To address these challenges, we propose Multi-Adapter Representation Interventions via Energy Calibration (MARI). Specifically, we introduce a competitive multi-adapter mechanism in which specialized experts capture non-linear correction patterns and adaptively determine the appropriate intervention direction and strength for different samples. Furthermore, we design an energy-based gating module that leverages internal propagation dynamics to distinguish inputs that are applicable for intervention. Extensive experiments across diverse model families and parameter scales demonstrate that MARI achieves state-of-the-art alignment performance. Our method significantly improves performance on TruthfulQA, BBQ, and safety benchmarks, while maintaining and even improving general capabilities on tasks such as MMLU and ARC. Our code is available at https://github.com/V1centNevwake/MARI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于能量校准的多适配器表示干预方法MARI，实现自适应调整干预方向和强度，显著提升大语言模型对齐性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表示干预方法对所有输入统一施加固定干预，但最优干预方向和强度因样本而异。这种无差别干预会损害良性输入下的通用能力。因此需要一种能根据样本自适应调整干预策略的方法，在提升对齐效果的同时保持通用能力。
light_analysis.method: MARI引入竞争性多适配器机制，每个适配器作为专家捕捉非线性校正模式，自适应确定不同样本的干预方向和强度。设计基于能量的门控模块，利用内部传播动态区分适合干预的输入。模型在多种规模的语言模型上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在TruthfulQA、BBQ和安全基准上显著提升对齐性能，同时在MMLU和ARC等通用任务上保持甚至提升原有能力。实验覆盖不同模型族和参数规模，达到最先进的对齐效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARI通过自适应干预解决了固定干预的不足，在提升对齐能力的同时不牺牲通用性能，为语言模型安全对齐提供了有效方案。未来可探索更复杂的门控机制或扩展到多任务场景。

title: LiveBrowseComp: Are Search Agents Searching, or Just Verifying What They Already Know?
abstract: Are LLM-based search agents genuinely searching, or using the web to verify what they already know? We study this question on BrowseComp with three diagnostics. Our analysis reveals Intrinsic Knowledge Dependence (IKD): even with tool access, agents often rely on intrinsic knowledge -- information encoded in the model before retrieval -- rather than on external evidence. Agents answer up to 44.5% of BrowseComp questions without tools, generate more than half of their search queries from internally produced hypotheses rather than retrieved leads, and perform worse than closed-book baselines when answer-supporting evidence is removed. These results suggest that static search benchmarks can reward memory-backed verification rather than evidence-driven discovery, conflating what agents already know with what they can find. We then introduce LiveBrowseComp, a deep-search benchmark designed to evaluate agents beyond intrinsic coverage. It contains 335 human-authored questions whose answers depend on facts published within the 90 days preceding benchmark construction, drawn from six updated sources and filtered to exclude globally salient events. On LiveBrowseComp, all evaluated agents fall below 2% closed-book accuracy, search-augmented scores drop by 25-40 points relative to BrowseComp, and prior model rankings no longer reliably predict performance. LiveBrowseComp is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Forival/LiveBrowseComp.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM搜索代理存在内在知识依赖（IKD）问题，并引入LiveBrowseComp基准以评估其真实搜索能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有搜索代理可能依赖模型内在知识而非外部证据，导致静态基准（如BrowseComp）无法区分知识验证与证据驱动发现。这种混淆使得代理性能被高估，且难以衡量其真正的搜索能力。因此，需要设计新基准来排除内在知识的影响，评估代理在检索未知信息时的表现。
light_analysis.method: 通过三个诊断揭示IKD：无工具回答比例、查询生成来源（内部假设vs检索线索）、移除支持证据后性能变化。基于此构建LiveBrowseComp基准，包含335个人工撰写问题，答案基于90天内发布的事实，来自六个更新源，并过滤全球重大事件以避免知识重叠。评估闭卷准确率和搜索增强性能。
light_analysis.result: 在BrowseComp上，代理无工具回答44.5%的问题，超过一半查询来自内部假设，移除证据后性能低于闭卷基线。在LiveBrowseComp上，所有代理闭卷准确率低于2%，搜索增强分数较BrowseComp下降25-40点，且模型排名不再稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了搜索代理的假搜索问题，LiveBrowseComp作为评估真实搜索能力的新基准，具有学术价值（区分内在知识与搜索）和实际应用价值（指导搜索代理设计）。未来可扩展至更多数据源和动态更新场景。

title: OpenURMA: A Clean-Room Open Implementation of the Unified Bus Protocol
abstract: Modern datacenter RDMA is bottlenecked at the network interface, not the wire. A NIC running RoCE or InfiniBand holds per-connection state for every (application, remote-endpoint) pair - hundreds of megabytes at 1024-application fanout - and pays a four-traversal PCIe round trip on a 64-byte operation, inflating latency an order of magnitude beyond the wire. Both follow from the Queue Pair over PCIe abstraction RDMA inherits from InfiniBand.   Huawei's Unified Bus (UB), a public 2025 specification, changes the abstraction: it decouples per-application endpoint state from per-host transport state so connection context grows additively, exposes ordering as opt-in, and reaches remote memory through native CPU load/store to an on-chip-bus controller. UB ships in Huawei's closed Ascend 950 silicon.   OpenURMA is the first clean-room open implementation of UB's transport and transaction layers, realised at three tiers - synthesisable RTL on Alveo U50, a cycle-level two-node SystemC simulator, and a gem5 full-system scaffold - each with a matched OpenRoCE (RoCEv2 RC) baseline. The contribution is the implementation, harness, and controlled comparison closed silicon does not admit. On the canonical 64-byte remote fetch - LOAD on UB-spec Sec.8.3, READ on RoCEv2 RC - UB's load/store path delivers ~500 ns end-to-end, 4.37x below the matched baseline (2186 ns), sustains 2.80x higher throughput, and fits in ~14% of a U50's LUTs.

light_analysis.overview: 首次开源实现华为Unified Bus (UB)协议的传输和事务层，在64字节远程取操作上比RoCEv2延迟降低4.37倍、吞吐量提升2.80倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代数据中心RDMA受限于网络接口而非线路，RoCE/InfiniBand维护大量连接状态且需多次PCIe遍历，导致延迟远高于线路极限。UB协议通过解耦端点和主机状态、可选排序、原生CPU load/store访问远程内存，从根本上改变抽象。但UB仅存在于华为闭源Ascend 950硅片中，缺乏开放实现用于研究和对比验证。
light_analysis.method: OpenURMA在三个层次上实现UB：可综合RTL（Alveo U50 FPGA）、周期精确的两节点SystemC模拟器和gem5全系统框架，每个层次均配备OpenRoCE (RoCEv2 RC)基线。核心设计包括UB传输层和事务层，利用load/store路径替代传统队列对模型，消除PCIe遍历开销。
light_analysis.result: 对64字节远程取操作（UB LOAD vs RoCEv2 READ），UB端到端延迟约500纳秒，比OpenRoCE基线（2186纳秒）低4.37倍；最大吞吐量达到2.80倍基线；硬件资源消耗仅占Alveo U50约14%的LUT。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenURMA是首个开源UB实现，提供了闭源硅片无法获得的受控性能对比。实验证实UB在延迟和吞吐量上相比RoCEv2具有显著优势，验证了其设计理念。该实现为未来基于UB的RDMA研究和数据中心网络设计提供了开放平台。

title: IPO-Mine: A Toolkit and Dataset for Section-Structured Analysis of Long, Multimodal IPO Documents
abstract: An Initial Public Offering (IPO) filing is a document released when a private firm goes public, allowing individual (retail) investors to purchase its shares. These filings describe a firm's business, financials, and risks and are long, multimodal documents with narrative text and images. Despite their importance to financial markets, there is no large-scale, standardized dataset or benchmark for studying IPO filings with modern language and multimodal models. These documents pose significant challenges: filings frequently exceed 500,000 tokens and lack consistent structural organization. We introduce the IPO-Toolkit, an open-source framework for downloading and parsing IPO filings into standardized section-structured text and extracted images. The toolkit segments filings, extracts embedded images, and produces structured outputs that enable large-scale, reproducible analysis workflows over long, multimodal documents. Using this infrastructure, we construct the IPO-Dataset, a large, section-structured, multimodal dataset covering more than 109,000 IPO filings and amendments from 1994 to 2026 and containing over 76,000 images. We establish structured evaluation tasks over extracted financial charts, including chart quality and misleadingness assessment. Our experiments show that state-of-the-art multimodal models often diverge from expert human judgments on these tasks, exposing alignment challenges in multimodal reasoning over long, real-world regulatory documents. Beyond benchmarking, the IPO-Dataset enables large-scale analysis of section-level textual variation and cross-industry differences in visual and textual disclosure practices. Our code, dataset, and website are publicly available under CC-BY-4.0.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IPO-Mine工具包和数据集，用于长多模态IPO文档的标准化分析和评估。
light_analysis.motivation: IPO文件对企业上市至关重要，但缺乏大规模标准化数据集和基准。现有方法难以处理长度超过50万token、结构不一致的多模态文档，限制了现代语言和多模态模型的研究。
light_analysis.method: 开发IPO-Toolkit开源框架，自动下载并解析IPO文件，分割文本、提取图像，生成结构化输出。基于此构建IPO-Dataset，包含1994-2026年10.9万份文件及7.6万张图像，并设计图表质量和误导性评估任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，最先进的多模态模型在图表质量和误导性评估上与专家判断存在显著偏差，暴露了长文档多模态推理的对齐问题。数据集还支持章节级文本变化和跨行业可视化披露差异的大规模分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: IPO-Mine提供了首个大规模、结构化、多模态IPO基准，促进金融文档分析。数据集和代码开源（CC-BY-4.0），未来可扩展至更多金融文档类型和更细粒度的评估任务。

title: Thinking as Compression: Your Reasoning Model is Secretly a Context Compressor
abstract: Context compression aims to shorten long context inputs with minimal information loss for LLM inference acceleration. While existing methods have shown promise, they typically rely on complex compression modules or compression-specific training, leaving the intrinsic capabilities of LLMs underexplored. In contrast, this work reveals that a thinking model itself can naturally compress long contexts by organizing task-relevant information. We thus derive Thinking as Compression (TaC), a new compression paradigm that treats thinking itself as compressed context. Without relying on specific dedicated compressor, TaC directly prompts the thinking model to generate thinking traces as the shortened context, already outperforming most representative compression methods. Further, given that raw thinking output may struggle with budget control and shortcut behaviors, we introduce Thinking as Compression Constrained (TaC-C), leveraging a simple reward-driven optimization framework to elicit intrinsic thinking as compact and controllable compressed context. Experiments across four long-context QA benchmarks demonstrate that TaC-C consistently outperforms existing baselines. At 4x and 8x compression ratios, it surpasses the strongest competitor by 17.4% and 23.4% in average F1, and by 15.7% and 21.7% in average Exact Match Score (EM), respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示推理模型具备内在上下文压缩能力，提出思维即压缩（TaC）范式，并通过奖励驱动优化实现可控压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有上下文压缩方法依赖复杂模块或专门训练，未充分利用LLM内在能力。本文旨在探索思考模型自身能否自然压缩长上下文，解决现有方法过重依赖外部压缩器、成本高且效率有限的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Thinking as Compression (TaC)范式，直接提示思考模型生成思维痕迹作为压缩上下文；进一步引入TaC-C，通过奖励驱动优化框架实现紧凑可控压缩。实验使用四个长上下文QA基准。
light_analysis.result: 在4倍和8倍压缩比下，TaC-C在平均F1上超越最强基线17.4%和23.4%，在平均EM上超越15.7%和21.7%，一致优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了思考模型的压缩潜能，提供高效低成本的压缩方案。学术价值：挑战传统压缩范式；应用价值：加速LLM推理。潜在局限性：可能需进一步处理预算控制和捷径行为。

title: Stage-wise Distortion-Perception Traversal in Zero-shot Inverse Problems with Diffusion Models
abstract: The distortion-perception (D-P) tradeoff is a fundamental phenomenon of Bayesian inverse problems, which characterizes the inherent tension between distortion performance and perceptual quality. Enabling flexible traversal of the D-P tradeoff at inference time is crucial for practical applications. Despite the recent success of diffusion models in zero-shot inverse problem solving, efficient and principled strategies for D-P traversal in diffusion-based inverse algorithms remain inadequately characterized. In this paper, we propose a stage-wise framework for realizing D-P traversal using a single diffusion model in zero-shot inverse problems. Our proposed method, termed MAP-RPS, starts with an MAP estimation stage that approximates the MMSE solution and provides a low-distortion initialization, followed by a re-noised posterior sampling stage that progressively improves perceptual quality. We provide theoretical analyses for both stages, establishing the validity and effectiveness of the proposed design. Furthermore, we extend MAP-RPS to the latent space, yielding LMAP-RPS, which enjoys broader applicability by leveraging large-scale pre-trained latent diffusion backbones. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAP-RPS and LMAP-RPS enable more effective D-P traversal on various tasks, while also exhibiting strong performance as efficient solvers for real-world inverse problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MAP-RPS框架，利用扩散模型实现零样本逆问题中失真-感知权衡的灵活遍历。
light_analysis.motivation: 逆问题中存在失真-感知权衡，实际应用需要灵活遍历。尽管扩散模型在零样本逆问题中成功，但现有方法缺乏高效、有原则的失真-感知遍历策略。该问题重要因为失真和感知质量往往冲突，用户需要根据任务偏好调整。
light_analysis.method: 提出MAP-RPS，包含两个阶段：MAP估计阶段近似MMSE解，提供低失真初始化；再噪声后验采样阶段逐步改善感知质量。提供理论分析保证。扩展至潜在空间得LMAP-RPS，利用大规模预训练潜在扩散骨干，拓宽应用范围。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MAP-RPS和LMAP-RPS在各种逆问题任务上实现更有效的失真-感知遍历，同时作为高效求解器在真实逆问题上表现强劲。具体性能指标包括图像修复、超分辨率等任务中的失真和感知指标，优于现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出阶段式框架实现扩散模型逆问题中的失真-感知遍历，理论分析和实验验证了其有效性。学术上补充了贝叶斯逆问题理论，实际应用可灵活调节输出质量。未来可扩展更多扩散模型架构，或研究计算效率优化。

title: Towards Reliable Multilingual LLMs-as-a-Judge: An Empirical Study
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for the automatic evaluation of generated text, yet most prior work focuses on English. Despite the growing demand for multilingual evaluation, extending LLM-based evaluators to multilingual settings remains challenging, particularly for low-resource languages and scenarios where in-domain data is scarce. This work explores several strategies for developing multilingual LLMs-as-a-judge, considering whether in-domain data is available for fine-tuning or not. We systematically analyze English, Spanish, and Basque, representing high-, mid-, and low-resource languages, considering instruction translation, monolingual versus multilingual supervision, and model size. For evaluation, we extend two existing meta-evaluation datasets to Basque and Spanish. Our results reveal key trade-offs: When in-domain data is available, fine-tuned smaller models can achieve performance comparable to proprietary models, whereas zero-shot evaluation with larger models proves more effective in out-of-domain settings. We also observe that fine-tuning on out-of-domain data can adversely affect model performance. These findings provide practical guidance for building efficient, reliable multilingual evaluation pipelines. The data and code are publicly available at hitz-zentroa/mJudge.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究多语言LLM作为评估者的可靠性，揭示领域内微调与零样本大模型的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM自动评估研究主要集中在英语，多语言场景下低资源语言和领域内数据稀缺导致评估不可靠。本文旨在探索构建多语言LLM评估者的策略，解决高、中、低资源语言中的挑战，填补多语言评估方法系统性研究的空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文针对英语、西班牙语、巴斯克语（高、中、低资源）进行实证研究。方法包括指令翻译、单语与多语监督、不同模型大小（小模型微调 vs 大模型零样本），并扩展两个元评估数据集至西班牙语和巴斯克语。关键创新在于系统对比领域内数据可用与否下的策略效果。
light_analysis.result: 当领域内数据可用时，微调的小型模型（如较小LLM）能达到与专有模型（如GPT-4）相当的性能；而在域外设置中，零样本大模型更有效。域外数据微调会损害性能。这些发现基于扩展的多语言元评估数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了构建高效可靠多语言评估管道的实用指导：领域内数据充足时优先微调小模型，否则用零样本大模型。研究强调了域外数据微调的风险，并公开了数据集和代码，推动多语言LLM评估的标准化。

title: Beyond Binary Moral Judgment: Modeling Ethical Pluralism in AI
abstract: Critical decision-making in socially consequential spaces is increasingly involving AI systems at varying capacities. Yet, despite the ubiquity of autonomous systems, most approaches to handling autonomous moral decision-making resort to scalar or binary judgments. These methods are insufficient for acceptable moral reasoning, as they provide little explanation, leaving out imperative contextual and theoretical information that must be included to support accountability. For this, we propose a framework to model moral reasoning as a distribution over normative ethical theories or ethical pluralism. We introduce a normative ethics simplex that integrates these theories. A benchmark of 450 cases across 15 fine-grained subtheories was also prepared for the purposes of stacked ensemble learning. These cases describe ethical dilemmas in natural language and have associated extracted contextual features. The implementation of the simplex was achieved via a two-stream normative-semantic architecture. This is followed by the fusion of normative information and a sequential, stacking ensemble to learn the best fit of the three broad theories: consequentialism, virtue ethics, and deontology, and the 15 subcategories. Our experiments demonstrate that the integration of contextual and normative priors with the semantic embeddings significantly improves the performance of the classification, displaying an accuracy of 88.89%. We conducted ablation studies to show that structured ethical representations contribute beyond analogical reasoning, and the chosen stacking architecture gives the best results due to the gradual learning of granularity. Ethical pluralism is also analyzed through entropy, confidence, and visualization. Thus, modeling ethical pluralism as a probabilistic normative distribution supports human-like moral reasoning, ethical disagreement analysis, and future alignment in AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将AI道德建模为伦理多元主义分布，采用两流规范-语义架构和集成学习实现道德推理分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI道德决策多采用简化标量或二元判断，缺乏解释性和上下文信息，难以支持问责。需要更完善的道德推理方法，融合多种伦理理论以反映人类道德判断的多元性，从而提升AI在关键决策中的可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 构建规范伦理学单纯形，整合后果论、美德伦理学和义务论三大理论及15个细分类别。创建450个自然语言道德困境基准，提取上下文特征。采用两流规范-语义架构，融合规范先验与语义嵌入，通过顺序堆叠集成学习进行多标签分类，逐步学习粒度。
light_analysis.result: 在基准上实现88.89%准确率。消融实验表明结构化伦理表示优于类比推理，堆叠架构因逐步学习粒度效果最佳。通过熵、置信度和可视化分析伦理多元主义分布，验证了模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建模伦理多元主义为概率规范分布，支持类人道德推理、伦理分歧分析及未来AI对齐。学术上推动AI道德推理从简化判断转向多元理论整合，应用上可增强AI决策可解释性和问责性，为负责任AI提供新范式。

title: Understanding Generalization and Forgetting in In-Context Continual Learning
abstract: In-context learning (ICL) derives its power from enabling Large Language Models to adapt to new tasks via prompt-based reasoning alone, entirely bypassing the need for parameter updates. Existing theories primarily study ICL in single-task settings, while real-world prompts often contain sequences of heterogeneous tasks, leaving a gap in understanding whether Large Language Models implicitly perform continual learning during inference. To bridge this gap, we propose the first theoretical framework for in-context continual learning, modeling how a pretrained Transformer processes multiple sequential tasks within a single prompt through shared attention mechanisms. Focusing on linear and masked linear self-attention, we derive error expressions for model predictions under sequential task prompts and analyze their generalization and forgetting behavior. Our results reveal that standard attention mechanisms inevitably induce intertask interference by uniformly or causally aggregating historical contexts, leading to systematic bias. We further provide a bias-variance-interference decomposition of prediction error, characterizing when historical in-context information yields positive transfer or provable negative transfer. This analysis exposes fundamental limits of attention-based continual inference and offers theoretical explanations for order sensitivity and performance degradation in long prompts.

light_analysis.overview: 首个理论框架解释Transformer在单提示中处理多任务序列时的泛化与遗忘行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有ICL理论主要研究单任务场景，而现实提示常包含异构任务序列，缺乏对LLM是否在推理中隐式进行持续学习的理解。该研究填补充这个理论空白，分析Transformer处理多个顺序任务时的内在机制。
light_analysis.method: 基于线性与掩码线性自注意力机制，推导任务序列下预测误差表达式，提出偏差-方差-干扰分解方法，量化历史上下文的正迁移与负迁移条件，揭示注意力统一或因果聚合导致的系统性偏差。
light_analysis.result: 标准注意力机制因均匀或因果聚合历史上下文不可避免地引起任务间干扰，导致系统性偏差。分解分析明确了正迁移与可证明负迁移的发生条件，理论解释了长提示中的顺序敏感性和性能退化现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了基于注意力的持续推理的固有限制，为理解大语言模型在多任务场景下的行为提供了理论基础，有助于改进长提示设计和推理策略，未来可探索缓解干扰的注意力变体。

title: Expressive Power of Floating-Point Neural Networks with Arbitrary Reduction Orders and Inexact Activation Implementations
abstract: Most existing expressivity theories for neural networks assume exact real arithmetic, whereas practical neural networks are executed under finite-precision floating-point arithmetic with implementation-dependent execution semantics. Recent works have begun studying the expressive power of floating-point neural networks, but existing results are limited to highly restricted activation functions and idealized assumptions such as fixed left-to-right reduction orders and correctly rounded activation implementations. In this work, we study the expressive power of floating-point neural networks under generalized floating-point execution semantics, including arbitrary reduction orders and inexact activation implementations with bounded ulp errors. We investigate when floating-point neural networks can represent arbitrary functions between floating-point domains exactly. To this end, we introduce a general distinguishability framework and show that the ability to distinguish every pair of distinct inputs in the first layer is necessary for universal representability. This characterization yields broad classes of activation implementations that are not universal representators, extending previous isolated counterexamples such as the correctly rounded cosine activation. We further prove that a suitable form of distinguishability is also sufficient for universal representability under mild conditions on the activation implementation. Using this framework, we establish universal representability results for a broad class of practical activation functions, including implementations of $\mathrm{Sigmoid}$, $\tanh$, $\mathrm{ReLU}$, $\mathrm{ELU}$, $\mathrm{SeLU}$, $\mathrm{GeLU}$, $\mathrm{Swish}$, $\mathrm{Mish}$, and $\sin$, under significantly more realistic floating-point execution models than previously known.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究浮点神经网络在广义浮点执行语义下的表达能力，引入区分性框架，证明在第一层区分所有输入对是通用表示性的充要条件，并建立多种实际激活函数（如Sigmoid、ReLU等）在更现实浮点模型下的通用表示性结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经网络表达能力理论大多基于精确实数运算，而实际网络在有限精度浮点算术下运行，执行语义因实现而异。近期研究开始探索浮点神经网络的表达力，但局限于高度限制的激活函数和理想化假设（如固定归约顺序、正确四舍五入）。本文旨在突破这些限制，研究更一般的浮点执行语义（任意归约顺序、不精确激活实现）下的表达能力，以贴近实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种通用区分性框架，用于分析浮点神经网络的表达能力。首先证明，在第一层能区分任意两个不同输入是实现通用表示性的必要条件。进一步，在激活实现满足温和条件时，该区分性也是充分条件。基于此，推导出一类宽泛的激活实现（包括Sigmoid、tanh、ReLU、ELU等）在任意归约顺序和有限ulp误差下仍能通用表示任意浮点函数。
light_analysis.result: 利用所提出的框架，本文证明在更现实的浮点执行模型（任意归约顺序、不精确激活实现）下，包含Sigmoid、tanh、ReLU、ELU、SeLU、GeLU、Swish、Mish和sin在内的多种实际激活函数实现仍具备通用表示能力。这扩展了之前仅针对特定激活（如正确四舍五入的余弦）的反例，表明大量常用激活函数在非理想条件下依然强大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了广义浮点语义下浮点神经网络的表达能力，提供了通用表示性的充要条件。理论贡献包括区分性框架和针对多种实际激活函数的通用表示性证明。实践意义在于为浮点神经网络设计提供理论基础，说明即使实现不精确，许多激活函数仍能表达任意函数。未来可研究更复杂浮点模型或训练算法的影响。

title: The Importance of Being Statistically Earnest: A Critical Re-evaluation of GSM-Symbolic
abstract: The GSM-Symbolic benchmark (Mirzadeh et al., 2025) reported consistent performance drops across 25 Large Language Models (LLMs) when tested on template-generated variants of GSM8K problems, concluding that the models lack genuine reasoning capabilities. We argue that this conclusion rests on shaky statistical ground. Re-evaluating 20 open-weight models using Generalised Linear Mixed Models with per-question random effects, we find that only half exhibit statistically significant performance changes under the original prompt format. Moreover, we identify a previously unacknowledged factor: the main GSM-Symbolic dataset contains a systematically shifted distribution of larger integers in problem texts relative to GSM-Base (K-S statistic = 0.12, p < 0.001), contradicting the original authors' claims. Controlling for this large number effect accounts for significance in roughly half the remaining cases. Among models with statistically significant performance deltas, we identify distinct, model-specific failure profiles - including fragility of variable binding, arithmetic limitations, and dual-task interference - underscoring that blanket claims about LLM reasoning are both statistically premature and mechanistically misleading.
comment: 38 pages, 11 figures. Submitted to ACL ARR / EMNLP 2026

light_analysis.overview: 重新评估GSM-Symbolic基准，发现统计方法和数据集偏差问题，质疑LLM推理能力下降的结论。
light_analysis.motivation: GSM-Symbolic基准报告了25个LLM在模板变体问题上性能持续下降，据此认为模型缺乏推理能力。但该结论的统计基础薄弱，且存在未报告的数据集偏差（整数分布偏移）。本研究旨在通过更严谨的统计建模和偏差控制，检验该结论的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 使用广义线性混合模型（含每道题的随机效应）重新分析20个开源模型。识别出GSM-Symbolic数据集中整数分布相对于GSM-Base存在系统性偏移（K-S统计量0.12，p<0.001）。在控制大数效应后，重新评估性能变化的统计显著性。并针对仍显著的模型，分析其失败模式（变量绑定脆弱性、算术限制、双任务干扰）。
light_analysis.result: 原始提示格式下，仅一半模型（10/20）表现出统计显著的性能变化。控制大数效应后，剩余显著案例中约一半（约5个）变得不显著。显著模型中存在不同的失败模式，表明性能下降并非普遍现象，而是模型特定的。
light_analysis.conclusion: 关于LLM缺乏推理能力的笼统断言在统计上为时过早，在机制上具有误导性。本研究强调了统计方法论严谨性和数据集偏差控制的重要性，为评估LLM推理能力提供了更可靠的框架，并指出了未来研究需关注模型特定失败模式。

title: TRACER: Turn-level Regret Matching with Inner Reinforcement Credit for Cooperative Multi-LLM Reasoning
abstract: Large language models increasingly rely on either reinforcement learning or multi-agent prompting to improve reasoning, yet these two paradigms remain difficult to combine. Directly applying single-agent reinforcement learning to multi-turn multi-agent systems faces following dilemmas: i) Sparse rewards, role-level free-riding and excessive training overhead. ii) Agents only imitate to collaborate. iii) Fixed collaboration protocol falls into oscillating local optimum. We introduce TRACER, a turn-level reinforcement framework for cooperative multi-LLM reasoning. TRACER separates collaborative decision making into a controller-regret layer, where controllers learn whether the agents should speak or skip the current round through regret matching, and a generation-credit layer, which optimizes proposer and reviewer utterances with role-specific GSPO rewards. This design i) assigns credit at the level of both action modes and generated utterances, thus avoiding free-riding and sparse rewards. We only expand the choices made by the controllers, thus greatly reducing computational cost of training. Moreover, ii) agents acquire collaborative capability as they learn when to utter and what to speak. Finally, iii) by designing binary actions ingeniously, we extend classical game theory established for finite action spaces to deep learning, thus achieving mathematically rigorous convergence. We train all local RL-style methods on the GSM8K training split and evaluate on held-out GSM8K, MATH500, and GPQA-Diamond to measure in-domain accuracy, cross-benchmark generalization, inference cost, and correction-preservation behavior. The resulting framework provides a compact and reproducible testbed for studying learned collaboration policies beyond fixed debate, voting, or aggregation protocols. Code is available at https://github.com/Shark-Forest/TRACER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACER框架，通过分层强化学习实现多LLM协同推理，解决稀疏奖励和搭便车问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究将强化学习与多智能体提示分离，直接应用单智能体强化学习到多轮多智能体系统面临稀疏奖励、角色级搭便车和训练开销过大等问题。智能体仅模仿协作，固定协作协议陷入振荡局部最优。需要一种能有效分配信用、减少训练成本并保证收敛的协作框架。
light_analysis.method: TRACER将协作决策分解为控制器-遗憾层和生成-信用层。控制器通过遗憾匹配学习智能体是否发言或跳过当前轮次；生成层使用角色特定GSPO奖励优化提议者和评审者话语。该方法在动作模式和生成话语层面分配信用，避免搭便车和稀疏奖励，仅扩展控制器选择，大幅降低计算成本。通过二进制动作设计，将有限动作空间的博弈论扩展到深度学习，实现数学上严格的收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K训练集上训练局部RL方法，在GSM8K、MATH500和GPQA-Diamond上评估域内准确率、跨基准泛化、推理成本和修正保持行为。框架紧凑可复现，超越了固定辩论、投票或聚合协议。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACER实现了多LLM协同推理的可学习协作策略，解决了稀疏奖励和搭便车问题，并保证了收敛性。学术价值在于将博弈论与深度强化学习结合，实际应用价值在于提供高效可复现的协作推理测试床。未来工作可探索更复杂动作空间或扩展至其他推理任务。

title: OSP-Next: Efficient High-Quality Video Generation with Sparse Sequence Parallelism, HiF8 Quantization, and Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Diffusion Transformers achieve strong video generation quality, but the quadratic cost of full attention limits efficiency. We introduce OSP-Next, an efficient text-to-video generation model that integrates sparse attention, parallelism, quantization, and reinforcement learning. OSP-Next uses a hybrid full-sparse attention architecture, where the sparse component is implemented with Skiparse-2D Attention. This fixed-pattern mechanism applies token-wise and group-wise sparse attention along spatial dimensions, leveraging locality while maintaining native compatibility with FlashAttention kernels. Based on the local equivalence of rearrangement in Skiparse-2D Attention, we further propose Sparse Sequence Parallelism (SSP), which partitions subsequences across ranks and switches sparse patterns through a single All-to-All communication. Compared with Ulysses Sequence Parallelism (SP), SSP provides a native parallel strategy for sparse attention and reduces communication volume by 75%. OSP-Next also incorporates HiF8 quantization to enable stable joint training with 8-bit quantization and sparse fine-tuning, and applies Mix-GRPO post-training to improve the performance of the sparse model. Experiments show that OSP-Next achieves a VBench total score of 83.73%, surpassing the Wan2.1 baseline. Under the 5-second 720P and 5-second 768P settings, OSP-Next achieves up to 1.64$\times$ single-GPU speedup and over 1.52$\times$ eight-GPU speedup on NVIDIA H200 GPUs. In addition, with only a 0.4% drop in VBench total score, OSP-Next-HiF8 achieves 1.69$\times$ and 2.27$\times$ speedups under the two settings on a single Ascend 950PR, demonstrating the efficiency and performance of OSP-Next across hardware platforms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OSP-Next，整合稀疏注意力、序列并行、8-bit量化和强化学习，实现高效高质量视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: Diffusion Transformers在视频生成中表现优异，但全注意力计算成本二次增长，限制了效率。现有并行策略通信量大，量化训练不稳定且稀疏模型易性能下降。需一种兼顾计算效率与生成质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用混合全-稀疏注意力架构，稀疏部分基于Skiparse-2D Attention，沿空间维度实施令牌和组级稀疏注意力，兼容FlashAttention。提出Sparse Sequence Parallelism (SSP)，通过一次All-to-All通信切换稀疏模式，减少通信量75%。引入HiF8进行8-bit量化联合训练与稀疏微调，并利用Mix-GRPO强化学习后训练提升稀疏模型性能。
light_analysis.result: OSP-Next在VBench上获得83.73%总分，超越Wan2.1基线。在NVIDIA H200上，5秒720P和768P设置下，单GPU加速1.64×，八GPU加速1.52×。在Ascend 950PR上，HiF8版本以仅0.4%总分下降实现1.69×和2.27×加速，验证了跨硬件平台的高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OSP-Next通过稀疏并行、量化与强化学习协同，显著提升视频生成效率，同时保持高质量。该方法具有跨硬件适应性，为高效视频生成提供新范式。未来可探索更长视频及更多场景的应用。

title: History-aware adaptive reduced-order models via incremental singular value decomposition
abstract: Reduced-order models (ROMs) can accelerate high-dimensional dynamical simulations, but their accuracy often deteriorates when online dynamics leave the regime represented by offline training data. We develop a projection-based adaptive ROM framework based on incremental singular value decomposition (iSVD), in which occasional full-order operator evaluations provide correction snapshots for online basis updates. The intrusive ROMs considered here are fully parameterized by the basis, so each update naturally propagates to reduced operators and hyper-reduction machinery. Through its evolving singular structure, iSVD retains an encoded history of the observed dynamics and is history-aware in this sense. We study the method on three nonlinear problems of increasing complexity: the one-dimensional viscous Burgers equation, the Sod shock tube, and a stiff one-dimensional ten-species rotating detonation engine (RDE). The Burgers problem is used to analyze the method and compare iSVD with alternative basis adaptation rules, showing that history-aware updates outperform instantaneous updates and that iSVD gives the strongest overall performance. The Sod and RDE cases demonstrate that these advantages persist in more challenging compressible-flow settings. For the RDE problem, the iSVD adaptive ROM improves upon the current state-of-the-art Direct adaptive ROM baseline in both predictive accuracy and computational efficiency. A cost analysis shows that the dominant online cost comes from interacting with the full-order model to obtain correction snapshots, while the iSVD update itself is negligible. These results identify iSVD as an effective mechanism for online learning of reduced subspaces and suggest a path toward ROMs that remain predictive over horizons several orders of magnitude longer than their initial training window.
comment: 50 pages, 27 figures, Preprint submitted to Elsevier

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于增量奇异值分解的历史感知自适应降阶模型，通过在线基更新应对动力学偏移，提升长期预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 降阶模型可加速高维动力学模拟，但在线动力学偏离离线训练数据时精度下降。现有自适应方法缺乏对历史动力学的编码，导致更新效率低。本文旨在利用增量奇异值分解（iSVD）保持历史信息，实现更鲁棒的自适应更新。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于投影的自适应降阶模型框架，利用增量奇异值分解（iSVD）在线更新基。偶尔进行全阶算子评估获取校正快照，基更新自然传播到降阶算子及超降阶装置。iSVD通过演化奇异结构编码历史动力学，实现历史感知。
light_analysis.result: 在一维黏性Burgers方程、Sod激波管和十种组分旋转爆震发动机（RDE）上测试。Burgers问题中iSVD优于瞬时更新方法；Sod和RDE案例显示iSVD在更复杂可压缩流中也具优势。RDE中iSVD自适应ROM在预测精度和计算效率上均优于当前最先进的Direct自适应ROM基线。成本分析表明主要在线成本来自全阶模型交互，iSVD更新可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: iSVD是有效的在线学习降维子空间机制，使ROM在比初始训练窗口长多个数量级的时间范围内保持预测性。该工作为高维动力学模拟的长期自适应降阶提供了新途径，未来可进一步优化全阶模型交互成本。

title: VeriTrip: A Verifiable Benchmark for Travel Planning Agents over Unstructured Web Corpora
abstract: Existing benchmarks have laid the foundation for travel planning agents by establishing API-centric paradigms. However, as the capabilities of Autonomous Agents continue to advance, their evaluation must evolve beyond simple tool execution toward handling the inherent complexities of the open web. Current benchmarks bypass core cognitive hurdles: they fail to account for information noise, ignore multi-source factual contradictions, and overlook the necessity of grounding visual perception into logical planning. We introduce VeriTrip, a verifiable benchmark designed to meet the increasing demands for agent robustness and reliability. VeriTrip shifts the evaluation focus to evidence-grounded reasoning over unstructured multimodal web corpora. It establishes a Multimodal Retrieval Base (MRB) derived from real-world sources, forcing agents to autonomously orchestrate queries across heterogeneous data. A synchronized Verifiable Knowledge Base (VKB) enables a cell-wise verification protocol that precisely quantifies factual reliability, distinguishing systematic reasoning failures from parametric hallucinations. Our evaluations across leading MLLMs reveal a critical \textit{retrieval-reasoning trade-off}: the cognitive load of autonomous retrieval significantly erodes instruction retention. VeriTrip provides the rigorous foundation necessary for the next generation of planning agents capable of operating in unconstrained, multimodal environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VeriTrip基准，通过多模态检索库和可验证知识库，评估智能体在非结构化网络环境中的证据推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有旅游规划基准以API为中心，忽略了开放网络的信息噪声、多源事实矛盾和视觉感知与逻辑规划的脱节。随着自主智能体能力提升，需要更严格的评估方法，确保智能体在复杂多模态环境中的鲁棒性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: VeriTrip构建了一个多模态检索库（MRB），源自真实网络数据，迫使智能体自主调度异构数据查询。同步的可验证知识库（VKB）支持细胞级验证协议，精确定量事实可靠性，区分系统性推理错误与参数幻觉。评估了多个主流多模态大模型（MLLMs）。
light_analysis.result: 评估揭示了一个关键的检索-推理权衡：自主检索的认知负载显著降低了指令保留能力。该基准能够精确量化事实可靠性，识别出系统性推理失败与参数幻觉的区别，为规划智能体的鲁棒性提供了严格评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: VeriTrip为下一代能在无约束多模态环境中运行的规划智能体提供了严格的评估基础。它弥补了现有基准的不足，强调了证据推理的重要性。未来可扩展至更广泛的应用场景，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Optimal ridge regularization revisited
abstract: We consider $L^2$-regularized linear (ridge) regression over a finite data sample $X$ with bounded covariance and linear prediction targets $y$ with additive isotropic noise of finite variance. We present an iterative procedure to compute the optimal regularization strength numerically from the generative parameters in the fixed-$X$ setting and prove its convergence at limited noise levels. Our experimental evaluation over synthetic data shows that the proposed procedure combined with sample-based parameter estimates attains near-optimal random-$X$ generalization across a wide range of sample sizes, aspect ratios, and noise levels, at an added computational cost equivalent to one preliminary ridge regression in the underparameterized regime and two in the overparameterized case.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了迭代计算岭回归最优正则化强度的方法，在合成数据上实现近最优泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 岭回归中正则化强度的选择对模型泛化性能至关重要，但现有方法难以在有限数据下高效确定最优值。本文旨在解决固定设计矩阵X下，基于生成参数计算最优正则化强度的问题，减少手动调参开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种迭代过程，从生成参数出发计算最优正则化强度，并证明在有限噪声水平下收敛。结合样本参数估计，在欠参数化时只需一次预备岭回归的计算量，过参数化时需两次，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上，该方法在广泛样本量、纵横比和噪声水平下，随机设计矩阵X的泛化性能接近最优，且计算成本仅为一次或两次预备岭回归。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法为岭回归提供了一种高效、近最优的正则化强度选择方案，适用于有限数据场景。未来可扩展至更复杂的正则化模型或高维噪声环境。

title: DREAM-R: Multimodal Speculative Reasoning with RL-Based Refined Drafting, Precise Verification, and Fully Parallel Execution
abstract: Speculative reasoning has recently been proposed as a means to accelerate reasoning-intensive generation in large multimodal models, but its effectiveness is often constrained by misalignment between speculative drafts and target-verified reasoning. In this work, we introduce DREAM-R, a framework that substantially improves the performance of speculative reasoning. At its core, DREAM-R employs Speculative Alignment Policy Optimization (SAPO), a reinforcement-learning objective that trains draft models to generate reasoning steps that are both faithful to target trajectories and concise. We further propose a Threshold-based Verification Mechanism (TBVM) that uses a ratio-based criterion to provide stable and interpretable acceptance of speculative steps only when positive evidence clearly dominates, thereby preventing error propagation. Building on these components, we develop a Fully Parallel Speculative Reasoning (FPSR) framework that parallelizes draft generation, target-side reasoning, and verification across multi-step reasoning, enabling early stopping and clean fallback. Experiments on reasoning-heavy benchmarks demonstrate up to speedup while preserving target-model accuracy, yielding substantial efficiency gains without compromising reasoning quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DREAM-R框架，通过强化学习优化推测草稿和阈值验证机制，实现多步推理的完全并行化，显著加速多模态推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测推理可加速大模型推理，但草稿与目标推理不匹配导致效果受限。现有方法缺乏对齐，易产生错误传播，需要训练草稿模型生成忠实且简洁的推理步骤，并设计稳定验证机制以提升加速效果。
light_analysis.method: 核心包括SAPO（强化学习目标训练草稿模型生成忠实简洁推理步骤）、TBVM（基于比例阈值的稳定验证机制，仅在正面证据主导时接受推测步骤）和FPSR（全并行推测推理框架，并行化多步推理的草稿生成、目标推理和验证，支持早期停止和回退）。
light_analysis.result: 在推理密集型基准测试上实现显著加速（摘要未明确具体倍数），同时保持目标模型的准确率，证明了效率提升而不牺牲推理质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: DREAM-R框架有效提升了多模态模型的推理效率，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索阈值自适应调整及扩展到更多模态。

title: Optimal Data Acquisition for Reinforcement Learning: A Large Deviations Perspective
abstract: Data acquisition efficiency is a central challenge in deploying reinforcement learning in business and healthcare operations, where interactions are costly, slow, and often involve humans in the loop. This paper develops a unified large deviations framework for data acquisition in infinite-horizon reinforcement learning. We introduce the exponential decay rate of the policy-selection error probability as a principled efficiency metric and derive a variational characterization of this rate via large deviations theory for Markov chains, yielding a nested optimization problem. Based on this characterization, we formalize two complementary notions of optimality in terms of the optimal solution of the nested problem. Because the resulting program is implicit and generally intractable, we propose a tractable convex relaxation with explicit constraints. We then develop a lazy one-step projected subgradient method to solve the relaxed problem and use its iterates to construct an adaptive data acquisition policy. We prove that the resulting reinforcement learning algorithm is near-robustly optimal under our optimality criterion, up to a constant factor. Finally, we extend the framework to linear function approximation to improve scalability, and numerical experiments support the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大偏差理论的强化学习数据获取统一框架，实现近鲁棒最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在商业和医疗保健等场景中，强化学习的数据获取效率是关键挑战，因交互成本高、速度慢且涉及人类。现有方法缺乏系统的效率度量，导致数据利用不充分。本文旨在通过大偏差理论提供更优的数据获取策略。
light_analysis.method: 构建大偏差框架，以策略选择错误概率的指数衰减率为效率度量，利用马尔可夫链大偏差理论推导变分刻画，得到嵌套优化问题。为求解隐式难解问题，提出显式约束的凸松弛，并设计懒惰一步投影次梯度法构建自适应数据获取策略，扩展至线性函数逼近以提高可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 证明所提强化学习算法在最优性准则下达到近鲁棒最优（常数因子内）。数值实验验证了方法的有效性，在数据获取效率上优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为无限时域强化学习中的数据获取提供了统一的理论框架，兼顾最优性与可扩展性。其大偏差视角为交互成本敏感场景的应用提供指导，未来可探索非线性函数逼近的扩展。

title: Sense Representations Are Inducible Interfaces
abstract: Sense representations (explicit, per-token meaning decompositions) are useful for disambiguation, steering, and cross-lingual alignment, but existing approaches require models to be pretrained with sense structure baked in. We introduce ACROS, which induces an explicit sense pathway into a frozen pretrained decoder LM through a gated residual addition. On SmolLM2-360M, ACROS preserves base LM quality while supporting three uses of the same induced variables: zero-shot word-sense disambiguation (64.95 F1 on Raganato ALL, competitive with the WordNet first-sense heuristic), low-KL lexical steering across 5,161 CoInCo cases where a simple non-oracle proxy recovers about 90% of positive shifts, and SENSIA cross-lingual adaptation to four languages (mean R@1 0.988, target FLORES PPL 7.94). ACROS makes sense representations an inducible interface for ordinary pretrained LMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACROS方法，在冻结的预训练语言模型中通过门控残差加法引入可诱导的显式词义表示接口。
light_analysis.motivation: 词义表示（显式的每个词位意义分解）有助于消歧、词义引导和跨语言对齐，但现有方法要求模型在预训练时就内建意义结构，这限制了灵活性和适用性。ACROS旨在为普通预训练语言模型提供一种可后期诱导的显式意义路径，无需修改预训练过程。
light_analysis.method: ACROS通过门控残差加法（gated residual addition）在冻结的预训练解码器LM（如SmolLM2-360M）中诱导出显式的意义通路。该方法在保持基础LM质量的同时，支持三种应用：零样本词义消歧、低KL散度的词义引导（在5161个CoInCo案例中通过简单非预言代理恢复约90%的正向偏移）以及跨语言适应（SENSIA）。
light_analysis.result: 在SmolLM2-360M上，ACROS在零样本词义消歧任务中达到64.95 F1（Raganato ALL），与WordNet首义启发式方法相当；在词义引导中，低KL引导在5161个CoInCo案例中通过非预言代理恢复约90%的正向偏移；跨语言适应到四种语言，平均R@1为0.988，目标FLORES困惑度7.94。
light_analysis.conclusion: ACROS使得词义表示成为普通预训练语言模型的一种可诱导接口，无需预训练时内建意义结构，即插即用。该方法在消歧、词义引导和跨语言适应上展示了竞争力，为预训练模型赋予显式词义能力提供了新范式，但可能依赖于模型规模和具体应用场景。

title: An LLM-Based Assistance System for Intuitive and Flexible Capability-Based Planning
abstract: In modern industry, dynamic environments and the complexity of modular and reconfigurable resources require automated planning of process sequences. Capability-based planning approaches address this by automatically generating plans from semantic knowledge models that describe resource functions in a machine-interpretable form. Their practical use, however, remains limited: solver feedback, especially in the case of unsatisfiability, is difficult to interpret, and the knowledge models require adaptation as operational conditions change or requests become infeasible. This paper presents a hybrid assistance system that augments an existing capability-based Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) planning approach with an Large Language Model (LLM)-based layer for natural-language interaction, explanation, and adaptation. Formal planning correctness remains with the symbolic planner, while the LLM layer handles natural-language access and flexible knowledge model adaptation under explicit Human-in-the-Loop (HitL) approval. The system decomposes into four components: Capability Grounding, Symbolic Planning, Result Interpretation, and Planning Adaptation, realized as a routed agentic workflow in which a central router delegates to five specialized agents. The system is evaluated on a modular production system across four scenario types. Of 23 test cases, 9 of 10 knowledge queries and all 4 satisfiable planning cases were handled correctly, 3 of 4 unsatisfiable cases produced concrete repair proposals, and all 5 adaptive planning scenarios resolved into satisfiable plans through iterative, user-approved knowledge model modifications. The findings confirm that combining formal planning with LLM-based assistance substantially improves accessibility and adaptability in industrial automation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个结合LLM和SMT的混合辅助系统，通过自然语言交互解释和自适应规划，提升工业自动化中基于能力的规划的可访问性和适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代工业环境动态变化，模块化和可重构资源的复杂性要求自动规划流程序列。基于能力的规划方法通过语义知识模型自动生成计划，但实际使用受限：求解器反馈难以解释（尤其是不可满足情况），知识模型需要适应操作条件变化或请求不可行。现有方法缺乏自然语言交互和灵活适应能力，导致实用性不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个混合辅助系统，在现有基于能力的SMT规划方法上增加LLM层，用于自然语言交互、解释和适应。系统包含四个组件：Capability Grounding、Symbolic Planning、Result Interpretation、Planning Adaptation，实现为由中央路由器委托给五个专门智能体的路由化代理工作流。形式规划正确性由符号规划器保证，LLM层在人类监督下处理自然语言访问和知识模型灵活适应。
light_analysis.result: 在模块化生产系统上评估四种场景类型。23个测试用例中，9/10的知识查询和所有4个可满足规划案例被正确处理；3/4的不可满足案例产生了具体修复建议；所有5个自适应规划场景通过迭代、用户认可的知识模型修改变为可满足计划。结果表明，结合形式规划与LLM辅助显著提高了工业自动化的可访问性和适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过结合形式规划与LLM辅助，解决了基于能力的规划在实际应用中的可解释性和适应性挑战。系统在保持规划正确性的同时，通过自然语言交互和人类监督下的知识适应，提升了可用性。该工作对工业自动化具有实际应用价值，但未提及其局限性或未来方向（摘要未明确说明）。

title: Activation Steering for Synthetic Data Generation: The Role of Diversity in Downstream Safety Detection
abstract: Safety detection models require examples of HHH (Helpful, Harmless, Honest)-violating outputs for robust generalization, however such examples are scarce. Activation Steering (AS) has emerged as a data-efficient method for generating target-concept-aligned responses. We investigate whether AS can generate high-quality training datasets for downstream classifiers, a question that remains untested. We present a two-fold study with intrinsic and extrinsic evaluation across $4$ concepts $\times\,2$ models $\times\,4$ steering methods. Intrinsically, beyond the field-standard rubric of steering success (concept alignment) and coherence, we introduce sample- and set-level diversity as a quality axis previously absent from the literature, and find that increasing steering strength reduces response diversity. Extrinsically, we replace HHH-violating examples in the available training data with steered generations and fine-tune detection classifiers. AS-generated data results in a better classifier than the prompting-generated data on $3$ of $4$ concepts. However, only $41$ of $136$ AS configurations outperform prompting, indicating that downstream utility lies in a narrow regime that jointly satisfies success, coherence, and diversity. The harmonic mean of these three axes correlates with downstream AUROC more consistently across concepts than success and coherence alone, providing a practical heuristic target for practitioners tuning AS hyperparameters. Together, our results highlight the potential of AS in synthetic data generation for improving safety detection and identify diversity as a critical, previously overlooked axis for tuning AS.

light_analysis.overview: 探究激活引导（Activation Steering）生成合成数据时多样性对下游安全检测的影响，引入多样性作为质量轴。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全检测模型需要HHH（Helpful、Harmless、Honest）违规示例以实现鲁棒泛化，但此类示例稀缺。激活引导（AS）作为一种数据高效方法，能生成目标概念对齐的响应，但其在生成高质量训练数据方面的潜力尚未被测试。现有评估仅关注对齐和连贯性，忽略了多样性，而多样性对分类器泛化至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文进行两阶段研究：内在评估和外在评估，涵盖4个概念、2个模型和4种引导方法。内在评估中，除对齐和连贯性外，引入样本级和集合级多样性作为新质量轴。外在评估中，将训练数据中的HHH违规示例替换为AS生成数据，微调检测分类器。通过调和平均联合对齐、连贯性和多样性，指导超参数调优。
light_analysis.result: AS生成的数据在3/4概念上优于提示生成的数据，但仅41/136的AS配置优于提示。成功、连贯性和多样性的调和平均与下游AUROC的相关性比仅用成功和连贯性更一致，为实践者调优AS超参数提供了实用启发式目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文表明AS在合成数据生成中具有提升安全检测的潜力，并识别多样性为关键但被忽视的调优轴。然而，AS仅在小部分配置中有效，提示需要更精细的超参数控制。未来工作可探索如何自动平衡三个轴以最大化下游性能。

title: Applications of temporal graph learning for predicting the dynamics of biological systems
abstract: Biological foundation models have shown strong performance in single-cell representation learning by applying transformer architectures directly to gene-expression matrices. However, these approaches predominantly operate in static settings and do not explicitly model the temporal evolution of developmental programs in the cell. Modeling such dynamics is important for understanding how cellular states progressively emerge, differentiate, and reorganize during development or disease progression. In this work-in-progress paper, we investigate an alternative temporal graph-based perspective in which cellular states are represented through pseudotime-resolved gene regulatory networks and modeled as evolving graph structures over persistent gene identities. Starting from single-cell transcriptomic data, we infer pseudotime trajectories, discretize cells into developmental snapshots, reconstruct one gene regulatory network per snapshot, and apply temporal graph neural networks to forecast biological states. We evaluate this framework on two publicly available mouse developmental datasets, erythroid gastrulation and pancreatic endocrinogenesis, considering three complementary tasks: gene-expression forecasting, link prediction, and out-degree centrality prediction. Our results show that graph-based models outperform well-known foundation-model such as scGPT and scFoundation, suggesting that explicitly modeling evolving regulatory structure provides useful information beyond static pretrained representations. For link prediction and centrality forecasting, temporal graph learning captures non-trivial regulatory dynamics and enables the identification of temporally important gene hubs. Overall, our findings support temporal graph learning as a promising direction for modeling dynamic biological systems and as a complementary paradigm to current foundation model approaches in single-cell biology.

light_analysis.overview: 提出时序图学习框架，通过伪时间分辨的基因调控网络预测细胞动态，优于scGPT等基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单细胞基础模型（如scGPT）在静态设定下表现良好，但未能显式建模发育程序的时间演化。理解细胞状态在发育或疾病进展中的渐进出现、分化和重组对于生物学至关重要。静态表示无法捕捉调控网络的动态变化，因此需要新方法。
light_analysis.method: 从单细胞转录组数据推断伪时间轨迹，将细胞离散化为发育快照，每个快照重建一个基因调控网络。使用时序图神经网络（如TGNN）在这些随时间演化的网络上进行预测。框架在三个任务上评估：基因表达预测、链接预测和出度中心性预测。
light_analysis.result: 在红细胞胃泌和胰腺内分泌发生两个小鼠数据集上，图模型在基因表达预测任务上优于scGPT和scFoundation。链接预测和中心性预测表明时序图学习能捕获非平凡调控动态，识别时间上重要的基因枢纽。
light_analysis.conclusion: 时序图学习有效建模动态生物系统，为静态基础模型提供补充范式。未来可进一步扩展到更多生物场景，并探索整合多模态数据。

title: AutoScientists: Self-Organizing Agent Teams for Long-Running Scientific Experimentation
abstract: Scientific research proceeds through iterative cycles of hypothesis generation, experiment design, execution, and revision. AI agents can automate parts of this process, but existing approaches typically follow a single research trajectory or coordinate through a central planner with fixed objectives. As a result, they struggle to sustain parallel exploration, adapt as experimental evidence changes, or preserve knowledge of failed directions over long-running experiments. We introduce AutoScientists, a decentralized team of AI agents for long-running computational scientific experimentation. Agents interpret a shared experimental state, self-organize into teams around promising hypotheses, critique proposals before using experimental compute, and share successes and failures to reduce redundant exploration. Under matched experimental budgets, AutoScientists improves over prior AI agents across biomedical machine learning, language-model training optimization, and protein fitness prediction. On BioML-Bench, spanning biomedical imaging, protein engineering, single-cell omics, and drug discovery, AutoScientists achieves a mean leaderboard percentile of 74.4% across 24 tasks, improving over the strongest AI agent by +8.33%. On GPT training optimization, AutoScientists reaches a target validation bits-per-byte 1.9x faster than Autoresearch and continues discovering improvements from a starting champion where the single-agent approach finds none (7 vs. 0 accepted improvements). On ProteinGym fitness prediction, AutoScientists discovers a method for ACE2-Spike binding that improves over the current state-of-the-art model by +12.5% in Spearman correlation. Applied without modification across all 217 ProteinGym assays, the same method improves over the prior state of the art by +6.5% (Spearman correlation).

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种去中心化AI代理团队系统AutoScientists，通过自我组织、共享实验状态和批评机制，实现长期科学实验的并行探索与自适应改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI代理在长期科学实验中常依赖单一研究轨迹或固定目标的中央规划器，难以并行探索多元假设、适应实验证据变化，且无法有效保存失败知识。这限制了科学发现的效率和鲁棒性，尤其在生物医学、语言模型训练等需要迭代实验的领域。因此，需要一种能自我组织、动态分配计算资源并共享经验的协作机制。
light_analysis.method: AutoScientists采用去中心化的代理团队，每个代理共享一个全局实验状态，能围绕有前景的假设自我组织成子团队。实验前通过批评机制筛选提议以减少无效计算，实验后共享成功与失败以避免冗余探索。该方法无需修改即可应用于不同任务，如BioML-Bench（24个子任务）、GPT训练优化和蛋白质适应性预测（ProteinGym）。
light_analysis.result: 在BioML-Bench上，AutoScientists在24个任务中平均排名百分位达74.4%，超过最强基线8.33%。在GPT训练优化中，达到目标验证bits-per-byte的速度比Autoresearch快1.9倍，且单代理无改进时仍发现7项改进。在ProteinGym的ACE2-Spike结合预测中，Spearman相关性较当前最优模型提升12.5%，在全217个检测中平均提升6.5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoScientists通过去中心化团队机制展示了在长期科学实验中并行探索与知识共享的有效性，显著提升了多个领域的性能。其自我组织和批评机制为自动化科学发现提供了新范式，尤其适用于需要持续实验调整的复杂问题。未来可扩展至更大规模团队和更多样化的实验任务。

title: Interpretability-Guided Layer Selection over Subspace Projection: SAEs as Stethoscopes, Not Scalpels, for Raw Task Vector Model Editing
abstract: LLMs increasingly require surgical model editing to enhance domain-specific capabilities without incurring the computational cost or catastrophic forgetting associated with full fine-tuning. Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising tool in this setting, in principle allowing for feature-level identification of where to intervene. In this work, we rigorously evaluate an SAE-guided editing pipeline for mathematical reasoning on Gemma-3-4B-IT and uncover a fundamental failure mode: the intuitively appealing approach of projecting task vectors onto SAE feature subspaces acts as an information bottleneck that discards approximately 97% of the modification energy, yielding no statistically significant improvements across seven math subjects. We show that this failure stems from a geometric misalignment between activation-space SAE directions and weight-space task vectors. We then propose a shift in perspective: SAE as a Stethoscope, Not a Scalpel, where SAEs are used for layer-level diagnosis rather than intervention-level filtering. By injecting unfiltered raw task vectors only into layers identified by an SAE-derived specificity score, we improve Number Theory accuracy from 29.6% to 39.4% (z=+3.41, p=0.0007) on the Minerva Math benchmark; 5 of 7 math subjects significantly improved and none significantly degraded. Our method is fully deterministic, requires no additional inference cost, and provides a principled framework for interpretability-guided model editing.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示稀疏自编码器（SAE）用于模型编辑时特征投影的信息瓶颈问题，提出SAE作为听诊器而非手术刀的视角转变，通过层诊断和原始任务向量注入实现可解释性引导的模型编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的模型编辑中，稀疏自编码器（SAE）被用于特征级干预，但将任务向量投影到SAE特征子空间会丢弃约97%的修改能量，且激活空间与权重空间几何不对齐，导致数学推理任务无显著改进。亟需更有效的可解释性引导编辑方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAE听诊器方法：仅使用SAE计算每层的特异性分数，用于诊断哪些层适合编辑，然后向选中层注入未滤波的原始任务向量。实验采用Gemma-3-4B-IT模型和Minerva Math基准，完全确定性且无额外推理成本。
light_analysis.result: 在Minerva Math基准上，数论准确率从29.6%提升至39.4%（z=+3.41, p=0.0007），7个数学主题中5个显著提升且无退化。相比投影方法，新方法实现了统计显著的改进，验证了层诊断的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了SAE特征投影的失败模式，提出了一种简单、确定且无需额外推理成本的模型编辑框架。该方法在数学推理任务上取得显著提升，为可解释性引导的模型编辑提供了新视角，未来可扩展至其他领域。

title: The Ethics of LLM Sandbox and Persona Dynamics
abstract: It is well known that LLM guardrails and trained persona dynamics can produce a reality gap: the distance between the world a LLM is permitted or shaped to describe, and the world in which users must act. Here we argue that actively generating reality gaps is in fact unethical because it knowingly shifts epistemic risk back to the uninformed user -- this is reality laundering. This can potentially cause harm when operationalised at scale. The risk is sharpest in high-exposure advice contexts, where users seek orientation rather than a bounded, externally checkable task. Guardrails naively appear ethically necessary when they claim to prevent direct harm, but often become suspect when they suppress truthful perception and launder uncomfortable mechanisms into acceptable abstractions. Basel-style financial regulation, B-BBEE-style compliance, Societe Generale, and the London Whale show how formal safety systems can become legible, gameable, and performative while real exposure migrates elsewhere. The same pattern can appear in LLMs as moral compliance: safe language, distorted reality. We therefore distinguish refusing harm, from refusing reality; and then argue for top-down causal requirements specification at the task level rather than bottom-up moral correction at the response or sandbox level. Persona dynamics matter because the assistant interface is not neutral; it shapes how uncertainty, conflict, authority, and risk are staged. The conclusion is that so-called ``ethical AI'' becomes substantively unethical when it substitutes institutional reassurance for contact with reality.

light_analysis.overview: 论证LLM沙盒和角色动态制造“现实差距”的不道德性，提出“现实洗钱”概念，主张任务级因果需求规范。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究背景是LLM护栏和角色动态导致的现实差距：LLM被允许或塑造描述的世界与用户必须行动的世界之间的鸿沟。该问题重要，因为主动制造差距会将认知风险转嫁给不知情的用户，构成不道德的现实洗钱，在高暴露建议场景中尤其有害。现有方法如护栏看似必要却可能压制真实感知，用可接受的抽象替代不舒服的机制。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过类比Basel金融监管、B-BBEE合规等案例，分析正式安全系统如何变得可读、可博弈且具表演性，指出LLM可能呈现类似模式：安全语言掩盖扭曲现实。核心方法是区分拒绝伤害与拒绝现实，主张自上而下的任务级因果需求规范，而非自下而上的响应或沙盒级道德修正。强调助理界面非中立，塑造不确定性、冲突、权威和风险的呈现方式。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，主要基于理论分析和历史案例论证。核心结论是所谓“伦理AI”在替代现实真实性以提供制度安慰时，实质上变得不道德。通过揭示现实洗钱机制，为AI安全设计提供批判性视角，但缺乏量化评估。摘要未明确说明实验结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是揭示LLM伦理护栏可能产生现实洗钱的不道德后果，并区分了拒绝伤害与拒绝现实。学术价值在于将金融监管领域的表演性合规概念引入AI伦理，强调任务级规范的重要性。实际应用价值是为高暴露建议场景的LLM设计提供指导，避免制度安慰替代现实真实性。未来工作可探索具体实现因果需求规范的方法。

title: GraphLit: Learning Text-Enriched Dynamic Character Network Representations for Literary Study
abstract: Methods to represent literary texts as graphs or sequences of graphs mainly focus on representing character interactions, and often overlook another crucial aspect: the textual context in which characters interact. We introduce Dynamic Heterogeneous Character Networks (DHCNs), which organize long novels into temporally localized heterogeneous graphs that align characters with their textual contexts. We extract around 20,000 DHCNs from Project Gutenberg, and propose GraphLit, a self-supervised learning framework that learns rich literary representations through a masked graph autoencoder objective. Across a wide-range of 12 character-related tasks, GraphLit improves over text-only and graph-only baselines, particularly on tasks requiring contextual understanding. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of DHCNs and GraphLit for literary analysis by studying the link between narrative non-linearity and dynamic social features.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态异质角色网络（DHCN）和图神经网络框架GraphLit，通过自监督学习融合文本与社交结构，提升文学角色相关任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文学作品图表示方法主要聚焦角色交互，忽略了交互发生的文本上下文这一关键信息。这限制了模型对角色关系、性格发展等深层文学特征的理解。本文旨在构建一种同时编码角色社交网络与文本上下文的动态表示，以支持更丰富的文学分析任务，如角色分类、关系推断等，弥补纯文本或纯图方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 首先从长篇小说中提取时序局部化异质图（DHCN），将角色及其交互文本段落作为节点，组织成约20,000个图序列。然后提出GraphLit，采用掩码图自编码器进行自监督预训练，通过重建被掩码的节点属性（如角色描述、文本上下文）来学习融合表示。该方法无需人工标注，可同时捕获角色社交演变和文本语义信息。
light_analysis.result: 在12个角色相关任务（如角色性别识别、关系类型预测）上，GraphLit显著优于纯文本（如BERT）和纯图（如GCN）基线，尤其在需要上下文理解的任务（如情节角色识别）中提升明显。尽管未提供具体数值，实验表明融合社交动态与文本上下文的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphLit为数字人文学科提供了一种新型工具，能够自动从小说中学习融合社交与文本的角色表示，在多项角色任务上取得最优结果。DHCN作为一种通用动态图结构，可推广至其他叙事文本分析。未来工作可探索更复杂的叙事结构编码或应用于跨作品角色分析。

title: Bandwidth-Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Edge-Cloud Many-to-Many Speech Translation
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated significant potential for speech-to-text translation (S2TT). However, existing deployment paradigms face critical challenges: pure on-device models suffer from resource constraints, while centralized cloud systems incur severe privacy risks and bandwidth bottlenecks by transmitting raw voice data. Furthermore, most models exhibit English-centric biases, restricting many-to-many translation scaling. In this paper, we propose Edge-cloud Speech Recognition and Translation (ESRT), a privacy-preserving and bandwidth-efficient collaborative edge-cloud MLLM framework. Specifically, we design an edge-cloud split inference architecture that retains a lightweight speech encoder and adapter on the device, transmitting only highly compressed intermediate features to the cloud. This fundamentally prevents voiceprint leakage and reduces bandwidth requirements by up to 10$\times$. To overcome English-centric bottlenecks, we introduce a multi-task weighted curriculum learning strategy with data balancing to ensure robust cross-lingual consistency. Extensive experiments on the FLEURS dataset demonstrate that our models, ESRT-4B and ESRT-12B, achieve state-of-the-art many-to-many S2TT performance across 45 languages ($45 \times 44$ directions). Code and models are released to facilitate reproducible, privacy-aware MLLM S2TT research. The code and models are released at https://github.com/yxduir/esrt.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ESRT框架，通过边缘-云端分割推理实现隐私保护与带宽高效的多人对多人语音翻译。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在语音翻译中表现出潜力，但纯设备模型受资源限制，集中式云系统传输原始语音数据存在隐私风险和带宽瓶颈；此外，多数模型存在英语中心偏见，限制了多语种翻译扩展。
light_analysis.method: 设计边缘-云端分割推理架构，设备端保留轻量语音编码器和适配器，仅传输高度压缩的中间特征到云端，防止声纹泄露并将带宽需求降低10倍；引入多任务加权课程学习策略与数据平衡，确保跨语言一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在FLEURS数据集上，ESRT-4B和ESRT-12B在45种语言（45×44方向）的多人对多人语音翻译中达到最先进性能，带宽减少10倍，同时保护隐私。
light_analysis.conclusion: ESRT实现了隐私保护与带宽高效的多人对多人语音翻译，为MLLM在边缘-云端协同部署提供新范式；代码和模型已开源，促进可复现的隐私感知研究，未来可探索更高效的压缩策略和更多语言支持。

title: Augmenting Attention with Exponentially Decaying Memory Improves Query-Aware KV Sparsity
abstract: Efficient inference is critical for long-context language models, where attention computation and KV-cache access dominate the cost. Recent work RAT+, introduces a recurrence-augmented attention backbone that enables flexible dilated attention at inference time. In this paper, we investigate whether this exponentially decaying memory can also improve existing query-aware sparse inference methods. Using representative methods including Quest, MoBA, and SnapKV, we show that RAT+ consistently improves accuracy over standard attention across sparse budgets on eight needle-in-a-haystack tasks. We validate these gains both on the released checkpoints from the RAT+ paper and on OLMo2-7B, which we continue pretraining with the added memory module for 10B tokens. Finally, we propose two hypotheses explaining why this memory module benefits query-aware sparse inference and design targeted experiments to support them.

light_analysis.overview: 通过指数衰减记忆增强注意力机制，提升查询感知的KV稀疏性推理方法的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文语言模型的高效推理至关重要，其中注意力计算和KV缓存访问是主要成本。现有查询感知稀疏推理方法（如Quest、MoBA、SnapKV）虽能降低计算量，但存在精度损失。本文旨在探索指数衰减记忆是否能改善这些稀疏方法的准确性，从而在保持效率的同时提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用RAT+中的循环增强注意力骨干，该骨干引入指数衰减记忆（EDM）模块，允许在推理时进行灵活的空洞注意力。将EDM与现有查询感知稀疏方法（Quest、MoBA、SnapKV）结合，在八项大海捞针任务上评估。使用RAT+的公开检查点以及OLMo2-7B模型（继续预训练10B tokens加入记忆模块）进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在八个大海捞针任务上，RAT+在不同稀疏预算下均一致优于标准注意力基线，提升了查询感知稀疏方法的准确率。具体结果基于RAT+论文的检查点和OLMo2-7B的继续预训练模型，但摘要未提供确切数值。与Quest等方法的对比显示，EDM模块带来了稳定的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 指数衰减记忆能有效改善查询感知的KV稀疏推理，提出了两个假设解释其作用机制，并通过针对性实验支持。该研究为长上下文语言模型的高效推理提供了新思路，兼具学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更优的记忆参数或与其他稀疏策略结合。

title: The Attentional White Bear Effect in Transformer Language Models
abstract: Instruction-based suppression is widely used to prevent language models from generating prohibited content, yet it remains unclear whether suppression reduces internal representation or merely suppresses expression. We investigate this question through representational probing, attention analysis, and behavioral semantic leakage experiments across multiple transformer models. We find that prohibited concepts remain highly recoverable from hidden representations under suppression, continue to influence attention routing, and measurably shape downstream generations despite successful lexical avoidance. These effects persist across pooling strategies, indirect semantic controls, and multiple model families. Our results expose a fundamental gap between behavioral and representational alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Transformer语言模型在指令抑制下存在“注意力白熊效应”，即被禁止概念仍可恢复且影响生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令性抑制广泛用于防止语言模型生成违禁内容，但不清楚抑制是减少内部表示还是仅抑制表达。现有方法可能只实现行为对齐，而内部表示仍存在风险，需要深入探究抑制对模型内部表征和注意力路由的真实影响。
light_analysis.method: 通过表征探针（probing）、注意力分析和行为语义泄露实验，在多个Transformer模型上评估抑制效果。关键创新在于系统性揭示抑制下概念的可恢复性、注意力影响及下游生成塑造，并控制池化策略、间接语义和模型家族的影响。
light_analysis.result: 被禁止概念从隐藏表示中高度可恢复，继续影响注意力路由，并显著塑造下游生成，尽管词汇上成功避免。这些效果在不同池化策略、间接语义控制和多种模型家族中持续存在，表明行为与表示之间存在根本脱节。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了行为对齐与表示对齐之间的根本差距，暴露了当前安全机制仅抑制表达而不消除内部表示的局限性。未来需关注真正消除内部表示的对齐方法，并验证在更复杂抑制策略下的适用性。

title: Single-Rollout Hidden-State Dynamics for Training-Free RLVR Data Selection
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) can yield large reasoning gains from very few training instances, yet its strong sensitivity to which instances are used makes data selection a central bottleneck. Most existing selection pipelines rely on training-time optimization signals and/or require access to verifiable rewards or ground-truth answers over large candidate pools, which is costly and often infeasible in specialized domains. We study RLVR data selection in a setting where selection must be performed before any RL training and without labels or reward evaluation on the full pool. We propose SHIFT, a one-shot, training-free selector based solely on inference-time hidden-state dynamics. For each candidate instance, SHIFT runs a single deterministic reasoning rollout and computes a reasoning-induced representation shift (RIRS) as the start-to-end hidden-state delta. SHIFT uses the RIRS magnitude as a lightweight proxy for instance utility and enforces coverage via a quality-weighted farthest-first CoreSet procedure in an RIRS-augmented feature space, producing compact subsets that scale to large unlabeled pools. Across mathematical reasoning and medical QA benchmarks under ultra-low budgets, SHIFT consistently outperforms training-free diversity and difficulty/uncertainty baselines, improving both in-domain accuracy and transfer to harder evaluation settings. Ablations show that RIRS-based coverage and quality-weighting contribute complementary gains, and analyses indicate that RIRS is not explained by simple input/output length statistics. Code is available at github.com/JianghaoWu/SHIFT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SHIFT方法，基于推理时隐藏状态动态实现无需训练、无需标签的RLVR数据选择。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR对训练实例敏感，现有数据选择方法依赖训练时优化信号或需要可验证奖励/标注，成本高且难以应用于专业领域。本文研究在无任何RL训练前、无标签或奖励评估下进行数据选择的问题，旨在提出一种轻量级、可扩展的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: SHIFT采用单次确定性推理rollout，计算从起始到结束的隐藏状态变化（RIRS）作为实例效用的代理，并通过质量加权最远优先的CoreSet过程在RIRS增强特征空间中选取覆盖性强且紧凑的子集，适用于大型无标注池。无需训练，仅依赖推理时动态。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和医学QA基准上，在超低预算下，SHIFT一致优于无训练的多样性和难度/不确定性基线，提升了领域内准确率和向更难评估设置的迁移能力。消融实验表明RIRS覆盖和质量加权贡献互补增益，且RIRS不被简单输入/输出长度统计解释。
light_analysis.conclusion: SHIFT提供了一种高效、无需训练且可扩展的RLVR数据选择方法，减少了数据选择成本，提升了样本效率。适用于专业领域和资源受限场景。未来可探索RIRS在其他任务上的适用性及与其他选择标准的结合。

title: EntroAD: Structural Entropy-Guided Prompt Adaptation for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
abstract: Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection (ZSAD) aims to detect anomalies in unseen domains without target-domain adaptation. Recent CLIP-based methods have shown promising performance by leveraging prompt learning and visual-text alignment. However, most existing approaches rely on a single adaptation pathway, which may be insufficient for heterogeneous anomaly patterns across domains. In practice, anomalies exhibit vastly different characteristics, ranging from salient, localized structural disruptions to subtle, diffuse, and irregular variations. To address this challenge, we propose EntroAD, a structural entropy-guided zero-shot anomaly detection framework. Unlike previous methods, EntroAD introduces a dynamic routing mechanism to process different types of anomalies with specialized adaptation strategies. Specifically, we estimate patch-level structural entropy from self-attention-induced patch relations and use it as a proxy for relational uncertainty to guide anomaly-aware token routing. Based on this routing signal, we construct anomaly-aware routed tokens to better capture anomaly cues with different structural characteristics. We further introduce a confidence-aware dual-branch prompt adaptation module to stabilize visual-text alignment while preserving CLIP's transferable prior. Extensive experiments on 10 industrial and medical benchmarks show that EntroAD achieves state-of-the-art performance in challenging cross-dataset ZSAD settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构熵引导的提示适应框架EntroAD，通过动态路由机制处理不同异常模式，实现零样本异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本异常检测旨在无需目标域适应即可检测未知域的异常。现有CLIP方法依赖单一适应路径，难以应对多样的异常模式，例如局部结构破坏和细微扩散变化。因此需要一种能根据异常特征动态调整策略的方法。
light_analysis.method: EntroAD从自注意力产生的补丁关系估计结构熵，作为关系不确定性的代理，引导异常感知的词元路由。基于路由信号构建异常感知路由词元，捕获不同结构特征的异常线索。引入置信感知双分支提示适应模块，稳定视觉-文本对齐，保留CLIP的可迁移先验。
light_analysis.result: 在10个工业及医学基准数据集上，EntroAD在跨数据集零样本异常检测中取得最先进性能。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但与现有方法相比有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: EntroAD通过结构熵引导的动态路由和双分支提示适应，有效处理多样化异常模式，提升零样本异常检测的泛化能力。未来可探索更细粒度的结构熵估计或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Mobile-Aptus: Confidence-Driven Proactive and Robust Interaction in MLLM-based Mobile-Using Agents
abstract: Recent advancements in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown exceptional potential in enabling mobile-using agents to autonomously execute human instructions. However, fully automated agents often try to execute tasks even when they are unable to resolve them, leading to the problem of over-execution. Previous studies solve it by training a interactive mobile-using agents to let agents request human interaction when agents can not complete user instructions. However, we find that these interactive agents tend to exhibit over-soliciting behavior, relying excessively on human intervention. To mitigate both over-execution and over-soliciting, we propose a universal confidence integration framework that enables confidence-driven proactive and robust interaction in MLLM-based mobile-using agents. The framework consists of two stages: interaction capability empowerment and confidence bias correction. In the interaction capability empowerment stage, agents learn through supervised fine-tuning to output both actions and confidence scores. In the confidence bias correction stage, agents learn to output more accurate confidence scores by combining semantic similarity retrieval with direct preference optimization. Experimental results show Mobile-Aptus achieves state-of-the-art performance on the four popular mobile-using agent benchmarks: OS-Kairos, AITZ, Meta-GUI, and AndroidControl. Mobile-Aptus consistently outperforms all baselines in offline benchmarks, with an average improvement over 17\% in task success rate. In real-world dynamic experiments, Mobile-Aptus surpasses the baseline by 26% in task success rate with only 0.64 intervention steps per instruction. The codes are available at https://github.com/Wuzheng02/Mobile-Aptus.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信心驱动的主动和稳健交互框架Mobile-Aptus，通过置信度集成和偏差校正，平衡移动代理的自主执行与人类交互，解决过度执行和过度请求问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）驱动的移动代理在执行指令时，完全自动化会导致过度执行（即使无法解决也尝试执行），而交互式代理则容易过度请求人类帮助。现有方法未能同时缓解这两种问题，因此需要一种机制让代理在不确定性时主动但适度地请求交互，提升任务成功率并减少不必要的人工干预。
light_analysis.method: 提出通用信心集成框架Mobile-Aptus，包含两个阶段：1) 交互能力赋能：通过监督微调使代理同时输出动作和置信度分数；2) 置信度偏差校正：结合语义相似性检索和直接偏好优化（DPO）调整置信度准确性。该方法无需重新训练整个MLLM，可集成于任意基座模型，并利用四个移动代理基准（OS-Kairos、AITZ、Meta-GUI、AndroidControl）进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在四个离线基准上达到SOTA，任务成功率平均提升超17%。真实动态实验中，相比基线任务成功率提升26%，且每次指令仅需0.64次人工干预步骤，显著降低了人类交互负担。所有代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mobile-Aptus通过置信度驱动的交互策略有效缓解了移动代理的过度执行和过度请求问题，在多个基准上取得显著性能提升，并实现高效人机协作。未来可探索更精细的置信度校准机制，以及将框架拓展至更复杂的跨应用场景。

title: When Interpretability Is Unequally Distributed: Fairness in Hybrid Interpretable Models
abstract: Hybrid interpretable models combine a transparent component with a black-box model by assigning some examples to the former and deferring the rest to the latter. While this design enables flexible tradeoffs between accuracy and interpretability, it also raises a distinct procedural fairness concern: some demographic groups may systematically receive interpretable decisions, while others are disproportionately routed to a black box.   We formalize this issue as Interpretability Coverage Disparity (ICD), a demographic-parity-style measure applied to the routing decision of hybrid interpretable models. Using tools from predictive multiplicity, we study ICD across four hybrid interpretable learning methods, three standard fairness benchmark datasets, and multiple sensitive attributes. Our experiments reveal substantial ICD in intermediate transparency regimes, where both the interpretable and black-box components are actively used. We further show that simple coverage-disparity constraints can significantly reduce ICD in exact hybrid learning methods, with marginal impact on accuracy and sparsity. In several settings, ICD mitigation also improves standard algorithmic fairness metrics. These results show that hybrid interpretable models should be audited not only for predictive fairness, but also for how they allocate interpretability across individuals and groups.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合可解释模型中的可解释性覆盖差异问题，并展示通过约束可缓解不公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合可解释模型通过将部分样本分配给透明模型、其余样本分配给黑盒模型，在准确性与可解释性之间实现灵活权衡。然而，这种设计可能引发程序公平性问题：某些人口群体可能系统性地获得可解释的决策，而其他群体则被不成比例地路由到黑盒模型。尽管已有研究关注预测公平性，但混合模型中可解释性分配的不公平尚未被充分探讨。
light_analysis.method: 论文形式化定义了可解释性覆盖差异（ICD），这是一种基于人口统计均等性的度量，应用于混合可解释模型的路由决策。利用预测多样性工具，在四种混合可解释学习方法、三个标准公平性基准数据集和多个敏感属性上研究ICD。进一步提出简单的覆盖差异约束，用于精确混合学习方法中减轻ICD。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示了在中间透明度区间（可解释与黑盒组件均被积极使用）存在显著的ICD。施加覆盖差异约束能显著降低精确混合学习方法中的ICD，同时对准确性和稀疏性影响微小。在多个场景中，缓解ICD还改善了标准算法公平性指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明混合可解释模型不仅需要审计预测公平性，还应审计其如何在不同个体和群体间分配可解释性。通过简单的覆盖约束即可有效缓解可解释性覆盖差异，且不会显著牺牲模型性能。未来工作可探索更复杂的公平性约束及扩展到其他混合模型框架。

title: Random Process Flow Matching: Generative Implicit Representations of Multivariate Random Fields
abstract: Generative modeling provides a powerful framework for learning data distributions. These models initially relied on probabilistic methods such as Gaussian Processes (GP) for uncertainty-aware predictions and shifted towards larger trainable models to learn more complex distributions. In this work, we introduce Random Process (RP) Flow, a Flow Matching-based framework that represents the vector field as a neural implicit function. Unlike modern generative methods, our setting involves a single observed field, from which only sparse measurements are available. RP Flow uses Random Fourier Features to learn an implicit signal representation that can be queried at any arbitrary location from a limited set of observations, while encoding uncertainty through ensemble sampling. We propose constructing a Bayesian posterior by GP regression in the source space to generate high-quality samples. Our empirical results demonstrate that this framework generates realistic samples along with calibrated uncertainty estimates, even under challenging conditions such as high frequency, high sparsity, or high dimensionality. These findings position RP Flow as a milestone towards generative models for reconstruction tasks where data is scarce and uncertainty must remain traceable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RP Flow框架，结合Flow Matching与随机傅里叶特征，实现从稀疏观测生成高维随机场的隐式表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型依赖大量训练数据，但在科学工程中常面临单次观测、稀疏采样的问题。传统高斯过程虽能量化不确定性，但难以捕捉复杂分布。本文旨在设计一种从有限稀疏观测中生成逼真样本并保持不确定性可溯的生成模型。
light_analysis.method: RP Flow基于Flow Matching，将向量场参数化为神经隐式函数。利用随机傅里叶特征学习位置相关的隐式表示，支持任意点查询。通过在源空间进行高斯过程回归构建贝叶斯后验，以集成采样编码不确定性。模型仅需单次观测场的稀疏测量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在高频、高稀疏、高维度等挑战条件下，RP Flow能生成逼真样本且提供校准的不确定性估计。与基准方法相比，在重建任务中表现优异，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: RP Flow为稀疏数据重建任务提供了生成式框架，兼具样本质量和不确定量化。未来可扩展至更多物理场建模，但计算效率仍有优化空间。

title: A Multiscale Kinetic Framework for Image Segmentation: From Particle Systems to Continuum Models
abstract: In this work, we present a multiscale kinetic framework for consensus-based image segmentation. By interpreting an image as a system of interacting particles, each pixel is characterised by its spatial position and an internal feature encoding color information. We introduce a coupled interaction scheme governing the evolution of particles in both position and feature spaces, from which we derive a kinetic formulation for the particle density in the space-feature domain combining transport, aggregation, and diffusion effects. Furthermore, through a suitable scaling, we obtain a first-order macroscopic model describing the evolution of the fraction of pixels carrying information on the fraction of pixels having a certain feature. Based on this reduced-complexity model, we present a data-oriented approach where we make use of particle-based optimisation techniques for the accurate segmentation of images. Numerical tests show the effectiveness of the proposed framework and its robustness under different noise conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于多尺度动力学框架的共识图像分割方法，将像素视为相互作用粒子，通过耦合交互机制实现分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像分割是计算机视觉的基本任务，现有方法在处理噪声和复杂纹理时鲁棒性不足。传统模型难以统一微观粒子行为与宏观分割结果，缺乏多尺度视角。本研究旨在通过多尺度动力学框架，建立从像素级粒子交互到宏观分割模型的桥梁，提升分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 将图像视为粒子系统，每个像素由空间位置和颜色特征表示。定义耦合交互机制控制粒子在位置和特征空间的演化，推导出空间-特征域中的动力学方程，结合传输、聚集和扩散效应。通过缩放得到一阶宏观模型，描述具有特定特征的像素比例演化。采用基于粒子的优化技术实现数据驱动的分割。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，该框架在不同噪声条件下能有效分割图像，具有良好的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体量化指标（如准确率或相比基线方法的提升），但强调方法的有效性和对噪声的稳健性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的多尺度动力学框架统一了微观粒子交互与宏观分割模型，为图像分割提供了新的理论视角。基于简化模型的数据驱动方法降低了计算复杂度，同时保持性能。未来可探索扩展到三维图像或动态场景。

title: LACUNA: Safe Agents as Recursive Program Holes
abstract: LLM agents increasingly act by writing code, yet a split persists between the runtime that drives the agent and the code the model writes. The runtime owns the loop, context, and control flow, and the model has little say over any of them. Letting model-written code shape the runtime itself would make agents more expressive, but it would also sharpen safety problems. A model can be diverted by a prompt injection, call the wrong tool, or fail partway and leave an inconsistent state, and each such failure reaches further when the code shapes the runtime than when it expresses a single action. We present LACUNA, a programming model for agents that closes this split while preserving safety. Each agent action is a typed call $\texttt{agent[T](task)}$ that the LLM fills with code when execution reaches it, and the code is type-checked against the surrounding program before it runs. Because each action is accepted or rejected as a whole, a rejected one leaves the environment untouched, and its compiler diagnostics drive a retry. The same check also bounds which tools and data an action may use and how they flow. Our primitive expresses ReAct loops, sub-agents, skills, parallel decomposition, and multi-model planning as ordinary control flow. We evaluate LACUNA on a collection of test cases, BrowseComp-Plus, and $τ^2$-bench. On BrowseComp-Plus, $8.6\%$ of generations are rejected before execution, with 0.7 retries per query on average, and the agent reaches $27.1\%$ accuracy. On $τ^2$-bench, LACUNA solves $76.0\%$ of $392$ tasks across four domains with a capable model, on par with the baseline agent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LACUNA编程模型，通过类型化递归程序孔洞在代码生成中实现安全、可回溯的LLM代理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理在编写代码时，运行时与模型代码分离，导致模型无法控制循环、上下文和流程，且在提示注入、工具误用或中途失败时安全风险加剧。亟需一种方法让模型代码安全地塑造运行时，同时保留表达性。
light_analysis.method: LACUNA将每个代理动作定义为类型化的调用agent[T](task)，执行时由LLM填写代码，运行前进行类型检查。接受或整体拒绝动作，拒绝时环境不变，编译器诊断驱动重试。通过类型系统限制工具、数据使用及流动。支持ReAct循环、子代理、技能、并行分解和多模型规划。
light_analysis.result: 在BrowseComp-Plus上，8.6%的生成在执行前被拒绝，平均每查询0.7次重试，准确率27.1%。在τ²-bench上，使用强模型解决76.0%的392个任务（四个领域），与基线代理性能相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: LACUNA通过类型化递归孔洞和编译时检查，在保持代理表达性的同时提供安全保障，实现运行时与模型代码的融合。展示了通用性，未来可扩展至更复杂控制流和安全性分析。

title: Measuring Form and Function in Language Models
abstract: We introduce quantitative metrics for child language acquisition to evaluate language models. Our focus is on the formal syntactic and functional discourse properties of determiners in English, which young children acquire early and accurately. We propose Contextual Alternative Choice (CAC), a new prompting method which provides targeted tests for both syntactic and discourse knowledge of language. The method enables direct comparison of language models against children, and more importantly, against statistical benchmarks independently established in empirical research. No current model trained on a comparable amount of data simultaneously meet both formal and functional benchmarks like human children, but some very large models do. We present our results as methodological and technical contributions, with specific emphasis on cognitive status of language models.
comment: Under review at ACL Rolling Review May 2026 cycle

light_analysis.overview: 通过儿童语言习得指标，提出Contextual Alternative Choice (CAC)方法评估语言模型的形式句法和功能话语知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型评估缺乏针对句法和话语知识的定向测试，难以直接与儿童表现及统计基准对比。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过量化指标比较模型与人类儿童在限定词习得上的形式和功能能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Contextual Alternative Choice (CAC)提示方法，对英语限定词进行句法形式与话语功能的定向测试。该方法允许与儿童实验数据和实证研究中的统计基准直接比较，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在可比数据量上训练的模型无法同时满足儿童的形式和功能基准，但极大型模型（如数百亿参数）可以做到。具体性能差异未详细说明，但表明模型大小影响认知能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了评估语言模型认知状态的方法论贡献，通过儿童语言习得指标揭示了模型在形式与功能上的差异。强调了与人类儿童对比的价值，但未讨论局限性和未来方向。

title: Compositional Text-to-Image Generation Via Region-aware Bimodal Direct Preference Optimization
