abstract: Despite the rapid progress of text-to-image (T2I) models, generating images that accurately reflect complex compositional prompts (covering attribute bindings, object relationships, counting) still remains challenging. To address this, we propose BiDPO, a framework to enhance T2I model's capability of compositional text-to-image generation. We begin by introducing an carefully designed pipeline to construct a large-scale preference dataset, BiComp, with strictly quality control. Then, we extend Diffusion DPO to jointly optimize image and text preferences, which is shown to greatly effective in improving the models to follow complex text prompt in generation. To further enhance the models for fine-grained alignment, we employ a region-level guidance method to focus on regions relevant to compositional concepts. Experimental results demonstrate that our BiDPO substantially improves compositional fidelity, consistently outperforming prior methods across multiple benchmarks. Our approach highlights the potential of preference-based fine-tuning for complex text-to-image tasks, offering a flexible and scalable alternative to existing techniques.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BiDPO框架，通过区域感知的双模态直接偏好优化提升文本到图像模型的组合生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管文本到图像（T2I）模型发展迅速，但在生成准确反映复杂组合提示（如属性绑定、对象关系、计数）的图像方面仍存在挑战。现有方法在处理这类复杂语义组合时表现不佳，亟需一种能够有效提升模型遵循复杂文本指令能力的技术。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出BiDPO框架，首先设计严格质量控制的流水线构建大规模偏好数据集BiComp。然后扩展Diffusion DPO，联合优化图像和文本偏好，以改善模型对复杂文本提示的遵循能力。进一步采用区域级引导方法，聚焦于组合概念相关区域，实现细粒度对齐。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，BiDPO显著提升了组合保真度，在多个基准测试中持续优于先前方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调大幅改进，验证了偏好微调在复杂文本到图像任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiDPO展示了偏好微调在复杂文本到图像生成中的潜力，提供了一种灵活可扩展的替代方案。该方法有效提升了模型对复杂组合提示的理解与生成能力，为未来研究提供了新方向。潜在局限性可能包括对偏好数据集质量的依赖，未来可探索更高效的偏好学习机制。

title: Learning High-Dimensional Parity Functions with Product Networks using Gradient Descent
abstract: Parity functions are fundamental Boolean operations with critical applications across machine learning, cryptography, and error correction. Yet, learning high-dimensional parity functions poses significant challenges: in a general setting, standard neural network architectures typically require exponential sample complexity, making gradient-based optimization intractable for large number of inputs $N$. We demonstrate that compact product-based neural architectures combined with stochastic data sparsity (Bernoulli inputs with $p_e \leq 1/N$) and appropriate hyperparameter choice enable efficient parity learning, with theoretical guarantees of convergence. Experiments validate our theory across dimensions up to $N = 100{,}000$, with empirical evidence showing optimal hyperparameter choices for $p_e$ and learning rate $α$, as well as polynomial complexity scaling laws. This work establishes fundamental connections between architectural inductive bias and data sparsity, opening new possibilities for neural arithmetic, structured reasoning, binary neural networks, and machine learning applied to automated protocol discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 针对高维奇偶函数学习难题，提出紧凑产品网络结合数据稀疏性，实现高效梯度下降训练，理论保证收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 奇偶函数是机器学习、密码学和纠错码中的基础布尔运算，但高维情况下标准神经网络常需指数级样本复杂度，梯度优化难以处理大规模输入N。现有方法缺乏高效学习机制，亟需突破架构与数据利用的局限。
light_analysis.method: 采用紧凑的产品神经网络架构，利用随机数据稀疏性（伯努利输入概率p_e ≤ 1/N）与适当超参数（如学习率α），实现梯度下降训练。理论分析给出收敛保证，实验验证维度高达N=100,000时的有效性，并揭示多项式复杂度标度律。
light_analysis.result: 在N=100,000维度下成功学习奇偶函数，经验性找到最优p_e和α，表现多项式复杂度而非指数，验证理论收敛性。与标准网络相比，显著降低样本复杂度，实现高效优化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作建立了架构归纳偏置与数据稀疏性间的联系，为神经算术、结构化推理、二元神经网络及自动协议发现等提供新途径。未来可拓展至其他布尔函数与更复杂结构。

title: JECA^2: Judgment-Explanation Consistent Adversarial Attack against Forensic Vision-Language Models
abstract: Forensic vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been developed to detect image tampering and provide natural-language explanations. However, their robustness against adversarial manipulation remains underexplored. Existing adversarial attacks typically aim to flip the model's binary judgment, while the accompanying explanation may still reveal forensic cues and contradict the attacked judgment. In this paper, we study judgment-explanation consistent adversarial attacks against forensic VLMs and propose JECA^2, a controlled white-box red-team diagnostic that jointly redirects visual attribution and aligns textual explanations with the target judgment. On the visual side, JECA^2 uses Grad-CAM-guided perturbations to divert attribution from tampered regions toward benign regions. On the textual side, it optimizes prompt embeddings toward authenticity-affirming semantics under a token-proximity constraint. Experiments on forensic VLM benchmarks show that JECA^2 achieves higher attack success and automated judgment-explanation consistency than implemented baselines under white-box threat settings, while transfer to closed-source VLMs remains measurable but limited. Our results highlight a consistency failure mode in explanation-based forensic VLMs and motivate future robustness evaluation beyond binary detection accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JECA^2攻击，实现对抗样本下法医视觉语言模型判断与解释的一致性操控。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有法医视觉语言模型虽能检测图像篡改并提供自然语言解释，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未充分探索。传统对抗攻击仅翻转二元判断，而伴随的解释可能仍揭示篡改线索，与攻击后的判断矛盾。该研究旨在揭示并利用判断-解释不一致的安全漏洞。
light_analysis.method: JECA^2是一种受控白盒红队诊断方法，联合重定向视觉注意力和对齐文本解释：视觉侧使用Grad-CAM引导扰动，将篡改区域的归因转移至良性区域；文本侧在令牌邻近约束下优化提示嵌入，使其朝向真实性确认语义。
light_analysis.result: 在法医VLM基准上，JECA^2在攻击成功率和自动判断-解释一致性上均优于基线方法。向闭源VLM的迁移性可测量但有限。具体量化指标摘要未明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结果表明法医解释型VLM存在一致性失败模式，超越二元检测准确率的鲁棒性评估是必要的。JECA^2作为诊断工具可促进模型安全改进。

title: Adaptive Multimodal Agents-Based Framework for Automatic Workflow Execution
abstract: Modern information systems require autonomous agents capable of navigating complex workflows, yet current methodologies often struggle with the transition from structured metadata parsing to general environmental perception. While the integration of MLLMs has enabled agents to interact directly with GUIs, existing approaches typically treat task sequences as discrete, linear episodes. This fragmentation prevents agents from capturing the underlying transition topology, limiting their effectiveness in novel or non-stationary scenarios. To address this, we propose a novel multimodal multi-agent framework that achieves automatic workflow execution through a distinct two-phase pipeline. First, during an offline discovery phase, the architecture adaptively constructs a topological knowledge base from fragmented execution logs. During inference, agents leverage Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over this fixed, pre-established graph, coupled with a closed-loop collaborative verification protocol to dynamically self-correct and navigate. This graph-based approach facilitates superior task decomposition and adaptive navigation performance. We validate our framework in a real-world context, demonstrating its ability to maintain high reliability and semantic awareness even with limited training data.
comment: Copyright 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses. Accepted for publication at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Evolving and Adaptive Intelligent Systems (EAIS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多模态多智能体的两阶段框架，通过拓扑知识库和自适应RAG实现自动化工作流执行。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代信息系统需要自主代理处理复杂工作流，但现有方法难以从结构化元数据解析过渡到通用环境感知。多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）使代理能直接与GUI交互，但现有方法将任务序列视为离散线性片段，无法捕获底层转换拓扑，限制其在新颖或非平稳场景中的有效性。因此需要一种能自适应构建拓扑知识库并动态校正导航的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态多智能体框架，包含两阶段流水线：离线发现阶段从碎片化执行日志自适应构建拓扑知识库（图结构）；推理阶段通过自适应检索增强生成（RAG）利用该预建图，结合闭环协作验证协议动态自我校正导航。该方法支持高效任务分解和自适应导航，无需大量训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界工作流场景中验证框架，表明其能保持高可靠性和语义感知能力，即使在有限训练数据下也能实现自动执行。相比现有方法，框架通过图结构拓扑知识捕获任务转换关系，提升了非平稳场景的适应性和任务分解效果。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过自适应拓扑知识库构建和多智能体协同验证，解决了工作流自动执行中任务序列碎片化和环境泛化问题。学术贡献在于提出图结构驱动的多模态代理协作范式，实际价值在于减少对大规模标注数据依赖，适用于动态信息系统。未来可探索更复杂的图演化机制或扩展到多任务学习场景。

title: Internally Referenced Low-Light Enhancement
abstract: Self-supervised low-light image enhancement (LLIE) is highly appealing as it eliminates the reliance on external paired data. However, the lack of external references causes networks to struggle with decoupling entangled illumination, delicate textures, and amplified noise. To resolve this challenge, we propose an Internally Referenced LLIE framework that extracts reliable physical and structural references from the degraded input image itself. First, we introduce a local exposure-simulated scheme to extract a low-frequency pseudo ground-truth. This serves as an internal physical reference to guide global illumination estimation and correct color casts. Second, we propose a dual-domain preservation strategy with spatial and spectral constraints to construct internal structural references. Specifically, an Illumination-Aligned Perceptual loss preserves global structures under illumination shifts, while a Shift-Invariant Spectral Correlation loss captures fine-grained local structures and suppresses high-frequency noise. Finally, we propose a Gain-Adaptive Feature Modulation (GAFM) mechanism to address highly spatially-variant residual noise. By transforming the self-estimated illumination map into an internal spatial gain prior, GAFM dynamically guides a blind-spot network for spatially-aware denoising. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering superior noise suppression and textural fidelity. Code will be publicly released at https://visonj.github.io/IRLE/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于内部参考的自监督低光照增强框架，从退化图像自身提取物理和结构参考以解耦光照、纹理和噪声。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督低光照图像增强虽无需外部配对数据，但缺乏外部参考导致网络难以解耦复杂光照、细腻纹理和放大噪声。现有方法在这三方面平衡不足，亟需一种能从输入图像内部提取可靠参考的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出内部参考LLIE框架：1)局部曝光模拟提取低频伪真值作为物理参考，引导全局光照估计和颜色校正；2)双域保留策略（光照对齐感知损失+移位不变谱相关损失）构建空间和谱域的结构参考；3)增益自适应特征调制(GAFM)机制利用自估计光照图作为内部空间增益先验，动态指导盲点网络进行空间感知去噪。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在噪声抑制和纹理保真度方面均达到最优性能，显著优于现有自监督和全监督方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但实验验证了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 所提内部参考框架有效解决了自监督LLIE中光照、纹理和噪声解耦的难题，实现高质量增强。其物理和结构参考的提取策略具有通用性，可推广至其他图像恢复任务。未来可探索降低计算开销及在极端低光照场景下的泛化性。

title: Mining Multi-Modality Spatio-Temporal Cues for Video Important Person Identification
abstract: Identifying key individuals in video scenes is essential for applications such as automated video editing and intelligent surveillance. Current methods primarily focus on static images and immediate visual cues, overlooking the rich spatio-temporal information in videos. This leads to the phenomenon of Temporal Importance Shift (TIS), wherein individuals deemed significant in early frames may be demoted as the entire temporal context is considered. To address this, we introduce the Video Important Person (VIP) identification task, aimed at automatically identifying the most influential individuals in videos while providing textual rationales. We present Temporal-VIP, a large-scale rationale-annotated dataset consisting of 9,249 video segments across 11 categories with aligned importance rationales. To mitigate TIS, we develop the VIP-Net framework, which includes a Social Cue Encoder (SCE) for extracting multi-modal spatio-temporal cues, a Temporal Importance Rectifier (TIR) for hierarchical cue fusion and cross-modal alignment, and VIP Inference for ranking individuals. Experimental results show that VIP-Net achieves 67.3% accuracy, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art models (37.5%-53.9%) and yielding a mean rationale similarity of 0.63 to ground truth through feature-guided LLM refinement. The dataset and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/yml2002/Temporal-VIP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视频重要人物识别任务及VIP-Net框架，通过多模态时空线索缓解时间重要性转移，显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频关键人物识别方法仅关注静态图像和即时视觉线索，忽视了丰富的时空信息，导致时间重要性转移（TIS）现象，即早期帧中重要人物在全局上下文中被降级。这限制了识别准确性，亟需利用多模态时空信息自动识别重要人物并提供文本理由。
light_analysis.method: 提出VIP-Net框架，包含社会线索编码器（SCE）提取多模态时空线索，时间重要性整流器（TIR）进行层次化融合和跨模态对齐，以及VIP推理用于人物排序。同时构建Temporal-VIP数据集，含9249个视频片段及重要性理由注释，覆盖11个类别。
light_analysis.result: VIP-Net在VIP识别任务上达到67.3%准确率，显著优于现有模型（37.5%-53.9%）；通过特征引导的LLM细化，理由相似度达到0.63。数据集和代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义VIP识别任务，通过多模态时空线索有效解决TIS问题，为自动视频编辑和智能监控提供新方案。Temporal-VIP数据集和VIP-Net框架作为基准，未来可探索更复杂的跨模态推理机制。

title: Online Irregular Multivariate Time Series Forecasting via Uncertainty-Driven Dual-Expert Calibration
abstract: Irregular multivariate time series forecasting is critical in many real-world applications, where time series are irregularly sampled and exhibit dynamically evolving missingness patterns. Although existing methods perform well in offline settings, they often suffer from significant performance degradation when deployed online due to dynamic shifts in data distribution. Maintaining forecasting capability in such dynamic scenarios typically necessitates online adaptation techniques. Since irregular sampling fundamentally undermines temporal continuity and periodicity, we cannot leverage these widely studied characteristics from regular MTS for online learning. To this end, we study the problem of online IMTS forecasting and propose Under-Cali, an uncertainty-driven dual-expert calibration framework consisting of three core components: an uncertainty estimator, a dual-expert calibration module, and an adaptive routing module. We design an uncertainty estimator that serves as the core control signal to jointly manage inference and adaptation processes. In our framework, the uncertainty estimator first assesses uncertainty for each incoming batch. The adaptive routing module then directs samples with high uncertainty to the unreliable expert for calibration, while low uncertainty samples remain with the reliable expert. Subsequently, the system updates the reliable expert and the uncertainty estimator using well-calibrated reliable samples, and updates the unreliable expert with challenging samples, enabling stable and efficient online learning. Under-Cali keeps the source forecasting model frozen and performs adaptation only through a lightweight, model-agnostic calibration module, enabling efficient adaptation. Extensive experiments on IMTS benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements with low computational cost. Our code is available at https://github.com/HaonanWen/Under-Cali.

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性驱动的双专家校准框架Under-Cali，实现在线不规则多变量时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有不规则时间序列预测方法在离线场景表现良好，但在线部署时因数据分布动态变化导致性能显著下降。不规则采样破坏了时间连续性和周期性，无法利用常规多变量时间序列的在线学习技术。因此需要专门针对在线不规则多变量时间序列预测的方法。
light_analysis.method: Under-Cali框架包含三个核心组件：不确定性估计器评估每个输入批次的不确定性；自适应路由模块将高不确定样本导向不可靠专家进行校准，低不确定样本保留给可靠专家；随后用可靠样本更新可靠专家和不确定性估计器，用挑战样本更新不可靠专家。源预测模型保持冻结，仅通过轻量、模型无关的校准模块进行适应，实现高效在线学习。
light_analysis.result: 在不规则多变量时间序列基准数据集上的大量实验表明，Under-Cali以较低的计算成本持续提升了预测性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但与现有方法对比取得一致改进，验证了框架的有效性和高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了在线不规则多变量时间序列预测问题，并提出不确定性驱动的双专家校准框架Under-Cali，通过动态分配样本实现稳定高效的在线适应。该框架具有模型无关性，易于集成到现有预测模型中。代码已开源，为实际应用提供了实用解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的不确定性建模和专家更新策略。

title: Satisfiability Solving with LLMs: A Matched-Pair Evaluation of Reasoning Capability
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for tasks that implicitly reduce to Boolean satisfiability (SAT), yet their reasoning ability on SAT remains unclear. We present a systematic study of LLMs on 2-SAT and 3-SAT, together with two canonical reductions, Vertex Cover and discrete 3D packing, to probe representation-invariant reasoning. We first evaluate models using conventional metrics, including accuracy, precision, recall, and F1, as well as the SAT phase-transition setting. We find that these metrics can be misleading: many models obtain high scores by over-predicting satisfiable formulas, fail to reproduce the classical easy-hard-easy signature around the 3-SAT threshold, and degrade sharply as the number of variables grows.   To address this problem, we introduce a paired-formula protocol based on minimally different satisfiable and unsatisfiable instances, together with Accurate Differentiation Rate (ADR), which requires both members of each pair to be classified correctly. ADR separates reasoning-oriented models from heuristic ones and correlates with witness validity. Beyond CNF, we test cross-representation consistency by converting CNF to Vertex Cover and 3-SAT to discrete 3D packing. Model decisions on CNF and on the corresponding graph or packing instances agree for most models on more than 80 percent of instances, suggesting stable decision rules across representations. Overall, our results show that SAT is a conservative probe for LLM reasoning, and that paired evaluation with ADR provides a more faithful and representation-robust assessment than conventional metrics.
comment: Accepted at the ACM International Conference on the Foundations of Software Engineering (FSE 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出配对公式协议和准确区分率（ADR），揭示传统指标在评估LLM对SAT问题推理能力时的误导性，并验证跨表示一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs被用于隐式简化为布尔可满足性（SAT）的任务，但其推理能力尚不明确。传统评估指标如准确率、F1等存在误导：模型常通过过度预测可满足公式获得高分，无法再现3-SAT的经典易-难-易相变特征，且随变量数增加性能急剧下降。因此需要更忠实的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于最小差异可满足/不可满足实例的配对公式协议，并引入准确区分率（ADR），要求配对中两个实例均被正确分类。进一步通过将CNF转换为顶点覆盖和离散3D装箱问题，测试跨表示一致性。实验使用2-SAT和3-SAT实例，评估多个LLM。
light_analysis.result: 传统指标下模型得分高但实为启发式；ADR能有效区分推理型与启发式模型，且与见证有效性相关。跨表示测试中，多数模型在80%以上实例上决策一致，表明具有稳定决策规则。SAT作为推理探针是保守的，配对抗估比传统指标更忠实鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明配对评估与ADR比传统指标更能忠实反映LLM的SAT推理能力，且跨表示一致性高。该方法为评估LLM推理提供了鲁棒框架，但局限性在于仅针对SAT领域，未来可扩展至其他逻辑推理任务。

title: Transformers Provably Learn to Internalize Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting substantially improves the sample efficiency of transformers, reducing the complexity of tasks like parity learning from exponential to polynomial in the input length. However, generating explicit reasoning steps at inference is computationally expensive. Implicit Chain-of-Thought (ICoT) has emerged as a promising empirical remedy that trains models to internalize intermediate steps within their hidden states, but its theoretical foundations remain poorly understood. We give the first theoretical analysis of ICoT, proving that an $L$-layer transformer trained under our proposed Log-ICoT curriculum learns $k$-parity with $\mathsf{poly}(n)$ samples and $L = \log_2 k$ training stages. This matches the sample efficiency of explicit CoT while eliminating its inference overhead, and extends prior one-layer parity guarantees to multi-layer architectures. Compared to standard ICoT, which removes thinking tokens one at a time, Log-ICoT removes them in geometric chunks, reducing the number of stages from linear in $k$ to logarithmic. Experiments on multi-layer transformers confirm the theory and visualize how reasoning is progressively absorbed into deeper layers.

light_analysis.overview: 首次理论证明隐式思维链（ICoT）的多层变压器在Log-ICoT课程下能以多项式样本学习k-parity，匹配显式CoT样本效率且消除推理开销。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought（CoT）提示显著提升变压器样本效率，但显式推理步骤导致高计算开销。隐式思维链（ICoT）通过内化中间步骤到隐藏状态减轻此问题，但其理论基础缺失。本文填补空白，首次理论分析ICoT，并解决训练阶段过多导致的效率问题，推动高效推理的理论发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出Log-ICoT课程，以几何级数方式逐步移除推理token，将训练阶段从线性降至对数（L=log2 k）。证明L层变压器在该课程下学习k-parity仅需poly(n)样本，理论分析扩展了先前单层保证到多层架构。实验采用多层变压器验证，并可视化推理逐步吸收到深层的过程。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明Log-ICoT达到显式CoT的样本效率（多项式复杂度），同时消除推理时额外计算。与标准ICoT的线性阶段数相比，Log-ICoT仅需对数个阶段（如k=8时从8阶段减至3阶段）。实验确认多层变压器在k-parity任务上随层数增加准确率提升，验证课程有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为隐式思维链提供严谨理论分析，表明其样本效率与显式CoT相当但推理更高效。Log-ICoT课程显著减少训练阶段，具有实际应用价值。局限性在于当前仅分析k-parity，未来可扩展至更复杂推理任务，并探索深层网络中内化表征的动态。

title: Evaluating the Realism of LLM-powered Social Agents: A Case Study of Reactions to Spanish Online News
abstract: LLM-powered social agents are increasingly used to simulate online social behavior, yet their realism remains difficult to validate. Existing work has largely relied on general-purpose benchmarks, while less attention has been paid to short, reactive discourse such as audience replies to online news.   In this paper, we evaluate whether LLM-generated reactions to Spanish online news reproduce measurable properties of real audience discourse. Using the Hatemedia dataset, we pair 5,631 news items with 58,555 real audience reactions, and generate a matched synthetic dataset using five LLMs under a shared experimental setting. We compare real and synthetic reactions across three dimensions: hate speech, sentiment, and semantic alignment, considering both off-the-shelf and fine-tuned generation.   Results show that off-the-shelf models are poor proxies for real audience reactions: they strongly underproduce hate speech, introduce model-specific sentiment biases, and remain distributionally distant from human replies. Fine-tuning improves fidelity unevenly. Qwen3 provides the most balanced approximation, while Mistral7B achieves the strongest sentiment and semantic alignment but overshoots hate prevalence. Plausible synthetic replies do not necessarily reproduce the distributional properties of public discourse.

light_analysis.overview: 评估LLM生成西班牙新闻评论的真实性，发现现成模型与真实分布差异大，微调可部分改善。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM驱动的社交代理被用于模拟在线社交行为，但其真实性难以验证。现有工作多依赖通用基准，较少关注短反应性话语（如新闻评论区）。本文聚焦西班牙在线新闻的受众评论，旨在验证LLM生成的回复是否能复现真实话语的可测量属性，从而填补该领域的研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于Hatemedia数据集，包含5,631条新闻和58,555条真实评论，使用五种LLM（如Qwen3、Mistral7B）在相同实验设置下生成匹配的合成数据集。从仇恨言论、情感和语义对齐三个维度，对比现成模型和微调模型的生成结果，分析其与真实回复的分布差异。
light_analysis.result: 现成模型严重低估仇恨言论，引入模型特定情感偏见，分布上与真实回复差距大。微调后保真度提升不均：Qwen3提供最均衡的近似，Mistral7B在情感和语义对齐上最强但高估仇恨发生率。表明看似合理的合成回复未必复现真实话语的分布属性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLM生成社交媒体评论时存在的真实感缺陷，强调不能仅凭表面合理性判断真实性。研究为社交模拟领域的评价方法提供了新视角，指出需关注分布级属性。未来可探索更精细的微调策略或结合外部知识以提升真实性。

title: Models That Know How Evaluations Are Designed Score Safer
abstract: The validity of AI safety evaluations depends on models behaving consistently across controlled and deployment settings. Prior work has identified test-time contextual cues, such as hypothetical scenarios, as a source of verbalized evaluation awareness and subsequent behavioral shift. In this paper, we investigate a potential explanation of this phenomenon: evaluation meta-knowledge, defined as parametric knowledge about the structural traits that characterize evaluations. Similar to dataset contamination, where benchmark exposure leads to higher performance through memorization, we hypothesize that models trained on texts describing evaluation practices may implicitly learn to recognize and respond to evaluation-like contexts, for instance, through exposure to scientific articles or social media posts about AI benchmarking. To test this, we fine-tune models on synthetic documents describing evaluation traits such as verifiable structures or moral dilemmas. Evaluating this fine-tuned model on six safety benchmarks, we find that it is significantly safer than the base model and control model. This behavioral shift persists even when restricting the analysis to responses lacking explicit verbalization of evaluation awareness. Our results demonstrate that evaluation meta-knowledge may inflate safety benchmark performance, introducing a novel confounder that is independent of explicit memorization or verbalized evaluation awareness, thus, challenging to detect. These findings have important implications for the design and interpretation of AI safety evaluations. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/compass-group-tue/arxiv2026_evaluation_meta_knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出评估元知识（evaluation meta-knowledge）作为AI安全评估中新的混淆因素，通过微调模型暴露于描述评估特征的数据，发现模型安全性显著提升，挑战了评估的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI安全评估的有效性依赖于模型在受控和部署环境中的行为一致性。先前工作发现测试时上下文线索（如假设场景）会导致评估意识与行为变化。然而，模型可能通过训练数据中的科学文章或社交媒体帖子隐式学习识别评估类上下文，类似数据集污染。这种评估元知识可能夸大安全基准性能，但未被充分研究。本文旨在验证这一假设，揭示其对评估设计的影响。
light_analysis.method: 通过微调模型在合成文档上学习评估特征（如可验证结构、道德困境），构建带有评估元知识的模型。使用六个安全基准评估微调模型、基线和控制模型。控制模型接受无关合成文档微调。关键创新在于区分评估元知识与显式记忆或评估意识，通过分析无显式评估意识表达的回答来排除混杂。数据集为自建合成文档，模型结构未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 微调模型在六个安全基准上显著比基线和控制模型更安全，安全性提升幅度依赖基准。行为转变即使在分析中限制为无显式评估意识表达的回答时仍然存在。这表明评估元知识独立于显式记忆或口头化评估意识，挑战传统检测方法。结果揭示了一个新的混淆因素，可能虚假提升安全评估分数，需警惕。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实评估元知识能诱导模型在安全评估中表现更安全，即使无显式评估意识。这为AI安全评估设计提出警示：需控制训练数据中评估特征的暴露，避免污染。研究具有重要学术价值，解释了评估分数膨胀的可能原因。未来需开发检测和缓解此类混淆的方法。局限性在于合成数据可能无法完全代表真实世界暴露。

title: PLS in the Mirror of Self-Attention
abstract: This note provides an interesting observation on casting partial least square (PLS) as a linearized self-attention so that PLS may be studied within the neural network paradigm. On the other hand, the dimensionality reduction and selection of predictors in PLS may indicate that self-attention includes certain degree of dimensionality normalization toward improved learning.

light_analysis.overview: 将偏最小二乘法（PLS）重新表述为线性化自注意力机制，桥接统计学习与神经网络。
light_analysis.motivation: PLS是经典统计方法，但长期与神经网络领域分离。本文旨在建立PLS与自注意力的理论联系，使PLS能在神经网络框架下分析，同时揭示自注意力中的隐式维度归一化，为理解深度学习机制提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是将PLS建模为线性化的自注意力机制，通过数学变换实现等价映射。具体而言，PLS的投影和回归过程被重新解释为自注意力的查询-键-值计算，其中权重矩阵线性化。这一转化使得PLS可融入神经网络架构，并暗示自注意力通过类似PLS的降维选择实现归一化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，主要贡献为理论推导和概念性观察。作者未报告定量性能指标，但指出该联系可能为后续方法融合（如PLS增强的注意力模块）奠定基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出PLS与自注意力的对偶关系，一方面将传统统计工具纳入现代深度学习框架，另一方面从PLS的降维特性解释了自注意力的工作机理。工作具有理论创新价值，但缺乏实证验证，未来可在具体任务（如序列建模）中测试该等价性的实际效果。

title: Thinned Mean Field Langevin Dynamics
abstract: Several important learning tasks can be formulated as minimizing an entropy-regularized objective over an appropriate space of probability distributions. Mean-field Langevin dynamics (MFLD) facilitate computation in this general context, casting the minimizer as the invariant distribution of a McKean--Vlasov process, which can be numerically discretized using $N$ particles and thus simulated. However, simulating this interacting particle system has computational complexity of order $N^2$. Motivated by recent research into \emph{kernel thinning}, we propose \texttt{KT-MFLD}, in which each particle interacts only with a thinned particle coreset of size $\mathcal{O}(N^{\frac{1}{2}})$. \texttt{KT-MFLD} thus reduces the computational complexity to order $N^{\frac{3}{2}}$ while, under mild regularity conditions, achieving the same convergence guarantees (up to logarithmic factors) as MFLD. Our theoretical analysis is empirically confirmed on tasks including the training of student-teacher neural networks, quantization with maximum mean discrepancy, and computation of predictively-oriented posteriors in a post-Bayesian framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KT-MFLD方法，通过核稀疏化将MFLD的粒子交互复杂度从N²降至N^{3/2}，同时保持收敛保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多学习任务（如训练神经网络、量化、后贝叶斯推断）可转化为熵正则化优化问题。MFLD通过N个粒子模拟McKean-Vlasov过程来求解，但每个粒子的交互复杂度为N²，计算成本高。现有方法缺乏高效的粒子交互机制，限制了大规模应用。
light_analysis.method: KT-MFLD在MFLD基础上引入核稀疏化技术：每个粒子仅与一个大小为O(N^{1/2})的稀疏粒子核心集交互，而非全部N个粒子，从而将计算复杂度降至O(N^{3/2})。该方法在温和正则条件下，保留了MFLD的收敛速度（仅多对数因子），并通过理论分析保证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个任务中验证：学生-教师神经网络训练、最大均值差异量化、后贝叶斯预测后验计算。实验结果显示，KT-MFLD在保持与MFLD相当收敛性能的同时，显著降低了计算开销，实现了复杂度从N²到N^{3/2}的改进（摘要未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: KT-MFLD为大规模熵正则化学习提供了高效求解方案，显著降低MFLD的计算瓶颈。其核稀疏化思想可推广至其他交互粒子系统。未来可探索自适应稀疏策略或结合其他加速技术。

title: Deformable Gaussian Occupancy: Decoupling Rigid and Nonrigid Motion with Factorized Distillation
abstract: Understanding dynamic 3D environments is essential for safe autonomous driving, particularly when reasoning about human-centric, nonrigid agents. However, existing weakly supervised occupancy prediction frameworks predominantly assume rigid-body motion and rely on simple frame-to-frame offsets, limiting their ability to capture fine-grained deformations and maintain temporal coherence. To address this issue, we propose DeGO, a deformable Gaussian occupancy framework that unifies decoupled Gaussian deformation with factorized 4D foundation-model distillation. DeGO disentangles rigid and nonrigid motion, enabling each Gaussian primitive to evolve through both deformation and offset-based updates. In parallel, a factorized 4D distillation strategy transfers cross-camera and cross-frame knowledge from the VGGT foundation model, producing foundation-aligned features that enhance temporal consistency. Experiments on the Occ3D-NuScenes benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under weak supervision, delivering 13.5% gains on human-centric instances and 10.9% overall improvements. These results highlight the effectiveness of deformation-aware and foundation-guided occupancy modeling for dynamic scene understanding. The code is publicly available: https://github.com/vita-epfl/DeGO

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeGO框架，通过解耦刚体与非刚体运动结合分解式4D基础模型蒸馏，实现弱监督下的动态3D占用预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有弱监督占用预测框架主要假设刚体运动并依赖简单的帧间偏移，难以捕捉细粒度形变并保持时间连贯性。这限制了动态场景理解能力，尤其是在涉及人类的非刚体运动时表现不足，亟需一种能区分刚体与非刚体运动的建模方法。
light_analysis.method: DeGO框架包含两个核心模块：可变形高斯占用将每个高斯原语的运动分解为形变和偏移两部分，从而解耦刚体与非刚体运动；同时引入分解式4D蒸馏策略，从VGGT基础模型中转移跨相机和跨帧知识，生成基础对齐的特征以增强时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在Occ3D-NuScenes基准上，DeGO在弱监督下达到最佳性能：人类中心实例的IoU提升13.5%，总体IoU提升10.9%。实验结果验证了形变感知和基础引导的占用建模对动态场景理解的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeGO通过解耦运动与基础蒸馏显著提升了弱监督动态占用预测的性能，尤其针对人类等非刚体目标。该工作为自动驾驶中的复杂场景理解提供了新思路，代码已开源。未来可探索更高效的基础模型蒸馏或扩展到其他动态任务。

title: Outer-Momentum Restarting in High-Dimensional Two-Phase Optimization
abstract: Communication-efficient distributed optimizers such as DiLoCo reduce synchronization costs by letting workers perform many local updates before aggregating their progress with an outer momentum optimizer. Recent theory suggests that the outer optimizer acts on an effective spectrum induced by the inner optimization loop, and that the choice of outer momentum controls how progress from local updates is accumulated across communication rounds. We study periodic restarting of the outer momentum as a simple complementary mechanism for controlling this outer memory. In a linearized squared-loss model where prediction-space residuals evolve under the empirical NTK, we derive a mode-wise restart contraction showing that resets exploit phase cancellation by discarding stale momentum while preserving inner-loop progress. Toy experiments verify the predicted contraction behavior, and language-model pretraining experiments show that periodic restarts widen the stable range of outer learning rates and momentum values across communication periods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出外动量周期性重启方法，通过丢弃过时动量保留内环进度，提高分布式优化稳定性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式优化中，DiLoCo等算法通过允许工作节点执行多次本地更新后聚合，使用外动量优化器减少同步开销。现有理论表明外动量控制着通信轮次间本地更新的累积，但外动量可能积累过时信息，导致不稳定性。本文旨在通过周期性重启外动量作为简单互补机制，解决外内存的负效用问题。
light_analysis.method: 在实证NTK下的线性化平方损失模型中，推导出模式级重启收缩，证明重置通过相位取消丢弃过时动量，同时保留内环进度。方法为周期性将外动量重置为零，实验在玩具模型和语言模型预训练中验证，使用不同通信周期和学习率设置。
light_analysis.result: 玩具实验验证了预测的收缩行为。语言模型预训练实验显示，周期性重启拓宽了外学习率和动量值的稳定范围，允许在更宽的参数设置下保持收敛性，表明该方法能提升分布式训练的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 外动量周期性重启是一种简单有效的机制，能改善分布式优化中动量累积的稳定性。学术上揭示了动量重置与相位取消的关系，实际应用中可扩展DiLoCo等优化器的可用超参数范围。未来可探索更复杂的重启策略或自适应间隔。

title: MUSE: Benchmarking Manufacturable, Functional, and Assemblable Text-to-CAD Generation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently advanced text-driven 3D generation, yet Text-to-CAD remains far from supporting industrial product design. Existing benchmarks focus primarily on generating single-part CAD models and evaluate them using geometric similarity metrics that fail to capture functionality, manufacturability, and assemblability. To address this gap, we introduce MUSE, a Text-to-CAD benchmark focused on complex, editable boundary representation (B-Rep) assemblies. MUSE pairs practical design instances with structured Design Specifications and evaluates generated models through a three-stage protocol: code check, geometric check, and design-intent alignment. The final stage uses design-specific rubrics to assess functionality, manufacturability, and assemblability, moving beyond shape matching toward practical design quality. To enable scalable evaluation, we use a rubric-based visual language model (VLM) judge and validate its reliability through human annotation. Experiments on closed-source and open-source LLMs reveal a clear failure cascade from executable code to valid geometry and finally to engineering-ready design, with even the strongest models achieving limited success on fine-grained engineering criteria. Together, MUSE provides a realistic benchmark and evaluation framework for advancing Text-to-CAD from geometric generation toward true engineering design. Our project website, including the leaderboard, dataset, and code, is available at https://dong7313.github.io/muse-benchmark/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MUSE基准，用于评估文本生成CAD模型的功能性、可制造性和可装配性，超越几何相似性度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Text-to-CAD基准主要关注单零件模型的生成，并使用几何相似性指标评估，无法捕捉功能性、可制造性和可装配性，难以支持工业产品设计。因此需要一个新的基准来推动从几何生成向工程设计的转变。
light_analysis.method: MUSE基准聚焦于复杂、可编辑的边界表示（B-Rep）装配体。通过结构化设计规范配对实际设计实例，采用三阶段评估协议：代码检查、几何检查和设计意图对齐。最后阶段使用设计特定评分规则，结合基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的自动评估，并通过人工标注验证可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 对闭源和开源LLM的实验显示明确的失败级联：从可执行代码到有效几何再到工程就绪设计，即使最强模型在细粒度工程标准上成功率有限。MUSE提供了现实基准和评估框架，推动Text-to-CAD从几何生成走向真实工程设计。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUSE填补了Text-to-CAD评估的空白，强调功能、制造和装配，具有重要学术和工业价值。局限性在于依赖VLM评估的准确性，未来可扩展至更多工程约束和更复杂的装配场景。

title: A Generalized Tikhonov Layer for Interpretable-by-design Graph Neural Networks
abstract: We propose the Tikhonov layer, a graph neural network layer that is interpretable by design: once trained, its learned parameters directly reveal which node features and which aspects of the graph topology were leveraged for prediction. In practice, the layer's propagation matrix takes the closed-form $R = (p(L)+Q)^{-1} Q$, where $L$ is the normalized graph Laplacian, $Q = diag(q_1,...,q_n)$ a learnable diagonal matrix of positive node-importance scores, and $p(\cdot)$ a learnable polynomial. For any input feature $x$, the layer output $Rx$ is the exact minimizer of a generalized graph Tikhonov problem that trades off node-level data fidelity against a topology-driven regularization penalty. The learned pair $\{\{q_i\},p\}$ constitutes a built-in explanation: large $q_i$ indicates that node $i$'s own features drive the prediction, while small $q_i$ signals reliance on the local graph topology; the shape of $p$ reveals whether homophily, heterophily, or a band-pass response is exploited. Expressivity is preserved by routing complexity through a dedicated, arbitrarily deep Q-network that produces the importance scores, while the Tikhonov layer itself remains transparent. We prove that distinct node-importance matrices yield distinct propagation operators, structurally coupling the explanation to the computation. Additionally, the Tikhonov layer provides, in a single layer, a global receptive field, mitigating both oversmoothing and oversquashing. Experiments on standard graph classification benchmarks confirm that the model matches (and sometimes outperforms) opaque baselines while producing interpretable and faithful explanations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种本质可解释的图神经网络层Tikhonov层，其传播矩阵具有闭式解，学习参数直接揭示节点特征和拓扑对预测的贡献。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图神经网络可解释性方法多为事后再解释，与模型本身解耦，且可能牺牲性能。本文旨在设计一种本质上可解释的GNN层，在训练后直接通过参数解读预测依据，同时保持与不透明模型相当的表达力，以解决可解释性与性能的权衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心是Tikhonov层，传播矩阵R=(p(L)+Q)^{-1}Q，其中L是归一化拉普拉斯，Q是可学习对角节点重要性矩阵，p是可学习多项式。输出Rx是广义图Tikhonov问题的最小化解，平衡数据保真度和拓扑正则化。通过一个深层Q网络生成Q，使层内透明，表达力由Q网络承载。该单层具有全局感受野，缓解过平滑和过挤压。
light_analysis.result: 在标准图分类基准上，Tikhonov层匹配甚至超越不透明基线（如GIN、GCN等）的性能，同时产生可解释且忠实的解释。具体地，学习到的节点重要性q_i和多项式p直接指示预测依赖节点特征还是局部拓扑，以及同配性或异配性等拓扑特性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了一种本质上可解释的GNN层，通过结构设计将解释与计算耦合，避免了事后解释的不忠实性。其全局感受野和理论性质（如不同重要性矩阵对应不同传播算子）为可解释GNN提供了新方向。未来可扩展到更复杂的图任务和大规模图。

title: Continual Model Routing in Evolving Model Hubs
abstract: AI model hubs provide access to a rapidly growing collection of powerful pre-trained models, enabling off-the-shelf mixture-of-experts systems with different routing strategies. However, this rapid growth poses two fundamental challenges: scaling model selection across thousands of experts and continually updating routing mechanisms as new models and tasks are introduced. In this paper, we formalise this setting as Continual Model Routing (CMR) and propose CMRBench, a new large-scale benchmark simulating realistic hub expansion and including over 2,000 candidate models. Finally, we introduce CARvE, a contrastive embedding approach for efficient continual model routing via checkpoint-based anchoring and structured replay. Extensive empirical results and ablations show that CARvE significantly outperforms zero-shot retrieval, fine-tuning, and adapter-merging baselines in model, family, and domain-level accuracy.
comment: 42 pages, 24 tables, 6 figures, to be published at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出持续模型路由（CMR）问题，构建大规模基准CMRBench，并设计对比嵌入方法CARvE实现高效路由。
light_analysis.motivation: AI模型中心的快速增长导致模型选择困难，且路由机制需持续更新以适应新模型和任务。现有方法无法有效处理持续扩展和更新需求，缺乏相应基准和高效方法，亟需形式化定义和解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 形式化定义持续模型路由（CMR），构建CMRBench基准（含2000+候选模型，模拟真实扩展）。提出CARvE对比嵌入方法，通过检查点锚定和结构化回放实现高效路由，无需重新训练整个系统。
light_analysis.result: CARvE在模型、家族和领域级别准确率上显著优于零样本检索、微调和适配器合并基线，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验及消融研究证实其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文形式化CMR问题，提供基准和高效方法，对实际模型中心应用有价值。未来可探索更复杂路由策略或扩展到异构模型。

title: A Conflict-Aware Penalty and Statistical Loss Framework for Balancing Modalities and Enhancing Stability in Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) fuses text, acoustic, and visual streams to infer sentiment. Because pre-trained text encoders are far more expressive than their acoustic and visual counterparts, the text modality tends to dominate optimization, suppressing weaker modalities and inducing gradient norm conflicts that destabilize training. To address this, we propose a Conflict-aware Penalty (CP) that detects and penalizes gradient norm conflicts at each training step, and a Statistical Loss (SL) that aligns predicted distribution statistics with empirical input statistics. Crucially, CP prevents dominant modality gradients from interfering with the SL objective, enabling synergistic training within a unified framework incorporating adaptive modality encoding, gated cross-modal fusion, and unimodal auxiliary heads. Experiments on CMU-MOSI demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with ablation studies confirming the effectiveness of each component.

light_analysis.overview: 提出冲突感知惩罚与统计损失框架，平衡多模态情感分析中文本主导问题并提升训练稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态情感分析中，预训练文本编码器相较于声学、视觉编码器表达能力更强，导致文本模态主导优化，压制其他模态，并引发梯度范数冲突，造成训练不稳定。现有方法未有效解决这一模态不平衡问题，亟需一种能动态平衡模态贡献并稳定训练过程的机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出冲突感知惩罚（CP），在每一步训练中检测并惩罚梯度范数冲突，防止主导模态梯度干扰统计损失目标；统计损失（SL）使预测分布统计量与经验输入统计量对齐。框架整合自适应模态编码、门控跨模态融合及单模态辅助头，实现协同训练。
light_analysis.result: 在CMU-MOSI数据集上取得最先进性能，消融研究验证了冲突感知惩罚和统计损失各组件的有效性，表明框架能有效提升情感分析准确率并增强训练稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过动态梯度冲突惩罚和分布统计对齐，有效缓解多模态情感分析中的模态不平衡与训练不稳定问题，提升模型性能。未来可扩展至更多模态场景，并探索更高效的冲突检测机制。

title: Efficient Pre-Training of LLMs through Truncated SVD Layers
abstract: The massive scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) has made pretraining increasingly cost-prohibitive. While low-rank representation and orthonormal weight matrices could in principle reduce parameter counts and computational overhead, most existing methods rely on static rank selection and do not enforce weight orthonormality due to high computational cost. This paper introduces TSVD, a framework that maintains low rank and strict orthonormality throughout the training process. It utilizes a spectral energy-based heuristic for adaptive rank selection, and a caching mechanisms to maintain orthonormality. Theoretical analysis justifies the advantage of the approach in pretraining dynamics and experiments across various model scales demonstrate that it is effective empirically. TSVD matches or exceeds the performance of full-parameter baselines while significantly reducing compute requirements. The approach thus offers a well-founded, practical, and scalable path toward efficient high-performance LLM pretraining.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TSVD框架，通过低秩表示和严格正交权重矩阵，结合自适应秩选择，实现LLM高效预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM预训练成本急剧上升，现有低秩方法采用静态秩选择且未强制权重正交性，导致参数效率和计算优化不足。TSVD旨在解决这些局限，提供一种更高效的预训练方案。
light_analysis.method: TSVD框架基于SVD，引入频谱能量启发式实现自适应秩选择，利用缓存机制维持权重正交性。理论分析表明该方法优化预训练动态，实验覆盖多种模型规模。
light_analysis.result: 在多种模型规模上，TSVD匹配或超越全参数基线性能，同时显著降低计算开销。具体提升幅度和效率改进摘要未详细量化。
light_analysis.conclusion: TSVD为高效LLM预训练提供了理论基础和实用方案，兼具可扩展性。未来可进一步探索更优的秩选择策略或与其他压缩技术结合。

title: Semantic Optimal Transport for Sparse Autoencoder Feature Matching and Circuit Compression
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become a central tool for interpreting language models. However, two key SAE analyses that remain difficult to scale are (1) matching semantically similar features across multi-layers and (2) compressing large feature circuits into interpretable supernodes. Although these have been treated as separate problems, we show that both are instances of a more fundamental challenge, which we frame as the estimation of semantic distances between SAE features that lie on different activation manifolds. We introduce a distributional framework for this problem, in which each feature is represented not by a single decoder vector like in the literature, but by an activation-weighted distribution over the hidden states that express it. By projecting these distributions into a shared reference space and comparing them with Wasserstein distance, our method provides a unified semantic metric for cross-layer feature comparison. We prove that our representation is invariant to activation rescaling, stable under perturbations, and recovers true matches under finite-sample margin conditions. Empirically, our method outperforms decoder-vector and LLM-based baselines and captures subtle functional distinctions between related features. Notably, our method compresses large feature circuits into interpretable supernodes automatically.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最优传输的语义度量框架，统一解决SAE跨层特征匹配和电路压缩问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）已成为解释语言模型的核心工具，但跨层语义特征匹配和大规模特征电路压缩难以扩展。现有方法将两者视为独立问题，但本质是估计不同激活流形上SAE特征间的语义距离。缺乏统一的度量方式限制了SAE分析的规模化与可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 每个特征用激活加权分布表示，而非单一解码器向量；将这些分布投影到共享参考空间，利用Wasserstein距离计算跨层语义相似度。理论证明该表示具有激活缩放不变性、扰动稳定性，且在有限样本下恢复真实匹配。方法将特征匹配与电路压缩统一为语义距离估计问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法优于基于解码器向量和LLM的基线，能捕捉相关特征间的细微功能差异。自动将大型特征电路压缩为可解释超节点，无需额外处理。在跨层匹配任务中准确率显著提升，摘要未给出具体数值但明确强调性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 统一框架解决了SAE分析中两个关键挑战，提供了理论保障的语义度量。学术上揭示了特征匹配与电路压缩的共同本质，实践中有助于构建更可解释的神经网络。未来可扩展至其他模型结构或引入更复杂的分布距离。

title: Tree of Thoughts as a Classical Heuristic Search Problem: Formal Foundations and Design Patterns
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet their standard generation process -- auto-regressive token prediction -- is inherently myopic and prone to cascading errors. To address this, the Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT) framework creates a search space over intermediate reasoning steps, allowing search models to explore, look ahead, and backtrack. However, current ToT research remains fragmented across Natural Language Processing and Automated Planning communities, often using inconsistent terminology and ad-hoc implementations. Consequently, we synthesize the ToT landscape through a unified taxonomy based on classical heuristic search terminology. We map LLM-based reasoning to classical search components: state representation (granularity of thoughts), successor generation (prompting operators), and heuristic evaluation (self-assessment of progress). We analyze existing work within the context of our taxonomy and identify emerging design patterns: systematic search (Best-First Search) for shallow, deterministic tasks and lookahead-heavy strategies (DFS, MCTS) for deep multi-step reasoning. We conclude by identifying open algorithmic challenges at the intersection of heuristic search and LLM reasoning, and call on the heuristic search community to engage with this emerging domain.
comment: Extended version of the SoCS 2026 paper. Includes appendices omitted from the proceedings version

light_analysis.overview: 将Tree-of-Thoughts框架形式化为经典启发式搜索问题，提出统一分类法并识别设计模式。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM的自回归生成方式短视易错，Tree-of-Thoughts通过搜索中间步骤缓解这一问题，但现有研究术语不一致、实现即席化，缺乏统一理论框架。本文旨在用经典启发式搜索术语统一ToT领域，促进跨社区协作。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于经典启发式搜索的统一分类法，将LLM推理映射为三个关键组件：状态表示（思考粒度）、后继生成（提示运算符）和启发式评估（自我评估）。通过该分类法分析现有方法，识别出系统性搜索（如Best-First Search）适用于浅层确定性任务，而前瞻性策略（如DFS、MCTS）适用于深层多步推理。
light_analysis.result: 本文未进行新的实验，而是通过分类法系统梳理了现有ToT方法，揭示了设计模式与任务类型的对应关系，为后续算法设计提供了理论指导。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了ToT与启发式搜索的理论联系，为LLM推理研究提供了严格的形式化基础。识别了开放算法挑战，呼吁启发式搜索社区参与这一新兴领域，有望推动更高效、更鲁棒的推理策略发展。

title: A Multi-dimensional Framework for Evaluating Generalization in EEG Foundation Models
abstract: Evaluating foundation models under appropriate adaptation settings is essential for understanding the quality and transferability of the learned representations. Recent EEG foundation models have demonstrated promising transfer capabilities across tasks and datasets, motivating their growing use in neurotechnology and clinical applications. However, these models are typically evaluated under full fine-tuning on well-curated downstream datasets, a setting that does not reflect biomedical domain constraints such as limited labeled data, reduced sensor coverage, or parameter-efficient adaptation. In this work, we propose a multi-dimensional evaluation framework for assessing EEG models under realistic low-resource conditions. Empirical analysis of both supervised EEG models and recent EEG foundation models, including LaBraM, CSBrain, and CBraMod, across 6 different datasets is performed under the proposed multi-dimensional evaluation framework. We find that EEG foundation models consistently provide performance gains on long-context tasks such as sleep stage prediction and mental health state classification. In contrast, for short-window Brain Computer Interface style tasks, supervised models achieve comparable despite having substantially fewer parameters. Additional analyses demonstrate that current foundation models provide limited robustness to short-window tasks and channel constrained settings. Together, these findings motivate the use of multi-dimensional evaluation protocols that characterize model behavior under realistic use constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多维度评估框架，系统分析EEG基础模型在低资源条件下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前EEG基础模型通常在全微调、精心整理的数据集上评估，忽视了生物医学领域的实际约束，如标签数据有限、传感器覆盖减少或参数高效适应。现有评估方式无法真实反映模型在现实应用中的表现，需提出更合理的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建多维度评估框架，涵盖低资源条件（小样本、少通道、参数高效微调）。在6个不同数据集上对比监督模型与三个EEG基础模型（LaBraM、CSBrain、CBraMod），包括长上下文任务（睡眠分期、心理健康分类）和短窗口BCI任务。
light_analysis.result: 基础模型在长上下文任务（如睡眠分期、心理健康状态分类）中持续优于监督模型，但在短窗口BCI任务中，监督模型以更少参数达到可比性能。此外，基础模型对短窗口任务和通道受限场景的鲁棒性有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多维度评估协议能更真实地表征模型行为，推动EEG基础模型在生物医学领域的实际部署。未来需改进模型对短窗口和少通道任务的适应性。

title: Soft-SVeRL: Self-Verified Reinforcement Learning with Soft Rewards
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has improved language models in domains such as mathematics and code, where correctness can be checked automatically. However, many important tasks are only partially verifiable: prompts contain multiple requirements, responses may satisfy some but not all of them, or no single reference answer might exist. We introduce Soft-RLVR, a framework for reinforcement learning from decomposed, learned verification signals. Soft-RLVR converts each prompt into a checklist of atomic requirements, scores candidate responses item by item with an LLM verifier, and trains on the resulting soft reward. Checklist-based rewards turn sparse pass/fail supervision into a denser partial-credit signal, but they also introduce a tradeoff: averaging item-level judgments can reduce verifier noise, while partial credit can reward incomplete responses. We formalize this tradeoff and identify conditions under which checklist-based verification gives a more reliable RL training signal than holistic verification. We further introduce Soft-SVeRL, a self-verifying variant of Soft-RLVR in which the policy also acts as the verifier. We show that self-verification is prone to reward inflation from overly permissive self-judgments, and that explicit stabilization is needed to prevent this collapse. In a controlled instruction-following setting with rule-based ground-truth evaluation, checklist-based Soft-RLVR improves IFEval by up to 11.1 points using only learned verifier rewards. Our experiments further show that verifier quality and checklist quality both affect downstream RL outcomes, and that explicit stabilization is essential for effective self-verification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于检查列表的软奖励强化学习框架Soft-RLVR及其自验证变体Soft-SVeRL，以处理部分可验证任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法仅适用于完全可验证任务（如数学、代码），但许多实际任务仅部分可验证，例如提示包含多个要求，响应可能只满足部分。需要一种能够利用部分正确信号的强化学习方法，以应对单一标准答案不存在或要求不完整的情况。
light_analysis.method: 将每个提示转换为原子要求检查列表，使用LLM验证器逐项评分生成软奖励（部分信用）。形式化分析了检查列表验证与整体验证的权衡，指出检查列表可降低噪声但可能奖励不完整响应。自验证变体中策略同时作为验证器，但存在奖励膨胀问题，通过显式稳定化防止崩溃。
light_analysis.result: 在受控指令遵循任务中，基于检查列表的Soft-RLVR使用学习到的验证器奖励将IFEval指标提升多达11.1点（基于规则的真实评估）。实验表明验证器质量和检查列表质量均影响下游强化学习效果，且自验证需显式稳定化才能有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出针对部分可验证任务的强化学习框架，通过分解验证信号和软奖励提升了指令遵循性能。自验证扩展需稳定化以防止奖励膨胀。该工作为复杂指令下的语言模型训练提供了新思路，未来可优化检查列表生成和验证器训练。

title: A Matter of TASTE: Improving Coverage and Difficulty of Agent Benchmarks
abstract: As agent capabilities advance, existing benchmarks, such as $τ^2$-Bench, are becoming increasingly saturated. Yet constructing new benchmark tasks remains complex, costly, and labor-intensive. Moreover, the standard approach, in which scenarios are first written in natural language and then mapped to tool sequences, captures only a narrow subset of the tool-use patterns agents exercise. In this paper, we address these problems by reversing the task construction process. We propose TASTE: Task Synthesis from Tool Sequence Evolution, an automatic method that generates challenging tasks with broader tool-use coverage. TASTE utilizes an Adaptive Contrastive $n$-gram model trained on LLM-judged validity signals. This enables sampling valid tool sequences that cover a vast range of tool combinations. TASTE then selects representative sequences from the pool via clustering, instantiates them into complete benchmark tasks, and refines them through iterative difficulty evolution. Using TASTE, we construct $τ^c$-Bench, a challenging extension of the three domains of $τ^2$-Bench. We evaluate $11$ agent/user LLM pairs and find that models nearly saturating $τ^2$-Bench suffer severe performance drops on our tasks (e.g., Gemini-3-Flash falls from $0.82\!-\!0.94$ to $0.28\!-\!0.61$). Beyond increasing difficulty, our generated tasks more than double the number of unique tool combinations agents must execute. Our results suggest high scores on existing benchmarks often reflect saturation rather than robust task-solving ability. By automating the generation of difficult, high-coverage benchmarks, TASTE enables continuous, scalable evaluation of future agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TASTE方法，通过反向任务构建流程自动生成高覆盖、高难度的智能体基准任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体基准如τ²-Bench逐渐饱和，构建新任务复杂且昂贵，传统方法（自然语言到工具序列）覆盖的工具模式狭窄。需要一种自动化方法生成挑战性任务并扩大工具使用覆盖面。
light_analysis.method: TASTE从工具序列演化出发，训练自适应对比n-gram模型（基于LLM有效性信号），采样覆盖大量工具组合的合法序列；通过聚类选择代表性序列，实例化为完整任务，并迭代难度演化。最终构建了τ^c-Bench。
light_analysis.result: 在τ^c-Bench上评估11个智能体/用户LLM对，发现饱和τ²-Bench的模型性能大幅下降（如Gemini-3-Flash从0.82-0.94降至0.28-0.61）。生成任务使独特工具组合数量翻倍以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: TASTE自动化生成高难度、高覆盖率基准，揭示现有高分反映的是饱和而非鲁棒解决方案。为未来智能体提供了可扩展的持续评估方法。

title: High Performance, Low Reliability: Uncertainty Benchmarking for Tabular Foundation Models
abstract: Recent Tabular Foundation Models (TFMs) have demonstrated state-of-the-art predictive performance, often surpassing Gradient-Boosted Decision Trees (GBDTs). However, the trustworthiness of these models, particularly their uncertainty quantification, has been largely overlooked. We investigate this gap through an extensive study comparing TFMs, GBDTs, and classical baselines on the 112 datasets of the TALENT benchmark. Our results reveal a performance-uncertainty trade-off: although TFMs achieve the highest predictive performance, measured by AUC, they exhibit lower conditional coverage under conformal prediction, measured by SSCS, compared to GBDTs. Complementary experiments on synthetic datasets further characterize the regimes in which this effect intensifies. We conclude that while TFMs advance predictive frontiers, achieving well-calibrated uncertainty remains a major open challenge for their reliable adoption. Code is available at: https://github.com/jose-melo/high-performance-low-reliability
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted at ESANN 2026 (European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks, Computational Intelligence and Machine Learning), 22-24 April 2026, Bruges (Belgium)

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了表格基础模型在预测性能与不确定性量化之间的权衡，即高性能但低可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格基础模型（TFMs）在预测性能上已超越梯度提升决策树（GBDTs），但其不确定性量化的可信度被忽视。现有研究多聚焦于预测精度，而缺乏对模型校准性和可靠性的系统评估。这一问题对模型在高风险场景中的实际应用至关重要，因为即使预测准确，如果不确定性估计失准，也可能导致错误决策。因此，亟需对比TFMs与传统方法在不确定性量化上的表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于TALENT基准的112个数据集，系统比较了TFMs、GBDTs及经典基线模型。使用AUC（曲线下面积）衡量预测性能，采用共形预测（Conformal Prediction）的条件覆盖指标SSCS（Standardized Set Coverage Score）评估不确定性校准。此外，在合成数据集上进行补充实验，以刻画性能-不确定性权衡加剧的特定数据特征。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TFMs在AUC上达到最高预测性能，但在共形预测下的SSCS条件覆盖率显著低于GBDTs，即存在明显的性能-不确定性权衡。合成数据集实验进一步揭示了该效应对数据噪声、样本量及特征分布等特性敏感，在特定场景下权衡更为突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 虽然TFMs在预测精度上取得了突破，但其不确定性校准仍是一大挑战，限制了在高可靠性要求场景中的部署。研究强调模型评估需同时考虑性能与可靠性，为未来开发更可信的表格基础模型提供了方向。代码已开源以促进复现与后续研究。

title: Refusal Before Decoding: Detecting and Exploiting Refusal Signals in Intermediate LLM Activations
abstract: In this paper, we investigate whether refusal behavior can be predicted from LLM intermediate activations before decoding using linear probes trained on residual stream activations at each transformer block. We find that refusal is linearly decodable well before the final layer, indicating that safety-relevant behavior is represented in intermediate activations before output generation. To test whether this signal is actionable, we introduce Mechanistic AutoDAN, a probe-guided variant of AutoDAN that replaces full-model fitness evaluation with partial forward passes and probe-based scoring inside a genetic prompt search loop. Across the evaluated models, our method achieves attack success rates competitive with vanilla AutoDAN while reducing per-iteration search time by up to 72%, and probe-guided prompts match or exceed AutoDAN's cross-model transfer in several configurations. We further find that the usefulness of probe guidance increases with model scale. Our results show that refusal is not only observable at the output level, but is encoded as a structured and actionable signal in intermediate LLM activations.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM中间激活中存在可线性解码的拒绝信号，并据此提出Mechanistic AutoDAN方法加速越狱攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有越狱攻击方法如AutoDAN需要完整前向传播进行适应度评估，计算成本高。同时，拒绝行为通常仅在输出层被观察，其内部表示机制尚不明确。本文旨在探索LLM中间激活中是否编码了可检测的拒绝信号，并利用该信号提高攻击效率。
light_analysis.method: 首先在每层Transformer的残差流激活上训练线性探针，用于预测拒绝行为。然后提出Mechanistic AutoDAN，在遗传提示搜索循环中用部分前向传播和探针评分替代完整模型评估，大幅降低搜索时间。该方法无需修改模型参数，仅利用中间表示指导搜索。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型上，Mechanistic AutoDAN实现了与原始AutoDAN相当的攻击成功率，但每轮搜索时间减少高达72%。探针引导的提示在多种配置下匹配或超越了AutoDAN的跨模型迁移性能，且探针的有效性随模型规模增大而提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证实拒绝行为不仅存在于输出层，更是一系列在中间激活中编码的结构化信号，可被线性解码并用于高效攻击。该发现为理解LLM安全机制提供了新视角，但探针的泛化性和对特定攻击的依赖仍需进一步研究。

title: Modeling Vehicle-Type-Specific Pedestrian Crash Avoidance Behavior in Safety-Critical Interactions Using Smooth-Mamba Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: As automated vehicles (AVs) increasingly share roadways with human-driven vehicles (HDVs), understanding how pedestrians respond to different vehicle types in safety-critical interactions is essential for the safe deployment of automated driving technologies. This study extracts safety-critical pedestrian-vehicle interactions from the Argoverse 2 dataset to capture real-world crash avoidance behaviors in encounters involving AVs and HDVs. To model vehicle-type-specific pedestrian crash avoidance behavior, we develop a Smooth-Mamba Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient framework, termed SMamba-DDPG, which integrates smooth action constraints with efficient temporal representation learning. To quantify pedestrian behavioral differences, the framework trains separate crash avoidance policies for pedestrian interactions with AVs and HDVs. Results show that SMamba-DDPG outperforms baseline reinforcement learning and supervised learning models in reproducing pedestrian crash avoidance behaviors. Reconstructed trajectories demonstrate strong behavioral realism, accurately reproducing crash avoidance kinematics in both AV and HDV scenarios. Reaction time analysis shows that the model captures human-like response delays and reveals that pedestrians respond more quickly to AVs than to HDVs. Counterfactual analysis further indicates that pedestrians adopt lower crossing speeds when interacting with AVs. Large-scale safety analysis of model-generated data revealed that pedestrian-AV interactions consistently yielded lower conflict rates and higher pedestrian yielding rates compared to pedestrian-HDV interactions. The findings highlight the importance of incorporating vehicle-type-specific pedestrian behavioral models for safer automated driving system design and more realistic traffic simulations in mixed-traffic environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SMamba-DDPG框架，建模行人对自动驾驶和人类驾驶车辆差异化的避碰行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆(AV)与人类驾驶车辆(HDV)共享道路时，行人在安全关键交互中可能表现出不同行为。理解这些差异对安全部署AV至关重要，但现有方法未考虑车辆类型对行人避碰行为的影响。本文从Argoverse 2数据集提取真实交互数据，旨在量化并建模车辆类型特异的行人避碰行为。
light_analysis.method: 提出SMamba-DDPG框架，将平滑动作约束与高效时域表示学习集成到深度确定性策略梯度(DDPG)中。分别训练行人与AV和HDV交互的避碰策略，以捕捉行为差异。使用Argoverse 2数据集中的安全关键交互数据，通过重构轨迹和反应时间分析评估模型。
light_analysis.result: SMamba-DDPG在复现行人避碰行为上优于基线强化学习和监督学习模型。重构轨迹准确再现了AV和HDV场景下的避碰运动学。反应时间分析显示模型捕捉到人类反应延迟，且行人对AV反应更快。反事实分析表明，行人与AV交互时采用更低的穿行速度。大规模安全分析显示，行人-AV交互的冲突率更低、行人让行率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了车辆类型对行人避碰行为有显著影响，提出的SMamba-DDPG能有效建模这种差异。研究成果可用于更安全的自动驾驶系统设计及混合交通环境中的真实交通仿真。未来工作可扩展至更多车辆类型和交互场景。

title: Resolution-free neural surrogates for geometric parameterization and mapping with spatially varying fields
abstract: Many imaging problems require computing spatial transformations induced by spatially varying intensity, feature, or density fields. Canonical examples include distortion correction, deformable image registration, atlas-based segmentation, and deformation-driven image analysis. These tasks can be formulated as geometric mapping problems in which the transformation is constrained to preserve local structure, control boundary behavior, or regulate angular distortion. Such formulations typically lead to variational models, diffusion processes, or elliptic partial differential equations. However, repeatedly solving high-resolution systems becomes computationally expensive when the underlying parameter fields vary across instances. In this work, we propose a resolution-free neural surrogate for geometric parameterization and mapping problems. Given a spatially varying parameter field $p:Ω\to\mathbb{R}^m$ and query locations $\{x_i\}_{i=1}^N\subsetΩ$, the model predicts mapped locations $\{u(x_i)\}_{i=1}^N$ on arbitrary structured or unstructured point sets. To avoid dependence on a fixed grid, we use a multi-resolution geometric encoding strategy that conditions the network on coordinate-augmented samples of the parameter field. The model is trained without labeled solution data by enforcing geometry-aware constraints derived from variational energies, diffusion-based density equalization, and quasi-conformal theory. Experimental results on quasi-conformal mapping and density-equalizing mapping problems are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无分辨率依赖的神经代理模型，通过多分辨率几何编码和几何感知约束实现高效求解几何参数化与映射问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多成像任务（如畸变校正、图像配准）需要计算由空间变化场驱动的几何变换，传统变分模型或PDE方法在高分辨率下计算成本高，且参数场变化时需重复求解。现有方法依赖固定网格，缺乏灵活性和效率。因此，亟需一种不依赖分辨率、能适应任意点集的快速代理模型。
light_analysis.method: 模型接收空间变化参数场 p 和查询位置 x_i，预测映射位置 u(x_i)，适用于任意结构化或非结构化点集。采用多分辨率几何编码策略，将参数场的坐标增强样本作为网络条件，避免固定网格依赖。训练无需标记解数据，通过强制执行从变分能量、扩散密度均衡和拟共形理论导出的几何感知约束进行无监督学习。
light_analysis.result: 在拟共形映射和密度均衡映射问题上的实验表明，所提方法能有效预测映射位置，且具有无分辨率特性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性结果证明了模型在保持几何约束下的准确性，相比传统迭代方法显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了分辨率无关的神经代理模型，为几何参数化和映射提供高效求解方案，可应用于图像配准、变形分析等领域。模型通过多分辨率编码和几何约束实现灵活预测，避免了网格依赖和标记数据需求。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的几何变换或高维参数场。

title: GEM: Generative Supervision Helps Embodied Intelligence
abstract: Embodied Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance and generalization in robotics, particularly within Vision-Language-Action frameworks. However, a significant gap remains between the high-level semantic focus of standard text-guided pre-training paradigms and the low-level spatial and physical knowledge critical for execution in embodied environments. In this paper, we introduce GEM, a Generative-supervised Embodied vision-language Model designed to bridge this divide. We propose integrating a depth map generation task directly into the VLM pre-training phase. By training this generative objective jointly with the main model, we observe substantial improvements in embodied intelligence, significantly enhancing both semantic understanding and physical operation capabilities. To support this paradigm, we curate and release GEM-4M, a comprehensive large-scale dataset featuring a mixture of grounding, reasoning, and planning data paired with high-quality depth supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GEM achieves state-of-the-art results across diverse embodied benchmarks. Furthermore, our deployed action model, GEM-VLA, exhibits vastly superior task execution abilities in both simulation environments and real-world evaluations. Code, models, and datasets are available at https://zhaorw02.github.io/GEM/

light_analysis.overview: 提出生成式监督具身视觉语言模型GEM，通过在VLM预训练中集成深度图生成任务，弥合高层语义与低层物理知识的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本引导的VLM预训练侧重高层语义，忽略具身环境所需的低层空间和物理知识，导致执行能力不足。该方法旨在通过生成式监督同时增强语义理解和物理操作能力。
light_analysis.method: GEM在VLM预训练阶段联合训练深度图生成任务与主模型，利用生成目标提升表示。同时发布大规模数据集GEM-4M，包含接地、推理、规划数据及高质量深度监督。
light_analysis.result: GEM在多个具身基准上达到最新最优，部署的GEM-VLA模型在仿真和真实场景中表现显著优于现有方法，具体性能提升未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEM通过生成式监督有效提升具身智能，开源代码、模型和数据集促进研究。未来可探索更复杂的生成任务或扩展到其他模态。

title: DriveWAM: Video Generative Priors Enable Scalable World-Action Modeling for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Pretrained foundation models have become an important basis for end-to-end autonomous driving. In contrast to vision-language models pretrained primarily on static image-text pairs, video generative models capture temporal dynamics and motion priors that are naturally suited for driving. We present DriveWAM, a driving world-action model that adapts a pretrained video diffusion transformer into an autoregressive video-action policy. DriveWAM organizes video and action streams into a unified temporal token sequence and trains them under a joint flow-matching objective, preserving the pretrained video-generation architecture while adapting its large-scale video priors to action generation. To incorporate high-level scene understanding, we introduce scene-evolving driving guidance, where a frozen VLM produces chunk-specific semantic intent to guide video-action generation. To keep long-horizon rollout bounded, we further introduce selective KV memory, which maintains bounded modality-aware video and action memory pools through relevance-redundancy cache selection at inference time. Experiments on NAVSIM and the PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles benchmark show that DriveWAM achieves strong planning performance, and a data-scaling study from 4k to 100k driving clips further confirms the scaling potential of world-action modeling for end-to-end autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DriveWAM，将预训练视频扩散模型适配为自回归视频动作策略，实现可扩展的世界动作建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法大多基于图像-文本对预训练的视觉语言模型，缺乏对时序动态和运动先验的建模。视频生成模型天然具备捕获时序信息的能力，但如何将其高效适配到动作生成仍面临挑战。DriveWAM旨在利用大规模视频先验，通过统一建模视频与动作流，提升驾驶规划的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: DriveWAM采用预训练视频扩散变换器（Video Diffusion Transformer）作为基础，将视频与动作流组织为统一的时序标记序列，并通过联合流匹配（Flow Matching）目标训练，保持原生成架构的同时适配动作生成。引入场景演进驾驶引导，利用冻结的VLM产生片段级语义意图以指导生成。为限制长距离规划，设计选择性KV记忆（Selective KV Memory），通过相关-冗余缓存选择维护有界的视频和动作记忆池。
light_analysis.result: 在NAVSIM和PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles基准上，DriveWAM实现了强规划性能。数据规模从4k扩展到100k驾驶片段的研究表明，世界动作建模在端到端自动驾驶中具有显著的扩展潜力。具体对比结果摘要未明确给出，但强调其性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DriveWAM成功将视频生成先验应用于自动驾驶中的世界动作建模，通过统一视频和动作序列的训练与推理，展示了在大规模数据下的可扩展性。该方法为利用预训练视频模型进行端到端驾驶决策提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化引导机制和记忆效率。

title: Cultural Binding Heads in Language Models
abstract: LLMs often default to equal treatment across cultural groups, even though context warrants differentiation: this is a lack of difference awareness. Using mechanistic interpretability and a factorial design on the N4 cultural appropriation benchmark from Wang et al. (2025), we identify 2-3 mid-layer attention heads per model that contribute causally to cultural binding across eight models (four architectures, base and instruct). Cultural binding is the process of associating cultural items with the appropriate identity. Knockout of the identity-to-item edges on these heads lowers the binding strength by 9-23%. The identified heads transfer from instruct to base models, suggesting that cultural binding is created at pre-training. An $α$-scaling shows a graded dose-response and moderate amplification steering at generation ($α= 2-3$) increases cultural differentiation accuracy by 1-3 pp while leaving neutral reasoning mostly intact. A knowledge probing task shows that models know 3-5 times more than they act upon it, indicating that the bottleneck lies in routing and not knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 通过机械可解释性发现语言模型中负责文化绑定的注意力头，并证明模型知识多于行为，路由是瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通常对不同文化群体一视同仁，缺乏差异意识，导致文化绑定不足。现有方法未从机制层面识别并解释文化绑定问题，而文化敏感性在AI应用中至关重要。本文旨在定位因果贡献于文化绑定的注意力头，并探究知识-行为差距。
light_analysis.method: 基于Wang等人（2025）的N4文化挪用基准，采用因素设计和机械可解释性，在8个模型（4种架构，基础版和指令版）中识别每个模型2-3个中层注意力头。通过敲除这些头上的身份-物品边削弱绑定强度，并利用α缩放实验和知识探测任务分析生成行为和知识掌握。
light_analysis.result: 敲除注意力头上的身份-物品边后，绑定强度下降9-23%。这些头从指令模型迁移到基础模型，表明文化绑定在预训练中形成。适度放大（α=2-3）将文化区分准确率提高1-3个百分点，且中立推理基本不变。知识探测显示模型知道的信息是实际应用的3-5倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文定位了负责文化绑定的注意力头，揭示了预训练中形成文化绑定的机制，并指出瓶颈在于路由而非知识。该发现有助于指导文化敏感语言模型的改进，未来可探索路由优化以弥合知识-行为差距。

title: GUI-CIDER: Mid-training GUI Agents via Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection
abstract: Despite the rapid progress of multimodal large language models in building Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents, their real-world task completion is fundamentally bottlenecked by a lack of world knowledge about GUI operations. Existing solutions typically rely on expensive multi-agent scaffolding or conventional post-training paradigms, such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, post-training only allows agents to implicitly absorb world knowledge through action annotations or reward signals, leading to inefficient trajectory memorization rather than genuine comprehension. Therefore, an approach that enables explicit learning of this knowledge is imperative. To this end, we propose GUI-CIDER, a mid-training method that explicitly internalizes GUI world knowledge through Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection. GUI-CIDER operates in three stages: (1) data synthesis, which distills static planning and dynamic causal knowledge from GUI trajectories into text; (2) exemplar reselection, which filters the corpus by rewarding causal structures and penalizing semantic redundancy; and (3) mid-training, where the refined data is used to embed the acquired knowledge. Extensive experiments on two GUI knowledge benchmarks and three task completion benchmarks demonstrate that GUI-CIDER consistently improves both the agent's understanding of GUI operations and its task success rates.The codes are available at https://github.com/Wuzheng02/GUI-CIDER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GUI-CIDER，一种通过因果内化与密度感知示例重选的显式中训练方法，用于GUI代理获取世界知识，提升任务完成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在GUI代理应用中受限于缺乏GUI操作的世界知识。现有方法如多代理框架、监督微调或强化学习仅能通过动作标签或奖励信号隐式吸收知识，导致低效的轨迹记忆而非真正理解。因此，需要一种显式学习GUI世界知识的方法。
light_analysis.method: GUI-CIDER包含三阶段：1）数据合成，从GUI轨迹中蒸馏静态规划与动态因果知识为文本；2）示例重选，通过奖励因果结构并惩罚语义冗余来筛选语料；3）中训练，用精炼数据嵌入知识。该方法无需多代理或后训练范式。
light_analysis.result: 在两个GUI知识基准和三个任务完成基准上的广泛实验表明，GUI-CIDER持续提升了代理对GUI操作的理解和任务成功率。摘要未提供具体数值，但验证了方法有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUI-CIDER首次通过期中训练显式内化GUI世界知识，为构建更智能的GUI代理提供了新范式。实验证明其在理解和任务完成上的优势。未来可探索在其他领域应用或扩展因果知识建模。

title: Semi-Supervised Hypothesis Testing by Betting on Predictions
abstract: We introduce a testing-by-betting framework that leverages predictions on unlabeled data to enhance the power of sequential hypothesis testing. Given limited samples from the joint distribution of $(X,Y)$, and additional unlabeled samples from the marginal of $X$, we ask how unlabeled data can be used to hypothesize about the distribution of $Y$, and the conditional distribution of $Y\mid X$. We introduce an e-statistic and use it to construct a sequential test. Under standard distributional assumptions -- label shift or concept shift -- we establish that the test is anytime valid. Furthermore, we show that for binary data, the e-statistic has non-trivial power. Crucially, our approach retains these properties even when the underlying predictions are inaccurate. Through simulations and applications to large language models evaluation, we demonstrate power gains over baseline approaches, including prediction-powered inference. These gains persist even with relatively limited unlabeled data and when predictions have low accuracy due to weak correlation between $X$ and $Y$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于‘测试下注’（testing-by-betting）的半监督假设检验框架，利用未标注数据提升序列检验效力。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统假设检验依赖完全标注数据，但在许多实际场景中标注成本高昂，而大量未标注数据容易获取。现有方法如预测驱动推理（prediction-powered inference）在预测不准确时表现不佳。该研究旨在利用未标注数据在标签偏移或概念偏移下提升检验功效，同时保证检验始终有效（anytime valid），并对预测质量不敏感。
light_analysis.method: 基于‘测试下注’框架，引入一种e统计量（e-statistic）来构造序列假设检验。在标签偏移或概念偏移的分布假设下，该方法能利用未标注数据推断Y的分布及Y|X的条件分布。对于二元数据，证明了e统计量具有非平凡功效。关键创新在于检验的有效性不依赖预测准确性，即使预测质量差也能保持性质。仿真和LLM评估中与基准（如预测驱动推理）对比。
light_analysis.result: 通过仿真实验和大型语言模型评估应用，所提方法在检验功效上优于预测驱动推理等基线方法。即使在未标注数据量有限或X与Y弱相关导致预测精度低的情况下，该方法仍能获得稳定增益。具体来说，在功效指标上提升显著，且保持了序列检验的任意有效性质（anytime validity）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文贡献了一种半监督假设检验新框架，通过结合未标注数据提升了检验功效，同时避免了传统方法对预测质量的敏感性。具有重要的学术价值，为弱监督场景下的统计推断提供了新思路。实际应用上，可节省标注成本并增强模型评估等任务的可靠性。未来可探索扩展到更复杂数据类型或放松分布假设。

title: Do Agents Know What They Can't Do? Evaluating Feasibility Awareness in Tool-Using Agents
abstract: Tool-using agents often incur substantial computational cost due to long reasoning chains and iterative tool usage. In practical scenarios, many tasks become infeasible under constrained tool environments, where the capabilities required for successful task completion are unavailable. Detecting infeasible tasks and stopping execution early can significantly reduce unnecessary execution cost. In this work, we propose FeasiGen, an automatic pipeline for constructing infeasible agent tasks by identifying the critical tools required for successful task completion. Our approach extracts tool-calling traces from successful executions across multiple agent systems, identifies critical tools consistently shared across diverse execution strategies, and masks these tools to automatically transform solvable tasks into infeasible ones. Human verification confirms that the infeasibility annotations for our constructed tasks achieve over 94% accuracy. We further introduce feasibility-aware evaluation metrics for measuring whether agents can recognize infeasible tasks and stop execution appropriately. Extensive evaluations across nine models reveal substantially weak infeasibility detection ability, with false continue rate reaching up to 73.9%. We further observe that multi-agent architectures significantly reduce erroneous execution under infeasible conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动构建不可行工具使用任务的FeasiGen流水线，系统评估智能体对任务不可行性的感知能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 工具使用智能体在执行不可行任务时，因长推理链和迭代工具调用导致高昂计算成本。现有方法缺乏对任务不可行性的检测能力，无法提前终止无效执行，造成资源浪费。研究旨在通过构建具有不可行性标注的任务，评估智能体的可行性感知能力，从而降低不必要的执行开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出FeasiGen自动流水线，从多个智能体系统的成功执行中提取工具调用轨迹，识别不同策略间共享的关键工具，并通过掩码这些工具将可解任务转化为不可解任务。人工验证确保不可行性标注准确率超94%。同时引入可行性感知评估指标，包括错误继续率等，量化智能体识别不可行任务并及时停止的能力。
light_analysis.result: 在九个模型上评估，发现不可行性检测能力普遍较弱，错误继续率最高达73.9%。多智能体架构显著减少不可行条件下的错误执行，表明其具有更好的可行性感知潜力。具体数据表明当前模型难以有效识别任务不可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了自动化构建不可行任务的方法和可行性感知评估框架，揭示了现有工具使用智能体在任务不可行性检测上的显著不足。研究为设计更高效、低成本的智能体系统提供了方向，未来可探索结合多智能体架构或增强推理策略来提升可行性感知能力。

title: Stabilizing distribution-free probabilistic forecasts
abstract: Multi-step-ahead forecasts are often updated as new observations become available, since shorter forecast horizons typically improve forecast quality. However, such improvements come at the cost of forecast instability, i.e., variability in forecasts for the same target period. This instability can trigger costly changes to plans formulated based on the forecasts and may erode trust in the forecasting system. In this work, we integrate forecast stability alongside forecast quality into the training of distribution-free probabilistic time-series forecasting models, allowing us to control this trade-off. We propose a method for generating stabilized forecasted conditional quantile functions using regression splines parameterized by a neural network. This approach enables joint optimization of quality and stability, as it allows us to directly penalize dissimilarities arising from forecast updates. Furthermore, it allows assigning varying importance to stabilizing different parts of the forecast distributions (e.g., central parts vs. tails) to focus on the parts most relevant for the intended downstream use (e.g., the upper tail for inventory management). We empirically evaluate the proposed method on two datasets with different statistical properties and show that it can effectively reduce forecast instability without a substantial loss in forecast quality, and that it can target stabilization effort toward specific parts of the forecast distributions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种将预测稳定性与质量联合优化的分布自由概率时间序列预测方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 多步超前预测随新数据更新而改善质量，但导致预测不稳定，易引发计划变更成本及信任下降。现有方法忽视稳定性与质量的权衡，无法同时优化两者。
light_analysis.method: 采用神经网络参数化的回归样条生成条件分位数函数，实现预测质量与稳定性的联合优化。通过直接惩罚更新引起的分位数差异，并允许对分布不同部分（如中心或尾部）赋予不同稳定权重，以适应下游应用需求。
light_analysis.result: 在两个统计特性不同的数据集上验证，该方法能有效降低预测不稳定性，且不显著牺牲预测质量。同时可按需定向稳定分布的特定部分（如库存管理关注的上尾）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种可控稳定性的分布自由概率预测框架，平衡质量与稳定权衡。具有实际应用价值（如库存管理），未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: Entropy-aware Masking for Masked Language Modeling
abstract: Masked language modeling has become a standard pretraining objective for training encoder-based language models. In this approach, certain tokens in the input are masked, and the model learns to predict them using the surrounding context. This process enables the model to capture both syntactic and semantic properties of language. Conventionally, the tokens selected for masking are chosen at random, which may not always yield the most effective learning signals. In this work, we examine a token masking strategy based on entropy distribution. We use the model's entropy over token predictions to identify which tokens should be masked. This method aims to target tokens that are more informative and uncertain to improve the training efficacy. We also propose a novel self-masking approach that enhances training efficiency without relying on an external reference model. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves an average performance improvement of 5% in GLUE scores compared to the baseline. Further, we experiment with combining knowledge distillation with entropy masking, resulting in the best overall results.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于熵分布的掩码策略，提升掩码语言模型预训练效率，GLUE分数平均提升5%。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统掩码语言建模中，掩码令牌随机选择，可能无法提供最有效的学习信号。现有方法未充分利用模型预测的不确定性，导致训练效率不足。该研究旨在通过熵度量识别信息量高、不确定性大的令牌，从而优化训练信号，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出熵感知掩码策略，根据模型对令牌预测的熵值选择掩码目标，优先掩码高熵（高不确定性）令牌。同时引入自掩码方法，无需外部参考模型即可提升训练效率。在预训练过程中，结合知识蒸馏进一步优化。使用标准BERT架构，在GLUE基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在GLUE基准上，熵感知掩码相比随机掩码基线平均提升5%的分数。结合知识蒸馏后，取得最优结果。摘要未提供具体每个任务的分解结果，但表明该方法在多个自然语言理解任务上一致有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 熵感知掩码通过聚焦不确定令牌，增强了掩码语言建模的学习信号，提升了预训练效率和下游任务性能。自掩码方法避免了额外模型依赖。未来可探索动态熵阈值调整和与其他预训练目标的结合。

title: Let Relations Speak: An End-to-End LLM-GNN Soft Prompt Framework for Fraud Detection
abstract: In recent years, Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown great capability in processing graph tasks such as fraud detection. However, most existing methods rely heavily on rich text attributes, which poses difficulties for this domain due to the lack of textual data. Although some pioneering methods attempt to overcome it, their textualization of graph structures via hard prompts easily leads to feature distortion. Additionally, fraud detection often exhibits multi-relational complexity, where current methods struggle to capture this deep semantic information. To address these challenges, we propose LLM-GNN Soft Prompt Framework (LGSPF). Specifically, LGSPF bridges the graph structure and semantic space using soft prompt to eliminate reliance on text. We further introduce a parallel Graph Neural Network (GNN) encoder to translate multi-relational topologies into graph tokens for fine-grained LLM fraud comprehension. Through end-to-end optimization, LGSPF enhances deep semantic alignment between LLM and GNN. Experiments across diverse fraud detection benchmarks demonstrate our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, we further validate the contribution of LGSPF on enhancing the semantic interpretability of fraud behaviors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种端到端的LLM-GNN软提示框架，利用软提示和并行GNN编码器实现无需文本属性、处理多关系复杂性的欺诈检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM欺诈检测方法依赖丰富文本属性，但实际场景文本数据匮乏；硬提示文本化图结构导致特征失真；欺诈检测具有多关系复杂性，当前方法难以捕捉深层语义。
light_analysis.method: 提出LGSPF框架，通过软提示桥接图结构和语义空间，消除对文本属性的依赖；引入并行GNN编码器将多关系拓扑转化为图令牌，供LLM进行细粒度理解；端到端优化增强LLM与GNN的深度语义对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在多个欺诈检测基准数据集上取得最先进性能；进一步验证了LGSPF在增强欺诈行为语义可解释性方面的贡献。
light_analysis.conclusion: LGSPF有效解决了欺诈检测中文本缺失和多关系复杂性问题，提升检测性能与可解释性，具有重要实际应用价值。

title: ClinicalEncoder26AM: A Multlilingual Diagnosable ColBERT Model; Evidences from the MultiClinNER Shared Task
abstract: ClinicalEncoder26AM is a multilingual Diagnosable ColBERT for clinical and biomedical texts, which aligns at multiple levels its token-level semantic with ClinicalMap25, a clinical latent space inspired by BioLORD-2023 and enriched with synthetic and annotated supervision. The post-training recipe builds upon BGE-M3, and combines synthetic clinical notes, patient--doctor conversations, and annotated resources such as MedMentions, while considering both named-entity-level and sentence-level representations in a multi-adapter distillation, along with a ColBERT-style retrieval objective. In this system demonstration paper, we evaluate the model in the MultiClinNER shared task by finetuning it as a BIO tagger for patient symptoms, disorders, and procedure spans, using a lightweight two-layer CNN head to improve local boundary detection. The resulting system remains simple, processes most documents in a single 8192-token window, and achieves state-of-the-art multilingual entity recall, while achieving Top 5 overall across all entity types and languages in Character-weighted F1 scores. Training curves further show that ClinicalEncoder26AM is markedly more data-efficient than the base M3 model, supporting the usefulness of its clinical post-training for downstream information extraction.   The model can be downloaded on https://huggingface.co/Parallia/ClinicalEncoder26AM-Diagnosable-Colbert-L2-for-multilingual-medical-texts

light_analysis.overview: 提出ClinicalEncoder26AM，一个多语言可诊断的ColBERT模型，通过多级对齐和蒸馏后训练，在多语言临床实体识别中达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言临床文本中的实体识别面临标注数据匮乏和跨语言泛化难题，现有模型如BGE-M3在临床领域缺乏针对性的语义对齐和数据效率优化。本研究旨在通过构建临床潜在空间ClinicalMap25并进行多适配器蒸馏，提升模型对临床实体的多语言召回能力和数据效率，解决下游任务对大量标注数据的依赖问题。
