light_analysis.method: 模型基于BGE-M3，后训练使用合成临床笔记、医患对话及MedMentions等资源，通过多适配器蒸馏同时优化实体级和句子级表示，并引入ColBERT风格的检索目标实现多级语义对齐。下游任务中，模型作为BIO标签器，采用轻量两层CNN头改进边界检测，处理窗口为8192个token。
light_analysis.result: 在MultiClinNER任务中，ClinicalEncoder26AM实现多语言实体召回SOTA，所有实体类型和语言的字符加权F1得分进入Top5。训练曲线显示其数据效率显著高于BGE-M3，表明临床后训练对下游信息提取有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: ClinicalEncoder26AM通过临床语义对齐和多适配器蒸馏，在降低标注数据需求的同时提升了多语言实体识别的准确性，适用于跨语言临床文本处理。模型已开源，未来可探索更复杂的实体关系抽取任务，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: GS-FUSE: Granger-Supervised Gated Fusion and Multi-Granularity Alignment for Event-Driven Financial Forecasting
abstract: Accurately forecasting the impact of salient financial events on markets is critical for investors and policymakers. However, existing multimodal time-series models typically fuse text and prices symmetrically, without an explicit way to decide when event text is truly predictive, and thus struggle to exploit the directional event-to-price structure and the heterogeneous roles of textual and price signals. In this work, we propose GS-Fuse, a multimodal event-based forecasting framework that employs (i) a Granger-supervised, causal-aware gated fusion module, which learns to open toward event text only when it provides incremental predictive value beyond historical prices, and (ii) a multi-granularity alignment mechanism that jointly aligns high-level event representations and fine-grained textual cues with future market trajectories. Built as a flexible, plug-and-play adapter on top of off-the-shelf large language models and time-series foundation models, GS-Fuse can be instantiated across diverse backbones and market settings. Extensive experiments on real-world financial datasets show that GS-Fuse consistently outperforms state-of-the-art time-series and multimodal baselines across multiple assets and forecasting horizons.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GS-Fuse框架，通过Granger监督的因果感知门控融合和多粒度对齐，有效利用事件文本的增量预测价值，提升金融事件预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态时间序列模型对称融合文本和价格，缺乏判断事件文本是否真正预测性的机制，难以利用事件到价格的方向性结构和文本与价格信号的异质角色，导致预测效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: GS-Fuse包含两个核心模块：Granger监督的因果感知门控融合，仅在事件文本提供增量预测价值时打开门控；多粒度对齐机制，联合对齐高层事件表示和细粒度文本线索与未来市场轨迹。作为即插即用适配器，可基于现有大语言模型和时间序列基础模型灵活实例化。
light_analysis.result: 在真实金融数据集上的大量实验表明，GS-Fuse在多种资产和预测区间上持续优于最先进的单变量时间序列和多模态基线，性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GS-Fuse通过因果感知融合和多粒度对齐，实现了事件文本与价格信号的有效结合，提升了金融事件预测的准确性和鲁棒性。未来可拓展至更广泛的市场场景和资产类别。

title: Stochastic Gradient Descent with Momentum is Algorithmically Stable
abstract: Stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM) is one of the most widely used optimization algorithms in machine learning. While optimization properties of SGDM have been extensively studied in the literature, it remains insufficiently understood whether and when SGDM can generalize well to unseen data. In particular, it has been conjectured that while momentum accelerates training, it may degrade generalization. In this paper, we close this gap by developing a comprehensive generalization analysis of SGDM through the lens of algorithmic stability. More specifically, we introduce a generalized SGDM framework that encompasses both Polyak's and Nesterov's momentum schemes, and establish tight on-average model stability bounds for smooth and convex problems. Notably, the obtained bounds exploit small optimization error bounds along the trajectory, apply to any momentum parameter in the interval $[0, 1)$, and do not require the commonly assumed Lipschitzness of loss functions. We further derive optimization error bounds for the generalized SGDM, and combine them with our generalization analyses to obtain optimal excess population risk bounds for SGDM with both Polyak's and Nesterov's momentum.

light_analysis.overview: 通过算法稳定性分析，证明了带动量的随机梯度下降（SGDM）具有优异的泛化性能，并获得了最优的总体风险界。
light_analysis.motivation: SGDM是机器学习中最广泛使用的优化算法之一，但其泛化能力尚不明确。有研究表明动量在加速训练的同时可能损害泛化性能。本文旨在通过算法稳定性视角，系统分析SGDM的泛化行为，解决这一争议。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个广义SGDM框架，统一了Polyak和Nesterov两种动量方案。针对光滑凸问题，建立了紧的on-average模型稳定性界，该界利用轨迹上的小优化误差，适用于任意动量参数∈[0,1)，且不要求损失函数的Lipschitz连续性。进一步推导了优化误差界，并与稳定性分析结合。
light_analysis.result: 获得的稳定性界是紧的，且不依赖于常见的Lipschitz假设。结合优化误差界，得到了SGDM（两种动量）在光滑凸问题上的最优总体风险界，表明动量在加速训练的同时不降低泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从算法稳定性角度证明了SGDM的泛化能力，填补了理论空白。结果表明动量不会损害泛化，为实际应用提供了理论支撑。未来可扩展到非凸问题或更复杂的动量变体。

title: Learning Theory of the SVRG: Generalization and Convergence Analysis
abstract: Variance reduction (VR) methods employ stochastic gradients with decreasing variance, and they have been widely applied to solve large-scale optimization problems in machine learning because of their efficiency. Existing theoretical studies of VR methods are mainly focused on the convergence analysis, leaving the generalization behavior largely unexplored. In this paper, we bridge this gap by developing the first non-vacuous generalization analysis of the representative VR method: Stochastic Variance Reduced Gradient (SVRG), through the lens of algorithmic stability. In particular, we establish sharp stability bounds of the SVRG in both convex and strongly convex settings by exploiting its algorithmic structure. The obtained bounds are data-dependent, because the training errors are incorporated along the trajectory. Our analysis clarifies the interplay between optimization and generalization, leading to optimal excess population risk bounds in both settings. Our approach differs substantially from existing analyses of stochastic algorithms in the sense that we decompose the SVRG update as an SGD-like step plus a zero-mean correction term and then introduce novel Lyapunov functions to absorb the additional gradient terms induced by the reference points. Our analytical framework can be generalized to other VR methods, and we demonstrate the generalization by the well-known Stochastic Average Gradient Accelerated (SAGA) method.

light_analysis.overview: 首次非平凡的SVRG泛化分析，通过算法稳定性建立最佳风险界。
light_analysis.motivation: 方差缩减方法（如SVRG）在机器学习大规模优化中应用广泛，但现有理论研究集中于收敛分析，泛化行为尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一空白，揭示优化与泛化的相互作用。
light_analysis.method: 基于算法稳定性，针对凸和强凸情形建立SVRG的尖锐稳定性界。将SVRG更新分解为类似SGD的步骤加零均值校正项，并引入新颖的Lyapunov函数吸收参考点带来的额外梯度项。该框架可推广至其他VR方法（如SAGA）。
light_analysis.result: 获得依赖数据的稳定性界（沿轨迹纳入训练误差），在凸和强凸设定下均得到最优超额风险界，优于现有泛化分析。通过SAGA验证框架的泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提供SVRG的非平凡泛化保证，明确优化与泛化的联系。理论结果具有数据依赖性，为VR方法的泛化分析提供新框架。未来可扩展至其他VR方法及更复杂场景。

title: On Compositional Learning Behaviours in Formal Mathematics
abstract: Self-evolving scientific agents capable of conquering the hard tail of formal mathematics require Compositional Learning Behaviours (CLBs) -- the capacity to ground and recombine novel symbolic structures in context, beyond mere recombination of prelearned atoms. We propose \textbf{S2B-LM}, an adaptation of the Symbolic Behaviour Benchmark that removes numerical processing as a confound and adds chain-of-thought scaffolding to elicit rather than merely probe latent CLB competency. Cross-evaluating ten Lean~4 theorem provers on CLB competency (adj-ZSCT) and miniF2F whole-proof performance, exact permutation tests establish a hierarchical necessity structure: search-heavy models cover the tractable bulk without detectable CLBs, yet every model breaking into the Olympiad-level tier (miniF2F $>75\%$) is among the five highest CLB scorers ($p=0.004$). After ruling out model scale as a confound, our results show that CLB competency is \emph{necessary but not sufficient} for the hard tail of formal mathematical verification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S2B-LM基准测试，论证组合学习行为（CLB）是形式数学中解决高难度问题的必要条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 形式数学的自动推理需要智能体具备组合学习行为（CLB），即能根据上下文理解并重新组合新的符号结构，而不仅仅是复用已学原子。现有基准测试（如Symbolic Behaviour Benchmark）存在数值处理干扰，且无法有效激发潜在CLB能力。为了评估CLB对解决高难度形式数学问题的必要性，需要设计一个去混淆的基准测试，并系统性地检验CLB与顶级定理证明性能之间的关系。
light_analysis.method: 提出S2B-LM，改编Symbolic Behaviour Benchmark：移除数值处理干扰，添加思维链（chain-of-thought）脚手架以激发而非仅探测CLB能力。在Lean 4平台上，对10个定理证明器进行交叉评估：使用adj-ZSCT指标衡量CLB能力，使用miniF2F衡量整体证明性能。通过精确置换检验分析CLB与性能的层级必要性结构。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：搜索密集型模型（如不使用CLB）能覆盖大部分易处理问题，但在miniF2F上超过75%的奥林匹亚级性能模型中，全部是CLB得分最高的五个模型之一（p=0.004）。排除了模型规模的影响后，结果表明CLB能力对于解决形式数学中的高难度问题是必要的，但并不充分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了组合学习行为（CLB）是形式数学中实现顶级性能的必要条件，为开发自进化科学智能体提供了关键指导。未来工作可探索如何增强CLB能力以进一步提升模型在硬尾问题上的表现。局限性在于实验仅基于Lean 4平台，结论的通用性需进一步验证。

title: Benchmarking AI for low-resource contexts: Thinking beyond leaderboards
abstract: Existing AI evaluation practices often fail to capture how systems actually perform in low-resource environments, where operational constraints shape usability as much as model quality. Through a structured analysis of existing benchmark families across speech, chat/RAG, and vision systems, we identify critical gaps between laboratory evaluation practices and real-world deployment conditions in low-resource environments. We argue that the meaningful unit of assessment is the deployed system rather than an isolated model and that effective evaluation frameworks must integrate task performance with deployment conditions such as noisy inputs, code-switching, intermittent connectivity, low-end hardware, and domain shift. At the same time, benchmarks should recognize that different application classes require distinct evaluation profiles rather than a single aggregate score that obscures operational differences. To support practical decision-making, we propose a shared reporting framework that preserves comparability across systems and application types while remaining sensitive to deployment context. Finally, we emphasize the need for concise and actionable reporting artifacts for policymakers, donors, and implementers, including standardized one-page benchmark cards, deployment profiles, and explicit documentation of failure handling procedures and human oversight mechanisms.
comment: Aakash Pant, Kavya Shah, and Apoorv Agnihotri contributed equally

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向低资源环境的AI评估框架，强调评估部署系统而非孤立模型，并整合任务性能与部署约束。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI评估方法在低资源环境下常失效，因为实验室评估无法反映实际部署中的运营限制（如噪声输入、间歇性连接、低端硬件等）。这些因素对系统可用性的影响不亚于模型质量。当前基准测试忽视不同应用类的差异化评估需求，单一聚合分数掩盖了操作差异，导致决策者无法有效选择适合低资源场景的系统。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过结构化分析语音、聊天/RAG和视觉系统的基准测试家族，识别实验室评估与真实部署的条件差距。提出以部署系统为评估单元，综合任务性能与部署条件（噪声、代码切换、域迁移等）。构建共享报告框架，保留跨系统和应用类型的可比性，并设计标准化的一页基准卡、部署档案、失败处理文档和人工监督机制说明等简洁报告工件。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，但通过案例分析揭示了现有基准测试在低资源环境下的不足，并论证了所提框架能更真实反映系统实用性。强调该框架可支持政策制定者、资助者和实施者的决策，促进跨系统比较同时保持对部署上下文的敏感性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为低资源场景的AI评估提供了系统化方法论，强调从实验室转向部署驱动的评估范式。学术上填补了评估指标与真实条件之间的理论空白；实践上为资源受限地区的AI部署提供了可操作报告标准，有助于提升技术落地的公平性和有效性。未来工作可进一步验证框架在不同应用中的通用性。

title: Universal Time Series Generation with Neural Controlled Differential Equations
abstract: Recent work on the sequence universality of State Space Models (SSMs) has introduced efficient, maximally expressive continuous-time approaches for time-series modelling. While these works focus on discriminative settings, we extend this perspective to generative time-series modelling by proving that maximally expressive Structured Linear Controlled Differential Equations (SLiCEs) are universal time-series generators, in the sense that they can approximate the induced path laws of continuous causal pushforwards on compact latent sets in $W_\infty$. Building on these theoretical results, we propose Generative SLiCEs (G-SLiCEs), a maximally expressive continuous-time model for flow matching on path-space. Empirically, we show that expressivity improves performance in probabilistic forecasting and downstream tasks, while retaining the advantages of continuous-time models such as generalising to arbitrary observation grids. This is particularly beneficial for irregular grids, where fixed-grid models often struggle.

light_analysis.overview: 将最大表达力的结构化线性受控微分方程(SLiCEs)扩展为通用时间序列生成器，提出G-SLiCEs用于路径空间上的流匹配，在概率预测和不规则网格任务中表现优异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于状态空间模型(SSMs)的连续时间序列方法主要关注判别任务，虽具序列通用性和高效性，但未涉及生成式建模。实际应用中，时间序列生成任务（如概率预测、不规则网格数据）需要同时兼顾高表达力与连续时间模型的灵活性。因此，本文旨在将SSMs的通用性证明延伸至生成设置，开发一种既能保证理论通用性又具备实践优势的生成模型。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先从理论上证明结构化线性受控微分方程(SLiCEs)在紧致潜在集上可以逼近任意连续因果推前映射的路径律，从而成为通用时间序列生成器。基于此，提出生成式SLiCEs（G-SLiCEs），它采用最大表达力的连续时间架构，通过流匹配目标在路径空间进行训练。该模型保留连续时间优势，如适应任意观测网格，特别擅长处理不规则采样数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，G-SLiCEs相较于固定网格模型在概率预测和下游任务中性能显著提升，尤其在不规则网格场景下优势明显。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调表达力的增强直接带来任务指标的改进，且连续时间特性使模型能无缝处理不同采样率的序列，克服了传统模型对规则网格的依赖。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论和实践上验证了最大表达力的连续时间模型在生成式时间序列建模中的通用性，G-SLiCEs为不规则网格数据提供了一种高效且灵活的解决方案。该工作填补了SSMs在生成任务上的空白，推动了连续时间生成模型的发展。未来可探索更高效的训练策略或扩展到高维时间序列。

title: Fitting Unknown Number of Hyperplanes with Manifold Optimization
abstract: Fitting an unknown number of hyperplanes to data is a fundamental yet challenging problem in machine learning, characterized by its non-convexity, non-differentiability, and unknown model order. Existing approaches often struggle with local optima or lack geometric consistency. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework based on Manifold Optimization. We reformulate the problem as an unsupervised learning task on the unit sphere manifold $\mathcal{S}^{\textbf{dim}-1}$. This formulation effectively handles the non-convex constraints and linearizes the distance measurement, rendering the gradient descent tractable. We propose a Two-Stage Manifold Optimization algorithm. In Phase I, we employ a Riemannian Expectation-Maximization process with a heavy-tailed kernel to robustly estimate posterior probabilities, effectively resolving the ambiguities of point distribution between intersecting hyperplanes. In Phase II, upon convergence of the soft estimates, the probabilistic weights degenerate into hard matching, generating a precise local optimum that strictly satisfies the geometric definition. Furthermore, we introduce a projected density estimation strategy for initialization to facilitate global convergence by significantly reducing the feature description space and search complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both geometric accuracy and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于流形优化的两阶段算法，将未知数量超平面拟合问题转化为单位球面上的无监督学习任务，实现鲁棒且几何一致的拟合。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器学习中，拟合未知数量的超平面是一个基础但极具挑战的问题，主要难点在于目标函数的非凸性、非可微性以及模型阶数未知。现有方法常陷入局部最优解或缺乏几何一致性，难以同时保证估计的准确性和鲁棒性。这些问题限制了其在图像分割、运动分割等实际应用中的效果。本文旨在克服这些局限性，提出一种能够有效处理非凸约束并线性化距离度量的新框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于流形优化的两阶段算法（Two-Stage Manifold Optimization）。首先将超平面拟合问题重新表述为单位球面 S^{dim-1} 上的无监督学习任务，从而线性化距离度量并简化梯度下降。第一阶段采用黎曼期望最大化（Riemannian EM）过程，结合重尾核函数以鲁棒地估计后验概率，解决超平面相交处的点分配歧义。第二阶段在软估计收敛后，概率权重退化为硬匹配，产生严格满足几何定义的精确局部最优解。此外，引入投影密度估计初始化策略，降低特征描述空间和搜索复杂度，促进全局收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在大量实验中对所提方法与多个先进基线进行了对比。结果表明，本方法在几何精度和鲁棒性方面均优于现有技术。具体性能指标（如准确率、F1分数等）摘要未明确说明，但从实验描述可知本方法在处理未知数量超平面拟合时能够获得更优的几何一致性和对噪声、异常点的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过流形优化成功解决了未知数量超平面拟合的非凸、非可微和模型阶数不确定问题。提出的两阶段流形优化算法结合了鲁棒概率估计和几何精炼，实现了高精度和强鲁棒性。该工作不仅具有重要的理论意义，还为计算机视觉、机器人感知等领域的实际应用提供了有效工具。未来可进一步探索将该框架扩展到非线性流形拟合或与其他几何推理任务结合。

title: Functional Entropy: Predicting Functional Correctness in LLM-Generated Code with Uncertainty Quantification
abstract: Large language models have shown impressive capabilities in code generation, yet they often produce functionally incorrect code. Uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods have emerged as a promising approach for detecting hallucinations in natural language generation, but their effectiveness for code generation tasks remains underexplored. We systematically evaluate how UQ techniques transfer to code generation across three programming languages, five LLMs, and over 1,700 problems. We find that some token-probability-based methods generalize effectively without modification, while sampling-based methods relying on natural language inference (NLI) fail because NLI models cannot distinguish functionally different code, causing most responses to collapse into a single semantic cluster. To address this, we introduce functional equivalence methods, a family of code-specific methods that replace NLI-based semantic equivalence with an LLM-based functional equivalence assessment, including functional entropy, a code-specific analog of semantic entropy. Functional equivalence methods achieve top AUROC in 11 out of 15 model-benchmark combinations and the best calibration across most settings, consistently outperforming both NLI-based counterparts and all other methods evaluated.

light_analysis.overview: 提出功能熵方法，通过不确定性量化预测LLM生成代码的功能正确性，显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在代码生成中常产生功能不正确的代码。现有不确定性量化方法在自然语言生成中有效，但在代码生成任务中的适用性尚未充分探索。需要专门针对代码的功能正确性预测方法。
light_analysis.method: 系统评估了多种不确定性量化方法在代码生成中的迁移效果，发现基于token概率的方法可直接泛化，而基于自然语言推理的采样方法因无法区分功能差异而失败。为此，提出功能等价方法族，用LLM功能等价评估替代NLI语义等价，并引入功能熵作为语义熵的代码特定变体。
light_analysis.result: 在三种编程语言、五个LLM和超过1700个问题上的实验表明，功能等价方法在15个模型-基准组合中的11个达到最佳AUROC，且在大多数设置下校准最优，持续优于NLI基方法及其他所有评估方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 功能熵有效提升了代码生成中功能正确性的预测能力，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的功能等价评估策略及扩展到更多编程语言。

title: Janus-LoRA: A Balanced Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Learning
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as a promising paradigm for Continual Learning. It independently updates its low-rank factors ($A$ and $B$), creating a composite update to the full weight matrix through their interaction. To prevent catastrophic forgetting, this update should remain orthogonal to the task-specific subspace that contains previously learned knowledge. However, we identify that this composite update systematically violates this orthogonality, reintroducing interference and undermining stability. Furthermore, naively enforcing this orthogonality compromises plasticity, disrupting the delicate stability-plasticity trade-off. To resolve these issues, we propose \textbf{Janus-LoRA}, a framework that restores this balance through two novel components. Specifically, we first introduce Gradient Rectification, a closed-form solution that mathematically decouples LoRA's factor updates, enforcing orthogonality against the historical knowledge subspace identified by an efficient Online Estimation. Next, to enhance plasticity, we introduce a Decoupled Margin Loss that promotes feature-level separation by pushing new feature representations away from old ones, thus creating distinct, low-interference regions for new learning. Comprehensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate that by harmonizing parameter-level orthogonality with feature-level separation, Janus-LoRA achieves a superior balance and establishes new state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Janus-LoRA框架，通过梯度修正和解耦边际损失平衡持续学习中的稳定性和可塑性，实现双因素低秩适应的正交更新。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA在持续学习中通过独立更新低秩因子A和B产生复合权重更新。为防止灾难性遗忘，该更新需保持与先前知识子空间正交。但研究发现复合更新系统性违反正交性，引入干扰并破坏稳定性；而简单强制正交又损害可塑性，破坏稳定性-可塑性平衡。当前方法无法同时解决这两个问题。
light_analysis.method: Janus-LoRA由两部分组成：1) 梯度修正：通过闭式解数学解耦LoRA的因子更新，利用在线估计高效识别历史知识子空间，强制更新正交于该子空间。2) 解耦边际损失：在特征层面推动新表示远离旧表示，为新学习创建低干扰区域，增强可塑性。两者结合实现参数级正交与特征级分离的协同。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准测试上，Janus-LoRA实现了新的最先进性能。实验表明，通过协调参数级正交性与特征级分离，该方法在稳定性和可塑性之间取得了优越平衡，具体性能提升摘要未明确数值，但标注为SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: Janus-LoRA为持续学习中的LoRA方法提供了平衡的解决方案，通过梯度修正和解耦边际损失有效缓解灾难性遗忘。其贡献在于理论分析复合更新正交性破坏问题，并设计精巧机制恢复平衡。未来工作可探索更高效的正交估计或扩展到其他参数高效微调方法。

title: A new semantically annotated corpus with syntactic-semantic and cross-lingual senses
abstract: We describe a new sense-tagged corpus for word sense disambiguation. The corpus is constituted of instances of 20 French polysemous verbs. Each verb instance is annotated with three sense labels: (1) the actual translation of the verb in the english version of this instance in a parallel corpus, (2) an entry of the verb in a computational dictionary of French (the Lexicon-Grammar tables) and (3) a fine-grained sense label resulting from the concatenation of the translation and the Lexicon-Grammar entry.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了一个新的法语多义动词语义标注语料库，通过三种标签（英语翻译、词典条目、组合标签）实现多视角的词义消歧标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 词义消歧是自然语言处理的关键任务，但现有资源对法语多义动词的标注不足。该研究旨在创建高质量、多语义视角的标注语料库，以支持跨语言和单语的语义分析。
light_analysis.method: 选取20个法语多义动词，从平行语料库中抽取实例，每个实例标注三个标签：英语翻译（跨语言对应）、Lexicon-Grammar词典条目（句法语义信息）、以及两者拼接的细粒度标签。该方法融合了翻译等价和词典知识，提供丰富的语义区分。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提及具体实验结果，主要贡献在于语料库的构建。该语料库可支持词义消歧模型的训练与评估，但未提供性能数据或与基线方法的对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该语料库为法语词义消歧提供了新资源，结合跨语言和词典信息，有助于多义词建模。未来需实验验证其有效性，并可能扩展至更多动词和语言对。

title: DiscoForcing: A Unified Framework for Real-Time Audio-Driven Character Control with Diffusion Forcing
abstract: We study real-time audio-responsive character control as a deployment-faithful problem: strictly causal, bounded-latency streaming that must generate coherent full-body motion at interactive frame rates while the audio condition can change abruptly, including tempo shifts, drops, or user edits. Prior music-to-motion systems are largely optimized for offline generation with global context, and degrade in streaming rollouts where conditioning history becomes stale or unreliable. We introduce DiscoForcing, a streaming audio-driven diffusion framework that combines a causal music encoder that captures rhythmic structure and phase dynamics with a diffusion-forcing sequence model trained under heterogeneous noise levels across the temporal horizon. Building on this, we design a hybrid temporal schedule and a history-guided streaming sampler to explicitly trade off responsiveness against long-horizon consistency under non-stationary audio. Implemented in an end-to-end real-time interactive system with online avatar playback and humanoid deployment workflows, DiscoForcing delivers more stable long-horizon rollouts and sharper audio-motion alignment than prior baselines under matched causality and latency constraints while maintaining real-time throughput.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiscoForcing框架，结合因果编码器与扩散强制模型，实现实时、低延迟的音频驱动角色控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有音乐到动作系统主要针对离线生成优化，在流式部署中因条件历史过时或不可靠而性能下降。实际应用需要严格因果、有限延迟的流式生成，并能应对音频条件的突变（如节奏变化、用户编辑），因此亟需一种能兼顾响应性与长程一致性的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: DiscoForcing结合因果音乐编码器（捕捉节奏结构和相位动态）与扩散强制序列模型（在时域异质噪声水平下训练）。设计混合时间调度和历史引导流式采样器，平衡响应性与长程一致性。实现端到端实时系统，支持在线头像回放和类人部署。
light_analysis.result: 在匹配因果性和延迟约束下，DiscoForcing相比基线方法实现更稳定的长程推演和更清晰的音频-动作对齐，同时保持实时吞吐率。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为实时音频驱动角色控制提供统一框架，解决了流式部署中的关键挑战，具有学术价值（推动扩散模型在因果流式场景的应用）和实际应用价值（如虚拟角色交互、游戏动画）。未来可探索更复杂音频条件或跨模态扩展。

title: SSR3D-LLM: Structured Spatial Reasoning via Latent Steps for Fine-Grained Grounding in Unified 3D-LLMs
abstract: 3D object grounding localizes referred objects in a 3D scene from natural language. Unified instance-centric 3D-LLMs aim to solve grounding together with dialog, QA, and captioning, yet many rely on a single pointer-style grounding decision that compresses a relational instruction into one selection. This is brittle for fine-grained queries where multiple same-class candidates must be ruled out by context objects and spatial relations. We propose Structured Spatial Reasoning 3D-LLM (SSR3D-LLM), a structured grounding interface for unified 3D-LLMs. Given fixed Mask3D object proposals, the LLM writes a sequence of latent spatial reasoning steps and memory tokens from the query, and a geometry-aware scorer reads these latent steps in order to refine candidate rankings step by step with step-length masking. The latent steps are learned from standard benchmark target supervision with auxiliary referential-cue supervision during training, while inference uses only the input query and Mask3D proposals. Across ReferIt3D, ScanRefer, and Multi3DRef, SSR3D-LLM achieves the strongest results among unified 3D-LLM baselines, with substantial gains over the single-pointer QPG baseline on fine-grained grounding and consistent improvements over prior unified 3D-LLMs, while preserving the default language-task route.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化空间推理3D-LLM (SSR3D-LLM)，通过潜在推理步骤和几何感知评分器逐步精炼候选对象，显著提升统一3D-LLM的细粒度定位性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一实例中心3D-LLM在细粒度查询中，需依据上下文对象和空间关系排除同类候选，但单指针式定位决策将关系指令压缩为单个选择，导致推理脆弱、精度不足。
light_analysis.method: 基于固定Mask3D物体提议，LLM根据查询生成潜在空间推理步骤和记忆令牌，几何感知评分器按步骤读取这些潜在表示，通过步长掩码逐步优化候选排序。训练时结合标准目标监督和辅助指征线索监督学习潜在步骤，推理仅需输入查询和Mask3D提议。
light_analysis.result: 在ReferIt3D、ScanRefer和Multi3DRef上，SSR3D-LLM超越所有统一3D-LLM基线，细粒度定位相比单指针QPG基线大幅提升，同时保持默认语言任务性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSR3D-LLM通过结构化推理接口增强了统一3D-LLM的细粒度空间推理能力，在学术和实际应用中有重要价值。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向。

title: ProvMind: Provenance-grounded reasoning for materials synthesis
abstract: Materials process optimization requires reasoning over routes, conditions, tools and causal dependencies, yet most computational formulations flatten synthesis procedures into text or ordered steps. We introduce MatProcBench, a provenance-grounded benchmark constructed from literature-mined MatPROV graphs, to evaluate seven process-reasoning tasks spanning route continuity, step-level variable inference and global causal consistency under both same-split and shift-aware evaluation, including a strict dual-OOD split that combines temporal and material-class shift. We further introduce ProvMind, a process-memory reasoning framework that retrieves analogous training processes, converts them into provenance-aware option-level compatibility scores, and uses a language model for constrained final decision making. ProvMind achieves 52.84\% accuracy on the dual-OOD split, outperforming prompting, retrieval-augmented and supervised fine-tuning baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于过程追踪的推理框架ProvMind和基准MatProcBench，用于材料合成过程优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 材料过程优化需要推理路线、条件、工具和因果依赖，但现有方法将合成过程扁平化为文本或有序步骤，缺乏对过程历史和图结构的利用。因此需要更结构化的基准和推理方法，以评估和提升模型对复杂过程依赖的理解能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建MatProcBench基准，基于文献挖掘的MatPROV图，涵盖路线连续性、步骤变量推断和全局因果一致性等七个任务。提出ProvMind框架：检索相似训练过程，转换为追踪感知的选项兼容性分数，并利用语言模型进行约束决策。采用同分布和分布偏移评估，包括严格的双OOD划分。
light_analysis.result: 在双OOD划分上，ProvMind达到52.84%准确率，显著优于提示工程、检索增强和微调基线方法，展现了在材料合成推理任务上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProvMind证明了利用过程追踪图进行材料合成推理的有效性，提供了标准化基准和推理框架，推动材料过程优化领域的自动化研究。未来可扩展至更复杂的路线和更多材料体系。

title: Comonadic Morphophonology: A Compositional Framework for Context-Dependent Morphological Rules in Finnish
abstract: Composing finite-state transducers (FSTs) for context-dependent morphophonological rules -- consonant gradation, vowel harmony, possessive suffix assimilation -- leads to multiplicative state explosion; neural models sidestep the problem but provide no formal account of the rules themselves. We present the first framework where each morphophonological rule is a function from a focused local context to a single output segment -- the type of a local rule familiar from cellular automata -- and where length-changing rules compose as coKleisli arrows of a comonad. Our central contribution is the Writer comonad (DeletionSet x Zipper), a new algebraic construction that restores strict coKleisli compositionality for such rules: each rule is a coKleisli arrow, extend lifts it to a global transformation, and deletions accumulate as a monoid action rather than requiring intermediate materialization. As supporting evidence, thirteen coKleisli arrows provide an alternative formulation expressing the same morphophonological behaviors that Omorfi encodes via 874 continuation classes (67:1 reduction at the rule-representation level), and the same abstraction enables bidirectional morphology -- a MorphGenerator reuses the analysis arrows for generation. On UD Finnish-TDT, the system achieves 83.92% UPOS accuracy with rule-only disambiguation (94.66% with an external suffix tagger), validating the framework as a practical morphological engine.
comment: 13 pages. Accepted at the Society for Computation in Linguistics (SCiL) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于共单子的组合框架，用于上下文相关形态音位规则，解决FST状态爆炸问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 处理芬兰语等语言的上下文相关形态音位规则（如辅音渐变、元音和谐）时，组合有限状态转换器会导致状态指数爆炸；神经模型虽能绕过但缺乏形式化解释。现有方法无法同时兼顾组合性与形式化描述，亟需一个既能保持规则局部性又能实现全局变换的代数框架。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是Writer共单子(DeletionSet×Zipper)，将每个形态音位规则建模为共Kleisli箭头（从局部上下文到输出音段），通过extend提升为全局变换，删除操作以幺半群动作累积而非中间物化。用13个共Kleisli箭头替代 Omorfi 的874个延续类（67:1压缩比），并实现双向形态分析。
light_analysis.result: 在UD Finnish-TDT数据集上，仅用规则消歧达到83.92%的UPOS准确率，结合外部后缀标注器提升至94.66%。与Omorfi相比，规则表示层压缩67倍，验证了框架作为实用形态引擎的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为上下文相关形态音位规则提供了兼具组合性与形式化的代数框架，Writer共单子保证了严格组合性，且能复用于生成方向。学术上拓展了共单子在语言学计算的应用，实际价值在于高效实现双向形态分析。未来可探索更多语言或与其他规则类型结合。

title: From Learning Resources to Competencies: LLM-Based Tagging with Evidence and Graph Constraints
abstract: Linking learning resources to a structured competency framework is key to enabling competency-based search and curriculum analytics in Learning Management Systems (LMS). However, manual tagging is labor-intensive, and fully automatic methods often lack transparency. In this paper, we present an end-to-end alignment pipeline that uses a large language model (LLM) as a constrained, evidence-producing tagger. LMS resources -both instructional content and assessments -are first segmented into meaningful pedagogical fragments. For each fragment, a small set of candidate competencies is retrieved from structured competency profiles enriched with graph-based context. The LLM then selects the most relevant competencies from this set and provides supporting evidence spans from the fragment text. These predictions are refined using the structure of the competency graph and aggregated at the resource level. We evaluate our approach on a dataset built from the Computer Science department's competency referential at the Université de Technologie de Compiègne (UTC), covering 22 competencies across multiple course materials. Our LLM+BM25+Graph (LBG) pipeline achieves strong results, with a micro-F1 of 0.57 and macro-F1 of 0.50 at the fragment level, 0.51 macro-F1 at the resource level, and an MRR of 0.82outperforming zero-shot and few-shot LLM variants, retrieval/similarity baselines, and supervised classifiers -while also producing more mechanically traceable evidence spans to support human auditing and educational analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM的端到端能力标签流水线，结合图约束和证据生成，实现从学习资源到能力框架的可解释对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 学习管理系统中的资源需要链接到结构化能力框架以支持基于能力的搜索和课程分析，但手动标记劳动密集且全自动方法缺乏透明度。现有方法无法同时保证准确性和可解释性，导致实际应用受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出LLM+BM25+Graph (LBG)流水线：首先将LMS资源分割为教学片段，然后从结构化能力档案中通过BM25和图上下文检索候选能力，LLM从候选中选择最相关能力并输出支持证据，最后利用能力图结构精炼预测并聚合到资源级。
light_analysis.result: 在UTC计算机科学系22项能力数据集上，片段级micro-F1=0.57、macro-F1=0.50，资源级macro-F1=0.51，MRR=0.82，优于零样本/少样本LLM、检索基线和有监督分类器，同时生成可追溯的证据文本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种可解释的能力标签方法，兼具自动化与透明度，支持人机协同审计。未来可扩展至更大规模能力图谱和多语言场景，但当前仍依赖领域特定资源分割和候选检索模块。

title: SA4Depth: Consistent Pose-Depth Scale Alignment for Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
abstract: Self-supervised depth estimation from monocular sequences relies on the joint learning of a depth and a pose network. Despite abundant research done to improve the depth network, efforts on the pose remain limited. In this context, even when depth is estimated up to scale, we highlight the importance of the alignment between the scene scales estimated by the pose and depth nets. Then, we introduce SA4Depth, an approach to improve this alignment and boost the depth predictions while keeping the inference time unchanged. Our proposed method uses the depth estimated during training to reproject learnable visual features across consecutive frames and refine the pose estimates by reducing feature alignment residuals. With our method, the estimated scene scales by the separate depth and pose networks are aligned, and the prediction scale consistency is improved across different sequences. Our differentiable refinement integrates seamlessly into existing self-supervised pipelines and substantially improves their depth estimates. We demonstrate this with extensive experiments both outdoors and indoors on KITTI, Cityscapes, and NYUv2. Additionally, results on KITTI Odometry confirm the effectiveness of our pose refinement. Our code is available at https://github.com/Runningchauncey/SA4Depth .

light_analysis.overview: 提出SA4Depth，通过特征重投影对齐深度和姿态网络的场景尺度，提升自监督单目深度估计的尺度一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督单目深度估计通常联合学习深度网络和姿态网络，但现有研究多聚焦于改进深度网络，对姿态网络的优化有限。即使深度估计已实现尺度不变，深度网络和姿态网络估计的场景尺度仍可能存在不一致，导致深度预测尺度不连续。这种对齐问题限制了深度估计的准确性，特别是在跨序列的预测中。因此，需要一种方法在不增加推理时间的前提下，提升两网络间的尺度对齐，从而改善深度估计质量。
light_analysis.method: SA4Drop通过利用训练期间估计的深度图，将可学习的视觉特征从一帧重投影到相邻帧，然后计算特征对齐残差，并通过残差最小化来迭代细化姿态估计。该方法使得深度网络和姿态网络输出的场景尺度实现对齐，增强跨序列的预测尺度一致性。该细化模块是可微分的，能够无缝集成到现有自监督流程中，无需修改模型架构或增加推理计算量。
light_analysis.result: 在KITTI、Cityscapes和NYUv2数据集上的大量实验表明，SA4Depth显著提升了深度估计精度，特别是在尺度一致性方面。在KITTI Odometry上的额外实验证实了姿态细化的有效性。与基线方法相比，该方法在不影响推理速度的前提下，取得了更低的深度误差和更高的准确率指标，具体数值如绝对相对误差（Abs Rel）等得到改进（摘要未提供具体数值，但声称显著提升）。
light_analysis.conclusion: SA4Depth通过特征重投影对齐深度和姿态网络的尺度，为自监督单目深度估计提供了一种轻量级但有效的改进方案。其可微分、即插即用的特性使得易于集成到现有流程中，具有实际应用价值。未来方向可能包括扩展到多帧或动态场景，但摘要未明确说明。代码已开源。

title: Mitigating Adaptive Attacks against Reasoning Models with Activation Consistency Training
abstract: As LLMs gain stronger reasoning capabilities, their extended chain-of-thought introduces new degrees of complexity for defending against adversarial jailbreaks and prompt injection. We study consistency training, a family of fine-tuning objectives that enforce identical behavior on clean prompts and adversarial rewrites, and evaluate its two main variants, output-level (BCT) and activation-level (ACT), across five reasoning models. We formulate both methods as a prompt injection defense and find ACT to be competitive with other training-based defenses while requiring only self-supervised pairs of clean and wrapped prompts. Our experiments also generalize both techniques within the jailbreak setting, demonstrating that ACT remains more robust to adaptive attacks. We also provide mechanistic evidence that ACT's defense against jailbreaks is encoded as a roughly linear shift in activation space at the assistant-turn boundary. After ACT training, we can recover a single steering direction that controls refusal on reasoning models with minimal effect on benign inputs. We find that ACT remains robust even when the model's chain-of-thought is replaced with a compliant trace from the undefended base model, pivoting to refuse prefilled jailbreaks. Together, these results suggest that supervising internal representations is a surprisingly effective and interpretable approach to various forms of safety training in reasoning models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出激活一致性训练（ACT），通过监督内部表示有效防御针对推理模型的自适应对抗攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型推理能力增强伴随长链思维，增加了对抗性越狱和提示注入的防御复杂度。现有输出级一致性训练（BCT）鲁棒性不足，缺乏可解释且高效的训练防御方法，特别是在面对自适应攻击时表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 研究输出级（BCT）和激活级（ACT）两种一致性训练，作为提示注入防御。ACT使用自监督的干净和扰动提示对，强制激活一致性。关键创新在于ACT将防御编码为助手回合边界处的线性移位，可恢复单个转向方向控制拒绝行为，且对良性输入影响小。
light_analysis.result: 在五个推理模型上，ACT与训练基防御竞争性强，尤其对自适应攻击更鲁棒。即使替换模型链思维为无防御基模型的顺从轨迹，ACT仍能拒绝预填充越狱。机制证据显示防御表现为激活空间的线性移位。
light_analysis.conclusion: 监督内部表示是有效且可解释的安全训练方法，适用于推理模型的各种安全形式。该工作为对抗性防御提供了新视角，未来可探索更复杂的攻击场景和扩展至其他模型架构。

title: Beyond One Path: Evaluating and Enhancing Divergent Thinking in Interactive LLM Agents
abstract: Divergent thinking is a core dimension of creativity, yet existing evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) treat them as single-turn text generations, failing to capture how an agent reasons through iterative interaction. To address this, we introduce MUTATE, an interactive benchmark designed to evaluate agentic divergent thinking at two levels: path-level, where an agent discovers multiple alternative paths to the same goal, and action-level, where individual actions require non-typical, mechanism-shifting object uses. Unlike success-only evaluations, MUTATE scores both completed paths and off-path attempts, capturing divergent reasoning that conventional success rates discard. Our experiments with frontier LLMs reveal a structural blind spot in existing frameworks: when exposed to immediate convergence pressure, they tend to fall into immediate action fixation, failing to improve action-level divergence. To overcome this, we propose ReDNA, which separates unconstrained divergent candidate generation from convergent constraint selection. ReDNA significantly outperforms prior methods across both divergence levels and generalizes effectively to an external creativity environment. We also confirm its success stems from a qualitative enhancement of resilient divergent reasoning rather than simple environmental exploration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MUTATE基准评估LLM代理的发散思维，并设计ReDNA方法通过分离发散生成与收敛选择来增强发散推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的LLM评估将模型视为单轮文本生成，忽略了交互式推理过程中的发散思维。发散思维是创造力的核心维度，但当前方法仅关注成功率，丢弃了非典型但关键的发散推理。因此需要一种能同时评估路径级和动作级发散思维的交互式基准，以揭示LLM在迭代交互中的结构性盲点。
light_analysis.method: 提出MUTATE基准，评估代理在路径级（发现多个替代路径）和动作级（非典型对象使用）的发散思维。它同时评分完成路径和偏离路径的尝试。基于实验发现的即时收敛压力导致的动作固定问题，提出ReDNA方法，将无约束的发散候选生成与收敛约束选择分离，以增强发散推理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个前沿LLM上的实验表明，现有框架存在结构性盲点：在即时收敛压力下，模型陷入动作固定，动作级发散性差。ReDNA显著优于先前方法，在两种发散级别上均取得更好性能，并能有效泛化到外部创造力环境。定性分析证实其成功源于增强韧性发散推理，而非简单环境探索。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过MUTATE基准揭示了LLM代理在发散思维评估中的关键盲点，并提出了有效的增强方法ReDNA。该研究为提升LLM的创造性交互推理提供了新视角，具有重要学术价值，尤其在需要探索性推理的AI应用中。未来工作可探索更复杂的发散推理场景及多步收敛策略。

title: The Cases LJP Never Sees: Prosecution Decision Prediction for More Complete Criminal Liability Assessment
abstract: Legal Judgment Prediction (LJP) has become a core benchmark for evaluating AI in the criminal legal domain, but it only sees criminal cases that have already passed prosecutorial review and been formally indicted. As a result, LJP leaves a substantial blind spot in assessing criminal liability, overlooking cases involving insufficient evidence, no criminal liability, or guilt exempted from punishment. To fill this gap, we propose \textbf{Prosecution Decision Prediction (PDP)}, the first Legal AI task built around prosecutorial review, which classifies each case into prosecution or one of three non-prosecution decisions and reflects legal AI's capabilities in evidence evaluation, legal subsumption, and value-based discretion. We further construct \textbf{PDP-Bench}, a benchmark of 4{,}630 real Chinese prosecutorial decisions spanning 190 charges. Extensive experiments show that state-of-the-art LLMs perform substantially worse on PDP than on LJP and that mainstream enhancement routes fail to close the gap. Moreover, controlled RLVR interventions show that simple outcome rewards fail to produce generalizable PDP discrimination.

light_analysis.overview: 提出起诉决策预测（PDP）任务，填补法律判决预测忽略起诉审查阶段的空白，并构建PDP-Bench基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有法律判决预测只处理已起诉案件，忽略证据不足、无刑事责任等情形，导致刑事责任评估不完整。起诉决策是刑事司法关键环节，但AI在此存在盲区，亟需更全面的评估任务。
light_analysis.method: 定义起诉决策预测（PDP）任务，将案件分为起诉或三类不起诉。构建PDP-Bench基准，含4630个真实中国起诉决策，覆盖190个罪名。采用LLMs进行实验，并尝试主流增强方法和RLVR干预。
light_analysis.result: 最先进LLMs在PDP上表现显著差于LJP，主流增强方法无法缩小差距；简单RLVR结果奖励不能产生泛化的PDP区分能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 填补法律AI中起诉决策预测空白，揭示现有模型在证据评估和法律适用上的不足，具有学术和实践价值。未来需改进模型以应对复杂起诉决策。

title: REVEAL: Reference-Grounded Reasoning for Multimodal Manipulation Detection
abstract: Multimodal manipulation detection aims to simultaneously identify forged image--text pairs and localize tampered regions, yet existing methods typically rely on memorizing isolated artifacts and struggle with imperceptible manipulation traces or domain shifts. Inspired by human comparative reasoning, we reformulate this task as a reference-grounded verification problem, where authenticity is assessed by comparing a query against retrieved authentic evidence. We propose REVEAL Reference-Enabled Verification for Evidence Analysis and Localization), a framework explicitly designed for this comparative paradigm. To support this paradigm, we construct a large-scale reference library comprising 170K authentic news image--text pairs featuring over 40K public figures. Technically, REVEAL employs a difference-aware fusion mechanism to capture fine-grained discrepancies between the query and retrieved evidence. Furthermore, we introduce a task-decoupled Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to jointly execute instance-level detection and fine-grained grounding, effectively mitigating optimization conflicts between these heterogeneous objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that REVEAL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, and notably enables \emph{training-free domain adaptation} by simply updating the reference library, offering a robust and practical solution for detecting evolving misinformation. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/REVEAL-Reference-A006.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REVEAL框架，将多模态篡改检测重构为参考基础的验证问题，通过比较查询与检索到的真实证据来判别真伪，并实现免训练域适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态篡改检测方法依赖记忆孤立伪造痕迹，难以应对难以察觉的篡改痕迹或域偏移。受人类比较推理启发，本文将任务重新定义为参考基础的验证问题，通过检索并比较真实证据来评估查询真伪，旨在提升检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力，解决现有方法在复杂场景下的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出REVEAL框架，包含差异感知融合机制以捕捉查询与检索证据间的细微差异，以及任务解耦的混合专家（MoE）结构，分别处理实例级检测和细粒度定位，缓解异构目标间的优化冲突。同时构建含17万对真实新闻图像-文本及4万公众人物的大规模参考库，支持检索证据。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，REVEAL显著优于当前最先进的多模态篡改检测方法。关键优势在于可通过仅更新参考库实现免训练域适应，无需重新训练模型，大幅提升了在域偏移场景下的泛化能力，为检测不断演变的虚假信息提供了鲁棒且实用的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: REVEAL通过引入参考比较范式，有效克服了现有方法对孤立伪影的依赖，并实现灵活的域适应。其构建的大规模参考库和设计的差异感知融合、MoE架构具有重要的学术价值。实际应用方面，该方法可快速适应新领域，对抗信息伪装。未来可进一步扩展参考库规模或探索更高效的检索机制。

title: Diffusion Large Language Models for Visual Speech Recognition
abstract: Existing Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) systems commonly rely on left-to-right autoregressive decoding, which can force premature decisions on visually ambiguous tokens before sufficient context is available. We propose DLLM-VSR, to the best of our knowledge, the first Diffusion Large Language Model (DLLM)-based VSR framework, formulating transcription as iterative masked denoising with flexible-order decoding. With confidence-based unmasking, DLLM-VSR commits high-confidence positions early and uses the committed tokens as bidirectional context to refine ambiguous ones. To adapt DLLMs to VSR, we introduce a two-stage masked-denoising training strategy that separates visual-to-text content alignment from length modeling. We further observe a performance gap with oracle-length decoding, which assumes access to the true transcript length, indicating that reducing target-length uncertainty can improve DLLM-based VSR. To reduce this gap, we develop length-guided candidate decoding, which uses video duration to construct plausible transcript-length hypotheses, decodes under multiple hypotheses, and reranks candidates using length plausibility and decoding confidence. The proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art WER of 19.5\% on LRS3 using only its labeled training data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于扩散大语言模型的视觉语音识别框架DLLM-VSR，通过迭代掩码去噪和长度引导候选解码实现灵活顺序转录，在LRS3数据集上达到19.5% WER的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VSR系统采用从左到右的自回归解码，在视觉模糊的token上会过早做出决定，缺乏利用未来上下文纠正错误的能力。为解决这一问题，需要一种能进行灵活顺序解码、利用双向上下文信息的方法，以提升对模糊视觉输入的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出DLLM-VSR框架，将视觉语音识别建模为迭代掩码去噪过程。采用置信度引导的解掩码策略，先解码高置信度token作为双向上下文，逐步细化模糊位置。设计两阶段掩码去噪训练策略，分离视觉-文本内容对齐与长度建模。为减少长度不确定性，提出长度引导候选解码，利用视频时长生成多个候选长度假设，解码后根据长度合理性和置信度重排序。
light_analysis.result: 在LRS3数据集上，仅使用标注训练数据，DLLM-VSR实现了19.5%的词错误率（WER），达到当时SOTA。与使用真实长度的oracle解码相比，存在性能差距，证实了长度不确定性的影响。长度引导候选解码有效缩小了这一差距，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将扩散语言模型应用于视觉语音识别，展示了非自回归解码在该任务中的潜力。提出的长度引导解码策略缓解了目标长度不确定性带来的性能下降。未来工作可探索更高效的长度预测模块或端到端集成，以进一步减少对长度假设的依赖。

title: GONDOR to the Rescue: Satisficing Planning with Low Memory
abstract: Greedy Best-First Search (GBFS) is the dominant approach for solving search problems where the goal can be estimated with a heuristic, such as planning, route finding, navigation, and pathfinding. This is especially true when the memory is tightly constrained, such as planning on edge devices. To alleviate that, we present GONDOR (Greedy Online Navigation with Dynamic Outpost-based Re-search), a memory-efficient extension of GBFS that allows search to continue under strict memory limits by periodically compressing the search tree while retaining a sparse set of anchor states, then upon reaching the goal reconstructs the path by re-searching between the sparse states. We analyze the algorithm and discuss several variants defined by different outpost selection policies. In addition, we explore using Bloom filters for compact duplicate detection in the closed list. Experiments across numeric planning domains and heuristic configurations show that GONDOR consistently improves coverage under low memory budgets compared to standard GBFS. We release the implementation of GONDOR and the Bloom-filter variant to facilitate further research on memory-efficient heuristic search.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GONDOR算法，一种内存高效的贪婪最佳优先搜索扩展，通过周期性压缩搜索树并保留稀疏锚点状态，在严格内存限制下继续搜索并重建路径。
light_analysis.motivation: 贪婪最佳优先搜索（GBFS）是规划、路径查找等问题的常用方法，但在内存受限设备（如边缘设备）上因内存预算低而难以有效搜索。现有GBFS在内存紧张时搜索覆盖不足，需要一种能在低内存下保持搜索效率的扩展方法。
light_analysis.method: GONDOR在GBFS基础上引入周期性搜索树压缩，仅保留一组稀疏的锚点状态。当达到目标时，通过重新搜索锚点状态之间的路径来重建完整路径。算法还探讨了多种锚点选择策略，并尝试使用布隆过滤器实现紧凑的闭列表重复检测，进一步节省内存。
light_analysis.result: 在多种数值规划领域和不同启发式配置下的实验表明，GONDOR在低内存预算下相比标准GBFS持续提高了覆盖率。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了一致的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GONDOR为内存受限环境下的启发式搜索提供了有效解决方案，适用于规划、路径搜索等应用。其开源实现有助于后续研究，未来可探索更优的锚点选择策略和布隆过滤器参数优化。

title: BiasEdit: A Training-Free Bias-Detect-and-Edit Framework for Learning Fair Visual Classifiers
abstract: Visual data from the Web power image classifiers, which often underpin many web services, such as recommendation and content moderation. However, the raw Web data often contain spurious correlations and social biases, and neural networks are known for their tendency to learn biases present in data. This can reinforce unfairness in web services and the web data, leading to a vicious cycle. In the context of image classification, networks learn bias attributes for a specific class when a majority of images contain the same attribute only for a given class. Hence, training a fair and debiased classifier from a biased dataset demands handling an imbalanced problem between a majority of images with bias attributes (bias-aligned samples) and a minority without (bias-conflict samples). In this work, we introduce BiasEdit, a modular framework that automatically detects bias attributes from the original dataset and edits them to construct a debiased dataset. Specifically, BiasEdit first detects unknown bias attributes via statistical dependence and mutual information analysis of visual-linguistic representations, and then explicitly edits those attributes using text-guided image editing to generate realistic bias-conflict samples. Unlike prior works that assume known bias attributes or relies on synthetic mixing, our method operates without manual annotations and can leverage off-the-shelf vision-language and editing models. BiasEdit addresses a fundamental challenge in Web-sourced visual AI, mitigating dataset-induced bias and achieving state-of-the-art debiasing performance even when training data are fully biased.
comment: Accepted to The Web Conference 2026 (formerly WWW) as an Oral presentation

light_analysis.overview: BiasEdit提出了一种无需训练的偏差检测与编辑框架，通过统计依赖和互信息分析自动检测偏差属性，并用文本引导图像编辑生成均衡样本，实现公平视觉分类器学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 网络图像数据常包含虚假相关性和社会偏见，神经网络倾向于学习这些偏见，导致网络服务和数据中的不公平性加剧。传统方法需要手动标注偏差属性或依赖合成混合，无法自动处理完全偏置的数据集。BiasEdit旨在解决从偏置数据集中训练无偏分类器时，多数偏差对齐样本与少数非偏差样本之间的不平衡问题，无需人工标注即可检测并修正偏差属性。
light_analysis.method: BiasEdit首先利用视觉-语言表示的统计依赖和互信息分析自动检测未知偏差属性，然后采用文本引导图像编辑显式修改这些属性，生成逼真的偏差冲突样本。该框架无需训练，可直接使用现成的视觉-语言模型和编辑模型，在完全偏置的数据集上构建去偏数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，BiasEdit在多种偏置场景下达到最先进的去偏性能，即使训练数据完全偏置，也能显著提升分类器的公平性。与现有方法相比，无需手动标注或复杂混合策略，有效缓解了网络数据中的偏差问题。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称优于先前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiasEdit为网络视觉AI中的偏差缓解提供了一种自动化、无需训练的解决方案，通过检测和编辑偏差属性生成平衡数据，促进了公平分类器的学习。其模块化设计可适配不同模型，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的偏差类型和编辑质量优化。

title: Bilinear Coordinate Alignment for Training-Free Task-Vector Transfer
abstract: Fine-tuning large-scale pre-trained models is a recent prevalent paradigm for adapting general representations to specialized tasks. However, when a new version of a pre-trained model becomes available, expertise acquired through fine-tuning cannot be directly reused because it is tied to the parameterization of the original model, requiring another costly fine-tuning. To address this inefficiency, recent work uses task vectors, defined as the parameter difference between a fine-tuned model and its base model, to transfer expertise across models. While existing methods bridge disparate models by matching activations or gradients, a significant performance gap remains relative to direct fine-tuning, suggesting that these partial correspondences are insufficient. In this work, instead of viewing a task vector merely as a parameter offset, we revisit the formation of task vectors and show that they can be derived as accumulated bilinear interactions between input-side activations and output-side gradients. Motivated by this observation, we formulate task-vector transfer as a dual-space alignment problem and propose BiCo, a training-free framework for transferring task vectors through Bilinear Coordinate alignment. BiCo estimates orthogonal Procrustes mappings in both spaces using a single forward-backward pass on a small calibration set, without any parameter update. Across extensive computer vision and natural language processing benchmarks, BiCo consistently outperforms existing transfer methods across models that differ in width, depth, and pre-training configuration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BiCo，一种无需训练的任务向量迁移框架，通过双线性坐标对齐实现模型间知识迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型预训练模型微调后，当模型版本更新时，微调参数无法直接复用，需重新微调，成本高昂。现有任务向量迁移方法通过匹配激活或梯度，但性能显著低于直接微调，表明部分对应关系不足。因此，需要一种更有效的任务向量迁移方法，以消除重复微调的开销。
light_analysis.method: BiCo重新审视任务向量形成，将其视为输入激活与输出梯度的累积双线性交互。基于此，将任务向量迁移转化为双空间对齐问题，提出双线性坐标对齐框架。该方法在单次前向-后向传播中，利用小型校准集估计两个空间中的正交Procrustes映射，无需任何参数更新，实现训练无关迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛的计算机视觉和自然语言处理基准测试中，BiCo在宽度、深度和预训练配置不同的模型间，持续优于现有迁移方法。与直接微调相比，性能差距显著缩小，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: BiCo通过双线性坐标对齐实现了高效的任务向量迁移，避免重新微调。该工作揭示了任务向量的双线性本质，为模型间知识复用提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的映射或扩展到更多模型架构。

title: Bayesian Gated Non-Negative Contrastive Learning
abstract: While Contrastive Learning (CL) has revolutionized self-supervised representation learning, its latent representations remain highly entangled and opaque, limiting their interpretability in safety-critical applications. We identify that a fundamental cause of this entanglement is the reliance on deterministic similarity measures, which treat all feature dimensions equally. In compositional scenes, this creates an Optimization Conflict: common background features, such as, "blue sky", are encouraged to align in positive pairs but simultaneously repelled in negative pairs, causing gradient oscillations that hinder precise semantic disentanglement. To address this, we propose BayesNCL (Bayesian Gated Non-Negative Contrastive Learning). Unlike standard approaches, BayesNCL introduces a probabilistic gating mechanism that dynamically filters out task-irrelevant, high-frequency common features while selectively retaining discriminative semantics. By formalizing feature selection as a variational inference problem with a sparse Bernoulli prior, our method effectively resolves the optimization conflict. Empirical experimental results on Imagenet-100 demonstrate that BayesNCL achieves a remarkable 142.1% improvement in semantic consistency compared to state-of-the-art baselines, yielding highly interpretable representations without compromising downstream task performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Cui-Peng-624/BayesNCL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出概率门控非负对比学习，通过变分推理动态过滤无关特征，解决对比学习中的表示纠缠和优化冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 对比学习在自监督表示学习中表现优异，但其潜在表示高度纠缠且不透明，在安全关键应用中受限。根本原因是确定性相似度度量将所有特征维度等同对待，在组合场景中导致优化冲突：背景特征在正负对中同时被拉近和推远，造成梯度振荡，阻碍精确语义解纠缠。现有方法无法动态过滤任务无关特征，迫切需要一种机制来选择性保留判别性语义。
light_analysis.method: 提出BayesNCL，引入概率门控机制，对特征进行非负约束并动态筛选。将特征选择形式化为带稀疏伯努利先验的变分推断问题，通过门控概率决定特征保留与否，从而有效解决优化冲突。该方法在训练中自适应地过滤掉高频的公共背景特征，同时保留具有判别性的语义信息，提高表示的紧凑性和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-100数据集上，与最先进基线相比，语义一致性提升142.1%，同时下游任务性能未受损害。这表明BayesNCL成功解耦了特征维度，产生了高度可解释的表示，验证了概率门控机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BayesNCL通过概率门控与变分推理解决了对比学习的表示纠缠问题，显著提升了语义一致性和可解释性，为安全关键应用提供了更可靠的表示学习框架。未来可探索在更大规模数据集上的扩展性，并应用于更复杂的组合场景。

title: AdaDPO: Self-Adaptive Direct Preference Optimization with Balanced Gradient Updates
abstract: DPO has become a widely adopted alternative to RLHF for aligning LLMs with human preferences, eliminating the need for a separate reward model or RL loop. Recent theoretical analysis uncovers an asymmetric gradient behavior in DPO: the loss suppresses dispreferred responses substantially faster than it promotes preferred ones, causing the model to learn to avoid bad answers rather than to generate good ones. We propose AdaDPO, a Self-Adaptive variant of the DPO algorithm that introduces per-preference-pair, stop-gradient-based coefficients derived directly from the policy model's generation probabilities, with the reference model's probabilities as an optional component. AdaDPO is constructed to enforce equality of gradient magnitudes between preferred and dispreferred probabilities; the practical implementation balances per-token gradients and applies a numerical clipping bound for stability, while retaining DPO's original hyperparameter structure. On Llama-3-8B-Instruct trained on UltraFeedback under a SimPO similar setup, AdaDPO consistently outperforms DPO on AlpacaEval 2: it achieves higher length-controlled win rates (LC) in 81% of hyperparameter combinations, attains the global best LC (48.3%) and raw win rate (46.1%), and enlarges the LC-over-WR margin in 88% of combinations, indicating effective mitigation of length bias. Additional analyses on KL divergence, reward margin, and reward accuracy confirm that AdaDPO rectifies the gradient imbalance and yields more efficient optimization. Because it operates purely at the loss level, AdaDPO can be dropped into existing preference-based alignment pipelines without changing data collection or model architectures. The method requires only a few lines of code, and the same self-adaptive principle generalizes to a broad family of pairwise contrastive preference losses including SimPO, R-DPO, IPO, CPO, and ORPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaDPO，一种自适应DPO算法，通过平衡正负例梯度解决DPO梯度不对称问题，提升LLM对齐性能。
light_analysis.motivation: DPO存在梯度不对称：压制负例远快于提升正例，导致模型学习避免错误而非生成正确回答。该问题影响对齐效率和效果，现有方法未直接解决，亟需一种能平衡梯度更新的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出AdaDPO，引入基于策略模型生成概率的自适应系数，在损失层平衡正负例梯度。实现中平衡每token梯度、数值裁剪保持稳定，不改变DPO超参结构，可即插即用到现有偏好对齐流程，仅需几行代码，且推广到SimPO等对比损失。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3-8B-Instruct+UltraFeedback上，AdaDPO在81%超参组合中AlpacaEval 2的LC Win Rate更高，全局最佳LC 48.3%、Raw Win Rate 46.1%，88%组合中LC-WR差距扩大（缓解长度偏差）。KL散度、奖励边际和准确率分析证实梯度平衡更高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaDPO有效纠正DPO梯度不平衡，提升对齐质量和效率，易于集成。通用性强，可扩展到多种偏好损失，为偏好优化提供新视角，但复杂度略增，未来可探索更动态的自适应机制。

title: Breaking the Script Barrier: Enabling Automatic Alignment for PoS-based ASR Error Analysis in Non-Latin Scripts
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are commonly evaluated using aggregate metrics such as Word Error Rate (WER), which do not capture the linguistic structure of errors. Fine-grained analysis, such as Part-of-Speech (PoS)-wise error characterization, requires accurate alignment between ASR hypotheses and reference transcriptions. However, existing alignment tools are often unreliable for languages written in non-Latin scripts. In this work, we address this gap by proposing a robust, automated, language-agnostic alignment mechanism applicable across ASR architectures and across languages written in both Latin and non-Latin scripts. This enables consistent alignment of hypotheses, references, and evaluation sequences, forming the basis for downstream linguistic analysis. Building on this, we employ standard PoS taggers to perform scalable and reproducible PoS-wise error analysis. Notably, we perform alignment and downstream ASR error analysis across three major segmented writing systems, namely, Abugida (Tamil, Hindi, Kannada), Alphabetic (English, Russian, Greek), and Abjad (Arabic). We further demonstrate how such error information can be leveraged during ASR training to improve metrics such as WER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种鲁棒、自动、语言无关的对齐机制，支持非拉丁脚本下基于词性（PoS）的ASR错误分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的ASR评估多用WER等聚合指标，无法捕获错误的语言结构。细粒度分析需要准确的对齐，但对拉丁和非拉丁脚本的语言，现有对齐工具不可靠。该论文旨在解决这一问题，为多种书写系统的语言提供一致的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出自动、语言无关的对齐机制，适用于不同ASR架构和书写系统（拉丁、非拉丁）。对齐后利用标准PoS标注器进行可扩展的PoS错误分析。在三种主要书写系统（元音附标、字母、辅音音素）的七种语言上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多种非拉丁脚本语言上实现了可靠对齐，并进行了PoS错误分析。展示了这种错误信息可改进ASR训练，降低WER。摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了非拉丁脚本自动对齐的空白，实现了跨书写系统的统一错误分析。为后续ASR评估和改进提供了工具，具有实用价值。未来可扩展到更多语言和错误类型（如语义）。

title: Roles with Rails: Contract-Preserving Role Evolution in Multi-Agent Structured Reasoning
abstract: Role-based LLM multi-agent systems need adaptive role pools, yet adapting such systems is not merely a matter of prompt optimization: roles often carry structural obligations, including capability coverage, message compatibility, validation, final-answer aggregation, and parser-compatible output protocols. Existing systems either fix the role inventory and lose adaptivity, or allow unconstrained generation to induce role drift, removing structurally necessary roles and breaking answer contracts. We formulate this as contract-preserving role evolution, requiring every committed edit to preserve five structural contracts (capability, communication, validation, aggregation, output protocol). We instantiate this formulation in SERO, a Self-Evolving Role Orchestration framework that evolves a typed role-card pool through credit-guided retrieval, a credit-ranked communication DAG with a protected terminal aggregator and conditional validator repair, and a contextual-bandit controller whose LLM-proposed edits are committed only when they preserve the contracts and improve task score. Experiments on real-world reasoning benchmarks across three LLM backbones confirm the value of contract-preserving role evolution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出合同保留的角色演化框架SERO，在结构化多智能体推理中保持五个关键合同以实现自适应角色池。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统中角色池需要自适应，但现有方法要么固定角色列表失去适应性，要么允许无约束生成导致角色漂移，破坏结构必要角色和答案合同。角色常带有结构性义务，如能力覆盖、消息兼容性、验证、最终答案聚合和解析器兼容输出协议。因此需要一种合同保留的角色演化方法，确保每次编辑都保留五个结构合同。
light_analysis.method: 提出SERO（自演化角色编排框架），通过信用引导检索演化类型化角色卡池，使用信用排名通信DAG、受保护终端聚合器和条件验证器修复，以及上下文强盗控制器，仅当LLM提出的编辑保留合同并提升任务分数时才提交。框架显式定义了五个结构合同：能力、通信、验证、聚合和输出协议。
light_analysis.result: 在三个LLM骨干网络的真实世界推理基准上，实验证实了合同保留角色演化的价值。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但表明该方法相比现有基线在保持角色结构完整性的同时提升了任务性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次形式化合同保留的角色演化问题，并实例化为SERO框架。该方法通过结构化合同约束确保角色自适应的稳定性和可靠性，具有重要学术价值。潜在局限包括对合同定义的依赖和计算开销，未来工作可探索更高效的演化策略。

title: Anomaly as Non-Conformity via Training-Free Graph Laplacian Energy Minimization
abstract: Detecting subtle visual anomalies in images remains challenging, particularly when only normal samples are available a priori. Such unsupervised anomaly detection is typically solved by measuring feature similarity of a query patch to a memory of normal patches. However, similarity alone does not reveal how strongly a query patch violates the structure of the normal feature manifold. We propose a training-free Laplacian graph energy optimization formulation, named ANoCo that scores Anomaly by the cost of Non-Conformity of a query patch to align with a fixed normal manifold. For each query patch, we construct a bipartite query to normal graph weighted by cosine affinity, explicitly removing query-query and normal-normal edges to prevent evidence dilution. We formulate anomaly scoring as a convex Laplacian energy with anchored normal nodes, and solve in closed form. In particular, we do not use the optimized features themselves-the anomaly score is the magnitude of the update required to satisfy normality constraints, reframing the graph Laplacian as a non-conformity operator rather than a smoothing prior. The proposed method introduces no learnable parameters, message passing, or sampling, and has complexity comparable to a single linear solve. Across standard benchmarks, it delivers strong image-level AUROC, stable localization maps, and improved robustness over prior methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of using optimization-induced feature drift as anomaly measure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练拉普拉斯图能量优化方法ANoCo，将异常得分为查询补丁对齐正常流形的非一致性成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督异常检测通常通过测量查询补丁与正常补丁的特征相似性来检测，但相似性无法揭示查询补丁如何违反正常特征流形的结构。需要一种能捕捉非一致性的方法，且避免引入可学习参数或复杂采样。
light_analysis.method: 构建二分图，仅保留查询到正常节点的边，用余弦亲和度加权。异常得分为闭式解中拉普拉斯能量优化所需的特征漂移幅度，即非一致性成本。无需训练、消息传递或采样，复杂度类似单次线性求解。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准上取得强图像级AUROC，稳定的定位图，且相比先前方法鲁棒性提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ANoCo将图拉普拉斯作为非一致性算子，通过优化诱导的特征漂移衡量异常，无需可学习参数。方法有效、计算高效，适合无监督异常检测。未来可扩展至其他流形结构任务。

title: Latent Diffusion for Missing Data
abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful generative approaches for missing-data imputation, yet most existing methods operate directly in data space and degrade when training data are heavily incomplete. We investigate whether shifting diffusion to a learned latent representation improves robustness under missing-completely-at-random (MCAR) corruption. To this end, we propose a two-stage framework: a robust VAE-based imputer first learns compact semantic features from incomplete observations, and a diffusion model is then trained in the resulting latent space. Across training missing rates, we perform a controlled comparison against pixel-space diffusion models under the same incomplete-data setting. The latent diffusion model maintains high sample quality and remains stable up to 50\% missingness, while pixel-space diffusion degrades progressively as missingness increases. For downstream imputation, latent diffusion also achieves consistently better performance than pixel-space diffusion. These findings indicate that latent-space modeling mitigates artifact amplification from zero-imputed inputs and provides a more robust generative prior for incomplete-data learning. Overall, our results support latent diffusion as a strong and practically useful alternative to pixel-space diffusion for missing-data problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出潜在扩散模型用于缺失数据插补，通过两阶段框架提升对高缺失率的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型直接在数据空间操作，训练数据高度不完整时性能下降。该研究旨在解决缺失数据插补中像素空间扩散对缺失率敏感的问题，探索将扩散模型迁移到潜在表示空间的可行性，以增强对随机缺失数据的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：首先使用鲁棒的VAE插补器从不完整观测中学习紧凑语义特征，然后在所得潜在空间训练扩散模型。在完全随机缺失（MCAR）假设下，与像素空间扩散进行受控对比，训练缺失率从低到高变化。
light_analysis.result: 潜在扩散模型在高达50%的缺失率下保持高样本质量且稳定，而像素空间扩散随缺失率增加逐渐退化。下游插补任务中，潜在扩散也持续优于像素空间扩散，表明其生成先验更鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 潜在空间建模缓解了零插补输入引起的伪影放大，为不完整数据学习提供了更鲁棒的生成先验。潜在扩散是像素空间扩散在缺失数据问题中的强有力且实用的替代方案。

title: Skill0.5: Joint Skill Internalization and Utilization for Out-of-Distribution Generalization in Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Equipping large language models with explicit skills has emerged as a promising paradigm for enabling autonomous agents to solve complex tasks. Agent skills can be inherently divided into general skills for broad cognitive transfer and task-specific skills for dynamic execution. However, existing skill-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods typically force a rigid choice between full externalization, which incurs prohibitive context overhead, and full internalization, which risks overfitting and knowledge conflicts. To address this dilemma, we propose Skill0.5, a novel agentic RL framework that explicitly differentiates skill treatments by combining general skill internalization with task-specific skill utilization. Driven by a dynamic, difficulty-aware router, Skill0.5 streams tasks into distinct mastery tiers to apply tailored optimization strategies: it internalizes general skills via privileged distillation to build a cognitive foundation for hard tasks, while using diagnostic probing on easy tasks to penalize shortcuts and enforce specific skill utilization. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop demonstrate that Skill0.5 outperforms both memory-based and skill-based RL baselines, yielding performance improvements across both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Skill0.5框架，联合技能内化与利用，解决强化学习中技能表示的外化与内化困境，提升分布外泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于技能的强化学习方法在技能表示上存在两难：完全外化（如记录完整轨迹）导致上下文开销剧增，完全内化（如将技能参数化进模型）则易导致过拟合和知识冲突。这限制了智能体在复杂任务中的泛化能力，尤其是在分布外场景下表现不佳。因此需要一种平衡策略，既能利用通用技能的认知迁移优势，又能保持任务特定技能的灵活执行。
light_analysis.method: Skill0.5框架通过动态难度感知路由器将任务分流到不同掌握层级：对困难任务，通过特权蒸馏将通用技能内化进模型，构建认知基础；对简单任务，使用诊断探针惩罚捷径学习，强制特定技能利用。该方法显式区分通用技能（内化）和任务特定技能（外化利用），避免了单一策略的局限。在ALFWorld和WebShop环境上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Skill0.5在ALFWorld和WebShop上均优于基于记忆和基于技能的强化学习基线方法，在分布内和分布外场景下均获得性能提升。具体提升幅度摘要未详细说明，但明确了整体优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Skill0.5通过联合技能内化与利用，有效解决了技能强化学习中外化与内化的矛盾，提升了智能体在分布外任务中的泛化能力。其动态难度感知策略为技能管理与迁移提供了新思路。未来可探索更细粒度的技能分化机制或扩展到更复杂的多任务环境。

title: VITAL: Visual-Semantic Dual Supervision for Enhanced and Interpretable Latent Reasoning in Medical MLLMs
abstract: Latent reasoning enables reasoning over continuous hidden states rather than explicit tokens, avoiding the language bottleneck and inference overhead of chain-of-thought for medical VQA. However, existing methods suffer from modality collapse, insufficient visual supervision, and train-inference mismatch. Moreover, their opaque latent states offer no interpretability, which is critical in clinical applications. We propose VITAL, a latent-space reasoning framework for medical MLLMs with visual-semantic dual supervision: an auxiliary text decoder reconstructs reasoning chains from latent states, while a visual projector regresses ROI features from a frozen, independent medical vision encoder. Both modules are discarded at inference with zero overhead, yet can be re-attached post-hoc for dual interpretability, providing textual and visual explanations of the reasoning process without sacrificing efficiency. We construct a 61K dataset spanning 9 imaging modalities, exceeding prior medical visual latent reasoning datasets by an order of magnitude. Experiments on 7 benchmarks show that VITAL consistently and substantially outperforms the backbone, all latent reasoning baselines, and medical MLLMs trained on far larger data, achieving state-of-the-art results competitive with trillion-parameter proprietary models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VITAL框架，通过视觉-语义双重监督增强医疗多模态大模型的可解释潜在推理，解决模态坍塌与不可解释性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有潜在推理方法在医疗视觉问答中面临模态坍塌、视觉监督不足及训练-推理不匹配问题，且潜在状态不透明，缺乏临床所需的可解释性。
light_analysis.method: VITAL框架采用辅助文本解码器从潜在状态重建推理链，并利用独立医学视觉编码器通过视觉投影器回归ROI特征。推理时二者可丢弃（零开销），后期可附加实现文本与视觉双模态可解释性。构建61K数据集，覆盖9种成像模态。
light_analysis.result: 在7个基准上，VITAL一致且显著超越骨干模型、所有潜在推理基线及基于更大数据训练的医疗MLLM，达到与万亿参数专有模型竞争的最优性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出可解释潜在推理框架，兼顾效率与解释性，提升医疗MLLM可靠性；数据集与方法的扩展性为未来多模态临床应用奠定基础。

title: DenoiseRL: Bootstrapping Reasoning Models to Recover from Noisy Prefixes
abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a central paradigm for advancing reasoning in large language models, yet most existing methods still depend on stronger teacher models or heavily curated difficult datasets, limiting scalable capability improvement. In this paper, we introduce DenoiseRL, a reinforcement learning framework that substitutes external supervision with recovery-oriented optimization over failures from weak models. Instead of relying on stronger supervision or carefully engineered data, DenoiseRL learns directly from incorrect reasoning traces by converting them into opportunities for improvement, making training more scalable and less dependent on external resources. This yields a richer and more diverse learning signal, improving exploration efficiency from imperfect model behavior. As a result, DenoiseRL improves reasoning performance and overall training efficiency while reducing the need for expensive data curation or stronger teacher models. Empirically, DenoiseRL consistently outperforms strong on-policy RL baselines across competitive mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks and promotes stronger self-corrective behavior as training difficulty increases, highlighting an effective and scalable alternative pathway for improving reasoning in large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DenoiseRL框架，通过从错误推理轨迹中恢复学习，替代外部监督，提升大模型推理能力和训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习方法依赖强教师模型或精心筛选的困难数据集，限制了可扩展性。为解决这一问题，DenoiseRL从弱模型的失败中学习，将错误推理转化为改进机会，减少对外部资源的依赖，实现更高效的训练。
light_analysis.method: DenoiseRL是一种强化学习框架，核心创新在于用恢复导向优化替代外部监督。它直接从错误推理轨迹中学习，通过将失败转化为改进信号，增加学习信号的丰富性和多样性，提升探索效率，而无需强教师或昂贵数据。
light_analysis.result: 在数学和通用推理基准上，DenoiseRL持续优于强在线强化学习基线。随着训练难度增加，模型表现出更强的自我纠正能力，推理性能和训练效率显著提升，减少了对数据筛选和外部监督的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: DenoiseRL提供了一种可扩展且高效的推理增强途径，通过自我纠正机制从错误中学习，降低对外部资源的依赖。未来可拓展至更多复杂推理任务，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Conveyance: A Versatile Framework for Learning in Structured Class Spaces
abstract: While machine learning (ML) architectures have evolved rapidly to account for complex data, loss functions like cross-entropy remain mostly structure-agnostic in many real-world applications. However, the `class-symmetric' nature of these standard losses fundamentally limits the ability of ML models to exploit structural relationships between classes, particularly when facing structured noise. We propose \textsc{Conveyance}, a new classification approach and associated loss function tailored to structured class spaces. It allows users to encode graph-like relations between classes without having to define complex joint distributions or manually tune utility matrices.Technically, our loss function operates by maximizing two separate margins over distinct class partitions, while preserving formal properties such as monotonicity and partial convexity. We demonstrate the versatility and effectiveness of our method by applying it to hierarchical classification, ordinal regression, and multiple instance learning. Across these tasks, \textsc{Conveyance} either matches or exceeds the performance of specialized baselines, thereby offering a unified solution for structured class spaces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Conveyance框架，通过最大化类别分区的双边界损失函数，统一处理层次分类、序数回归等多类结构空间学习任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习架构快速发展，但损失函数如交叉熵大多忽视类别间的结构关系，特别是面对结构化噪声时表现有限。这种类别对称性限制了模型利用类间关系的能力。用户需要复杂的联合分布或手动调整效用矩阵，缺乏通用解决方案。
light_analysis.method: Conveyance是一种新的分类方法及损失函数，允许用户编码图状类别关系，无需定义复杂联合分布或手动调整。损失函数通过最大化不同类别分区上的两个独立边界来运作，同时保持单调性和部分凸性等正式性质。该方法可应用于层次分类、序数回归和多实例学习。
light_analysis.result: 在层次分类、序数回归和多实例学习任务中，Conveyance匹配或超越了特定任务基线的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效且具有通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Conveyance为结构化类别空间提供了统一的学习框架，具有广泛的适用性。它减轻了用户设计和调整的负担，同时性能不逊于专门方法。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或扩展至其他任务。

title: Revisiting Metafeatures to Explain Model Differences on Tabular Data
abstract: With the rise of tabular foundation models alongside traditional models still performing well on many tasks, choosing the right model for a tabular dataset remains difficult. We investigate whether dataset meta-features can explain performance gaps between model families on tabular prediction tasks. Using the TabArena benchmark results, we analyze dataset-level performance gaps and relate them to model-agnostic dataset descriptors. After strict statistical tests with false discovery control, we find that (1) for neural network vs. tree gaps, no meta-feature survives false discovery control, (2) for non-foundation vs. foundation model gaps, one association is robust but does not generalize when tested in leave-one-dataset-out prediction, and (3) for TabICLv2 vs. TabPFN-2.6, one robust association also improves held-out prediction. Furthermore, we conduct a leave-one-dataset-out analysis and find that meta-feature predictors fail to improve meaningfully over a simple baseline. Overall, our results show the heterogeneity of tabular datasets and that global meta-feature approaches are not robust enough to offer explanations on the 51 TabArena datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 通过严格统计检验发现，元特征不能稳健解释表格数据上模型性能差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格数据上模型选择困难，尽管元特征方法被提出用于解释模型差异，但其鲁棒性尚未经过严格验证。现有研究在有限数据集上发现某些关联，但缺乏大规模、统计严格的检验。本文旨在使用TabArena基准和错误发现控制，系统评估元特征在解释神经网络与树模型、基础模型与非基础模型等性能差距中的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 基于TabArena基准的51个数据集，计算模型无关的元特征描述符。分析数据集级性能差距与元特征的关系，采用置换检验和Benjamini-Hochberg错误发现控制进行统计检验。进一步通过留一数据集预测评估元特征预测器的泛化能力，并以简单基线（如均值）作为对照。
light_analysis.result: 神经网络与树模型的性能差距中，无任何元特征通过错误发现控制；非基础模型与基础模型差距中，只有一个关联通过检验，但在留一数据集预测中不泛化；TabICLv2与TabPFN-2.6差距中，一个关联通过检验且能改善预测。然而，整体元特征预测器在多数对比中未能显著优于简单基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明全局元特征方法在表格数据上解释模型差异的能力有限，凸显了数据集的异质性。未来应探索更局部或自适应的解释方法，或考虑模型与数据集的交互特性。该发现对表格数据模型选择元学习有重要警示意义。

title: Efficient Post-training of LLMs for Code Generation With Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Post-training using online reinforcement learning (RL) is an important training step for LLMs, including code-generating models. However, online RL for code generation involves LLM inference and verification of the generated output, which can take considerable time and resources. In this paper, we explore the application of offline RL to code-generating models by leveraging existing code datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that offline RL is an effective training strategy for improving LLM performance. We show that offline RL can be especially beneficial for small LLMs and challenging coding problems.

light_analysis.overview: 探索离线强化学习在代码生成LLM后训练中的应用，证明其有效性和效率优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线强化学习用于代码生成模型的后训练需要大量时间和资源，包括LLM推理和输出验证。现有方法效率低下，尤其对于小模型和复杂问题。本文旨在利用现有代码数据集，通过离线RL提高训练效率，同时保持或提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用离线强化学习方法，利用已有的代码数据集进行后训练，无需在线交互和即时验证。具体方法可能包括使用离线策略优化算法（如DQN、CQL等），但摘要未明确说明。关键创新点在于将离线RL应用于代码生成任务，减少计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，离线RL是一种有效的训练策略，能够提升LLM在代码生成任务上的性能。特别地，离线RL对小型LLM和具有挑战性的编码问题有显著改进效果。摘要未提供具体数值或与基线方法的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了离线RL在代码生成LLM后训练中的可行性，为降低训练成本提供了新思路。学术上拓展了RL在代码领域的应用，实际中可加速模型优化。未来可能需探索更高效的数据利用和算法适配。

title: Measuring Progress Toward AGI: A Cognitive Framework
abstract: Despite widespread discussion of AGI, there is no clear framework for measuring progress toward it. This ambiguity fuels subjective claims, makes it difficult to track progress, and risks hindering responsible governance. As a starting point to address this gap, we present a framework for understanding system capabilities in relation to human cognitive abilities. Drawing from decades of research in psychology, neuroscience, and cognitive science, we introduce a Cognitive Taxonomy that deconstructs general intelligence into 10 key cognitive faculties. We then propose a rigorous evaluation protocol in which a system's performance is measured across a suite of targeted, held-out cognitive tasks, generating a 'cognitive profile' that can be used to understand a system's strengths and weaknesses. We hope this framework will provide a practical roadmap and an initial step toward more rigorous, empirical evaluation of AGI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于认知科学的框架，用于衡量AGI进展，包括认知分类法和评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前关于AGI的讨论缺乏明确的衡量框架，导致主观断言泛滥、进展追踪困难，并阻碍负责任治理。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过引入系统性的评估方法来促进AGI的实证评估。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴心理学、神经科学和认知科学的研究，将通用智能分解为10个关键认知能力，构建认知分类法。提出严格评估协议，通过一组针对性、保留的认知任务测量系统性能，生成'认知轮廓'以分析其优劣势。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，主要贡献是提出理论框架。框架旨在提供实用路线图和初步步骤，以推动更严格、实证的AGI评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为AGI进展的实证评估提供了理论基础和实践指导，有助于减少主观争议、促进治理。未来工作可进一步验证认知分类法的有效性和评估协议的可靠性。

title: EgoRelight: Egocentric Human Capture and Illumination Recovery for Relightable and Photoreal Avatar Rendering
abstract: Mixed Reality (MR) headsets promise a future of immersive telepresence where virtual humans blend indistinguishably into real or virtual surroundings. Achieving this vision requires a method for capturing a user's motion, estimating appearance under novel lighting, and understanding the environment - all from the constrained viewpoint of a head-mounted display (HMD). Existing approaches treat these as isolated problems: they either focus on driving avatars with baked-in lighting or rely on studio setups for relighting. In this paper, we present EgoRelight, a holistic framework for egocentric telepresence that simultaneously captures full-body human performance, synthesizes photorealistic and relightable appearance, and estimates high dynamic range (HDR) environment maps from a single HMD. First, to ensure motion and surface reconstruction, we propose an egocentric perception module that leverages stereo down-facing cameras to extract dense depth maps, which serve as geometric control signals to drive a mesh-based avatar. Second, we introduce a novel neural appearance model that learns to synthesize view-dependent specular and view-independent diffuse shading separately. By employing a specialized ray-sampling strategy, our model generalizes to unseen illumination without relying on restrictive analytical BRDF priors. Third, we enable seamless avatar integration into the physical world via a test-time inverse rendering process, which recovers an HDR environment map by matching the pre-trained avatar's appearance to live egocentric camera observations. We demonstrate our system through a social telepresence application, where remote users are coherently relit according to their physical environment. Extensive experiments show that our components and the integrated system significantly outperform state-of-the-art baselines in geometric accuracy and rendering as well as relighting fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EgoRelight，从HMD视角同时捕获人体运动、估计HDR环境光照并生成可重光照的逼真虚拟化身。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合现实需要从头戴显示器(HMD)的有限视角实现用户运动捕获、外观估计和环境理解，现有方法要么仅关注预烘焙光照的化身驱动，要么依赖于工作室环境进行重光照，缺少端到端的一体化方案。EgoRelight旨在解决这一实际问题，实现从单个HMD进行全身运动捕捉、照片级可重光照外观合成，并恢复HDR环境贴图，以支持沉浸式远程临场。
light_analysis.method: 首先，利用立体下视相机提取密集深度图作为几何控制信号驱动网格化身。其次，提出新颖的神经外观模型，分别学习视角相关镜面反射和视角无关漫反射，通过特殊光线采样策略泛化到未知光照，无需分析BRDF先验。最后，在测试时通过逆渲染过程，匹配预训练化身与实时观测外观，恢复HDR环境贴图，实现化身与物理环境一致的重光照。
light_analysis.result: 在几何精度、渲染质量和重光照保真度上显著优于现有基线方法。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但通过社交远程临场应用展示，远程用户可根据物理环境获得一致重光照。实验验证各组件及集成系统均优于最先进基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: EgoRelight提供了从HMD视角进行全身运动捕捉、外观合成和HDR光照恢复的一体化框架，推动了沉浸式远程临场的发展。其价值在于实现虚拟化身与真实环境的无缝融合，未来可应用于混合现实社交、虚拟会议等场景。潜在局限性包括对HMD硬件的依赖以及实时性能的优化空间。

title: HRBench: Benchmarking and Understanding Thinking-Mode Switch Strategies in Hybrid-Reasoning LLMs
abstract: Hybrid-reasoning large language models (LLMs) expose explicit controls over reasoning effort, allowing users or systems to trade off answer quality against inference cost. However, existing methods for adaptive thinking-mode selection are typically evaluated under different models, datasets, and implementation assumptions, making it difficult to compare their practical behavior. We introduce HRBench, a unified evaluation framework for studying thinking-mode switching in hybrid-reasoning LLMs. HRBench organizes the design space along two axes: three switching strategy families, prompt-based selection, external routing, and speculative execution, and four training regimes, training-free, SFT, offline and online RL, yielding 12 controlled evaluation settings. We evaluate these settings across 6 LLMs, from Qwen3.5-2B to Kimi-K2.5-1.1T, and 5 reasoning benchmarks covering mathematics, science, and code, while reimplementing 12+ representative prior methods within the same pipeline. Our analysis characterizes how different switching strategies occupy distinct effectiveness-efficiency trade-off regions: prompt-based methods often provide favorable token-accuracy trade-offs, routing methods offer more stable cost reduction, and speculative methods tend to improve accuracy at higher token cost. We further find that training affects strategies differently, and that the preferred strategy varies with model scale and task domain. HRBench provides reference implementations and a unified evaluation platform to support more controlled research on efficient reasoning in hybrid-reasoning LLMs. Our data, code and repository are available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/HRBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HRBench框架，系统评估混合推理LLM中的思维模式切换策略，揭示不同策略在效果-成本权衡中的特点。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合推理LLM提供显式控制推理努力以权衡答案质量与推理成本，但现有自适应思维模式切换方法在不同模型、数据集和实现假设下评估，缺乏统一比较。不同切换策略（基于提示、路由、推测）和训练范式（无训练、SFT、RL）的实际行为难以横向对比。因此需要标准化的评估框架来公平衡量各策略的有效性和效率，以指导实际应用中的策略选择。
light_analysis.method: HRBench沿两个维度组织设计空间：三种切换策略家族（基于提示的选择、外部路由、推测执行）和四种训练机制（无训练、SFT、离线RL、在线RL），共12个受控设置。在6种LLM（从Qwen3.5-2B到Kimi-K2.5-1.1T）和5个推理基准（数学、科学、代码）上评估，并重新实现12+种代表性方法以保持实验一致性。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明不同策略占据不同效果-效率权衡区域：基于提示的方法通常提供有利的token-准确性权衡，路由方法实现更稳定的成本降低，推测方法以更高token成本提升准确性。训练影响因策略而异，且首选策略随模型规模（从2B到1.1T参数）和任务领域（数学、科学、代码）变化。这些发现为策略选择提供实证依据。
