light_analysis.conclusion: HRBench提供统一评估平台和参考实现，系统揭示了混合推理LLM中思维模式切换策略的行为特征。其学术价值在于建立了可复现的比较基准，实际应用价值在于指导根据资源约束和任务需求选择最优策略。未来可扩展至更多策略和训练方法，支持高效推理的进一步研究。

title: Adaptive Temporal Gating of Longitudinal Magnetic Resonance Imaging for Alzheimer's Prediction
abstract: Predicting conversion from Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) to Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is critical for early intervention. Current deep learning paradigms predominantly rely on cross-sectional structural MRI, neglecting prognostic value in patient-specific anatomical trajectories. We introduce the Temporal Adaptive Fusion Network (TAF-Net), a hybrid CNN-Transformer architecture that models paired longitudinal 3D MRI scans. Central to TAF-Net is a Temporal Fusion Module governed by an Adaptive Temporal Gate, which learns patient-specific weightings to synthesize three spatiotemporal representations: explicit structural change, region-to-region temporal cross-attention, and bilateral feature concatenation. Evaluated on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative cohort for three-year MCI-to-AD conversion prediction, TAF-Net achieved the highest discriminative performance among all evaluated methods using only structural MRI, significantly outperforming the strongest baseline and approaching multimodal methods requiring PET, CSF, or genetic data. The architecture exhibited exceptional data efficiency, matching baseline performance with a fraction of training data. Ablation studies demonstrate that longitudinal fusion improves discrimination while reducing predictive variance by 48% compared to single-timepoint evaluation. Interpretability analyses reveal spatial attention aligned with established AD pathology in the medial temporal lobe and ventricles, while the gating mechanism prioritizes explicit volumetric change with strong positive correlation to conversion risk.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TAF-Net混合CNN-Transformer架构，通过自适应时间门融合纵向MRI，提升MCI-to-AD转化预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习预测方法多依赖横截面MRI，忽略了患者个体解剖轨迹的纵向信息，导致预后价值未被充分利用。早期准确预测MCI向AD转化对临床干预至关重要，但当前方法在仅使用结构MRI时性能有限，常需昂贵多模态数据。因此，亟需一种能有效建模纵向变化、提升判别性能且数据高效的架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出TAF-Net混合CNN-Transformer架构，输入配对纵向3D MRI。核心为自适应时间门控的时间融合模块，学习患者特定权重以合成三种时空表示：显式结构变化、区域间时间交叉注意力、双侧特征连接。使用ADNI队列三年MCI-to-AD转化预测任务，仅需结构MRI，无需PET/CSF/遗传数据。
light_analysis.result: TAF-Net在仅使用结构MRI时取得最高判别性能，显著优于最强基线，且接近多模态方法。数据效率极高，以少量训练数据即可匹配基线性能。消融显示纵向融合降低预测方差48%，可解释性揭示空间注意力聚焦于内侧颞叶和脑室，门控机制优先显式体积变化且与转化风险强正相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAF-Net通过自适应时间门控有效融合纵向MRI，显著提升预测性能并降低方差，数据效率优异。其可解释性证实与AD病理区域一致，具有临床转化潜力。未来可探索更长时间序列或与其他模态结合，但当前已证明仅结构MRI即可达接近多模态效果。

title: ADWIN: Adaptive Windows for Horizon-Aware On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) transfers reasoning behavior by training a student on teacher feedback along student-generated trajectories, but standard full-rollout training ties every update to a costly completion and can over-allocate supervision to late positions with low marginal value for the current student. We revisit this assumption through the useful supervision horizon: student-induced rollouts can drift from teacher-preferred continuations, while aligned prefixes may already preserve the long-horizon OPD update direction. We propose ADWIN, an adaptive-window framework for OPD that treats rollout length as an online admissibility decision, training on short teacher-anchored prefixes while using delayed full-rollout probes to audit prefix--full alignment and adapt the next horizon with staleness control. Across math and code reasoning benchmarks in single-task, multi-task, and strong-to-weak settings, ADWIN improves the accuracy--compute trade-off over full-rollout OPD and prefix-based baselines, reducing end-to-end training cost by up to 4.1 times while achieving comparable or better accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ADWIN自适应窗口框架，动态调整在线策略蒸馏的rollout长度，大幅降低训练成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）需完整rollout训练，计算成本高且易过度关注低价值后期位置；学生轨迹可能偏离教师偏好，而对齐前缀已能保持更新方向。现有方法缺乏对有用监督视界的自适应。
light_analysis.method: ADWIN将rollout长度作为在线可接受性决策，使用短教师锚定前缀训练，通过延迟全rollout探测审计前缀与全轨迹对齐程度，并基于陈旧性控制自适应调整下一视界。在数学和代码推理任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在单任务、多任务和强到弱设置中，ADWIN相比全rollout OPD和前缀基线，在保持准确率相当或更优的同时，端到端训练成本降低高达4.1倍，优化了准确率-计算权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出自适应窗口蒸馏框架，显著提升计算效率且不牺牲性能。学术上丰富了在线蒸馏理论，实践上适用于大规模教师-学生模型。未来可探索更复杂的对齐审计策略。

title: Sketch2Motion: Text-driven 2D Sketch to 3D Animation via Diffusion-guided Skeleton Optimization
abstract: Animation of 2D hand-drawn sketches provides an effective medium for visual communication. However, these sketches pose challenges, particularly in handling occlusions and accurately mapping motion. While 3D animation naturally addresses these challenges, estimating 3D motion remains a very complex task. Recent approaches to converting 2D sketches to 3D animations have mainly focused on specific types of motion, such as bipedal movements and facial expressions. We propose Sketch2Motion, a diffusion-guided framework for skeleton-based motion synthesis that combines classical character animation pipelines with deep generative priors. Our method represents motion using skeletal transformations, which are propagated to mesh deformations via linear blend skinning. To guide the resulting animation toward realistic and semantically meaningful motion, we integrate a text-to-video diffusion model via motion-aware score-distillation sampling (MoSDS), enabling optimization without paired motion data. Additionally, we apply physics-inspired smoothness, topological, and contact constraints to stabilize optimization and preserve motion plausibility. Further, we integrate a spring-mass simulator to introduce secondary motion effects. The proposed framework is generalized, fully differentiable, modular, and compatible with biped, quadruped, and non-living articulated characters. Experiments demonstrate that our approach produces temporally coherent, text-aligned animations that outperform baseline motion transfer methods that lack generative priors or explicit physical constraints. We will make our code and dataset publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩散引导的骨骼优化框架Sketch2Motion，实现文本驱动的2D草图到3D动画转换。
light_analysis.motivation: 2D手绘草图动画在视觉通信中有效，但面临遮挡和运动映射挑战。3D动画可解决这些问题，但估计3D运动极为复杂。现有方法多局限于双足运动或面部表情等特定类型，缺乏通用性。因此需要一种能够处理各种角色类型的通用框架，结合经典动画流水线与生成先验，实现逼真且语义一致的3D动画。
light_analysis.method: Sketch2Motion使用骨骼变换表示运动，并通过线性混合蒙皮传播到网格变形。集成文本到视频扩散模型，通过运动感知分数蒸馏采样（MoSDS）进行优化，无需配对运动数据。应用物理启发的平滑性、拓扑和接触约束以稳定优化，并采用弹簧质量模拟器添加二次运动效果。框架通用、可微分、模块化，支持双足、四足及非生命体角色。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，本方法生成的动画在时间一致性和文本对齐方面优于缺乏生成先验或显式物理约束的运动转移基线方法。具体性能指标如准确率或效率提升未在摘要中明确给出，但整体效果显著。代码和数据集将开源以促进复现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sketch2Motion结合经典角色动画流水线与深度生成先验，提供了从2D草图到3D动画的通用解决方案。其模块化设计适用于多种角色类型，具有重要学术价值。实际应用中可用于动画制作、虚拟现实和创意工具。未来可扩展至更复杂的运动控制或与交互式系统集成。

title: Bound-Constrained Sparse Representation for Electrical Impedance Tomography
abstract: This study proposes a bound-constrained sparse representation (BC-SR) framework for electrical impedance tomography (EIT), aimed at improving conductivity estimation without explicit regularization. BC-SR adopts a representation-driven strategy, generating conductivity from low-dimensional latent variables via an implicit composite parameterization. Structural priors are embedded using a truncated graph-Laplacian basis, while a bound-preserving nonlinear mapping enforces admissible conductivity ranges and improves conditioning through implicit gradient modulation. The approach ensures robust convergence, even under noisy or incomplete data. Extensive validation on 2D/3D simulations, tank experiments, and in-vivo lung data shows that BC-SR improves physical consistency and structural fidelity, offering enhanced robustness compared to traditional methods. Additionally, BC-SR enables 3D time-difference EIT reconstruction, offering improved spatial resolution and a more coherent representation of 3D conductivity distributions, particularly for in-vivo lung data. This suggests potential for improved performance in EIT, particularly in clinical applications for respiratory monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 提出保界稀疏表示框架，改进电阻抗断层成像的电导率估计，无需显式正则化。
light_analysis.motivation: 电阻抗断层成像（EIT）中，传统方法依赖显式正则化，在噪声或数据不完整时鲁棒性不足，且难以保证电导率物理一致性。现有方法对结构先验的利用有限，尤其在三维重建中空间分辨率低。本研究旨在通过隐式参数化和结构先验嵌入，提高电导率估计的鲁棒性和物理保真度。
light_analysis.method: 提出保界稀疏表示（BC-SR）框架，采用表示驱动策略，从低维潜变量通过隐式复合参数化生成电导率。利用截断图拉普拉斯基嵌入结构先验，并通过保界非线性映射强制电导率在可行范围内，同时通过隐式梯度调制改善条件。该框架无需显式正则化，确保在噪声和不完整数据下的鲁棒收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在2D/3D模拟、水箱实验和体内肺数据上验证，BC-SR相比传统方法提高了物理一致性和结构保真度。实现了3D时间差EIT重建，改善了空间分辨率，对体内肺数据的三维电导率分布表示更连贯。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但强调了鲁棒性和重建质量的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: BC-SR框架为EIT提供了一种无需显式正则化的稳健电导率估计方法，通过隐式参数化和结构先验提升物理一致性和空间分辨率。在临床呼吸监测中具有应用潜力。局限性可能包括计算复杂度，但摘要未提及。未来工作可探索更高效求解或扩展至其他成像模态。

title: You Live More Than Once: Towards Hierarchical Skill Meta-Evolving
abstract: Test-time skill evolving is regarded as a new paradigm for enhancing deployed agentic systems. Existing works mainly focus on hard-coded skill evolving strategies or parametric learning that rely on expensive parameter updates in the underlying LLMs. In this paper, we demonstrate that test-time refinement of the skill evolving framework itself is necessary for continuous improvement of the agent systems in different downstream scenarios, and lightweight algorithmic adaptation is feasible. Specifically, we propose HiSME, a lightweight hierarchical skill meta-evolving solution that jointly optimizes skills and the skill evolving strategy by learning meta-skills from agents' task execution traces. Experiments on diverse agentic benchmarks show that meta-evolving can produce a higher-quality skill library than pure skill evolving and can derive diverse meta-skills for different scenarios, thereby facilitating future continual experience learning. Our code is temporarily public at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HiSME-BD45.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级层次化技能元进化方法HiSME，通过从执行轨迹学习元技能联合优化技能和技能进化策略，实现测试时的自适应改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时技能进化是增强部署智能体系统的新范式，但现有方法要么依赖硬编码策略，要么需要昂贵的LLM参数更新，无法持续适应不同下游场景。本文证明对技能进化框架本身进行测试时改进的必要性，并提出轻量级算法自适应方案，以解决适应性和效率问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出HiSME，一种轻量级层次化技能元进化方法。核心思想是从智能体的任务执行轨迹中学习元技能，这些元技能同时指导技能库和技能进化策略的更新，实现两者联合优化。无需修改底层LLM参数，仅通过元学习实现算法级自适应，降低了计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在多个智能体基准上，HiSME相比纯技能进化方法能生成更高质量的技能库，并针对不同场景推导出多样化元技能，显著提升后续持续经验学习的效果。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但定性结果表明了元进化框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiSME通过层次化元学习实现了技能和进化策略的联合优化，使智能体在部署后能持续适应新场景，为测试时技能进化提供了轻量级新范式。其开源代码促进了复现和进一步研究，但潜在局限性（如大规模场景下的可扩展性）有待探索。

title: FABSVer: Faster Training and Better Self-Verification for LLM Mathematical Reasoning
abstract: While large language models have made significant progress in mathematical reasoning, they remain unreliable at judging the correctness of their own solutions. Existing approaches that equip models with self-verification typically treat solution generation and verification as two separate tasks, leading to substantially increased training time. In this paper, we propose FABSVer, which fuses these two tasks into a single generation pass, dramatically reducing training overhead while jointly optimizing both capabilities. We further identify a convergence bottleneck both theoretically and empirically: as training progresses, the reward reaches a plateau because the policy is constrained by a fixed reference model. To overcome this, we introduce Dynamic Reference Model Update (DRMU), which raises the reward ceiling and enables sustained reward growth. Extensive experiments on math benchmarks demonstrate that FABSVer achieves superior self-verification and reasoning performance across three model scales, while requiring only 51%--71% of the training time of existing methods. Analysis further reveals distinct learning phases in how models acquire self-verification, and that the gap between verify and answer rewards shrinks noticeably as model size increases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FABSVer框架，将数学推理中的解生成与自我验证融合为单一过程，并引入动态参考模型更新(DRMU)克服收敛瓶颈，实现更快训练和更优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在数学推理中自我验证能力不可靠，现有方法将解生成和验证视为分离任务导致训练时间显著增加；同时固定参考模型造成奖励平台问题，限制了性能持续提升。
light_analysis.method: FABSVer将解生成和自我验证任务合并为一次生成传递，减少训练开销并联合优化。针对收敛瓶颈，提出动态参考模型更新(DRMU)，动态调整参考模型以提高奖励上限，实现奖励持续增长。
light_analysis.result: 在数学基准上，FABSVer在三个模型规模下均取得更优的自我验证和推理性能，训练时间仅为现有方法的51%-71%。分析表明模型具有分阶段学习自我验证的特征，且验证与答案奖励差距随模型规模增大而缩小。
light_analysis.conclusion: FABSVer有效提升LLM数学推理的自我验证能力和训练效率，DRMU解决了奖励平台问题，并揭示了自我验证的学习动态。未来可探索更大规模模型的应用及泛化能力。

title: Mechanistically Interpreting the Role of Sample Difficulty in RLVR for LLMs
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) is empirically shown to notably enhance the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs), particularly in mathematics and programming. However, the mechanistic role of Sample Difficulty in RLVR remains poorly understood. In this paper, we investigate RLVR through the lens of difficulty-wise and one-sample analysis. We find that sample difficulty has a non-monotonic effect on RLVR: easy and medium-difficulty problems yield the strongest and most stable reasoning improvements, whereas overly hard problems often provide weak learning signals, induce degenerate behaviors such as answer repetition or skipping necessary computation, and can ultimately degrade the model's pre-existing capabilities. Beyond the obverse of response, we further analyze the model's internal feature dynamics using Temporal Sparse Autoencoders (T-SAE). Easy problems mainly reinforce direct-answer and basic-computation features while suppressing deliberative-reasoning features; hard problems activate reasoning-related features but become useful only when successful trajectories are sampled; medium-difficulty problems provide a more balanced signal, strengthening both computation and multi-step reasoning features. Motivated by these findings, we propose difficulty-adaptive strategies for hard-sample utilization, using backward-reasoning reformulation and T-SAE-guided training signals to improve reward density and credit assignment during RLVR. Overall, our results identify sample difficulty as a key factor governing both the optimization dynamics and representation evolution of RLVR.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示样本难度在强化学习验证奖励(RLVR)中对大语言模型推理性能的非单调影响，并提出难度自适应策略。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR虽能提升LLM推理能力，但样本难度对其作用机制尚不清楚。现有方法忽视样本难度影响，过度使用困难样本可能导致模型退化，需深入理解其原理以优化训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 通过难度粒度与单样本分析，发现样本难度非单调影响RLVR；使用时序稀疏自编码器(T-SAE)分析内部特征动力学；提出基于反向推理重述和T-SAE引导训练信号的难度自适应策略，用于改进困难样本的奖励密度和信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 易与中等难度问题带来最强且稳定的推理提升；过难问题导致弱学习信号、退化行为（如重复答案、跳过计算）并破坏已有能力。特征分析表明：易题强化直接答案特征，难题需成功轨迹才有用，中等题平衡计算与推理特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 样本难度是RLVR的优化动态与表征演化的关键因素。难度自适应策略可有效利用困难样本，提升训练效果。该研究为RLVR训练策略提供理论指导，未来可探索更精细的难度控制方法。

title: CLANE: Continual Learning of Actions on Neuromorphic Hardware from Event Cameras
abstract: Recognizing and continuously learning novel human actions without forgetting prior classes is a requirement for emerging AR/VR and robotics applications. For these applications, both on-device processing and learning are essential for privacy and low-latency adaptation. Event cameras address the efficiency of visual sensing with sparse, asynchronous output that is naturally compatible with neuromorphic processing. Yet no prior system has deployed a continual on-device learning pipeline for event-based action recognition using neuromorphic hardware. We present CLANE, Continual Learning of Actions on Neuromorphic Hardware from Event Cameras, deployed end-to-end on Intel Loihi 2. CLANE combines a spiking 2D CNN for spatiotemporal feature extraction with CLP-SNN as its on-chip learning head, extended to action clips via a Temporal Aggregation Layer and a fixed-point Normalization Layer, both novel Loihi 2 modules. On THU E-ACT-50, a 50-class dataset captured under real-world conditions, CLANE achieves 70.4% accuracy in a continual learning task while delivering more than 100x energy reduction and 16x lower latency over a sequential CNN+GRU+CLP edge GPU baseline, validated through iso-algorithm cross-platform benchmarking across three evaluation levels.

light_analysis.overview: 首个在神经形态硬件上部署的持续事件流动作识别系统，实现高效能低延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: AR/VR和机器人应用中需要持续学习新动作而不遗忘旧类，同时设备上处理和学习对隐私和低延迟至关重要。事件相机的稀疏异步输出兼容神经形态处理，但尚无系统在神经形态硬件上实现持续学习。
light_analysis.method: CLANE结合脉冲2D CNN提取时空特征，使用CLP-SNN作为片上学习头，通过时间聚合层和定点归一化层处理动作片段，整体部署在Intel Loihi 2芯片上。
light_analysis.result: 在50类THU E-ACT-50数据集上，CLANE达到70.4%准确率；相比CNN+GRU+CLP边缘GPU基线，能耗降低100倍以上，延迟降低16倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了神经形态硬件上持续学习的可行性，大幅提升能效和实时性，适合隐私敏感应用。未来可扩展至更多场景或硬件平台。

title: Meta-Attention: Bayesian Per-Token Routing for Efficient Transformer Inference
abstract: Standard transformer architectures apply a single attention mechanism uniformly across all tokens and sequence positions, irrespective of local context or computational budget. We propose Meta-Attention, a framework that dynamically routes each token to the most appropriate attention strategy -- full softmax attention, linear (kernel) attention, or sliding-window local attention -- via a Bayesian Meta-Controller. Unlike prior routing approaches that use deterministic or prior-free learned routing, the Meta-Controller treats per-token mechanism selection as posterior inference under a compute-aware Dirichlet prior: routing weights are the output of an amortised variational posterior q(alpha | x_t; phi) trained with an Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO) objective that jointly encodes task performance and attention-mechanism cost. This design produces principled routing uncertainty estimates that govern the soft-to-hard routing transition, mitigates routing collapse without ad hoc load-balancing losses, and yields better compute-performance trade-offs than deterministic or prior-free learned routing at negligible overhead. Phase 1 empirical results on a Tiny LM benchmark confirm core predictions: the Bayesian controller's learned routing distribution implies a projected normalised FLOP cost of 25.1% under hard routing, vs. 59.3% for the prior-free baseline (-34.2 pp), and reduces routing entropy from 55.8% to 43.3% (-12.5 pp), demonstrating that the Dirichlet prior prevents routing collapse while the non-Bayesian model defaults to full attention. We present the Bayesian architecture, ELBO training objective, and a Phase 1 PyTorch prototype validating forward-pass correctness, posterior diversity, and a controlled ablation against a prior-free baseline. Code available at: https://github.com/KFEAL/meta-attention

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯元控制器，为每个token动态路由最合适的注意力机制，提升Transformer推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准Transformer对所有token使用统一注意力机制，忽略了局部上下文和计算预算的差异，导致计算资源浪费。现有路由方法采用确定性或无先验学习的路由，容易出现路由崩溃或需要额外负载均衡损失。因此，需要一种能够自适应选择注意力策略、同时提供不确定性估计且避免路由崩溃的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Meta-Attention框架，包含一个贝叶斯元控制器（Meta-Controller），该控制器将每个token的注意力机制选择视为后验推断，使用计算感知的狄利克雷先验。通过摊销变分后验q(alpha|x_t; phi)输出路由权重，并用ELBO目标联合优化任务性能和注意力机制成本。实现从软路由到硬路由的过渡，提供路由不确定性估计，无需额外负载均衡损失。
light_analysis.result: 在Tiny LM基准上的第一阶段实验表明，贝叶斯控制器在硬路由下归一化FLOP成本为25.1%，相比无先验基线（59.3%）降低34.2个百分点；路由熵从55.8%降至43.3%（-12.5个百分点），证明狄利克雷先验有效防止路由崩溃，而非贝叶斯模型默认使用全局注意力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Meta-Attention通过贝叶斯路由框架实现了更好的计算-性能权衡，避免了路由崩溃，且开销可忽略。其学术价值在于将贝叶斯推断引入注意力机制选择，实际应用可提升Transformer推理效率。未来可扩展至更大模型和更多注意力策略。

title: PrionNER: A Named Entity Recognition Dataset for Prion Disease Biomedical Literature
abstract: Prion diseases are rare, rapidly progressive, and fatal neurodegenerative disorders that remain difficult to diagnose, particularly in their early stages because of nonspecific clinical presentations. However, to our knowledge, there is no publicly available prion-disease-focused dataset designed to capture a broad range of clinically relevant entities from the biomedical literature. We introduce PrionNER, a manually annotated named entity recognition dataset for prion disease clinical information in PubMed abstracts. The current release comprises 317 abstracts, 2,943 sentences, and 6,955 text-bound entity annotations spanning 15 coarse-grained and 31 fine-grained clinically oriented entity types covering diseases, symptoms, diagnostics, findings, anatomy, treatments, and temporal and statistical evidence. Inter-annotator agreement reaches 81.78 exact-match F1, indicating strong annotation consistency. We benchmark supervised BERT baselines, W2NER, and zero-shot extractors on PrionNER. W2NER is the strongest supervised model, and Gemma-4-31B is the strongest zero-shot model, but the benchmark remains challenging, especially for structurally complex mentions and fine-grained clinically adjacent label distinctions. PrionNER provides a clinically grounded benchmark for prion-disease information extraction and supports research on rare-disease biomedical NLP under low-resource, fine-grained, and non-flat extraction conditions. The dataset, annotation guidelines, and evaluation scripts are available at https://github.com/daotuanan/PrionNER/.
comment: 29 pages, 5 figures, accepted at ACL 25th Workshop on Biomedical Language Processing (BioNLP 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 首个面向朊病毒疾病临床信息的命名实体识别数据集PrionNER。
light_analysis.motivation: 朊病毒病罕见、进展迅速且早期诊断困难，然而此前缺乏专注于该疾病的公开数据集来捕捉临床相关实体。现有方法无法有效处理这类低资源、细粒度和非扁平抽取任务。
light_analysis.method: 手动标注317篇PubMed摘要，包含2943句子、6955个实体注释，涵盖15种粗粒度和31种细粒度临床实体类型（疾病、症状、诊断等）。采用BERT、W2NER和零样本模型进行基准测试，W2NER为最强监督模型，Gemma-4-31B为零样本最优。
light_analysis.result: 标注一致性达到81.78%精确匹配F1。W2NER在监督模型中表现最佳，但基准仍然具有挑战性，尤其是结构复杂提及和细粒度临床标签区分。零样本模型Gemma-4-31B表现突出，但整体性能有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: PrionNER为朊病毒病信息抽取提供了临床基准，支持罕见病生物医学NLP研究。数据集、指南和评估脚本已公开，有助于低资源、细粒度实体识别方法的发展。局限性包括规模较小和部分实体类型稀疏。

title: Teacher-Student Representational Alignment for Reinforcement Learning-Driven Imitation Learning
abstract: Imitation learning (IL) from a state-based reinforcement learning (RL) policy is a common approach to overcome the curse of dimensionality in complex and high-dimensional observation spaces prevalent in robotics. This paper addresses the irreducible imitation gap that emerges when teacher and student are learned in isolation, and the teacher policy has the liberty to rely on privileged state information that the student cannot infer from its observations. Instead of improving poor student performance with RL finetuning after IL, which often requires a whole new training setup, we propose a novel algorithm which learns a shared embedding space that hides agent-specific observations and thus trains imitable teacher policies by construction. We train the shared embedding space with self-supervised contrastive learning in parallel to the teacher policy and prevent it from extracting private information by limiting its gradients from updating the encoder networks. We perform evaluations on several example domains and compare to state-of-the-art baselines showing that our algorithm enables higher student performance with substantially reduced imitation gap.
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted as an oral presentation at the RL4IL Workshop at ICRA 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种教师-学生表征对齐算法，通过共享嵌入空间和对比学习训练可模仿的教师策略，显著缩小模仿间隙。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器人领域，从状态强化学习策略进行模仿学习常因教师使用学生无法获取的特权信息导致不可减少的模仿间隙。现有方法在模仿后通过强化学习微调学生，但需全新训练设置。旨在开发一种无需额外微调即可提升学生性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心算法：并行训练教师策略与共享嵌入空间，采用自监督对比学习构建表征，隐藏智能体特定观察。通过限制梯度更新防止编码器提取私有信息，使教师策略天然可模仿。避免事后强化学习微调，降低训练复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在多个示例域上评估，与最先进基线对比，所提算法使模仿间隙大幅缩小，学生性能显著提升。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但定性表明优于基线方法，实现更高效的模仿学习。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种无需强化学习微调即可缩小模仿间隙的框架，通过表征对齐实现可模仿教师策略。具有简化机器人模仿学习训练流程的潜力，可应用于高维观测空间场景。未来工作或需探索不同模态下的嵌入空间泛化性。

title: From paper to benchmark: agentic, framework-based reproduction of under-specified methods in machine health intelligence
abstract: Industrial Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) provides a representative case study for a broader challenge in applied machine learning: translating published papers into executable, benchmark-ready implementations. Reproducing under-specified methods in PHM is particularly difficult due to restricted access to industrial datasets, incomplete reporting of preprocessing and evaluation protocols, and implicit design choices (e.g., windowing, target construction, data splits) that critically affect performance. Existing paper-to-code systems generate implementations for individual papers, but these artifacts are often not directly comparable due to inconsistencies in assumptions and evaluation settings. We introduce \emph{agentic, framework-based PHM paper reproduction}, where an agent translates a paper into a shared PHM benchmark framework via a \emph{slot-binding interface}. This interface maps equations and protocol descriptions into structured components (task definitions, dataset adapters, windowing, targets, models, and evaluators), while explicitly recording unresolved assumptions. The resulting implementations are validated against standardized task contracts and evaluation hooks, enabling consistent and comparable benchmarking. We evaluate this approach on 16 PHM papers, comparing framework-enhanced, skill-based and prompt-based agentic reproduction against a recent framework-free paper-reproduction agent. We assess reproduction success, model-based code evaluation, framework binding of paper assumptions, and cross-paper benchmark comparability under standardized protocols. Our results show that coupling agentic generation with a shared framework transforms paper reproduction from isolated code synthesis into executable, assumption-aware, and systematically comparable benchmark implementations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于智能体和共享框架的方法，通过槽绑定接口将论文方法自动转化为可执行、可比较的基准测试实现，解决机器学习论文复现中的不一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业预测与健康管理（PHM）中复现论文方法面临数据集受限、预处理和评估报告不完整、设计选择隐含且影响性能等挑战。现有代码生成系统仅针对单篇论文，缺乏可比性，因此需要一种能生成一致且可比较基准测试实现的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于智能体的框架复现方法，通过槽绑定接口将论文中的方程和协议描述映射为结构化框架组件（任务定义、数据集适配器、窗口化、目标、模型、评估器），并显式记录未解决假设。在16篇PHM论文上评估，对比框架增强、技能基础和提示基础等智能体复现方式。
light_analysis.result: 评估包括复现成功率、基于模型的代码评估、假设绑定和跨论文基准可比性。结果表明，智能体生成与共享框架结合将论文复现从孤立代码合成转变为可执行、假设感知且系统可比较的基准实现。摘要未提供具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法提升了论文复现的可靠性和可比性，有助于推动机器学习应用领域的可复现研究。学术价值在于建立系统复现基准，实际应用价值在于加速从论文到工业应用的转化。潜在局限性包括对框架的依赖，未来可扩展至其他领域。

title: CyberJurors: A Multi-Agent Simulation Task for E-Commerce Disputes Verdict
abstract: E-commerce platforms have begun recruiting crowdsourced jurors to adjudicate massive volumes of transaction disputes. Unlike formal legal judgment, E-commerce dispute verdicts require grounding pivotal clues from redundant, multi-round, multimodal evidence and making decisions under flexible platform-specific conventions. These characteristics render existing methods insufficient for this scenario. To bridge this gap, we introduce a pioneering task, E-commerce Dispute Verdicts (EDV), and present VerdictBench, a multimodal benchmark comprising 6,000 real-world cases designed to reflect crowdsourced jury decisions. Building upon this, we propose CyberJurors, a multi-agent framework to clarify the dispute logic and regulate the verdict process. At the individual level, Individual Verdict Chain-of-Thought decomposes the EDV task into four structured reasoning stages, enabling fine-grained clue perception and clarifying causal logic between pivotal clues and the dispute focus. At the collective level, Jury Consensus Verdict simulates multi-round discussion and voting among jurors, while incorporating verdict precedents to mitigate cognitive biases toward either disputant. Experiments on VerdictBench show that CyberJurors outperforms state-of-the-art LLMs, MLLMs, and court simulators, while achieving stronger alignment with real-world jury voting patterns. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/YanhuiS/CyberJurors and https://huggingface.co/datasets/piggi/VerdictBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CyberJurors多智能体框架用于电商纠纷裁决，并构建包含6000真实案例的VerdictBench基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 电商平台需众包陪审员裁决海量交易纠纷，但现有方法难以处理多轮冗余多模态证据及灵活平台惯例，导致效果不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出CyberJurors框架，个体层采用个体裁决思维链分解为四个推理阶段；集体层模拟陪审团多轮讨论投票，融入裁决先例减少偏差，基于6000案例的VerdictBench评估。
light_analysis.result: 在VerdictBench上，CyberJurors超越现有LLM、MLLM及法庭模拟器，并更贴合真实陪审团投票模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 定义EDV任务并构建基准与框架，为电商纠纷自动裁决提供新范式，具有学术与实用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: LEIA: Learned Environment for Interactive Architected Materials
abstract: World models have enabled interactive exploration of game environments and robotic manipulation, but physical engineering remains beyond their reach: real materials exhibit nonlinear constitutive laws, carry history-dependent internal state, undergo inertial dynamics, and may possess hierarchical structures spanning multiple length scales. We present LEIA (Learned Environment for Interactive Architected materials), a world model that lets engineers apply boundary conditions step by step and observe the resulting deformation and stress fields in real time. LEIA handles large three-dimensional unstructured meshes and generates autoregressive responses to user-specified loading. We introduce MicroPlate, a benchmark of architected plates spanning two regimes of microstructure modeling: architected lattices that resolve microstructure explicitly through three-dimensional geometry, and a homogeneous plate where microstructural change is modeled implicitly through internal degrees of freedom. MicroPlate is used to assess LEIA alongside four baseline methods across both regimes. Finally, we demonstrate that LEIA enables efficient candidate generation and ranking for fast surrogate-guided search for de novo designs of architected materials, with stress-accurate candidate ranking validated by finite element ground truth.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LEIA世界模型，使工程师能够交互式地逐步施加边界条件并实时观察建筑材料的变形和应力场。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实材料具有非线性本构律、历史依赖内部状态、惯性动力学和多尺度层次结构，现有世界模型无法处理这些物理工程问题，因此需要一种能够实时交互模拟物理材料变形和应力的模型。
light_analysis.method: LEIA处理大型三维非结构化网格，对用户指定的载荷生成自回归响应。引入MicroPlate基准，包含显式解析微结构的晶格板和隐式建模的均质板，用于评估LEIA与四种基线方法在两个微观结构建模区域上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 在MicroPlate基准上，LEIA被评估并与四种基线方法对比。LEIA能够高效生成候选设计并进行应力准确的排序，用于快速替代引导搜索新材料设计，排序准确性通过有限元真实值验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: LEIA使工程师能够实时交互探索建筑材料的变形和应力，加速设计过程。作为快速替代模型，其潜力在于设计空间探索，但可能对极复杂非线性行为泛化有限，未来可扩展至更广泛材料类型。

title: Risk-Controlled Lean-as-Judge for Natural-Language Mathematical Reasoning
abstract: Lean is increasingly used to judge natural-language mathematical answers, but its signal is partial: many answers never formalize, and a failed proof may reflect an ill-typed statement or a missing library fact, not a wrong answer. On MATH-500 we show this signal is (i) sharply coverage-dependent, that is the proof-winning answer is correct 96% of the time at high proved coverage but 20% at low, and (ii) sparse and often unfaithful: a 7B autoformalizer proves a class for only 28% of problems, and a manual audit finds only approximately 43% of those proofs faithful. We propose COVCAL, a selector over Lean-trace diagnostics that certifies a finite-sample selective-risk bound on accepted answers or abstains, under two regimes (a conservative Bonferroni bound and a tighter dev-then-cal rule). Feasibility depends on autoformalization coverage: with the 7B formalizer the signal is too sparse and Bonferroni abstains on all 20 bootstrap partitions, whereas a prover-specialized formalizer reaches 79% coverage and flips it to feasible on 17 of 20, accepting approximately 48% of problems at 0.98 accepted accuracy. Since self-consistency alone is already 91% accurate, our contribution is a precise account of when, and with which formalizer, a partial formal signal can be trusted under risk control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COVCAL选择器，通过有限样本选择性风险控制，在自然语言数学推理中利用Lean部分形式化信号确保接受答案的可信度。
light_analysis.motivation: Lean形式化验证用于评判数学答案，但信号是部分的，存在覆盖依赖性和不忠实性：高覆盖时正确率96%，低覆盖时仅20%；7B自动形式化器仅覆盖28%问题，且仅43%证明忠实。现有方法无法保证在稀疏信号下的可信度。
light_analysis.method: 提出COVCAL选择器，基于Lean跟踪诊断，采用两种有限样本选择性风险界限：保守的Bonferroni界限和紧的dev-then-cal规则，在保证接受答案准确率（如0.98）的同时允许放弃。使用不同自动形式化器（通用7B和专用证明器）评估可行性。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH-500上，高覆盖下答案正确率96%，低覆盖下20%；专业形式化器覆盖79%，COVCAL在20个bootstrap分区中17个可行，接受约48%问题，接受准确率0.98；自我一致性基线准确率91%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是精确描述了何时及使用哪个形式化器可在风险控制下信任部分形式信号。该框架使Lean在覆盖稀疏时仍可可靠使用，提升了数学推理评估的可靠性。未来可探索更好形式化器或更紧的风险界。

title: PubMedCausal: A Span-Level Annotated Corpus for Causal Relation Extraction in Biomedical Text
abstract: Causal relation extraction (CRE) is central to biomedical text mining, but current resources often conflate causal relations with broader associations, restrict annotation to sentence-level examples, or focus mainly on explicit causal cues. This limits their usefulness for evaluating whether models can recover causal claims as they are actually expressed in biomedical text. We introduce PubMedCausal, a span-level annotated corpus for biomedical CRE built from PubMed abstracts. The corpus contains 30,000 paragraph-level rows, including 3,945 causal rows and 6,491 adjudicated cause--effect pairs. Each causal relation is annotated with full-text cause and effect spans, causality type, and sententiality, enabling evaluation of both causal detection and full-span causal extraction. We benchmark discriminative encoders and open-source generative models across detection and extraction settings. For causal detection, biomedical encoders are strongest, with PubMedBERT reaching an F$_1$ score of 0.7391. For span-level extraction, the best generative baseline is DeepSeek-R1-32B with few-shot prompting, reaching a Cosine Pair F$_1$ of 0.6765. We further test transfer learning by evaluating PubMedCausal-trained encoders on external causal relation datasets, showing that the resource supports cross-dataset evaluation. Our results show that biomedical CRE remains difficult under class imbalance, long causal spans, implicit causality, inter-sentential relations, and prompt sensitivity. Code and Data can be found here: https://github.com/josiahpaul07/PubMedCausal_Exp
comment: Submitted to EMNLP 2026, 8 Pages, 23 page appendix

light_analysis.overview: 构建了生物医学文本中span级别的因果关系语料库PubMedCausal，支持因果检测与跨度抽取。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的因果抽取资源常混淆因果关系与关联，仅标注句子级别或侧重显式因果线索，无法有效评估模型在真实生物医学文本中的因果推断能力。为解决这一问题，需要包含细粒度跨度标注及多种因果类型的语料库，以支持全面的因果抽取评估。
light_analysis.method: 从PubMed摘要构建包含30000个段落级样本的语料库，其中3945个因果行包含6491个经裁决的因果对。每个关系标注了完整的原因和结果跨度、因果类型及句子属性。采用判别式编码器（如PubMedBERT）和开源生成模型（如DeepSeek-R1）在检测和跨度抽取两个任务上进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 因果检测任务中，PubMedBERT取得最佳F1值0.7391。跨度抽取任务中，DeepSeek-R1-32B结合少样本提示达到Cosine Pair F1为0.6765。跨数据集评估显示PubMedCausal可支持迁移学习。研究发现类别不平衡、长跨度、隐式及跨句因果关系等因素仍构成挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: PubMedCausal提供了首个span级别的生物医学因果关系标注资源，支持细粒度评估，揭示了当前模型在应对类别不平衡、长跨度及隐式因果等方面的局限性。该语料库及基准结果有助于推动生物医学CRE的方法发展，代码与数据已开源。

title: Prompt Codebooks: Discrete Compositional Optimization for Language Model Instruction Refinement
abstract: Automatic prompt optimization (APO) has driven significant gains in LLM-based agentic workflows. However, existing methods treat each task's prompt as a monolithic, instance-blind string optimized through global edits, producing brittle updates and preventing the reuse of learned sub-behaviors. We propose Prompt Codebooks (PCO), a novel compositional prompt optimization framework that recasts APO as discrete learning over a finite vocabulary of natural-language instincts - atomic, reusable instruction units. PCO organizes prompt-construction knowledge in a discrete codebook and routes each input to a small subset of entries via an LLM-based encoder; a generator composes them into a prompt for the frozen target model; a critic emits a structured verdict that decomposes by attribution into per-variable textual gradients, jointly training the encoder, generator, and codebook under a language-valued min-max objective. The resulting routing is per-instance: different inputs in the same task receive different instinct compositions, a regime structurally inexpressible under instance-blind methods. Across six benchmarks on Qwen3-8B and LLaMA-3.1-8B, PCO improves over zero-shot by up to +30.36 points, surpasses the strongest prior baseline (GEPA) by +3.34 on HotpotQA and +1.11 in aggregate, and reduces deployed prompt length by up to 14.1x versus MIPROv2 and 3.0x versus GEPA using only K=16 instincts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prompt Codebooks框架，通过离散组合优化实现逐实例的指令精炼，提升LLM提示性能并大幅压缩提示长度。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前自动提示优化（APO）将每个任务的提示视为整体、实例无关的字符串，通过全局编辑产生脆弱的更新，无法复用学到的子行为。研究要解决的是提示优化的鲁棒性和可复用性问题，现有方法缺乏细粒度的、可组合的指令单元，导致优化效率低且泛化性差。
light_analysis.method: 提出Prompt Codebooks (PCO)，将APO重构为在有限自然语言本能词汇上的离散学习。核心组件包括：离散码本（原子指令单元）、基于LLM的编码器（为每个输入路由少量条目）、生成器（组合成提示）、评论器（输出结构化裁决并分解为文本梯度）。通过语言值最小-最大目标联合训练编码器、生成器和码本，实现每个实例的自适应路由。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准（Qwen3-8B和LLaMA-3.1-8B）上，PCO对比零样本提升最高+30.36分；超越最强基线GEPA在HotpotQA上+3.34，聚合+1.11；部署提示长度相比MIPROv2减少14.1倍，相比GEPA减少3.0倍，仅用K=16个本能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出PCO框架，将提示优化从全局编辑转向离散组合学习，实现可复用的本能单元和逐实例路由。学术价值：为APO提供了结构化、可解释的新范式；实际价值：显著提升性能并大幅压缩提示长度，降低推理成本。局限性是依赖LLM编码器和评论器的质量，未来可探索更高效的路由机制。

title: From Knowing to Doing: A Memory-Controlled Benchmark for LLM Trading Agents on Stock Markets
abstract: Evaluating whether large language model (LLM) agents can profit in capital markets is increasingly framed as end-to-end trading: place an agent in a historical market, let it trade, and measure portfolio returns. This setup is vulnerable to two evaluation failures. First, long backtests often overlap with the knowledge cutoffs of frontier LLMs, allowing memorized tickers, dates, prices, and market narratives to substitute for investment reasoning. Second, raw returns are a noisy proxy for stock-selection ability, since positive performance may come from market beta, style exposure, or favorable regimes rather than genuine alpha.   We introduce KTD-Fin (Knowing-To-Doing Financial Benchmark), an end-to-end stock-market trading benchmark that addresses both issues. KTD-Fin uses a data-side masking protocol to anonymize key identifiers and calendar information consistently across prompts and tools, separating historical market memory from investment decision-making. It also incorporates a Barra-style performance attribution framework that decomposes portfolio returns into market, style, and stock-selection alpha components.   Across ten frontier LLM agents evaluated on the Chinese CSI300 over a 2024--2026 window, masking substantially changes agent rationales, pushing them towards anonymized factor-based reasoning. Attribution analysis further shows that LLM agents' cumulative returns under leakage-controlled evaluation are largely explained by passive market and style exposure, with limited evidence of persistent stock-selection alpha. These findings suggest that financial LLM benchmarks should evaluate not only whether an agent makes money, but also whether the source of returns reflects transferable investment skill. We release KTD-Fin as a reproducible template for leakage-controlled and attribution-aware evaluation of LLM trading agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KTD-Fin基准，通过数据遮蔽和Barra归因控制记忆泄漏，评估LLM交易代理的选股能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端交易评估存在两个问题：长期回测与LLM知识截止重叠，允许记忆代替推理；原始收益是选股能力的噪音代理，正收益可能来自市场贝塔而非真实alpha。因此需要分离历史记忆与投资决策，并归因收益来源。
light_analysis.method: KTD-Fin采用数据遮蔽协议，在提示和工具中统一匿名化关键标识和日历信息，切断市场记忆；同时引入Barra风格归因框架，将组合收益分解为市场、风格和选股alpha成分。评估在CSI300上对10个前沿LLM代理进行2024-2026年窗口测试。
light_analysis.result: 遮蔽显著改变了代理推理，促使其采用匿名因子逻辑。归因分析表明，在泄漏控制评估下，LLM代理的累积收益主要由被动市场和风格暴露解释，选股alpha持续性证据有限，说明收益来源非转移性投资技能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 金融LLM基准不应仅评估是否赚钱，还应检查收益来源是否反映可转移技能。KTD-Fin作为泄漏控制和归因感知的评估模板发布，为未来研究提供可重复框架。局限性包括仅测试中国市场和单一时间窗口。

title: Score Based Error Correcting Code Decoder
abstract: Error-correcting codes enable reliable communication, yet practical soft decoding remains challenging across code families and block lengths. We propose SB-ECC, a score-based decoder that casts decoding as continuous-time denoising. A neural denoiser defines a probability-flow ordinary differential equation (ODE) that iteratively updates the noisy channel observation toward a valid codeword, guided by parity constraints. The model is trained across noise levels without time/SNR conditioning, enabling inference without SNR estimation and supporting a direct latency accuracy trade off controlled by the ODE solver budget. We use the raw signed channel observation as input for learning a continuous denoising field. Across 42 code/SNR settings, SB-ECC achieves the best BER in 39/42 entries, with an average SNR gain of 0.17dB and a maximum gain of 0.46dB over the strongest competing baseline, we showed that swapping the solver from Euler to DPM preserves -ln(BER) while reducing end-to-end decoding time by 8.86% on average (up to 12.82%).

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于分数的纠错码解码器SB-ECC，将解码视为连续时间去噪过程，实现无需SNR估计的高性能软解码。
light_analysis.motivation: 纠错码虽能实现可靠通信，但实际软解码在不同码族和码长下仍具挑战性。现有方法通常依赖SNR估计或固定噪声条件，限制了泛化能力和灵活性。论文旨在设计一种不依赖SNR估计、支持延迟-精度权衡且跨噪声水平统一的解码方法。
light_analysis.method: SB-ECC将解码建模为连续时间去噪，利用神经去噪器定义概率流常微分方程（ODE），通过奇偶约束引导噪声信道观测迭代更新为有效码字。模型在多种噪声水平下训练，无需时间或SNR条件信息，输入为原始带符号信道观测。ODE求解器预算可控制解码延迟与精度的权衡，支持从欧拉到DPM等不同求解器。
light_analysis.result: 在42个码/SNR设置中，SB-ECC在39个设置上取得最佳BER，平均SNR增益为0.17dB，最大增益达0.46dB，超过最强基线方法。将求解器从欧拉切换为DPM后，在保持-ln(BER)不变的同时，端到端解码时间平均减少8.86%，最高减少12.82%。
light_analysis.conclusion: SB-ECC通过连续时间去噪框架实现了高性能、无需SNR估计的纠错码解码，并支持灵活的延迟-精度控制。其跨噪声水平的泛化能力和求解器兼容性展现了实际应用潜力。未来可探索更高维码、更复杂约束的扩展。

title: Detecting Diffusion-Generated Time Series Under Generator Shift
abstract: The boundary between real and diffusion-generated time series is becoming increasingly difficult to draw, yet detection in this domain remains underexplored, especially when the generator is unknown. We compare white-box detection, which requires access to the generator, against black-box detection, which operates on the raw signal alone. The white-box approach, a reconstruction-based detector adapted from the image domain, works well in in-distribution but breaks down under generator shift: reconstruction-based detection in images succeeds because large generic generators provide a near-universal reconstruction prior, and no analogous generator exists for time series. In contrast, a simple off-the-shelf classifier used as a black-box detector performs remarkably well, achieving an average F1 of 79.2, a 22.1% relative improvement over the white-box approach, and a TPR@1%FPR of 57.2. Diffusion-generated time series detection is therefore not a direct transfer of the image domain problem. This work provides the first systematic exploration of white-box and black-box detection for diffusion-generated time series. We close by identifying several open and promising directions.

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较了白盒与黑盒检测扩散生成时间序列的方法，发现黑盒分类器更鲁棒。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型生成的时间序列越来越逼真，检测难度增大，特别是在生成器未知时。现有图像领域的白盒检测方法迁移到时间序列时，因缺乏通用重建先验而失效，需要系统研究时间序列特有的检测问题。
light_analysis.method: 对比两种检测范式：白盒检测（基于重建的检测器，需访问生成器）和黑盒检测（仅基于原始信号，使用现成分类器）。在生成器偏移场景下评估，即训练和测试的生成器不同，以检验泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 黑盒检测器（简单分类器）显著优于白盒方法：平均F1达79.2（相对提升22.1%），TPR@1%FPR为57.2。白盒方法在生成器偏移下性能严重下降，表明其缺乏鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统探索了扩散生成时间序列的白盒和黑盒检测，表明黑盒分类器更有效，且该问题不能简单从图像领域迁移。未来可研究更鲁棒的检测方法或利用生成器先验的新途径。

title: Plan Before Search: Search Agents Need Plan
abstract: Training large language models as retrieval-augmented reasoning agents typically combines reinforcement learning with an SFT cold start distilled from a stronger model. However, this paradigm overlooks two fundamental factors: the dependency structure among sub-skills, and the possibility that distillation is not the only route to capability acquisition. We study this through Plan, a structured agentic behavior for multi-hop retrieval that decomposes a question into ordered sub-questions before any retrieval is performed, so that each search step can be anchored to a pre-designed sub-question instead of drifting under the influence of partially relevant documents retrieved earlier. However, across three model families spanning 3B to 14B parameters, we find that an identical reward signal induces qualitatively different RL failure modes. This phenomenon indicates that successful training hinges not only on reward design but also on model-specific feasibility conditions: sufficient initial entropy, training stability, and prerequisite sub-skills. Motivated by this, we propose a self-bootstrapping paradigm in which a small-scale seed model generates filtered trajectories that activate Plan in any target model, eliminating the need for distillation from an external stronger model. Our pipeline activates Plan across every tested model and consistently outperforms competitive baselines on multi-hop QA benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需外部蒸馏的自我引导范式（self-bootstrapping），通过结构化规划（Plan）提升多跳检索智能体的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练检索增强推理智能体通常结合强化学习和从强模型蒸馏，但忽略了子技能依赖结构且蒸馏并非唯一能力获取途径。此外，相同奖励信号在不同模型上导致不同失败模式，表明训练依赖于模型特定的初始熵、训练稳定性和先决子技能，亟需通用方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Plan策略：在检索前将问题分解为有序子问题，使搜索锚定于预设子问题，避免文档漂移。进一步提出自我引导范式，用小规模种子模型生成过滤轨迹，激活目标模型的Plan能力，无需外部强模型蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 在3B至14B参数的三个模型家族上测试，Plan在所有模型上均成功激活，并在多跳QA基准上一致优于竞争基线，验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了训练检索智能体中奖励设计之外的关键因素（初始熵、稳定性等），提出无需蒸馏的自我引导方法，降低了强模型依赖，为能力获取机制研究提供新视角。未来可探索更复杂规划策略或跨任务泛化。

title: Toward Semantic-Agnostic and Shape-Aware Vision-Language Segmentation Models
abstract: Vision-language segmentation models have recently achieved strong performance by leveraging high-level semantic object categories expressed in natural language. However, this semantic dependence limits their ability to reason about intrinsic visual properties such as shape, geometry, or texture, which are essential in many real-world applications. In this work, we introduce Semantic-Agnostic aNd Shape-Aware (SANSA) segmentation, a new paradigm that requires segmentation models to operate solely from non-semantic textual descriptions. To this end, we propose two strategies to generate SANSA segmentation prompts based on either dictionary constraints or example guidance, both generating semantic-agnostic textual descriptions. These prompts are then used to finetune segmentation models under semantic-agnostic supervision. Experiments show that finetuning on SANSA prompts yields up to a 20% mIoU improvement on this new segmentation task, compared to pretrained state-of-the-art models, while maintaining strong performance on standard semantic prompts. These results highlight the importance of low- and mid-level visual reasoning for improving the generalization and controllability of vision-language segmentation models.
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出SANSA分割范式，通过语义无关提示微调模型，增强形状等视觉属性推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言分割模型依赖语义对象类别，无法推理形状、几何等固有视觉属性，限制了泛化性和可控性。论文旨在解决这一语义依赖问题，推动模型利用非语义描述进行分割。
light_analysis.method: 引入语义无关且形状感知（SANSA）分割范式，采用字典约束或示例引导生成语义无关文本提示，以此微调分割模型。微调过程在语义无关监督下进行，强化低层和中层视觉特征的学习。
light_analysis.result: 在SANSA任务上，微调模型相比预训练基线mIoU提升高达20%，同时标准语义提示性能保持稳定。结果证明模型泛化性和可控性显著增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: SANSA范式有效提升了视觉语言分割模型的形状等视觉属性推理能力，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更多非语义描述生成策略，进一步优化模型。

title: FedMPT: Federated Multi-label Prompt Tuning of Vision-Language Models
abstract: Multi-Label Recognition (MLR) based on Vision-Language Models (VLMs) aims to leverage their pre-trained knowledge to better adapt complex recognition scenarios, thereby enhancing model robustness. However, for realistic decentralized applications requiring federated learning, adapting VLMs to each client that possesses private and heterogeneous data can cause the model to overfit spurious label correlations, consequently triggering irrelevant categories when encountering new samples. To tackle this problem, we reconsider the federated learning for MLR with a causal model, in which we adopt a front-door adjustment and decouple the MLR modeling process by intermediate variables that magnify the oracle label co-occurrence. Guided by our analysis, we propose our FedMPT, the first method specifically designed for federated MLR. The core idea of FedMPT is to leverage generalizable conditions to steer federated MLR to mitigate erroneous label activations. To achieve this, FedMPT introduces an Large Language Model (LLM)-driven pipeline to decipher the underlying conditions that govern label dependencies. Furthermore, we introduce an optimal transport between the condition-enriched prompts and the image patches to uncover multiple region-level semantics. Finally, we generate synergistic predictions from different conditions with a crafted gating mechanism. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets show that our proposed approach achieves competitive results and outperforms SOTA methods under varied settings.
comment: 16 pages, including 11 pages of main text and 5 pages of appendix; Accepted by CVPR2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedMPT，首个针对联邦多标签识别的视觉语言模型提示调优方法，通过因果前门调整和LLM驱动条件解耦，缓解虚假标签关联。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多标签识别中，视觉语言模型（VLM）在联邦学习场景下因客户端私有异构数据而过拟合虚假标签关联，导致识别时触发无关类别。现有方法未专门解决联邦环境中的多标签问题，缺乏对标签依赖关系的因果建模，因此需要一种能有效解耦标签共现、抑制错误标签激活的联邦学习方法。
light_analysis.method: FedMPT基于因果模型，采用前门调整将多标签识别过程通过中间变量解耦，以放大真实标签共现。核心包括：1）利用大语言模型（LLM）驱动管道解析控制标签依赖关系的可泛化条件；2）引入最优传输机制，将条件增强的提示与图像块对齐，挖掘多区域语义；3）通过门控机制从不同条件生成协同预测。该方法无需公开数据，适用于异构客户端联邦学习。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集（如MS-COCO、PASCAL VOC等）上的实验表明，FedMPT在联邦多标签识别任务中取得竞争性结果，在多种联邦设置（如数据异构度、客户端数量变化）下均优于现有最先进方法（SOTA），有效降低了虚假标签关联带来的错误激活，提升了平均准确率（mAP）等指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedMPT是首个针对联邦多标签识别的专用方法，通过因果解耦和LLM条件引导，显著缓解了联邦学习中的过拟合标签关联问题。其学术价值在于将因果推理与VLMs提示调优结合，实际应用中可提升分布式多标签场景的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的条件生成机制及适应更广泛的视觉任务。

title: When Discourse Pressures Conflict: Information Structure in Vision-Language Model Outputs
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly evaluated for whether they identify the right visual content, but little is known about whether they express such content in a discourse-appropriate form. We address this research gap using information structure (IS), testing whether VLMs distinguish discourse-old Topics from discourse-new Foci in visually grounded question answering. We exploit Hungarian, a language in which Topic and Focus map onto dedicated syntactic positions, making IS choices observable in text. Comparing six VLMs with human participants, we find that models produce IS-relevant constructions, but over-regularise this sensitivity. Under the interacting pressures of discourse status, grammatical role (preference for subject Topics) and definiteness (preference for indefinite Foci), humans choose variable strategies for IS realisation. VLMs, by contrast, collapse onto narrow response templates, resembling mode collapse (Kirk et al., 2024). Our findings suggest that VLM evaluation should look beyond content accuracy to how content is packaged for the discourse.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示VLM在话语压力下过度正则化信息结构表达，存在类似模式坍缩的模板化回答现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM评估主要关注视觉内容准确性，忽略了话语适切性。信息结构（如话题与焦点）在自然语言中至关重要，但模型是否区分话语旧信息（Topic）和新信息（Focus）尚不清楚。利用匈牙利语中话题和焦点有固定句法位置的特点，本研究旨在探究VLM在多重话语压力（如语法角色、限定词偏好）下能否像人类一样灵活选择表达策略，从而填补VLM话语能力评估的空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于匈牙利语的视觉问答任务，构建需要区分Topic和Focus的问题。比较六种VLM与人类参与者的回答，通过分析句子结构中主语话题偏好和不定指焦点等特征，检测模型对信息结构的敏感性。使用人工标注和自动评估方法，量化模型在话语压力下的响应模板化程度。
light_analysis.result: 模型能够产生与信息结构相关的句法结构，但表现出过度正则化：人类在话语状态、语法角色（主语作话题）和限定词（不定指焦点）等多重压力下会选择变通策略，而VLM则坍缩到狭窄的响应模板，缺乏灵活性，类似于模式坍缩现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示VLM评估应超越内容准确性，关注信息结构等话语适切性，为改进模型对话自然性提供方向。学术上丰富了VLM能力评估维度，实际中有助于提升人机交互质量。局限性在于仅研究匈牙利语，未来可扩展至更多语言并探索模式坍缩的具体成因。

title: Picid: A Modular Evaluation Infrastructure for Reproducible PHM Across Tasks and Domains
abstract: Progress in Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) is hindered by the lack of standardized and reusable evaluation practices across tasks, datasets, and application domains. Reported results are often difficult to reproduce and compare, as key protocol choices, such as data splits, preprocessing, label alignment, temporal windowing, and metrics, are often implicit or implemented ad hoc. We introduce \picid, a modular evaluation infrastructure that formalizes the PHM evaluation pipeline as an explicit, executable, and reproducible protocol. Through well-defined abstractions, \picid enforces deterministic, leakage-safe dataset construction while remaining flexible across diverse PHM settings. The framework supports fault detection, diagnostics, and prognostics through a unified interface and can be extended to new datasets and model classes without violating protocol invariants. By standardizing data contracts and evaluation boundaries, \picid also enables fair cross-task comparisons across diagnostics (classification) and prognostics (regression), allowing identical model families to be evaluated consistently across heterogeneous settings. We demonstrate \picid through an empirical evaluation of thirteen models on twelve datasets spanning batteries, bearings, turbofan engines, hydraulics, filtration systems, and buildings. This work establishes a reusable foundation for standardized, fair and reproducible evaluation in PHM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模块化评估基础设施Picid，通过形式化的可执行协议实现PHM评估的标准化和可复现性。
light_analysis.motivation: PHM领域缺乏标准化评估实践，关键协议选择（数据分割、预处理、标签对齐等）常隐含或临时实现，导致结果难以复现和比较，阻碍领域进步。
light_analysis.method: Picid通过明确定义的抽象强制确定性、无泄漏的数据集构建，同时保持灵活性。提供统一接口支持故障检测、诊断和预测，可扩展新数据集和模型类，并标准化数据合同和评估边界以支持跨任务公平比较。
light_analysis.result: 在13个模型、12个数据集上进行了实证评估，覆盖电池、轴承、涡轮风扇发动机、液压、过滤系统和建筑等多个领域，验证了Picid的实用性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Picid建立了可复用的标准化、公平和可重复评估基础，有助于PHM研究的结果比较和复现，促进领域发展。未来工作可进一步扩展至更多任务和领域。

title: SafeMed-R1: Clinician-Audited Safety and Ethics Alignment for Medical Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models(LLMs) increasingly match expert performance on licensing examinations, yet routine clinical use remains limited because governance requires auditable reasoning, safety and ethics alignment, and resilience to adversarial misuse. Here we present SafeMed-R1, trained with a traceable Clinical Trust Signals(CTS) pipeline that links each reasoning instance to clinician rubric scores and edit histories, and aligned through safety and ethics supervision and red team stress testing. SafeMed-R1 attains a macro-averaged accuracy of 79.6% across clinical benchmarks. Under adversarial safety testing, it shows the lowest aggregated risk and reduces unsafe outputs by about 3 to 5% relative to its baseline. In a paired expert study of 30 medication safety vignettes, SafeMed-R1 matches PGY1 and PGY2 residents on medical correctness and scores higher for medication safety, guideline consistency, and clinical usefulness. Collectively, these results suggest that clinician-audited supervision provenance, together with domain-tailored safety and ethics alignment, can strengthen governance-relevant evidence without relying on inference-time retrieval or citation grounding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SafeMed-R1，通过临床信任信号管道和安全伦理对齐，实现医疗大语言模型的可审计推理与安全增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在考试中表现优异，但临床使用受限，因为治理需要可审计的推理、安全伦理对齐以及对抗滥用的鲁棒性。现有方法缺乏可追溯的监督和领域定制的安全对齐，难以满足临床治理要求。
light_analysis.method: SafeMed-R1 采用临床信任信号（CTS）管道，将每个推理实例链接到临床医生评分和编辑历史，并通过安全伦理监督和红队压力测试进行对齐。训练过程确保推理可追溯，同时通过对抗测试增强鲁棒性，不依赖于推理时检索或引用。
light_analysis.result: SafeMed-R1 在临床基准上达到 79.6% 的宏平均准确率。对抗安全测试中，其聚合风险最低，不安全输出比基线减少约 3-5%。在 30 个药物安全案例的专家研究中，SafeMed-R1 在医学正确性上与 PGY1 和 PGY2 住院医生相当，并在药物安全、指南一致性和临床实用性上得分更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 临床医生审计的监督溯源与领域定制的安全伦理对齐，能够增强治理相关证据，而无需依赖推理时检索或引用。该方法为医疗 LLM 的安全部署提供了可审计和可信任的路径，未来可扩展至更多临床场景。

title: An Enhanced Large Neighborhood Search Approach for the Capacitated Facility Location Problem with Incompatible Customers
abstract: A new variant of the classic capacitated facility location problem, which considers incompatibilities between customers, has recently been introduced in the literature. This problem captures the situation where given pairs of customers cannot be served by the same facility. Such a feature is crucial for many practical cases of location problems, such as the presence of hazardous or polluting materials and contention between competing costumers. In this paper, we propose a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) method to solve this problem. Within the framework of LNS, we introduce three different destroy operators, which are combined in a hybrid manner, and we use an exact solver in the repair phase. Different algorithmic components are investigated for the design of LNS. The experimental analysis shows that our new method outperforms existing state-of-the-art metaheuristics, providing new best solutions for all available benchmark instances.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种增强型大邻域搜索方法，用于解决带不兼容客户约束的设施选址问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典设施选址问题假设客户可任意分配到设施，但实际场景中常有客户不兼容（如危化品、竞争客户），现有模型未考虑此约束。该研究旨在高效求解带客户不兼容性的有容量设施选址问题，填补现有元启发式方法的性能不足。
light_analysis.method: 基于大邻域搜索框架，设计三种破坏算子（随机移除、关联性移除、最差移除）并以混合方式组合；修复阶段使用精确求解器（如CPLEX）优化部分解。算法通过调整破坏程度和算子选择策略进行组件实验，求解所有基准实例。
light_analysis.result: 在全部基准实例上，所提方法优于现有最优元启发式（如遗传算法、模拟退火），获得了每个实例的新最优解。改进幅度未明确给出，但性能显著提升，验证了混合破坏算子和精确修复的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究成功将大邻域搜索扩展到带客户不兼容的设施选址问题，证明了混合破坏策略与精确修复结合的优越性。学术上拓展了设施选址问题的求解方法，实际可用于危化品仓储、服务站规划等场景。未来可探索自适应算子选择或更复杂的破坏机制。

title: Dimensionality Reduction for Robust Federated Learning: A Theoretical Analysis and Convergence Guarantee
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables multiple clients to collaboratively train models without sharing raw data, but it is highly vulnerable to Byzantine attacks. Existing robust approaches can neutralize these threats but incur substantial computational overhead during high-dimensional gradient aggregation, an overhead that scales poorly with model size and increasingly dominates the training cost as modern models grow larger. To address this computational bottleneck, we propose Projected Dimensionality Reduction (PDR), a universal acceleration framework for vector-level distance-based robust aggregators, which performs robust aggregation by compressing gradients into a drastically smaller subspace via sparse random projection to efficiently compute reliability weights. This approach reduces the server computational complexity to an optimal $ \mathcal{O}(Mp) $, where $ M $ is the number of clients and $ p $ is the model dimension, matching the theoretical lower bound required merely to read the gradients. We establish convergence guarantees under standard FL assumptions in prior Byzantine-robust FL analyses. By leveraging the Subspace Embedding Theorem, we show that PDR achieves optimal convergence rates of $ \mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{T}) $ for non-convex functions and $ \mathcal{O}(1/T) $ for strongly convex functions, where $ T $ denotes the number of iterations. Crucially, we mathematically demonstrate that this massive acceleration comes almost for free, merely inflating the inherent Byzantine error floor by a bounded, tunable factor of $ \frac{1+ε}{1-ε} $. Experimental results on benchmark datasets confirm that integrating PDR with existing aggregators yields orders of magnitude speedups in time efficiency while maintaining highly competitive convergence performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出投影降维(PDR)加速联邦学习鲁棒聚合，在保证收敛性的同时将复杂度降至最优O(Mp)。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习易受拜占庭攻击，现有鲁棒方法虽能抵御攻击，但在高维梯度聚合时计算开销巨大，且随模型规模增长而急剧增加，成为训练瓶颈。因此需要一种能够有效降低计算复杂度的加速框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出投影降维(PDR)，一种通用加速框架，通过稀疏随机投影将梯度压缩到低维子空间，然后计算可靠性权重，实现鲁棒聚合。将服务器计算复杂度降至最优O(Mp)，理论上下界仅需读取梯度。利用子空间嵌入定理，证明非凸函数收敛率O(1/√T)，强凸函数O(1/T)，且放大拜占庭误差因子(1+ε)/(1-ε)。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上实验，集成PDR与现有聚合器，时间效率提升数个数量级，同时保持高度竞争性的收敛性能。理论分析证明达到最优收敛率，且计算复杂度匹配理论下界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从理论和实验上验证了PDR的有效性，提供了收敛保证和复杂度分析。学术上为鲁棒联邦学习提供了高效加速方案，实际应用可显著降低大规模模型训练时间。潜在局限性可能包括对压缩近似误差的敏感性，未来可探索更优投影方式。

title: Transfer learning RGB models to hyperspectral images with trainable tensor decompositions
abstract: Transfer learning makes it possible to use large vision networks on a variety of domains, by specializing their models' general filters to new tasks. However, these networks assume the input images to have 3 input channels, making them incompatible with multi- or hyperspectral images. Current approaches that mitigate this incompatibility sacrifice information in either the image, or the model. This work proposes a novel approach that preserves the image and spatial information present in the model by using partially trainable tensor decompositions. We create such decompositions of pretrained convolutional filters, separating the filters into spatial and spectral components. The spectral components are then replaced with trainable components of higher channel dimensionality. This creates hyperspectral filters that can specialize to new datasets, while retaining the spatial patterns of the original filter. Experiments on a variety of hyperspectral datasets show that our approach is more accurate and robust than other hyperspectral transfer learning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用可训练张量分解将RGB预训练模型迁移到高光谱图像，保留空间信息并适配高光谱通道。
light_analysis.motivation: 迁移学习使大型视觉网络能适应新任务，但多数预训练模型假设输入为3通道RGB图像，无法直接处理多/高光谱图像。现有方法或牺牲图像信息（如降维），或牺牲模型结构（如修改模型），导致信息损失。本文旨在解决RGB模型与高光谱图像的不兼容问题，同时保持图像和模型的空间信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种基于部分可训练张量分解的方法：将预训练卷积滤波器分解为空间和光谱分量，固定空间分量保留原始模式，光谱分量替换为可训练的高通道维度分量，从而生成高光谱滤波器。该方法无需修改模型整体结构，仅调整滤波器通道以适应高光谱输入，保留预训练空间特征。
light_analysis.result: 在多个高光谱数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面优于其他高光谱迁移学习方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了RGB预训练模型到高光谱图像的迁移，兼顾了图像通道完整性和模型空间特征。潜在局限性可能在于分解复杂度，未来可探索更高效的分解方式或应用于更多模态。

title: Learning the Error Patterns of Language Models
abstract: When generating outputs for domains with specific validity constraints (e.g., a program should compile), LLMs often fail in a small number of focused ways: for example, by using Python function names when generating TypeScript. We observe that these error patterns can be represented using a small number of constraints that can be learned in practice. We propose \emph{prefix filters}, which are per-domain-and-LLM symbolic functions, as objects to capture the error patterns, Palla as an algorithm to learn prefix filters efficiently in practice, and implement Palla. Prefix filters learned by Palla i) help us quantitatively analyze the error patterns of LLMs, and ii) can be used to constrain the outputs of a model via constrained sampling algorithms. For example, Palla boosts compile rates for Qwen2.5-1.5B on TypeScript generation, by over 60%, allowing Qwen2.5-1.5B to achieve similar performance to Llama3.1-8B unconstrained.

light_analysis.overview: 提出前缀过滤器（prefix filters）学习LLM在特定领域输出中的错误模式，并通过约束采样提升正确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在生成具有特定有效性约束（如程序编译）的输出时，常出现集中的错误模式（例如在TypeScript中使用Python函数名）。这些错误模式可以用少量约束表示，但现有方法未能有效捕获和利用它们。因此，需要一种系统的方法来学习并利用这些错误模式，以提升LLM在受限领域的输出质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出前缀过滤器（prefix filters），作为针对特定领域和LLM的符号函数，用于捕获错误模式。设计Palla算法高效学习这些前缀过滤器。学习到的过滤器可定量分析错误模式，并用于约束采样算法（如受限生成）以过滤无效输出。实验中使用Qwen2.5-1.5B和Llama3.1-8B在TypeScript生成任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: Palla将Qwen2.5-1.5B在TypeScript生成上的编译率提升超过60%，使其性能与未约束的Llama3.1-8B相当。这表明通过学习少量错误约束，小模型可以匹配大模型的生成质量，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法证明了通过学习LLM的特定错误模式（以符号约束形式）可以显著提升生成质量。前缀过滤器提供了一种高效、可解释的工具来约束模型输出，有助于提升LLM在编程等严格领域的可靠性。未来可扩展到更多领域和模型。

title: Inpainting-Style Conditional Diffusion for Multivariable Time Series Forecasting
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel conditional diffusion-based framework for multivariable time-series solar power forecasting. The proposed method reformulates temporal PV data as structured two-dimensional representations (images) using a sliding-window patch construction, enabling the application of Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM) within a unified spatiotemporal learning paradigm. A key contribution of this work is the formulation of solar forecasting as an inpainting problem, where future time steps are treated as missing regions to be reconstructed. This is achieved through a mask-based conditional diffusion mechanism, in which historical observations are preserved as conditioning context while the target (future) region is progressively corrupted and subsequently recovered via reverse diffusion. The model learns to generate coherent future sequences conditioned on observed data, effectively performing time-series inpainting. To fully utilize all available features and ensure compatibility with U-Net architectural constraints, a zero-padding strategy is introduced to construct fixed-size inputs. The model is trained using a supervised denoising objective to predict injected noise, enabling accurate iterative reconstruction during the reverse process. Extensive experiments conducted on benchmark PV dataset, including GEFCom2014, demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high forecasting accuracy, particularly for short-term horizons. The results highlight the effectiveness of integrating diffusion-based generative modeling with an inpainting formulation for robust, flexible, and high-fidelity solar power forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 将多变量时间序列预测转化为图像修复问题，提出基于掩码条件扩散的概率模型用于太阳能功率预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 光伏功率预测对电网调度至关重要，但现有方法难以同时捕捉时空依赖性和处理多变量数据。传统扩散模型在时间序列上的应用受限于结构化表示，且无法直接利用历史条件信息。本文旨在通过将时间序列重构为2D图像，并引入条件修复机制，实现高保真、鲁棒的短期预测。
light_analysis.method: 提出滑动窗口补丁构建将时间序列转为二维图像，利用U-Net架构的DDPM。将未来时间步视为缺失区域，通过掩码条件扩散机制，保留历史观测作为条件上下文，逐步破坏并修复目标区域。引入零填充策略确保输入尺寸统一，模型通过监督去噪目标训练来预测噪声，实现逆向迭代重构。
light_analysis.result: 在GEFCom2014基准光伏数据集上实验，所提方法在短期预测中达到高精度，优于基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调了集成生成式建模与修复范式的有效性，表明具有鲁棒性和灵活性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文创新地将时间序列预测建模为图像修复问题，利用条件扩散模型实现高保真多变量预测。该方法在太阳能功率预测中展现了优越性能，尤其是在短时间尺度上。未来可扩展至其他可再生能源预测任务，并研究更高效的掩码策略。局限性可能在于长序列的生成质量和计算开销。

title: Hybrid Neural World Models
abstract: Neural surrogates promise large speedups over classical solvers for physical dynamics but fail silently at sharp dynamical events such as shocks, fronts, and contact. We present hybrid neural world models for physical dynamics: a recipe for training and deploying multi-horizon surrogates in physical state space, where a single network with continuous horizon conditioning is trained with direct supervision against textbook reference solvers to predict any future state at horizon T in one forward pass. Although no part of the training data, loss function, or architecture supervises discontinuity location, the trained surrogate encodes it implicitly, recoverable from its forward passes alone as a per-trajectory error map that concentrates on shocks, fronts, and contacts, and stays small elsewhere. The map is competitive with or better than standard label-free baselines including deep ensembles, learned error heads, gradient-magnitude indicators, and locally-adaptive conformal prediction, while using only a single trained network and requiring no calibration set or governing-equation knowledge. The recipe supports two operating points. Mode 1 runs the surrogate alone for maximum throughput, with same-hardware CPU speedups of 26x to 72x against textbook solvers on the PDE environments. Mode 2 uses the error map to gate a reference-solver fallback, deferring uncertain trajectories and roughly halving the surrogate's residual error at the default operating point. The recipe applies without modification across reaction-diffusion, compressible Euler, and rigid-body collision dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合神经世界模型，通过单一网络直接预测物理动力学任意未来状态，并隐式编码不连续性生成误差图，实现高效且可靠的替代求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经替代模型能加速物理动力学模拟，但在冲击、接触等尖锐动态事件中会悄然失效。现有方法缺乏有效的错误检测机制，需要多网络集成或校准集，计算成本高。本文旨在构建一种无需额外校准集、仅用单个网络即可同时实现高速预测和不确定性估计的替代模型，弥补传统求解器与纯数据驱动方法之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 采用连续水平条件网络，通过直接监督学习训练，以教科书参考求解器为目标，单次前向传播即可预测任意未来状态T。网络隐式编码不连续性，通过前向传播生成每个轨迹的误差图，该误差图集中于冲击、前沿和接触区域。支持两种模式：模式1单独运行替代模型实现最大吞吐量；模式2利用误差图门控回退到参考求解器，推迟不确定轨迹。无需修改即可应用于反应扩散、可压缩欧拉和刚体碰撞动力学。
light_analysis.result: 在反应扩散、可压缩欧拉和刚体碰撞环境上，同硬件CPU速度提升26至72倍。误差图在识别不连续区域上优于深度集成、学习误差头、梯度幅值指示器和局部自适应保形预测等无标签基线，且仅需单个训练网络，无需校准集或控制方程知识。模式2在默认操作点将替代模型的残差误差约减半。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的混合神经世界模型为物理动力学提供了一种高效且可靠的替代求解方案，兼具高吞吐量和内置不确定性估计能力。误差图可竞争甚至超越现有无标签基准，且适用性广泛。未来工作可探索将该方法扩展到更复杂的物理系统或与自适应网格细化结合，进一步减少回退调用。

title: HardMTBench: Stress-Testing Chinese-English Translation on Knowledge-Intensive Domains
abstract: General-purpose machine translation benchmarks such as FLORES-200 have reached a saturation regime on Chinese-English pairs, where modern large language models cluster within a narrow band of high scores. Across 22 systems, FLORES-200 zh-en GEMBA scores fall in a 7.87-point range with a standard deviation of 2.29, which compresses the separation between systems on knowledge-intensive domains such as finance, healthcare, law, and science and technology. We introduce HardMTBench, a difficulty-aware diagnostic benchmark for bidirectional Chinese-English domain translation. HardMTBench covers 12 domains and contains 10,000 hand-curated source sentences with reference translations, packaged as 20,000 directional test items. A three-stage construction pipeline builds a domain-balanced candidate pool of 84{,}566 pairs, applies an LLM-based multi-signal judge over knowledge density, translation difficulty, terminology load and reference correctness, and assembles the final test set under a hardness fusion rule with per-domain quotas. Across 22 systems spanning general LLMs, commercial engines and specialised MT models, HardMTBench widens the cross-system GEMBA range by roughly a factor of two over FLORES-200, induces visible rank reorderings, and exposes domain-specific terminology and knowledge weaknesses that quality-only metrics tend to flatten. All data and code are open-sourced at https://github.com/jasonNLP/HardMTBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HardMTBench，一个难度感知的中英双向领域翻译诊断基准，覆盖12个知识密集型领域，通过三阶段构建扩大系统性能区分度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有通用翻译基准如FLORES-200在中英对上已饱和，高分窄带压缩了知识密集领域（如金融、医疗、法律等）的系统间差异，无法有效评估模型在专业术语和知识方面的弱点。需要更难的基准来暴露模型在这些领域的局限性。
light_analysis.method: HardMTBench覆盖12个领域，包含10,000条人工精选源句及参考译文，形成20,000个方向测试项。构建分三阶段：1) 构建领域平衡候选池（84,566对）；2) 基于LLM的多信号评判器评估知识密度、翻译难度、术语负载和参考正确性；3) 按硬度融合规则和每领域配额组装最终测试集。
light_analysis.result: 在22个系统（包括通用LLM、商业引擎和专用MT模型）上，HardMTBench将跨系统GEMBA得分范围比FLORES-200扩大约两倍，引发明显的排名重排序，并暴露了领域特定术语和知识弱点，而这些弱点是仅凭质量指标难以捕捉的。
light_analysis.conclusion: HardMTBench有效区分了不同翻译系统在知识密集型领域的性能，揭示了传统指标无法反映的短板。该基准开源，有助于推动中英翻译在专业领域的评估和模型改进，未来可扩展至更多语言对或领域。

title: Argument Quality Assessment with Large Language Models: A Pairwise Bradley-Terry Approach
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in tasks related to reasoning and judgment. However, assessing the quality of arguments requires a rigorous evaluation. We investigate the extent to which LLMs can effectively perform this task. We tested 12 open-weight LLMs of different sizes and families under zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought to approximate expert pairwise comparisons of argument quality across three dimensions-logical, rhetorical, and dialectic-and used these comparisons in a Bradley-Terry model to infer latent strength scores and derive a ranking of arguments. Our insights show that LLMs have promising but moderate correlation with human expert judgments, with Llama-70B obtaining the strongest alignment, reaching moderate Cohen's $κ$ = 0.493 and moderate correlations with Bradley-Terry scores derived from these annotations (Kendall, Pearson, and Spearman: 0.327-0.477). Other LLMs exhibit weak, moderate, or high alignment with Llama-70B while achieving comparable results against human experts, suggesting partial but complementary understanding of underlying quality dimensions despite differences in model size and family. Moreover, LLM predictions are stable across trial runs, with fewer than 7.75\% of cases yielding different labels. Remaining variability is handled via majority voting and few-shot prompting for large-size models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用大型语言模型通过成对比较和Bradley-Terry模型进行论证质量评估的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 论证质量评估需要严格评价，传统依赖人工专家耗时且主观。大型语言模型在推理与判断任务中表现优异，但对其在论证质量评估中的能力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在系统评估LLM能否有效替代或辅助专家进行多维度论证质量排序，弥补现有自动评估方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 测试12个不同大小和系列的开源LLM（如Llama-70B），在零样本、少样本和思维链提示下进行论证质量的成对比较，覆盖逻辑、修辞和辩证三个维度。将比较结果输入Bradley-Terry模型，推断潜在强度分数并生成论证排名。采用多数投票和少样本提示处理预测的不稳定性（<7.75%标签变化）。
light_analysis.result: LLM与人类专家判断呈中等相关性，Llama-70B表现最佳，Cohen's κ=0.493，与基于专家标注的Bradley-Terry分数的Kendall、Pearson和Spearman相关系数为0.327-0.477。其他LLM与Llama-70B的一致性从弱到强，与人类专家结果相当，表明不同模型对质量维度有互补理解。预测稳定性高，标签变化少于7.75%。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM在论证质量评估中展现出有前景但中等水平的能力，可辅助专家评估，但尚未完全替代。模型间一致性表明不同架构对质量维度有互补理解。未来可探索更大模型或结合专家微调以提升性能。局限性包括仅测试开源模型及有限维度。

title: Learning to Assess the Reliability of Number-of-Runs Estimation in Stochastic Optimization
abstract: In large-scale benchmarking of stochastic optimization algorithms, the key challenge is no longer whether repeated runs are needed for reliability, but how to determine when sufficient evidence has been collected without incurring unnecessary computational cost. We study a learning-based extension of a recent empirical online heuristic that adaptively estimates the required number of runs using outlier handling and skewness-based symmetry checks. Using annotated outcomes from 132{,}000 Nevergrad runs on COCO (24 problems in 20 dimensions, 10 instances each, 11 optimizers), we train classifiers on 23 statistical, energy-free, and shape and stability features to predict whether a run-number estimate is reliable, prioritizing detection of incorrect estimates via minority-class recall. We evaluate reliability prediction using a within-configuration learning setup, where models are trained and tested on data sharing the same optimizer. The results show that run-number reliability can be learned in a within-configuration scenario, enabling detection of unreliable estimates with high minority-class recall, although performance remains limited by the restricted data diversity within fixed configurations.
comment: Preprint version of a poster accepted at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2026 (GECCO 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于分类器学习的方法，预测随机优化中运行次数估计的可靠性，以节省计算资源。
light_analysis.motivation: 在随机优化的大规模基准测试中，亟需确定何时收集到足够证据以避免不必要的计算开销。现有自适应估计运行次数的方法虽能减少重复运行，但无法判断估计本身是否可靠。研究旨在通过机器学习评估估计可靠性，优先检测错误估计，从而提升基准测试效率。
light_analysis.method: 扩展自适应启发式算法，集成异常值处理和偏度对称性检查。从Nevergrad的COCO基准（24问题×20维×10实例×11优化器）中提取23个统计、无能量、形状和稳定性特征，训练分类器预测运行次数估计的可靠性。采用配置内学习设置，模型在相同优化器数据上训练和测试，优化少数类召回率以优先检测不可靠估计。
light_analysis.result: 在配置内场景下，分类器能够有效学习运行次数可靠性，对不可靠估计实现高少数类召回率检测。然而，由于固定配置内数据多样性有限，整体性能受限，跨配置泛化能力不足。摘要未提供具体准确率或对比数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明运行次数估计的可靠性可通过机器学习在配置内场景中学习，为自适应停止准则提供验证手段。学术上，将分类技术引入随机优化元评估；实践中可减少计算浪费。局限在于数据多样性不足，未来需探索跨配置学习或特征增强。

title: HELEA: Hard-Negative Benchmark and LLM-based Reranking for Robust Entity Alignment
abstract: Entity Alignment (EA) is essential for knowledge graph (KG) fusion, but existing benchmarks often allow models to exploit name overlap rather than relational structure. This makes it difficult to evaluate whether models can reject same-name entities that refer to different real-world objects. Our primary contribution is a same-name hard-negative augmentation strategy that simultaneously yields quality-controlled evaluation benchmarks (DW-HN29K, DY-HN27K) and augmented training corpora (DW-Train, DY-Train), by mining same-name but distinct entity pairs from KG name-collision groups. We further introduce HELEA, a two-stage framework integrating (i) entity encoder retrieval trained on hard-negative-augmented training corpora with 1-hop KG context, and (ii) LLM-based reranking without additional training. Experiments show that name-dependent baselines collapse to near-random performance on our hard-negative benchmarks, while HELEA achieves F1 0.967 on DW-HN29K while maintaining Hit@1 0.993 on standard DW-15K.
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables. Code and benchmarks available at https://github.com/Wnsdnl/HELEA

light_analysis.overview: 提出硬负样本增强策略和LLM重排序的两阶段实体对齐框架，解决同名实体区分问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有实体对齐基准允许模型利用名称重叠而非关系结构，导致模型无法拒绝同名但指向不同实体的案例。需要更鲁棒的评估基准和方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出HELEA框架：第一阶段，在硬负样本增强的训练语料上训练实体编码器，结合1跳KG上下文进行检索；第二阶段，使用预训练LLM进行无训练重排序。同时构建硬负样本基准集DW-HN29K和DY-HN27K。
light_analysis.result: 依赖名称的基线方法在硬负样本基准上性能降至接近随机；HELEA在DW-HN29K上F1达0.967，同时在标准DW-15K上保持Hit@1 0.993。
light_analysis.conclusion: HELEA有效区分同名实体，提升实体对齐鲁棒性。硬负样本增强策略可生成高质量训练数据。未来可探索更复杂的KG上下文结合方式。

title: Routing-Aligned Fine-Tuning for Multilingual Downstream Tasks in Mixture-of-Experts Models
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have emerged as a dominant paradigm for efficient LLM scaling, yet adapting them to non-English downstream tasks remains challenging. Existing fine-tuning approaches treat MoE models as monolithic learners, ignoring the heterogeneous routing structure that develops during pretraining. We validate across multiple MoE models and downstream tasks that middle layers form a language-universal alignment zone where routing divergence strongly predicts per-language task performance gaps. Building on this observation, we propose RA-MoE (Routing-Aligned MoE Fine-Tuning), a three-stage framework that categorizes parallel task examples into a four-way taxonomy (cc/ci/ic/ii) based on correctness in English and the target language, identifies task-relevant experts in the middle layers, and augments standard SFT with a routing alignment loss that encourages target-language routing on ci-type examples to follow the English task-expert activation pattern. Experiments across three MoE models, three tasks, and six target languages demonstrate that RA-MoE consistently outperforms standard SFT and strong baselines including Routing Steering and RISE, with the ci proportion of a task-language pair serving as a reliable predictor of alignment benefit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RA-MoE框架，通过路由对齐微调提升MoE模型在多语言下游任务上的性能，利用中间层语言通用对齐特性。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE模型在LLM扩展中表现优异，但适配非英语下游任务时性能不佳。现有微调方法将MoE视为整体，忽略了预训练形成的异构路由结构，导致语言间性能差异。中间层路由分歧能预测语言任务差距，亟需针对路由进行对齐的微调方法。
light_analysis.method: RA-MoE包含三阶段：首先将平行任务样本按英语和目标语言正确性分为cc/ci/ic/ii四类；其次识别中间层与任务相关的专家；最后在标准SFT基础上增加路由对齐损失，引导ci类型样本的目标语言路由遵循英语的任务专家激活模式。
light_analysis.result: 在三个MoE模型（如Mixtral）、三个任务（情感分析、NER等）和六种目标语言上，RA-MoE一致优于标准SFT及Routing Steering、RISE等基线。ci比例可可靠预测对齐收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: RA-MoE利用中间层语言通用对齐特性，实现了有效的多语言微调，为MoE模型的多语言适配提供了新范式。其路由对齐损失简单有效，且ci比例可作为收益预测器。未来可扩展至更多任务和语言。

title: Revisiting Anthropomorphic Reflection Markers in Large Language Model Reasoning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often produce explicit reflective traces during complex reasoning, accompanied by anthropomorphic markers such as wait, hmm, and alternatively. Although these markers are commonly used as visible indicators of reflection, their mechanisms remain unclear, which leaves the risk of overthinking associated with redundant and repetitive reflection markers. In this work, we revisit anthropomorphic reflection markers, examining their necessity for reasoning and role in the reflection. We suppress these markers through prompt-level and token-level interventions, and analyze their effects on task performance across four benchmarks and two model scales. Our results show that anthropomorphic markers are not uniformly necessary for reasoning performance: suppressing them can preserve or improve performance in several settings, especially under larger sampling budgets. Meanwhile, marker suppression does not necessarily remove reflection behavior, as models can still perform marker-free verification. These suggest that anthropomorphic markers tend to be surface cues rather than reliable proxies for reflection itself, and motivate future research on reasoning mechanisms beyond explicit marker patterns.

light_analysis.overview: 重新审视LLM推理中的拟人化反思标记（如wait, hmm），发现它们并非必要，抑制后可保持或提升性能，表明这些标记是表面线索而非可靠反思代理。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在复杂推理中常产生带有拟人化反思标记（如wait, hmm）的显式反思痕迹，但其机制不明，可能导致冗余和过度思考。现有方法缺乏对这些标记必要性和作用的深入理解，因此论文旨在探究其对推理的实际影响和作为反思指标的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 通过提示级别和令牌级别的干预抑制拟人化反思标记，在四个基准测试（摘要未明确具体数据集）和两种模型规模上分析对任务性能的影响，并检查抑制后模型是否仍能进行无标记验证。关键创新是系统性地评估这些标记的必要性和作用。
light_analysis.result: 拟人化反思标记并非普遍必要：抑制它们可在多个设置下保持或提升性能，尤其在更大采样预算下。同时，抑制标记不必然移除反思行为，模型仍能进行无标记验证。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 拟人化反思标记倾向于表面线索而非可靠反思代理，启示未来研究应关注超越显式标记模式的推理机制。学术贡献在于重新审视常见现象并提供实验证据，实际应用可能简化推理过程、减少冗余。局限性或未来方向：摘要未明确提及。

title: Compositional Generalization in Autoregressive Models via Logit Composition
abstract: Composing autoregressive models remains a core challenge in understanding how large language models can combine behaviors or skills learned across tasks.
