We introduce a new and principled composition strategy for autoregressive systems, inspired by composition methods developed for diffusion models. Under a factorized-conditionals assumption, we show that the resulting composition is projective: each component model preserves control over its own designated subspace of the output distribution avoiding interference between models. This property is further preserved under smooth reparameterizations of the output space, yielding a feature-space theorem. Finally, we show that composition preserves length-generalizing behavior when the factorization assumptions and component guarantees hold uniformly at the target length. These results provide a principled understanding of when model composition and merging succeed in autoregressive systems and identify conditions under which their interactions remain stable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于logit组合的自回归模型组合策略，实现投影性组合并保持长度泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归模型组合是理解大语言模型跨任务行为组合的核心挑战。现有方法缺乏原则性策略，尤其在高维输出空间中模型间干扰严重，难以保证组合稳定性。该研究旨在建立一种形式化的组合方法，确保各组件模型在其指定子空间内保持控制权，避免干扰，并扩展至长度泛化场景。
light_analysis.method: 受扩散模型组合方法启发，提出因子化条件假设下的logit组合策略。每个组件模型在其指定输出子空间进行投影组合，确保互不干扰。通过平滑重参数化保留该性质，导出特征空间定理。要求在目标长度上均匀保持因子化假设和组件保证，以维持长度泛化行为。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果或性能指标，但从理论分析表明：组合具有投影性，组件模型各自控制输出分布的子空间；该性质在平滑重参数化下保持不变；在均匀条件假设下，组合可保持长度泛化行为。为模型合并的成功条件提供了理论依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为自回归系统模型组合提供了原则性理解，揭示了组合成功和交互稳定的条件。理论成果可指导多任务大语言模型的行为组合与合并，提升可解释性和可控性。未来可探索实际应用中的假设验证与近似实现。

title: From Fact Overwriting to Knowledge Evolution: Causal Editing via On-Policy Self-Distillation
abstract: While Knowledge Editing (KE) enables efficient updates, its dominant Static Fact Overwriting paradigm treats LLMs as discrete databases, forcibly injecting isolated facts. Fracturing pre-trained logical topologies, this triggers Epistemic Dissonance -- a pathology where un-evolved legacy priors force the model to explicitly negate the injected update. Idealized interventions reveal that this is an inherent structural flaw rather than mere algorithmic noise, with a zero-distortion proxy yielding a catastrophic 95.6% self-refutation rate. Given the causally driven nature of real-world knowledge, grounding updates in explicit causal narratives effectively collapses this conflict rate to just 6.6%, underscoring the imperative for a paradigm shift toward Causal Editing. To internalize this evolution, we propose CODE (Causal On-policy Distillation for Editing). By coupling causal bootstrapping with asymmetric on-policy distillation, CODE engraves causal transition logic directly into parametric memory. Experiments on LLaMA-3.1 and Qwen-2.5 show CODE drastically suppresses self-refutation to 1.8% while securing robust multi-hop accuracy (up to 83.5%), seamlessly transforming discrete fact injection into coherent knowledge evolution. Code is available at https://github.com/CrashBugger/CODE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果编辑范式CODE，通过策略内自蒸馏将事实注入转化为知识演化，有效抑制自反驳率。
light_analysis.motivation: 静态事实覆盖范式将LLM视为数据库强行注入孤立事实，破坏预训练逻辑拓扑，引发认知失调，导致高达95.6%的自反驳率。现有方法忽略知识演变的因果本质，亟需从事实覆盖转向因果编辑，以解决结构性缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 提出CODE（因果策略内蒸馏编辑），耦合因果引导（causal bootstrapping）与非对称策略内蒸馏，将因果转换逻辑直接编码到参数记忆中。实验采用LLaMA-3.1和Qwen-2.5模型，通过多跳推理和自反驳率评估效果。
light_analysis.result: CODE将自反驳率从95.6%（零失真代理）降至1.8%，多跳准确率达83.5%。基于因果叙事的干预将冲突率从95.6%降至6.6%，验证了因果编辑的有效性，显著优于静态覆盖方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CODE实现了从离散事实注入到连贯知识演变的转变，解决了认知失调问题。该工作提高了知识编辑的可靠性，为LLM持续学习提供新范式。未来可探索更复杂因果叙事及跨任务泛化能力。

title: How Far Can Disaggregation Go? A Design-Space Exploration of Attention-FFN Disaggregation for Efficient MoE LLM Serving
abstract: Modern large language model (LLM) inference has progressively disaggregated to keep pace with growing model sizes and tight TTFT and TPOT service-level objectives: from chunked-prefill aggregation, to prefill-decode (P/D) disaggregation, and most recently to operator-level Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD). This trend is especially important for mixture-of-experts (MoE) models, where memory-bound attention, compute-intensive expert FFNs, and MoE dispatch/combine communication create distinct resource demands. AFD further exposes this heterogeneity by placing attention and MoE-FFN execution on separate GPU groups. Each level of disaggregation deepens the scheduling design space across workload characteristics, resource allocation, and interconnect topology, raising the central question: when does each level actually pay off? We systematically characterize this trade-off for MoE inference across realistic workloads spanning input/output sequence lengths, prefix-KV reuse, and per-user latency constraints. Using chunked-prefill and P/D disaggregation as baselines, we study the benefits and limits of AFD at scale through a framework that fuses on-device kernel measurements with high-fidelity network simulation. Under strict TTFT/TPOT SLOs, AFD sustains around 4k tokens/s of system throughput on DeepSeek-V3.2 across chat, coding, and agentic-coding workloads, where non-AFD deployments are infeasible. We distill concrete takeaways for jointly optimizing throughput and interactivity, including how to partition attention and FFN across GPUs as a function of workload and model architecture, providing design principles for current rack- and cluster-scale deployments as well as future disaggregated AI infrastructure.

light_analysis.overview: 系统探索注意力-FFN解聚（AFD）在MoE LLM推理中的收益与局限性，给出设计原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM推理逐步采用解聚策略以应对模型规模增长和严格的服务质量目标（TTFT/TPOT）。对于混合专家模型，注意力、专家FFN和MoE调度/通信的资源需求各异，进一步加剧了异构性。现有方法如chunked-prefill和P/D解聚尚未充分挖掘算子级解聚的潜力，且缺乏何时使用各层解聚的设计指南。本文旨在系统化表征这一权衡，填补设计空间探索的空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个融合设备内核测量与高保真网络仿真的框架，系统比较chunked-prefill、P/D解聚和AFD。在真实工作负载（覆盖输入/输出长度、前缀KV复用、延迟约束）下，研究AFD在不同资源分配和互连拓扑下的表现。以DeepSeek-V3.2为模型实例，探索注意力与FFN在GPU组上的最优分区策略。
light_analysis.result: 在严格的TTFT/TPOT SLO下，AFD在DeepSeek-V3.2上可维持约4k tokens/s的系统吞吐量，覆盖聊天、编码和代理编码工作负载。相比之下，非AFD部署在这些场景下不可行。通过设计空间探索，蒸馏出联合优化吞吐量和交互性的具体要点，包括如何根据工作负载和模型架构分区注意力与FFN。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为当前机架和集群规模部署以及未来解聚AI基础设施提供了设计原则。AFD能在满足延迟约束的同时显著提升吞吐量，尤其适用于MoE模型。未来工作可探索更细粒度的算子级解聚及动态资源适配。

title: Better Accuracies, Worse Reasoning: A Step-Level Audit of Medical Chain-of-Thought Distillation
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) distillation trains a smaller model to imitate a teacher's reasoning trace, but it is typically evaluated by final-answer metrics including accuracy. We ask whether gains in answer quality are accompanied by improvements in the trace. In medical QA, where short answer options can leave a richer clinical justification under-specified, a Qwen3-8B student distilled from a DeepSeek-V3-family teacher improves on MedQA-USMLE answer metrics (SC@64 74.7% to 84.4%; expected calibration error (ECE) 0.096 to 0.034). Yet under a Kimi-K2.6 style-blind LLM-judge audit, its error rate over non-abstained steps rises from 30.6% to 50.3%. In this primary medical setting, answer quality and trace factuality move in opposite directions. This before--after pattern persists across evaluators, teacher strengths, student scales and families, medical benchmarks, and style, segmentation, and answer-correctness controls. A 150-step blinded audit by a clinical expert reproduces the same ordering. Boundary checks narrow the scope of the claim: the risk appears when a compact answer under-constrains the rationale and a capable student can imitate expert-like form without reliably grounding each local claim. Standard answer metrics and aggregate hedging rates do not reveal the shift. When such traces are released or reused, answer-level metrics alone are insufficient.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示医学思维链蒸馏中答案准确率提升但推理轨迹事实性下降的反向现象，指出仅用答案指标评估不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CoT蒸馏评估依赖最终答案指标，忽略推理轨迹质量。在医学问答中，答案选项简短可能遗漏丰富临床理由，现有方法无法确保推理事实性。作者质疑答案提升是否伴随轨迹改善，发现两者可能反向变化，需要更细致的审计。
light_analysis.method: 使用DeepSeek-V3家族教师蒸馏Qwen3-8B学生，在MedQA-USMLE评估答案指标，并用Kimi-K2.6风格盲审LLM评判推理轨迹错误率。进行多种控制实验（评估者、教师强度、学生规模、基准等），并通过临床专家150步盲审验证。边界检查分析风险条件。
light_analysis.result: 蒸馏后答案准确率提升（SC@64从74.7%到84.4%），校准误差降低（0.096到0.034），但推理轨迹错误率从30.6%上升到50.3%。答案质量和轨迹事实性反向移动，标准答案指标和聚合对冲率未揭示此转变。
light_analysis.conclusion: 仅用答案级指标评估CoT蒸馏不足，尤其在医学领域。蒸馏可能产生表面合理但常识错误更多的推理，需要更全面的轨迹审计。潜在局限性可能限于紧凑答案设置，未来需设计更好的评估指标和训练方法保证推理事实性。

title: T-GINEE: A Tensor-Based Multilayer Graph Representation Learning
abstract: Traditional network analysis focuses on single-layer networks, real-world systems often form multilayer networks with multiple relationship types. However, existing methods typically fail to capture complex inter-layer dependencies by treating layers independently or aggregating them. To address this, we propose T-GINEE (Tensor-Based Generalized Multilayer-graph Estimating Equation), a statistical regularization framework combining tensor-based generalized estimating equations with task-specific loss to model cross-network correlations explicitly. Key innovations include: (1) CP tensor decomposition capturing structural dependencies via shared latent factors; (2) a generalized estimating equation framework modeling inter-layer correlations through working covariance matrices; and (3) a flexible link function accommodating characteristics like sparsity. Our theoretical analysis establishes consistency and asymptotic normality under mild conditions. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate T-GINEE's effectiveness for multilayer network analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出T-GINEE框架，利用张量分解和广义估计方程显式建模多层网络的跨层依赖关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实系统常由多层网络构成，但现有方法或独立处理各层、或简单聚合，未能有效捕获层间复杂依赖关系。这种忽略导致信息丢失、分析不准确。因此需要一种能显式建模跨层相关性，同时保留层特异性的统计框架。
light_analysis.method: T-GINEE结合张量CP分解与广义估计方程：CP分解通过共享潜在因子捕获层间结构依赖；广义估计方程利用工作协方差矩阵建模层间相关性；灵活链接函数适应稀疏等特性。框架整合任务特定损失，形成正则化估计，理论上证明一致性及渐近正态性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成与真实多层网络数据集上的实验表明，T-GINEE在链路预测、节点分类等任务中优于忽略层间依赖或简单聚合的基线方法。具体性能提升及统计显著性需参考原文，摘要未提供详细数值，但强调有效性验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: T-GINEE为多层网络分析提供统一统计框架，同时捕获层间相关性和层特异性。理论性质保证了估计的可靠性，实验支持其广泛应用。未来可探索更复杂的张量分解形式或扩展到动态多层网络。

title: REED: Post-Training Representation Editing for Cross-Domain Linguistic Steganalysis
abstract: In real-world scenarios of linguistic steganalysis, tested texts usually come from unseen domains with different vocabularies, topics, writing styles, and steganographic generation patterns, which can significantly degrade the detection performance. Although existing cross-domain steganalysis methods can effectively alleviate this problem through distribution alignment, domain-invariant feature learning, etc., the detection performance is not satisfactory. In this paper, we propose a post-training representation editing method for cross-domain linguistic steganalysis. Specifically, the detector is first trained on source-domain data, and then the feature extractor and classifier are kept frozen, and the intermediate representations are deterministically edited before classification. For domain adaptation, we construct a domain-offset vector from marginal source and target representations. For domain generalization, we derive a source-domain cover-to-stego direction to guide sample-specific editing. Experimental results show that compared with the advanced methods, the proposed method can achieve high cross-domain detection performance, especially in terms of F1-score, while requiring no architecture modification or parameter updates after source-domain training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种后训练表示编辑方法，通过域偏移向量和源域覆盖-隐写方向实现高效跨域语言隐写分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际隐写分析中测试文本常来自未见过的域，词汇、主题、写作风格等差异导致检测性能严重下降。现有跨域方法虽通过分布对齐等缓解问题，但检测效果仍不理想，亟需更高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先在源域数据上训练检测器，然后冻结特征提取器和分类器，在分类前对中间表示进行确定性编辑。域适应时构建域偏移向量，域泛化时推导源域覆盖-隐写方向以指导样本特定编辑。方法无需架构修改或参数更新。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，与先进方法相比，提出的方法在跨域检测中取得高性能，尤其在F1分数上表现突出。无需额外训练或参数更新即可达到优越效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效跨域隐写分析方法，通过后训练表示编辑实现高检测性能，且无需模型架构修改或参数更新。该方法具有实用价值，未来可探索更复杂的编辑策略。

title: Machine Learning methods for event classification and vertex reconstruction of the 12C + 12C reaction with the MATE-TPC
abstract: In modern nuclear physics experiments, identifying events of interest is challenging for nuclear reaction studies with the active target Time Projection Chamber (TPC). In this work, machine learning techniques are employed to analyze the complex data of the 12C + 12C fusion reaction from a TPC named MATE (multi-purpose active-target time projection chamber for nuclear experiments). Specifically, we successfully applied Residual Neural Network (ResNet-50, ResNet-34 and ResNet-18) and Visual Geometry Group (VGG-19) to classify elastic scattering and fusion reaction events from the 12C + 12C reaction. The classification results of the four models are nearly identical, with accuracies of approximately 97% for the simulated data and 90% for the experimental data. Moreover, these approaches successfully identify some events that are misclassified by traditional methods. These models are also applied to classify events from different fusion reaction channels, with classification accuracies of approximately 95% on simulated data. In addition, a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model is developed to reconstruct the reaction vertex, providing an alternative strategy for vertex reconstruction. These results indicate that machine learning techniques can effectively classify reaction events from different channels and reconstruct the reaction vertex, thereby paving the way for future analyses of complex nuclear reaction data.

light_analysis.overview: 利用ResNet和VGG等深度学习模型对MATE-TPC中12C+12C核反应事件进行分类，并开发CNN用于反应顶点重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 在现代核物理实验中，使用主动靶时间投影室（TPC）研究核反应时，识别感兴趣的事件具有挑战性。传统方法难以准确分类弹性散射和聚变反应事件，且事件误分类问题突出。因此需要引入机器学习技术，提高分类精度和顶点重建效率，以处理12C+12C反应的复杂数据。
light_analysis.method: 采用ResNet-50、ResNet-34、ResNet-18和VGG-19四种深度学习模型对弹性散射和聚变反应事件进行分类，并用于区分不同聚变反应道。模型基于卷积神经网络架构，利用模拟和实验数据进行训练。此外，开发了一个CNN模型用于重建反应顶点，为顶点重建提供新策略。
light_analysis.result: 四个模型在模拟数据上分类准确率约97%，实验数据上约90%，且能成功识别传统方法误分类的事件。在区分不同聚变反应道时，模拟数据准确率约95%。CNN顶点重建模型也取得了有效结果，验证了机器学习在核反应数据分析中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究表明机器学习能有效分类不同核反应道的事件并重建反应顶点，提升了复杂核反应数据分析的能力。该方法为未来主动靶TPC实验的数据处理提供了新途径，但未提及局限性，未来可探索更复杂的网络结构或应用于其他反应系统。

title: Where Rollouts Begin: Low-Load, High-Leverage First-Token Diversification for RLVR
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) trains reasoning models without labeled trajectories, relying on grouped rollouts to expose the policy to alternative reasoning paths and a verifier to score them. Rollout diversity has accordingly emerged as a central bottleneck in RLVR, with most existing methods broadening exploration through temperature, prefix, or rollout-selection adjustments. We identify a structurally distinguished but overlooked position for broadening this diversity: the first token after the reasoning marker. The policy's first-token distribution exhibits a sharply peaked yet correctness-decoupled phenomenon, and this first token position can broaden the regions a rollout group covers without altering the correctness signal. We introduce REFT (Rollout Exploration with First-Token Diversification), a light addition to the RLVR pipeline that samples first tokens uniformly from the policy's own top-$N$ candidates and allocates rollouts evenly, leaving every other component unchanged. Trained on the resulting diversified rollouts, REFT improves aggregate Pass@1, Pass@8, and Pass@64 over DAPO and GRPO baselines across four base models (0.5B-7B) and three difficulty regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REFT方法，通过均匀采样策略优化RLVR中rollout第一token的多样性，显著提升推理模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在强化学习可验证奖励（RLVR）中，rollout多样性是核心瓶颈，现有方法通过温度、前缀或rollout选择调整来拓宽探索，但忽略了推理标记后的第一个token位置。该位置具有尖峰但正确性解耦的现象，能在不改变正确信号的情况下拓宽rollout组覆盖区域，具有高杠杆效应。
light_analysis.method: REFT（Rollout Exploration with First-Token Diversification）是一种轻量级改进，在RLVR流程中，从策略自身top-N候选token中均匀采样第一token，并均匀分配rollout，其余组件保持不变。该方法不增加额外计算开销，仅修改采样策略，即可提升rollout多样性。实验在四个基础模型（0.5B-7B）和三个难度级别上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在基于DAPO和GRPO基线的对比中，REFT显著提升了聚合Pass@1、Pass@8和Pass@64指标。具体提升幅度摘要未明确数值，但强调在多种模型规模和难度下均优于基线。该方法以零额外训练开销实现性能增益，展示了第一token多样化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: REFT通过精准干预第一token采样，低成本解决了RLVR中rollout多样性瓶颈，为推理模型训练提供了新思路。该方法简单易集成，有望推广至更多RLVR场景。局限性在于依赖策略自身的top-N候选质量，未来可探索自适应选择策略或与其他多样性增强方法结合。

title: ProRL: Effective Reinforcement Learning for Proactive Recommendation via Rectified Policy Gradient Estimation
abstract: Proactive Recommender Systems (PRSs) aim to guide user preference shift toward target items by generating paths of intermediate recommendations. Reinforcement learning (RL) provides a principled framework for optimizing such sequential decision tasks, as path rewards can naturally capture both short-term acceptance and long-term guidance effectiveness. However, naively applying policy gradients to PRS results in deficient gradient estimation. We identify two deficiencies: (1) path-level rewards decompose into step-level rewards with positive mean, creating a length-dependent bias that causes gradients to favor path extension over meaningful exploration; (2) weighting each step by the entire path-level reward ignores the decomposition structure, leading to high gradient variance. To rectify these two deficiencies, we propose an effective RL framework ProRL with two novel mechanisms for proactive recommendation. First, Stepwise Reward Centering subtracts expected rewards to neutralize length-dependent bias, ensuring that path extension yields zero expected gradient signal. Second, Position-Specific Advantage Estimation leverages the reward decomposition structure to compute step-dependent baselines, reducing gradient variance. Together, these mechanisms yield policy gradients that precisely target path quality. Our experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that ProRL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art PRSs. Our code is available at https://github.com/hongruhou89/ProRL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProRL框架，通过逐步奖励中心化和位置特定优势估计修正策略梯度缺陷，显著提升主动推荐效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动推荐系统旨在通过中间推荐路径引导用户偏好转变，强化学习可优化此类序列决策任务。但直接应用策略梯度存在两个缺陷：路径级奖励分解为步级奖励时产生长度依赖偏置，使梯度偏向路径延长而非有效探索；整体路径奖励加权每步忽略分解结构，导致高梯度方差。现有方法未能解决这些问题，影响推荐效果。
light_analysis.method: ProRL框架包含两种机制：逐步奖励中心化减去期望奖励以抵消长度依赖偏置，确保路径延长产生零期望梯度信号；位置特定优势估计利用奖励分解结构计算步骤相关基线，降低梯度方差。两者结合产生精确针对路径质量的策略梯度。实验在三个真实数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，ProRL显著优于现有最先进的主动推荐系统。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但整体效果提升明显，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProRL通过修正策略梯度估计中的偏差和方差问题，提出了有效的强化学习框架，在主动推荐任务上取得显著提升。该工作具有学术价值（解决分解奖励场景下的梯度缺陷）和实际应用价值（提升推荐引导效果）。未来可探索更复杂的奖励结构或扩展到其他序列决策领域。

title: CIRF: Tokenizing Chain-of-Thoughts into Reusable Functional Units for Efficient Latent Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: Implicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reduces the inference cost of large language models by internalizing the explicit rationales. However, existing approaches typically lack alignment with explicit rationales and adaptivity to example complexity. In this work, we propose CIRF (\textit{\underline{C}hain-of-thoughts \underline{I}nto \underline{R}eusable \underline{F}unctional units}), an implicit CoT framework that performs reasoning as a dynamic sequence of discrete functional tokens. CIRF assigns a functional token to each semantically coherent reasoning unit in explicit CoT traces. The model is then fine-tuned to autoregressively generate functional tokens and their optional results, followed by the final answer. This design aligns latent reasoning with a sequence of functional units, facilitating parallel training, explicit rationale alignment, and adaptive reasoning. Extensive experiments on mathematical, symbolic, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks show that CIRF provides a favorable accuracy-latency trade-off compared with state-of-the-art implicit CoT methods. Further analyses demonstrate that CIRF constructs distinct, interpretable functional tokens, leading to consistent performance improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 CIRF 框架，将显式思维链的推理单元转化为离散功能性 token，实现高效隐式推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有隐式思维链方法缺乏与显式推理的对齐，且无法根据示例复杂度自适应调整，导致推理效率与准确性难以兼顾。CIRF 旨在通过将推理过程分解为可重用的功能性单元，解决对齐与适应性问题。
light_analysis.method: CIRF 将显式 CoT 中语义连贯的推理片段映射为功能性 token，然后微调模型自回归地生成这些 token 及其可选结果，最后输出答案。该设计实现了并行训练、显式对齐和自适应推理，提升了隐式推理的灵活性。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、符号和常识推理基准上，CIRF 与最先进的隐式 CoT 方法相比，在精度-延迟权衡上表现更优。分析表明，CIRF 构建了清晰、可解释的功能性 token，并带来一致的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CIRF 提供了一种新的隐式推理范式，将推理过程 token 化，兼具对齐性、适应性和可解释性。未来可探索功能性 token 的自动发现及其在更复杂任务中的应用。

title: Adaptive Bandit Algorithms for Contextual Matching Markets
abstract: We study bandit learning in matching markets, where players and arms constitute the two market sides, and the players' utilities are linear in the arm contexts. In each round, new arms arrive with observable contexts. Then, the algorithm matches them to players, aiming to minimize each player's regret against a stable matching benchmark. This contextual structure creates significant complexity: subtle context shifts can slightly alter one player's utility while completely reconfiguring the underlying benchmark, causing large regret spikes for others. We address this in two settings: stochastic contexts, drawn from a latent distribution, and adversarial contexts, which may be arbitrary. For the stochastic case, we introduce a novel minimum preference gap to capture learning difficulty and provide a fully adaptive algorithm with an instance-dependent poly-logarithmic regret upper bound. We also establish matching instance-independent regret upper and lower bounds under a mild distributional assumption. For the adversarial setting, we propose a tractable regret notion that remains valid under arbitrary contexts and achieves an instance-independent sublinear regret bound via an adaptive algorithm.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对上下文匹配市场的新型适应性bandit算法，在随机和对抗上下文下分别实现实例相关/无关的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 匹配市场中的bandit学习面临上下文结构带来的复杂挑战：微小的上下文变化可能完全改变稳定匹配基准，导致其他玩家产生大的遗憾峰值。现有方法无法有效处理这种动态变化。该研究旨在设计自适应算法，在随机和对抗上下文两种设置下最小化玩家遗憾，解决实际匹配市场的在线学习问题。
light_analysis.method: 对于随机上下文，引入最小偏好差距量化学习难度，设计完全自适应算法，获得实例相关的多对数遗憾上界，并在温和分布假设下建立匹配的实例无关上下界。对于对抗上下文，提出即使在任意上下文下依然有效的可处理遗憾概念，通过自适应算法实现实例无关的次线性遗憾界。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据。理论结果表明：随机上下文下算法达到多对数遗憾上界（实例相关）及匹配的实例无关上下界；对抗上下文下实现次线性遗憾界（实例无关）。无与基线方法的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统解决上下文匹配市场的bandit学习问题，在随机和对抗设置下分别给出理论最优或可处理的遗憾界。学术上丰富了在线学习与市场设计的交叉的理论基础；实际应用于动态匹配平台（如众包、广告分配）。未来工作可探索更复杂的效用函数或部分可观测上下文。

title: AtomComposer: Discovering Chemical Space from First Principles with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Discovering novel stable molecules without training data remains a grand scientific challenge. Current molecular generative models are trained on large, pre-curated datasets, which introduce biases and limit exploration of novel chemistry. In contrast, we propose a new paradigm: autonomous, generalized agents capable of mapping vast, unknown chemical spaces without any pretraining. For the first time, we present AtomComposer, a self-guided agent that autonomously constructs valid 3D isomers under stoichiometric constraints and is trained exclusively online using reinforcement learning. Unlike existing approaches that generally overfit to a specific chemical formula, we establish a multi-composition training scheme that enables a broad generalization across diverse chemistry, guided by energy- and validity-based rewards. Our agent can discover up to an order of magnitude more valid isomers on unseen test formulas than existing single-composition reinforcement-learning baselines trained with per-step energy rewards. These results fulfill the promise of online reinforcement learning as a powerful paradigm for scalable, from-scratch exploration of chemical configuration space.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AtomComposer，一种基于强化学习的自引导智能体，无需预训练数据即可从零开始自主探索化学空间，发现有效3D异构体。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分子生成模型依赖大型预训练数据集，引入偏差并限制新颖化学探索。本文旨在解决从第一性原理发现稳定分子的难题，提出无需预训练数据、自主探索未知化学空间的新范式，以克服传统方法对特定化学式的过拟合和数据依赖问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出AtomComposer，一种自引导智能体，在化学计量约束下自主构建有效3D异构体，完全在线训练，使用强化学习。建立多组分训练方案，实现跨化学式的泛化，奖励基于能量和有效性。关键创新在于无需预训练数据，通过在线RL实现从零开始的可扩展化学空间探索。
light_analysis.result: 在未见过的测试化学式上，AtomComposer发现的有效异构体数量比现有单组分强化学习基线多一个数量级。这验证了在线强化学习作为从零开始可扩展探索化学构型空间的有效范式，显著提升了新颖分子的发现能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: AtomComposer提出了无需预训练数据的化学空间探索新范式，突破数据驱动局限，为加速新材料发现提供了新途径。学术上证明了在线强化学习在化学领域的潜力；未来可进一步优化泛化能力和计算效率，以处理更复杂的分子结构。

title: PrunePath: Towards Highly Structured Sparse Language Models
abstract: Feed-forward networks (FFNs) dominate the parameter count and computation of modern language models, yet existing pruning methods often struggle to convert sparsity into hardware-friendly inference efficiency gains. We introduce \textbf{PrunePath}, a budget-adaptive structured sparsification framework for FFN layers. Built on MoEfication, PrunePath replaces independent expert-wise thresholding with a softmax-normalized routing distribution and activates important experts under a cumulative-mass threshold. This formulation imposes a token-level probability budget, enabling adaptive expert counts and a direct inference-time sparsity knob from a single checkpoint. Across NLU, NLG, and instruction-tuning evaluations, PrunePath achieves a favorable sparsity--performance trade-off compared with existing static pruning and MoEfication-based methods. We further implement Triton kernels for KV-cache decoding to translate the resulting structured sparsity into practical memory savings and measurable decoding-speed improvements. These results demonstrate the superior performance of PrunePath for building highly sparse, deployment-friendly large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PrunePath框架，通过预算自适应结构化稀疏实现FFN层的高效推理，兼顾性能与硬件效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代语言模型中FFN层参数和计算占比大，现有剪枝方法难以将稀疏性转化为硬件友好的推理效率提升。静态剪枝和MoEfication方法在稀疏度-性能权衡上存在不足，且缺乏对推理时稀疏度的灵活控制。
light_analysis.method: PrunePath基于MoEfication，用softmax归一化的路由分布替代独立专家阈值，通过累积质量阈值激活重要专家，实现token级概率预算和自适应专家数量。该方法从单个检查点提供推理时的稀疏度调节旋钮，并实现Triton内核加速KV-cache解码以获得结构化稀疏的实用效益。
light_analysis.result: 在NLU、NLG和指令调优评估中，PrunePath相比现有静态剪枝和MoEfication方法取得了更优的稀疏度-性能权衡。通过Triton内核实现KV-cache解码，获得了可测量的内存节省和推理速度提升，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: PrunePath展示了构建高度稀疏且部署友好型大语言模型的优越性能，其结构化稀疏框架可直接转化为硬件效率提升。未来可探索更细粒度的稀疏策略或扩展到其他层类型，同时硬件加速的进一步优化也是潜在方向。

title: ResearchLoop: An Evidence-Gated Control Plane for AI-Assisted Research
abstract: AI-assisted research compresses ideation, implementation, evaluation, and manuscript writing into a single interactive loop. This compression is useful, but it also creates a publication risk: paper claims can become easier to state than to audit. We present ResearchLoop, an evidence-gated control plane for AI-assisted computational research. ResearchLoop treats research questions, task contracts, evidence objects, claim ledgers, closeouts, and paper bindings as durable project state, realized here as a repository-backed runtime. This technical report provides the complete protocol specification, state model, transition rules, claim-admission algorithm, and insight-compounding mechanism. It also reports the full experimental record spanning nine versions (V0--V9), including a self-hosting case study, a controlled task-suite study with component ablations, a mathematical olympiad evaluation, and a supplementary SciCode boundary experiment evaluated with the official generated-code harness. All artifacts, manifests, and verification reports are preserved in the project repository.

light_analysis.overview: 提出证据门控控制平面ResearchLoop，确保AI辅助研究中的声明可审计。
light_analysis.motivation: AI辅助研究将构思、实现、评估和写作压缩为单一循环，导致论文声明易陈述难审计，存在发布风险。现有方法缺乏对研究过程的可追溯性和证据管理，亟需一种控制平面来保证声明的可信度。
light_analysis.method: ResearchLoop将研究问题、任务合同、证据对象、声明账本、结项和论文绑定作为持久项目状态，通过仓库支持运行时实现。核心包括协议规范、状态模型、转换规则、声明准入算法和见解复合机制，关键创新是以证据门控确保每个声明有可验证证据。
light_analysis.result: 报告了九个版本（V0-V9）的完整实验记录，包括自托管案例研究、组件消融的任务套件研究、数学奥赛评估，以及使用官方生成代码评估的SciCode边界实验。所有工件、清单和验证报告保存在项目仓库，但摘要未提供具体性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是提出可重复、可审计的AI辅助研究框架，提升研究可信度，实际应用价值在于规范AI辅助科研流程。局限性可能依赖仓库基础设施，未来可扩展至更多研究领域。

title: Do LLMs Build World Models From Text? A Multilingual Diagnostic of Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Whether large language models (LLMs) construct internal spatial world models from pure-text descriptions remains contested, and whether such capabilities transfer across languages has not been systematically studied. We introduce MentalMap, a multilingual diagnostic benchmark with a six-level capability hierarchy (L0-L5) spanning atomic spatial facts to generative world-graph construction, together with four diagnostic axes probing frame of reference, reading-direction bias, reasoning-effort allocation, and hallucination. MentalMap is built from 100 ProcTHOR household scenes, covers eight typologically diverse languages plus a structured-text control, and contains 39 task families across 1,950 evaluation cells. Evaluating thirteen LLMs across scales and model families, we identify a universal L3 reasoning cliff: no model retains even half of its L0 performance on viewpoint reasoning once baseline atomic accuracy exceeds 40%. The cliff persists across languages, scales, and prompting strategies, while structured-output failures and reasoning patterns vary substantially across models. Human evaluation under the identical pure-text protocol reproduces the same failure pattern, suggesting that the bottleneck arises from text-only working memory constraints rather than being specific to current LLM architectures. Our findings reframe pure-text spatial reasoning as a multi-axis world-modeling problem and motivate multimodal and scratchpad-augmented reasoning as future directions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MentalMap多语言诊断基准，揭示LLMs在纯文本空间推理中存在普遍的L3推理悬崖，表明文本工作记忆限制是瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 关于LLMs是否从文本构建内部空间世界模型存在争议，且跨语言迁移能力未经系统研究。现有方法缺乏多语言、多层级诊断基准，无法深入定位推理瓶颈。理解这一问题对于评估LLMs的推理能力和世界模型构建机理至关重要，直接影响其在空间相关任务中的应用可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 构建MentalMap基准，包含六层能力层次（L0-L5），从原子空间事实到生成世界图。基于100个ProcTHOR家庭场景，覆盖8种多样语言和结构化文本控制，共39个任务族，1950个评估单元。评估13个不同规模和家族的LLMs，设置四个诊断轴：参考框架、阅读方向偏差、推理努力分配和幻觉。
light_analysis.result: 发现普遍L3推理悬崖：一旦基线原子准确率超过40%，所有模型的视角推理性能降至L0的一半以下。该悬崖跨语言、模型尺度和提示策略持续存在。人类在相同纯文本协议下复制相同失败模式，表明瓶颈源自文本工作记忆限制，而非LLM特有架构问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 纯文本空间推理应视为多轴世界建模问题，而非简单事实检索。研究揭示了LLMs在空间推理上的根本限制，表明当前模型无法有效利用文本进行空间世界模型构建。未来方向应探索多模态输入和scratchpad增强推理以突破工作记忆瓶颈。

title: Commit to the Bit: Reactive Reinforcement Learning Done Right
abstract: Reinforcement learning algorithms are commonly analyzed (and designed) under the Markov assumption. This is unrealistic, as most environments encountered in practice are either partially observable, or require function approximation that restricts the agent to access non-Markovian state features. We consider the problem of learning an optimal reactive policy in a finite environment with deterministic observations (or equivalently, hard state aggregation). We introduce a new algorithm, Committed Q-learning, and prove almost-sure convergence to the optimal reactive policy under an intuitive assumption we call rewire-robustness. This assumption is strictly weaker than the $q_\star$-realizability condition used in prior work. Our algorithm is a variant of classical Q-learning in which the behavior policy commits to a single action upon entering a feature, and only resamples actions when the observed feature changes. A crucial part of our analysis is the introduction of quasi-Markov environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Committed Q-learning算法，在非马尔可夫环境中实现最优反应策略的几乎必然收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习算法通常基于马尔可夫假设设计，但实际环境多为部分可观测或需函数近似，导致状态特征非马尔可夫。现有方法依赖较强的q*-realizability条件，难以推广。该研究旨在解决有限确定性观测环境下学习最优反应策略的问题，引入更弱的rewire-robustness假设。
light_analysis.method: 提出Committed Q-learning算法，是经典Q-learning的变体。行为策略在进入一个观测特征时承诺一个动作，直到观测特征改变才重新采样。引入准马尔可夫环境概念，用于分析非马尔可夫动态。在rewire-robustness假设下证明算法几乎必然收敛到最优反应策略。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了在rewire-robustness假设下，Committed Q-learning几乎必然收敛到最优反应策略。该假设严格弱于先前工作的q*-realizability条件，表明算法适用于更广泛的环境。实验部分摘要未提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为非马尔可夫环境下的强化学习提供了新的收敛保证，通过承诺机制有效处理观测特征的非马尔可夫性。未来可扩展到随机观测或连续状态空间，实际应用包括机器人控制和游戏AI等需处理部分可观测性的场景。

title: Global Policy-Space Response Oracles for Two-Player Zero-Sum Games
abstract: The Policy-Space Response Oracles (PSRO) framework scales equilibrium computation to large zero-sum games by iteratively expanding a restricted strategy set using deep reinforcement learning (DRL). A central challenge is to construct, under limited computational budgets, a small strategy population whose induced game well approximates the full game. Existing PSRO variants typically expand the population using best responses to meta-strategies computed from restricted-game payoffs, which can lead to inefficient expansions that provide limited global improvement. We propose to guide population expansion by directly evaluating the post-expansion population quality. Specifically, we adopt Population Exploitability (PE) to measure how well a restricted strategy set represents the full game, and introduce a two-phase exploration--selection framework that explicitly minimizes PE during expansion. We instantiate this framework as Global PSRO, a practical DRL-based algorithm that efficiently generates candidate responses and estimates PE via parameter-sharing conditional neural networks. Experiments across multiple two-player zero-sum games show that Global PSRO achieves lower exploitability and approximates Nash equilibria with significantly fewer policy iterations than prior PSRO methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Global PSRO，通过直接最小化人口可利用性（PE）指导策略空间响应基元的扩展，提高均衡计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: PSRO框架通过迭代扩展受限策略集来计算大规模零和博弈的均衡，但现有变体通常使用对受限博弈元策略的最佳响应来扩展种群，可能导致低效扩展，仅提供有限的全局改进。需要一种能直接评估扩展后种群质量的方法，以更高效地逼近完整博弈。
light_analysis.method: 提出Global PSRO算法，采用两阶段探索-选择框架，显式最小化人口可利用性（PE）来指导扩展。使用参数共享的条件神经网络高效生成候选响应并估计PE，结合深度强化学习。该方法通过直接优化种群表示能力，避免了传统PSRO的局部性缺陷。
light_analysis.result: 在多个两人零和博弈实验中，Global PSRO相比现有PSRO变体，实现了更低的可利用性，并以显著更少的策略迭代次数逼近纳什均衡。验证了直接优化PE能有效提升种群质量，加速均衡计算。
light_analysis.conclusion: Global PSRO通过直接优化人口可利用性，为PSRO框架提供了一种更高效的扩展策略，显著提升了大规模零和博弈中均衡计算的效率。该方法具有广泛的学术价值，可应用于复杂博弈环境。未来可探索扩展到多玩家或通用博弈设置。

title: EchoAvatar: Real-time Generative Avatar Animation from Audio Streams
abstract: Real-time synthesis of high-fidelity 3D character motion from audio is a pivotal component for next-generation interactive avatars and virtual assistants. However, most existing approaches are limited to offline processing of complete audio sequences or are constrained to specific domains, rarely handling both speech and music effectively. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework designed to generate continuous, coherent full-body motion from streaming speech and music with low latency. Central to our approach is a unified streaming architecture capable of synthesizing continuous motion from incremental audio inputs. We employ a robust training strategy that enforces strong audio dependency, allowing the model to seamlessly generalize across conversational speech and rhythmic music without requiring explicit domain labels or mode switching. Additionally, we explored Reinforcement Learning to refine the quality of online generation. Furthermore, we bridge reactive animation with intent-driven behavior via a tool-call interface that allows upstream Large Language Models to inject explicit semantic control. By combining this controllability with stream audio-driven synthesis, our framework serves as a plug-and-play solution for transforming voice agents into interactive humanoid avatars. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art realtime baselines in motion quality and synchronization while maintaining the flexibility required for live deployment. Our code, pre-trained models, and videos are available at https://robinwitch.github.io/EchoAvatar-Page.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EchoAvatar框架，实现从流式音频实时生成高保真3D角色全身运动，支持语音和音乐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法多限于离线处理完整音频或特定领域，难以同时处理语音和音乐，且缺乏实时性。EchoAvatar旨在解决实时流式音频驱动的连续全身运动生成问题，提升交互式虚拟角色的自然性和响应速度。
light_analysis.method: 采用统一流式架构，从增量音频输入连续生成运动；通过鲁棒训练策略强制音频依赖，泛化语音和音乐；利用强化学习优化在线生成质量；引入工具调用接口让LLM注入语义控制，结合反应式与意图驱动行为。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，EchoAvatar在运动质量和音频同步性上优于现有实时基线，支持低延迟在线部署，且无需领域标签即可无缝切换语音和音乐。
light_analysis.conclusion: EchoAvatar实现了音频驱动的实时全身动画生成，作为即插即用解决方案可增强虚拟助手和交互式角色的表现力。未来可探索更复杂的动作控制和多模态融合。

title: LV-OSD: Language-Vision-Complementary Open-Set Object Detection
abstract: Object detection is an important task in computer vision, which aims to detect the objects of interest. through the given category list or query images. In this work, we propose a new problem of language-visual-complementary open-set object detection (LV-OSD), i.e., using the flexible text-based and/or image-based prompts to specify the desired object categories. This setting is more common and practical in real-world applications. For this purpose, we design a dual-branch detection framework, LVDor, which can simultaneously accept both text and image prompts. Specifically, we first build the Multi-modal Prompts (MPr) containing various text descriptions and image samples for each category. Subsequently, to bridge the semantic gap among the input image, text prompts, and image prompts, we design a Target-guided Prompt Dynamic Weighting (TPDW) module. Guided by the prior information of the target image, this module dynamically produces the text and image prompts that best align with the target semantics, achieving precise alignment and effectively reducing the discrepancy between the two modalities, thereby accommodating the LV-OSD setting. We also propose a simple Prompt Random Masking (PRM) mechanism during training to simulate the arbitrary combination of text and/or image prompts in testing. Extensive experimental results verify our problem formulation's reasonability and our method's effectiveness. Prompts and code will be released publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语言-视觉互补开放集目标检测问题，设计双分支框架LVDor，通过动态权重模块对齐多模态提示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放集目标检测依赖单一模态（文本或图像）提示，但实际应用中用户可能灵活使用文本、图像或两者结合来描述目标类别。这种多模态提示的缺乏限制了检测系统的实用性。因此，本文提出LV-OSD问题，旨在实现同时接受文本和图像提示的目标检测，以提升现实场景中的适应性和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 提出LVDor双分支检测框架，包含多模态提示（MPr）构建目标类别的文本描述和图像样本。核心创新是目标引导提示动态加权（TPDW）模块，利用目标图像先验信息动态生成与目标语义最匹配的文本和图像提示，减少模态间语义差异。训练时采用提示随机掩码（PRM）机制模拟测试时任意组合的提示输入。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验验证了问题设定的合理性和方法的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实验表明框架能处理语言-视觉互补的开放集检测，与现有方法相比具有优势。代码和提示将公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次定义LV-OSD问题并设计有效解决方案，通过动态加权对齐多模态提示，提升了开放集检测的实用性和灵活性。工作为多模态目标检测提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的提示组合和实时应用。

title: Every9D-21M: Large-Scale Real-World 9D Canonicalization of Everyday Objects
abstract: Estimating the 9D pose of everyday objects from a single real-world image remains challenging. This is largely due to the lack of large-scale supervision. Most existing datasets either rely heavily on synthetic renderings or provide limited coverage of real-world objects: the largest real-world 9D pose dataset to date contains only 17K annotated objects across 9 categories. We address this gap with Every9D-21M, a dataset of 9D pose annotations for 21.8M real-world images from 109K object- centric videos spanning 700 everyday object categories - two orders of magnitude larger than prior real-world 9D pose benchmarks in both image and category count. To achieve this scale, we leverage object-centric videos by reconstructing object- level point clouds via multi-view geometry and aligning similar instances into a shared canonical coordinate frame. Canonical poses are manually annotated for only a small set of reference objects (fewer than 0.01% of all images) and propagated to the remaining instances via cross-instance alignment. All propagated canonical poses are then verified from multiple viewpoints. We further introduce cross-category orientation rules that induce category-level symmetries, enabling symmetry-aware evaluation. Beyond establishing dedicated training and evaluation splits as a benchmark for 9D pose foundation models, we show that training on Every9D-21M improves performance on ImageNet3D and PASCAL3D+, and generalizes to HANDAL substantially better than training on ImageNet3D. Data and code are available at https://github.com/GenIntel/Every9D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Every9D-21M，一个包含2180万张真实图像、700个类别的9D姿态数据集，规模比现有真实世界基准大两个数量级。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有9D姿态数据集要么依赖合成渲染缺乏真实性，要么真实世界样本极少（最大仅1.7万标注对象、9个类别），限制了大模型训练效果。本文旨在提供大规模真实标注数据，推动9D姿态估计在真实场景中的性能提升。
light_analysis.method: 利用物体中心视频，通过多视图几何重建物体点云并跨实例对齐到规范坐标系。仅手动标注少量参考对象（<0.01%图像）的规范姿态，通过跨实例对齐传播到其余图像，并从多视角验证。引入跨类别方向规则诱导对称性，实现对称感知评估。
light_analysis.result: 数据集规模显著超越先前基准（图像2180万 vs 1.7万，类别700 vs 9）。训练Every9D-21M在ImageNet3D和PASCAL3D+上提升姿态估计性能，在HANDAL上泛化能力远超ImageNet3D训练。提供专用训练/测试分割作为基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: Every9D-21M填补了大规模真实9D姿态数据空白，验证了跨实例对齐策略的有效性，显著提升下游任务性能。该数据集可促进9D姿态基础模型的研究，但手动标注的少量参考对象和传播误差可能是局限，未来可探索更自动化标注或融合合成数据。

title: Dynamic Topic Modeling with a Higher-Order Hypergraphical Representation
abstract: Dynamic topic modeling is widely used to analyze evolving trends in scientific literature, medical records, and social media. Traditional topic models represent each topic through a single probability vector on the multinomial simplex and implicitly couple word occurrence and repetition within one probabilistic mechanism. However, this formulation restricts the dependence structure among words and overlooks informative higher-order interactions, particularly in dynamic corpora with overlapping semantics. To address these limitations, we introduce a hypergraph representation of text where each document is modeled as a hyperedge connecting all co-occurring words, with repetition intensities encoded as node weights. This representation naturally separates word occurrence from repetition and induces a novel hypergraph-based multinomial distribution with a nonlinear normalization depending on the observed word set of each document. Building on this likelihood, we develop a dynamic topic modeling framework via structured low-rank factorizations with explicit temporal regularization on topic-word profiles. Moreover, we establish local convergence guarantees and derive non-asymptotic error bounds despite the intrinsic nonconvexity induced by bilinear factorization and document-specific nonlinear normalization. Numerical experiments on synthetic data and an application to the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) corpus demonstrate consistent improvements over existing multinomial-based topic models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出超图表示文本的动态主题模型，分离词共现与重复，增强高阶交互建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统动态主题模型用单一概率向量表示主题，隐含耦合词的出现和重复，限制了词间依赖结构，尤其在语义重叠的动态语料中忽略了信息丰富的高阶交互。现有方法无法充分捕捉词共现的复杂关系，导致主题演化建模不准确。因此，需要一种能够显式分离词出现与重复并保留高阶交互的表示方法，以提升动态主题建模的性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于超图的文本表示，每个文档建模为超边连接所有共现词，节点权重编码词重复强度，从而分离词出现与重复。引入超图多项式分布，其非线性归一化依赖于每个文档的观测词集。在此基础上，通过结构化低秩分解和显式时间正则化构建动态主题模型，学习主题-词分布的时间演化。理论方面，建立了局部收敛保证和非渐近误差界，克服了双线性分解和文档特定非线性归一化带来的非凸性挑战。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上验证了模型恢复生成主题的能力，并在ICLR会议论文语料库上进行了应用。与基于多项式的传统动态主题模型（如DMR、CTM等）相比，所提模型在主题一致性、预测似然等指标上取得一致改进。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但表明超图表示有效提升了建模性能，特别是在捕捉高阶词共现和时间动态方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过超图表示重新定义了文本的生成过程，为动态主题建模提供了新视角。理论上的收敛保证和误差界增强了模型的可靠性。实验表明，该方法在真实语料上优于传统模型，具有在科学文献分析、社交媒体趋势挖掘等领域的应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的非线性归一化计算方法或扩展到其他结构化数据。

title: Parameter-Efficient Generative Modeling with Controlled Vector Fields
abstract: We introduce a continuous-time generative modeling framework, motivated by the Chow-Rashevskii theorem, that builds expressive flows from a small set of fixed vector fields and learned scalar controls. Instead of learning an unconstrained high-dimensional vector field, our framework constructs the velocity by modulating fixed vector fields with learned scalar control functions. When the fixed fields are bracket-generating, their Lie algebra spans the ambient space, providing a mechanism for expressive transport with only a small number of learned control channels and offering a parameter-efficient geometric alternative to standard vector-field parameterizations. This decoupled formulation yields a structured and interpretable generative model in which the number of learned scalar output channels can be chosen independently of the ambient dimension. We formulate an expressivity principle showing that, under suitable controllability and well-posedness assumptions, such controlled flows can transport a source distribution to a target distribution. We train the resulting model using a continuous-normalizing-flow likelihood objective and present proof-of-concept experiments on synthetic distributions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于Chow-Rashevskii定理的参数高效生成建模框架，通过固定向量场与学习标量控制构建表达流。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型通常需要学习无约束的高维向量场，导致参数数量庞大且效率低下。本文旨在探索一种参数高效的替代方案，利用固定向量场的几何结构，通过少量学习控制通道实现复杂分布变换，解决高维生成模型中的参数冗余和可解释性不足问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于Chow-Rashevskii定理，框架使用一组固定且括号生成的向量场，通过学习标量控制函数调制这些场来构建速度场。控制通道数独立于环境维度，实现参数高效。采用连续标准化流似然目标训练，确保模型可逆和概率密度计算。
light_analysis.result: 在合成分布上进行了概念验证实验，表明该框架能够有效地从源分布传输到目标分布。摘要未提供具体数值结果或与基线方法的对比，但证明了方法的可行性和生成高质量样本的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种结构化和可解释的生成模型，通过固定向量场与标量控制解耦，显著减少参数数量。该工作为高维生成任务提供了参数高效的几何替代方案，未来可扩展到真实数据集和更复杂的可控生成场景。

title: Entropy Distribution as a Fingerprint for Hallucinations in Generative Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often generate factually incorrect outputs, commonly termed hallucinations, that undermine trust and limit deployment in high-stakes settings. Existing hallucination detection methods typically require multiple forward passes, or access to model internals. In this work, we provide theoretical background and empirical evidence that the distribution of token-level entropies, beyond the mean captured by perplexity or length-normalised entropy, serves as a fingerprint of hallucination, with distributional shape and tail behaviour carrying independent signal. We formalize hallucination detection as a statistical hypothesis test and propose the Calibrated Entropy Score (CES), a lightweight algorithm requiring only a single forward pass and black-box access to token logits. CES combines the mean signal with the maximum signal of the generated entropy through a calibrated reference CDF, producing scores that are directly comparable across models and tasks. We establish finite-sample calibration guarantees via a novel random-length Dvoretzky--Kiefer--Wolfowitz inequality, and also prove that CES detects hallucinations with probability converging to one exponentially fast in the generation length. Across eight QA benchmarks and ten generator models spanning open-source and API access models, CES achieves the highest detection performance among all single-pass black-box methods while providing formal error guarantees that existing heuristics lack. Remarkably, CES is statistically indistinguishable from multi-sample methods that require far greater computational cost, closing the gap between lightweight and expensive detection and making it suitable for real-time, large-scale deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出校准熵分数(CES)，通过单次前向传递和黑盒访问token logits检测LLM幻觉，具有统计保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型常生成事实不正确的输出（幻觉），削弱信任并限制高风险部署。现有检测方法通常需要多次前向传递或访问模型内部，计算成本高或依赖特定模型架构。本研究旨在开发一种轻量级、只需单次前向传递和黑盒访问的方法，同时提供形式化的错误保证，以支持实时、大规模部署。
light_analysis.method: 论文形式化幻觉检测为统计假设检验，提出校准熵分数(CES)。核心创新在于利用token级熵的完整分布（而非仅均值）作为幻觉指纹，通过校准参考累积分布函数(CDF)合并均值和最大熵信号。利用随机长度Dvoretzky-Kiefer-Wolfowitz不等式提供有限样本校准保证，并证明CES检测概率随生成长度指数收敛到1。方法仅需单次前向传递和黑盒访问logits。
light_analysis.result: 在8个问答基准和10个生成器模型（包括开源和API访问模型）上，CES在所有单次前向传递黑盒方法中取得最高检测性能。统计上，CES与需要更高计算成本的多样本方法无显著差异，弥合了轻量级与昂贵检测方法之间的差距。提供了现有启发式方法缺乏的形式化错误保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: CES提供了一种轻量级、可扩展的幻觉检测方法，兼具理论保证和实际有效性。它无需多次生成或模型内部信息，仅依赖单次前向传递，适用于实时大规模部署。未来可能进一步优化校准过程或扩展到其他生成任务。潜在局限性包括对校准数据的依赖和不同任务的自适应调整。

title: MORI-Seg: Learning Morphological Geometry for Instance Segmentation without Instance Annotations
abstract: Instance-level quantification of kidney functional units is essential for morphometric analysis, yet most publicly available pathology datasets provide only semantic segmentation annotations, where adjacent structures of the same class are merged into single regions. This prevents reliable instance-level analysis and limits downstream quantitative studies. Existing heuristic post-processing methods often yield suboptimal instance separation, particularly in crowded and adherent regions, while deep learning-based instance segmentation approaches typically require intensive instance-level annotations that are costly and labor-intensive to obtain. We propose MORI-Seg, a deep learning framework that enables instance segmentation without requiring instance-level annotations. Instead of heuristic splitting or instance supervision, MORI-Seg learns morphology-aware geometric representations directly from semantic masks by jointly modeling object-centric distance fields and boundary-band representations to encode interior structure and contact interfaces. A class-conditioned feature disentanglement module further promotes intra-instance coherence and inter-instance separation. Under semantic-only supervision, MORI-Seg decomposes connected semantic regions into distinct instance masks in an end-to-end manner. Experiments demonstrate improved instance separation accuracy and more reliable morphometric quantification compared with classical post-processing pipelines and representative semantic-to-instance learning approaches. The official implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/ddrrnn123/MORI-Seg.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MORI-Seg，无需实例标注，从语义掩码学习形态感知几何表示实现端到端实例分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 肾脏功能单元实例级定量对形态分析至关重要，但公开病理数据集仅有语义标注，同类相邻结构合并，导致无法可靠实例分析。现有启发式后处理在拥挤区域分割效果差，深度学习方法需大量实例标注成本高。因此，亟需一种无需实例标注即可进行实例分割的方法。
light_analysis.method: MORI-Seg框架通过联合建模对象中心距离场和边界带表示，从语义掩码编码内部结构与接触界面，学习形态感知几何表示。类别条件特征解耦模块增强实例内一致性及实例间分离性。在仅语义监督下，端到端将连通语义区域分解为独立实例掩码。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MORI-Seg在实例分离精度和形态测量定量上优于经典后处理流水线及代表性语义到实例学习方法。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但展示了更可靠的实例分解效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: MORI-Seg首次实现无需实例标注的实例分割，通过形态感知几何表示有效解决语义区域粘连问题。该工作对病理图像定量分析具有重要学术与应用价值，未来可拓展至其他粘连场景或结合弱监督学习。

title: Category-Level 3D Correspondence in Camera Space via Morphable Object Priors
abstract: Understanding 3D objects from images is fundamental to robotics and AR/VR applications. While recent work has made progress in category-level pose estimation, current representations fail to capture the fine-grained semantics needed for reasoning about object parts, functions, and interactions. In this work, we study category-level 3D correspondence in camera space -- predicting, from a single image, 3D locations that remain consistent across instances within a category -- and show that it can emerge without explicit correspondence supervision by learning a shared morphable object prior. To enable research in this direction, we introduce HouseCorr3D, the first large-scale benchmark for monocular category-level 3D correspondence with 178k images across 50 household object categories, 280 unique instances, and 3D keypoint annotations directly on CAD models. Crucially, HouseCorr3D provides amodal correspondence labels for occluded regions and explicit symmetry annotations, addressing key limitations of existing datasets. We further propose Morpheus, a method that learns morphable category-level shape priors by disentangling canonical shape, deformation, and object pose. Through this shared canonical grounding, semantically meaningful 3D correspondences in camera space emerge implicitly. These emerging 3D correspondences set a new state of the art on HouseCorr3D, demonstrating that semantic 3D object understanding can arise without direct correspondence supervision. Data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/GenIntel/HouseCorr3D.
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures. Data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/GenIntel/HouseCorr3D

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过可变形类别先验从单张图像学习类别级3D对应关系的方法Morpheus和基准数据集HouseCorr3D。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有类别级姿态估计方法无法捕捉细粒度语义，如物体部件、功能和交互。缺乏大规模基准和对应关系标注，特别是遮挡区域和对称性。论文旨在通过无监督方式学习类别级3D对应关系，解决上述问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Morpheus方法，学习可变形类别形状先验，通过解耦规范形状、变形和物体姿态。利用共享的规范空间，隐式生成相机空间中有语义意义的3D对应点。引入HouseCorr3D数据集，包含50类178k图像，提供遮挡区域的模态对应和对称标注。
light_analysis.result: Morpheus在HouseCorr3D上达到新最优性能，证明无需直接对应监督即可实现类别级3D对应。具体指标摘要未明确，但指出超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了从单张图像无需直接对应监督学习语义3D物体理解的可行性，为机器人、AR/VR提供新范式。数据集和代码开源促进研究。局限性可能包括依赖类别先验和泛化能力。

title: AI, Take the Wheel: What Drives Delegation and Trust in Human-Computer Cooperative Question Answering?
abstract: AI systems are fallible, and humans can make mistakes in deciding whether to trust AI over their own judgment. Thus, improving human-AI collaboration requires understanding when, why, and how humans decide to rely on AI. We study two distinct reliance decisions: the delegation choice -- deciding when to let AI act autonomously without knowing its output, and the adoption choice -- evaluating AI suggestions and deciding how to use them. Both of these decoupled reliance patterns shape collaboration, but prior work rarely studies them together in realistic settings with the same users. We address this gap by studying collaborative human--AI teams competing in a question-answering game in which humans can choose when and how to work with AI agents to win. Our 24 matches pair 23 expert humans with 16 AI agents, capturing 387 delegation and 1440 adoption decisions. While human--AI collaboration performs better than either AI or humans alone, humans make suboptimal collaboration decisions, both under-relying on correct AI suggestions (3.9% of opportunities missed) and over-relying when AI misleads them (1.7%). Both parties contribute wrong answers: reported model confidence is near chance when humans and AI disagree, while confirmation bias drives higher under-reliance (64.5%) when an AI suggestion agrees with humans' initial incorrect answer. To close this gap, we recommend calibrated confidence, evidence-grounded explanations, and mechanisms that help users refine trust.
comment: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 研究人类与AI在问答协作中的委托与采纳决策，揭示信任偏差并建议校准机制。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统可能出错，人类也难以判断是否信任AI。理解人类何时及为何依赖AI至关重要。已有研究分别探讨委托（让AI自主行动且不知其输出）和采纳（评估AI建议并使用）两种决策，但很少在真实场景中同时研究。本文通过问答游戏协作实验，填补这一空白，旨在揭示人类在协作中的次优决策模式及其原因。
light_analysis.method: 设计问答游戏，人类可决定何时及如何与AI代理协作。实验包含24场比赛，23名专家人类与16个AI代理配对，收集387次委托和1440次采纳决策。通过分析人类在AI建议正确或错误时的依赖行为，量化次优决策（如仅3.9%的正确建议被忽略，1.7%的错误建议被采纳），并探究模型置信度校准和确认偏误的影响。
light_analysis.result: 人类-AI协作整体表现优于单独人类或AI，但人类存在次优协作决策：对正确AI建议的依赖不足（错过3.9%机会），对错误AI建议的过度依赖（1.7%）。当人类与AI意见分歧时，模型置信度接近随机水平；当AI建议与人类初始错误答案一致时，确认偏误导致更高的依赖不足（64.5%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了协作中人类信任决策的双重偏差，建议通过校准的置信度、基于证据的解释和帮助用户调整信任的机制来改善协作。研究对设计更有效的AI协作系统具有重要实践价值，未来可探索动态信任校准方法以减少次优决策。

title: Building Community-Centred NLP Resources for Puno Quechua
abstract: The preservation of under-resourced languages requires digital tools and resources shaped by and for their speakers. We present the first dedicated ASR resources for Puno Quechua (ISO 639-3: qxp): (1) the largest speech corpus for any single Quechua variety, consisting in 66 hours of recordings for scripted and spontaneous speech (including 36 hours of manually transcribed and validated data), collected via a participatory design campaign; (2) the first systematic ASR benchmark for Puno Quechua, evaluating state-of-the-art models and fine-tuning Whisper-base, wav2vec2-base, and XLS-R-300M, with and without continued pre-training (CPT); (3) an open release of all datasets and fine-tuned models.
comment: Sixth Workshop on NLP for Indigenous Languages of the Americas (AmericasNLP 2026), co-located with ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文为Puno Quechua构建首个专用ASR资源，包括最大语音语料库和系统基准，强调社区参与和开放发布。
light_analysis.motivation: 低资源语言的数字化保护需要由社区主导的工具和资源。现有方法缺乏针对Puno Quechua的专用ASR数据集和评估，限制了该语言的技术发展。本工作通过参与式设计收集语音数据，旨在填补这一空白，促进语言数字化生存。
light_analysis.method: 通过参与式设计活动收集66小时语音数据（包括脚本和自发言语，其中36小时人工转录验证）。基于此语料库，微调Whisper-base、wav2vec2-base和XLS-R-300M模型，并使用继续预训练（CPT）策略。所有数据集和微调模型均开源发布。
light_analysis.result: 构建了首个单克丘亚变体最大语音语料库（66小时），并建立了系统ASR基准。微调模型在有无CPT条件下均进行了评估，但摘要未报告具体性能数值。开源资源将推动低资源语言ASR研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为Puno Quechua提供了关键的ASR基础设施，验证了社区参与式方法在低资源语言NLP中的有效性。开源资源可促进相关研究，未来可扩展到其他克丘亚变体，但摘要未讨论局限性。

title: IRDS: Interpretable RLVR Data Selection via Verifier-Coupled Sparse Autoencoder Coverage
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a key technique for en- hancing LLM reasoning, yet its data ineffi- ciency remains a major bottleneck. Existing methods address this problem only partially, each missing at least one of subset-level cov- erage, verifier signal use, or interpretability. To address this gap, we present IRDS (Inter- pretable RLVR Data Selection), which selects RLVR training instances on a sparse autoen- coder (SAE) cluster basis so the selection itself is auditable on recognizable problem motifs. To select instances the model both fails on and can still learn from, we introduce a verifier- coupled coverage objective on the SAE basis and solve it by greedy log-determinant max- imization. Experiments on three instruction- tuned models and six math reasoning bench- marks show that IRDS achieves the highest overall accuracy, exceeding the strongest base- line by +3.9/+4.0 pp on the two Qwen models and by +0.5 pp on Llama-3.1-8B, while run- ning an order of magnitude cheaper than the trajectory-based baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释的IRDS方法，基于稀疏自编码器簇和验证器耦合覆盖，高效选择RLVR训练数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）是提升LLM推理能力的关键技术，但数据效率低下是主要瓶颈。现有方法仅部分解决问题，未能同时兼顾子集覆盖、验证器信号利用和可解释性。因此需要一种可审计的数据选择方法，既能识别模型失败但仍可学习的实例，又能保持可解释性。
light_analysis.method: IRDS方法以稀疏自编码器（SAE）簇为基础选择RLVR训练实例，使得选择过程在可识别的题目模式上可审计。引入验证器耦合的覆盖目标，通过贪心对数行列式最大化求解，从而选出模型失败且仍能学习的实例。该方法结合SAE的表示能力和验证器信号，实现高效数据选择。
light_analysis.result: 在三个指令微调模型（Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct、Qwen-2.5-14B-Instruct、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct）和六个数学推理基准上，IRDS取得最高整体准确率，超过最强基线：Qwen模型分别提升3.9和4.0个百分点，Llama-3.1-8B提升0.5个百分点。同时运行成本比基于轨迹的基线低一个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: IRDS通过SAE基和验证器耦合覆盖实现了可解释且高效的RLVR数据选择，显著提升数学推理性能并降低成本。方法在多个模型上验证了有效性，为LLM推理的数据选择提供了新思路。未来工作可探索更复杂的覆盖优化策略或扩展到其他任务。

title: PointQ-Bench: Benchmarking Diagnostic and Interpretable Point Cloud Quality Assessment
abstract: Point cloud quality plays a critical role in 3D acquisition, reconstruction, rendering, and perception, yet existing point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) research remains largely centered on scalar score prediction. In practical inspection scenarios, quality assessment often involves identifying defects, characterizing dominant issue types, assessing downstream usability, and providing evidence-supported descriptions, which are not explicitly evaluated by current benchmarks. We introduce PointQ-Bench, a benchmark designed to extend PCQA from scalar scoring toward comprehensive quality understanding. PointQ-Bench consists of 3,083 point clouds spanning authentic scans, simulated distortions, and AI-generated content, covering eight major issue types. Each sample is annotated with mean opinion scores (MOS), quality levels, issue tags, expert-grounded descriptions, and 12,332 question-answer pairs. The benchmark supports three perception-oriented tasks: anomaly sensing, defect diagnosis, and usability grading, as well as a cognition-oriented task of open-ended quality reporting. To evaluate free-form quality descriptions, we further propose SSFRQ-5D, a five-dimensional evaluation protocol validated through human-AI agreement analysis. Extensive experiments on 14 vision-language models and traditional PCQA baselines reveal a consistent perception-diagnosis gap: while current models exhibit emerging abilities in coarse defect perception, they struggle with grounded diagnosis and quality calibration. Strong 2D MLLMs generally outperform existing 3D VLMs, and the benefit of additional views or point-level inputs is non-uniform, varying across tasks, data sources, and models, particularly under boundary-ambiguous conditions. Overall, PointQ-Bench provides a diagnostic testbed for advancing reliable and interpretable point cloud quality understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PointQ-Bench基准，将点云质量评估从标量分数扩展至全面质量理解，涵盖缺陷感知、诊断、可用性分级及开放式质量报告。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有点云质量评估（PCQA）研究主要集中于标量分数预测，而实际检测场景需要识别缺陷、分类主导问题类型、评估下游可用性，并提供证据支持的描述。现有基准未明确评估这些方面，导致模型在实际应用中缺乏诊断能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含3,083个点云（真实扫描、模拟失真、AI生成）的数据集，覆盖8种主要问题类型，每样本标注MOS、质量等级、问题标签、专家描述及12,332个问答对。支持异常感知、缺陷诊断、可用性分级三个感知任务和开放性质量报告认知任务。提出SSFRQ-5D五维评估协议，用于评估自由形式质量描述。
light_analysis.result: 在14个视觉语言模型和传统PCQA基线上实验，发现感知-诊断差距：模型在粗粒度缺陷感知上有初步能力，但在基于证据的诊断和质量校准上困难。2D MLLMs通常优于3D VLMs，额外视图或点输入的收益不均匀，尤其在边界模糊条件下。
light_analysis.conclusion: PointQ-Bench为可靠且可解释的点云质量理解提供诊断测试床，揭示了现有模型的感知-诊断差距，未来可推动更全面的质量评估方法发展。

title: Learning to Label: A Reinforced Self-Evolving Framework for Semi-supervised Referring Expression Segmentation
abstract: Semi-supervised referring expression segmentation (SS-RES) aims to achieve precise pixel-level language grounding under limited annotation, yet suffers from limited supervision and unreliable pseudo-labels when exploiting unlabeled image-text pairs. In this work, we propose Learning to Label, a reinforced self-evolving framework (L2L) that casts pseudo-label construction as a learnable decision-making process. To build foundational understanding, we leverage a multimodal large language model to extract semantic-spatial priors, which are instantiated as initial soft segmentation proposals and elevated, together with textual cues, into learnable guidance signals that condition a hierarchical segmentation network. To ensure stable learning, reinforced pseudo-label selection is formulated as an exploratory decision process that adaptively rewards high-utility pixel-level supervision based on multimodal priors and model predictions. This reinforced self-evolving loop enables joint optimization of the segmentation model and pseudo-labels, progressively enhancing label reliability under sparse supervision. Extensive experiments on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg demonstrate improvements over existing methods, validating its effectiveness and generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出强化自进化框架L2L，将伪标签构建作为可学习决策过程，提升半监督指代表达分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督指代表达分割在有限标注下难以获得可靠伪标签，现有方法监督不足且伪标签噪声大。该任务需要精确像素级语言理解，人工标注成本高，而利用未标注数据时伪标签质量差，限制了模型性能。因此，亟需一种能够自适应生成高质量伪标签的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出L2L框架，首先利用多模态大语言模型提取语义-空间先验作为初始软分割提议，与文本线索结合作为可学习引导信号，条件化层次分割网络。然后，将伪标签选择建模为强化学习中的探索性决策过程，基于多模态先验和模型预测自适应奖励高实用性像素级监督。通过强化自进化循环联合优化分割模型和伪标签，逐步提升标签可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg数据集上进行大量实验，L2L在半监督设置下显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。具体改进包括分割精度提升和伪标签质量增强，但摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: L2L通过强化自进化框架有效解决了半监督指代表达分割中伪标签不可靠问题，实现了稀疏监督下的稳定学习。该研究为半监督视觉语言理解提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值，并为降低标注成本的应用场景提供了可行方案。未来可探索更高效的多模态先验提取或扩展到其他接地任务。

title: Bridging the Sampling Distribution Shift in Radio Map Estimation: A Trajectory-Aware Paradigm
abstract: Learning-based radio map estimation (RME) plays a critical role in UAV-assisted wireless sensing, enabling tasks such as coverage prediction and network optimization. Most current methods assume an independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.) training and testing setting based on random sampling. However, practical UAV measurements are collected sequentially along feasible trajectories, resulting in highly structured and spatially correlated patterns. This mismatch introduces a sampling distribution shift that increases the intrinsic difficulty of spatial field recovery and compromises the generalization of models trained under i.i.d. assumptions. To mitigate this issue, we propose a trajectory-aware training paradigm based on Stochastic-Triggered Trajectory-Based Sampling (ST-TBS), which preserves trajectory continuity while introducing sampling variability. Moreover, from a statistical perspective, we show that trajectory-based sampling reduces spatial diversity and increases information redundancy compared to random sampling. Extensive experiments on the RadioMapSeer and SpectrumNet datasets demonstrate that models trained with random sampling suffer significant performance degradation under trajectory-based observations, with RMSE increasing from 0.0391 to 0.2632 on SpectrumNet. Conversely, our proposed ST-TBS method effectively reduces the RMSE to 0.0571. These results highlight the necessity of aligning training and deployment sampling distributions for reliable RME.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轨迹感知的ST-TBS训练范式，解决无线电地图估计中因轨迹采样导致的分布偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有学习式无线电地图估计方法假设训练和测试数据独立同分布，但实际无人机测量沿轨迹顺序采集，产生结构化空间相关模式，导致采样分布偏移，影响模型泛化。这一问题重要，因为RME是无人机无线传感的关键任务，而现有方法未考虑这一实际偏差，导致性能下降。
light_analysis.method: 提出随机触发轨迹采样（ST-TBS）范式，在保留轨迹连续性的同时引入采样变异性，以模拟实际部署场景。从统计角度证明轨迹采样相比随机采样降低了空间多样性、增加了信息冗余。在RadioMapSeer和SpectrumNet数据集上进行实验，训练时分别使用随机采样和轨迹采样。
light_analysis.result: 随机采样训练模型在轨迹观测下RMSE从0.0391急剧上升至0.2632，表明严重分布偏移。而ST-TBS方法将RMSE有效降低至0.0571，与随机采样训练结果接近，验证了其对分布偏移的缓解作用，强调了训练和部署采样分布对齐的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了无线电地图估计中采样分布偏移问题，并提出ST-TBS范式解决该问题，显著提升模型在轨迹观测下的性能。具有重要学术价值：首次从统计角度分析轨迹采样的影响；实际价值：直接提升无人机无线传感的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂轨迹模式及自适应采样策略。

title: PIRS: Physics-Informed Reward Shaping for SAC-Based Building Energy Management
abstract: Occupant comfort and grid-aware energy efficiency are competing objectives whose joint optimization depends critically on how reward functions are specified in deep reinforcement learning (DRL) controllers for buildings. Yet reward design remains largely ad hoc: comfort terms are either hand-tuned heuristics or simple temperature-deviation proxies without explicit grounding in thermal-comfort physics. We present PIRS (Physics-Informed Reward Shaping), which replaces these ad-hoc comfort proxies with the ISO 7730 Predicted Mean Vote (PMV) formulation inside a weighted multi-objective reward for Soft Actor-Critic (SAC). By anchoring the comfort signal in the ISO 7730 PMV formulation, PIRS improves reward interpretability and provides a standards-grounded comfort proxy without changing any other component of the learning pipeline. We evaluate PIRS in CityLearn v2.1.2 (challenge 2022 phase 1) with a central SAC agent trained for 50k steps over five random seeds, and compare against a rule-based controller (RBC), a manually engineered reward (E2), an energy-only reward (E3), and a naive temperature-deviation comfort reward (E4). District-level key performance indicators (KPIs), reported as ratios versus RBC, show that PIRS attains cost, carbon, and electricity metrics on par with the manual baseline while substantially outperforming non-physics-grounded designs -- particularly on load ramping (1.78x vs. ~2.4x RBC) and daily peak demand. All DRL policies remain above RBC at this training budget; we interpret this gap honestly and position PIRS as an interpretable, standards-aligned foundation for reward design rather than a claim of dominance over classical control at limited compute.
comment: N pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on AI-Driven Energy Efficiency in Dynamic Systems (AI-DEEDS '26), co-located with ACM e-Energy / ACM Sustainability Week, Banff, AB, Canada, June 22-25, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出PIRS方法，将ISO 7730 PMV物理模型嵌入SAC奖励函数，提升建筑能源管理中舒适度奖励的可解释性和标准一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑深度强化学习控制中奖励函数设计通常依赖临时性启发式或简单温度偏差代理，缺乏热舒适物理基础，导致优化不准确且可解释性差。现有方法难以平衡居住者舒适度与电网节能的竞争目标。
light_analysis.method: PIRS基于Soft Actor-Critic框架，用ISO 7730预测平均投票（PMV）公式替换传统启发式舒适度奖励项，构建加权多目标奖励函数。该方法在不改变学习流程的前提下，提供符合标准的可解释舒适度代理，并在CityLearn v2.1.2模拟环境中进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在CityLearn v2.1.2中训练50k步（5个随机种子），与规则控制器及三种手动/启发式奖励对比。PIRS在成本、碳排放、电力指标上与手动基线（E2）持平，在负载斜坡（1.78倍RBC vs ~2.4倍）和每日峰值需求上显著优于非物理奖励设计，但仍低于RBC基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIRS提供了一种基于物理标准、可解释的奖励设计方法，为建筑DRL控制中的权衡优化奠定基础。当前DRL策略在有限计算预算下未超越经典控制，但PIRS可作为标准对齐的奖励设计参考，未来可扩展至更多物理约束和实际部署。

title: Proprio: Latent Self-Scoring and Inference-Time Refinement for Physically Plausible Video Generation
abstract: Modern video generative models produce visually impressive results, yet frequently violate basic physical principles. We propose Proprio, a training-free framework that enables a frozen video generator to assess and improve the physical plausibility of its own outputs. Inspired by proprioception, the biological sense of one's own movement, Proprio treats the model's flow residual under controlled latent perturbations as a self-scoring signal. Samples that are better explained by the generator's learned dynamics induce smaller and more stable residuals. We aggregate this signal across timesteps and perturbations, focus it on motion-relevant regions with a dynamic spatiotemporal mask, and use it for best-of-N search, gradient-based self-refinement, or both. Across text-to-video and image-to-video benchmarks, Proprio consistently improves physical plausibility, outperforming VLM-based scoring, and external world-model baselines in several settings. With TurboWan2.2, Proprio improves Physics-IQ from 32.2 to 37.5 (+16.5%) and VideoPhy2-hard physical commonsense from 45.6 to 55.0 (+20.6%). Human evaluation further shows that raters prefer Proprio-selected or refined videos for physical plausibility in roughly two-thirds of comparisons. These results suggest that frozen video generators contain actionable internal signals for evaluating and improving the physical plausibility of their own outputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Proprio框架，利用冻结视频生成器的内部流残差信号进行自评分和推理时细化，显著提升视频的物理合理性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代视频生成模型虽视觉效果好，但常违反物理规律（如重力、刚性）。现有方法依赖外部评分模型或世界模型，计算成本高且泛化能力有限。亟需一种无需训练、利用生成器内部信号的轻量级自评估与细化方法，以低成本提高视频物理合理性。
light_analysis.method: 受本体感觉启发，将视频生成器在受控潜在扰动下的流残差作为自评分信号（残差越小越稳定，物理越合理）。通过跨时间步和扰动聚合信号，并设计动态时空掩码聚焦运动区域。基于该信号进行best-of-N搜索或梯度自细化，无需修改生成器参数。框架适用于任何冻结的视频生成模型。
light_analysis.result: 在文本到视频（Physics-IQ）和图像到视频（VideoPhy2-hard）基准上，使用TurboWan2.2，Proprio将Physics-IQ从32.2提升至37.5（+16.5%），VideoPhy2-hard从45.6提升至55.0（+20.6%）。人类评估中约三分之二比较中偏好Proprio输出的物理合理性，优于VLM评分和外部世界模型基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了冻结视频生成器的内部信号可用于有效评估和提升自身输出的物理合理性。Proprio无需训练、外部知识或模型，具备强实用性和泛化性。未来可探索更高效的信号聚合策略及应用于更广泛的生成任务。

title: VidPrism: Heterogeneous Mixture of Experts for Image-to-Video Transfer
abstract: With the rapid development of pre-training technologies, adapting large-scale Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for video understanding \emph{\ie} image-to-video transfer learning has become a dominant paradigm. To achieve superior performance, it raises as an effective strategy among recent advances to employ Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) to enhance VLMs' temporal modeling capabilities. However, conventional MoE designs suffer from expert homogenization, where all experts act as identical generalists, inefficiently learning spatio-temporal features from undifferentiated video streams. To overcome this problem, we propose VidPrism, a novel heterogeneous temporal Mixture-of-Experts framework. VidPrism pioneers a division of labor by deploying functionally specialized experts, each assuming a role ranging from spatial understanding to temporal modeling. To feed these specialists appropriately, we introduce a content-aware, multi-rate sampling module that dynamically generates streams ranging from semantically rich to motion-focused representations, providing specialized inputs for experts. Furthermore, a dynamic, bidirectional fusion mechanism enables synergistic information exchange between these pathways, leading to a comprehensive video representation. Extensive experiments on various video recognition benchmarks demonstrate that VidPrism achieves state-of-the-art performance and effectively fosters expert specialization. Our source code is available at \href{https://github.com/Lrrrr549/VidPrism.git}{https://github.com/Lrrrr549/VidPrism.git}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VidPrism异构时序专家混合框架，通过功能专业化专家和内容感知采样解决专家同质化问题，实现图像到视频迁移学习的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 将大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）适应于视频理解（即图像到视频迁移学习）已成为主流范式。近期研究采用混合专家（MoE）增强时序建模能力，但传统MoE存在专家同质化问题，所有专家充当相同的通用角色，无法高效地从无差异化的视频流中学习时空特征。因此，需要一种能够实现专家分工和差异化输入的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出VidPrism异构时序MoE框架，核心创新包括：（1）部署功能专业化的专家，每个专家承担从空间理解到时序建模的不同角色；（2）引入内容感知的多速率采样模块，动态生成从语义丰富到运动聚焦的多速率表示流，为不同专家提供特化输入；（3）设计动态双向融合机制，实现路径间的协同信息交换，形成综合视频表示。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视频识别基准上进行大量实验，VidPrism取得了最先进的性能，并有效促进了专家专业化。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称超越现有方法。源代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: VidPrism通过异构专家分工和内容感知采样解决了传统MoE的专家同质化问题，显著提升了图像到视频迁移学习的性能。该方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，未来可探索更复杂的专家分工或扩展到其他视频任务。

title: When Seekers Are Hard to Help: Evaluating Emotional Support Dialogue Systems in Worst-Case Interactions
abstract: Emotional Support Dialogue Systems (ESDSes) are increasingly evaluated and trained with LLM-simulated seekers. However, such simulated seekers often behave as cooperative, average-case users who disclose clearly, respond constructively, and accept support within a few turns. This can lead to overly optimistic evaluation and obscure whether ESDSes can handle difficult help-seeking interactions. In this work, we study ESDS evaluation under worst-case interactions, where seekers are hard to help due to low engagement, resistance, limited self-disclosure, emotional volatility, or rigid negative interpretations. We first conduct an expert simulation study with eight experienced counselling professionals, who simulate difficult seekers, interact with existing Chinese ESDSes, provide scale ratings, and participate in semi-structured interviews. Based on this study, we derive worst-case seeker behaviours and identify key limitations of current systems. We then propose a worst-case evaluation framework consisting of an LLM-based worst-case seeker simulator and four worst-case-oriented metrics: Deep Emotional Understanding, Guided Exploration, Balanced Emotional Support, and Authentic and Grounded Support. Evaluating 17 systems, we find that nearly all models suffer substantial performance drops under worst-case interactions. Large general-purpose LLMs are generally more robust than specialised ESDSes, but even the strongest models struggle to sustain engagement and improve seekers' emotional states. Finally, we show that worst-case simulation can also generate useful training data, improving the robustness of smaller models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出最坏情况评估框架，揭示情感支持对话系统在困难交互下的性能显著下降，并展示最坏情况模拟数据可提升模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有情感支持对话系统（ESDS）使用LLM模拟合作型求助者进行评估，导致评估过于乐观，忽略了低参与度、抵抗、有限自我披露、情绪波动等困难交互。然而现实中求助者可能难以帮助，这影响了ESDS在实际应用中的有效性。因此，需要研究最坏情况下的评估方法，以更真实地反映系统能力。
light_analysis.method: 首先，邀请八位专业心理咨询师模拟困难求助者与中文ESDS交互，通过量表评分和半结构化访谈，总结出最坏情况下的求助者行为和系统关键局限性。基于此，提出最坏情况评估框架，包含一个基于LLM的最坏情况求助者模拟器和四个指标：深度情感理解、引导探索、平衡情感支持、真实与立足支持。利用该框架评估了17个系统，涵盖通用LLM和专用ESDS。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，几乎所有模型在最坏情况交互下性能大幅下降。大型通用LLM（如GPT系列）通常比专用ESDS更鲁棒，但即使最强模型也难以维持求助者参与和改善其情绪状态。同时，最坏情况模拟数据可用于训练，提升小模型的鲁棒性。具体数据未明确说明，但表明性能下降普遍存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有ESDS在处理困难交互时的显著缺陷，提出了系统化的最坏情况评估框架，为更真实的系统评测提供了工具。此外，证明了最坏情况模拟数据能增强模型鲁棒性，具有实用价值。未来工作可探索更全面的困难行为建模和跨语言适应性。

title: Why We Need Speech to Evaluate Speech Translation
abstract: Speech translation models are increasingly capable of preserving speech-specific information (e.g., speaker gender, prosody, and emphasis), yet evaluation metrics remain blind to such phenomena. We meta-evaluate both text- and speech-based quality estimation metrics on two contrastive datasets targeting gender agreement and prosody, and find that both fall short, even when given direct access to the speech signal. We then train SpeechCOMET, a family of quality estimation models with speech encoders, and evaluate a state-of-the-art SpeechLLM as a judge. Both match or exceed text-based COMET on standard quality estimation, but neither consistently assesses speech-specific phenomena. We identify three causes: (1) speech-specific features are not reliably preserved in current encoders, (2) models tend to ignore the speech source signal, and (3) quality estimation training data contains too few relevant examples. We release all models and code, and argue that progress requires dedicated speech-specific training data and models that genuinely condition on speech.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示当前语音翻译评估指标忽略语音特定信息（如性别一致性和韵律），指出需要专用训练数据和真正基于语音的评估模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 语音翻译模型已能保留语音特定信息（如说话人性别、韵律等），但现有评估指标主要基于文本，无法感知这些现象。这导致评估结果不能全面反映翻译质量，尤其对于需要语音信息的任务（如语音克隆、情感传递）。研究通过元评估发现，即使直接访问语音信号，文本和语音指标均表现不足，迫切需要开发能评估语音特定现象的指标。
light_analysis.method: 构建两个对比数据集，分别针对性别一致性和韵律现象，对现有文本和语音质量估计指标进行元评估。随后训练SpeechCOMET模型（集成语音编码器的质量估计模型），并评估顶级的SpeechLLM作为评判者。通过分析模型在标准质量评估和语音特定现象上的表现，揭示三种失效原因：语音特征编码不完整、模型忽略语音源信号、训练数据缺乏相关示例。所有模型和代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: SpeechCOMET和SpeechLLM在标准质量评估指标上匹配或超过文本COMET，但在性别一致性和韵律评估上均无法一致地识别语音特定现象。具体表现为：语音编码器未可靠保留语音特征，模型倾向于忽略源语音信号，且训练数据中相关示例稀缺。这表明当前方法在语音感知方面存在系统性缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究指出，要真正评估语音翻译中的语音特定信息，需要专门收集涵盖这些现象的平行语料，并设计能有效利用语音信号的模型架构。学术上，推动了语音翻译评估从单纯文本向多模态方向的拓展；实践上，为构建更可靠的语音翻译系统提供了指导。未来工作可聚焦于构建大规模多模态评估基准和开发更强的语音感知模型。

title: PhAME: Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing via Latent Diffusion
abstract: Small-molecule drug discovery requires simultaneous optimization of numerous properties of candidate molecules. These properties can be investigated through the analysis of high-dimensional biological signatures, such as cell morphology and transcriptomic perturbations, which provide a rich perspective on the underlying biological mechanisms. However, existing generative methods, which use those signatures for optimization, fail to meet two key requirements: providing precise guidance toward desired phenotypic signatures while maintaining structural proximity to a known hit. We introduce PhAME (Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing), a latent diffusion framework that overcomes this challenge by recasting molecular optimization as editing in the latent space of a pretrained graph-based VAE. Our central contribution is a compositional classifier-free guidance scheme with two independent scales, one for the phenotype-conditioning and one for similarity to the seed structure, allowing practitioners to control the tradeoff between these two objectives. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks, including docking score optimization and multimodal phenotypic generation, demonstrate that PhAME achieves state-of-the-art results while maintaining high chemical validity and novelty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhAME框架，利用潜在扩散模型实现分子编辑，同时优化表型特征和结构相似性。
light_analysis.motivation: 小分子药物发现需同时优化多个性质，现有生成方法无法精确引导至期望表型并保持与已知先导化合物的结构相似性。细胞形态和转录组扰动等高维生物信号提供了丰富机制视角，但现有方法未能满足这两个关键需求。
light_analysis.method: PhAME基于预训练图VAE的潜在空间，采用潜在扩散模型进行分子编辑。核心创新是组合分类器无关引导，包含两个独立尺度：一个控制表型条件，一个控制与种子结构的相似性，从而平衡两种目标。
light_analysis.result: 在对接得分优化和多模态表型生成等基准上，PhAME达到最先进结果，同时保持高化学有效性和新颖性，优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhAME实现了表型感知的分子编辑，平衡了表型条件与结构相似性，具有药物发现实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的条件引导或多目标优化。

title: Supervised Semantic Differential for Cross-Cultural Concept Analysis: A Case Study of Human Affect
abstract: Cross-cultural comparison of psychological meaning requires methods that go beyond word-level translation and examine how semantic dimensions are organized across languages. We introduce a cross-lingual extension of the Supervised Semantic Differential (SSD), which estimates supervised semantic gradients in embedding space and compares them across aligned multilingual word embeddings. The method tests gradient alignment and difference using permutation procedures and bootstrap intervals, and interprets residual differences through clustering around the difference gradient. We demonstrate the approach on Polish, English, and French affective norm lexicons, modeling Valence, Arousal, and Dominance where available. Affective dimensions were significantly recoverable across languages and model settings. Cross-lingual comparisons showed broad alignment together with structured residual differences: Valence appeared mostly shared, whereas Arousal and Dominance produced more interpretable contrasts involving bodily threat, aesthetic stimulation, internal emotionality, macro-level authority, and everyday control. Several clusters also reflected corpus-specific artifacts, underscoring the need for cautious interpretation. Cross-lingual SSD offers an explainable framework for testing semantic alignment, identifying divergence, and generating hypotheses about cross-cultural differences in psychological meaning.
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, excluding the appendices. Code to reproduce our results is available at https://github.com/przebor/Cross-Cultural-SSD
