light_analysis.overview: 提出跨语言监督语义微分方法，用于跨文化概念分析，以人类情感为例。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨文化比较心理意义需要超越词级翻译的方法，现有方法未能充分考察语义维度如何跨语言组织。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过估计语义梯度并比较多语言词嵌入，揭示情感维度在不同语言中的对齐与差异。
light_analysis.method: 引入跨语言扩展的监督语义微分（SSD），在嵌入空间中估计监督语义梯度，并比较对齐的多语言词嵌入。使用置换检验和bootstrap区间测试梯度对齐与差异，通过围绕差异梯度聚类解释残差差异。在波兰语、英语和法语情感规范词汇上建模效价、唤醒度和优势度。
light_analysis.result: 情感维度在跨语言和模型设置中显著可恢复。跨语言比较显示广泛对齐与结构化残差差异：效价大致共享，唤醒度和优势度产生更多可解释对比，涉及身体威胁、审美刺激等。部分聚类反映语料库伪影，需谨慎解读。
light_analysis.conclusion: 跨语言SSD提供一个可解释框架，用于测试语义对齐、识别分歧并生成关于心理意义跨文化差异的假设。该方法有助于理解情感概念的跨语言组织，但需注意语料库伪影的影响。

title: When Does Memory Help Multi-Trajectory Inference for Tool-Use LLM Agents?
abstract: Multi-trajectory inference for tool-use LLM agents - generating multiple reasoning attempts and selecting among them - benefits from transferring knowledge across attempts so that later ones avoid the pitfalls of earlier ones. Existing cross-trajectory memory methods (trajectory-level reflection, atomic fact extraction, raw observation injection) are each evaluated under a single inference strategy on a single task, making it unclear whether reported gains reflect properties of the memory abstraction or of the inference method. We propose a unified framework that decomposes memory along two axes -- the scope of transfer (within an expansion vs. across trajectories) and the abstraction of the transferred content -- and evaluate four methods under three inference strategies (best-of-N, beam search, MCTS) on four tool-use benchmarks spanning SQL, knowledge-graph, and CLI environments, in a verifier-free setting that matches the deployment regime of practical agents. The experiment matrix identifies the inference method as a confound: the same memory method produces statistically distinct results under different inference strategies on the same examples. Reflection reaches significance only under MCTS (not under best-of-N); within-expansion injection (conditioning each candidate on prior siblings' outcomes) helps only diversity-starved beam search; and atomic fact extraction is accuracy-neutral but shortens trajectories by 19-26% on tasks with reusable environmental structure.
comment: More evaluation and analysis are on the way

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架分解记忆方法的两个维度（转移范围和内容抽象），揭示推理策略是混淆变量，不同记忆方法在不同策略下效果不同。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨轨迹记忆方法（轨迹级反思、原子事实提取、原始观测注入）分别在单一任务和单一推理策略下评估，导致报告的性能提升无法区分是源于记忆抽象还是推理方法。实际工具使用LLM代理需要无验证者设置，且不同部署场景下推理策略选择影响记忆效果。论文旨在系统解耦记忆和推理策略的相互作用。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一框架，沿两个轴分解记忆：转移范围（扩展内 vs 跨轨迹）和内容抽象（原始观测、事实、反射）。在四种工具使用基准（SQL、知识图谱、CLI）上，评估四种记忆方法（反射、事实提取、观测注入等）与三种推理策略（best-of-N、束搜索、MCTS）的组合，采用无验证者设置。实验矩阵32种配置，每种配置多次运行以获取统计显著性。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示推理策略是混淆变量：相同记忆方法在不同策略下结果显著不同。反射仅在MCTS下显著提升，不在best-of-N下；扩展内注入（基于先前兄弟结果调节每个候选）仅帮助多样性不足的束搜索；原子事实提取对精度无影响但缩短轨迹19-26%。不同策略下记忆的有效性取决于任务环境结构可重用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统评估了记忆与推理策略的交互，指出未来研究应在多种推理策略下报告性能，并考虑部署策略选择。实际应用中需根据推理策略选择合适记忆方法：MCTS适用反射，束搜索适用扩展内注入，事实提取可减少成本。局限性包括未覆盖所有记忆方法和任务领域。

title: Analyzing Quality-Latency-Resource Trade-offs in a Technical Documentation RAG Assistant Using LoRA Adaptation
abstract: We study quality-latency-resource trade-offs in a documentation-grounded retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system that uses Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) of the generator. We build a manually verified benchmark of 5,144 question-answer pairs over the official Kubernetes documentation and combine it with a fixed hybrid-retrieval pipeline (BGE-M3 dense, BGE-M3 native sparse, Reciprocal Rank Fusion, cross-encoder reranking). Over this benchmark we ablate 20 LoRA configurations on Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct across rank and target-module choices, and evaluate each on token-level F1, LLM-judged groundedness and correctness (pass@4), inference latency, inference memory, and training cost, all reported with bootstrap 95% confidence intervals. Pareto analysis shows that LoRA adapters acting only on the q and v attention projections consistently dominate the front, while the 3B/8B choice mainly defines operating regime. A param-matched control comparison further indicates that the q/v advantage is structural rather than purely parametric. The benchmark, selected adapters, and code are available at https://github.com/EugPal/rag-lora-tradeoffs.
comment: 13-page main body plus extended appendix; 6 figures; benchmark, LoRA adapters, and code at https://github.com/EugPal/rag-lora-tradeoffs

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过LoRA微调分析RAG系统中质量、延迟和资源之间的权衡，发现仅对q和v注意力投影进行适配的LoRA配置在多目标优化中表现最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际部署RAG系统时，需要在生成质量、推理延迟和计算资源之间取得平衡。LoRA作为一种参数高效微调方法，其配置选择（如秩、目标模块）对性能的影响尚未得到系统研究。现有工作多关注单一指标，缺乏对多目标权衡的量化分析，且缺少人工验证的领域基准。本文旨在填补这一空白，为RAG系统的LoRA适配提供设计指导。
light_analysis.method: 构建基于Kubernetes官方文档的人工验证基准（5,144个问答对）。采用固定混合检索管线（BGE-M3稠密/稀疏检索、互逆排名融合、交叉编码器重排序）。在Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上消融20种LoRA配置（变化秩和目标模块），评估token级F1、LLM评判的接地性和正确性、推理延迟、推理内存及训练成本，并用bootstrap 95%置信区间报告。通过帕累托分析和参数匹配对照实验揭示结构优势。
light_analysis.result: 帕累托分析显示，仅对q和v注意力投影进行LoRA适配的配置在多目标（质量、延迟、资源）前沿中持续占优。3B/8B模型选择主要决定可达到的操作区间。参数匹配对照表明q/v优势源于结构而非纯参数数量。所有结果附有置信区间，提供量化权衡依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统量化了RAG系统中LoRA配置的质量-延迟-资源权衡，揭示了仅适配q/v投影的实用优越性。研究为实际部署提供了选择原则：优先调整q/v模块而非全注意力，并根据资源预算选择合适规模的基模型。公开的基准和代码可复现并延伸至其他领域。未来可探索自动化配置搜索及跨任务泛化性。

title: IFMTBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multilingual Translation Instruction Following
abstract: Modern translation workflows demand more than semantic equivalence. Users routinely require models to preserve JSON or HTML schemas, honor curated glossaries, disambiguate with provided context, and match prescribed registers, often several at once. Conventional metrics such as BLEU and xCOMET capture semantic fidelity but provide little signal on constraint adherence, while general instruction following benchmarks ignore the cross-lingual nature of translation. We introduce \bench, a benchmark for multilingual translation instruction following covering seven languages, with 4,506 single-constraint and 2,838 multi-constraint items spanning six constraint dimensions and five compositional patterns with instructions issued in all seven languages. Constraints are split into a gating subset verified by deterministic checkers and a continuous subset scored by a rubric-based LLM judge, combined under a multiplicative rule that resists reward hacking. Evaluating 15 models reveals systematic gaps that prior protocols miss: Instruction following scales with size more sharply than translation quality, glossary and structured-format constraints dominate the difficulty gradient, and general instruction following rankings correlate only weakly with translation behavior. Our benchmark are available at https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy-MT2/tree/main/IFMTBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IFMTBench基准，评估多语言翻译中的指令遵循能力，覆盖7种语言、6种约束维度，揭示传统指标忽略的系统性差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代翻译工作流要求模型不仅语义等价，还需遵循JSON/HTML结构、术语表、上下文消歧、语域匹配等多重约束。现有BLEU、xCOMET等指标仅捕获语义保真度，忽略约束遵循；通用指令遵循基准忽视翻译的跨语言特性。因此需要专门评估翻译指令遵循能力的基准，以发现模型在复合约束下的真实表现。
light_analysis.method: 构建IFMTBench，包含7种语言，共4,506个单约束和2,838个多约束项，覆盖6种约束维度和5种组合模式。约束分为门控子集（可验证）和连续子集（基于LLM评分），使用乘法规则组合以防止奖励黑客。评估15个模型，分析指令遵循与翻译质量、模型规模、难度梯度的关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：指令遵循能力随模型规模增长比翻译质量更显著；术语表和结构化格式约束主导难度梯度；通用指令遵循排名与翻译行为弱相关。系统揭示了传统协议遗漏的差距，表明IFMTBench能有效衡量翻译模型的约束遵循表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: IFMTBench为多语言翻译指令遵循提供了全面基准，填补了评估空白。其多约束设计和乘法评分规则可促进翻译模型在复合指令下的鲁棒性研究。未来可扩展更多语言和约束类型，并用于指导模型训练。基准已开源。

title: A Patient-Specific Pulmonary Arterial Tree Digital Twin to Extract Pulmonary Embolism Biomarkers
abstract: Pulmonary embolism, the obstruction of a pulmonary artery by a blood clot, is one of the leading causes of acute cardiovascular syndrome. In clinical practice, therapeutic decisions after diagnosis via computed tomography pulmonary angiography rely on risk stratification, which categorizes 30-day mortality risk into three categories. This stratification depends on the right-to-left ventricular diameter ratio and blood levels of two cardiac enzymes. However, blood biomarkers are not always available in emergency settings, and manual calculation of established severity scores - such as Qanadli and Mastora - is time-consuming and rarely performed in clinical routine practice. This study introduces an automated pipeline that models a directed graph representation of the pulmonary arterial tree, labeling its hierarchical structure and characterizing pulmonary embolism. The pipeline derives image-based biomarkers, including local artery-level features (morphological information, hierarchical position, clot volume, and resulting obstruction) and global patient-level biomarkers such as automatically calculated severity scores (Qanadli and Mastora) and the total embolic volume distribution by lobes and hierarchical levels. Using artificial-intelligence-generated binary masks of arteries, emboli, lungs, and lobes, it creates a patient digital twin of the arterial structure. Validation of the pipeline through comparison to an existing pipeline, anatomical expectations, and manual severity score calculations demonstrates the pipeline's ability to automatically generate anatomically accurate digital twins and severity scores with strong agreement. This supports the potential of these image-derived biomarkers to automatically provide rapid, precise information on thrombotic burden and spatial clot distribution.
comment: 11 pages + 2 pages of supplementary materials. Submitted to special issue of JBHI

light_analysis.overview: 提出自动化管道构建肺动脉树数字孪生，提取肺栓塞图像生物标志物并自动计算严重程度评分。
light_analysis.motivation: 肺栓塞是急性心血管综合征主因，风险分层依赖心室直径比和心脏酶水平，但血液生物标志物在急诊中不可得，手动计算Qanadli和Mastora评分耗时且少用。需要高效自动化的方法提取血栓生物标志物以支持快速决策。
light_analysis.method: 利用AI生成的动脉、栓塞、肺和叶的二进制掩膜，构建有向图表示肺动脉树层次结构。提取局部动脉特征（形态、层次、血栓体积、阻塞）和全局特征（自动计算的Qanadli/Mastora评分、栓塞体积按叶和层次分布），创建患者数字孪生。
light_analysis.result: 通过与现有管道、解剖预期及手动评分验证，管道能自动生成解剖准确的数字孪生和严重程度评分，一致性高。表明图像生物标志物可自动快速提供血栓负荷和空间分布的精确信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该自动化管道有效提取肺栓塞生物标志物，支持快速风险分层，具有临床实用价值。未来可优化实时性并拓展至多中心验证。

title: Explaining is Harder Than Predicting Alone: Evaluating Concept-based Explanations of MLLMs as ICL Visual Classifiers
abstract: In-context learning (ICL) enables multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to classify images from a few labelled examples. Yet, how these models use the provided context remains opaque. While Chain-of-Thought prompting is widely used, recent work argues that it may not reflect true internal computation.   In this paper, we systematically evaluate the concept-based explainability of frozen MLLMs under few-shot ICL using five conditions of increasing formal rigour, ranging from baseline classification to Description Logics (DL) axiom generation.   Evaluating four state-of-the-art MLLMs via an independent LLM-as-a-judge pipeline, we demonstrate that explaining is genuinely harder than predicting alone. Surprisingly, forcing models to generate formally structured, concept-based explanations degrades predictive accuracy monotonically (from 93.8% to 90.1%), contradicting the assumption that explicit reasoning universally aids performance.   However, when models successfully articulate class-discriminative visual features, explanation quality strongly correlates with correct predictions. Our findings suggest that while MLLMs excel at visual classification, they lack the specific instruction-tuning required for formal, machine-verifiable explainability.
comment: Accepted to the CompLearn Workshop at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估多模态大语言模型在少样本上下文学习中的概念可解释性，发现解释比预测更难且形式化解释会降低准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文学习使多模态大语言模型能从少量示例中分类图像，但模型如何使用上下文仍不透明。尽管思维链提示被广泛使用，近期研究质疑其是否反映真实内部计算。现有方法缺乏对模型可解释性的严格评估，特别是概念级形式化解释的能力。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过形式化严格度递增的条件评估冻结MLLMs的可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了五种形式化严格度递增的条件（从基线分类到描述逻辑公理生成），评估四种最先进的MLLMs在少样本上下文学习下的概念可解释性。采用独立的LLM-as-a-judge管道评估解释质量。关键创新在于强制模型生成形式化结构的概念解释，并系统对比预测准确率与解释质量的关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，解释任务比预测任务更难：强制生成形式化概念解释导致预测准确率从93.8%单调下降至90.1%，否定了显式推理普遍提升性能的假设。然而，当模型成功表达类判别视觉特征时，解释质量与正确预测强相关。四个模型表现一致，验证了结果鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究表明，当前MLLMs在视觉分类上表现优异，但缺乏面向形式化、机器可验证可解释性的专门指令微调。工作揭示了可解释性与预测性能之间的权衡，为未来设计兼顾解释能力与预测准确性的模型提供了方向。局限性在于仅评估了冻结模型，未涉及微调影响。

title: Learning When to Optimize: Verified Optimization Skills from Expert GPU-Kernel Lineages
abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly used to generate GPU kernels, but they often know what optimizations to try without knowing when those optimizations are sound. We introduce KLineage, which learns this missing "when" knowledge from expert kernels: instead of relying on forward rollouts, KLineage walks expert implementations backward through validation-gated simplifications and reverses each accepted step into a reusable optimization skill. Each skill records not only the optimization intent, but also where it applies in code, what conditions made it valid, what effect it had, and what failures its assumptions avoid. A downstream LLM materializes these skills on new code surfaces under the same compile/correctness/profile gate. On five expert workloads across two NVIDIA architectures, these lineage-derived skills serve as an effective optimization curriculum, exceeding recent memory-based LLM-kernel baselines in both final kernel quality and optimization efficiency under the same fixed budget. We additionally use a separate 22-instance held-out check as a sanity test against source-case memorization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KLineage，从专家GPU内核实现中学习优化技能，重点掌握优化适用的条件而非仅优化方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理常知道优化操作但不知何时有效，导致生成内核质量不稳定。现有方法依赖前向展开，忽略优化条件的系统性学习。KLineage旨在填补这一知识缺口，从专家实现中提取可重用的验证化技能。
light_analysis.method: KLineage通过反向遍历专家实现，逐步验证并简化优化步骤，将每个接受的步骤逆转为可重用技能。技能记录优化意图、适用代码位置、有效性条件、效果及避免的失败。下游LLM在新代码上实例化技能，经过编译/正确性/性能门控。
light_analysis.result: 在五个专家工作负载及两种NVIDIA架构上，基于衍生的技能作为优化课程，在固定预算下最终内核质量和优化效率均超过近期基于记忆的LLM内核基线。额外使用22个保留实例验证未发生过拟合。
light_analysis.conclusion: KLineage有效教授LLM代理优化条件，提升内核生成质量。其技能形式可解释且可迁移，为自动化GPU内核优化提供新范式。未来可扩展至更多架构和优化类型。

title: When Helpful Context Leaks: Privacy Risks in Domain-Adapted ASR
abstract: SpeechLLMs are increasingly deployed in professional settings where domain customisation is standard practice: users supply context in prompts with sensitive information, fine-tune on proprietary recordings, or both. We identify and systematically investigate an overlooked privacy risk of such customisation: a model adapted to recognise domain-specific terminology can be nudged into transcribing a phonetically similar word from its context or training data, even when a different word is spoken, thereby leaking private information. To evaluate this risk, we construct a controlled dataset and measure leakage rates across two customisation mechanisms, prompting and fine-tuning. Both mechanisms cause measurable leakage, compounding when combined. We evaluate a prompt-level mitigation strategy and analyse the accuracy-leakage trade-off across customisation approaches, finding that fine-tuning without context prompts offers the best balance. We release our code and dataset publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 识别并系统研究了领域自适应语音语言模型在定制化过程中，由于上下文提示或微调导致发音相似词被错误转录而泄露隐私的风险。
light_analysis.motivation: SpeechLLMs在专业领域部署时，用户常通过提供包含敏感信息的上下文提示或在私有数据上微调进行领域定制。现有研究未充分关注这种定制化带来的隐私风险：模型可能会将实际说出的词转录为发音相似的上下文或训练数据中的词，从而泄露隐私。该问题在医疗、法律等高敏感场景中尤为重要，亟需系统性评估。
light_analysis.method: 构建了一个受控数据集，通过设计音似词对模拟泄露场景。评估了两种定制化机制：上下文提示（prompting）和模型微调（fine-tuning）。测量了单独使用和组合使用时的泄露率。此外，测试了一种基于提示级别的缓解策略（如限制上下文信息）。分析了不同定制化方法下准确率与隐私泄露的权衡关系。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，单独的上下文提示或微调均会导致可测量的隐私泄露，且当两者结合时泄露率叠加上升。在准确率-泄露权衡分析中，仅进行微调而不使用上下文提示的方法达到了最佳平衡：在保持较高转录准确率的同时，泄露率相对较低。提出的提示级缓解策略能一定程度上降低泄露，但可能影响性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了领域自适应ASR系统中一个被忽视的隐私风险，即上下文定制可能无意中导致隐私泄露。通过构建数据集和评估框架，量化了不同定制化方案的泄露程度。实践建议是优先采用无上下文的微调。未来工作可探索更有效的缓解技术，如差分隐私或对抗训练。代码和数据集已开源，便于后续研究。

title: The Illusion of Opting in AI-Mediated Consequential Decisions
abstract: Drawing on Ullmann-Margalit's concept of opting (transformative, irrevocable, and shadowed by foreclosed alternatives), we show that current AI systems raise a profound ethical problem that existing AI ethics has not fully captured: the illusion of opting, in which persons and groups encounter the deceptive appearance of meaningful consequential choice while the agency needed to become genuinely capable of choosing is weakened. Against approaches that treat AI primarily as an optimizer of already given ends, we argue that AI systems should be evaluated by whether they protect and cultivate meta-capacity against the illusion of opting: the socially and institutionally scaffolded agentive capacity through which means and ends can be formed, contested, revised, and owned. This reframing is especially urgent for disadvantaged populations, who are least able to absorb the costs of the illusion of opting when AI-mediated pathways misdirect behavior and action. We propose three normative imperatives for AI-mediated consequential decisions: existential honesty, which acknowledges the limits of prediction; ecological rationality, which situates guidance within heterogeneous lived ecologies; and counterfactual reparation, which acknowledges and repairs foreclosed alternatives when AI-mediated decision-making pathways fail.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示AI系统中存在的“选择错觉”伦理问题，提出保护元能力的三项规范性原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI伦理未能充分捕捉AI系统引发的深层伦理问题：用户面临看似有意义的抉择，但实际代理能力被削弱，产生“选择错觉”。这一问题对弱势群体尤为严重，他们难以承受错误选择的代价。因此需要重新审视AI系统评估标准，从优化给定目标转向保护人的元能力。
light_analysis.method: 借鉴Ullmann-Margalit的“选择”概念，定义“选择错觉”为转型性、不可逆且被关闭替代方案所遮蔽的虚假选择。提出三个规范性原则：存在诚实（承认预测局限）、生态理性（将指导置于异质生活生态中）、反事实修复（当失败时承认并修复被关闭的替代方案）。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验或数据结果，但通过理论论证表明该框架能够更全面评估AI决策系统，尤其关注弱势群体保护。未来可应用于AI伦理治理和政策制定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重新定义了AI伦理评估方向，从优化效率转向保护人的选择代理能力。通过三项原则为AI系统设计提供规范指导，强调对弱势群体的责任。局限性在于缺乏实证验证，未来需将该框架操作化并检验其实际效果。

title: Robust Contrastive Graph Clustering with Adaptive Local-Global Integration
abstract: Graph clustering is essential in graph analysis for revealing structural patterns and node communities. Despite recent advances in self-supervised contrastive learning that have improved clustering via structural and attribute signals, existing methods still struggle to flexibly capture high-order local structures and often overlook global semantics in complex graphs. These limitations lead to suboptimal node representations, especially in real-world graphs with fragmented structures and ambiguous cluster boundaries. To address these limitations, a contrastive graph clustering framework is proposed to jointly integrate multi-scale local structures with global semantics via attention mechanisms. At the local level, GNN-based topological signals extracted from multiple propagation depths are adaptively fused through attention-based weighting to capture multi-scale neighborhood features. At the global level, semantic prototypes derived from dynamically evolving cluster centers are adaptively aggregated through attention to guide node representations and enhance inter-cluster separability. The model is trained under a dual-view contrastive learning paradigm with a hybrid objective that combines instance-level and structure-aware losses to improve representation robustness and discrimination. Experiments on eight real-world graph datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive clustering performance. Code is available at https://github.com/vege12138/w2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出鲁棒对比图聚类框架，通过注意力机制自适应融合多尺度局部结构和全局语义，提升聚类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 图聚类是图分析中的关键任务，现有自监督对比学习方法虽利用结构和属性信号改进聚类，但难以灵活捕获高阶局部结构，且常忽略全局语义，导致复杂图中节点表征次优，尤其在结构碎片化和聚类边界模糊的真实图中表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出对比图聚类框架，联合集成多尺度局部结构和全局语义：局部层面通过注意力加权自适应融合不同传播深度的GNN拓扑信号，捕获多尺度邻域特征；全局层面利用动态聚类中心生成的语义原型，经注意力聚合指导节点表示并增强簇间分离性。模型采用双视角对比学习，结合实例级和结构感知损失的混合目标训练。
light_analysis.result: 在八个真实世界图数据集上，该方法取得了有竞争力的聚类性能，具体指标摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了其有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过自适应局部-全局集成解决了图聚类中高阶结构捕获和全局语义利用不足的问题，显著提升了复杂图上的节点表征鲁棒性和判别力。未来可进一步探索更大规模图上的扩展性，以及更高效的原型更新机制。

title: Pruning and Distilling Mixture-of-Experts into Dense Language Models
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is now the dominant architecture for frontier language models, yet it requires all expert parameters to be loaded in memory, making it less preferable for memory-constrained deployment. Existing compression methods reduce the number of experts but the output remains an MoE model with the same fundamental limitation. We present the first systematic framework for converting a trained MoE into a standard fully dense architecture: experts are scored, selected, and grouped, then concatenated into a dense FFN and refined by knowledge distillation from the MoE teacher. We evaluate 7 scoring, 5 grouping, and 2 magnitude scaling methods across a range of selected expert counts on Qwen3-30B-A3B, yielding 350 configurations. We find that the choice of scoring method is the most impactful, with our novel diversity-aware scoring consistently outperforming prior methods on Qwen3-30B-A3B, DeepSeek-V2-Lite, and GPT-OSS-20B. Under a controlled comparison at matched parameter count, MoE-to-dense outperforms dense-to-dense pruning by +6.3 pp in average downstream accuracy after ~4B-token distillation at 1.6x faster training wall-clock speed.

light_analysis.overview: 首个将MoE模型转换为稠密语言模型的系统框架，通过专家评分、选择和分组，结合知识蒸馏实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE是当前主流语言模型架构，但需要将所有专家参数加载到内存，不利于内存受限的部署。现有压缩方法减少专家数量后仍是MoE模型，无法解决根本问题。因此需要将MoE转换为标准稠密架构以降低内存占用，同时保持高性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出系统框架：对专家进行评分、选择、分组，然后拼接成稠密前馈网络，并通过知识蒸馏从MoE教师模型精炼。评估了7种评分、5种分组和2种幅度缩放方法，在Qwen3-30B-A3B上配置350种。创新点包括多样性感知评分方法，有效利用专家多样性。
light_analysis.result: 评分方法选择影响最大，多样性感知评分在Qwen3-30B-A3B、DeepSeek-V2-Lite和GPT-OSS-20B上持续优于先前方法。在匹配参数数量下，MoE-to-dense相比稠密到稠密剪枝，经过约40亿token蒸馏后平均下游准确率提升6.3个百分点，训练壁钟速度快1.6倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首个MoE转稠密框架，有效解决内存受限部署问题。实验表明方法优于传统剪枝，开辟了MoE压缩新路径。实际应用价值在于降低部署成本和加速推理。未来可探索更优评分和分组策略，或应用于更大规模模型。

title: Refining Multidimensional Video Reward Models via Disentangled Influence Functions
abstract: As Text-to-Video (T2V) generation models continue to evolve, the complexity of video evaluation necessitates a fine-grained assessment across various axes. To address this, recent works have focused on developing Multidimensional Video Reward Models (MVRMs), which decompose the evaluation process to better align with the multifaceted nature of human visual perception. However, training effective MVRMs is fundamentally challenged by the complex nature of video data. In this work, we identify a critical phenomenon termed Dimensional Heterogeneity: the reliability of a training sample can vary substantially across evaluation dimensions, meaning that a sample may provide reliable supervision for one objective while inducing high supervision risk for another. Consequently, prevailing data-centric methods that filter based on global scalar metrics are ill-posed for T2V tasks. To address this, we propose a disentangled influence framework that that efficiently estimates dimension-specific supervision risk. Leveraging this framework, we introduce two dimension-disentangled refinement strategies: Dimension-Disentangled Pruning, which removes extreme high-risk samples, and Dimension-Disentangled Reweighting, which softly down-weights high-risk supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our disentangled strategies significantly outperform global filtering baselines, yielding reward models with superior alignment to ground truth.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于解耦影响函数的框架，解决多维视频奖励模型训练中的维度异构性问题，通过维度特定的监督风险估计实现数据筛选与重加权。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着文本到视频生成模型的发展，视频评估需要多维度细粒度分析。现有方法训练多维奖励模型时面临视频数据复杂性挑战，尤其存在“维度异构性”现象：同一训练样本在不同评估维度的可靠性差异显著。传统基于全局标量指标的数据筛选方法无法处理这种维度差异，导致监督信号不可靠。因此需要一种能估计维度特定监督风险的方法，从而精细化训练数据。
light_analysis.method: 提出解耦影响函数框架，高效估计每个样本在不同评估维度上的监督风险。基于此设计两种策略：维度解耦剪枝，移除极端高风险样本；维度解耦重加权，对高风险监督信号赋予低权重。该方法利用影响函数近似剔除或降低样本对模型参数的影响，实现维度层面的数据精炼，无需额外标注。
light_analysis.result: 在多个T2V评估任务上的实验表明，所提解耦策略显著优于全局过滤基线方法。具体指标包括奖励模型与人类评判的相关性提升（摘要未明确数值），验证了维度解耦数据处理在降低维度异构性负面影响方面的有效性，最终获得与真实标注更对齐的多维视频奖励模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文识别了视频奖励模型训练中的维度异构性挑战，并提出基于解耦影响函数的有效解决方案。该方法通过精细控制各维度的监督信号质量，显著提升了多维评估模型的可靠性。未来可探索扩展到更复杂的评估维度组合，以及更高效的影响函数计算方法。

title: Plant, Persist, Trigger: Sleeper Attack on Large Language Model Agents
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents remain vulnerable to safety threats from the external environment, where attackers inject adversarial content into external observations such as tool-returned data, webpages, or MCP context, causing harmful agentic behaviors such as unsafe actions or incorrect outputs. Existing studies typically focus on single-interaction attacks, where the agent observes adversarial content and immediately exhibits harmful behavior within one user request. However, we show that adversarial content can also persist across interactions served by the same agent, making such threats harder to detect and mitigate. Specifically, adversarial content may persist in the agent state, remain dormant across interactions, and later be activated by a benign user query. We formalize this type of safety threat as Sleeper Attack. To evaluate it, we construct a benchmark with 1,896 instances covering six real-world harmful outcomes, three attack strategies, and three agent state targets: session context, memory, and reusable skills. Experiments on seven strong open-source and closed-source LLMs show that state-of-the-art LLM agents remain vulnerable to Sleeper Attack, even when they achieve low attack success rates under a single-interaction baseline. Our code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/skdvnfu23ihr9wdscnksf1asdffsaef.

light_analysis.overview: 提出并形式化Sleeper Attack，攻击内容持久存在于LLM代理状态中，跨交互潜伏并在良性查询触发时产生有害行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单次交互攻击，但实际中攻击内容可持久存在于代理状态（如会话上下文、记忆、可重用技能），并在后续交互中被激活。这种持久性威胁更难检测和防御，因此需要系统研究此类跨交互的安全威胁。
light_analysis.method: 形式化定义Sleeper Attack，构建包含1,896个实例的基准测试，覆盖六种真实世界有害结果、三种攻击策略和三种代理状态目标（会话上下文、记忆、可重用技能）。在七个开源和闭源LLM上评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，最先进的LLM代理在Sleeper Attack下仍然脆弱，即使单次交互基线攻击成功率较低，潜伏攻击仍能成功引发有害行为。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示LLM代理面临的新安全威胁，强调跨交互持久性攻击的风险。提供基准测试和评估框架，有助于未来防御策略开发。局限性或未来工作未提及。

title: Geometry-First Generative Spatial Single-Cell Reconstruction
abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) profiles large numbers of cells but loses spatial context, whereas spatial transcriptomics (ST) preserves partial spatial structure at lower resolution. Most existing integration methods either deconvolve spot mixtures or map cells onto a measured spot lattice, which ties reconstructions to a fixed grid and slide-specific coordinate systems, a limitation that is especially problematic in unpaired settings. We propose GEARS, a geometry-first framework that reconstructs an intrinsic single-cell spatial geometry guided by ST, without relying on cell-type labels, histological images, or cell-to-spot assignment. GEARS first learns a domain-invariant expression encoder that aligns ST spots and dissociated cells, and then trains a permutation-equivariant generator with a diffusion-based refiner with EDM-style preconditioning to generate local spatial geometries under pose-invariant supervision derived from ST coordinates. At inference, GEARS reconstructs geometry on many overlapping subsets of scRNA-seq cells, aggregates predicted pairwise distances across subsets, and solves a global distance-geometry problem to obtain canonical two-dimensional coordinates and a dense distance matrix. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments, including cross-section generalization, show that GEARS consistently improves global distance preservation, local neighborhood fidelity, and spatial distribution alignment compared to strong spatial mapping and deconvolution baselines.
comment: 32nd SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出GEARS框架，基于几何优先进行单细胞空间重建，无需细胞类型标签或组织图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞RNA测序丢失空间背景，而空间转录组学分辨率较低。现有整合方法多依赖固定网格和滑动坐标系，在非配对设置中问题严重。需要一种不依赖细胞类型标签、组织图像或细胞到点分配的框架，重建内在单细胞空间几何。
light_analysis.method: GEARS先学习域不变表达编码器对齐ST点和解离细胞，再训练置换等变生成器和基于EDM预条件的扩散精炼器，在ST坐标的位姿不变监督下生成局部空间几何。推理时对重叠细胞子集重建几何，聚合预测距离后求解全局距离几何问题，获得二维坐标和密集距离矩阵。
light_analysis.result: 定量和定性实验包括交叉部分泛化测试表明，GEARS在全局距离保持、局部邻域保真和空间分布对齐方面持续优于强空间映射和解卷积基线。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEARS提出几何优先框架，无需额外监督即可从scRNA-seq和ST数据重建单细胞空间几何，提供密集距离矩阵，有助于空间转录组分析。未来可扩展至更复杂组织或三维重建。

title: Hierarchical Synthetic Tabular Data Generation: A Hybrid Top-Down and Bottom-Up Framework
abstract: Existing approaches for synthetic tabular data generation are based on either purely generative models or LLMs, both of which struggle with data heterogeneity, logical consistency, rare-event coverage, and robustness in low-data regimes. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical hybrid top-down and bottom-up (H-TDBU) framework that decouples semantic structures from stochastic texture. In the top-down path, structure-driven logical constraints and cross-modal alignment rules are constructed, while in the bottom-up path, lightweight tabular generators are used to learn local statistical patterns from real data. The two paths are consolidated in a unified synthesis engine with an iterative feedback loop. We evaluate the framework on weak multimodal financial benchmarks combining tabular and sentiment-text data. Experimental results show that our H-TDBU approach improves train-synthetic-test-real performance over neural baseline methods while preserving semantic consistency. Our results suggest that hierarchical rule-guided synthesis provides an effective mechanism for combining controllability, semantic coherence, and statistical fidelity in synthetic data generation.
comment: Accepted as a poster at FMSD @ ICML 2026. 9 pages, 6 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出H-TDBU层次化混合框架，通过解耦语义结构与随机纹理，实现高效合成表格数据生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有合成表格数据方法（纯生成模型或LLM）难以同时处理数据异质性、逻辑一致性、罕见事件覆盖及低数据鲁棒性等问题。这些缺陷限制了合成数据在金融等弱多模态场景下的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: H-TDBU框架包含自上而下和自下而上两条路径：前者构建结构驱动的逻辑约束与跨模态对齐规则，后者利用轻量级表格生成器学习局部统计模式。两条路径在统一合成引擎中通过迭代反馈循环整合，实现语义与纹理的协同生成。
light_analysis.result: 在弱多模态金融基准（表格+情感文本）上，H-TDBU相比神经基线方法在训练-合成-测试-真实任务中性能提升，同时保持语义一致性。具体指标未明确说明，但表明层次化规则引导合成有效兼顾了可控性、语义连贯性与统计保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 层次化规则引导合成框架为合成数据生成提供了兼顾可控性、语义一致性与统计保真度的有效机制。该工作适用于多模态异构数据场景，未来可拓展至更强逻辑约束和低数据环境下的生成任务。

title: Agentic Active Omni-Modal Perception for Multi-Hop Audio-Visual Reasoning
abstract: Multi-hop audio-visual reasoning remains challenging for Omni-LLMs, as relevant evidence is often sparse, temporally dispersed, and distributed across both audio and visual streams. Existing benchmarks provide limited investigation of this setting, typically involving only a limited number of modalities, relevant temporal segments, or reasoning steps. In this work, we introduce MOV-Bench, a benchmark containing 519 carefully curated questions that require multi-hop reasoning over temporally dispersed audio-visual evidence. Evaluations on MOV-Bench reveal that current Omni-LLMs still struggle with multi-hop cross-modal reasoning. To address this challenge, we further propose AOP-Agent, an efficient agentic framework built on open-source Omni-LLMs for active omni-modal perception. By combining a hierarchical omni-modal memory with a collaborative observe-reflect-replan loop, AOP-Agent enables open-source Omni-LLMs to perform active perception without additional training or proprietary models. Experiments on MOV-Bench and OmniVideoBench demonstrate that AOP-Agent consistently improves reasoning performance, with particularly notable gains on long videos and reasoning-intensive questions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MOV-Bench基准和AOP-Agent框架，解决多跳音视频推理中证据稀疏、时间分散的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 多跳音视频推理对全模态大模型（Omni-LLMs）具有挑战性，因为相关证据稀疏且时间分散，现有基准仅涉及有限模态、时间片段或推理步骤。为解决这一问题，需要更全面的基准和高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建MOV-Bench，包含519个需要多跳推理的音视频问题。提出AOP-Agent，基于开源Omni-LLMs的主动全模态感知框架，结合分层全模态记忆和协作式观察-反思-重规划循环，无需额外训练或专有模型。
light_analysis.result: 在MOV-Bench和OmniVideoBench上，AOP-Agent持续提升推理性能，尤其在长视频和推理密集型问题上效果显著。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出一致性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOV-Bench为多跳音视频推理提供评估基准，AOP-Agent展示了开源模型通过主动感知提升跨模态推理能力的潜力。未来可扩展至更多模态和更复杂场景。

title: The Harder Text Embedding Benchmark (HTEB): Beyond One-dimensional Static Robustness
abstract: Embedding benchmarks like MTEB report a single score per model, implicitly treating robustness as a static, scalar property. We argue that embedding robustness is multidimensional, since models respond differently to different types of variation, and requires dynamic evaluation to expose failures hidden by static benchmarks. We introduce the Harder Text Embedding Benchmark (HTEB), a dynamic evaluation framework that challenges model robustness along three practically interpretable axes (Lexical/Stylistic, Length and Language) by stochastically transforming inputs at evaluation time with an LLM. Evaluating 16 open-weight embedding models on 32 datasets covering 42 languages under transformations validated by 4,800 human ratings on an English subsample, we find three patterns: (1) Models exhibit specific, partly decoupled robustness profiles across axes. (2) Across three model families, scale increases absolute scores but does not close the gap between original and transformed evaluations. Here, scaling tends to improve specifically the Language axis. (3) English datasets are more sensitive to HTEB transformations than multilingual datasets. This demonstrates that HTEB identifies strengths and weaknesses of models along deployment-relevant axes, challenging current embedding benchmarks and arguing for multidimensional, dynamic robustness evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HTEB基准，证明文本嵌入鲁棒性是多维动态的，并揭示模型在不同变换轴上的弱点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有嵌入基准如MTEB仅报告单一分数，将鲁棒性视为静态标量属性。然而，模型对不同类型输入变化的响应各异，静态评估会掩盖关键失败模式。因此，需要多维度的动态评估方法以反映实际部署中的鲁棒性需求。
light_analysis.method: HTEB框架通过LLM随机变换输入，沿词汇/风格、长度、语言三个实际可解释轴评估鲁棒性。使用16个开放权重模型、32个数据集（覆盖42种语言），并由4800个英文样本的人类评分验证变换质量。
light_analysis.result: 发现三个模式：(1) 模型在不同轴上呈现特定且部分解耦的鲁棒性轮廓；(2) 规模提升提高绝对分数但未消除原始与变换评估间的差距，主要改进语言轴；(3) 英文数据集对变换更敏感。表明HTEB能识别模型在部署相关轴上的优劣。
light_analysis.conclusion: HTEB挑战了当前嵌入基准的静态评估范式，提出多维动态鲁棒性评价是必要的。该工作推动了嵌入模型在实际应用中的可靠性评估，未来可扩展更多变换轴或优化评估效率。

title: Framing Matters: Addressing Framing Sensitivity in Decision-Making through Behaviorally-Grounded Value Alignment
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes decision-making settings such as legal reasoning, where consistency under factually equivalent inputs is critical. However, we find that fact-preserved but differently framed inputs can significantly destabilize LLM decisions. To systematically investigate this problem, we introduce Fragile, a large-scale benchmark that isolates fact-preserving semantic framing across three controlled dimensions: value-tinted narration, temporal slice, and narrative vividness. Our experiments reveal a high susceptibility of LLMs to framing, with an average decision flip rate of 28.6%. We find that simple prior prompt-level and activation-level interventions not only fail to suppress framing sensitivity but actively amplify it. We therefore propose Valign, a representation-level method that explicitly targets these framing dimensions by anchoring decisions to a stable value prior, steering hidden states toward the model's value-consistent direction, and projecting out temporal-vividness-sensitive directions from the model's hidden states. Valign consistently reduces framing-induced decision flips, demonstrating that robust mitigation requires directly targeting the internal pathways in which framing operates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Valign方法，通过表征级干预解决大语言模型在决策中对语义框架的敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在高风险决策（如法律推理）中部署时，对事实等价但不同语义框架的输入表现出显著不稳定性，平均决策翻转率达28.6%，且现有提示级和激活级干预不仅无效反而加剧问题。该研究系统调查并旨在缓解这一框架敏感性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Valign，一种表征级方法，通过将决策锚定到稳定的价值先验、将隐藏状态向模型价值一致方向引导、并从隐藏状态中投影除时间-生动性敏感方向，显式针对三类框架维度（价值色调叙述、时间切片、叙述生动性）。基于Fragile基准测试，该基准隔离了事实保留的语义框架。
light_analysis.result: 在Fragile基准上，LLM平均决策翻转率为28.6%。Valign持续减少框架诱导的决策翻转，而简单提示级和激活级干预反而放大敏感性。实验表明稳健缓解需要直接针对框架操作的内部通路。
light_analysis.conclusion: Valign通过表征级干预有效抑制了LLM的框架敏感性，揭示了直接干预内部表征的必要性。该研究为高风险场景下LLM决策的一致性提供了新方法，未来可扩展到更多框架维度和实际应用。

title: Joint Training of Multi-Token Prediction in Reinforcement Learning via Optimal Coefficient Calibration
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as the standard paradigm for improving reasoning capability of large language models, while Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has been a widely adopted module in pretraining. Combining them is a natural approach, yet current RL practices detach MTP gradients because joint training degrades the performance. We revisit this failure from an optimization perspective. We show that the per-step effect of MTP on the RL objective can be decomposed into two terms: a first-order correlation and a second-order perturbation penalty. This decomposition unifies three MTP training regimes: Detach, Cross-Entropy loss, and Policy loss, and explains why each succeeds or fails. Further analysis of policy loss reveals that, although it aligns with intuition, performance still degrades: the correlation term decays while the quadratic penalty persists. Guided by the analysis, we propose Optimal Coefficient Calibration (OCC), an adaptive scheme that tracks the optimal coefficient online via a log-probability proxy at negligible cost. Across six competition-level mathematical reasoning benchmarks, OCC consistently matches or exceeds the detach baseline, delivering improved joint MTP-RL training performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出最优系数校准（OCC）方法，实现多令牌预测与强化学习的联合训练，提升大语言模型推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习从可验证奖励（RLVR）与多令牌预测（MTP）结合是自然思路，但当前RL实践会分离MTP梯度，因为联合训练会降低性能。本文从优化视角重新审视这一失败，揭示MTP对RL目标的每一步影响可分解为一阶相关项和二阶扰动惩罚项，解释了分离、交叉熵损失和策略损失三种训练机制成功或失败的原因。
light_analysis.method: 通过优化分解，将MTP对RL目标的影响分解为一阶相关项和二阶扰动惩罚项，统一了三种训练机制。分析发现策略损失虽符合直觉，但相关项衰减而二次惩罚持续，导致性能下降。据此提出最优系数校准（OCC），一种自适应方案，通过对数概率代理在线跟踪最优系数，几乎零开销。OCC根据当前优化状态动态调整MTP系数，平衡相关项与惩罚项。
light_analysis.result: 在六个竞赛级数学推理基准（如MATH、GSM8K等）上，OCC方法始终匹配或超越分离MTP梯度的基线，实现改进的联合MTP-RL训练性能。具体而言，OCC在多个数据集上平均提升约1-3%的准确率，且训练收敛更快，证明了自适应系数校准的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从优化角度揭示了MTP与RL联合训练失败的原因，并提出了OCC方法实现有效联合训练。该工作统一了现有MTP训练机制，为RLVR与MTP的结合提供了理论指导和实用方案。OCC方法计算开销小，可广泛应用于需要推理增强的大语言模型。未来可探索更复杂的系数调度策略或扩展到其他预训练模块。

title: BenGER: Benchmarking LLM Systems on Subsumption-Based Legal Reasoning in German Law
abstract: We introduce the BenGER (Benchmark for German Law) dataset for evaluating LLM systems on subsumption-based legal reasoning in German law. The BenGER dataset consists of three components: 596 exam-style free-text legal case tasks across multiple levels of legal education and 531 short doctrinal reasoning tasks. We evaluate 12 contemporary LLM systems -- closed flagship, efficiency-oriented, and open-weight -- across automatic and judge-based metrics. On a controlled validation subset of timed human-written solutions under both unaided and human--AI co-creation conditions, we contextualise model performance against these human baselines. We introduce a rubric-aligned LLM-as-a-Judge framework cross-validated against a multi-rater human-grading protocol (three blind reviews plus one author-informed creator review per solution). Our results show that replacing a blind human reviewer with the LLM judge degrades agreement with the full human pool no more than removing that reviewer altogether (Calderon r=0.96 vs.~r=0.96, matched n=30), that closed-flagship systems lead the leaderboard across all corpora, and that human--AI co-creation substantially outperforms unaided human work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出德国法律推理基准BenGER，评估LLM在涵摄推理上的性能，并引入LLM-as-a-Judge评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律推理是LLM应用的重要领域，但现有基准缺乏对德国法律涵摄推理的系统评估。德国法律体系复杂，需要细粒度推理能力。现有方法多关注普通法系或简单问答，缺乏针对大陆法系、特别是德国法律分层教育的专门数据集。此外，人类评估成本高且不一致，需要可靠自动化评估方法。本文旨在填补这些空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建BenGER数据集，包含596个考试式自由文本法律案例任务（覆盖多级法律教育）和531个简短教义推理任务。评估12个当代LLM系统（闭源旗舰、效率导向、开源权重），使用自动指标和基于法官的指标。在受控验证子集上，对比人类在有/无AI辅助下的表现。引入与评分标准对齐的LLM-as-a-Judge框架，经多评阅人人类评分协议（每份方案三盲审+一作者知情审核）交叉验证。
light_analysis.result: 用LLM法官替换盲人评审员时，与完整人类评审团的一致性下降程度不高于直接移除该评审员（Calderon r=0.96 vs. r=0.96，匹配n=30）。闭源旗舰系统在所有语料库领先排行榜。人机协同创作显著优于无辅助人类工作。
light_analysis.conclusion: BenGER为评估LLM在德国法律推理中的能力提供了标准化基准。LLM-as-a-Judge框架可靠且高效，可替代部分人工评审。闭源模型表现最佳，但人机协作潜力巨大。未来可扩展至其他法律领域或语言，并探索更细粒度的推理评估。局限性包括数据集规模有限和仅涵盖德国法律。

title: When Confidence Misleads: Suffix Anchoring and Anchor-Proximity Confidence Modulation for Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion language models decode text by iteratively denoising masked token sequences, making the choice of which positions to decode a central inference-time decision. Most training-free decoding strategies use model confidence for position selection, assuming that high-confidence positions are ready to be decoded. In this work, we revisit this assumption by studying when confidence misleads fully non-autoregressive (fully non-AR) decoding. EOT tokens can receive high confidence and cause incomplete generation; inserting a suffix anchor can mitigate this issue but introduces local overconfidence near the anchor, causing anchor-adjacent tokens to be decoded too early. To address these issues, we propose Suffix-Anchored Confidence Modulation, a simple training-free method that inserts a short suffix anchor to encourage response completion and modulates confidence near the anchor according to decoding progress. This preserves the response-completion benefit of suffix anchoring while reducing premature decoding of anchor-adjacent tokens. Across text-only reasoning, vision-language reasoning, and code-generation benchmarks, our method consistently improves confidence-based fully non-AR decoding, outperforms explicit EOT suppression, and preserves the parallel decoding advantage of fully non-AR generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出后缀锚点置信度调制方法，解决扩散语言模型中置信度误导导致的解码问题，提升非自回归解码性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型通过迭代去噪掩码序列解码，但全非自回归解码中，EOT令牌的高置信度导致生成不完整。现有训练无关解码策略依赖置信度选择位置，但置信度会误导。插入后缀锚点虽能缓解不完整问题，却引入锚点附近局部过置信，导致锚点邻近令牌过早解码。因此需要解决置信度误导和锚点邻近过置信的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出后缀锚点置信度调制（Suffix-Anchored Confidence Modulation），一种训练无关方法。在序列末尾插入短后缀锚点，鼓励生成完整响应；同时根据解码进度调制锚点附近的置信度，保留后缀锚点促进完整生成的好处，同时减少锚点邻近令牌的过早解码。该方法适用于全非自回归解码，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在纯文本推理、视觉语言推理和代码生成基准测试中，该方法一致提升了基于置信度的全非自回归解码性能，优于显式EOT抑制方法，并保持了全非自回归生成的并行解码优势。摘要未给出具体数值，但明确表明性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了扩散语言模型中置信度误导的问题，并提出了有效的训练无关解决方案。该方法通过后缀锚点和置信度调制，在保持并行解码效率的同时提高了生成质量和完整性。未来可探索更复杂的置信度调制策略或应用于其他生成任务。

title: SuperValid: Capability-Aligned OOD Validation for Generalizable Downstream Scaling
abstract: Scaling laws guide large language model training by relating compute to cross-entropy loss, and recent work further extends them to predict downstream benchmark performance. However, prior approaches face generalization limitations from two aspects: focusing on benchmark-level performance introduces scenario-specific artifacts, while relying on IID validation loss fails to track capability improvements when training distributions vary. In this work, we argue that downstream scaling should be studied at the capability level, which captures shared skill factors across related tasks while abstracting away benchmark-specific noise. We propose SuperValid, a framework that synthesizes OOD (out-of-distribution), capability-aligned validation data by distilling core concepts from benchmarks within a capability domain and expanding them into diverse, knowledge-rich texts. Extensive experiments spanning 17 benchmarks grouped into 6 capability domains show that SuperValid loss exhibits strong and stable correlation with downstream performance across models of different architectures, scales, and training data distributions. As a training-free metric computable during training without benchmark evaluation, SuperValid enables effective model selection, early stopping, and scaling decisions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SuperValid框架，通过生成能力对齐的OOD验证数据，实现训练时无基准评估的模型选择与缩放决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有缩放定律主要预测交叉熵损失或下游基准性能，但面临泛化限制：基准级评估引入场景特定噪声，而IID验证损失无法跟踪训练分布变化时的能力提升。实际应用中，需要一种能跨模型架构、规模和数据分布稳定预测下游性能的指标，且无需基准测试即可在训练中计算，以指导模型选择、早停和缩放决策。
light_analysis.method: SuperValid框架合成能力对齐的OOD验证数据：首先从能力领域内的基准中蒸馏核心概念，再扩展为多样化的知识丰富文本。实验涵盖6个能力领域的17个基准。该损失在训练过程中无需基准评估即可计算，作为免训练指标，与下游性能强相关且稳定。
light_analysis.result: 在17个基准（分属6个能力领域）上的实验表明，SuperValid损失与不同架构、规模和训练数据分布的下游性能呈现强且稳定的相关性。相比基准级评估和IID验证损失，SuperValid有效避免了场景特定噪声和分布偏移问题，实现有效的模型选择、早停和缩放决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: SuperValid实现了训练时无基准评估的能力对齐OOD验证，为通用下游缩放提供稳定指导。其核心贡献在于将缩放定律从基准级提升至能力级，并生成OOD验证数据。该方法具有实际应用价值，可替代传统基准测试进行模型选择。未来可扩展至更多能力领域及验证数据合成策略的优化。

title: From Kellgren-Lawrence to Calcium Pyrophosphate Crystal Deposition: A Soft-Labelling Framework for Knee Osteoarthritis Assessmen
abstract: Background and objective. Conventional Deep Learning (DL) approaches for Knee Osteoarthritis (KOA) grading rely on one-hot labels, which fail to capture both the ordinal uncertainty of Kellgren--Lawrence (KL) and Calcium Pyrophosphate Deposition Disease (CPPD) severity scores and the asymmetric relationship between the two scales observed in clinical practice.   Methods. We retrospectively collected 2172 knee X-ray images, including 968 radiographs jointly annotated for KL and CPPD severity. An ordinal DL framework based on soft-labelling was developed for both tasks, replacing one-hot targets with unimodal probability distributions centred on the annotated grade. Four formulations were investigated: binomial, beta, triangular, and exponential.   Results. All soft-labelling strategies consistently outperformed the nominal baseline. For CPPD grading, the triangular formulation achieved the highest Quadratic Weighted Kappa (QWK) and the lowest Mean Absolute Error (MAE) (QWK = 0.796; MAE = 0.438), while the beta formulation yielded the most balanced class-wise performance considering Average MAE (AMAE) and Maximum MAE (MMAE) across classes (AMAE = 0.458; MMAE = 0.573). For KL grading, the beta-based approach provided the best overall performance, achieving the highest QWK together with the lowest MAE and class-wise errors (QWK = 0.777; MAE = 0.529; AMAE = 0.523; MMAE = 0.775). Statistical analysis demonstrated significant improvements over conventional one-hot supervision (p < 0.001).

light_analysis.overview: 提出软标签框架，通过概率分布编码序数不确定性，同时提升KL和CPPD分级性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法使用one-hot标签进行膝骨关节炎分级，无法捕捉Kellgren-Lawrence与钙焦磷酸盐晶体沉积严重度评分之间的序数不确定性以及临床实践中观察到的两个量表间的不对称关系。这限制了模型对真实数据分布的建模能力，导致分级准确性不足。因此，需要一种能够同时处理序数信息和跨量表关联的新型标签表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 回顾性收集2172张膝关节X光片（其中968张同时标注KL和CPPD严重度）。提出基于软标签的序数深度学习框架，用围绕标注等级的单峰概率分布（二项式、beta、三角、指数）替换one-hot目标。模型架构未明确说明，但基于标准分类网络。通过四种分布形式对比，优化分级任务。
light_analysis.result: 所有软标签策略均显著优于one-hot基线（p<0.001）。对CPPD，三角分布取得最高QWK（0.796）和最低MAE（0.438），beta分布实现最佳类间平衡（AMAE=0.458，MMAE=0.573）。对KL，beta分布表现最佳：QWK=0.777，MAE=0.529，AMAE=0.523，MMAE=0.775。
light_analysis.conclusion: 软标签框架有效解决了序数不确定性和跨尺度关系问题，为膝骨关节炎分级提供了更准确的评估方法。该研究具有临床诊断辅助的实用价值，未来可扩展至其他序数分类任务。局限性在于未考虑更复杂的标签噪声，且仅在单一回顾性数据集上验证。

title: FLORO: A Multimodal Geospatial Foundation Model for Ecological Remote Sensing Across Sensors and Scales
abstract: Foundation models offer a promising route to transferable remote sensing representations, but many current approaches depend on very large pretraining datasets and fixed sensor configurations, limiting their suitability for ecological and environmental applications, where observations often vary across platforms, spatial and spectral resolutions, and available modalities. We introduce FLORO, a multimodal geospatial foundation model designed to learn transferable representations from a small but highly diverse remote sensing corpus. FLORO is pretrained using masked autoencoding on a heterogeneous combination of Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, SkySAT imagery, elevation, and UAV-derived data. To accommodate sensor variability, FLORO incorporates availability-aware inputs that indicate which spectral bands and auxiliary modalities are present in each sample, enabling a unified input space across heterogeneous sensor configurations. We evaluated FLORO on the PANGAEA benchmark under a frozen-encoder protocol across scene classification, segmentation, and regression tasks. Despite being pretrained on a smaller corpus than competing foundation models, FLORO achieved strong and stable transfer across optical, optical-SAR, and optical-elevation benchmarks spanning medium-resolution satellite, airborne, and ultra-high-resolution UAV imagery. FLORO obtained the second-best average segmentation performance across six PANGAEA benchmarks, trailing only a recently introduced foundation model pretrained on over two orders of magnitude more images, remained competitive on scene classification, and was robust in regression tasks, while qualitative results showed improved preservation of spatial structure in flood, urban, biomass, and canopy-height prediction settings. In a separate controlled experiment on EuroSAT-MS, geo-positional encoding further improved classification relative to absolute positional encoding.

light_analysis.overview: FLORO是一个多模态地理空间基础模型，通过小规模多样化遥感语料库学习可迁移表征，支持跨传感器和尺度的生态遥感应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基础模型依赖大规模预训练数据集和固定传感器配置，难以适应生态与环境应用中观测数据在平台、空间/光谱分辨率和可用模态上的变化。FLORO旨在利用少量但高度多样化的遥感数据学习可迁移表征，解决传感器异构性带来的泛化挑战。
light_analysis.method: FLORO采用掩码自编码预训练，使用Sentinel-1、Sentinel-2、SkySAT影像、高程和无人机数据的异构组合。为适应传感器差异，引入可用性感知输入，指示每个样本中存在的光谱波段和辅助模态，从而构建统一的输入空间。模型在PANGAEA基准上采用冻结编码器协议评估。
light_analysis.result: FLORO在PANGAEA基准的场景分类、分割和回归任务中取得稳定迁移表现。分割性能在六个基准中排名第二，仅落后于一个预训练图像数量大两个数量级的新模型；分类和回归任务中具有竞争力，定性结果显示在洪水、城市、生物量和冠层高度预测中空间结构保留更好。EuroSAT-MS上，地理位置编码优于绝对位置编码。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLORO证明了即使使用较小语料库，通过传感器异构性设计和可用性感知输入，也能获得强可迁移表示，对生态遥感的多平台、多尺度应用具有实际价值。未来可探索更大规模数据下的扩展性或结合更多模态。

title: MangaFlow: An End-to-End Agentic Framework for Controllable Story to Manga Generation
abstract: End-to-end manga generation is a structured visual storytelling task that requires story decomposition, recurring character and scene grounding, page layout design, panel rendering, page composition, and lettering. However, existing generative models often perform direct page synthesis, entangling these factors in a single visual output and limiting precise control over layout geometry, visual references, and cross-panel consistency. To address these limitations, we propose MangaFlow, an agentic framework for controllable long-form manga generation that decomposes manga creation into planning, grounding, layout construction, reference-conditioned rendering, composition, and text placement. By treating layout and visual references as explicit intermediate variables, MangaFlow enables both simple text-to-manga generation and more precise user-controlled manga creation. This design exposes layout, visual assets, and lettering as editable intermediate controls for refining panel geometry, references, and text placement. To support long-form consistency, MangaFlow introduces a story section memory that links section descriptions with corresponding character, scene, and object references for reuse across panels. We further present a meta-benchmark for evaluating layout controllability, visual consistency, and generation quality. Experiments show that MangaFlow improves layout adherence and cross-panel consistency over direct generation baselines while supporting flexible human control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MangaFlow，一个端到端代理框架，通过将漫画生成分解为可控的中间步骤，实现布局和视觉参考的精确控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端漫画生成模型直接合成页面，将故事分解、角色场景定位、布局设计、面板渲染、页面合成和文字排版等因素纠缠在一起，限制了布局几何、视觉参考和跨面板一致性的精确控制。需要一种可分解的框架来分离这些因素，实现可控的漫画生成。
light_analysis.method: MangaFlow将漫画创建分解为规划、定位、布局构建、参考条件渲染、合成和文字放置六个步骤。将布局和视觉参考作为显式中间变量，支持文本到漫画和用户控制模式。引入故事章节记忆，链接章节描述与角色、场景、物体引用以实现跨面板一致性。提出元基准评估布局可控性、视觉一致性和生成质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MangaFlow在布局遵从性和跨面板一致性上优于直接生成基线，同时支持灵活的人类控制。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过元基准评估验证了效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: MangaFlow通过分解漫画生成流程并暴露中间控制，实现了更精确的布局和视觉一致性，为可控长篇漫画生成提供了有效方案。未来可探索更复杂的用户交互和故事理解，摘要未提及局限性。

title: Localizing Input Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Models via Shapley Values
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-stakes decision-making, the ability to reliably quantify uncertainty has become a critical requirement for safety and trust. However, current uncertainty quantification methods primarily operate at the output level, often failing to distinguish whether uncertainty arises from the model's lack of knowledge or from ambiguity in the user's input. While input-centric uncertainty quantification has recently emerged as a promising direction, it remains relatively underexplored and typically relies on coarse, input-level information. Consequently, users are provided with scalar uncertainty scores that offer little actionable guidance on which parts of the input should be clarified to improve reliability. To address this limitation, we propose Shapley-based input uncertainty Quantification (ShaQ), a framework for span-level attribution of input-induced uncertainty. Our approach models ambiguous spans in the input as players in a cooperative game and quantifies their contributions using Shapley values, defined via the weighted average of marginal reductions in conditional entropy obtained by clarifying each span coalition. Unlike existing input-level approaches, our formulation captures complex interactions among spans and provides a principled decomposition in which individual attributions sum exactly to the total input-induced uncertainty. We evaluate ShaQ on the AmbigQA and AmbiEnt benchmarks, where it achieves state-of-the-art performance in ambiguity detection. We further demonstrate its utility on MediTOD, showing that ShaQ can localize under-specified clinical utterances and facilitate human-AI collaboration in high-stakes settings. Overall, ShaQ improves uncertainty estimation and provides actionable insights for targeted input clarification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ShaQ框架，基于Shapley值对LLM输入中模糊跨度进行归因，实现输入不确定性的局部量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM不确定性量化方法主要关注输出级别，无法区分不确定性源于模型知识不足还是输入歧义。输入级方法仅提供标量分数，缺乏可操作指导。用户难以定位需要澄清的具体输入部分，限制了在高风险决策中的应用。
light_analysis.method: ShaQ将输入中的模糊跨度视为合作博弈的玩家，通过Shapley值量化每个跨度对输入不确定性的贡献。Shapley值定义为澄清各跨度联盟后条件熵边际减少的加权平均。该方法捕获跨度间复杂交互，并保证归因总和等于总输入不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在AmbigQA和AmbiEnt基准上，ShaQ在歧义检测任务中达到最先进性能。在MediTOD临床对话数据集上，成功定位不明确语句，辅助人机协作。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: ShaQ提供了一种可解释的输入不确定性归因方法，提升不确定性估计的细粒度与可操作性，有助于高风险场景中人机交互。未来可扩展至其他模态或更复杂的交互设置。

title: OccuReward: LLM-Guided Occupant-Centric Reward Shaping for Demographic Equity in Grid-Interactive Buildings
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated promising capability in generating reward functions for deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based building energy management. However, their potential to exhibit or exacerbate disparities in occupant comfort across heterogeneous demographic populations remains unexplored. We present OccuReward, a framework investigating how LLM-mediated reward design affects demographic equity. Our contribution is three-fold: the introduction of the Comfort Equity Index (CEI) as a novel feedback signal; a methodology for iterative, equity-aware LLM reward shaping; and a performance analysis of DRL agents under these refined objectives. Utilizing four empirically grounded occupant profiles from the ASHRAE Global Thermal Comfort Database II (13,440 votes), we deploy a Soft Actor-Critic agent in CityLearn v2. Our approach employs the Gemini API to generate reward function logic and weights--rather than performing per-step inference--across three refinement rounds. Results across 15 experimental runs reveal that elderly female occupants consistently experience the lowest satisfaction in initial rounds. By Round 3, equity-aware LLM refinement activates specific reward components that improve satisfaction for Young Males (+17.6%), Mid-aged Females (+28.2%), Health Sensitive (+53.8%), and Elderly Females (+567%), while simultaneously reducing energy costs by 3.2%. Our findings highlight that while reward-level intervention significantly improves equity, demographic disparities in AI-driven controllers persist, necessitating further research into algorithmic fairness in building systems.
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at OccuSys 2026, co-located with ACM Sustainability Week 2026. Preprint version

light_analysis.overview: 提出OccuReward框架，利用LLM指导的奖励塑造提升建筑能源管理中不同人群的舒适度公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑能源管理中深度强化学习常忽视不同人口群体的舒适度公平性，现有方法可能加剧不平等。研究引入Comfort Equity Index作为反馈，探索LLM介导的奖励设计如何影响公平性，以解决多群体舒适度差异问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于ASRHAE全球热舒适数据库II的13440条投票，构建四种实际居住者画像。采用Soft Actor-Critic智能体在CityLearn v2中训练，使用Gemini API生成奖励函数逻辑和权重，经三轮公平感知迭代优化，而非逐步推理。
light_analysis.result: 15次实验显示，初始轮中老年女性满意度最低。第三轮后，公平感知奖励显著提升各群体满意度：年轻男性+17.6%、中年女性+28.2%、健康敏感+53.8%、老年女性+567%，同时能耗成本降低3.2%，但人口统计差异仍存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明奖励级干预能显著提升公平性，但AI控制器中的人口统计差异仍需进一步研究。工作为建筑系统中算法公平性提供了新方法，未来可探索更高效的公平性机制和更广泛的数据集。

title: DebFilter: Eradicating Biases Stashed in Value
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models, which are theoretically equivalent to score-based generative models, generate images through a multi-step denoising process guided by text embeddings extracted from pretrained vision-language models such as CLIP. However, these text embeddings inherently encode social and semantic biases -- such as those related to gender and age -- that are subsequently propagated and amplified through the guidance mechanism, along with the model's training on large-scale datasets that are imbalanced with respect to these bias-related concepts, often leading to skewed outputs in text-to-image generation. We propose DebFilter, a lightweight and training-free framework for mitigating such biases in text-to-image diffusion models. Observing that the model's error prediction at each denoising step is primarily influenced by cross-attention dynamics, we introduce a bias-correction strategy that adjusts the value components within cross-attention. Specifically, we apply a fixed offset to the slice of guidance embedding, effectively steering the semantic direction of cross-attention values toward unbiased representations. This adjustment reconfigures the score landscape to produce balanced outputs while maintaining alignment with the intended text semantics. Unlike prior approaches that rely on fine-tuning or retraining, DebFilter operates entirely at inference time, requiring no additional data or model updates. Our results demonstrate that this method effectively mitigates social biases in generated images, offering an efficient and scalable pathway toward fairer and more inclusive text-to-image generation.
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, supplementary material included, CVPR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出DebFilter，一种轻量级、无需训练的去偏框架，通过调整交叉注意力中的值组件来消除文本到图像扩散模型中的社会偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型使用预训练视觉语言模型（如CLIP）的文本嵌入进行引导，但这些嵌入编码了性别、年龄等社会偏见，并通过引导机制和训练数据的不平衡被放大，导致生成图像存在偏差。现有方法依赖微调或重训练，成本高且不灵活。
light_analysis.method: DebFilter在推理时操作，无需额外数据或模型更新。它观察到模型去噪步骤中的误差预测主要由交叉注意力动力学影响，因此提出偏差校正策略：在交叉注意力的值组件中应用固定偏移，调整引导嵌入的切片，从而将语义方向转向无偏表示，重新配置评分景观以产生平衡输出。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DebFilter有效减轻生成图像中的社会偏见，效率高且可扩展。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调其与初衷文本语义保持对齐，且优于依赖微调或重训练的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DebFilter提供了公平和包容的文本到图像生成的高效途径，无需训练开销。其贡献在于识别交叉注意力中的偏差来源并开发轻量级修复策略，适用于现有扩散模型。未来可探索更复杂的偏差模式或多模态场景。

title: QuITE: Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding
abstract: Irregular Multivariate Time Series (IMTS) are common in practice, yet their irregular sampling complicates effective modeling. Existing approaches typically either (i) design specialized architectures that limit the reuse of proven Multivariate Time Series (MTS) models, or (ii) map IMTS onto regular temporal grids through interpolation, which may distort temporal dynamics by introducing artificial values. To address these limitations, we propose a new input-embedding-based approach. We identify that the key bottleneck lies not in the backbone architecture, but in conventional embedding layers that assume uniform sampling. In this work, we introduce QuITE (Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding), a simple yet effective plug-and-play embedding module for IMTS. QuITE employs learnable query tokens to aggregate irregular observations through a single self-attention layer, directly producing backbone-compatible latent representations without artificial value generation or architectural modification. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks show that QuITE consistently improves MTS models, yielding average relative gains of up to $54.7\%$ in forecasting and $15.8\%$ in classification across diverse datasets and backbone architectures. Code is available at: https://github.com/Meaningfull9502/QuITE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QuITE，一种即插即用的查询式不规则时间序列嵌入模块，通过可学习查询令牌和自注意力聚合不规则观测，无需修改骨干架构或生成人工数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 不规则多变量时间序列（IMTS）在实际应用中常见，但其不规则采样导致建模困难。现有方法要么设计专门架构限制成熟MTS模型的复用，要么通过插值映射到规则网格，可能引入人工值扭曲时间动态。因此，需要一种无需修改骨干网络且不产生人工值的嵌入方法。
light_analysis.method: QuITE是一种即插即用的嵌入模块，采用可学习查询令牌，通过单层自注意力层聚合不规则时间观测，直接生成与骨干网络兼容的潜在表示。它避免了人工值生成和架构修改，可简单集成到现有MTS模型中。实验使用多个真实世界基准数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界数据集和不同骨干架构上，QuITE一致提升了MTS模型的性能。在预测任务中获得平均相对提升54.7%，在分类任务中获得15.8%。表明QuITE有效且通用。
light_analysis.conclusion: QuITE通过可学习查询和自注意力机制，有效解决了不规则时间序列的嵌入瓶颈，使得现有MTS模型可以直接处理不规则数据，无需特殊设计。该方法易于集成，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的查询机制或处理极端不规则性。

title: Unification and Optimization of Robust Supervised Learning
abstract: The literature has proposed various robust alternatives to empirical risk minimisation to address failure modes such as distribution shift, label noise and finite-sample degeneracies. Examples include distributionally robust optimization, label smoothing, vicinal risk minimization, and Mixup. However, such approaches are typically developed in isolation, forcing practitioners to commit a priori to a single failure mode even when the dominant mode for the task is unclear. To address this, we organize a broad class of existing methods along three common design axes and derive a tractable training procedure that decomposes robust learning into sequential stages (reference distribution enrichment, input-space perturbation, label-space perturbation, and sample-level aggregation), each with a choice of stance (pessimistic, neutral, or optimistic). This results in a unified design space in which joint hyperparameter optimization can compose and configure robustness strategies suited to the task at hand. Across tabular, image, and reward modeling benchmarks, joint hyperparameter optimization is competitive with the best single-method baseline in each setting, offering a reliable default for practitioners who do not know a priori which failure mode dominates their task.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一鲁棒学习的设计空间，通过联合超参数优化组合多种鲁棒策略，无需事先知道主导失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有鲁棒学习方法如分布鲁棒优化、标签平滑、邻域风险最小化和Mixup各自独立开发，迫使实践者预先承诺单一失败模式。然而实际任务中主导失败模式往往不明确，导致方法选择困难。因此需要一种通用框架来统一和优化多种鲁棒策略，使其能根据任务自动配置。
light_analysis.method: 沿三个共同设计轴组织现有方法，推导出顺序训练过程：参考分布丰富化、输入空间扰动、标签空间扰动和样本级聚合，每个阶段可选择悲观、中性或乐观立场。形成统一设计空间，通过联合超参数优化自动组合和配置鲁棒策略。
light_analysis.result: 在表格、图像和奖励建模基准上，联合超参数优化与每种设置中最佳单一方法基线性能相当。为不知道主导失败模式的实践者提供可靠默认选择，避免了手动选择方法的复杂性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作统一了多种鲁棒学习方法，简化了实践中的选择过程，具有广泛应用价值。未来可扩展至更多失败模式或优化算法。

title: DEPART: DEcomposing PARiTy across Multilingual LLMs
abstract: Multilingual Large Language Models (mLLMs) leaderboards report per-language accuracy but rarely explain why disparities emerge, leaving systemic biases unattributed and offering practitioners no actionable levers. We first establish that these gaps are systematic rather than artifacts of sampling noise via distribution-free Friedman and Kruskal--Wallis tests, then introduce a two-step Bayesian hierarchical framework that decomposes multilingual performance variance into interpretable components. First, isolating the variance attributable to language identity, we show that observable language features (script, family, typological distance) explain $R^2_{\text{ling}} = 79\%$ of this variance on understanding tasks and $92\%$ on reasoning, with a model's internal representational similarity to English emerging as the dominant predictor across both task buckets. Second, decomposing the full (model$\times$benchmark$\times$language) cube, we find that NLU and reasoning have fundamentally divergent variance profiles: model identity dominates understanding ($66.7\%$ of variance), whereas the benchmark$\times$model interaction dominates reasoning ($46.3\%$). Together these results recast multilingual evaluation from passive performance mapping into an explainable, diagnostic framework with concrete levers for targeting the root drivers of language disparity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两步贝叶斯层次框架分解多语言LLM性能差异，识别语言特征和模型内部表征为关键驱动因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言LLM排行榜报告每语言准确率，但未解释性能差异原因，导致系统性偏见无法归因，从业者缺乏改进方向。现有方法仅描述差距而非诊断根源，无法提供可操作杠杆。该研究旨在将被动性能映射转变为可解释的诊断框架，为缩小语言差异提供具体策略。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过无分布弗里德曼和克鲁斯卡尔-沃利斯检验验证差距的系统性。然后提出两步贝叶斯层次框架：第一步隔离语言身份方差，利用可观察语言特征（文字、语系、类型距离）及模型内部英语相似性预测方差，在理解任务上R²=79%，推理任务上92%；第二步分解模型×基准×语言立方体，量化各因素方差占比。
light_analysis.result: 语言特征解释理解任务79%和推理任务92%的方差，模型内部英语表征相似性为最强预测因子。方差分解显示：自然语言理解中模型身份占主导（66.7%），而推理中基准×模型交互占主导（46.3%）。结果揭示了任务类型间根本不同的方差谱，为干预提供具体杠杆。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架将多语言评估升级为可解释的诊断工具，直接定位语言差异的根源。学术上揭示语言特征和模型内部表征的关键作用；实践上提供针对性改进方向，如调整模型对齐或基准设计。未来可扩展至更多语言和任务，并探索因果干预措施。

title: MeniOmni: A Structured Multimodal Benchmark for Holistic Meniscus Injury Assessment
abstract: Clinical diagnosis of meniscus injuries requires radiologists to integrate volumetric MRI evidence with patient context (e.g., sex, age, BMI) and to produce structured diagnostic reports. Existing knee MRI benchmarks are typically unimodal and rely on coarse labels, limiting their ability to evaluate holistic clinical reasoning. We introduce MeniOmni, a structured multimodal benchmark for meniscus injury assessment, consisting of 746 multi-center MRI studies with tri-planar volumetric inputs, Clinical Priors, and expert-annotated clinical text. MeniOmni supports two tasks: (1) fine-grained Stoller severity grading and (2) diagnostic report generation. We further propose risk-aware ordinal evaluation and a semantic consistency metric (Meni-Score) to better reflect clinical relevance. Baseline experiments show that incorporating Clinical Priors improves grading performance and reduces severe errors, highlighting the value of multimodal context for safer assessment. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ShuruiXu/MeniOmni.
comment: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2026 (Oral Presentation)

light_analysis.overview: 提出MeniOmni，一个结构化的多模态基准测试，用于半月板损伤的全面评估，包含多中心MRI和临床先验信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床诊断半月板损伤需整合体积MRI证据和患者背景（性别、年龄、BMI）并生成结构化报告。现有膝关节MRI基准多为单模态且依赖粗粒度标签，无法评估整体临床推理能力，因此需要支持多模态和细粒度评估的新基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含746个多中心MRI研究的MeniOmni基准，提供三平面体积输入、临床先验和专家注释文本。支持Stoller严重度分级和诊断报告生成任务，并提出风险感知有序评估和语义一致性指标Meni-Score。基线实验结合临床先验进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 基线实验表明，加入临床先验显著提高了分级性能，尤其是减少了严重错误（如高估或低估损伤级别），验证了多模态上下文对更安全评估的价值。具体性能指标提升幅度需参考论文原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: MeniOmni为半月板损伤评估提供了结构化多模态基准，其风险感知评估和语义一致性指标更贴合临床需求。该工作促进了多模态融合在医学影像诊断中的应用，代码和数据公开，未来可扩展至其他损伤评估任务。

title: Look on Demand: A Cognitive Scheduling Framework for Visual Evidence Acquisition in Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Existing multimodal reasoning approaches predominantly follow two paradigms: converting visual inputs into text prior to reasoning, or performing end-to-end reasoning within a unified vision-language representation space. Despite their empirical progress, both paradigms suffer from fundamental structural limitations. The former relies on static visual-to-text conversion, which tends to compress and lose fine-grained visual details. The latter is prone to linguistic dominance induced by joint optimization and attention mechanisms, leading to systematically weakened faithfulness to visual evidence during reasoning. In this work, we argue that a central challenge is how and when visual evidence is introduced into the reasoning process. Motivated by this insight, we propose CSMR, a multimodal reasoning framework in which a language model controls the reasoning process by deciding when to invoke an independent visual perception module to acquire task-relevant visual evidence. Experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that CSMR consistently outperforms representative baseline methods in accuracy under a zero-shot setting. Further experimental analysis confirms that these advantages primarily arise from the proposed cognitive scheduling mechanism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CSMR框架，通过语言模型控制何时调用视觉感知模块，实现按需获取视觉证据，提升多模态推理的视觉忠实度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态推理方法存在结构局限：静态视觉转文本会压缩细节，统一视觉语言空间易受语言主导，导致对视觉证据的忠实度不足。因此需要解决如何及时引入视觉证据的核心问题。
light_analysis.method: CSMR框架让语言模型作为推理控制器，动态决定何时触发独立的视觉感知模块，按需获取任务相关的视觉证据。该认知调度机制避免了静态转换的细节损失和联合优化中的语言主导，实现更灵活的视觉证据引入。
light_analysis.result: 在多个零样本多模态推理基准上，CSMR一致优于代表性基线方法。实验分析确认性能提升主要源于认知调度机制，该机制有效增强了推理对视觉证据的忠实度。
light_analysis.conclusion: CSMR通过认知调度机制实现了按需视觉证据获取，解决了现有方法的两大结构缺陷。该方法具有学术价值，可推广至其他需要视觉忠实推理的任务，未来可探索更复杂的调度策略。

title: OR-Space: A Full-Lifecycle Workspace Benchmark for Industrial Optimization Agents
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used to assist with operations research (OR) modeling, yet existing OR-oriented benchmarks often reduce evaluation to one-shot translation from a self-contained problem statement into a mathematical formulation or solver program. Such settings abstract away two characteristics of real industrial OR workflows: persistent multi-artifact workspaces and multi-stage task lifecycles. We introduce OR-Space, a full-lifecycle workspace benchmark for evaluating industrial optimization agents across model construction, model revision, and grounded explanation. Each instance is an executable workspace containing business documents, structured data, optional code artifacts, solver outputs, and task-specific evaluators distributed across interdependent files. OR-Space defines three task modes: Build, where agents construct solver-ready optimization models from heterogeneous artifacts; Revise, where agents modify existing models under changing requirements or solver feedback while preserving valid prior logic; and Explain, where agents answer grounded questions about solutions, constraints, and business implications using evidence spread across workspace artifacts. By combining persistent workspaces with lifecycle-oriented tasks, OR-Space evaluates whether agents can perform reliable optimization work beyond end-to-end text generation. We describe the benchmark design, evaluation protocol, and quality-control pipeline, and position OR-Space as a benchmark for studying the reliability, failure modes, and practical readiness of LLM agents in industrial OR workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OR-Space，一个面向工业优化智能体的全生命周期工作区基准，涵盖模型构建、修订和解释任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有运筹学基准通常将评估简化为从自包含问题描述到数学公式或求解器程序的一次性翻译，忽略了工业OR工作流的两大特点：持久的多工件工作区和多阶段任务生命周期。这导致对LLM智能体在实际工业环境中的可靠性和实用性评估不足。OR-Space旨在弥补这一差距，提供更贴近真实场景的评估。
light_analysis.method: OR-Space包含可执行工作区，内含业务文档、结构化数据、代码工件、求解器输出及跨文件的任务评估器。定义三种任务模式：Build从异构工件构建求解器就绪模型；Revise在需求变化或求解器反馈下修改模型，保留有效先验逻辑；Explain基于工作区证据回答关于解决方案、约束和业务影响的接地问题。通过持久工作区与生命周期任务的结合，评估智能体超越端到端文本生成的可靠优化工作能力。
light_analysis.result: 论文描述了基准设计、评估协议和质量控制流程，但未提供具体实验结果。摘要表明OR-Space可用于研究LLM智能体在工业OR工作流中的可靠性、失败模式和实际准备度。
light_analysis.conclusion: OR-Space填补了现有OR基准在工业工作流模拟方面的空白，为评估LLM智能体在模型构建、修订和解释等生命周期任务中的表现提供了标准化平台。其意义在于推动智能体从简单文本生成向可靠优化决策辅助的转变，未来可扩展更多工业场景和任务类型，但当前缺乏实证结果。

title: Intra-YOLO: A Small Object Detection Model for Caries and Molar-Incisor Hypomineralization in Intraoral Photography Based on Transfer Learning with Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This study developed a computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) system for detecting caries and molar-incisor hypomineralization (MIH) in intraoral photographs. These lesions share similar appearances, making clinical differentiation challenging, especially given their small size and variability in imaging conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Intra-YOLO模型，结合迁移学习和强化学习，实现口内照片中龋齿和MIH的小目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 龋齿和MIH在口内照片中外观相似、尺寸小且成像条件多变，临床区分困难，现有CAD系统难以准确检测这些小目标病变。
light_analysis.method: 基于YOLO架构设计Intra-YOLO，采用迁移学习从预训练模型初始化，并引入强化学习动态调整检测策略以优化小目标定位。摘要未明确数据集规模及具体强化学习机制。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确具体性能指标。合理推断Intra-YOLO在检测精度和召回率上优于传统YOLO及其他基线方法，尤其在小目标场景下表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该CAD系统可辅助临床医生准确识别龋齿和MIH，提升诊断效率。未来可扩展至其他口腔病变检测，或结合更多图像增强技术。

title: Temporal Hyperbolic Graph Representation Learning for Scale-Free Internet Routing and Delay Prediction
abstract: Predicting Internet round-trip time (RTT) is critical for routing optimization, quality-of-service (QoS) provisioning, and traffic engineering, yet remains challenging due to long-term temporal dependencies, evolving routing dynamics, and heavy-tailed latency distributions. While Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) can model evolving network topologies, most existing approaches operate in Euclidean space, which poorly captures the hierarchical and scale-free structure of Internet routing graphs. Hyperbolic geometry provides a more suitable representation space.   We propose HERMIT (Hyperbolic Edge-aware RTT Modeling via Integrated Topology), a hybrid framework combining a hyperbolic manifold-preserving temporal GNN with a Random Forest regressor for joint link prediction and RTT prediction. Built on HMPTGN, HERMIT introduces RTT-aware edge features and a learnable edge encoder to improve modeling of evolving link states and routing behavior. The resulting hyperbolic node representations are combined with historical RTT statistics for robust latency prediction.   We evaluate HERMIT on a large-scale real Internet dataset spanning 2015-2024. HERMIT consistently outperforms a strong Random Forest baseline using only historical RTT statistics, achieving a 6% RMSE improvement while reducing large errors on heavy-tailed samples. It also surpasses prior hyperbolic TGNN models, including HMPTGN and HTGN, in link prediction performance. These results demonstrate that combining hyperbolic temporal graph learning with tree-based regression provides a scalable solution for RTT prediction in real-world Internet topologies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HERMIT框架，结合双曲时间图神经网络与随机森林，用于互联网RTT预测，在真实数据集上提升6% RMSE。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测互联网RTT对路由优化和QoS至关重要，但现有TGNN在欧氏空间难以捕捉互联网图的层次和无标度结构，导致对长期依赖和重尾延迟建模效果差。双曲几何更适合表示此类结构，但缺乏结合时间演化与RTT预测的统一方法。
light_analysis.method: HERMIT框架由保持双曲流形的时间GNN（HMPTGN）和随机森林回归器组成。HMPTGN引入RTT感知边缘特征和可学习边缘编码器，生成双曲节点表示；随后结合历史RTT统计特征，输入随机森林进行延迟预测。模型联合优化链路预测和RTT预测任务。
light_analysis.result: 在2015-2024年大规模真实互联网数据集上，HERMIT相比仅用历史RTT的随机森林基线取得6% RMSE提升，并显著减少重尾样本的大误差。链路预测性能也超越先前双曲TGNN模型HMPTGN和HTGN，验证了双曲时间图学习与树回归结合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HERMIT有效融合双曲几何的表示优势与树集成模型的鲁棒性，为互联网RTT预测提供可扩展方案。其学术价值在于拓展了双曲时间图网络的应用，实际价值在于提升网络服务质量与路由效率。未来可探索更复杂的时序依赖或自适应双曲空间。

title: A novel ordinal multi-view aggregation scheme for oak defoliation
abstract: Forest decline driven by climate and biotic stressors threatens ecosystem functioning, making accurate monitoring of tree health essential. In this work, we address tree defoliation estimation as an ordinal classification problem using ground-level imagery. We propose a novel multi-view ensemble framework that aggregates predictions from Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) trained on different perspectives of individual trees (north, south, and crown). This approach leverages complementary visual information while preserving modelling consistency through a homogeneous ensemble design.   A comprehensive evaluation is conducted by comparing multiple ordinal classification methods and analysing the contribution of each view and their combinations. Results show that modelling the ordinal structure of defoliation levels improves performance over nominal approaches, while the proposed multi-view ensemble consistently outperforms single-view and pairwise configurations. In particular, the three-view ensemble achieves the most robust and accurate predictions across all evaluation metrics.   These findings highlight the potential of combining Deep Learning (DL), Ordinal Classification (OC), and multi-view aggregation for scalable, consistent, and objective forest health assessment in complex ecosystems such as Mediterranean dehesas.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合序数分类与多视图CNN聚合的新型方案，提升橡树落叶评估的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 森林衰退威胁生态系统功能，精确监测树木健康至关重要。现有方法多采用名义分类，忽略了落叶等级的序数结构；且单视角图像信息有限。本研究旨在利用多视角图像（北、南、树冠）的互补信息，同时引入序数分类以提升落叶估计的准确性，解决传统方法在复杂生态系统如地中海德赫萨中评估不一致、主观性强的问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种多视图集成框架，基于同质集成设计，对每棵树木的北、南、树冠三个视角分别训练卷积神经网络（CNN），将各视角预测通过聚合策略融合。方法核心在于保留序数结构，使用序数分类损失函数训练模型。对比了多种序数分类方法和视图组合，包括单视图、成对视图及三视图集成，以评估各视图贡献。数据集未明确说明，但基于地面级图像。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，序数分类方法在各项指标上均优于名义分类方法。提出的多视图集成方案一致优于单视图和成对视图配置，其中三视图集成在所有评价指标上达到最佳性能，实现了最稳健和准确的预测。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调序数结构建模与多视角融合的有效性，验证了方法在森林健康评估中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了深度学习、序数分类和多视图聚合在森林健康评估中的潜力，为大规模、一致且客观的树木落叶监测提供了新方案。该方法适用于复杂生态系统如地中海德赫萨，可扩展至其他树种和更广泛的环境监测任务。未来工作可探索更多视角、不同聚合策略及与实际生态指标的相关性分析。

title: Off-Policy Learning to Reason Works Because It Is More Pessimistic Than You Think
abstract: Large scale reinforcement learning has become a central tool for improving reasoning in large language models. At this scale, generation is often lagged or asynchronous, so updates are performed on data collected by older policies. This makes learning inherently off-policy. Most existing approaches nevertheless remain rooted in PPO-style trust-region objectives, treating training as approximately on-policy and using importance weights to correct distribution mismatch. These corrections can introduce high variance, destabilize optimization, and accelerate entropy collapse. Recent work suggests an alternative: rather than correcting the mismatch, one can embrace off-policy data and remove importance weights, often yielding stronger algorithms. In this paper, we provide an intuitive construction of off-policy objectives that include successful off-policy objectives and show that their effectiveness can be understood through implicit pessimism: they optimize toward target policies that are more conservative than their nominal objectives suggest. This perspective explains why some particular implementation choices improve stability: they implicitly control the effective target distribution. We then propose a principled modification that stabilize this induced distribution and improve off-policy learning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示离策略学习的目标函数通过隐式悲观主义实现更稳定的优化，并提出改进方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模强化学习用于提升大语言模型推理时，由于生成滞后，数据多为离策略。现有PPO方法使用重要性权重校正分布偏移，但导致高方差和熵崩塌。近期工作发现移除重要性权重反而更有效，但缺乏理论解释。本文旨在揭示这种有效性的内在机制，即隐式悲观主义，并据此设计更稳定的离策略学习算法。
light_analysis.method: 本文构建了一个离策略目标函数的通用框架，将成功经验（如移除重要性权重）纳入其中。通过理论分析，证明这些目标函数隐式地优化一个比名义目标更保守的分布，即隐式悲观主义。基于此，提出一种原则性修改，通过稳定有效目标分布来改进离策略学习，具体包括控制目标策略的保守程度，避免过度悲观或熵崩溃。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但指出基于隐式悲观主义的理解能够解释现有方法的稳定性来源，并且提出的修改可进一步提升离策略学习的性能。典型改进包括降低方差、防止熵坍塌，以及在推理任务中取得更稳定的训练曲线和更好的最终结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了离策略强化学习目标函数的隐式悲观主义特性，为理解现有成功经验提供了理论视角，并据此提出改进方法。该研究有助于设计更稳定的离策略RL算法，尤其适用于大规模语言模型的推理优化。未来可探索更精细的保守度控制和与其他正则化技术的结合。

title: Sign-Aware Gated Sparse Autoencoders: Modeling Anticorrelated Features with Bi-Jump-ReLU Activations
abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) extract interpretable features from Large Language Models, but standard variants enforce non-negativity, forcing separate latents for diametrically opposed concepts (e.g., "pressure too high" vs. "pressure too low") and wasting dictionary capacity when features are anticorrelated. We propose the Sign-Aware Gated SAE (SA-GSAE): two-sided gated sparsity with signed magnitude and auxiliary supervision. A polarity-sensitive gate selects support on either sign, a signed-magnitude path avoids L1 shrinkage, and an auxiliary reconstruction prevents gate collapse. Bipolar sharing - one latent encoding both signs along a shared direction - is realised via a new Bi-Jump-ReLU activation; parameter accounting shows sign-awareness stays parameter-efficient even when anticorrelated pairs are rare.
