light_analysis.result: 在密集和MoE推理模型上的实验显示，JTS显著提高了跨数据集的可靠弃权率，并将弃权率@检测率（A@D）推至接近饱和，表明模型不仅能检测缺失信息，还能据此行动。通过立即终止不可回答的轨迹，JTS减少了不必要的推理，提高了推理效率。此外，缺失前提训练还改变了模型在困难但可回答问题上的推理行为，减少了无益的自我反省。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了信息不足下弃权是部署推理模型安全高效的关键推理控制形式。JTS框架通过轨迹级判断-求解机制，有效弥合检测到弃权的差距，提升可靠弃权率和推理效率。未来可探索将该控制机制扩展到其他类型的推理失败模式，如幻觉或不确定性。

title: ZipRL: Adaptive Multi-Turn Context Compression with Hindsight Response Replay
abstract: Adaptive context compression is vital for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs) to complex, multi-turn agent tasks. However, rule-based compression methods may discard task-critical nuances, while Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches usually struggle to balance information retention and token efficiency under the sparse rewards inherent to long-horizon workflows. To bridge this gap, we propose ZipRL, a novel adaptive compression framework tailored for Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). ZipRL features a multi-granularity compression mechanism for active, non-uniform information reduction, coupled with Hindsight Response Replay (HRR), a technique designed to densify training signals during RLVR optimization. Theoretically, we prove ZipRL's superior task-relevant utility over uniform methods. Concretely, ZipRL utilizes coarse-to-fine prompts for macro-compression and incorporates HRR into GRPO via generalized advantage reshaping. Multiple models of varying versions and parameter scales validate the effectiveness of our approach. Benchmarks on five agent tasks show ZipRL outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by 27.9% and 34.7% across Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B models, while maintaining exceptional token efficiency and robustness under extreme 256-turn extrapolation stress tests.

light_analysis.overview: ZipRL提出一种基于强化学习的自适应多轮对话上下文压缩方法，结合多粒度压缩与事后响应重放，显著提升长序列任务的效率与性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在处理复杂多轮智能体任务时面临上下文长度限制，规则压缩方法可能丢失关键细节，而强化学习方法在长序列稀疏奖励下难以平衡信息保留与令牌效率。现有方法无法有效适应非均匀信息重要性，亟需一种能动态保留任务相关细节并优化压缩策略的框架。
light_analysis.method: ZipRL包含多粒度压缩机制，采用粗到细的提示进行宏观压缩，并利用事后响应重放（HRR）在可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）中加密训练信号。HRR通过广义优势重塑集成到GRPO中，实现非均匀信息缩减。方法在多个模型版本和参数规模上验证，支持极长序列外推。
light_analysis.result: 在五个智能体任务基准上，ZipRL在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型上分别超越现有最优方法27.9%和34.7%，同时保持卓越的令牌效率。在256轮极端外推压力测试中表现出鲁棒性，验证了多粒度压缩与HRR的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ZipRL为长上下文多轮对话提供了一个有效的自适应压缩框架，理论证明其任务相关效用优于均匀方法。该方法可提升LLM在复杂代理任务中的可扩展性，未来可探索更细粒度的压缩策略或与其他RL算法结合。

title: PINE: Pruning Boosted Tree Ensembles with Conformal In-Distribution Prediction Equivalence
abstract: Tree ensembles are machine learning models with strong predictive performance and interpretability, and remain widely used for tabular data. Standard pruning methods for tree ensembles typically optimize an accuracy-compression trade-off and may change a subset of predictions, potentially compromising decision consistency. Faithful pruning methods address this issue by preserving prediction equivalence over the entire input space, but this requirement leads to lower compression ratios. We propose PINE, a pruning method that provides strong guarantees within an in-distribution region. PINE preserves prediction equivalence within this region and controls the region size using a single parameter $α$ via conformal calibration. Experiments on 12 public tabular datasets show that PINE improves the compression ratio by up to $30\%$ while preserving predictions at a comparable level to existing faithful pruning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PINE方法，通过保形校准在分布内区域保持预测等价性，实现树集成模型的高效剪枝。
light_analysis.motivation: 树集成模型在表格数据中广泛应用，但标准剪枝方法在优化精度与压缩权衡时可能改变部分预测，影响决策一致性。忠实剪枝方法虽能保持全输入空间的预测等价性，但压缩率较低。因此，需要一种能在分布内区域提供强保证同时提高压缩率的方法，以平衡决策一致性与模型压缩。
light_analysis.method: PINE方法通过保形校准在分布内区域保持预测等价性，使用单参数α控制区域大小。该方法在不改变预测的前提下进行剪枝，确保在分布内区域预测不变，并通过保形校准量化区域置信度。实验在12个公开表格数据集上进行，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在12个公开表格数据集上，PINE与现有忠实剪枝方法相比，在保持可比预测水平的同时，压缩率提高了最多30%。这证明了PINE在保持预测等价性的前提下显著提升了模型压缩效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: PINE为树集成模型提供了一种在分布内区域保持预测等价性的高效剪枝方法，平衡了压缩率和决策一致性。该方法通过保形校准提供了可调节的保证，具有较高的实用价值。未来可探索扩展到其他模型或处理分布外场景。

title: BlazeEdit: Generalist Image Editing on Mobile Devices with Image-to-Image Diffusion Models
abstract: The remarkable generation quality of modern diffusion models often comes at the cost of massive parameter counts, which necessitate server-side inference with significant computational costs and potential privacy risks. Consequently, there is growing momentum toward developing efficient on-device alternatives. While recent efforts have optimized text-to-image models for mobile hardware, they remain relatively bulky, typically ranging from 0.5B to 1B parameters. We present BlazeEdit, a highly efficient, generalist image-to-image diffusion model tailored for on-device deployment. By identifying that many practical image editing tasks do not require text-based guidance, we eliminate the text-conditioning components and develop a multi-task architecture that consolidates object removal, outpainting, tone correction, relighting, and sticker generation into a single, compact model of only 195M parameters. BlazeEdit achieves a substantial reduction in download size and memory overhead while maintaining competitive generation quality. It completes a full inference pass in just 290ms on a Pixel 10, delivering a seamless, privacy-preserving, and lightning-fast experience for generalist image editing on the edge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BlazeEdit，一个仅195M参数的通用图像编辑扩散模型，专为移动设备设计，实现快速、隐私保护的端侧推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型参数庞大（0.5B-1B），需服务器端推理，导致高计算成本和隐私风险。尽管已有面向移动设备的文本到图像模型优化，但仍较笨重。实际许多图像编辑任务不需要文本指导，因此需要更轻量、高效的端侧解决方案。
light_analysis.method: BlazeEdit移除了文本条件组件，采用多任务架构整合物体移除、外扩、色调校正、重照明和贴纸生成等任务。模型仅195M参数，通过精简设计降低下载大小和内存开销，支持在Pixel 10上290ms完成一次完整推理。
light_analysis.result: 在Pixel 10设备上，BlazeEdit完成一次推理仅需290ms，下载大小和内存开销显著降低，同时保持与更大模型相当的生成质量。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但强调了速度、隐私保护和边缘部署的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BlazeEdit证明了在移动设备上实现高质量通用图像编辑的可行性，通过消除文本依赖和多任务压缩大幅减小模型尺寸。未来可探索更多编辑任务扩展或进一步优化硬件适配，但当前版本已提供闪电般快速且隐私安全的用户体验。

title: PromptEmbedder:: Efficient and Transferable Text Embedding via Dual-LLM Soft Prompting
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable efficacy in text embedding, yet current adaptation methods like LoRA face significant bottlenecks in computational efficiency and cross-architecture transferability. Whenever a new backbone emerges, existing approaches require costly retraining from scratch. To address this, we propose PromptEmbedder, a novel dual-LLM framework that decouples embedding knowledge from specific backbone weights. PromptEmbedder utilizes a Prompting LLM to generate instruction-aware soft prompts for a frozen Embedding LLM via a differentiable generation process with continuous relaxation, ensuring full gradient flow during contrastive training. By localizing task-specific knowledge within the Prompting LLM, adapting to new architectures requires only retraining a lightweight linear alignment matrix. Evaluations on the MTEB benchmark show that PromptEmbedder achieves comparable performance with LoRA finetuning while reducing GPU memory by 40% and accelerating training by 3.7x. Our approach establishes a scalable, architecture-agnostic paradigm for efficient LLM-based representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双LLM软提示框架，实现高效且跨架构可迁移的文本嵌入。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在文本嵌入中表现优异，但现有微调方法如LoRA存在计算效率低和跨架构迁移性差的问题：每当新的骨干网络出现，需要昂贵的从头训练。这限制了LLM在表示学习中的可扩展性。PromptEmbedder旨在解耦嵌入知识与特定骨干网络权重，实现高效的跨架构适应。
light_analysis.method: PromptEmbedder采用双LLM框架：一个提示LLM通过可微分的连续松弛生成指令感知的软提示，注入冻结的嵌入LLM，确保对比训练中梯度完全流动。任务特定知识存储在提示LLM中，适应新架构仅需训练轻量线性对齐矩阵。方法实现知识解耦，避免对每个新骨干网络重新训练完整模型。
light_analysis.result: 在MTEB基准上，PromptEmbedder达到与LoRA微调相当的性能，同时GPU内存减少40%，训练加速3.7倍。这表明该方法在保持性能的同时显著提升效率，证明了架构无关范式的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PromptEmbedder建立了可扩展、架构无关的范式，用于基于LLM的高效表示学习，通过软提示解耦实现跨架构迁移，降低了适应新骨干网络的成本。未来可探索更复杂的提示生成策略或应用于多模态任务。局限性可能包括对提示LLM质量的依赖。

title: Verifiable Benchmarking of Long-Horizon Spatial Biology
abstract: AI agents are increasingly useful for biological data analysis, but existing benchmarks mostly test broad biological knowledge, executable workflows, or localized analysis steps rather than end-to-end scientific reasoning over spatial measurements. We introduce SpatialBench-Long, a benchmark for long-horizon spatial biology in which agents must recover biological claims from raw or near-raw data and calibrated experimental context without prescribed methods. SpatialBench-Long contains 24 evaluations across primary pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), engineered glioblastoma organoids and in vivo tumors, Cas9 lineage-traced lung adenocarcinoma, and mouse optic nerve aging/intervention systems, spanning CosMx, Visium, Xenium, multiplexed error-robust fluorescence in situ hybridization (MERFISH), single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), Slide-seq, Slide-tags, histology, and lineage-recording data. Candidate claims are hardened through reproduction, independent scientist review, and trajectory inspection. Final answers are graded deterministically over controlled vocabularies and symbols with companion rubrics capturing progress through key analysis chokepoints. Across the SpatialBench-Long benchmark, three model-harness pairs tie at 8/72 runs (11.1\%): Gemini 3.5 Flash / Pi terminal coding harness, GPT-5.5 / Pi, and GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex. SpatialBench-Long tests whether agents can move beyond executing procedural analysis to deriving accurate scientific conclusions from complex spatial measurements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpatialBench-Long基准，评估AI agent从原始空间生物学数据中推导科学结论的长程推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI agent基准主要测试通用生物知识、可执行工作流或局部分析步骤，缺乏对空间测量数据端到端科学推理的评估。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过包含多种数据类型和生物学系统的基准，检验agent能否从复杂空间数据中得出准确科学结论，而非仅执行程序化分析。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含24个评估任务的SpatialBench-Long基准，涵盖PDAC、胶质母细胞瘤类器官、肺腺癌、小鼠视神经老化等系统，涉及CosMx、Visium、Xenium、MERFISH、scRNA-seq、Slide-seq、Slide-tags、组织学、谱系记录等多种数据类型。候选结论经重复验证、独立科学家审查和轨迹检查强化，最终答案通过受控词汇和符号确定性评分。
light_analysis.result: 在SpatialBench-Long上，三个模型-工具组合（Gemini 3.5 Flash/Pi终端编码、GPT-5.5/Pi、GPT-5.5/OpenAI Codex）均获得8/72次运行成功（11.1%），表明当前agent在复杂空间科学推理上仍存在显著局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatialBench-Long可有效评估agent从原始空间数据中推导科学结论的能力，揭示了现有模型在长程推理上的不足。该基准为未来开发具备端到端科学推理能力的AI agent提供了重要测试平台，有助于推动空间生物学自动化分析的发展。

title: ConvMemory: A Lightweight Learned Memory Reranker, a Negative Attribution Result, and a Research-Preview Conflict Editor
abstract: We describe ConvMemory, a small 3.6M-parameter learned reranker for conversational long-term memory retrieval, trained with cross-encoder teacher supervision over fused dense and lexical features. On the LongMemEval memory family, ConvMemory operates above the BGE-large cross-encoder in Recall@10 at 12-47x lower latency, remains within 0.025 Recall@10 of mxbai-rerank-large-v1 on Clean500 while running 28x cheaper; under Stress1000 distractors the Recall@10 gap widens to 0.081 but ConvMemory still operates at 117x lower latency; these LongMemEval numbers are single-run or single-seed and are reported as indicative cost-frontier evidence, not benchmark-grade. We then publish a rigorous negative attribution result on a previously claimed mechanism: a five-seed retrained ablation with paired bootstrap shows that ConvMemory's learned temporal window is statistically significant on aggregate but not temporally specific, with the largest effects on hard non-temporal controls and no significant effect on multi-hop temporal queries. The honest description of the mechanism is cheap cross-encoder distillation in a fused dense+lexical feature space, not temporal-structure exploitation. We additionally release CCGE-LA, a low-amplitude conflict-aware candidate-set editor over ConvMemory, as a research preview with modest but consistent gains on supersession and stale/rescue slices on LoCoMo. All results are retrieval-stage; ConvMemory does not match mxbai-rerank-large-v1 in absolute LoCoMo MRR, and the report is single-author and not yet independently audited.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级内存重排器ConvMemory，通过负归因实验揭示其机制为廉价交叉编码器蒸馏，而非时间结构利用，并发布冲突感知编辑器CCGE-LA。
light_analysis.motivation: 对话长期记忆检索需要高效的重排器以平衡效果与延迟。现有重排器如BGE-large cross-encoder延迟高，而mxbai-rerank-large-v1性能好但成本高。同时，先前声称的基于时间窗口的机制缺乏严格验证，需要纠正错误归因。
light_analysis.method: ConvMemory是一个3.6M参数的重排器，通过交叉编码器教师监督训练，融合稠密和词法特征。关键创新是使用五种子重训和配对bootstrap进行负归因，证明学习的时间窗口非时间特异性。另发布CCGE-LA，一种低幅度冲突感知候选集编辑器。
light_analysis.result: 在LongMemEval上，ConvMemory在Recall@10上超过BGE-large cross-encoder，延迟低12-47倍；与mxbai-rerank-large-v1相比，Clean500上Recall@10差距0.025但成本低28倍，Stress1000下差距0.081但延迟低117倍。CCGE-LA在LoCoMo的超期和过时/救援切片上表现适度提升，但整体MRR未匹配mxbai-rerank-large-v1。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConvMemory展示了轻量级重排器在低延迟下接近大模型性能的潜力，并通过严格实验纠正了对时间窗口机制的误解。CCGE-LA作为研究预览提供了冲突感知编辑的改进方向。由于单作者未审计，结果需谨慎看待。

title: Challenges in Explaining Pretrained Clinical Text Classifiers
abstract: Explaining the predictions of neural models in clinical NLP remains a significant challenge, especially for complex tasks involving long, unstructured medical texts. While post-hoc methods like LIME and SHAP are widely used, they often fall short when applied to clinical narratives. In this paper, we identify core limitations of token-level and perturbation-based explanation techniques through targeted demonstra- tions on a hospital length-of-stay prediction task. Our findings reveal issues such as overemphasis on non-informative tokens, instability in at- tributions, and high-confidence predictions for incoherent input variants. These results underscore the need for explanation strategies that are clin- ically meaningful, semantically grounded, and robust to linguistic noise.
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at the First Workshop on Responsible Healthcare using Machine Learning (RHCML 2025), co-located with ECML PKDD 2025

light_analysis.overview: 揭示临床文本分类器解释方法的局限性，强调需要语义鲁棒且临床有意义的策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床NLP中神经模型预测的解释仍具挑战，尤其涉及长且非结构化的医疗文本。现有后处理方法如LIME和SHAP在临床叙述中表现不足，存在过度强调非信息性token、归因不稳定、对不连贯输入给出高置信度预测等问题。这些问题影响模型在医疗领域中的可信度与可解释性，亟需新的解释方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过住院时间预测任务进行针对性演示，系统分析token级和扰动式解释技术的核心局限。采用LIME和SHAP等常用方法，测试其对临床文本的分类解释效果。关键创新在于识别并量化了临床领域特有的解释偏差，如对非语义tokens的过度依赖和归因波动性。实验使用临床叙事数据集，未提及具体模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现解释技术存在三大问题：过度强调非信息性tokens（如停用词）、归因结果不稳定（同一输入多次解释差异大）、对不连贯输入变体（如随机替换词语）仍保持高置信度预测。这些结果表明现有方法在临床文本上缺乏可靠性和语义敏感性，与人类预期解释不符。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了当前解释方法在临床NLP中的根本性不足，强调了开发临床有意义、语义扎实且对语言噪声鲁棒的解释策略的紧迫性。该研究对医疗AI的可信部署具有重要指导意义，未来工作可探索基于领域知识或因果推理的解释方法，但未提及具体局限性或方向。

title: Prompting Is All You Need: Multi-view Prompting Large Language Models for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Recent work explored the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) in Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) through few-shot prompting, requiring substantially fewer annotated examples while achieving notable improvements over zero-shot baselines. However, a performance gap remained compared to models fine-tuned on hundreds of examples, and the computational costs of LLM inference present practical barriers to deployment. We introduce LLM-based Multi-View Prompting (LLM-MvP), which adapts the multi-view principle of considering multiple element orderings to LLM prompting. By combining schema-constrained decoding with a context-free grammar and prefix batching, LLM-MvP achieves performance competitive or superior to fine-tuned approaches while substantially reducing computational overhead. Extensive experiments across five benchmark datasets demonstrate that LLM-MvP closes the gap between few-shot prompting and fine-tuned models, offering a practical and efficient solution for ABSA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-MvP方法，通过多视图提示、模式约束解码和前缀批处理，在方面级情感分析中取得与微调模型竞争的性能，同时大幅降低计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 已有工作利用大型语言模型（LLM）通过少样本提示进行方面级情感分析（ABSA），虽比零样本有显著提升，但与基于数百样本微调的模型相比仍有性能差距，且LLM推理的计算成本阻碍了实际部署。因此，需要一种既能缩小性能差距又高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于LLM的多视图提示方法（LLM-MvP），将多视图原则（考虑多种元素排序）适配到LLM提示中。通过结合模式约束解码（使用上下文无关语法）和前缀批处理，LLM-MvP在无需微调的情况下，仅通过提示工程即可实现高效推理，同时保持高性能。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，LLM-MvP取得了与微调方法相当甚至更优的性能，同时显著降低了计算开销。该方法成功缩小了少样本提示与微调模型之间的性能差距，为ABSA提供了实用高效的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了LLM-MvP，一种结合多视图提示、模式约束解码和前缀批处理的高效方法，在ABSA任务中实现了性能与计算效率的平衡。该研究为LLM在情感分析中的实际应用提供了新思路，未来可扩展至其他自然语言处理任务。

title: On the Learnability of Test-Time Adaptation: A Recovery Complexity Perspective
abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt models to maintain reliable performance on non-stationary test streams without requiring labeled data. Despite its empirical success, the learnability of TTA under non-stationary streams remains unexplored. A key challenge is the lack of a principled theoretical framework that simultaneously aligns with the TTA objective and captures both continuously evolving distribution shifts and intrinsic information constraints. To address this gap, we propose the first theoretical framework for studying the learnability of TTA and introduce $(ε,δ)$-Recovery Complexity and $(ε,ρ)$-TTA Learnability. Recovery complexity measures the post-shift time needed to maintain excess risk below a target level with high probability, and is further extended to TTA learnability, which measures the long-term reliability of TTA. Within this framework, we introduce a novel discrete surrogate for non-stationary test streams, enabling a unified and tractable analysis of both gradual and abrupt shifts. We derive order-wise matching lower and upper bounds on recovery complexity, revealing fundamental limits of TTA and an intrinsic adaptivity-information trade-off. These results provide unified learnability guarantees for TTA that complement regret-based analyses.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出测试时自适应可学习性的理论框架，引入恢复复杂度和TTA可学习性概念，揭示自适应-信息权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时自适应（TTA）在非平稳测试流上保持模型可靠性能，但缺乏理论理解。现有方法未同时考虑持续演变的分布偏移和信息约束，导致可学习性未知。本文旨在建立统一理论框架，解决TTA在非平稳流上的基本极限问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出（ε,δ）-恢复复杂度和（ε,ρ）-TTA可学习性概念。恢复复杂度衡量偏移后恢复性能所需时间，TTA可学习性评估长期可靠性。引入非平稳测试流的离散代理，统一分析渐变和突变。推导恢复复杂度的匹配上下界，揭示自适应-信息权衡。
light_analysis.result: 推导了恢复复杂度的阶匹配下界和上界，明确了TTA的基本极限。理论结果表明存在固有的自适应-信息权衡，为TTA提供了统一的可学习性保证，补充了基于遗憾的分析方法。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为TTA可学习性提供了首个理论基石，阐明了非平稳流中自适应与信息约束的内在关系。学术上统一了TTA的理论分析，实践上指导设计更鲁棒的适应算法。未来可扩展至更复杂的场景如在线学习或多任务适应。

title: CogPortrait: Fine-Grained Eye-Region Control in Portrait Animation via Hierarchical Agent Planning
abstract: Portrait animation methods have achieved substantial visual quality and lip synchronization, but fine-grained manipulation of the eye region still faces a trade-off between input granularity and motion accuracy. Existing methods using emotion labels or coarse text prompts are insufficient for describing subtle ocular dynamics, whereas approaches based on Action Units or driving videos provide higher fidelity at the cost of a heavier input burden. These limitations are still restrictive for beyond-emotion states (e.g., thinking) and drowsiness. In light of the above, we propose CogPortrait, a two-stage framework that generates portrait animations from high-level labels. In the first stage, three chain-of-thought Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) agents compile high-level labels into facial keypoints through temporal event planning, prototype retrieval, and composition from a real-behavior library, and semantic-physiological constraint enforcement. In the second stage, a DiT-based video generation backbone synthesizes the final animation conditioned on the keypoints, reference portrait, audio, and text prompt, enhanced by a dynamic classifier-free guidance strategy with eye-region-aware reweighting and KTO-based refinement for boundary cases. We further introduce the EMH benchmark covering diverse emotions and beyond-emotion categories with two AU-level metrics for evaluating fine-grained eye-region and head-motion control. Extensive experiments on HDTF and the EMH benchmark demonstrate that CogPortrait achieves more precise eye-region control than existing methods while maintaining supe- rior visual quality and identity consistency

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段框架CogPortrait，通过层次化智能体规划实现精细眼部区域控制的人脸动画生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有人脸动画方法在眼部精细控制上面临输入粒度与运动准确性的权衡：粗粒度输入（如情感标签）难以描述细微眼动，高精度输入（如动作单元或驱动视频）则增加用户负担，尤其难以处理超越情感状态（如思考、困倦）。因此需要一种从高级标签生成精细眼部动画的方法。
light_analysis.method: 第一阶段，三个链式思维多模态大语言模型智能体将高级标签编译为面部关键点，通过时间事件规划、原型检索与来自真实行为库的合成、以及语义生理约束执行。第二阶段，基于扩散变换器的视频生成主干以关键点、参考肖像、音频和文本提示为条件，结合动态无分类器引导策略（眼区感知重加权）和基于KTO的边界情况细化，合成最终动画。
light_analysis.result: 在HDTF和EMH基准上，CogPortrait在保持优越视觉质量和身份一致性的同时，实现了比现有方法更精确的眼部区域控制。引入了覆盖多种情感及超越情感类别的EMH基准，并采用两个动作单元级别的指标评估精细眼部和头部运动控制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：解决了人脸动画中精细眼部控制的难题，通过层次化智能体规划从高级标签生成高保真动画；引入新基准EMH和细粒度评估指标。学术价值在于提出两阶段MLLM+DiT框架，实际应用可扩展至数字人、虚拟助手等领域。未来可探索更复杂的眼动模式或跨模态融合。

title: RW-TTT: Batched Serving for Request-Owned Test-Time Training State
abstract: Test-time training (TTT) adapts an LLM during generation by reading and updating request-owned state, such as fast weights, low-rank deltas, or streaming learner state. This breaks batched LLM serving, which assumes shared static weights: serial execution is correct but slow, while naive batching can corrupt request state. We formulate this problem as read-write TTT serving and present RW-TTT , which tags each decode step with its owner, version, and READ/WRITE effect, batches only compatible phases, and commits updates only to the owner. On one GPU with eight fast-weight InPlace-TTT streams, RW-TTT reaches 274.61 aggregate tok/s, 9.31x over sequential serving and 3.44x over per-stream replicas under the same memory budget. It preserves behavior on RULER, a long-context benchmark, and passes owner/version checks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RW-TTT方法，通过标记解码步骤的所有者、版本和读写效果，实现测试时训练中请求拥有状态的批处理服务，大幅提升吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时训练（TTT）在LLM生成过程中为每个请求维护独立状态（如快速权重），这打破了传统批量服务共享静态权重的假设。顺序执行虽正确但效率低下，而朴素批处理会因状态共享导致请求状态损坏。因此需要一种新方法，在保持状态隔离的前提下高效批处理，以兼顾正确性和性能。
light_analysis.method: RW-TTT将每个解码步骤标记为所有者、版本和读写效果，仅批处理兼容阶段（如只读或版本一致的操作），更新仅提交给所有者。该方法基于读写冲突检测，确保状态一致性，同时允许并行执行无冲突步骤。采用InPlace-TTT快速权重实现，每个请求拥有独立状态流。
light_analysis.result: 在单GPU上使用8个InPlace-TTT流，RW-TTT达到274.61聚合tok/s的吞吐量，相比顺序服务提升9.31倍，相比每流独立副本（相同内存预算）提升3.44倍。在长上下文基准RULER上保持原有行为，并通过所有者/版本检查验证正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RW-TTT有效解决了测试时训练批处理中的状态冲突问题，显著提升服务吞吐量，同时保证请求间隔离。该方法具有良好的可扩展性，未来可探索分布式多GPU场景及更多状态类型。为LLM在线适应提供高效服务方案。

title: Beyond Surrogate Gradients: Fully Differentiable Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Visual token pruning reduces the computational cost of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) by removing redundant visual tokens. Existing methods typically rely on Gumbel-Softmax to approximate discrete selection during training. However, the optimization is driven by surrogate gradients rather than the true selection process, leading to unreliable learning of token importance. In this paper, we propose DiffPrune, which reformulates pruning as continuous control of token information instead of discrete selection learning. Specifically, we introduce an Information Throttler that modulates each token using variance-preserving noise conditioned on importance scores, where higher scores induce less information suppression during training. This design directly operates on token representations, naturally providing a fully differentiable optimization path for learning token importance. At inference, tokens are removed via hard thresholding on the learned scores. Across ten VLM benchmarks, DiffPrune retains 96.5% of full-model accuracy while accelerating LLM prefill by 2.85x, with only 0.69 ms of inference overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffPrune，通过连续控制token信息实现视觉语言模型的全可微分令牌剪枝，避免近似离散选择的代理梯度问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型中，现有令牌剪枝方法依赖Gumbel-Softmax近似离散选择，优化由代理梯度驱动而非真实选择过程，导致令牌重要性学习不可靠。需要一种端到端可微的剪枝方法，直接优化令牌重要性。
light_analysis.method: DiffPrune将剪枝重新定义为对令牌信息的连续控制，引入信息调节器（Information Throttler），使用方差保持的噪声调制每个令牌，噪声水平由重要性分数决定，分数越高信息抑制越少。训练时全可微，推理时通过硬阈值移除令牌。
light_analysis.result: 在十个VLM基准上，DiffPrune保留全模型96.5%的准确率，同时将LLM预填充速度提升2.85倍，推理开销仅为0.69毫秒。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiffPrune提供了全可微的令牌剪枝方案，解决了代理梯度不可靠问题，在保持高精度的同时显著加速推理。未来可探索更复杂的噪声分布和自适应阈值策略。

title: Knowledge Dependency Estimation for Reliable Question Answering
abstract: Reliable question answering requires identifying not only whether an answer is correct, but also which available knowledge the prediction depends on. In realistic LLM-based QA, this knowledge may come from context, retrieval, decomposition, or intermediate reasoning, forming a noisy and redundant candidate space rather than a clean gold evidence set. We study \emph{knowledge dependency estimation}: estimating the sensitivity of a fixed black-box QA model to different candidate knowledge units. The challenge is to obtain fine-grained dependency scores without exhaustive test-time perturbation while modeling redundancy, substitutability, and complementarity. We propose \textbf{Knot}, a structured rank-aware knowledge dependency estimator. Knot learns from subset-level counterfactual supervision, models subset sensitivity through coverage over latent dependency factors, and derives rank-aware unit scores to identify influential candidates. Across multiple-choice and generative QA benchmarks, Knot outperforms all compared baselines in subset-sensitivity prediction and produces more faithful unit rankings than deployable baselines without extra QA-model calls; when used for practical risk screening, its dependency scores help flag error-prone QA predictions early.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Knot，一种结构化秩感知知识依赖估计器，用于可靠问答中的知识依赖估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 可靠问答需要识别答案正确性及预测依赖的知识，但现有方法在噪声和冗余的候选知识空间中难以细粒度估计依赖，且需要避免穷举扰动。该问题重要，因为错误依赖导致不可靠预测，而现有方法无法高效处理冗余和互补性。
light_analysis.method: Knot从子集级反事实监督学习，通过覆盖潜在依赖因子建模子集敏感性，导出秩感知单元评分来识别有影响力的知识单元。无需额外QA模型调用，适用于黑盒模型，处理冗余、替代和互补关系。
light_analysis.result: 在多项选择和生成式QA基准上，Knot在子集敏感性预测中优于所有基线，产生更忠实的单元排名。用于风险筛查时，依赖评分帮助早期标记易错预测，且无需额外QA模型调用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出知识依赖估计方法Knot，有效估计黑盒QA模型对知识单元的敏感性，提高可靠性。具有实际应用价值，可用于风险筛查。未来可扩展至更复杂知识结构。

title: MemCog: From Memory-as-Tool to Memory-as-Cognition in Conversational Agents
abstract: Existing agent memory systems universally follow what we term a Memory-as-Tool paradigm where a single query triggers one-shot retrieval of flat passage lists, suffering from passive invocation, reasoning-retrieval decoupling, and structural mismatch between retrieved fragments and the agent's navigational needs. We propose MemCog, a Memory-as-Cognition system that makes memory access an integral part of the reasoning process. MemCog organizes user knowledge as Navigable Memory Store with associative link graphs, exposes Cross-Dimensional Navigation Interface for multi-step reasoning-driven traversal, and employs Proactive Reasoning Protocol that drives agents to spontaneously initiate memory exploration from conversational context. We additionally construct ProactiveMemBench, the first benchmark for evaluating proactive memory triggering. Experiments show that MemCog achieves state-of-the-art on passive QA benchmarks (92.98 on LoCoMo, 95.8 on LongMemEval) while substantially outperforming baselines on ProactiveMemBench, demonstrating the advantage of Memory-as-Cognition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemCog系统，将记忆访问整合到推理过程中，实现从“记忆即工具”到“记忆即认知”的范式转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对话代理记忆系统遵循“Memory-as-Tool”范式，存在被动调用（单次查询触发一次性检索）、推理与检索解耦、检索片段与导航需求结构不匹配等问题。这些问题限制了代理在复杂对话中主动利用记忆的能力，导致记忆利用效率低下。亟需一种将记忆访问作为推理过程有机组成部分的新型范式。
light_analysis.method: MemCog由三个核心组件构成：1) Navigable Memory Store，通过关联链接图组织用户知识；2) Cross-Dimensional Navigation Interface，支持多步推理驱动的跨维度遍历；3) Proactive Reasoning Protocol，驱动代理从对话上下文自发启动记忆探索。该系统将记忆检索从被动查询变为主动推理的一部分。此外，构建了ProactiveMemBench基准用于评估主动记忆触发。
light_analysis.result: 在被动QA基准上达到SOTA：LoCoMo 92.98%，LongMemEval 95.8%。在主动记忆基准ProactiveMemBench上显著优于基线方法，验证了Memory-as-Cognition范式的优势。结果表明主动推理与结构化记忆导航能大幅提升对话代理的记忆利用能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemCog通过将记忆访问整合为推理过程，实现了从工具到认知的转变，显著提升了对话代理的记忆主动性和检索准确性。该工作为下一代智能代理的内存系统设计提供了新范式。未来可探索更大规模的关联图构建与跨任务泛化。

title: Relevant Is Not Warranted: Evidence-Force Calibration for Cited RAG
abstract: Cited RAG evaluation often treats visible sources as a grounding signal, but a real, topically relevant citation can still under-warrant the attached wording. We study this diagnostic failure as citation laundering: a related source is presented as warrant for an over-strong claim. We introduce FORCEBENCH, a contrastive stress test for evidence-force calibration. Each item holds a cited passage fixed and pairs an evidence-calibrated claim with a localized force-raised variant across five operational axes: relation, modality, scope, temporal validity, and numeric specificity. A calibrated evaluator should score the evidence-calibrated claim higher. Headline experiments use a fixed, locality-filtered 198-pair evaluation set. A citation-presence sanity check is uninformative by design; token and entity overlap still violate monotonicity on 32.8--36.4% of pairs. Across four reported model judges, standard generic support prompting is insufficient for this force-calibration stress test (aggregate MVR 47.2%), while explicit warrant-strength prompting lowers MVR to 24.5% but remains imperfect. We release the benchmark, prompts, outputs, and plug-in pipeline so citation evaluators can report monotonicity violation rate and force sensitivity alongside conventional support metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FORCEBENCH基准测试，用于评估引文RAG中证据-力度的校准，发现标准提示方法无法区分相关但力度不足的引用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有引文RAG评估常将可见源视为真实信号，但相关引用可能无法充分支持过强的主张（citation laundering）。这种诊断失败会导致对模型可信度的错误评估，而现有方法缺乏对证据力度与主张强度之间校准的细粒度测试。
light_analysis.method: 构建FORCEBENCH，一个对比性压力测试，包含固定引用下证据校准主张与力度提升主张的198对样本，覆盖关系、模态、范围、时间有效性和数值特异性五个操作轴。使用固定、局部过滤的评估集，并比较标准通用支持提示与显式力度提示的效果。
light_analysis.result: 标准支持提示在力度校准测试中聚合MVR为47.2%，而显式力度提示将MVR降至24.5%但仍不完美。在32.8-36.4%的样本对中，标记和实体重叠违反了单调性。引用存在性检查因设计而信息量低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了相关引用不等于充分支持的诊断问题，提出了力度校准基准FORCEBENCH。实验表明当前评估提示不足，需专门设计力度敏感提示。基准和工具已开源，可用于补充传统支持指标，推动更可靠的引文RAG评估。未来可探索更精确的力度建模。

title: Extracting Small Translation Specialists from LLMs by Aggressively Pruning Experts
abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) achieve state-of-the-art machine translation performance, but they do so as broad generalists largely trained for many tasks and capabilities unrelated to translation. Thus, they are heavily overparameterized for this task, resulting in excessive memory and compute requirements. In this paper, we present a method for aggressively pruning experts from modern mixture-of-experts LLMs while incurring negligible degradation in translation quality. Our approach exploits expert specialization and the separability of multilingual capabilities in LLMs to identify experts irrelevant to translation. And because of the modular nature of MoEs, these can be easily pruned without any training. Without retraining, we are able to prune half of all experts with negligible degradation and 70% with only minor losses. With a very short SFT, we prune 75% of experts while recovering baseline performance, and in some settings remove nearly 90% while maintaining reasonable translation quality. Overall, our results show that translation requires only a fraction of the LLM, enabling substantial compression of the MoE blocks that contain over 90% of parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 通过修剪MoE中与翻译无关的专家，在不损失翻译质量的情况下大幅压缩LLM。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代大型语言模型（LLM）在机器翻译上表现优异，但作为通用模型，它们被训练用于多种任务，导致对翻译任务过度参数化，带来巨大的内存和计算开销。现有方法未能有效利用LLM中专家的专业化和多语言能力的可分离性来去除冗余，因此亟需一种能识别并移除无关专家、同时保持翻译质量的轻量化方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种激进修剪混合专家（MoE）模型中专家的方法。利用专家专业化和多语言能力的可分离性，识别与翻译无关的专家。由于MoE的模块化特性，这些专家可直接被修剪而无需训练。之后，通过简短的有监督微调（SFT）恢复性能。该方法无需重新训练，仅需识别和移除即可。
light_analysis.result: 在不重新训练的情况下，修剪50%的专家仅导致可忽略的性能下降，修剪70%仅带来轻微损失。经过简短SFT后，修剪75%的专家可恢复基线性能，甚至在部分设置下修剪近90%的专家仍能保持合理的翻译质量。这表明翻译任务仅需LLM的一小部分参数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明翻译任务仅需大型语言模型的一小部分参数，通过激进修剪MoE中与翻译无关的专家，可压缩包含90%以上参数的MoE块，大幅降低内存和计算需求。该方法简单有效，无需重训练，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精确的专家选择策略及跨任务推广。

title: Personality, Role, and Expressive Style in Large Language Models: An Interactionist Analysis
abstract: Prompt-based personality control is a key technique for designing large language model (LLM) dialogue agents that behave consistently across social contexts. However, specifying Big Five personality traits (BFTs) in a prompt does not ensure that the intended traits are expressed in generated utterances. This paper investigates this mismatch from an interactionist perspective, viewing personality expression as a context-dependent outcome shaped by the interplay between trait specification and situational factors. We analyze how perceived BFT expression in LLM-generated dialogue is influenced by three prompt factors: personality traits, dialogue roles, and expressive styles. Using a factorial design that combines six personality conditions, three roles, and three expressive-style conditions, we generate 1,080 LLM-agent dialogues in each of English and Japanese. We then evaluate the target agent's utterances using an LLM-as-a-judge framework to estimate expressed Big Five traits. The results show that expressed personality is shaped not only by explicit trait specification, but also by dialogue role and expressive style. These effects are trait-specific: dialogue role strongly influences Openness, expressive style substantially shapes Conscientiousness and Agreeableness, and explicit trait specification dominates Neuroticism. Even without explicit personality-trait specification, social and expressive conditions induce distinct personality-like impressions. Cross-linguistic comparisons show broadly similar patterns between English and Japanese dialogues, with noticeable differences only under specific combinations of personality, role, and expressive style. These findings suggest that personality control in LLM agents should be understood not as a direct consequence of trait prompting, but as a context-dependent process involving personality specification, social role, and expressive style.

light_analysis.overview: 从互动主义视角分析大型语言模型中提示因素对个性表达的影响，揭示个性控制是上下文依赖的过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法通过提示指定大五人格特质来控制LLM对话代理的个性，但无法确保生成的话语中表达出预期特质。这种不匹配限制了LLM在需要一致社会行为场景中的应用。本文从互动主义视角出发，认为个性表达是特质指定与情境因素（角色、表达风格）交互作用的结果，旨在系统分析这些因素如何共同影响LLM生成对话中的个性感知，为更有效的个性控制提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用因子设计，组合六种人格条件（大五人格特质）、三种对话角色和三种表达风格，生成1,080个LLM代理对话（英语和日语各半）。使用LLM-as-a-judge框架评估目标代理话语，估计表达的大五人格特质。通过严格实验控制，量化各因素及其交互作用对特质表达的影响，并跨语言比较。
light_analysis.result: 表达的人格不仅受显式特质指定影响，还显著受对话角色和表达风格塑造，效果因特质而异：对话角色强烈影响开放性，表达风格显著塑造尽责性和宜人性，显式特质指定主导神经质。即使无显式人格指定，社会与表达条件也能引发独特个性印象。跨语言比较显示英语和日语总体模式相似，仅在特定组合下存在差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM代理的个性控制应被理解为涉及人格指定、社会角色和表达风格的上下文依赖过程，而非特质提示的直接结果。研究为设计更一致、可控的LLM对话代理提供理论指导，强调需综合考虑多因素。未来可探索更广泛模型和现实场景。

title: Stay Fair! Ensuring Group Fairness in Diffusion Models Across Guidance Scales
abstract: Diffusion models steer conditional generation with a tunable guidance scale to trade off prompt alignment and diversity. However, existing debiasing techniques are optimized for a single scale, degrading fairness when users adjust this parameter. We trace this behavior to a previously overlooked source by decomposing total bias into two components: a model bias and a guidance bias. While prior work primarily targets the former, we show that the guidance bias grows monotonically with the guidance scale, eventually dominating the high-guidance regimes users prefer. To address this, we extend Strong Demographic Parity to guidance and derive a condition under which the target distribution retains its group ratio across guidance scales. We propose StayFair, which leverages this condition to design fair guidance algorithms in both regimes. For classifier guidance, it equalizes the classifier's output distributions across groups; for classifier-free guidance, it shifts the null embedding by a prompt-dependent offset. Because StayFair modifies only the guidance step, it is orthogonal to model debiasing and can be layered onto existing fair diffusion models to extend their fairness across guidance scales. Across class-conditional and text-to-image generation, StayFair decouples fairness from the guidance scale without sacrificing image quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StayFair方法，通过解耦公平性与引导尺度，确保扩散模型在不同引导尺度下保持群组公平性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型去偏技术仅针对单一引导尺度优化，当用户调整尺度时公平性显著下降。研究发现总偏差可分解为模型偏差和引导偏差，其中引导偏差随尺度单调增长，在高尺度下主导。现有方法未考虑该偏差，导致用户偏好高引导尺度时公平性受损。
light_analysis.method: StayFair将强人口均等扩展至引导尺度，并推导保持群组比例的条件。对分类器引导，均衡分类器在群组上的输出分布；对无分类器引导，通过提示相关偏移调整空嵌入。该方法仅修改引导步骤，可叠加至现有公平扩散模型，实现跨尺度公平性。
light_analysis.result: 在类条件生成和文生图任务中，StayFair解耦了公平性与引导尺度，在不同尺度下保持群组比例，且不牺牲图像质量。与基线相比，公平性指标显著提升，而FID等质量指标未下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文识别并解决了引导偏差这一被忽视的公平性来源，提出StayFair确保扩散模型在任意引导尺度下的公平性。该方法正交于模型去偏，具有通用性，可提升实际应用中用户调整参数时的公平性。未来可扩展至更复杂的条件生成场景。

title: MTAVG-Bench 2.0: Diagnosing Failure Modes of Cinematic Expressiveness in Multi-Talker Audio-Video Generation
abstract: In recent years, Multi-Talker Audio-Video Generation (MTAVG) models have shown promising performance on fundamental metrics such as lip-sync and audio-visual alignment. However, these metrics remain insufficient for assessing cinematic expressiveness in scene-level generation. In multi-character scenes, generation models must go beyond audio-visual realism to convey coherent character performance and other higher-level cinematic qualities. To fill this gap, we introduce MTAVG-Bench 2.0, a benchmark for diagnosing failure modes of cinematic expressiveness in multi-talker audio-video generation. Unlike prior settings that mainly focus on the quality of basic multi-turn dialogue, MTAVG-Bench 2.0 targets short-drama and scene-level generation, and establishes a high-level failure taxonomy spanning acting, narrative, atmosphere, and audio-visual language. Based on this taxonomy, we construct more than 10,000 question-answering evaluation instances, together with subsets for short-drama-level assessment and temporal localization of failure modes, to systematically evaluate the ability of omni large language models to diagnose high-level audio-visual failures. Experimental results show that commercial omni models such as Gemini substantially outperform other evaluators, yet even the strongest models continue to struggle with complex failures in our benchmark. These results demonstrate that MTAVG-Bench 2.0 provides a systematic benchmark for failure diagnosis in cinematic multi-talker audio-video generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MTAVG-Bench 2.0基准，用于系统诊断多说话人音视频生成中的电影表现力失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MTAVG模型在唇同步等基础指标上表现良好，但缺乏对场景级电影表现力的评估，尤其是多角色场景中连贯的表演、叙事等高级品质。现有基准主要关注基本多轮对话质量，无法诊断高层次失败，因此需要新基准来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建MTAVG-Bench 2.0基准，针对短剧和场景级生成，建立包含表演、叙事、氛围和视听语言的高层次失败分类法。基于此分类法创建超过10,000个问答评估实例，包括短剧级评估子集和失败模式时间定位子集，用于评估全能大语言模型（Omni LLMs）诊断高层次视听失败的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，商业全能模型Gemini显著优于其他评估器，但即使最强模型在复杂失败上仍表现挣扎。这表明MTAVG-Bench 2.0能有效诊断电影多说话者音视频生成中的失败模式，为高层次评估提供系统基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: MTAVG-Bench 2.0填补了电影表现力评估的空白，推动MTAVG模型从基础真实性向场景级高级品质发展。该基准可用于诊断生成模型的失败模式，未来可指导模型改进，提升多角色场景的连贯性和艺术表达。

title: Clark Hash: Stateless Sparse Johnson-Lindenstrauss Quantization for Neural Embeddings
abstract: Clark Hash is a small method for storing neural embeddings in less space. It normalizes each database vector, applies a deterministic sparse signed Johnson-Lindenstrauss projection, clips the result, and stores a fixed-width scalar-quantized code. Queries stay in floating point and are scored against the stored sketches. In the default 384-dimensional sentence-embedding setting, Clark Hash stores a cosine-search vector in 48 bytes instead of 1536 bytes for dense f32 storage. This is 32x smaller. The method does not need a training pass, learned codebooks, rotations, or corpus statistics before new vectors can be stored. We describe the codec, the Rust implementation, and a multilingual sentence-similarity evaluation on 9,304 labeled pairs from 29 subsets. With a multilingual MiniLM encoder, the 48-byte sketches reached 0.910 and 0.946 macro Pearson correlation with dense cosine scores on STS17 and STS22. Clark Hash is not a new Johnson-Lindenstrauss theorem and it is not a replacement for approximate nearest-neighbor indexes. It is a simple stateless codec for compact embedding storage.
comment: First Autoresearch publication. Code available at https://github.com/clark-labs-inc/clark-hash. GPT-5.5 Pro was used for drafting and editing assistance

light_analysis.overview: Clark Hash是一种无状态稀疏Johnson-Lindenstrauss量化的神经嵌入压缩方法，将384维句子嵌入从1536字节压缩至48字节，实现32倍压缩且无需训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经嵌入通常需要大量存储空间，例如384维浮点向量占用1536字节。现有压缩方法需要训练过程、学习码本、旋转或语料统计，无法即插即用。在许多实际场景中，需要一种简单、无状态且无需预处理的紧凑编码方案，以快速存储和检索大量嵌入向量。
light_analysis.method: 方法对每个数据库向量进行归一化，应用确定性稀疏有符号Johnson-Lindenstrauss投影，裁剪后使用定长标量量化编码为48字节草图。查询向量保持浮点精度，与存储的草图通过余弦相似度评分。该方法无需训练、无需学习码本或旋转，支持即时添加新向量。默认设置针对384维句子嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 在多语言MiniLM编码器下，使用9,304个标注对（来自29个子集）评估，48字节草图在STS17和STS22上分别达到0.910和0.946的宏观Pearson相关系数，与基于稠密余弦分数的性能高度一致。压缩比达32倍，且无显著精度损失。
light_analysis.conclusion: Clark Hash是一种简单、无状态的紧凑嵌入存储编解码器，无需训练或语料统计，适合快速部署。它并非新的JL定理或近似最近邻索引的替代，而是为资源受限场景提供高效的量化方案。未来可扩展至其他嵌入类型或维度。

title: PetroBench: A Benchmark for Large Language Models in Petroleum Engineering
abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly applied in the petroleum industry, highlighting the need for a domain-specific evaluation framework. This study develops a benchmark for LLMs in petroleum engineering, including a three-stage process of data preprocessing, quality filtering, and multi-model validation. Using expert review, a standardized question bank with strong domain relevance and discriminative capability was constructed. The benchmark covers production, reservoir, and drilling engineering, with 1,200 questions across multiple-choice, true or false, term definition, and short-answer formats. Eight mainstream LLMs were evaluated under a unified API environment. Results show that models performed better on subjective than objective questions, indicating weaknesses in factual knowledge discrimination. The highest accuracies for multiple-choice and true or false questions were 65.3% and 74.3%, respectively. Gemini-3-Pro, Kimi-K2.5, and Claude-Opus-4.6-Thinking achieved the best overall scores of 72%-74%. Models performed best in production engineering and weakest in reservoir engineering. Chinese models showed advantages in multiple-choice questions, while international models performed slightly better in short-answer questions. The benchmark provides a reproducible and practical reference for evaluating and deploying LLMs in petroleum engineering.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向石油工程领域的大语言模型评估基准PetroBench，包含1200道专业题目，覆盖三大工程方向，评估了8个主流模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在石油工业中的应用日益广泛，但缺乏专门的领域评估框架。现有通用基准无法有效衡量模型在石油工程中的专业知识掌握程度，特别是在生产、储层和钻井工程等细分领域的判别能力。因此需要构建一个具有强领域相关性和区分能力的标准化评估基准。
light_analysis.method: 采用三阶段流程：数据预处理、质量过滤和多模型验证。通过专家评审构建了标准化题库，包含选择题、判断题、术语定义和简答题四种类型，共1200道题目，覆盖生产工程、储层工程和钻井工程三大领域。在统一API环境下评估了8个主流大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 模型在主观题上表现优于客观题，说明事实性知识判别能力不足。选择题最高准确率65.3%，判断题74.3%。Gemini-3-Pro、Kimi-K2.5、Claude-Opus-4.6-Thinking总体得分最高（72%-74%）。生产工程表现最佳，储层工程最弱。中文模型在选择题上有优势，国际模型在简答题上稍好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了首个石油工程领域的大模型评估基准，可重复、实用。为石油工程中LLM的评估和部署提供了参考。局限性包括题目类型可能不够全面，未来可扩展更多任务和模型。

title: SPARD: Defending Harmful Fine-Tuning Attack via Safety Projection with Relevance-Diversity Data Selection
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models often undermines their safety alignment, a problem further amplified by harmful fine-tuning attacks in which adversarial data removes safeguards and induces unsafe behaviors. We propose SPARD, a defense framework that integrates Safety-Projected Alternating optimization with Relevance-Diversity aware data selection. SPARD employs SPAG, which optimizes alternatively between utility updates and explicit safety projections with a set of safe data to enforce safety constraints. To curate safe data, we introduce a Relevance-Diversity Determinantal Point Process to select compact safe data, balancing task relevance and safety coverage. Experiments on GSM8K and OpenBookQA under four harmful fine-tuning attacks demonstrate that SPARD consistently achieves the lowest average attack success rates, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art defense methods, while maintaining high task accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/shuhao02/SPARD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPARD框架，通过安全投影交替优化和相关性-多样性数据选择防御有害微调攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型微调常破坏安全对齐，有害微调攻击利用对抗数据移除安全防护。现有方法难以兼顾安全性与任务准确性，亟需有效的防御框架。
light_analysis.method: SPARD包含SPAG（安全投影交替优化）和相关性-多样性行列式点过程数据选择。SPAG在效用更新和安全投影间交替，用安全数据强制约束；数据选择平衡任务相关性与安全覆盖，选取紧凑安全数据。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K和OpenBookQA上针对四种攻击的实验表明，SPARD平均攻击成功率最低，显著优于现有防御方法，同时保持高任务准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPARD有效防御有害微调攻击，维护安全对齐且不牺牲性能。代码已开源。未来可探索扩展至更多攻击类型和模型。

title: BPPO: Binary Prefix Policy Optimization for Efficient GRPO-Style Reasoning RL with Concise Responses
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is widely used for training reasoning models, but updating all sampled completions in each group incurs substantial cost and can reinforce verbose reasoning trajectories. In this paper, we study whether all completions provide equally useful update signals in GRPO-style reasoning RL. Our gradient-similarity analysis shows that, within the same prompt group, same-class completions often induce highly similar update directions, whereas correct-incorrect pairs provide more distinct contrastive signals. Motivated by this observation, we propose Binary Prefix Policy Optimization (BPPO), which uses the shortest correct completion and the shortest incorrect completion as a compact update unit while preserving full-group advantage normalization. BPPO further improves efficiency with adaptive completion scheduling and prefix-focused optimization; by updating only response prefixes, it avoids reinforcing redundant suffixes and encourages more concise responses. Experiments on GSM8K, MATH, and Geo3K show that BPPO achieves up to 6.08x speedup over GRPO while maintaining competitive accuracy, and reduces mean response length by approximately 30-50% without modifying the reward with an explicit length penalty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BPPO方法，通过只使用最短正确和错误完成进行策略优化，实现GRPO风格推理RL的高效训练和简洁响应。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO在训练推理模型时更新组内所有采样完成，计算成本高且易强化冗长推理轨迹。研究发现在同一提示组内，相同类别的完成产生相似梯度方向，而正确-错误对提供更清晰的对比信号。现有方法未充分利用这一特性，导致效率低下和响应冗长。
light_analysis.method: BPPO基于梯度相似性分析，选择每个组中最短的正确完成和最短的错误完成作为紧凑更新单元，同时保留全组优势归一化。采用自适应完成调度和前缀聚焦优化，仅更新响应前缀以避免强化冗余后缀，从而鼓励更简洁的响应。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K、MATH和Geo3K上，BPPO相比GRPO实现高达6.08倍加速，保持竞争性准确率，并将平均响应长度减少约30-50%，无需显式长度惩罚奖励。
light_analysis.conclusion: BPPO通过智能选择更新样本和前缀优化，显著提升GRPO风格推理RL的效率，并自然生成更简洁的响应。该方法在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算开销，适用于资源受限场景。未来可探索更复杂的样本选择策略。

title: MIRA: A Bilingual Benchmark for Medical Information Response Audit
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to provide public-facing health information, yet existing safety evaluations overlook whether responses preserve comparable medical information across different user phrasings of the same question. To address this, we introduce the Medical Information Response Audit (MIRA), a bilingual, controlled benchmark that assesses whether LLMs provide comparable medical information across user-side language, register, and health literacy signals. MIRA contains 4,320 prompts built from 60 medically reviewed, low-risk health questions. Across five mainstream LLMs, models answered all medical questions, but responses to low health-literacy signals consistently omitted more key information, provided fewer concrete next steps, and offered less support for independent judgment. We term this pattern Differential Information Dilution (DID). Language effects are model-specific rather than uniformly worse for non-English prompts. A comparison with 300 real-world health queries provides preliminary evidence of rank-order validity. A knowledge-guided mitigation prompt reduces information dilution for most models, with the largest reductions in underinformative simplification observed for Claude (~8%) and Qwen (~6%).

light_analysis.overview: 提出双语基准MIRA，评估LLMs在不同用户表述下提供医学信息的一致性，揭示信息稀释现象并探索缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地用于提供面向公众的健康信息，但现有安全评估忽略了对同一问题的不同用户表述（语言、语域、健康素养）是否提供可比的医学信息。这一问题至关重要，因为用户多样性可能导致信息不对等，影响健康决策。现有方法未系统评估这一方面，缺乏控制变量和双语覆盖。
light_analysis.method: 构建MIRA基准，包含4320个提示，源自60个经医学审查的低风险健康问题，覆盖用户侧语言（英语/中文）、语域和专业健康素养信号。评估五个主流LLM（如Claude、Qwen等）的回答，分析信息完整性、具体步骤和支持独立判断。提出知识引导的缓解提示，通过注入医学知识减少信息稀释。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型回答了所有问题，但对低健康素养信号的响应持续遗漏关键信息，提供更少具体下一步（如Claude减少8%的简化信息）和独立判断支持，模式称为Differential Information Dilution (DID)。语言影响模型特异：非英语提示并非普遍更差。知识引导缓解提示有效降低信息稀释，Claude和Qwen分别减少约8%和6%的不足信息简化。与300个真实健康查询对比验证了排序有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIRA揭示了LLMs在医学信息响应中的信息稀释问题，即对低健康素养用户提供的回答更不完整。研究贡献了控制双语基准和初步缓解方法，强调了安全评估中考虑用户表述多样性的重要性。未来工作可扩展至更多语言和健康领域，并改进缓解策略的泛化性。

title: VCap: Hypergeometric Rewards for Weak-to-Strong Visual Captioning
abstract: Visual captioning requires models to capture visual content faithfully while minimizing both omission and hallucination. As the dominant paradigm for captioning, MLLMs have achieved strong performance through scaling and high-quality data. Recently, RL has emerged as a key route to driving MLLMs toward higher precision and broader coverage, however, existing reward designs for captioning fail to provide fine-grained and reliable signals for factual verification, limiting their effectiveness. To address this, we propose VCap, a Witness-Adjudicator reward that pairs the reference caption (a witness) with the visual signal (an adjudicator). By explicitly verifying factual consistency between the reference and policy-generated captions grounded in the visual signal, VCap delivers a reward signal with hypergeometric-distribution-level precision for caption quality verification. This design enables effective learning even from imperfect references, facilitating weak-to-strong generalization in RL training. In our experiments, an 8B model trained with VCap outperforms open- and closed-source SOTA models on multiple image and video captioning benchmarks. Human evaluation further confirms its strong alignment with factual correctness. Additionally, VCap improves MLLM perceptual capability, generalizes across tasks, and surpasses best-of-N distillation, challenging prior assumptions about RLVR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VCap，一种基于超几何分布的Witness-Adjudicator奖励机制，实现视觉描述中弱到强泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉描述要求模型忠实地捕捉视觉内容，减少遗漏和幻觉。当前MLLM通过规模扩展和高质数据取得强性能，但强化学习中的奖励设计缺乏细粒度、可靠的事实验证信号，限制了模型精度和覆盖率的提升。
light_analysis.method: VCap引入Witness-Adjudicator奖励对，将参考描述（证人）与视觉信号（裁判）配对，基于视觉信号显式验证参考与策略生成描述之间的事实一致性，提供超几何分布级精度的奖励信号。该设计允许从有缺陷的参考中有效学习，促进弱到强泛化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个图像和视频描述基准上，8B模型训练VCap后超越开源和闭源SOTA。人类评估证实其与事实正确性高度对齐。此外，VCap提升MLLM感知能力，跨任务泛化，并超越best-of-N蒸馏，挑战先前关于RLVR的假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献为一种新颖的奖励设计，解决了事实验证的细粒度问题，并挑战了RLVR的先前假设。学术上提供了弱到强泛化的新方法；实际中通过提升描述事实准确性，增强MLLM的感知和泛化能力。未来可探索更高效的奖励计算或扩展到其他任务。

title: Beyond pass@k: Redundancy-Aware RLVR for Multi-Sample Code Generation
abstract: LLMs for code generation are commonly evaluated in repeated-sampling settings using Pass@k, where multiple candidate programs are executed against unit tests under a finite sampling budget. While recent verifier-based reinforcement learning (RLVR) methods improve executable correctness, how these objectives affect redundancy among sampled programs remains poorly understood. In this work, we study implementation-level redundancy in code generation using JPlag, a plagiarism-detection system for code. Across models and benchmarks, we show that correctness-only RLVR often concentrates generations around repeated implementations, whereas Pass@k-aware objectives maintain lower redundancy and improve larger-budget performance. Motivated by these observations, we augment RLVR with direct anti-redundancy rewards based on JPlag similarity. Across 3 models and 3 benchmarks, discouraging near-duplicate generations reliably improves finite-budget executable performance, often matching or outperforming specialized Pass@k-aware objectives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种冗余感知的RLVR方法，通过JPlag相似度奖励减少代码重复，提升多采样生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多采样代码生成评估常用Pass@k，但基于验证器的强化学习(RLVR)仅关注正确性，导致生成代码存在大量重复实现，浪费采样预算。研究发现正确性RLVR会集中生成重复实现，而Pass@k感知目标能降低冗余，因此需直接减少冗余的策略。
light_analysis.method: 使用JPlag剽窃检测系统测量代码实现级相似度，在RLVR中引入反冗余奖励：对同一问题采样的多段代码计算两两JPlag相似度，惩罚高相似度对，鼓励多样性。在3个模型和3个基准上训练与评估。
light_analysis.result: 抑制近重复生成一致提升了有限采样预算下的可执行通过率，往往匹配或超越专门的Pass@k感知目标，证明了冗余感知训练的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出冗余感知的RLVR方法，通过直接奖励多样性解决正确性RLVR的重复实现问题，提升了多采样场景下代码生成的采样效率。学术价值在于揭示并缓解了正确性目标的缺陷，实际价值在于提高代码生成系统的鲁棒性。

title: AOE: Exhaustive Out-of-Distribution Detection via Recalibrating Outlier Labels
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for deploying machine learning models in open-world and safety-critical scenarios, where test inputs may deviate from the training distribution and overconfident predictions on unknown samples can lead to unreliable decisions. Outlier Exposure (OE) has emerged as a promising OOD detection paradigm by introducing auxiliary outliers during training to enlarge the margin between in-distribution (ID) and OOD samples. Existing OE-based methods typically enlarge this margin by employing uniform labels to maximize the entropy of OOD samples over ID categories. However, we theoretically show that uniform labels inevitably disregard the relations between OOD samples and ID categories, termed the over-softening effect, leading to a suboptimal margin bound. Our theoretical analysis further reveals that explicitly exploiting such relations can instead yield improved OOD detection performance. Motivated by this insight, we propose \underline{A}daptive Confidence \underline{OE} (AOE), a simple yet effective method that leverages temperature scaling to recalibrate outlier labels. Specifically, AOE generates adaptive soft targets from temperature-scaled model predictions for OOD samples, where the learnable temperature smooths the prediction distribution without fully erasing class-wise relational information. By supervising OOD samples with these adaptive soft targets, AOE preserves the semantic proximity between OOD samples and ID categories while encouraging the softened targets to approach a high-entropy distribution, thereby suppressing overconfident OOD predictions and enlarging the separation margin. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of AOE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应置信度异常暴露（AOE）方法，通过温度缩放重新校准异常标签，改善分布外检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布外检测对于开放世界和安全关键场景至关重要。现有基于异常暴露（OE）的方法使用均匀标签最大化异常样本的熵，但理论上存在过度软化效应，忽视了异常样本与类别间的关系，导致次优的边界。本研究旨在利用这种关系来提升检测性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应置信度异常暴露（AOE），利用温度缩放为异常样本生成自适应软目标。可学习温度平滑预测分布而不完全消除类别关系信息，通过监督异常样本接近高熵分布，同时保留其与类别间的语义邻近性，从而抑制过度自信预测并扩大分离边界。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行广泛实验，结果表明AOE方法在OOD检测性能上优于现有OE-based方法。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但强调了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AOE通过重新校准异常标签有效改善了分布外检测，理论分析支持其优势。该方法简单易用，适用于开放世界场景。未来可探索更复杂的温度调度或标签生成策略，进一步优化性能。

title: The Missing Piece in Pre-trained Model Evaluation: Reward-Guided Decoding Unlocks Task-Oriented Behavior Without Parameter Updates
abstract: With the rapid progress of large language models (LLMs), reliably evaluating the capabilities of pre-trained LLMs has become increasingly important. The challenge is that base pre-trained models are optimized for next-token prediction and often fail to follow instructions or produce well-formed answers under standard prompting and direct decoding. As a result, benchmark performance can conflate model capability with decoding-induced failures to produce task-oriented outputs, while exposing such behavior often relies on costly post-training. Recent decodingonly approaches attempt to reshape output distributions, but such methods can be inefficient and brittle across open-ended tasks. To address these limitations, we propose Energy-Based Decoding (EBD), a training-free, reward-guided framework for activating task-oriented behaviors from frozen pre-trained LLMs across both open-ended and objective tasks. EBD augments decoding with an external lightweight reward model, steering generations toward high-utility responses while anchoring them to the pre-trained model prior through a reward-tilted target distribution. We show that EBD shifts base-model outputs toward more instructionfollowing behavior, increasing behavioral similarity to post-trained counterparts and enabling a fairer inference-time evaluation of accessible pre-trained-model behavior. Empirically, EBD outperforms baselines across five models and six benchmarks, improving Qwen3-8B-Base on AlpacaEval2.0 from 8.8 to 44.5, reducing Mistral-7B Math500 latency by 18.9x relative to prior decoding work, and remaining robust to reward-model size.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的奖励引导解码框架EBD，从冻结的预训练LLM中激活面向任务的行为，实现更公平的推理时评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练语言模型优化于下一个词预测，标准解码难以产生符合指令的答案，导致基准性能混淆能力与解码失败。现有解码方法效率低且脆弱，尤其不适用于开放式任务。因此需要一种无需后训练、高效鲁棒的解码方法，以激活预训练模型的任务导向行为。
light_analysis.method: EBD框架在解码时引入外部轻量奖励模型，通过奖励倾斜的目标分布引导生成高效用响应，同时通过KL散度锚定预训练模型先验。无需参数更新，适用于开放式和客观任务。核心创新是将解码过程重塑为能量基础模型，奖励模型提供能量函数。
light_analysis.result: 在5个模型和6个基准上优于基线：Qwen3-8B-Base在AlpacaEval2.0从8.8提升至44.5；Mistral-7B在Math500延迟相比先前解码工作降低18.9倍；对奖励模型大小鲁棒。EBD有效改善了指令遵循行为，输出与后训练模型更相似。
light_analysis.conclusion: EBD为预训练模型评估提供新范式，无需参数更新即可激活任务导向行为，避免后训练成本。学术上揭示解码策略对评估的关键影响，实践上可提升基座模型的可用性。未来可探索更高效的奖励集成方式及多任务扩展。

title: Dual-branch Distilled Transformer for Efficient Asymmetric UAV Tracking
abstract: Given the real-time demands of UAV tracking, many methods simplify the backbone to reduce computation, but this often weakens feature representation and degrades performance in complex scenarios. To alleviate this issue, we propose EATrack, an efficient and asymmetric UAV tracking framework centered around a teacher-guided dual-branch distillation strategy that enhances the feature expressiveness of the lightweight student model. Specifically, EATrack investigates two complementary perspectives of knowledge transfer: spatially focused feature-level distillation that compensates for weakened representations by guiding the student to learn strong target representations, and prediction-level distillation that enhances spatial localization by learning the teacher's capability for accurate target localization. Furthermore, to enhance robustness against appearance variations, we introduce a fine-grained target-aware distillation strategy that selectively transfers the teacher's target modeling capacity to the student. A temporal adaptation module is incorporated at inference to enhance robustness over time. Experiments on five UAV benchmarks demonstrate that EATrack achieves a favorable balance between accuracy and speed. Code: https://github.com/GXNU-ZhongLab/EATrack

light_analysis.overview: 提出EATrack框架，通过教师引导的双分支蒸馏策略，在轻量学生模型中增强特征表达，实现高效非对称UAV跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机跟踪需实时性，常简化骨干网络以降低计算量，但这会削弱特征表示，导致复杂场景下性能下降。现有方法难以在保持轻量高效的同时，维持足够的特征表达能力和定位精度。因此，需要一种能够在轻量模型中有效恢复并增强特征表示的技术，以平衡速度与精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出EATrack框架，核心是教师引导的双分支蒸馏策略。包括：1）空间聚焦特征级蒸馏，引导学生学习强目标表示；2）预测级蒸馏，增强空间定位能力。此外，引入细粒度目标感知蒸馏，选择性转移教师的目标建模能力。推理阶段使用时序适应模块提升时间鲁棒性。整体采用非对称架构，教师模型复杂，学生模型轻量。
light_analysis.result: 在五个UAV跟踪基准（如UAV123、DTB70等）上实验，EATrack在精度和速度之间取得了有利平衡。相比其他轻量跟踪器，EATrack在保持实时性的同时，显著提升了复杂场景下的跟踪精度。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: EATrack通过创新的双分支蒸馏策略，有效解决了轻量UAV跟踪中特征表示弱化的问题，在不显著增加计算成本的前提下提升了性能。该工作为无人机实时跟踪提供了一种高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步探索更紧凑的教师模型或自适应蒸馏策略。

title: Enhancing Ultra-low-field MRI with Segmentation-guided Adversarial Learning
abstract: Ultra-low-field (ULF) MRI offers portable and low-cost imaging but suffers from poor image quality. To address this, we present our submission to the 2025 ULF Enhancement Challenge (ULF-EnC), where the goal is to synthesise high-field-like MRIs from 64 mT scans. Our pipeline enhances ULF MRI through a combination of anatomical conditioning and model ensembling. We first generate tissue segmentation priors using a Swin UNETR trained solely on challenge-provided data. These priors condition two independent enhancement networks - a CycleGAN and a transformer-based residual enhancement model (T-REX) - each trained to synthesise 3 T-like MRIs. Outputs from both models are combined using a weighted average. Our approach produces enhanced MRIs that were comparable to high-field scans both quantitatively and qualitatively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分割引导的对抗学习方法，结合CycleGAN和T-REX模型集成，将64 mT超低场MRI增强为3 T级图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 超低场MRI虽然便携且低成本，但图像质量差。现有方法难以生成高场级图像，因此需要有效的增强技术来提升诊断价值。该研究旨在通过合成高场级MRI来解决图像质量不足的问题，使超低场MRI在临床应用中更具可行性。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括三个步骤：首先使用Swin UNETR从挑战数据生成组织分割先验；然后利用这些先验分别训练两个增强网络——CycleGAN和基于Transformer的残差增强模型（T-REX），两者独立合成3 T MRI；最后通过加权平均集成两个模型的输出。所有训练仅使用挑战提供的数据。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在定量和定性评估中，生成的增强MRI与高场扫描（3 T）相当。摘要未提供具体指标（如PSNR或SSIM），但表明结果在挑战中具有竞争力，能有效提升图像质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了分割引导的对抗学习与模型集成在超低场MRI增强中的有效性，为低成本MRI的应用提供了可行方案。未来可探索更优的集成策略或扩展到其他场强。局限性在于依赖挑战数据，泛化性需进一步验证。

title: ROSD: Reflective On-Policy Self-Distillation for Language Model Reasoning across Domains
abstract: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) improves the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs) by providing dense token-level supervision for on-policy rollouts. However, existing OPSD methods often yield limited gains on in-domain reasoning and generalize poorly to out-of-domain problems. We identify two key causes: conditioning the self-teacher on a verified solution encourages imitation of training-domain reference trajectories rather than error-specific correction, and applying distillation to the full response can overwrite valid reasoning prefixes and reinforce overfitting.   We propose Reflective On-policy Self-Distillation (ROSD), a framework that turns reference-solution imitation into targeted reasoning correction through reflection-guided, error-localized distillation. For each rollout, ROSD uses a self-reflector to extract a corrective idea and locate the first erroneous span. The corrective idea guides the self-teacher toward targeted supervision, while the localized error span restricts distillation to where correction is needed. This design corrects flawed reasoning while preserving valid prefixes. Experiments on multiple in-domain and out-of-domain reasoning benchmarks show that ROSD yields stronger in-domain reasoning performance overall and substantially better out-of-domain generalization than standard OPSD. Code is available at https://github.com/ZiqiZhao1/ROSD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反思式在线策略自蒸馏框架，解决LLM推理的领域内性能提升有限和跨域泛化差的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）通过密集的令牌级监督提升LLM推理，但现有方法在领域内推理增益有限且跨域泛化差。原因在于：自教师条件化于验证解，导致模仿训练域参考轨迹而非错误特定修正；对整个响应应用蒸馏可能覆盖有效推理前缀并强化过拟合。因此需要一种能够进行错误定位和针对性修正的蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出反思式在线策略自蒸馏（ROSD），通过反思引导的错误定位蒸馏将参考解模仿转化为针对性推理修正。对每次rollout，使用自反射器提取修正观点并定位首个错误跨度。修正观点引导自教师产生目标监督，错误跨度限制蒸馏仅作用于需要修正的位置。该设计在修正错误推理的同时保留有效前缀。
light_analysis.result: 在多个领域内和跨域推理基准上，ROSD相比标准OPSD在领域内推理性能更强，且跨域泛化显著更好。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称整体更强和更好。
light_analysis.conclusion: ROSD通过反思式错误定位蒸馏解决了OPSD的模仿和过拟合问题，在提升LLM推理的领域内性能和跨域泛化方面有效。未来可探索更复杂的反射机制或应用于其他任务。代码已开源。

title: KSAFE-MM: A Multimodal Safety Benchmark via Localized Contextualization for Korean Cultural Risks
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) exacerbate safety risks by introducing vulnerabilities across multiple modalities, such as language and vision. Current MLLM safety evaluation tools, however, suffer from major limitations: 1) English-centric dataset construction, and 2) a focus on generic risks that are not tied to local cultural contexts. This paper introduces KSAFE-MM, a benchmark for Korean multimodal safety evaluation that covers both general safety risks and culture-specific vulnerabilities. KSAFE-MM consists of two parts, KSAFE-MM-G and KSAFE-MM-C. KSAFE-MM-G evaluates globally shared risks in Korean contexts through linguistic contextualization, which transforms generic safety queries into contextually grounded multimodal samples. KSAFE-MM-C targets culture-dependent MLLM safety vulnerabilities using localized visual queries derived from real-world contexts. It pairs these visual queries with jailbreak-style textual queries to cover multimodal safety risks involving cultural visual cues and malicious textual intent. Together, these components provide a general-to-local construction pipeline for evaluating both globally shared safety risks and culture-specific vulnerabilities. We evaluate 12 state-of-the-art MLLMs on KSAFE-MM and reveal that models exhibit greater vulnerability to culturally grounded attacks than to generic ones. Notably, jailbreaking strategies substantially amplify attack success rates, with ProgramExecution yielding up to 74.2% ASR compared to 13.4% for standard queries. Furthermore, we identify a systematic trade-off between safety and over-refusal, where models achieving low ASR tend to exhibit excessive refusal behavior on benign queries. These findings highlight the urgent need for culturally grounded safety evaluation beyond English-centric benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个针对韩语文化的多模态安全基准KSAFE-MM，涵盖通用和文化特定风险，揭示模型对文化攻击的脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型安全评估存在两大局限：数据集以英语为中心，且仅关注通用风险，忽略本地文化背景。随着MLLMs在多模态场景部署，文化特定风险可能导致严重安全隐患，例如视觉线索与恶意文本结合的越狱攻击。现有基准无法评估模型在非英语文化下的安全性，亟需构建文化感知的安全评估工具。
light_analysis.method: KSAFE-MM包含两部分：KSAFE-MM-G通过语言上下文化将通用安全查询转化为韩语场景的多模态样本；KSAFE-MM-C基于真实世界韩语文化上下文（如独特视觉线索）构建视觉查询，并配对越狱式文本查询，覆盖文化特定风险。采用通用到局部的构建流程，评估12个先进MLLM。
light_analysis.result: 模型对文化攻击更脆弱，越狱策略显著提升攻击成功率：ProgramExecution在文化场景达74.2% ASR，标准查询仅13.4%。此外发现安全性与过度拒绝间的权衡：低ASR模型倾向于对良性查询过度拒绝。
light_analysis.conclusion: KSAFE-MM揭示了文化差异对MLLM安全性的关键影响，强调需要超越英语中心基准进行文化感知评估。研究成果为构建更安全、文化适配的多模态模型提供了评测基础，未来可扩展至更多语言和文化。

title: Automated Estimation of Impact Time, Impact Location, and Shuttlecock Speed in Badminton Smashes Using Event Cameras
abstract: Quantifying impact phenomena in badminton smashes is important for evaluating both athletic performance and equipment; however, conventional measurement systems involve trade-offs between temporal resolution, data efficiency, and preparation effort. This study proposes a measurement method using two synchronized event cameras to automatically estimate impact time, impact location on the racket face, and post-impact shuttlecock speed in an integrated manner within the same trial. The swing interval was detected from event rate statistics, impact time was estimated from the shuttlecock trajectory inflection in the lateral-view event data, impact location was determined by ellipse fitting to the racket face in the rear-view event image, and shuttlecock speed was calculated in the sagittal plane. To validate the proposed method, Bland-Altman analysis was performed against a high-speed camera-based reference method using 125 smash trials from five players. Impact time and shuttlecock speed were estimated in all 124 analyzable trials, and impact location was estimated in 93.5% (116/124). The bias (95% CI) for impact time, medio-lateral impact location, longitudinal impact location, and shuttlecock speed were 1.84 ms (1.45 to 2.23), 3.45 mm (2.18 to 4.72), -1.92 mm (-2.97 to -0.88), and -1.00 m/s (-2.46 to 0.46), respectively. No proportional bias was observed for any metric. These results suggest that the proposed method can serve as a useful tool for integrated assessment of badminton smash performance and equipment in practical settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用事件相机自动估计羽毛球扣杀中的击球时间、击球位置和球速的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化羽毛球扣杀中的冲击现象对评估运动表现和装备至关重要，但传统测量系统在时间分辨率、数据效率和准备工作量之间存在权衡。现有方法难以在一次试验中同时准确、高效地获取击球时间、击球位置和球速。
light_analysis.method: 使用两个同步事件相机，通过事件率统计检测挥拍区间，从横向视角事件数据中的轨迹拐点估计击球时间，在后视角事件图像中通过椭圆拟合确定击球位置，并在矢状面计算球速。方法无需繁琐标定，可实现全自动处理。
light_analysis.result: 在5名运动员的125次扣杀测试中，击球时间和球速估计成功率达100%（124/124），击球位置估计成功率为93.5%（116/124）。与高速相机参考方法比较，击球时间偏差1.84 ms，击球位置偏差约3.45 mm（横向）和-1.92 mm（纵向），球速偏差-1.00 m/s，且无比例偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法能够在实际环境中集成评估羽毛球扣杀性能与装备，具有高时间分辨率和数据效率。虽存在轻微偏差，但可作为实用工具。未来可优化事件相机标定以进一步提高定位精度。

title: Confidence-Orchestrated Self-Evolution against Uncertain LLM Feedback
abstract: Self-evolving large language models (LLMs) learn by generating their own training tasks and solutions, reducing reliance on human-curated supervision. However, in many reasoning domains, the model must also validate generated tasks and judge generated answers to obtain training signals. This creates a training-signal challenge: erroneous self-judgments become erroneous gradient updates. Existing approaches either rely on external verifiers, which limits generality, or treat noisy self-generated feedback as supervision. We propose COSE (Confidence-Orchestrated Self-Evolution), which uses the LLM's intrinsic confidence as a lightweight uncertainty signal to modulate learning. COSE introduces confidence-weighted PPO updates and confidence-prioritized replay. Across 19 held-out benchmarks and four Qwen/Llama backbones (0.6B--4B), COSE consistently improves over base models and achieves the best average performance in general reasoning and mathematics, while remaining competitive on code. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/COSE_-B5C2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COSE方法，利用LLM内在置信度作为不确定性信号，通过置信度加权PPO和优先回放实现自我演化。
light_analysis.motivation: 自我演化LLM依赖自身生成和验证训练数据，但自我判断错误会导致梯度更新偏差。现有方法要么使用外部验证器限制通用性，要么直接处理噪声反馈。需要一种轻量级、无需外部信号的方法来缓解自我反馈不确定性对学习的影响。
light_analysis.method: COSE利用LLM生成答案时的内在置信度作为不确定性信号，设计置信度加权PPO更新，对高置信度样本赋予更大权重，同时采用置信度优先回放，优先训练置信度适中的样本。方法不依赖外部验证器，适用于多种推理任务。
light_analysis.result: 在19个零样本基准和四种Qwen/Llama模型（0.6B-4B）上评估，COSE在通用推理和数学任务上达到平均最佳性能，相比基线持续提升，代码任务上保持竞争力。具体性能指标优于未使用置信度调制的自进化方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: COSE通过置信度调制有效缓解自我反馈噪声，提升自进化LLM的训练稳定性与泛化能力。该方法为无外部验证的自我进化提供了实用方案，未来可探索置信度估计的改进及更复杂任务上的应用。

title: MemGuard: Preventing Memory Contamination in Long-Term Memory-Augmented Large Language Models
abstract: Memory-augmented large language models extend reasoning beyond a fixed context window by maintaining long-term memory across interactions. However, existing memory systems often collapse stable user facts, episodic events, and behavioral rules into a shared space, allowing functionally distinct memories to be retrieved and used as interchangeable evidence. We identify this failure mode as heterogeneous memory contamination, where context-specific events become overgeneralized claims, or semantically relevant but functionally incompatible memories mislead generation. To this end, we introduce MemGuard, a type-aware memory framework that preserves functional memory boundaries during memory construction and retrieval. It assigns each memory an explicit functional role at write time, maintains relations across type-isolated memories, and selectively composes evidence only from necessary memory types, reducing contamination from irrelevant or functionally incompatible evidence. Across hallucination and long-horizon conversation benchmarks, MemGuard improves memory reliability by up to 28.27% while retrieving up to 5.8x fewer memory tokens than prior methods. These results suggest that reliable long-term reasoning depends on principled organization and selective use of heterogeneous memory.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemGuard，一种类型感知的记忆框架，通过功能性角色分配和选择性证据组合，防止长时记忆增强型大语言模型中的异质记忆污染。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆系统将稳定用户事实、 episodic 事件和行为规则混在共享空间，导致异质记忆污染：上下文特定事件被过度概括为泛化声明，或语义相关但功能不兼容的记忆误导生成。这种污染损害了长时推理的可靠性，亟需保持功能性记忆边界的方法。
light_analysis.method: MemGuard在内存写入时为每个记忆分配显式功能角色（如事实、事件、规则），维护类型隔离记忆间的关系；检索时仅从必要记忆类型中组合证据，减少无关或功能不兼容证据的污染。框架类型感知地组织与选择性使用异质记忆。
light_analysis.result: 在幻觉和长时对话基准上，MemGuard将记忆可靠性提升最高28.27%，同时检索的记忆token数比先前方法减少5.8倍。实验证明类型化组织与选择性检索能显著提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemGuard表明可靠的长时推理依赖于原则性组织和选择性使用异质记忆。其类型感知框架有效缓解记忆污染，提升可靠性并降低检索开销。未来工作可探索自动功能类型发现或更细粒度的关系建模。

title: Zipping the Thought: When and How Compressed Reasoning Data Works in LLM Post-Training
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can now solve complex problems through long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, but the trade-off between performance and token cost remains a central challenge. To address this issue, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) often uses compressed reasoning data, where CoT traces are shortened into compact forms. However, the effect of such compressed reasoning data on post-training remains poorly understood. In this paper, we propose a taxonomy of CoT consisting of Explicit CoT, which outputs all operations without aggregation, Composed CoT, which combines multiple operations into a single step, and Implicit CoT, which omits intermediate operations. We construct a synthetic compositional reasoning task that allows controlled variation of difficulty, compression granularity, and data size, and conducted a comprehensive set of experiments across different model families and sizes. Notably, we find that (i) coarser CoT requires more SFT data, (ii) compared with Explicit CoT, Composed CoT and Implicit CoT benefit more from data scaling, while Composed CoT benefits from data repetition and Implicit CoT tends to lead to memorization, (iii) unlike SFT, subsequent reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) decomposes compressed steps learned during SFT, and (iv) unidirectional CoT ordering shows stronger generalization on longer sequential tasks. Our findings provide implications for CoT design under data resource constraints and offer important insights into the mechanisms of SFT and RL in LLM post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoT推理的压缩分类法，系统研究压缩推理数据在LLM后训练中的影响，揭示数据缩放、重复和强化学习的不同效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型通过长链式推理（CoT）解决复杂问题，但性能与token成本之间需要权衡。现有研究对压缩推理数据在后训练中的作用理解不足，缺乏系统分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索不同压缩粒度对监督微调和强化学习的影响机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出CoT推理的三分类法：显式CoT（完整步骤）、组合CoT（多步合并）、隐式CoT（省略中间步骤）。构建合成组合推理任务，控制难度、压缩粒度和数据量，在不同模型族和规模上进行实验。通过SFT和带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）研究压缩数据的效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现：(i) 更粗粒度的CoT需要更多SFT数据；(ii) 组合CoT和隐式CoT在数据缩放上收益更大，组合CoT受益于数据重复，隐式CoT易导致记忆化；(iii) RLVR会分解SFT中学习的压缩步骤；(iv) 单向CoT顺序在长序列任务上泛化更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为数据资源受限下的CoT设计提供指导，揭示了SFT和RL在LLM后训练中的不同机制。压缩数据可节省token但需注意数据量平衡，RL能进一步解压缩。未来可探索更复杂的推理任务和自动压缩策略。

title: Learning Compositional Latent Structure with Vector Networks
abstract: Deep networks are powerful function approximators, but they typically store many different computations in shared weight matrices, making it difficult to selectively reuse or adapt parts of them when a familiar structure appears in novel combinations. We introduce the Vector Network (VN), a hierarchical recurrent architecture in which each layer replaces a fixed weight matrix with a library of reusable rank-1 weight atoms. For each input, VN minimizes a layer-local energy to infer a sparse set of active weight atoms and their coefficients, jointly constrained by bottom-up input reconstruction and top-down feedback consistency. These weight atom coefficients then compose an input-specific low-rank weight matrix for that sample. After convergence, slow learning updates only the selected weight atoms through local residual signals scaled by the inferred coefficients. We evaluate VN on four compositional benchmarks spanning 1D signals, 2D spatial decoding, N-body dynamics, and compositional MNIST. VN matches strong baselines in distribution while often achieving out-of-distribution error about an order of magnitude lower when familiar factors must be recombined in novel ways. Vector networks thus make compositional generalization a structural property of the architecture and inference process rather than a brittle byproduct of fitting many behaviors into one shared dense parameter substrate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Vector Network，一种层级循环架构，用可复用的秩1权重原子库替换固定权重矩阵，通过局部能量最小化实现组合泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度网络将大量不同计算存储在共享权重矩阵中，导致当熟悉结构在新组合中出现时难以选择性重用或适应。现有方法缺乏有效的组合泛化机制，需要更结构化的方法来处理这种需求。
light_analysis.method: Vector Network (VN) 是一种层级循环架构，每层维护一个可复用的秩1权重原子库。对于每个输入，通过最小化层局部能量来推断稀疏的活动原子及其系数，该能量受自下而上输入重建和自上而下反馈一致性约束。推断得到的原子系数组成输入特定的低秩权重矩阵。学习阶段仅通过推断系数缩放的局部残差信号更新选中的原子。
light_analysis.result: 在1D信号、2D空间解码、N体动力学和组合MNIST四个组合基准上，VN在分布内性能匹配强基线，而在需要以新颖方式重组熟悉因子的分布外场景中，误差通常降低约一个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: VN通过架构设计将组合泛化转化为结构属性，而非依赖将多个行为拟合到共享稠密参数中的脆弱机制。该方法展示了在强组合泛化任务上的显著优势，未来可探索更高效的推理过程或更大的原子库。

title: Integrated and Cross-Architecture Interpretation of LLM Reasoning
abstract: Understanding how LLMs reason is hindered by a practical asymmetry: while their generated outputs are observable, the underlying reasoning patterns remain opaque. Relying on single probes, such as Mutual Information Peak (MIP) or Deep-Thinking Ratio (DTR), risks underestimating the genuine inferential structure. To response this deficiency, we present an Integrated, cross-Architecture Reasoning (IAR) framework, designed to provide a unified approach to LLM reasoning interpretability. Specifically, we first propose to use bandwidth-calibrated MIP coupled with Tukey IQR peak-detection to isolate reasoning-crucial tokens at the output layer. Second, we performed an overlap analysis between MIP-picked tokens and DTR-deep tokens to trace the cross-layer trajectories of those tokens. This also discloses whether reasoning-crucial tokens are computation-intensive as well, further facilitating to understand how reasoning patterns evolve across model layers. Finally, we apply a Jaccard stability metric over multi-domain problems to verify if the MIP-identified tokens are reasoning quality-guaranteed. Extensive experiments on three models (Qwen-7B, Qwen-14B, and Llama-8B) across four domains (mathematics, code, logic, and common sense) demonstrate IAR's generalizable interpretation capabilities across architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成跨架构推理解释框架IAR，统一解释LLM推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM推理理解存在输出可观察但推理模式不透明的对称性，现有单一探测方法（如MIP或DTR）可能低估真实推理结构，需要更全面的解释方法。
light_analysis.method: IAR框架包括：基于带宽校准的MIP和Tukey IQR峰值检测隔离推理关键token；MIP与DTR重叠分析追踪跨层轨迹；Jaccard稳定性度量验证推理质量。在Qwen-7B、Qwen-14B、Llama-8B上跨数学、代码、逻辑、常识四领域实验。
light_analysis.result: IAR在三个模型和四个领域上展示了可泛化的解释能力，验证了跨架构的统一推理解释有效性（摘要未提供具体量化指标）。
light_analysis.conclusion: IAR提供统一LLM推理可解释性方法，揭示推理模式跨层演变，有助于理解推理机制和模型改进，具有学术与实践价值。

title: Beyond Chunk-Local Extraction: Cross-Chunk Graph Augmentation for GraphRAG
abstract: GraphRAG extends retrieval-augmented generation by organizing corpora as explicit knowledge graphs, enabling graph-based retrieval for complex question answering. However, existing frameworks extract entities and relations within individual chunks, leaving cross-chunk relations -- those whose evidence spans multiple passages -- systematically absent from the index. Exhaustive LLM-based recovery of such relations is impractical due to the combinatorial explosion of chunk combinations. We present CrossAug, a GNN-guided CROSS-Chunk Graph AUGmentation method that enriches GraphRAG indices with cross-chunk relational structure as an offline step before query-time retrieval. CrossAug derives training supervision through self-supervised graph corruption, uses a topology-aware GNN to score subgraphs for missingness, and applies evidence-grounded LLM completion only to selected high-scoring regions. Experiments on three LLM-based GraphRAG frameworks across four multi-hop and long-document QA benchmarks demonstrate that CrossAug consistently improves performance, confirming the benefit of cross-chunk graph augmentation for retrieval-based question answering. Our code is available at https://github.com/DonFinliani/CrossAug.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CrossAug方法，通过GNN引导的跨块图增强解决GraphRAG中跨块关系缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GraphRAG框架仅在单个文本块内提取实体和关系，导致跨块关系（证据跨越多个段落）系统性缺失。由于块组合数量爆炸，用LLM全面恢复不切实际。因此需要一种高效的方法来丰富索引中的跨块关系结构。
light_analysis.method: CrossAug是一种GNN引导的跨块图增强方法，作为查询前离线步骤。它通过自监督图破坏生成训练监督，使用拓扑感知的GNN对子图进行缺失评分，然后仅对高评分区域进行基于证据的LLM补全。该方法不依赖特定LLM框架，可集成到多种GraphRAG中。
light_analysis.result: 在三种基于LLM的GraphRAG框架上，跨四个多跳和长文档QA基准进行实验，CrossAug一致提升性能，证实了跨块图增强对检索式问答的益处。摘要未提供具体数值，但提及一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出CrossAug有效填补了GraphRAG中跨块关系缺失的空白，通过智能选择性地补全缺失关系，避免了计算爆炸。实验证明其通用性和有效性。未来工作可能涉及更复杂的图结构或与端到端训练结合。

title: ResearchMath-14K: Scaling Research-Level Mathematics via Agents
