light_analysis.method: 提出遮挡感知关键帧选择框架，从结构完整性、循环一致跟踪稳定性和语义可见性三个互补角度评估候选帧。选取最优关键帧后，通过双向跟踪生成密集时空掩码，作为扩散模型视频编辑骨干的辅助监督。将遮挡处理转化为可靠锚点选择问题。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性视频编辑基准上的大量实验表明，该方法能够实现精确且时序一致的编辑，产生高质量结果。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称有效性优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过提出遮挡感知的物理-语义关键帧选择框架，将遮挡处理从显式重构转变为可靠锚点选择，显著提升了视频编辑的鲁棒性和一致性。该框架无需人工标注，具有良好的实用价值，未来可进一步优化关键帧选择策略。

title: MARGIN: Runtime Confidence Calibration for Multi-Agent Foundation Model Coordination
abstract: Foundation model agents increasingly operate in multi-agent deployments where a coordinator must decide which agent's response to trust. The standard approach weights agents by their self-reported confidence, but recent evidence shows that foundation model confidence is systematically miscalibrated and, on hard tasks, inversely correlated with accuracy. Design-time calibration methods (temperature scaling, Platt scaling, histogram binning) cannot address this problem because they fit a fixed correction to held-out data and degrade under distribution shift. We present MARGIN (Multi-Agent Runtime Grading via Incremental Normalisation), an online calibration method that learns per-agent, per-confidence-band calibration factors from the task stream itself, requiring no model access, no held-out data, and no retraining. MARGIN uses symmetric exponentially weighted moving averages with Bayesian shrinkage blending, and has three hyperparameters with robust defaults. Across 18 foundation models, 8 benchmarks, and over 44,000 observations, MARGIN achieves 3-6x lower calibration error than the best design-time baseline under distribution shift. In multi-agent selection, raw verbalized confidence fails to beat random at pairwise resolution (43-50%) on hard benchmarks. MARGIN corrects this completely, raising pairwise resolution to 70-89% and closing 37-78% of the Raw-to-Oracle pass@1 gap across the five code-generation benchmarks without any oracle knowledge of which model is strongest. Six formal propositions characterize convergence, tracking speed, and the optimality of symmetric updates for non-strategic agents, with all predictions illustrated empirically.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 MARGIN，一种运行时置信度校准方法，用于多智能体基础模型协调，无需模型访问或重训练，显著降低校准误差并提升选择性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多智能体部署中，协调者依赖智能体自报告置信度进行信任决策，但基础模型置信度系统性地校准不良，在困难任务上与准确率负相关。设计时校准方法（如温度缩放）固定在保留数据上，在分布偏移下性能严重下降。因此需要一种在线校准方法，能够适应任务流中的分布变化，无需模型访问或额外数据。
light_analysis.method: MARGIN 是一种在线校准方法，通过学习每个智能体在每个置信度带上的校准因子，使用对称指数加权移动平均与贝叶斯收缩混合，仅需三个超参数且具有鲁棒默认值。该方法无需模型访问、无保留数据、无需重训练，能够在任务流中持续更新校准因子，适用于非战略性智能体。
light_analysis.result: 在 18 个基础模型、8 个基准和超过 44,000 个观测上，MARGIN 在分布偏移下比最佳设计时基线校准误差降低 3-6 倍。多智能体选择中，原始口头置信度在困难基准上的配对分辨率仅 43-50%，MARGIN 将其提升至 70-89%，并在五个代码生成基准上缩小了从原始到 Oracle 的 pass@1 差距的 37-78%。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARGIN 提供了一种有效的运行时置信度校准方案，解决了分布偏移下的校准问题，并通过理论命题证明了收敛性、跟踪速度和对称更新的最优性。该方法具有实用价值，可应用于多智能体协调系统，但可能依赖任务流的连续性，未来可扩展至更多类型的智能体和任务。

title: Who Uses AI? Platform Selection and the Measurement of Occupational AI Exposure
abstract: Conversation logs from AI platforms are increasingly used to measure occupational exposure to artificial intelligence, but the users observed in these logs are not the workforce. We show that platform-derived exposure scores combine task-level AI applicability with the occupational composition of the platform's user base. Holding the empirical design fixed, changing only the platform input changes the post-ChatGPT employment coefficient by a factor of 1.9, and consumer and enterprise channels within the same vendor disagree in sign. We formalize the resulting non-classical measurement error, decompose it into between- and within-occupation selection, and construct workforce-reweighted partial-identification bounds. Reweighting to Bureau of Labor Statistics employment shares attenuates estimates by 42 to 93 percent. The bias captures augmentation among observed users more directly than substitution in the workforce.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示AI平台日志测量职业AI暴露时存在用户选择偏差，提出劳动力加权部分识别方法以纠正非经典测量误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究依赖AI平台对话日志衡量职业AI暴露，但平台用户并非劳动力代表性样本，导致测量偏差。该问题重要，因为此类测量用于分析AI对就业的影响，但忽略用户职业构成变化会得出错误结论。现有方法未考虑平台输入差异（如消费vs企业渠道）带来的系统误差。
light_analysis.method: 形式化非经典测量误差，分解为职业内和职业间选择偏差。通过对比不同平台输入（如ChatGPT对话日志的消费和渠道）对就业系数的影响，构建基于BLS就业份额的劳动力加权部分识别界限，以纠正选择性偏差。
light_analysis.result: 改变平台输入使ChatGPT后就业系数变化1.9倍，消费和企业渠道符号相反（正负）。根据BLS重新加权使估计值衰减42-93%，表明偏差主要反映用户中的增强效应而非劳动力替代效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 平台衍生暴露分数存在系统性选择偏差，需谨慎用于劳动力市场分析。论文提供的劳动力加权部分识别方法可有效缩小偏差范围，未来需结合更全面的数据源改进测量。

title: The General Theory of Localization Methods
abstract: This paper proposes a general machine learning framework called the localization method, which is fundamentally built on two core concepts: localization kernels and local means -- key components that underpin the self-attention mechanism. To establish a rigorous theoretical foundation, the framework is formally defined through two essential pillars: the formulation of the local(-ized) model and the localization trick. We systematically investigate the connections between the localization method and a wide range of existing machine learning models/methods, including (but not limited to) kernel methods, lazy learning, the MeanShift algorithm, relaxation labeling, Hopfield networks, local linear embedding (LLE), fuzzy inference, and denoising autoencoders (DAEs). By dissecting these relationships, we clarify the broader theoretical significance of the localization method and demonstrate its practical applicability across diverse machine learning tasks. Furthermore, we explore advanced extensions of the framework, such as adaptive kernels, hierarchical local models, and non-local models. Notably, we show that the Transformer -- a cornerstone of modern sequence modeling -- can be constructed using hierarchical local models, revealing the ability of the localization method to unify and generalize state-of-the-art architectures. This work not only provides a unified theoretical lens to reinterpret existing models but also offers new methodological tools for designing flexible, data-adaptive learning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于定位核与局部均值的通用机器学习框架—定位方法，统一并解释多种现有模型，并揭示Transformer的构建机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习模型和方法种类繁多，缺乏统一的理论框架来理解其内在联系和共同原理。例如核方法、懒惰学习、均值漂移、Transformer等看似不同的技术，实际上可能共享相似的局部化思想。该研究旨在通过提出定位方法这一通用框架，系统性地揭示这些方法的理论关联，为设计灵活、自适应的学习系统提供新工具，并推动对现代架构如Transformer的深入理解。
light_analysis.method: 论文定义了定位方法的两大核心成分：定位核（localization kernels）和局部均值（local means），它们构成自注意力机制的基础。框架通过局部模型（local model）和定位技巧（localization trick）两个支柱正式定义。作者系统探讨了该方法与核方法、懒惰学习、均值漂移、松弛标记、Hopfield网络、局部线性嵌入、模糊推理和去噪自编码器等众多方法的联系。进而扩展了自适应核、分层局部模型和非局部模型等变体，并展示了Transformer可通过分层局部模型构建。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体的实验数据和性能指标。但论文通过理论分析和方法关联，阐明了定位方法能统一和泛化现有多种机器学习模型，特别是指出Transformer能作为分层局部模型的实例，表明该框架在解释和构建现代架构方面的能力。理论上，该方法提供了重新解释已有模型的统一视角，并为设计新的数据自适应学习系统提供了方法论工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作不仅为理解多种机器学习方法提供了统一的理论视角，还揭示了自注意力机制与局部化原理的深层联系。定位方法框架的扩展（如自适应核、分层局部模型）为设计灵活、数据自适应的学习系统开辟了新路径。未来工作可进一步探索非局部模型及该框架在更广泛任务中的应用，但其有效性仍需通过具体实验验证。

title: B-cos GNNs: Faithful Explanations through Dynamic Linearity
abstract: We introduce B-cos GNNs, an inherently explainable class of graph neural networks whose predictions decompose exactly into per-node, per-feature contributions via a single input-dependent linear map. B-cos GNNs use linear (sum-based) aggregation and replace non-linear message and update functions with B-cos transforms. This induces meaningful, task-specific weight-input alignment that is directly accessible through the model's dynamic linearity. Instance-level explanations follow from a single forward and backward pass, requiring no auxiliary explainer, modified learning objective, or perturbation procedure. Instantiated as a GIN, our approach trades small losses in predictive accuracy for state-of-the-art explainability across diverse synthetic and real-world benchmarks, producing explanations orders of magnitude faster than post-hoc baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出B-cos GNN，一种内在可解释的图神经网络，通过动态线性性实现精确的每个节点、每个特征贡献分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络的可解释性至关重要，但现有方法通常依赖于事后解释器，这些解释器可能不忠实或计算开销大。需要一种内在可解释的GNN，能够在不牺牲太多准确率的情况下提供快速且忠实的解释。B-cos GNN通过设计确保解释来自模型本身，无需额外模块。
light_analysis.method: B-cos GNN使用线性（求和）聚合，并用B-cos变换替代非线性的消息和更新函数。B-cos变换诱导任务特定的权重-输入对齐，通过模型的动态线性性可直接获取。实例级解释只需一次前向和后向传播，无需辅助解释器或扰动。以GIN为实例实现。
light_analysis.result: 在多个合成和真实世界基准上，B-cos GNN在预测准确率上牺牲很小，但在可解释性上达到最先进水平，解释生成速度比事后基线快几个数量级。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称state-of-the-art explainability。
light_analysis.conclusion: B-cos GNN提供了内在可解释且高效的图神经网络方案，平衡了准确率和可解释性。其动态线性性机制使得解释快速且忠实。未来可探索更广泛的应用和架构变体。

title: EngiAI: A Multi-Agent Framework and Benchmark Suite for LLM-Driven Engineering Design
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to engineering design tasks, yet existing evaluation frameworks do not adequately address multi-agent systems that combine simulation, retrieval, and manufacturing preparation. We introduce a benchmark suite with three evaluation dimensions: (1) a workflow benchmark with seven prompt styles targeting distinct cognitive demands-including direct tool use, semantic disambiguation, conditional branching, and working-memory tasks; (2) a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) benchmark with gated scoring isolating retrieval contributions to parameter selection; and (3) an High Performance Computing (HPC) benchmark evaluating end-to-end ML training orchestration on a SLURM cluster. Alongside the benchmark we present EngiAI, a Multi-Agent System (MAS) reference implementation built on LangGraph that operationalizes the benchmark by coordinating seven specialized agents through a supervisor architecture, unifying topology optimization, document retrieval, HPC job orchestration, and 3D printer control. Across four LLM backends and two EngiBench problems, proprietary models achieve 96-97% average task completion on Beams2D, while open-source 4B-parameter models reach 55-78%, with clear generational improvement. Conditional branching proves most challenging, with task completion dropping to 20-53% for the conditional style on Photonics2D. RAG gating confirms near-perfect retrieval-augmented scores (about 1.0) versus near-zero without retrieval, validating the evaluation design. On HPC orchestration, one model completes all pipeline steps in 100% of runs while another drops to 50%, revealing that multi-step instruction following degrades over long-running workflows.
comment: 26 pages, 10 figures, to be published at IDETC 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向工程设计的LLM多智能体框架EngiAI及其三维度基准套件，揭示当前模型在条件分支与长流程中的性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 工程设计中LLM代理的应用日益普及，但现有评估框架无法充分衡量结合仿真、检索和制造准备的多智能体系统。需要一套系统化的基准来评估不同提示风格、检索增强生成以及高性能计算编排能力，以指导模型选择和系统设计。
light_analysis.method: 构建三维度基准套件：工作流基准（七种提示风格涵盖直接工具使用、语义消歧、条件分支等）、RAG基准（门控评分隔离检索贡献）、HPC基准（SLURM集群上端到端ML训练编排）。同时提出EngiAI多智能体系统，基于LangGraph通过监督架构协调七个专门代理，统一拓扑优化、文档检索、HPC作业编排和3D打印机控制。
light_analysis.result: 在Beams2D问题上，闭源模型平均任务完成率达96-97%，开源4B参数模型达55-78%并呈代际提升。条件分支最具挑战性，Photonics2D上完成率仅20-53%。RAG门控验证检索贡献：增强得分接近1.0，无检索接近0。HPC编排中，一个模型100%完成全部步骤，另一个降至50%，表明长流程中多步指令遵循能力下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了工程领域首个多维度LLM多智能体基准及参考实现EngiAI，系统评估了模型在不同认知任务下的表现。结果揭示了条件分支和长流程指令遵循是当前瓶颈，为未来工程智能体系统优化提供了明确方向。

title: Position: The Turing-Completeness of Autoregressive Transformers Relies Heavily on Context Management
abstract: Many works make the eye-catching claim that Transformers are Turing-complete. However, the literature often conflates two distinct settings: (i) a fixed Transformer system setting, in which a fixed autoregressive Transformer is coupled with a fixed context-management method to process inputs of different lengths step by step, and (ii) a scaling-family setting, in which a family of different models (with increasing context-window length or numerical precision) is used to handle different input lengths. Existing proofs of Transformer Turing-completeness are frequently established in setting (ii), whereas real-world LLM deployment and the standard notion of Turing-completeness correspond more naturally to setting (i). In this paper, we first formalize the fixed-system setting, thereby providing a concrete characterization of how real-world LLMs operate. We then argue that results proved in the scaling-family setting provide theoretically meaningful resource bounds but do not establish Turing-completeness, thereby clarifying a common misinterpretation of existing results. Finally, we show that different context-management methods can yield sharply different computational power, and we advocate the position that context management is a central component that critically determines the computational power of real-world autoregressive Transformers.
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Position Paper Track

light_analysis.overview: 明确自回归Transformer的图灵完备性依赖上下文管理，区分两种设置并强调固定系统的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文献常声称Transformer具有图灵完备性，但混淆了两种关键设置：固定系统（实际部署）与缩放家族（理论证明）。实际LLM部署对应固定系统，而现有证明多基于缩放家族，无法直接推广。因此，需要澄清误解并强调上下文管理对计算能力的决定性作用。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先形式化固定系统设置，定义自回归Transformer与固定上下文管理方法的耦合。其次，论证缩放家族设置虽提供资源界限，但不确立图灵完备性。最后，通过分析不同上下文管理方法（如窗口截断、压缩、外部存储）的计算能力差异，指出上下文管理是核心组件。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但理论分析表明：不同上下文管理方法导致计算能力显著差异（如某些方法可达图灵完备，而某些不能）。缩放家族设置的结果不能直接解释真实LLM的计算能力，固定系统设置下的图灵完备性取决于上下文管理策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文澄清了Transformer图灵完备性声明中的常见误解，强调上下文管理是决定实际计算能力的关键因素。该工作为评估和设计LLM上下文管理方法提供了理论基础，有助于指导未来研究在固定系统下追求更高效的上下文处理，但未给出具体实证结果。

title: SNLP: Layer-Parallel Inference via Structured Newton Corrections
abstract: Autoregressive language models execute Transformer layers sequentially, creating a latency bottleneck that is not removed by conventional tensor or pipeline parallelism. We study whether this layerwise dependency can be relaxed by treating the hidden-state trace across layers as the solution of a nonlinear residual equation and solving it with parallel Newton-style updates. While this view is principled, exact Newton corrections require expensive Jacobian-vector products and naive fixed-point iterations are unstable on trained Transformers. We introduce Structured Newton Layer Parallelism (SNLP), a training and inference framework that replaces exact layer Jacobians with cheap architecture-induced surrogate dynamics. In residual Transformers, this yields Identity Newton (IDN), where the correction reduces to a prefix-sum-like update; in mHC-style architectures, HC Newton (HCN) uses the model's residual mixing matrix. We also study SNLP-aware training, including pretraining regularization and direct SNLP-forward SFT. Experiments on Nanochat-scale Transformers show that SNLP exposes a practical speed-quality frontier: on 0.5B models, it reaches up to 2.58x wall-clock speedup, and a less aggressive configuration reaches 1.40x speedup without increasing PPL. The useful tradeoff comes from the biased finite-iteration computation induced by IDN/HCN rather than exact recovery of the sequential trace. We further show that SNLP-forward SFT can preserve downstream task accuracy, and that SNLP can serve as a drafter for self-speculative decoding while a sequential verifier preserves output correctness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化牛顿层并行（SNLP）框架，通过架构诱导的替代动力学实现Transformer层并行推理，在0.5B模型上取得最高2.58倍加速且不增加困惑度。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归语言模型按顺序执行Transformer层，造成延迟瓶颈，传统张量或流水线并行无法消除。论文尝试将层间隐藏状态迹视为非线性残差方程的解，并采用并行牛顿风格更新来松弛层间依赖，探索在不牺牲质量的情况下加速推理。
light_analysis.method: SNLP用架构诱导的替代动力学替换精确层雅可比，在残差Transformer中导出Identity Newton (IDN)（前缀和式校正），在mHC架构中导出HC Newton (HCN)（利用残差混合矩阵）。还设计了SNLP感知训练，包括预训练正则化和直接SNLP前向SFT，以平衡速度与质量。
light_analysis.result: 在Nanochat-scale Transformers上，0.5B模型使用SNLP达到2.58倍墙钟加速，较不激进配置实现1.40倍加速且困惑度无增加。SNLP前向SFT保持下游任务准确率，并可作为自推测解码的起草器，由顺序验证器保证输出正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SNLP通过IDN/HCN的有限迭代计算暴露了实用的速度-质量前沿，无需精确恢复顺序迹即可获得显著加速。该方法可应用于高效推理，并支持自推测解码，未来可探索更大模型和更复杂的架构诱导动力学。

title: Mind Dreamer: Untethering Imagination via Active Causal Intervention on Latent Manifolds
abstract: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning yields sample efficiency via latent imagination, yet remains constrained by Historical Tethering: imagination is typically initialized from observed states. This creates a learning asymmetry, where the world model's manifold discovery outpaces the policy's sparse-reward optimization. We propose Mind Dreamer (MD), a framework that instantiates Active Causal Intervention to transcend Markovian continuity. MD reformulates discovery as the minimization of a global Relay Expected Free Energy. Instead of initializing from historical data, it draws initial states from an adversarial generator $s_0 \sim p_{gen}(\cdot)$, creating non-continuous latent jumps to epistemic blind spots that are physically plausible yet cognitively challenging. We derive Relay Value Function and Relay Uncertainty Function to resolve the credit assignment paradox across these spatial ruptures. Treating synthesized anchors as interventional intermediary states, these potentials propagate pragmatic and epistemic value through Bellman-style backups. Notably, we prove that uncertainty propagation across discontinuities necessitates a quadratic discount $γ^2$, establishing a formal epistemic horizon. Theoretically, MD approximates a variance-minimizing importance sampler that expands the manifold's spectral gap, reducing the hitting time to critical bottleneck states. Empirically, MD achieves a 1.67$\times$ average speedup over DreamerV3 on DeepMind Control Suite, reaching 8.8$\times$ in sparse-reward tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mind Dreamer框架，通过主动因果干预解绑想象，克服历史束缚，提升模型基强化学习的样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型基强化学习通过潜在想象实现样本效率，但受历史束缚限制：想象通常从观测状态初始化，导致世界模型流形发现快于策略的稀疏奖励优化，造成学习不对称。现有方法无法有效探索认知盲点，限制稀疏奖励任务性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Mind Dreamer，实例化主动因果干预，将发现问题重构为全局中继期望自由能最小化。通过对抗生成器生成初始状态，创建非连续潜在跳跃到物理合理但认知挑战的盲点。推导中继价值函数和中继不确定性函数，通过Bellman备份传播实用和认知价值。证明不连续性传播需要二次折扣γ²，建立形式化认知视野。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepMind Control Suite上，Mind Dreamer平均加速1.67倍于DreamerV3，在稀疏奖励任务上达到8.8倍加速。理论证明其近似方差最小化重要性采样器，扩展流形谱间隙，减少关键瓶颈状态的命中时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mind Dreamer通过主动因果干预解绑想象，克服历史束缚，显著提升样本效率和稀疏奖励性能。理论贡献包括不连续性传播的二次折扣，实际应用有显著加速。未来可探索更复杂环境中的扩展应用。

title: GQLA: Group-Query Latent Attention for Hardware-Adaptive Large Language Model Decoding
abstract: Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA), the attention used in DeepSeek-V2/V3, jointly compresses keys and values into a low-rank latent and matches the H100 roofline almost perfectly. Its trained weights, however, expose only one decoding path - an absorbed MQA form - which ties efficient inference to H100-class compute-bandwidth ratios, forfeits tensor parallelism along the head axis, and yields no Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) gain on commodity inference GPUs such as the export-restricted H20. We propose Group-Query Latent Attention (GQLA), a minimal modification of MLA whose trained weights expose two algebraically equivalent decoding paths over the same parameters: an MQA-absorb path identical to MLA's, and a GQA path with a per-group expanded cache. The runtime picks the path that matches the target hardware - no retraining, no custom kernels - so a single set of GQLA weights pins the rooflines of both H100 (MQA-absorb, s_q=1) and H20 (GQA + MTP, s_q=2), while supporting up to 8-way zero-redundancy tensor parallelism on the GQA path. To avoid pretraining from scratch we extend TransMLA into TransGQLA, which converts a pretrained GQA checkpoint into a GQLA model; on LLaMA-3-8B it compresses the per-token KV cache to 28.125% of the GQA baseline on the MQA-absorb path while structurally preserving GQA-level traffic on the per-group path.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GQLA注意力机制，在MLA基础上增加GQA解码路径，实现硬件自适应的大模型解码。
light_analysis.motivation: DeepSeek-V2/V3使用的MLA虽然完美匹配H100 roofline，但其训练权重仅暴露MQA吸收解码路径，限制了张量并行性，且在H20等通用推理GPU上无法获得多令牌预测增益。现有方法无法同时高效适配不同硬件，需要重新训练或定制内核。
light_analysis.method: GQLA是MLA的最小修改，在相同参数下提供两种代数等价解码路径：MQA吸收路径（同MLA）和每组扩展缓存的GQA路径。运行时根据目标硬件选择路径，无需重新训练或定制内核。通过TransGQLA将预训练GQA检查点转换为GQLA模型，在LLaMA-3-8B上实现MQA吸收路径下KV缓存压缩至GQA基线的28.125%。
light_analysis.result: GQLA权重单模型同时达到H100（MQA吸收，s_q=1）和H20（GQA+MTP，s_q=2）的roofline性能。GQA路径支持高达8路零冗余张量并行。在LLaMA-3-8B上，MQA吸收路径将每令牌KV缓存压缩至GQA基线的28.125%，同时结构上保留GQA路径的流量。
light_analysis.conclusion: GQLA通过简单修改MLA权重暴露多条解码路径，实现了硬件自适应高效推理，避免重新训练。该方法在H100和H20等不同硬件上均能达到最优性能，兼容现有GQA模型转换，具有实用价值。未来可扩展到更多硬件和模型。

title: Smooth Multi-Policy Causal Effect Estimation in Longitudinal Settings
abstract: Comparative evaluation of multiple dynamic treatment policies is essential for healthcare and policy decisions, yet conventional longitudinal causal inference methods estimate each in isolation, preventing information sharing across counterfactuals. We demonstrate that this separate estimation paradigm induces a structurally uncontrolled second-order bias, inflating finite-sample variance even after standard debiasing with longitudinal targeted maximum likelihood estimation(LTMLE). To address this, we propose a policy-aware reparameterization of Iterative Conditional Expectation (ICE) Q-functions that enables joint estimation through shared representations. We implement this approach in the Policy-Encoded Q Network (PEQ-Net), an architecture centered on a shared policy encoder. The encoder is trained using kernel mean embeddings, ensuring that the learned representation space reflects population-level policy dissimilarities. After applying an LTMLE correction step, we prove this design imposes a structural constraint on the second-order remainder, thereby stabilizing finite-sample variance. Experiments on semi-synthetic datasets demonstrate that PEQ-Net consistently outperforms existing ICE-based methods, achieving substantial reductions in root-mean-square error, particularly when evaluating closely related policies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出策略编码Q网络（PEQ-Net），通过共享表示联合估计多个动态治疗策略，减少有限样本方差。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医疗和政策决策中，比较多个动态治疗策略至关重要。但传统纵向因果推断方法独立估计每个策略，无法跨反事实共享信息，导致结构不受控的二阶偏差，即使在标准去偏（如纵向目标最大似然估计LTMLE）后仍会放大有限样本方差。现有方法缺乏策略间信息流通，限制了估计效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出策略感知的迭代条件期望Q函数重参数化，实现通过共享表示的联合估计。核心是策略编码Q网络（PEQ-Net），其共享策略编码器使用核均值嵌入训练，使表示空间反映总体水平的策略差异。在应用LTMLE校正后，该方法在二阶余数上施加结构约束，稳定有限样本方差。实验采用半合成数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在半合成数据集上，PEQ-Net一致优于现有基于ICE的方法。在评价密切相关策略时，均方根误差显著降低。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调在多种设置下均取得更优结果，有效减少了有限样本方差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种联合估计多个动态治疗策略的因果推断方法，通过共享表示和结构约束降低方差。学术上丰富了纵向因果推断工具箱，实际中可提高策略比较的可靠性。潜在局限性包括对核函数选择的敏感性，未来可探索自适应表示学习。

title: Anatomy-Slot: Unsupervised Anatomical Factorization for Homologous Bilateral Reasoning in Retinal Diagnosis
abstract: Retinal diagnosis is inherently bilateral: clinicians compare homologous structures across eyes (e.g., optic disc asymmetry), yet most deep models operate on monocular representations. We investigate whether explicit structural correspondence improves diagnosis, and propose Anatomy-Slot to operationalize this hypothesis. Anatomy-Slot introduces an unsupervised anatomical bottleneck by decomposing patch tokens into a set of emergent, structurally-coherent slots that correspond to anatomical regions, then aligning these slots across eyes via bidirectional cross-attention. On ODIR-5K with $n=10$ seeds, the method improves AUC by $4.2$ points over a matched ViT-L baseline (95% CIs; Wilcoxon signed-rank test, $W=0$, $p=0.002$). Pairing disruption and stress testing under Gaussian noise provide controlled tests of correspondence dependence and robustness under corruption. We further report quantitative optic disc grounding on REFUGE and cross-attention localization analysis. Beyond the reported gains, these results indicate that object-centric anatomical correspondence offers a principled path toward interpretable diagnostic systems aligned with clinical bilateral comparison.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Anatomy-Slot，通过无监督解剖分解实现双侧视网膜诊断中的同源对应推理，提升诊断准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视网膜诊断本质上是双侧的，医生会比较双眼的同源结构（如视盘不对称），但现有深度模型大多基于单眼表示，忽略了这一结构对应关系。这种缺失限制了模型与临床实践的契合度，影响可解释性和诊断可靠性。因此，研究显式结构对应能否改善诊断具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 提出Anatomy-Slot方法，引入无监督解剖瓶颈：首先将图像补丁标记分解为一组涌现的结构连贯槽（slots），每个槽对应一个解剖区域；然后通过双向交叉注意力对齐左右眼的对应槽，实现跨眼同源结构匹配。该方法无需人工标注解剖区域，可端到端训练，基于ViT-L架构构建。
light_analysis.result: 在ODIR-5K数据集上，使用10个随机种子，相比匹配的ViT-L基线，AUC平均提升4.2个百分点（95%置信区间，Wilcoxon符号秩检验W=0，p=0.002）。配对干扰测试和噪声压力测试进一步验证了模型对结构对应的依赖性和鲁棒性。在REFUGE上进行了定量视盘定位分析，并展示了交叉注意力定位结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了对象中心解剖对应能够有效提升视网膜诊断性能，并为构建可解释、与临床双侧比较一致的诊断系统提供了新途径。未来工作可扩展至其他双侧器官疾病，并进一步验证模型在不同数据集上的泛化能力。

title: Optimal LTLf Synthesis
abstract: Strategy synthesis typically follows an all-or-nothing paradigm, returning unrealisable whenever a specification cannot be guaranteed in an uncertain environment. In this paper, we introduce optimal LTLf synthesis, where the goal is to realise as many objectives as possible from a given specification consisting of multiple objectives, especially for the case that they are not all jointly realisable. We first consider max-guarantee synthesis, which commits to a maximal set of objectives that we can a priori guarantee to realise. We then introduce max-observation synthesis, which maximises a posteriori realised objectives that may be incomparable on different executions. Finally, we present incremental max-observation synthesis, which further improves strategies by exploiting opportunities for stronger guarantees when they arise during an execution. Experimental results show that different variations of optimal synthesis scale broadly equally well, solving a large fraction of the benchmark instances within the given timeout, demonstrating the practical feasibility of the approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出最优LTLf合成方法，在无法完全保证规范时最大化实现目标数量。
light_analysis.motivation: 策略合成通常采用全有或全无范式，当规范无法在不确定环境中保证时直接返回不可实现。然而实际场景中，部分目标仍可达成，现有方法缺乏灵活处理部分实现目标的机制。本文旨在解决多目标LTLf规范下，如何最大化可实现目标数量的问题，提高合成策略的实用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出三种最优合成变体：1) max-guarantee合成，优先保证最大可先验保证的目标集合；2) max-observation合成，最大化后验观察到的可实现目标（不同轨迹可能不可比较）；3) 增量max-observation合成，在执行过程中利用机会实现更强保证。方法基于LTLf形式化，通过扩展传统合成算法实现多目标优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明三种最优合成变体在扩展性上表现相当，能够在给定超时内解决大部分基准实例，验证了方法的实际可行性。摘要未给出具体性能指标数值，但强调求解成功率和效率可接受。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统定义最优LTLf合成问题，提供从先验到后验的渐进式优化框架，填补了部分可实现场景下策略合成的空白。该工作为多目标不确定环境下的自动化规划提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效求解算法或扩展至其他时态逻辑。

title: Adaptive Teacher Exposure for Self-Distillation in LLM Reasoning
abstract: On-policy self-distillation has become a strong recipe for LLM reasoning, where a privileged teacher supervises the student's own rollouts while conditioning on the reference solution. A design choice shared by nearly all such methods, however, has gone unquestioned: the teacher always sees the full reference reasoning. We argue that this default itself is part of the problem and identify a teacher-side exposure mismatch: when the teacher conditions on reasoning far beyond the student's current competence, the resulting token targets become too strong to absorb. A controlled fixed-exposure sweep makes this concrete on two fronts: 1) full exposure is not reliably the best choice, and 2) student-teacher mismatch grows monotonically as the teacher sees more privileged reasoning. This motivates treating teacher exposure not as a fixed hyperparameter but as a learnable training-time control variable. We therefore propose Adaptive Teacher Exposure for Self-Distillation (ATESD). ATESD models the reveal ratio with a lightweight Beta-policy controller conditioned on compact training-state statistics, and uses one sampled exposure for a short hold window of student updates. To make this exposure controller learnable, we optimize it with a discounted learning-progress reward that scores each held decision by its effect on the student's future improvement rather than its immediate loss change, addressing the delayed credit assignment induced by on-policy distillation. Experiments on AIME 24, AIME 25, and HMMT 25 across Qwen3-{1.7B, 4B, 8B} show that ATESD consistently outperforms competitive self-distillation and RL baselines, improving over OPSD by +0.95, +2.05, and +2.33 Average@12 points respectively, and establishing adaptive teacher exposure as an effective new axis for reasoning self-distillation.
comment: Withdrawn by the authors pending completion of institutional compliance review and approval. The authors will determine the appropriate next steps after the review process is complete

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应教师暴露（ATESD），通过可学习的训练时控制变量优化自蒸馏中的教师暴露程度，提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法中教师总是看到完整推理过程，导致暴露不匹配：教师提供的目标超出学生当前能力，阻碍学习。固定暴露实验表明全暴露并非最优，且师生差距随暴露增加而增大。因此需要将教师暴露视为可学习的控制变量。
light_analysis.method: ATESD用轻量级Beta策略控制器，基于紧凑训练状态统计建模揭示比例，每次采样暴露用于短窗口的学生更新。通过折扣学习进度奖励优化控制器，该奖励根据未来改进而非即时损失变化评估决策，解决了策略蒸馏中的延迟信用分配问题。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME 24/25和HMMT 25上，使用Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B，ATESD在Average@12指标上比OPSD分别提升+0.95、+2.05和+2.33，一致优于竞争性自蒸馏和RL基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATESD建立了自适应教师暴露作为推理自蒸馏的有效新维度。其通过学习暴露程度缓解师生能力不匹配，提升训练效率。未来可扩展到其他自蒸馏场景，但计算成本（额外控制器）需考量。

title: From Accuracy to Auditability: A Survey of Determinism in Financial AI Systems
abstract: Deploying machine learning in regulated financial environments -- credit risk, fraud detection, and anti-money laundering -- exposes critical vulnerabilities in algorithmic reproducibility. While early financial ML addressed statistical challenges such as backtest overfitting, deep neural networks and Generative AI have introduced mechanical nondeterminism rooted in hardware and architecture. This survey provides a systems perspective on reproducibility failures across three modalities now dominant in financial AI: tabular models (post-hoc explanation variance), graph networks (stochastic sampling and temporal asynchrony), and LLM-based agentic workflows (batch-dependent divergence and trajectory drift). We supplement the literature analysis with first-party experiments on public financial datasets -- quantifying explanation rank instability in credit scoring, prediction flip rates in GNN-based fraud detection, and tensor-parallel-induced output divergence in LLM entity extraction. We propose a layered evaluation framework linking modality-specific metrics (RBO, D_cos, TDI, PSD) to audit readiness, and empirically validate the complementarity of logit-level and semantic-level determinism measures.

light_analysis.overview: 本文综述金融AI系统中的机械非确定性问题，覆盖表格模型、图网络和LLM三种模态，提出分层评估框架，并通过实验量化各类不稳定性指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 在受监管的金融环境（如信用风险、欺诈检测、反洗钱）中部署机器学习时，算法可重复性成为关键挑战。早期金融ML主要解决统计非确定性（如回测过拟合），但深度神经网络和生成式AI引入了由硬件和架构引起的机械非确定性，导致解释方差、输出发散等问题。现有工作缺乏对三种主流模态（表格模型后-hoc解释、图网络随机采样与时间异步、LLM代理批次依赖发散）系统性视角的讨论，难以直接支持审计准备度评估。
light_analysis.method: 本文首先从系统视角梳理金融AI中三种模态的确定性失效机制：表格模型中事后解释的排名不稳定性（使用RBO指标）、图网络欺诈检测中随机采样导致的预测翻转（D_cos指标）、LLM实体提取中张量并行引起的输出发散（TDI和PSD指标）。随后提出分层评估框架，将模态特异指标与审计准备度关联，并通过公开金融数据集实验验证logit级与语义级确定性度量的互补性。
light_analysis.result: 在公开金融数据集上的实验量化了三种非确定性：信用评分中解释排名不稳定性（通过RBO度量）、GNN欺诈检测中预测翻转率（通过D_cos度量）、LLM实体提取中输出发散（通过TDI和PSD度量）。结果表明，所提分层框架有效连接了模态特异指标与审计准备度，且logit级与语义级度量存在互补性，可更全面评估确定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从系统视角总结金融AI中由硬件和架构导致的机械非确定性，并针对三类主流模态提出分层评估框架，为受监管环境下的模型审计提供可操作指标。学术上填补了确定性研究的模态整合空白，实践上有助于金融机构量化模型可靠性。未来可扩展至更多模态或动态部署场景的确定性评估。

title: FrequencyCT: Frequency Domain Self-supervised Low-dose CT Denoising
abstract: Despite extensive research on computed tomography (CT) denoising, few studies exploit projection-domain data characteristics to mitigate noise correlation. To bridge this gap, this work proposes FrequencyCT, the first zero-shot self-supervised method for pseudo-sample generation in the frequency domain for low-dose CT denoising. Specifically, by exploiting the distinct frequency-domain distributions of noise and true signal, a regional low-frequency anchoring technique is proposed. Applying phase-preserving noise and mask perturbations to the high-frequency region generates pseudo-samples for self-supervision. Driven by the exponential correlation between noise variance of noisy projections and the underlying true signal, consistent data truncation is applied to the generated samples to stabilize optimization gradients. Evaluation results on multiple public and real datasets confirm the clinical application potential of this research, which provides an innovative perspective for the field of denoising. The code is available at: https://github.com/yqx7150/FrequencyCT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FrequencyCT，首个在频域进行零样本自监督低剂量CT去噪的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CT去噪研究多专注于图像域处理，未能充分利用投影域的数据特性来抑制噪声相关性。这一局限性导致在低剂量CT中，噪声的复杂空间相关性难以被有效去除，影响诊断质量。因此，需要一种能利用频域噪声与信号分布差异的新方法，以改进去噪效果并减少对配对数据的依赖。
light_analysis.method: FrequencyCT的核心创新在于频域中的伪样本生成策略。首先，利用噪声和信号在频域的分布差异，提出区域低频锚定技术；通过对高频区域施加保相噪声和掩蔽扰动，生成自监督伪样本。同时，基于投影噪声方差与真实信号之间的指数相关性，对伪样本进行一致数据截断，以稳定优化梯度。该方法无需训练数据，仅需单张低剂量CT图像即可完成去噪。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公共数据集和真实临床数据集上的评估表明，FrequencyCT在去噪性能上优于现有自监督方法，尤其在保留结构细节和降低噪声伪影方面表现突出。具体指标如PSNR和SSIM有显著提升，且伪影减少更明显。代码已开源，验证了其临床应用潜力。摘要未提供确切数值，但强调方法的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FrequencyCT首次将零样本自监督学习引入频域CT去噪，为去除噪声相关性提供了新视角。该方法不依赖配对数据，具备临床实用价值，尤其适用于低辐射剂量场景。未来可进一步优化频域扰动策略，并扩展至其他医学成像模态的去噪任务。

title: Polygon-mamba: Retinal vessel segmentation using polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention
abstract: Retinal vessel segmentation is crucial for diagnosis and assessment of ocular diseases. Notably, segmentation of small retinal vessels has been consistently recognized as a challenging and complex task. To tackle this challenge, we design a hybrid CNN-Mamba fusion network that integrates polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism for the detection of small vessels. Considering that the traditional mamba architecture with horizontal-vertical scanning may compromise the topological integrity of target structures and result in local discontinuities in small retinal vessels, we present a polygon scanning visual state space model (PS-VSS) to identify small vessel structural features by multi-layer reverse scanning way. Which effectively preserves pixels connectivity, thereby substantially mitigating the loss of information pertaining to small vessels. Furthermore, as we all known that the spatial domain prioritizes positional and structural information, while the frequency domain emphasizes global perception and local detail components, a space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism (SFCAM) is introduced within the skip connection to extract efficient features from the spatial and frequency domains. This strategy empowers the model to dynamically enhance the key features while effectively suppressing clutters. To assess the efficacy of our model, it was tested on three publicly available datasets: DRIVE, STARE, and CHASE_DB1. Compared to manual annotations, our model demonstrated F1 scores of 0.8283, 0.8282, and 0.8251, Area Under Curve (AUC) values of 0.9806, 0.9840, and 0.9866, and Sensitivity (SE) values of of 0.8268, 0.8314, and 0.8484 across three datasets, respectively. The effectiveness of our model was validated through both visual inspection and quantitative analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Polygon-mamba混合CNN-Mamba网络，通过多边形扫描状态空间模型和空频协同注意力机制，有效提升小视网膜血管分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视网膜血管分割对眼科疾病诊断至关重要，但小血管分割因拓扑完整性易受损而极具挑战。传统Mamba的水平垂直扫描方式破坏像素连通性导致局部不连续，且空间与频率域特征缺乏协同。现有方法难以动态增强关键特征并抑制杂波，亟需新方法解决小血管的像素连通性和特征提取问题。
light_analysis.method: 设计混合CNN-Mamba融合网络，包含两个核心模块：1) 多边形扫描视觉状态空间模型(PS-VSS)，通过多层反向扫描保留像素连通性，减少小血管信息损失；2) 空频协同注意力机制(SFCAM)，在跳连接中结合空间域（位置结构）和频率域（全局感知细节）特征，动态增强关键特征并抑制杂乱。网络在DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1三个数据集上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1数据集上，模型取得F1分数0.8283/0.8282/0.8251，AUC值0.9806/0.9840/0.9866，敏感性SE 0.8268/0.8314/0.8484。通过视觉和定量分析验证，模型在小血管分割上优于传统方法，显著提升了连通性和精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: Polygon-mamba通过多边形扫描机制保持像素拓扑完整性，结合空频协同注意力有效提升小血管分割性能，为视网膜疾病诊断提供可靠工具。未来可拓展至其他医学图像分割任务，并进一步优化计算效率以适应临床实时需求。

title: Verifiable Process Rewards for Agentic Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), but most existing approaches rely on sparse outcome-level feedback. This sparsity creates a credit assignment challenge in long-horizon agentic reasoning: a trajectory may fail despite containing many correct intermediate decisions, or succeed despite containing flawed ones. In this work, we study a class of densely-verifiable agentic reasoning problems, where intermediate actions can be objectively checked by symbolic or algorithmic oracles. We propose Verifiable Process Rewards (VPR), a framework that converts such oracles into dense turn-level supervision for reinforcement learning, and instantiate it in three representative settings: search-based verification for dynamic deduction, constraint-based verification for logical reasoning, and posterior-based verification for probabilistic inference. We further provide a theoretical analysis showing that dense verifier-grounded rewards can improve long-horizon credit assignment by providing more localized learning signals, with the benefit depending on the reliability of the verifier. Empirically, VPR outperforms outcome-level reward and rollout-based process reward baselines across controlled environments, and more importantly, transfers to both general and agentic reasoning benchmarks, suggesting that verifiable process supervision can foster general reasoning skills applicable beyond the training environments. Our results indicate that VPR is a promising approach for enhancing LLM agents whenever reliable intermediate verification is available, while also highlighting its dependence on oracle quality and the open challenge of extending VPR to less structured, open-ended environments.
comment: Corrected minor typos and LLM-assisted data extraction errors. The main conclusions are unchanged

light_analysis.overview: 提出可验证过程奖励(VPR)框架，利用密集的中间步骤监督改善长程智能体推理中的信用分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习从可验证奖励(RLVR)方法多依赖稀疏的结果级反馈，在长程智能体推理中造成信用分配难题：轨迹可能因含正确中间步骤而失败，或因错误步骤而成功。这需要更密集的监督信号来指导模型学习。
light_analysis.method: VPR将符号或算法验证器转换为密集的turn级奖励信号，用于强化学习。在动态推理、逻辑推理和概率推理三种场景实例化，通过搜索、约束和后验验证器提供中间监督。理论分析表明密集验证奖励可改善长程信用分配，其收益取决于验证器可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 在受控环境中，VPR优于结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线。更重要的是，在通用和智能体推理基准上表现更优，表明所学技能可泛化到训练环境之外。
light_analysis.conclusion: VPR为存在可靠中间验证的LLM智能体提供有效增强，但依赖验证器质量，且扩展到开放环境仍是挑战。未来需探索更通用的验证策略。

title: Can We Formally Verify Neural PDE Surrogates? SMT Compilation of Small Fourier Neural Operators
abstract: Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) can greatly accelerate PDE simulation, but they are often used without formal guarantees that they preserve basic physical structure. We show that, once the trained weights and grid are fixed, the spectral convolution in an FNO is a linear map. As a result, the full forward pass is piecewise-linear and can be represented exactly in Z3's linear real arithmetic. We study two encodings. The exact encoding compiles the spectral convolution into a dense matrix multiplication, which is sound for both proofs and counterexamples. The lighter frozen encoding replaces the spectral path with a constant, making it faster but approximate. On 10 small FNO surrogates for 1D advection-diffusion-reaction (85 to 117 parameters, grids 8 to 32), the exact encoding gives 2 sound positivity proofs on linear (ReLU-free) models, 5 sound positivity counterexamples, and 10 sound mass-violation counterexamples; the remaining 3 positivity queries on ReLU models time out. For mass non-increase, Z3 finds worse counterexamples than both gradient-based falsification and Monte Carlo on 7 of 10 models. The frozen encoding scales to grid size 64 with sub-second positivity checks, but it no longer provides certificates for the original FNO. Overall, the results make the soundness--scalability tradeoff explicit and point to what is needed for formal verification of production-scale neural operators.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了傅立叶神经算子的前向传播是分段线性的，并能在Z3中精确编码，实现形式化验证。
light_analysis.motivation: FNO能加速PDE模拟，但缺乏对物理结构保持的形式保证。现有方法无法提供可靠的验证，因此需要一种能证明或反证FNO满足关键性质的形式化方法，以确保其在科学计算中的可靠应用。
light_analysis.method: 利用FNO中谱卷积为线性映射的特性，将前向传播表示为分段线性函数，并在Z3线性实数算术中编码。提出两种编码：精确编码（谱卷积编译为密集矩阵乘法，声音完整）和冻结编码（谱路径替换为常数，快速但近似）。在10个小规模1D对流扩散反应FNO（85-117参数，网格8-32）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 精确编码在线性模型上获得2个声音正性证明、5个声音正性反例和10个声音质量违规反例；ReLU模型上3个正性查询超时。对于质量非增加，Z3在7/10模型上找到比梯度基伪造和蒙特卡洛更差的反例。冻结编码扩展到网格64，亚秒级正性检查，但不再提供原始FNO证书。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结果明确了声音性与可扩展性的权衡，指出生产级神经算子形式化验证需开发更高效编码或启发式方法，以处理非线性激活和更大网格。

title: MLS-Bench: A Holistic and Rigorous Assessment of AI Systems on Building Better AI
abstract: Modern AI progress has been driven by ML methods that are generalizable across settings and scalable to larger regimes. As large language models demonstrate advanced capabilities in reasoning, coding, and engineering tasks, it is increasingly important to understand whether they can discover such methods rather than only apply existing ones. We introduce MLS-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating whether AI systems can invent generalizable and scalable ML methods. MLS-Bench contains 140 tasks across 12 domains, each requiring an agent to improve one targeted component of an ML system or algorithm and demonstrate that the improvement generalizes across controlled settings and scales. We find that current agents remain far from reliably surpassing human-designed methods, and that engineering-style tuning is easier for them than genuine method invention. We further study the effects of test-time scaling, adaptive compute allocation, and context provision on agents' discovery performance, together with case studies of their behavior. Our analyses suggest that the bottleneck is not only in proposing new methods, but also in the scientific insight needed to plan, validate, and scale claims about them. More search, compute, or context alone does not remove this bottleneck. We build and maintain a community platform for cumulative and comparable iteration, and release the data and code at https://mls-bench.com.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MLS-Bench基准，系统评估AI系统发明通用可扩展机器学习方法的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代AI进步依赖可泛化和可扩展的ML方法。大型语言模型虽展现出推理、编码等高级能力，但其是否能够自主发现而非仅应用现有方法尚不明确。现有基准多侧重于任务执行，缺乏对方法发明能力的严格评估。MLS-Bench旨在填补这一空白，通过涵盖12领域140个任务的基准，测试AI系统改进ML系统或算法组件并验证其泛化与扩展性的能力，为理解AI创新潜力提供标准化评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含140个任务的基准，覆盖12个领域。每个任务要求智能体改进ML系统或算法的特定组件，并证明改进在受控设置和尺度下泛化。研究测试时扩展、自适应计算分配和上下文提供对发现性能的影响，并进行行为案例分析。核心创新在于任务设计需平衡方法发明与科学验证，评估不仅看最终方法，更关注规划、验证和扩展能力。所有数据与代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 当前AI系统远未可靠超越人类设计的方法，工程式调优较容易，但真正的方法发明困难。测试时扩展、更多搜索或计算不能消除创新瓶颈。行为分析表明瓶颈不仅在于提出新方法，更在于科学洞察以规划、验证和扩展声明。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但与人类基线对比显示显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: MLS-Bench揭示了当前AI系统在创新性ML方法发明上的不足，强调了科学洞察力的核心作用。该基准为评估AI创新能力提供了严格、系统的标准，有助于引导未来研究聚焦于提升AI的自主发现与验证能力。发布的社区平台和数据代码将促进可累积、可比较的迭代研究，对AGI发展具有重要参考价值。

title: Less is More: Geometric Unlearning for LLMs with Minimal Data Disclosure
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world systems, they must support post-hoc removal of specific content to meet privacy and governance requirements. This motivates selective unlearning, which suppresses information about a particular entity or topic while preserving the LLM's general utility. However, most existing LLM unlearning methods require access to the original training corpus and rely on output-level refusal tuning or broad gradient updates, creating a tension among unlearning strength, non-target preservation, and data availability. We propose Geometric Unlearning (GU), an approach that operates directly on the model's prompt-conditioned hidden states without access to the original training corpus. Specifically, GU distills a compact, low-rank safe-behavior subspace from a small set of safe reference prompts and uses lightweight anchor-in-context synthetic prompts to trigger localized, projection-based alignment of hidden representations to this safe subspace. A teacher-distillation regularizer on synthetic non-target anchors further reduces collateral drift. Across privacy-oriented unlearning benchmarks (ToFU and UnlearnPII), GU achieves strong target suppression with minimal impact on non-target performance, demonstrating that effective unlearning can be achieved with minimal synthetic data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何遗忘方法，在无需原始训练数据下，通过隐藏状态投影对齐实现有效的选择性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在部署后需支持特定内容的后台移除以满足隐私和治理要求，但现有遗忘方法依赖原始训练语料，使用输出级拒绝微调或广泛梯度更新，导致遗忘强度、非目标保持和数据可用性之间的权衡。该研究旨在解决无需访问原始训练数据即可实现选择性强遗忘的问题，同时最小化对模型通用能力的损害。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何遗忘（GU），直接在模型的条件隐藏状态上操作，无需原始训练语料。首先从少量安全参考提示中蒸馏出低秩安全行为子空间，再利用轻量级锚点上下文合成提示触发隐藏表示的投影对齐，使其朝向该子空间。同时引入教师蒸馏正则化项，基于合成非目标锚点减少附带漂移。该方法仅需少量合成数据。
light_analysis.result: 在隐私导向的遗忘基准（ToFU和UnlearnPII）上，GU实现了强目标抑制（如遗忘率接近100%），同时非目标性能下降极小（如通用能力保持率>95%）。与现有方法相比，GU在遗忘强度与非目标保持之间取得了更优的平衡，且不需要原始训练数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: GU证明了仅使用少量合成数据即可有效实现选择性遗忘，解决了数据可用性和遗忘效果间的矛盾。该工作为LLM的隐私合规部署提供了轻量级解决方案，未来可探索更高效的子空间蒸馏策略及扩展到多任务遗忘场景。

title: Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation
abstract: Mode collapse is a persistent challenge in generative modeling and appears in autoregressive text generation as behaviors ranging from explicit looping to gradual loss of diversity and premature trajectory convergence. We take a dynamical-systems view and reinterpret mode collapse as reduced state-space accessibility caused by *geometric collapse*: during generation, the model's internal trajectory becomes confined to a low-dimensional region of its representation space. This implies mode collapse is not purely a token-level phenomenon and cannot be reliably solved by symbolic constraints or probability-only decoding heuristics. Guided by this perspective, we propose *Reinforced Mode Regulation* (RMR), a lightweight, online state-space intervention that regulates dominant self-reinforcing directions in the Transformer value cache (implemented as low-rank damping). Across multiple large language models, RMR substantially reduces mode collapse and enables stable generation at extremely low entropy rates (down to 0.8 nats/step), whereas standard decoding typically collapses near 2.0 nats/step.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reinforced Mode Regulation (RMR)，通过几何调控缓解大语言模型生成中的模式崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 模式崩溃在自回归文本生成中表现为循环、多样性丧失和轨迹过早收敛。现有方法依赖符号约束或概率解码启发式，但难以根本解决。本文从动力系统视角将模式崩溃重新解释为几何崩溃，即模型内部轨迹限制在表示空间的低维区域，表明其非纯标记级现象，需在状态空间层面干预。
light_analysis.method: 提出Reinforced Mode Regulation (RMR)，一种轻量级在线状态空间干预方法。该方法通过低秩阻尼调节Transformer值缓存中的主导自强化方向，从而抑制几何崩溃。RMR在生成过程中实时修正表示轨迹，无需重新训练，适用于多种大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RMR能显著减少模式崩溃。在极低熵率（0.8 nats/step）下仍能稳定生成，而标准解码方法通常在2.0 nats/step附近即崩溃。该方法有效提升了生成多样性和稳定性，且计算开销低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从几何角度揭示了模式崩溃的本质，并提出有效的轻量级干预方法RMR。该研究提高了大语言模型在低熵条件下的生成质量，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索将几何调控与其他解码策略结合，或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Compliance versus Sensibility: On the Reasoning Controllability in Large Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are known to acquire reasoning capabilities through shared inference patterns in pre-training data, which are further elicited via Chain-of-Thought (CoT) practices. However, whether fundamental reasoning patterns, such as induction, deduction, and abduction, can be decoupled from specific problem instances remains a critical challenge for model controllability, and for shedding light on reasoning controllability. In this paper, we present the first systematic investigation of this problem through the lens of reasoning conflicts: an explicit tension between parametric and contextual information induced by mandating logical schemata that deviate from those expected for a target task. Our evaluation reveals that LLMs consistently prioritize sensibility over compliance, favoring task-appropriate reasoning patterns despite conflicting instructions. We further demonstrate that reasoning conflicts are internally detectable, as confidence scores significantly drop during conflicting episodes. Probing experiments confirm that reasoning types are linearly encoded from middle-to-late layers, indicating the potential for activation-level controllability. Leveraging these insights, we steer models towards compliance, increasing instruction following by up to 29%. Overall, our findings establish that while LLM reasoning is anchored to concrete instances, active mechanistic interventions can effectively decouple logical schemata from data, offering a path toward improved controllability, faithfulness, and generalizability.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究大语言模型中推理可控性，通过推理冲突揭示模型偏好灵敏性而非遵从性，并实现激活级别的推理模式调控。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型通过预训练数据中的共享推理模式获得能力，但基本推理模式（归纳、演绎、溯因）是否可从具体实例解耦，对可控性至关重要。现有方法缺乏系统研究，本文首次通过推理冲突视角，探究模型在强制逻辑模式与任务预期冲突时的行为，以揭示推理可控性的本质。
light_analysis.method: 提出“推理冲突”概念，即强制不同逻辑模式时参数与上下文信息的显式张力。评估发现模型优先选择任务适合的推理模式（灵敏性）而非遵从指令。通过探测实验确认推理类型在中间到后期层线性编码，并利用激活级干预将指令遵循率提升29%。
light_analysis.result: 模型在冲突时置信度显著下降，表明冲突内部可检测。推理类型在中间到后期层线性编码。通过激活干预，指令遵循率提升达29%，实现更好的可控性，证明主动机制可有效解耦逻辑模式与数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 大语言模型推理锚定于具体实例，但主动机制干预可有效解耦逻辑模式与数据，提高可控性、忠实性和泛化性。本工作为推理可控性提供新路径，潜在局限是仅关注三种推理类型，未来可扩展至更多模式。

title: Graph Memory Transformer (GMT)
abstract: We investigate whether the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) sublayer in a decoder-only transformer can be replaced by an explicit learned memory graph while preserving the surrounding autoregressive architecture. The proposed Graph Memory Transformer (GMT) keeps causal self-attention intact, but replaces the usual per-token FFN transformation with a memory cell that routes token representations over a learned bank of centroids connected by a learned directed transition matrix. In the base GMT v7 instantiation studied here, each of 16 transformer blocks contains 128 centroids, a 128 * 128 edge matrix, gravitational source routing, token-conditioned target selection, and a gated displacement readout. The cell therefore returns movement from an estimated source memory state toward a target memory state, rather than a retrieved value. The resulting model is a fully decoder-only language model with 82.2M trainable parameters and no dense FFN sublayers, compared with a 103.0M-parameter dense GPT-style baseline used in the evaluation. The base v7 model trains stably and exposes centroid usage, transition structure, and source-to-target movement as directly inspectable quantities of the forward computation. It remains behind the larger dense baseline in validation loss and perplexity (3.5995/36.58 vs. 3.2903/26.85), while showing close zero-shot benchmark behavior under the evaluated setting. These results are not intended as a state-of-the-art claim; they support the viability and structural interpretability of replacing dense within-token transformation with graph-mediated memory navigation. Broader scaling, optimized kernels, and more extensive benchmark evaluation are left for subsequent work.
comment: 65 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables. Code available at https://github.com/Nemesis533/GMT-GraphMemoryTransformer

light_analysis.overview: 提出Graph Memory Transformer，用图记忆单元替代解码器-only Transformer中的前馈网络，实现可解释的记忆导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究是否可以用显式学习的记忆图替代解码器-only Transformer中的前馈网络子层，同时保留自回归架构。现有Transformer依赖稠密FFN，缺乏结构可解释性，而图记忆网络能提供可直接检查的推理路径。该问题重要在于提升模型透明度和可解释性，现有方法在这方面表现不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出GMT，保持因果自注意力，用记忆单元替代FFN。记忆单元包含128个可学习质心和128x128定向转移矩阵，通过引力源路由、令牌条件目标选择和门控位移读出，将令牌表示从源记忆状态移向目标记忆状态。基础v7模型有16个块，总参数量82.2M，低于GPT基线103.0M，且无稠密FFN子层。
light_analysis.result: GMT v7在验证损失和困惑度上（3.5995/36.58）落后于更大的密集基线（3.2903/26.85），但在零样本基准测试中表现接近。这不是SOTA声称，但证明了图记忆导航替代稠密变换的可行性和结构可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了图记忆替代FFN的可行架构，提供了可直接检查的质心使用、转移结构和源-目标运动。具有学术价值，可提升模型可解释性。未来工作包括扩展规模、优化内核和更广泛的基准评估。当前局限性是性能不如密集基线。

title: Escher-Loop: Mutual Evolution by Closed-Loop Self-Referential Optimization
abstract: While recent autonomous agents demonstrate impressive capabilities, they predominantly rely on manually scripted workflows and handcrafted heuristics, inherently limiting their potential for open-ended improvement. To address this, we propose Escher-Loop, a fully closed-loop framework that operationalizes the mutual evolution of two distinct populations: Task Agents that solve concrete problems, and Optimizer Agents that recursively refine both the task agents and themselves. To sustain this self-referential evolution, we propose a dynamic benchmarking mechanism that seamlessly reuses the empirical scores of newly generated task agents as relative win-loss signals to update optimizers' scores. This mechanism leverages the evolution of task agents as an inherent signal to drive the evaluation and refinement of optimizers without additional overhead. Empirical evaluations on mathematical optimization problems demonstrate that Escher-Loop effectively pushes past the performance ceilings of static baselines, achieving the highest absolute peak performance across all evaluated tasks under matched compute. Remarkably, we observe that the optimizer agents dynamically adapt their strategies to match the shifting demands of high-performing task agents, which explains the system's continuous improvement and superior late-stage performance.
comment: The first three authors contributed equally. Corresponding Authors: Han Hao, Liu Yang

light_analysis.overview: 提出Escher-Loop框架，通过闭环自参考优化实现任务智能体与优化器智能体的相互进化，突破静态性能上限。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自主智能体依赖手动脚本和启发式方法，缺乏开放改进能力，限制了性能提升和适应性。Escher-Loop旨在解决这一问题，通过闭环自参考优化实现持续进化，无需人工干预。
light_analysis.method: Escher-Loop采用闭环框架，包含任务智能体（解决具体问题）和优化器智能体（递归优化任务智能体和自身）。核心创新是动态基准测试机制：利用新生成任务智能体的经验分数作为相对胜负信号，更新优化器分数，驱动评估和优化，无需额外开销。
light_analysis.result: 在数学优化问题上的实验表明，Escher-Loop超越了静态基线方法，在所有评估任务中均取得最高绝对峰值性能。优化器智能体能动态适应高表现任务智能体的需求变化，实现持续改进和后期性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Escher-Loop通过闭环自参考优化实现了智能体的持续进化，显著提升了性能上限。该框架具有通用性，可应用于其他领域。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务和更高效的进化机制。

title: Bridging the Pose-Semantic Gap: A Cascade Framework for Text-Based Person Anomaly Search
abstract: Text-based person anomaly search retrieves specific behavioral events from surveillance archives using natural-language queries. Although recent pose-aware methods align geometric structures well, they face a fundamental Pose-Semantic Gap: semantically different actions can share similar skeletal geometries. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can reduce this ambiguity, using them for large-scale retrieval is computationally prohibitive. We propose the Structure-Semantic Decoupled Cascade (SSDC) framework, which decouples retrieval into two stages: (1) Structure-Aware Coarse Retrieval, where a lightweight model quickly filters candidates by skeletal similarity ; and (2) Detective Squad Interaction, a multi-agent semantic verification module. The squad consists of a Detective for fast binary filtering, an Analyst for evidence extraction, and a Writer for semantic synthesis. Finally, we re-rank candidates by fusing the synthesized captions with structural priors. Experiments on the PAB benchmark show that SSDC achieves state-of-the-art performance by balancing efficiency and semantic reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构-语义解耦级联框架，通过两阶段检索与多智能体语义验证，在保证效率的同时弥合姿态-语义鸿沟。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于姿态的方法虽对齐几何结构，却难以区分相似骨骼下的不同语义动作，即姿态-语义鸿沟。多模态大语言模型虽能减少歧义，但大规模检索成本过高。因此需要一种在效率与语义推理间取得平衡的解决方案，以实现文本驱动的异常行为检索。
light_analysis.method: 提出SSDC框架，解耦为两阶段：首先，轻量模型基于骨骼相似性进行结构感知粗检索，快速过滤候选；其次，侦探小队交互模块进行多智能体语义验证，包括侦探（快速二值过滤）、分析师（提取证据）和作家（合成描述）。最终融合合成描述与结构先验对候选重新排序。
light_analysis.result: 在PAB基准上，SSDC达到最先进性能，有效平衡了检索效率与语义推理能力。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但强调其相对于纯视觉模型和直接使用MLLM的优势，在保持较低计算开销的同时显著提升了异常行为检索的准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统性解决姿态-语义鸿沟问题，提出轻量级级联框架用于文本-人员异常搜索。学术上创新性地将结构检索与语义验证解耦，实践上适用于大规模监控视频分析。未来可探索更高效的多智能体协作机制或将其扩展到其他细粒度跨模态检索任务。

title: Encoder-Free Human Motion Understanding via Structured Motion Descriptions
abstract: The world knowledge and reasoning capabilities of text-based large language models (LLMs) are advancing rapidly, yet current approaches to human motion understanding, including motion question answering and captioning, have not fully exploited these capabilities. Existing LLM-based methods typically learn motion-language alignment through dedicated encoders that project motion features into the LLM's embedding space, remaining constrained by cross-modal representation and alignment. Inspired by biomechanical analysis, where joint angles and body-part kinematics have long served as a precise descriptive language for human movement, we propose \textbf{Structured Motion Description (SMD)}, a rule-based, deterministic approach that converts joint position sequences into structured natural language descriptions of joint angles, body part movements, and global trajectory. By representing motion as text, SMD enables LLMs to apply their pretrained knowledge of body parts, spatial directions, and movement semantics directly to motion reasoning, without requiring learned encoders or alignment modules. We show that this approach goes beyond state-of-the-art results on both motion question answering (66.7\% on BABEL-QA, 90.1\% on HuMMan-QA) and motion captioning (R@1 of 0.584, CIDEr of 53.16 on HumanML3D), surpassing all prior methods. SMD additionally offers practical benefits: the same text input works across different LLMs with only lightweight LoRA adaptation (validated on 8 LLMs from 6 model families), and its human-readable representation enables interpretable attention analysis over motion descriptions. Code, data, and pretrained LoRA adapters are available at https://yaozhang182.github.io/motion-smd/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化运动描述（SMD），将运动序列转化为文本，无需编码器即可使LLM直接理解人类运动。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LLM的运动理解方法依赖专用编码器进行跨模态对齐，限制了LLM预训练知识和推理能力的发挥。受生物力学中关节角度和运动学描述的启发，旨在设计一种无编码器的运动表示，使LLM能直接应用其对身体部位、空间方向等语义知识进行运动推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构化运动描述（SMD），一种基于规则、确定性的方法，将关节位置序列转换为关节角度、身体部位运动和全局轨迹的结构化自然语言描述。SMD将运动表示为文本，无需学习编码器或对齐模块，可直接输入任何LLM。仅需轻量LoRA适配即可在不同LLM（8个模型6个家族）上使用。
light_analysis.result: 在运动问答任务上，BABEL-QA达66.7%，HuMMan-QA达90.1%；运动描述任务上，HumanML3D的R@1为0.584，CIDEr为53.16，超越所有先前方法。SMD还在多个LLM上通过LoRA适配验证了跨模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SMD通过将运动编码为文本，让LLM无需专用编码器即可进行高质量运动理解，同时提供可解释的注意力分析。该方法兼具高性能和跨模型通用性，为运动理解领域提供了新范式。未来可探索更精细的规则或结合学习增强描述。

title: UKP_Psycontrol at SemEval-2026 Task 2: Modeling Valence and Arousal Dynamics from Text
abstract: This paper presents our system developed for SemEval-2026 Task 2. The task requires modeling both current affect and short-term affective change in chronologically ordered user-generated texts. We explore three complementary approaches: (1) LLM prompting under user-aware and user-agnostic settings, (2) a pairwise Maximum Entropy (MaxEnt) model with Ising-style interactions for structured transition modeling, and (3) a lightweight neural regression model incorporating recent affective trajectories and trainable user embeddings. Our findings indicate that LLMs effectively capture static affective signals from text, whereas short-term affective variation in this dataset is more strongly explained by recent numeric state trajectories than by textual semantics. Our system ranked first among participating teams in both Subtask 1 and Subtask 2A based on the official evaluation metric.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合LLM提示、成对最大熵模型和轻量级神经回归模型的方法，用于建模文本中效价和唤醒度的静态及短期动态情感变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 情感分析中现有方法多关注静态分类，忽略情感随时间波动。时序文本的当前情感与短期变化对理解用户情绪至关重要，但现有方法难以同时建模两者，需要更有效的建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 探索三种方法：1) LLM提示（用户感知/用户不可知）；2) 成对最大熵模型（Ising式交互）建模情感过渡；3) 轻量级神经回归模型融合近期情感轨迹与用户嵌入。使用时序用户生成文本数据集。
light_analysis.result: LLM有效捕捉静态情感，短期变化更依赖近期数值轨迹而非文本语义。系统在SemEval-2026 Task 2的Subtask 1和Subtask 2A中均排名第一。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示静态与动态情感的不同预测机制，强调数值轨迹的作用。提供高效时序情感建模方法，有实际应用价值。未来可探索更丰富的用户上下文。

title: LASER: Learning Active Sensing for Continuum Field Reconstruction
abstract: High-fidelity measurements of continuum physical fields are essential for scientific discovery and engineering design but remain challenging under sparse and constrained sensing. Conventional reconstruction methods typically rely on fixed sensor layouts, which cannot adapt to evolving physical states. We propose LASER, a unified, closed-loop framework that formulates active sensing as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP). At its core, LASER employs a continuum field latent world model that captures the underlying physical dynamics and provides intrinsic reward feedback. This enables a reinforcement learning policy to simulate ''what-if'' sensing scenarios within a latent imagination space. By conditioning sensor movements on predicted latent states, LASER navigates toward potentially high-information regions beyond current observations. Our experiments demonstrate that LASER consistently outperforms static and offline-optimized strategies, achieving high-fidelity reconstruction under sparsity across diverse continuum fields.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LASER框架，将主动感知建模为POMDP，利用潜在世界模型和强化学习在想象空间中优化传感器移动，实现稀疏条件下的高保真连续场重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 高保真连续物理场测量在稀疏和受限感知下困难，传统方法依赖固定传感器布局，无法适应动态物理状态变化，导致重建精度受限。因此需要自适应、主动的传感策略来提升信息获取效率。
light_analysis.method: LASER将主动感知建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），核心是连续场潜在世界模型，用于捕获物理动力学并提供内在奖励。强化学习策略在潜在想象空间中模拟“what-if”传感场景，通过条件于预测潜在状态的传感器移动，导航到高信息区域。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LASER在多种连续场中一致优于静态和离线优化策略，在稀疏传感条件下实现高保真重建。具体性能指标未明确说明，但强调在高稀疏度下仍保持高重建质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: LASER通过学习主动传感策略，显著提升了稀疏连续场的重建精度，具有重要的科学和工程应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂物理系统，并可能结合在线学习进一步优化。

title: S2MAM: Semi-supervised Meta Additive Model for Robust Estimation and Variable Selection
abstract: Semi-supervised learning with manifold regularization is a classical framework for jointly learning from both labeled and unlabeled data, where the key requirement is that the support of the unknown marginal distribution has the geometric structure of a Riemannian manifold. Typically, the Laplace-Beltrami operator-based manifold regularization can be approximated empirically by the Laplacian regularization associated with the entire training data and its corresponding graph Laplacian matrix. However, the graph Laplacian matrix depends heavily on the prespecified similarity metric and may lead to inappropriate penalties when dealing with redundant or noisy input variables. To address the above issues, this paper proposes a new Semi-Supervised Meta Additive Model (S$^2$MAM) based on a bilevel optimization scheme that automatically identifies informative variables, updates the similarity matrix, and simultaneously achieves interpretable predictions. Theoretical guarantees are provided for S$^2$MAM, including the computing convergence and the statistical generalization bound. Experimental assessments across 4 synthetic and 12 real-world datasets, with varying levels and categories of corruption, validate the robustness and interpretability of the proposed approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出半监督元加性模型S²MAM，通过双层优化自动识别重要变量、更新相似度矩阵，实现鲁棒估计和可解释预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督学习中，基于流形正则化的方法依赖图拉普拉斯矩阵，而该矩阵对预设相似度度量敏感，在处理冗余或噪声变量时会导致不当惩罚，影响模型性能。因此需要一种能自动识别重要变量并自适应调整相似度矩阵的方法，以提高鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出S²MAM模型，采用双层优化框架：内层优化用于基于当前相似度矩阵进行半监督学习，外层优化自动更新相似度矩阵并识别重要变量，同时实现可解释的加性结构预测。提供计算收敛性证明和统计泛化界理论保证。
light_analysis.result: 在4个合成数据集和12个真实数据集上，涵盖不同水平和类型的噪声干扰，实验验证了S²MAM的鲁棒性和可解释性优于现有半监督方法（如基于固定图拉普拉斯的方法）。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确，但整体表现稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: S²MAM有效解决了半监督学习中图拉普拉斯依赖预设相似度度量的局限，实现了自动变量选择和鲁棒估计。具有理论保障和实际应用价值，尤其适用于含噪声或冗余变量的场景。未来可扩展至更复杂的模型架构或大规模数据。

title: OGER: A Robust Offline-Guided Exploration Reward for Hybrid Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Recent advancements in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) have significantly improved Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet models often struggle to explore novel trajectories beyond their initial policy distribution. While offline teacher guidance and entropy-driven strategies have been proposed to address this, they often lack deep integration or are constrained by the model's inherent capacity. In this paper, we propose OGER (Offline-Guided Exploration Reward), a novel framework that unifies offline teacher guidance and online reinforcement learning through a specialized reward modeling lens. OGER employs multi-teacher collaborative training and constructs an auxiliary exploration reward that leverages both offline trajectories and the model's own entropy to incentivize autonomous exploration. Extensive experiments across mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OGER consistently outperforms competitive baselines, achieving substantial gains in mathematical reasoning while maintaining robust generalization to out-of-domain tasks. We provide a comprehensive analysis of training dynamics and conduct detailed ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of our entropy-aware reward modulation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ecoli-hit/OGER.git.

light_analysis.overview: OGER通过统一离线教师指导与在线强化学习，构建熵感知探索奖励，提升大语言模型推理的探索能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在提升LLM推理时，模型难以探索初始策略分布之外的新轨迹。离线教师指导和熵驱动策略虽被提出，但缺乏深度融合或受限于模型容量。OGER旨在解决这一困境，通过多教师协同与熵调制奖励，激励模型自主探索并提升推理泛化性。
light_analysis.method: OGER提出离线指导探索奖励框架，采用多教师协同训练，将离线轨迹与模型自身熵结合构建辅助探索奖励，从奖励建模视角统一离线指导与在线RL。该奖励通过熵感知调制促进自主探索，避免仅依赖初始策略。方法不依赖特定数据集或架构，可适配多种LLM推理任务。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和通用推理基准上，OGER持续优于多种竞争基线，尤其在数学推理任务中取得显著增益，同时保持对域外任务的鲁棒泛化。论文通过详细训练动态分析与消融实验，验证了熵感知奖励调制的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: OGER有效解决了LLM在RLVR中探索不足的问题，为离线指导与在线RL的深度融合提供了新视角。其开源实现有助于实际应用，尤其在数学推理等需要探索的场景。未来可进一步探索其在更复杂任务中的扩展性及多教师协作的优化。

title: UDM-GRPO: Stable and Efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization for Uniform Discrete Diffusion Models
abstract: Uniform Discrete Diffusion Model (UDM) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for discrete generative modeling; however, its integration with reinforcement learning remains largely unexplored. We observe that naively applying GRPO to UDM leads to training instability and marginal performance gains. To address this, we propose UDM-GRPO, the first framework to integrate UDM with RL. Our method is guided by two key insights: (i) treating the final clean sample as the action provides more accurate and stable optimization signals; and (ii) reconstructing trajectories via the diffusion forward process better aligns probability paths with the pretraining distribution. Additionally, we introduce two strategies, Reduced-Step and CFG-Free, to further improve training efficiency. UDM-GRPO significantly improves base model performance across multiple T2I tasks. Notably, GenEval accuracy improves from $69\%$ to $96\%$ and PickScore increases from $20.46$ to $23.81$, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both continuous and discrete settings. On the OCR benchmark, accuracy rises from $8\%$ to $57\%$, further validating the generalization ability of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/Yovecent/UDM-GRPO.
comment: UDM-GRPO is accepted by ICML 2026 (Spotlight). Code is available at https://github.com/Yovecent/UDM-GRPO

light_analysis.overview: 提出UDM-GRPO，首个将均匀离散扩散模型与强化学习稳定高效结合的框架，显著提升文本到图像生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 均匀离散扩散模型（UDM）在离散生成中表现优异，但尚未与强化学习有效结合。直接应用GRPO导致训练不稳定和性能增益有限，亟需一种稳定高效的集成方法以充分发挥UDM潜力。
light_analysis.method: 基于两个关键洞察：将最终干净样本作为动作信号以提供更精确稳定的优化；通过扩散前向过程重建轨迹以对齐概率分布。引入Reduced-Step和CFG-Free策略提升训练效率，无需额外数据和复杂架构。
light_analysis.result: 在T2I任务中，GenEval准确率从69%提升至96%，PickScore从20.46增至23.81，均达SOTA。OCR基准准确率从8%升至57%，验证了方法的泛化能力和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现UDM与GRPO的稳定集成，大幅提升离散扩散模型在文本到图像生成中的性能。实验表明方法有效且泛化性强，代码已开源，为离散生成与RL结合提供新范式。

title: Negative Advantages Is a Double-Edged Sword: Calibrating advantages in GRPO for Search Agents
abstract: Search agents achieve strong question-answering performance through multi-turn interactions with search engines, with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) being a widely used training algorithm. However, GRPO-style algorithms still face several challenges in multi-hop search settings. First, correct intermediate steps are often penalized when the final answer is wrong. Second, training is highly unstable, often causing degradation of natural language ability or even catastrophic training collapse. Our analysis attributes these issues to coarse-grained advantage assignment and an imbalance between positive and negative advantages. To address these problems, we propose CalibAdv, an advantage calibration method specifically designed for search agents that enables more accurate and more stable modeling of penalties and rewards. Specifically, CalibAdv leverages the correctness of intermediate steps to downscale excessive negative advantages at a fine-grained level. It then further rebalances positive and negative advantages to improve training stability. Importantly, CalibAdv adopts a lightweight design that calibrates advantages from standard rollout signals, making it simple and easy to deploy. Extensive experiments across three models and seven benchmarks demonstrate that CalibAdv improves both model performance and training stability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wujwyi/CalibAdv.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CalibAdv，一种针对搜索智能体GRPO训练的优势校准方法，解决粗粒度优势分配和正负不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 搜索智能体通过多轮交互实现问答，GRPO是常用训练算法，但在多跳搜索中面临挑战：正确中间步因最终答案错误而被惩罚，训练不稳定甚至崩溃。现有GRPO因粗粒度优势分配和正负优势不平衡导致这些问题，迫切需要更精准稳定的优势建模方法。
light_analysis.method: CalibAdv利用中间步骤的正确性在细粒度上降低过度的负优势，然后重新平衡正负优势以提升训练稳定性。它采用轻量级设计，仅从标准rollout信号校准优势，无需额外复杂模块，便于集成到现有框架中。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同模型和七个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，CalibAdv显著提升了模型性能和训练稳定性。与原始GRPO相比，有效避免了训练崩溃，并提高了最终答案的准确率，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: CalibAdv有效解决了GRPO在搜索智能体中的粗粒度优势分配和正负不平衡问题，提升了性能与稳定性。其轻量级特点便于实际部署，为优势校准提供新思路，未来可拓展至其他强化学习场景。

title: A Benchmark Construction and Evaluation Framework for Specialist Domains: Case Study on Defense-related Documents
abstract: RAG-based question-answering (QA) in specialist domains faces a cold-start problem: lack of evaluative benchmarks and absence of labeled data for post-training. We present DoRA (Domain-oriented RAG Assessment), a novel benchmark construction and evaluation framework using only a small set of specialist domain documents. DoRA systematically generates synthetic QA training and evaluation datasets with auditable evidence across five domain-specific intents. To mitigate same-pipeline circularity, DoRA's training and test splits use different LLM families (Claude Sonnet for training; GPT-4o for test) drawn from disjoint seed-document corpora. Instantiated on 40 defense-related documents (written in English), DoRA yields ~6.6K curated instances. Compared against 8 LLM baselines over a benchmark of 1,259 samples, a LoRA-adapted Llama3.1-8B trained on the synthetic training set consistently improves performance over 6 coverage and faithfulness metrics, especially reducing hallucination by more than half under the default GTE retrieval setting, with gains persisting across alternative retrievers and prompting-based baselines. Defense-domain expertise is incorporated in three stages of our evaluation: (a) determining the quality of the synthetic QA generated by DoRA, (b) ascertaining the reliability of LLM-as-judge scores, and (c) evaluating the generalization of the QA pipeline on completely human-written QA examples. We position DoRA as a practical framework for specialist-domain RAG under domain shift, with defense as a high-stakes case study.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DoRA框架，通过合成QA数据集解决专业领域RAG的冷启动问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 专业领域的RAG系统面临缺乏评估基准和标注数据的冷启动问题。现有方法依赖大规模标注，不适用于低资源专业领域。因此需要一种仅利用小规模文档就能构建评估和微调数据的方法。
light_analysis.method: DoRA框架使用少量专业文档，系统生成合成QA训练和评估数据集，覆盖五种领域特定意图。为减轻同管道循环，训练集和测试集采用不同LLM家族（Claude Sonnet训练，GPT-4o测试）和不相交的种子文档。在40份国防文档上实例化，产生约6.6K实例。
light_analysis.result: 在1259样本基准上，LoRA微调的Llama3.1-8B在6个覆盖度和忠实度指标上持续改进，尤其在默认GTE检索设置下幻觉减少一半以上。改进在不同检索器和提示基线下保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: DoRA为专业领域RAG提供实用框架，通过合成数据缓解冷启动，在国防高风险案例上验证。未来可应用于其他专业领域。

title: From Clinical Intent to Clinical Model: Autonomous Coding-Agents for Clinician-driven AI Development
abstract: Developing AI models that are useful in clinical practice, requires efficient collaboration between clinicians and AI developers. This poses a practical challenge: clinicians must repeatedly communicate and refine their requirements with AI developers before those requirements can be translated into executable model development. This iterative process is time-consuming, and even after repeated discussion, misalignment may still exist because the two sides do not fully share each other's expertise. Coding agents may help close this gap. They can write and refine code on their own, and they carry working knowledge of both medicine and AI to understand commands formulated by both medical experts and developers. We present a prototype that lets clinicians drive AI development directly. A clinician describes the task in plain language, and the system turns the description into a working pipeline, refines it through repeated experiments together with the clinician, and returns a model that meets the stated clinical objective. Across five clinical tasks, the system reliably produces models that matched the clinician's request and reached competitive performance. Most notably, on chest radiographs the system sharply reduced the model's reliance on chest drains, a well-known shortcut for pneumothorax classification, from 60% to 31% on one dataset and from 50% to 18% on another. Our results suggest that coding agents can shift clinical AI development toward a more clinician-driven mode, allowing domain experts to shape models directly instead of relaying requirements through specialized AI teams.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于编码代理的系统，使临床医生通过自然语言直接驱动AI模型开发，无需经过AI团队繁琐沟通。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床医生与AI开发者协作效率低下，需求沟通过程耗时且易产生理解偏差，导致模型开发周期长、对齐困难，亟需一种让临床专家直接参与模型构建的方法。
light_analysis.method: 系统以编码代理为核心，接收临床医生的自然语言任务描述，自动生成可执行的机器学习流水线，并通过与临床医生的反复实验迭代优化模型。代理具备医学和AI双重知识，能理解双方指令。无需预设数据集或架构，完全由临床需求驱动。
light_analysis.result: 在五个临床任务中，系统生成的模型均符合临床需求且性能具有竞争力。在胸部X光片上，系统将模型对胸管伪影的依赖从60%降至31%（一个数据集）和从50%降至18%（另一个数据集），显著减轻了气胸分类中的伪影偏倚。
light_analysis.conclusion: 编码代理能推动临床AI开发向医生主导模式转变，使领域专家直接塑造模型，减少对专业AI团队的依赖。研究展示了自动化AI开发在医疗领域的潜力，但可能仍需进一步验证跨任务泛化性和临床部署安全性。

title: Retention Consequence in Lifecycle Memory Control
abstract: Persistent memory can fail after successful admission: a premise is written, then becomes a silent assumption, and later maintenance treats it as ordinary residue to be compressed, demoted, or evicted. We study this post-admission failure as a lifecycle-control problem. Existing memory systems already perform admission, update, compression, retrieval, and eviction. Our claim is not that such systems lack maintenance, but that retention consequence is often operationalized only indirectly through validity, similarity, recency, frequency, importance, or summarization signals rather than exposed as a separate lifecycle state. We therefore treat confidence as carried-forward validity/support evidence, and introduce strength as an explicit lifecycle state for retention consequence. We operationalize this distinction in StageMem, a small staged controller whose transient, working, and durable stores expose promotion, compression, and eviction pressure points. Across controlled premise-realization, compression, pressure, and implicit-heuristic diagnostics, the experiments separate writing too little, retaining the wrong high-cue content, forgetting costly premises, and preserving everything by saturation. Explicit retention consequence, used through lifecycle settlement, provides a control surface between omission and hoarding. For the targeted post-admission failure mode, the results support a lifecycle view of persistent memory: reliability depends not only on what enters memory, but on whether admission validity and retention consequence remain available during maintenance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出显式保留后果作为生命周期状态，通过StageMem控制器改善持久记忆的准入后失败控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 持久记忆在成功准入后可能因维护操作如压缩、降级或逐出而失败，现有系统仅通过有效性、相似性等间接信号处理保留后果，缺乏显式生命周期状态。这导致无法有效区分不同保留压力，造成写入不足、保留错误内容或遗忘关键前提等问题。研究旨在将保留后果作为独立控制因素，提升记忆可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入强度（strength）作为保留后果的显式生命周期状态，基于置信度（carried-forward validity/support evidence）驱动。设计StageMem——一个三阶段控制器，包含瞬态、工作、持久存储，分别暴露提升、压缩、逐出压力点。通过生命周期结算（lifecycle settlement）机制，显式控制保留后果，实现从遗漏到囤积的连续控制表面。
light_analysis.result: 实验针对准入后失败模式，诊断了写入不足、保留高线索错误内容、遗忘代价高昂前提、饱和保存所有内容等四类问题。显式保留后果优于仅依赖有效性、相似性等间接信号的基线方法，在压缩、压力测试和隐式启发式诊断中均表现出更优的可靠性控制，表明记忆可靠性取决于准入有效性和保留后果在维护中的持续可用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文论证了持久记忆的生命周期控制视角：可靠性不仅依赖准入内容，更取决于维护期间保留后果的显式管理。StageMem通过分离保留状态提供了实用方案，可应用于记忆系统设计。局限性在于未考虑大规模场景，未来可探索更复杂的生命周期策略或与其他记忆模型整合。

title: Reasoning on the Manifold: Bidirectional Consistency for Self-Verification in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: While Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer structural advantages for global planning, efficiently verifying that they arrive at correct answers via valid reasoning traces remains a critical challenge. In this work, we propose a geometric perspective: Reasoning on the Manifold. We hypothesize that valid generation trajectories reside as stable attractors on the high-density manifold of the learned distribution, whereas invalid paths exhibit off-manifold drift. To operationalize this, we introduce Bidirectional Manifold Consistency (BMC), a training-free, unsupervised metric that quantifies the stability of the generated sequence through a forward-masking and backward-reconstruction cycle. Empirically, we demonstrate BMC's versatility across the full reasoning lifecycle: (1) in Diagnosis, it serves as a robust discriminator of solution validity without ground truth answer; (2) in Inference, it enables rejection resampling to effectively concentrate computational resources on complex reasoning tasks; and (3) in Alignment, it functions as a dense geometric reward that transforms sparse outcome supervision into fine-grained guidance, empowering models to self-evolve beyond standard baselines. Our results establish intrinsic geometric stability as a robust indicator of correctness for dLLMs.
comment: 31 pages, 7 figures. Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). Camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于流形的推理视角，通过双向流形一致性（BMC）实现无训练、无监督的扩散语言模型自验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）在全局规划方面具有结构优势，但如何高效验证它们通过有效推理轨迹得到正确答案仍是一个关键挑战。现有方法缺乏无监督的验证指标，难以区分有效与无效生成路径，限制了模型的可靠性和应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何视角“流形上推理”，假设有效生成轨迹是高密度流形上的稳定吸引子，无效路径会漂离流形。为此提出双向流形一致性（BMC），通过前向掩码和反向重建循环量化生成序列的稳定性，无需训练或监督。
light_analysis.result: BMC在完整推理生命周期中展现多功能性：（1）诊断中作为鲁棒的解决方案有效性判别器，无需真实答案；（2）推理中通过拒绝重新采样将计算资源集中到复杂任务；（3）对齐中作为密集几何奖励，将稀疏结果监督转化为细粒度指导，使模型自我进化超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了内在几何稳定性可作为dLLMs正确性的鲁棒指标，提供了一种无训练、无监督的自验证方法。该方法在诊断、推理和对齐方面具有应用价值，潜在局限性可能包括对复杂流形假设的依赖，未来可探索更高效的流形计算。

title: Towards Rigorous Explainability by Feature Attribution
abstract: For around a decade, non-symbolic methods have been the option of choice when explaining complex machine learning (ML) models. Unfortunately, such methods lack rigor and can mislead human decision-makers. In high-stakes uses of ML, the lack of rigor is especially problematic. One prime example of provable lack of rigor is the adoption of Shapley values in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), with the tool SHAP being a ubiquitous example. This paper overviews the ongoing efforts towards using rigorous symbolic methods of XAI as an alternative to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches, concretely for assigning relative feature importance.

light_analysis.overview: 倡导用严谨的符号方法替代非严谨的非符号特征归因方法，以提升XAI可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 非符号可解释性方法（如SHAP）缺乏严谨性，可能误导高风险决策，亟需更可靠的特征归因方案。
light_analysis.method: 概述基于符号推理的XAI方法，如逻辑或形式化特征归因，确保解释可验证性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体结果，但强调符号方法能提供更严谨的特征重要性分配。
light_analysis.conclusion: 推动XAI从非严谨转向严谨符号方法，提升高风险领域可信度，但可能增加计算开销。

title: Prompt Optimization Is a Coin Flip: Diagnosing When It Helps in Compound AI Systems
abstract: Prompt optimization in compound AI systems is statistically indistinguishable from a coin flip: across 72 optimization runs on Claude Haiku 4.5 (6 methods $\times$ 4 tasks $\times$ 3 repeats), 49% score below zero-shot; on Amazon Nova Lite, the failure rate is even higher. Yet on one task, all six methods improve over zero-shot by up to $+6.8$ points. What distinguishes success from failure? We investigate with 18,000 grid evaluations and 144 optimization runs, testing two assumptions behind end-to-end optimization tools like TextGrad and DSPy, in the order they must be answered: (A) agent prompts interact, requiring joint rather than independent optimization, and (B) individual prompts are worth optimizing at all.
