Interaction effects are never significant ($p > 0.52$, all $F < 1.0$), and optimization helps only when the task has exploitable output structure: a format the model can produce but does not default to. We further give a mechanistic account: instruction-tuning compresses input phrasing into a narrow output distribution, eliminating the very phrasing-sensitivity that joint optimization assumes. We provide a two-stage diagnostic: an \$80 ANOVA pre-test for agent coupling, and a 10-minute headroom test that predicts whether optimization is worthwhile, turning a coin flip into an informed decision.
comment: Accepted to the 1st Workshop on Combining Theory and Benchmarks, CTB@ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea

light_analysis.overview: 揭示提示优化在复合AI系统中效果与抛硬币无异，并提出诊断性方法识别何时优化有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端优化工具如TextGrad、DSPy假设提示间存在交互且需联合优化，但实际优化效果极不稳定。许多情况下优化后性能甚至低于零样本基线，缺少明确诊断何时优化有效的准则，导致资源浪费。
light_analysis.method: 通过18,000次网格评估和144次优化运行，系统检验两个核心假设：A）提示交互要求联合优化；B）单个提示值得优化。使用ANOVA分析交互效应，发现其始终不显著（p>0.52, F<1.0）。进一步识别优化有效条件：任务存在模型可产生但非默认的输出结构。提出两阶段诊断：80美元的ANOVA预测试和10分钟的头房测试。
light_analysis.result: 在Claude Haiku 4.5上，49%的优化运行得分低于零样本；在Amazon Nova Lite上失败率更高。但在特定任务上，所有六种方法均提升最多+6.8分。交互效应从未显著，优化仅当任务具有可剥削输出结构时有效。头房测试可准确预测优化收益，将决策成功率显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了提示优化在复合AI系统中的随机性本质，首次提供机制性解释（指令调优压缩输出分布消除措辞敏感性）。提出的诊断框架将不可靠的优化转化为基于证据的决策，节省计算资源，并为未来系统设计提供指导。

title: When PCOS Meets Eating Disorders: An Explainable AI Approach to Detecting the Hidden Triple Burden
abstract: Women with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) face substantially elevated risks of body image distress, disordered eating, and metabolic challenges, yet existing natural language processing approaches for detecting these conditions lack transparency and cannot identify co-occurring presentations. We developed small, open-source language models to automatically detect this triple burden in social media posts with grounded explainability. We collected 1,000 PCOS-related posts from six subreddits, with two trained annotators labeling posts using guidelines operationalizing Lee et al. (2017) clinical framework. Three models (Gemma-2-2B, Qwen3-1.7B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B) were fine-tuned using Low-Rank Adaptation to generate structured explanations with textual evidence. The best model achieved 75.3 percent exact match accuracy on 150 held-out posts, with robust comorbidity detection and strong explainability. Performance declined with diagnostic complexity, indicating their best use is for screening rather than autonomous diagnosis.

light_analysis.overview: 开发小型开源语言模型，可解释地自动检测PCOS患者社交媒体中的身体形象困扰、饮食失调和代谢挑战三重负担。
light_analysis.motivation: PCOS女性面临身体形象困扰、饮食失调和代谢挑战的高风险，但现有NLP方法缺乏透明性，无法识别共病情况。本研究旨在构建可解释的自动检测工具，提升对PCOS患者多重健康问题的筛查能力，弥补当前方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 从6个Reddit子版块收集1000条PCOS相关帖子，由两名标注者依据临床框架标注。采用低秩适配（LoRA）微调三个小型语言模型（Gemma-2-2B、Qwen3-1.7B、DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B），生成包含文本证据的结构化解释，实现可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型在150个保留帖子上达到75.3%精确匹配准确率，共病检测稳健，可解释性强。但性能随诊断复杂性下降，表明更适合作为筛查工具而非自主诊断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了可解释AI在检测PCOS相关健康问题中的潜力，为临床筛查提供了低成本、透明的解决方案。局限性在于对复杂病例的检测能力有限，未来需改进模型以处理更高诊断复杂性。

title: BenGER Platform: A Collaborative Web Platform for End-to-End Benchmarking of German Legal Tasks
abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) for legal reasoning requires workflows that span task design, expert annotation, model execution, and metric-based evaluation. In practice, these steps are split across platforms and scripts, limiting transparency, reproducibility, and participation by non-technical legal experts. We present the BenGER (Benchmark for German Law) framework, an open-source web platform that integrates task creation, collaborative annotation, configurable LLM runs, and evaluation with lexical, semantic, factual, and judge-based metrics. BenGER supports multi-organization projects with tenant isolation and role-based access control, and can optionally provide formative, reference-grounded feedback to annotators. We will demonstrate a live deployment showing end-to-end benchmark creation and analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个集成任务创建、协作标注、LLM运行和多种评估指标的开源Web平台，用于德国法律任务的端到端基准测试。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前评估法律推理LLM的工作流分散在多个平台和脚本中，限制了透明度、可重复性以及非技术法律专家的参与。缺乏一个统一的、协作式的基准测试环境，使得跨组织的法律任务基准测试难以标准化和高效执行。
light_analysis.method: BenGER框架是一个开源Web平台，集成任务创建、协作标注、可配置LLM运行以及基于词汇、语义、事实和法官判断的评估指标。支持多组织项目的租户隔离和基于角色的访问控制，并可提供参考依据的形成性反馈给标注者。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供定量实验结果。论文计划通过现场部署展示端到端基准创建和分析的能力，强调平台的可操作性和协作功能。
light_analysis.conclusion: BenGER平台通过统一的工作流提升了法律LLM基准测试的透明度和可重复性，促进了非技术专家的参与。具有实际应用价值，但摘要未提及局限性或未来工作。

title: Evaluating the Evaluator: Problems with SemEval-2020 Task 1 for Lexical Semantic Change Detection
abstract: This discussion paper re-examines SemEval-2020 Task 1, the most influential shared benchmark for lexical semantic change detection, through a three-part evaluative framework: operationalisation, data quality, and benchmark design. First, at the level of operationalisation, we argue that the benchmark models semantic change mainly as gain, loss, or redistribution of discrete senses. While practical for annotation and evaluation, this framing is too narrow to capture gradual, constructional, collocational, and discourse-level change. Also, the gold labels are outcomes of annotation decisions, clustering procedures, and threshold settings, which could potentially limit the validity of the task. Second, at the level of data quality, we show that the benchmark is affected by substantial corpus and preprocessing problems, including OCR noise, malformed characters, truncated sentences, inconsistent lemmatisation, POS-tagging errors, and missed targets. These issues can distort model behaviour, complicate linguistic analysis, and reduce reproducibility. Third, at the level of bench-mark design, we argue the small curated target sets and limited language coverage reduce realism and increase statistical uncertainty. Taken together, these limitations suggest that the benchmark should be treated as a useful but partial test bed rather than a definitive measure of progress. We therefore call for future datasets and shared tasks to adopt broader theories of semantic change, document pre-processing transparently, expand cross-linguistic coverage, and use more realistic evaluation settings. Such steps are necessary for more valid, interpretable, and generalisable progress in lexical semantic change detection

light_analysis.overview: 批判性分析SemEval-2020 Task 1在操作化、数据质量和基准设计上的局限，呼吁更完善的语义变化检测评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前词汇语义变化检测领域最权威的基准SemEval-2020 Task 1被广泛使用，但其模型将语义变化窄化为离散意义的增减，忽略渐变和语篇层级变化；同时标注过程受主观决策影响，数据存在严重预处理问题（如OCR噪声、分词错误），且目标集小、语言覆盖有限。这些缺陷可能导致对模型能力的误判，阻碍领域进步。因此有必要系统性剖析该基准的弊端，为未来研究提供改进方向。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了包含三个层次的评估框架。在操作化层面，指出该基准将语义变化建模为离散义项的增减，忽视渐变、构式化和搭配变化；标注标签依赖于聚类和阈值等决策。在数据质量层面，通过分析发现语料存在OCR噪声、字符错误、断句、词形还原不一致、词性标注错误及目标词遗漏等问题。在基准设计层面，指出目标词集小（仅几十个词）且仅覆盖少数语言，降低了评估的统计可靠性和现实性。
light_analysis.result: 本文未开展实验，而是通过论证揭示了SemEval-2020 Task 1的多方面缺陷：操作化导致评估效度受限，数据质量问题使结果不可复现且偏离真实分布，基准设计降低了泛化能力。这些发现表明该基准只能作为部分测试工具，而非领域进步的绝对标尺。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于系统批判了现有主流基准的不足，强调语义变化检测需要更开放的理论框架（如渐变、构式）、透明的数据预处理、多语言扩展以及更贴近真实的评估任务。这些建议对提升该领域评测的效度和可解释性具有重要指导意义，未来研究应基于这些反思构建更合理的基准和共享任务。

title: PrecisionCUA: Iterative Visual Refinement for Pixel-Precise Cursor Grounding in Code Editors
abstract: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) fundamentally rely on graphical user interface (GUI) grounding to translate language instructions into executable screen actions, but editing-level grounding in dense coding interfaces (such as VS Code and Cursor), where sub-pixel accuracy is required to interact with dense IDE elements, remains underexplored. Existing approaches typically rely on single-shot coordinate prediction, which lacks a mechanism for error correction and often fails in high-density interfaces. In this technical report, we conduct an empirical study of pixel-precise cursor localization in coding environments. Instead of a single-step execution, our agent engages in an iterative refinement process, utilizing visual feedback from previous attempts to reach the target element. This closed-loop grounding mechanism allows the agent to self-correct displacement errors and adapt to dynamic UI changes. We evaluate our approach across Claude, Qwen, and GPT on a suite of complex coding benchmarks, demonstrating that multi-turn refinement significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single-shot models in both click precision and overall task success rate. Our results suggest that iterative visual reasoning is a critical component for the next generation of reliable software engineering agents. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/precision-cua-bench/tree/main.

light_analysis.overview: 提出迭代视觉精炼方法PrecisionCUA，实现代码编辑器中亚像素级的光标定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的计算机使用智能体(CUAs)在密集编码界面（如VS Code）中进行亚像素级的光标定位时，通常采用单次坐标预测，缺乏纠错机制，难以适应高密度界面和动态UI变化。该问题对于实现可靠的软件工程智能体至关重要，但尚未被充分研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出PrecisionCUA方法，采用迭代精炼过程，利用前一次尝试的视觉反馈逐步修正位移误差，实现闭环对接地机制。该方法允许智能体自纠正并适应动态UI变化。评估中使用Claude、Qwen和GPT模型在复杂编码基准上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在多个复杂编码基准上，多轮精炼方法在点击精度和整体任务成功率上显著优于最先进的单次预测模型。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调迭代视觉推理是可靠软件工程智能体的关键组件。
light_analysis.conclusion: PrecisionCUA通过迭代视觉精炼解决了代码编辑器中像素级光标定位的挑战，展示了闭环对接地机制的有效性。该工作为开发高可靠性软件工程智能体提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索更高效的视觉反馈模型。

title: Text2Model: Modeling Copilots for Text-to-Model Translation
abstract: There is growing interest in leveraging large language models (LLMs) for text-to-model translation and optimization tasks. This paper aims to advance this line of research by introducing \textsc{Text2Model} and \textsc{Text2Zinc}. \textsc{Text2Model} is a suite of copilots based on several LLM strategies with varying complexity, along with an online leaderboard. \textsc{Text2Zinc} is a cross-domain dataset for capturing optimization and satisfaction problems specified in natural language, along with an interactive editor with built-in AI assistant. While there is an emerging literature on using LLMs for translating combinatorial problems into formal models, our work is the first attempt to integrate \textit{both} satisfaction and optimization problems within a \textit{unified architecture} and \textit{dataset}. Moreover, our approach is \textit{solver-agnostic} unlike existing work that focuses on translation to a solver-specific model. To achieve this, we leverage \textsc{MiniZinc}'s solver-and-paradigm-agnostic modeling capabilities to formulate combinatorial problems. We conduct comprehensive experiments to compare execution and solution accuracy across several single- and multi-call strategies, including; zero-shot prompting, chain-of-thought reasoning, intermediate representations via knowledge-graphs, grammar-based syntax encoding, and agentic approaches that decompose the model into sequential sub-tasks. Our copilot strategies are competitive, and in parts improve, recent research in this domain. Our findings indicate that while LLMs are promising they are not yet a push-button technology for combinatorial modeling. We contribute \textsc{Text2Model} copilots and leaderboard, and \textsc{Text2Zinc} and interactive editor to open-source to support closing this performance gap.
comment: AAAI'25 Bridge Program on Machine Learning and Operations Research CPAIOR'26 Master Class on LLMs for CP/OR

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一且求解器无关的文本到模型翻译系统Text2Model和数据集Text2Zinc，并开源。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM在文本到模型翻译领域展现出潜力，但现有工作要么仅关注满足问题或优化问题之一，要么依赖于特定求解器的模型，缺乏统一框架。此外，LLM在组合建模中的性能尚未达到一键式水平，需要进一步研究和改进。因此，本文旨在构建一个跨领域、求解器无关的翻译系统，并评估多种LLM策略来缩小性能差距。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Text2Model框架，基于多种LLM策略（如零样本提示、链式推理、知识图谱中间表示、语法编码和智能体分解）实现文本到MiniZinc模型的翻译。同时构建Text2Zinc数据集，包含自然语言描述的满足与优化问题，并配备交互式编辑器与AI助手。通过统一架构和求解器无关设计（利用MiniZinc抽象能力），实现跨域支持。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个单次和多次调用策略上进行，对比执行准确率和求解精度。Text2Model的copilot策略在部分任务上优于近期研究，展现出竞争力。但结果表明LLM尚未成为组合建模的即插即用技术，存在性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次在统一架构和数据集下整合满足与优化问题，实现求解器无关的文本到模型翻译。开源Text2Model copilots、排行榜、Text2Zinc数据集及交互编辑器，为领域研究提供基础平台。未来工作可致力于缩小LLM在组合建模中的性能差距。

title: EpiAgent: An Agent-Centric System for Ancient Inscription Restoration
abstract: Ancient inscriptions, as repositories of cultural memory, have suffered from centuries of environmental and human-induced degradation. Restoring their intertwined visual and textual integrity poses one of the most demanding challenges in digital heritage preservation. However, existing AI-based approaches often rely on rigid pipelines, struggling to generalize across such complex and heterogeneous real-world degradations. Inspired by the skill-coordinated workflow of human epigraphers, we propose EpiAgent, an agent-centric system that formulates inscription restoration as a hierarchical planning problem. Following an Observe-Conceive-Execute-Reevaluate paradigm, an LLM-based central planner orchestrates collaboration among multimodal analysis, historical experience, specialized restoration tools, and iterative self-refinement. This agent-centric coordination enables a flexible and adaptive restoration process beyond conventional single-pass methods. Across real-world degraded inscriptions, EpiAgent achieves superior restoration quality and stronger generalization compared to existing methods. Our work marks an important step toward expert-level agent-driven restoration of cultural heritage. The code is available at https://github.com/blackprotoss/EpiAgent.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EpiAgent，一个基于智能体的铭文修复系统，通过分层规划和工作流协调实现优于现有方法的修复效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 古代铭文作为文化记忆的载体，因环境和人为因素严重退化，修复其视觉和文本完整性是数字遗产保护的重大挑战。现有基于AI的方法通常依赖刚性流水线，难以泛化到复杂多样的真实退化类型。因此，需要一种灵活且自适应的修复方法。
light_analysis.method: EpiAgent采用智能体中心设计，将铭文修复建模为分层规划问题，遵循Observe-Conceive-Execute-Reevaluate范式。核心是LLM驱动的中央规划器，协调多模态分析、历史经验、专业修复工具和迭代自优化模块，形成灵活自适应的修复流程，超越了传统单次方法。
light_analysis.result: 在真实退化铭文上，EpiAgent实现了比现有方法更优的修复质量和更强的泛化能力。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明，但通过与现有方法对比证明了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EpiAgent标志着向专家级智能体驱动的文化遗产修复迈出重要一步，展示了基于智能体协调的修复流程在复杂真实场景中的潜力。未来工作可进一步拓展其应用范围。

title: Nexus: Same Pretraining Loss, Better Downstream Generalization via Common Minima
abstract: The foundational capabilities of large language models are acquired during pretraining on internet-scale, highly heterogeneous data mixtures. In this work, we investigate an interesting geometric question regarding the converged state of pretraining: Does the model converge to a common minimizer across all data sources (e.g., \cref{fig:cwa_illustration:close}), or merely a minimizer of the summed loss (e.g., \cref{fig:cwa_illustration:distant})? We hypothesize that the geometric "closeness" of task-specific minima is intrinsically linked to downstream generalization. We reveal that standard optimizers (e.g., AdamW) often converge to points where task-specific minima are distant from each other. To address this, we propose the Nexus optimizer, which encourages the closeness of these minima by maximizing gradient similarity during optimization. Experiments across models ranging from 130M to 3B parameters, various data mixtures and hyperparameter schedules, show that Nexus \textit{significantly boosts downstream performance}, despite \textit{achieving the same pretraining loss} (see \cref{fig:demo:benchmark}). Notably, on the 3B model, Nexus reduces the out-of-distribution loss by 0.012 and yields up to a 15.0\% accuracy improvement on complex reasoning tasks (e.g., GSM8k). This finding challenges the reliance on pretraining loss as the sole proxy for model evaluation and demonstrates the importance of implicit biases in unlocking downstream generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Nexus优化器，通过最大化梯度相似性鼓励任务特定最小值接近，在不改变预训练损失的情况下显著提升下游泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在异构数据上预训练时，标准优化器（如AdamW）往往收敛到各任务最小值相距较远的点，这限制了下游泛化能力。现有方法仅关注预训练损失，忽视了隐式偏置对泛化的影响。本文旨在通过几何角度研究任务最小值接近性与下游泛化的内在联系，并设计优化器促进这一属性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Nexus优化器，核心思想是在优化过程中最大化不同数据源（任务）之间的梯度相似性，从而鼓励模型收敛到各任务最小值的公共区域。该方法不改变预训练损失函数，仅通过修改优化步骤实现。实验在130M到3B参数模型上进行，涵盖多种数据混合和超参数调度。
light_analysis.result: 在3B参数模型上，Nexus将分布外损失降低0.012，并在复杂推理任务（如GSM8k）上带来高达15.0%的准确率提升。尽管达到相同的预训练损失，Nexus在下游性能上显著优于标准优化器，表明预训练损失不是评估模型的唯一代理。
light_analysis.conclusion: Nexus挑战了对预训练损失的过度依赖，揭示了隐式偏置在解锁下游泛化中的重要性。该研究为设计更有效的预训练优化器提供了新视角，未来可探索其他几何约束或自适应梯度策略。

title: Graph-of-Skills: Dependency-Aware Structural Retrieval for Massive Agent Skills
abstract: Modern LLM agents increasingly rely on reusable skills, and as they interact with personal applications, web browsers, and other interfaces, skill libraries can scale to thousands of skills. Scaling to larger skill sets introduces two key challenges. First, loading the full skill set saturates the context window, driving up token costs, hallucination, and latency. Second, semantic retrieval surfaces topically relevant skills but misses their prerequisite chain of upstream and downstream skills, creating a prerequisite gap that leaves the retrieved bundle execution-incomplete. In this paper, we present Graph-of-Skills (GoS), an inference-time structural retrieval layer for large skill libraries. GoS constructs an executable skill graph offline from skill packages, then at inference time retrieves a bounded, dependency-aware skill bundle through hybrid semantic-lexical seeding, reverse-aware Personalized PageRank, and context-budgeted hydration. On SkillsBench and ALFWorld, GoS consistently delivers substantial reward improvements and token savings across three model families (Claude Sonnet 4.5, MiniMax M2.7, and GPT-5.2 Codex). On SkillsBench, GoS achieves a peak reward increase of 25.55% while reducing total tokens by 56.72% over the vanilla full skill-loading baseline using GPT-5.2 Codex. Ablations confirm this pattern across skill libraries from 200 to 2,000 skills.
comment: 11 pages of main text, 12 pages of appendix. Core contribution by Dawei Liu and Zongxia Li. Project page: https://github.com/davidliuk/graph-of-skills

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Graph-of-Skills (GoS)，一种依赖感知的结构检索层，用于大规模技能库的高效检索和组合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代 LLM 代理依赖可复用技能，当技能库规模扩大时，全量加载会饱和上下文窗口，增加令牌成本、幻觉和延迟；传统语义检索能找到主题相关技能但缺失上下游依赖关系，导致执行不完整。
light_analysis.method: GoS 离线从技能包构建可执行技能图，推理时通过混合语义-词汇种子、反向感知的个性化 PageRank 和上下文预算水化，检索有界、依赖感知的技能包，确保技能依赖链完整。
light_analysis.result: 在 SkillsBench 和 ALFWorld 上，使用 Claude Sonnet 4.5、MiniMax M2.7 和 GPT-5.2 Codex 三个模型族，GoS 均带来奖励提升和令牌节省。SkillsBench 上使用 GPT-5.2 Codex 时峰值奖励提高 25.55%，总令牌减少 56.72%；消融实验验证技能库规模 200-2000 时效果一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: GoS 有效解决大规模技能库的依赖感知检索问题，提升代理性能并节省资源，在多个模型和基准上得到验证；未来工作可探索更复杂依赖关系或动态图更新。

title: Mitigating Cross-Lingual Cultural Inconsistencies in LLMs via Consensus-Driven Preference Optimisation
abstract: Despite their impressive capabilities, multilingual large language models (MLLMs) frequently exhibit inconsistent behaviour when the prompt's language changes. While such adaptation is generally desirable, it becomes a critical failure when a user's identity is explicitly defined. For instance, given a fixed British persona and an ambiguous everyday knowledge query about literature, the prompt's language frequently overwrites the system persona -- yielding Shakespeare in English but Cervantes in Spanish. To robustly quantify this Cross-lingual Cultural Inconsistency, we introduce Singleton Fleiss's $κ_S$, a metric mathematically resilient to hallucinations. For mitigation, we propose Cross-lingual Cultural Consistent Preference Optimisation (C-3PO), a consensus-driven alignment framework. C-3PO achieves up to a 0.13-point absolute increase in $κ_S$ over unaligned models, consistently outperforming strong prompting and representation steering baselines whilst preserving explicit user identities, cultural neutrality and intrinsic cultural knowledge. Empirical evaluations demonstrate this inconsistency disproportionately affects lower-resource languages like Indonesian and Persian. Finally, early decoding of intermediate layers reveals that MLLMs implicitly personalise outputs towards the prompt language's stereotypical culture as forward-pass representations stabilise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出共识驱动的偏好优化方法C-3PO，缓解多语言大模型中的跨语言文化不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言大模型在语言切换时表现不一致，尤其当用户身份明确时，提示语言会覆盖系统角色，导致文化矛盾。这种不一致在低资源语言中更严重，现有方法如强提示和表示引导效果有限。
light_analysis.method: 提出C-3PO框架，采用共识驱动的对齐方法。引入Singleton Fleiss's κ_S指标量化不一致性，并通过偏好优化实现跨语言文化一致性，同时保留用户身份、文化中立性和内部知识。
light_analysis.result: C-3PO在κ_S上提升高达0.13个绝对点，优于强提示和表示引导基线。不一致性在印尼语和波斯语等低资源语言中尤其显著。早期解码显示模型会隐式个性化输出至提示语言的刻板文化。
light_analysis.conclusion: C-3PO有效缓解跨语言文化不一致，提升模型可靠性。该工作对多语言文化包容性有重要价值，未来可探索更广泛场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Benchmarking and Mechanistic Analysis of Vision-Language Models for Cross-Depiction Assembly Instruction Alignment
abstract: 2D assembly diagrams are often abstract and hard to follow, creating a need for intelligent assistants that can monitor progress, detect errors, and provide step-by-step guidance. In mixed reality settings, such systems must recognize completed and ongoing steps from the camera feed and align them with the diagram instructions. Vision Language Models (VLMs) show promise for this task, but face a depiction gap because assembly diagrams and video frames share few visual features. To systematically assess this gap, we construct IKEA-Bench, a benchmark of 1,623 questions across 6 task types on 29 IKEA furniture products, and evaluate 19 VLMs (2B-38B) under three alignment strategies. Our key findings: (1) assembly instruction understanding is recoverable via text, but text simultaneously degrades diagram-to-video alignment; (2) architecture family predicts alignment accuracy more strongly than parameter count; (3) video understanding remains a hard bottleneck unaffected by strategy. A three-level mechanistic analysis further reveals that diagrams and video occupy disjoint ViT subspaces, and that adding text shifts models from visual to text-driven reasoning. These results identify visual encoding as the primary target for improving cross-depiction robustness. Project page: https://ryenhails.github.io/IKEA-Bench/

light_analysis.overview: 提出IKEA-Bench基准，系统评估19个VLM在跨描绘装配指令对齐中的表现，发现视觉编码是主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 2D装配图通常抽象难懂，智能助手需从视频流中识别进度并与图解指令对齐。现有VLMs面临描绘鸿沟，因图解与视频帧共享视觉特征少。需系统评估模型在此任务中的表现与机制。
light_analysis.method: 构建IKEA-Bench基准，含29个IKEA产品的1623个问题，覆盖6种任务类型。评估19个VLM（2B-38B参数），采用三种对齐策略。通过三级机理分析揭示图解与视频在ViT子空间中的分离，以及文本引入导致的推理偏移。
light_analysis.result: 关键发现：(1)装配指令理解可通过文本恢复，但文本降低图解-视频对齐；(2)架构家族比参数量更预测对齐精度；(3)视频理解是硬瓶颈。模型表现显示视觉编码是跨描绘鲁棒性的主要改进目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了VLMs在跨描绘任务中的核心挑战是视觉编码，而非文本推理。未来应着力提升视觉特征对齐。IKEA-Bench为评估此类能力提供了标准化基准。

title: COTTA: Context-Aware Transfer Adaptation for Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Developing robust models to accurately predict the trajectories of surrounding agents is fundamental to autonomous driving safety. However, most public datasets, such as the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and Argoverse, are collected in Western road environments and do not reflect the unique traffic patterns, infrastructure, and driving behaviors of other regions, including South Korea. This domain discrepancy leads to performance degradation when state-of-the-art models trained on Western data are deployed in different geographic contexts. In this work, we investigate the adaptability of Query-Centric Trajectory Prediction (QCNet) when transferred from U.S.-based data to Korean road environments. Using a Korean autonomous driving dataset, we compare four training strategies: zero-shot transfer, training from scratch, full fine-tuning, and encoder freezing. Experimental results demonstrate that leveraging pretrained knowledge significantly improves prediction performance. Specifically, selectively fine-tuning the decoder while freezing the encoder yields the best trade-off between accuracy and training efficiency, reducing prediction error by over 66% compared to training from scratch. This study provides practical insights into effective transfer learning strategies for deploying trajectory prediction models in new geographic domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出编码器冻结、解码器微调的迁移学习策略，使QCNet轨迹预测模型从美国道路环境高效适应韩国环境。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型多基于西方数据集（如Waymo、Argoverse），未反映韩国等地区的独特交通模式、基础设施和驾驶行为，导致域差异和性能下降。本文研究如何将QCNet从美国数据迁移到韩国道路环境，以解决部署时的性能退化问题。
light_analysis.method: 使用韩国自动驾驶数据集，以QCNet为基模型，比较零样本迁移、从头训练、全微调和编码器冻结四种策略。核心创新是选择性微调解码器并冻结编码器，在利用预训练知识的同时减少训练开销，实现准确性和效率的最佳权衡。
light_analysis.result: 编码器冻结、解码器微调策略相比从头训练减少预测误差超过66%，在准确率和训练效率间取得最佳平衡。实验证明了利用预训练知识能显著提升跨域轨迹预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为轨迹预测模型在新地理域的部署提供了实用迁移学习策略，验证了预训练知识和特定微调策略的有效性。未来可扩展至更多模型和区域，进一步探索域适应方法。

title: A tree interpretation of arc standard dependency derivation
abstract: Arc-standard derivations over projective dependency trees can be interpreted as the incremental construction of lexicalized ordered trees with contiguous yields. Each \textsc{shift}, \textsc{leftarc}, and \textsc{rightarc} transition corresponds to a deterministic tree update, and the resulting ordered tree uniquely determines the dependency arcs introduced by the derivation. We show that this representation is not an arbitrary encoding: a single-headed dependency tree admits such a contiguous ordered representation if and only if it is projective. The proposal is therefore derivational rather than conversion-based, since the ordered object is defined over the transition sequence itself rather than obtained by transforming a completed dependency graph. This gives a tree-theoretic interpretation of arc-standard parsing, in which projective dependency derivations implicitly construct recoverable constituency-style ordered trees. For non-projective inputs, the interpretation can be used through pseudo-projective lifting and inverse decoding. A small implementation study confirms that the mapped derivations are executable in an existing neural transition-based parser.

light_analysis.overview: 提出弧标准依存推导的树解释，将投影依存树推导映射为连续有序树的确定性构建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有弧标准依存分析系统缺乏对推导过程本身的树结构解释，本文旨在建立推导与树结构间的直接对应关系，为理解弧标准分析提供理论框架，并支持在神经迁移基分析器中的应用。
light_analysis.method: 将shift、left-arc、right-arc操作定义为有序树的确定性更新，构建的连续有序树唯一确定依存弧；证明有头依存树存在连续有序表示当且仅当它是投影的；对非投影输入采用伪投影提升和逆解码扩展解释，并在现有神经迁移基分析器中验证。
light_analysis.result: 小型实现研究显示映射的推导可在现有神经迁移基分析器中执行，验证了树解释的有效性和可行性，但摘要未提供具体性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为弧标准依存推导提供树理论解释，使投影依存分析隐式构建可恢复有序树；具有理论价值，并为非投影输入提供处理方案；未来可探索与其他句法表示的联系。

title: ClinicalAgents: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Clinical Decision Making with Dual-Memory
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated potential in healthcare, they often struggle with the complex, non-linear reasoning required for accurate clinical diagnosis. Existing methods typically rely on static, linear mappings from symptoms to diagnoses, failing to capture the iterative, hypothesis-driven reasoning inherent in human clinicians. To bridge this gap, we introduce ClinicalAgents, a novel multi-agent framework designed to simulate the cognitive workflow of expert clinicians. Unlike rigid sequential chains, ClinicalAgents employs a dynamic orchestration mechanism modeled as a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) process. This allows an orchestrator to iteratively generate hypotheses, actively verify evidence, and trigger backtracking when critical information is missing. The foundation of this framework is a Dual-Memory architecture: a mutable working memory that maintains the evolving patient state for context-aware reasoning, and a static experience memory that retrieves clinical guidelines and historical cases via an active feedback loop. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ClinicalAgents achieves the best performance among evaluated baselines, significantly enhancing both diagnostic accuracy and explainability compared to strong single-agent and multi-agent baselines. Our code is released at https://github.com/ZhuohanGe/ClinicalAgents-Code.
comment: Accepted to the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出ClinicalAgents多智能体框架，模拟临床医生的认知工作流，通过动态编排和双记忆架构提升诊断准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在医疗领域虽具潜力，但难以处理复杂非线性的临床诊断推理。现有方法依赖静态线性映射，无法模拟人类医生的迭代假设驱动推理。临床诊断需要动态假设生成、证据验证和回溯机制，而现有系统缺乏这种能力，导致诊断准确性和可解释性不足。
light_analysis.method: ClinicalAgents采用多智能体框架，核心是蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）动态编排机制，支持假设迭代生成、主动证据验证和回溯。引入双记忆架构：可变工作记忆维护患者状态演变，静态经验记忆通过主动反馈循环检索临床指南和历史案例。无需预设线性流程，模拟临床医生认知工作流。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，ClinicalAgents在所有评估基线上取得最佳性能。与强单智能体和多智能体基线相比，诊断准确性和可解释性显著提升。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: ClinicalAgents通过模拟临床医生推理过程，解决了现有LLM在诊断中的线性推理局限。双记忆架构和MCTS编排增强了动态推理和可解释性。未来可扩展至更广泛的临床决策场景，但可能面临计算开销和记忆更新效率的挑战。

title: Explanation Generation for Contradiction Reconciliation with LLMs
abstract: Existing NLP work commonly treats contradictions as errors to be resolved by choosing which statements to accept or discard. Yet a key aspect of human reasoning in social interactions and professional domains is the ability to hypothesize explanations that reconcile contradictions. For example, "Cassie hates coffee" and "She buys coffee everyday" may appear contradictory, yet both are compatible if Cassie has the unenviable daily chore of buying coffee for all her coworkers. Despite the growing reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), their ability to hypothesize such reconciliatory explanations remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce the task of reconciliatory explanation generation, where models must generate explanations that effectively render contradictory statements compatible. We propose a novel method of repurposing existing natural language inference (NLI) datasets, and introduce quality metrics that enable scalable automatic evaluation. Experiments with 18 LLMs show that most models achieve limited success in this task, and that the benefit of extending test-time compute by "thinking" plateaus as model size increases. Our results highlight an under-explored dimension of LLM reasoning and the need to address this limitation in enhancing LLMs' downstream applications such as chatbots and scientific aids.

light_analysis.overview: 提出调和解释生成新任务，评估LLM生成矛盾调和解释的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NLP研究将矛盾视为需解决的错误，通过选择接受或拒绝陈述来消除矛盾，但人类推理中，假设解释以调和矛盾是关键能力。随着LLM推理能力增强，其能否生成调和矛盾的解释尚未探索。这一能力缺失限制了LLM在需要复杂推理的应用（如聊天机器人、科学辅助）中的效果，因此亟需研究。
light_analysis.method: 定义调和解释生成任务：给定两个矛盾陈述，模型需生成使两者兼容的解释。利用现有NLI数据集，通过构造矛盾对并人工标注解释来构建数据。提出质量指标（如一致性、合理性）实现自动评估。实验选用18个LLM，包括不同规模（如GPT、LLaMA），并探索测试时计算（如思维链）的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，多数LLM在调和解释生成上成功有限，生成的解释常缺乏合理性或未能真正调和矛盾。扩展测试时计算（如多步推理）对性能提升随模型规模增大而饱和，小模型提升明显，大模型提升微乎其微。这揭示了当前LLM在矛盾调和推理上的瓶颈，与标准NLI任务表现形成对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了LLM推理中尚未充分探索的维度——矛盾调和解释生成。该能力对提升LLM在复杂交互场景（如对话系统、科学研究）中的实用性至关重要。当前LLM表现不足，表明需要新的训练方法或架构创新。未来工作可探索更优的数据构建、奖励设计或混合推理机制。

title: SaFeR-Steer: Evolving Multi-Turn MLLMs via Synthetic Bootstrapping and Feedback Dynamics
abstract: MLLMs are increasingly deployed in multi-turn settings, where attackers can escalate unsafe intent through the evolving visual-text history and exploit long-context safety decay. Yet safety alignment is still dominated by single-turn data and fixed-template dialogues, leaving a mismatch between training and deployment.   To bridge this gap, we propose SaFeR-Steer, a progressive multi-turn alignment framework that combines staged synthetic bootstrapping with tutor-in-the-loop GRPO to train a single student under adaptive, on-policy attacks. We also introduce Trajectory-Consistent Summative Reward (TCSR), which aggregates the historical minimum and average of turn rewards so that any low-quality turn affects the trajectory-level return.   I. Dataset. We release STEER, a multi-turn multimodal safety dataset with STEER-SFT (12,934), STEER-RL (2,000), and STEER-Bench (3,227) dialogues spanning 2-10 turns. II. Experiment. Starting from Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B, SaFeR-Steer substantially improves Safety/Helpfulness on both single-turn (48.30/45.86 $\rightarrow$ 81.84/70.77 for 3B; 56.21/60.32 $\rightarrow$ 87.89/77.40 for 7B) and multi-turn benchmarks (12.55/27.13 $\rightarrow$ 55.58/70.27 for 3B; 24.66/46.48 $\rightarrow$ 64.89/72.35 for 7B), shifting failures to later turns and yielding robustness beyond scaling alone.   Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SaFeR-Steer

light_analysis.overview: 提出SaFeR-Steer框架，通过合成引导和反馈动态实现多轮多模态大语言模型的安全对齐，显著提升多轮对话的安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在多轮对话场景中存在安全风险，攻击者可通过视觉-文本历史逐步升级恶意意图，利用长上下文安全衰减。现有安全对齐方法主要依赖单轮数据和固定模板对话，导致训练与部署之间的不匹配。需要一种能够适应多轮对抗攻击的对齐框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出SaFeR-Steer，一种渐进式多轮对齐框架，结合分阶段合成引导（synthetic bootstrapping）和教师参与的GRPO（tutor-in-the-loop GRPO）来训练单一学生模型，并引入轨迹一致总结奖励（TCSR），聚合每轮奖励的历史最小值和平均值，使任何低质量轮次影响轨迹级回报。同时发布多轮多模态安全数据集STEER，包含SFT、RL和Bench子集。
light_analysis.conclusion: SaFeR-Steer有效解决了多轮对话中的安全对齐问题，通过合成引导和奖励机制显著提升模型的安全性而不显著牺牲有用性。提供了开源数据集和代码，为多模态安全对齐研究提供了新基准。未来可探索更复杂的攻击策略和更大规模模型。

title: Integrating Inductive Biases in Transformers via Distillation for Financial Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Transformer-based models have been widely adopted for time-series forecasting due to their high representational capacity and architectural flexibility. However, many Transformer variants implicitly assume stationarity and stable temporal dynamics -- assumptions routinely violated in financial markets characterized by regime shifts and non-stationarity. Empirically, state-of-the-art time-series Transformers often underperform even vanilla Transformers on financial tasks, while simpler architectures with distinct inductive biases, such as CNNs and RNNs, can achieve stronger performance with substantially lower complexity. At the same time, no single inductive bias dominates across markets or regimes, suggesting that robust financial forecasting requires integrating complementary temporal priors. We propose TIPS (Transformer with Inductive Prior Synthesis), a knowledge distillation framework that synthesizes diverse inductive biases -- causality, locality, and periodicity -- within a unified Transformer. TIPS trains bias-specialized Transformer teachers via attention masking, then distills their knowledge into a single student model with regime-dependent alignment across inductive biases. Across four major equity markets, TIPS achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming strong ensemble baselines by 55%, 9%, and 16% in annual return, Sharpe ratio, and Calmar ratio, while requiring only 38% of the inference-time computation. Further analyses show that TIPS generates statistically significant excess returns beyond both vanilla Transformers and its teacher ensembles, and exhibits regime-dependent behavioral alignment with classical architectures during their profitable periods. These results highlight the importance of regime-dependent inductive bias utilization for robust generalization in non-stationary financial time series.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIPS框架，通过知识蒸馏将因果性、局部性、周期性等归纳偏置整合到单一Transformer中，实现金融时间序列预测的鲁棒泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在时间序列预测中广泛应用，但金融市场的非平稳性和机制转换导致许多Transformer变体性能不佳，甚至不如简单架构（CNN/RNN）。且单一归纳偏置无法适应所有市场或机制，因此需要整合互补的时间先验以提高鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: TIPS框架首先通过注意力掩码训练三个偏置特异性Transformer教师（分别编码因果性、局部性和周期性），然后利用知识蒸馏将它们的知识转移到一个学生模型中，学生模型通过机制依赖的对齐自适应整合归纳偏置。实验在四个主要股票市场进行。
light_analysis.result: TIPS在年化收益率、夏普比率和卡尔玛比率上分别比强集成基线提升55%、9%、16%，推理计算量仅为其38%。进一步分析显示，TIPS产生统计显著的超额收益，并在不同机制下与经典架构（如CNN/RNN）的行为对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIPS验证了机制依赖的归纳偏置利用对于非平稳金融时间序列预测的重要性。学术贡献在于提出一种整合多种归纳偏置的蒸馏框架；实际应用可提升投资绩效。未来可探索更多偏置类型或自适应教师选择。

title: Excited Pfaffians: Generalized Neural Wave Functions Across Structure and State
abstract: Neural-network wave functions in Variational Monte Carlo (VMC) have achieved great success in accurately representing both ground and excited states. However, achieving sufficient numerical accuracy in state overlaps requires increasing the number of Monte Carlo samples, and consequently the computational cost, with the number of states. We present a nearly constant sample-size approach, Multi-State Importance Sampling (MSIS), that leverages samples from all states to estimate pairwise overlap. To efficiently evaluate all states for all samples, we introduce Excited Pfaffians. Inspired by Hartree-Fock, this architecture represents many states within a single neural network. Excited Pfaffians also serve as generalized wave functions, allowing a single model to represent multi-state potential energy surfaces. On the carbon dimer, we match the $O(N_s^4)$-scaling natural excited states while training $>200\times$ faster and modeling 50% more states. Our favorable scaling enables us to be the first to use neural networks to find all distinct energy levels of the beryllium atom. Finally, we demonstrate that a single wave function can represent excited states across various molecules.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Excited Pfaffians架构和MSIS方法，实现单一神经网络高效表示多个激发态，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经波函数在变分蒙特卡洛中成功用于基态和激发态，但准确计算态重叠需要随态数增加的蒙特卡洛样本，导致计算成本高昂。现有方法难以高效处理多态问题，亟需一种几乎常数样本量的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Multi-State Importance Sampling（MSIS）方法，利用来自所有态的样本估计成对重叠，保持样本量几乎恒定。同时引入Excited Pfaffians架构，受Hartree-Fock启发，在单个神经网络中表示多个态，并可作为广义波函数建模多态势能面。
light_analysis.result: 在碳二聚体上，该方法匹配O(N_s^4)缩放的自然激发态，训练速度快200倍以上，可建模多50%的态。首次用神经网络找到铍原子的所有不同能级，并展示单一波函数可表示多种分子的激发态。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作提出了高效的神经多态波函数框架，大幅降低计算代价，实现了对多分子激发态的通用表示。该方法在量子化学和材料科学中具有重要应用价值，未来可扩展到更大体系。

title: Sparse Scheduled Diffusion Guidance for Inverse Problems
abstract: Pretrained diffusion models are effective priors for Bayesian inverse problems, but posterior sampling with these priors is often costly because data-consistency guidance is applied throughout the full reverse trajectory. Existing methods have shown that vector-Jacobian products through the denoiser can sometimes be avoided, yet they typically still rely on dense guidance through the full trajectory or expensive inner solves. We introduce Sparse Scheduled Diffusion Guidance for Inverse Problems (Spin), a solver that avoids starting posterior sampling from pure noise. Spin first samples from a posterior time-marginal at an intermediate timestep $t_*$, and then uses that state as a warm start for a guided reverse diffusion process. At guidance time, instead of enforcing the measurement constraint at every denoising step, Spin applies lightweight corrections only at scheduled timesteps where the denoiser can still clean up artifacts. The resulting procedure decouples prior refinement from data consistency: the prior supplies denoising, while lightweight pixel-space optimization enforces the measurement constraint without backpropagation through the denoiser or decoder. Across linear and nonlinear inverse problems on FFHQ and ImageNet, Spin achieves competitive reconstruction quality with a substantially better runtime--memory profile, running 2x faster on pixel-space models and up to 50x faster on latent diffusion models, with lower memory costs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Spin，一种稀疏调度的扩散引导方法，通过中间时间步暖启动和稀疏修正，高效求解逆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练扩散模型作为贝叶斯逆问题的先验，但后验采样中数据一致性引导贯穿整个反向轨迹，成本高昂。现有方法虽避免向量-雅可比乘积，但仍依赖密集引导或昂贵内循环。急需一种能显著降低计算开销同时保持重建质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: Spin首先从中间时间步t*的后验时间边缘采样，作为暖启动。在引导阶段，仅在预定时间步施加轻量像素空间修正，这些步骤中降噪器仍能清理伪影。将先验细化与数据一致性解耦：先验提供降噪，轻量优化强制执行测量约束，无需通过降噪器或解码器反向传播。
light_analysis.result: 在FFHQ和ImageNet的线性和非线性逆问题上，Spin达到竞争性重建质量。像素空间模型运行速度提升2倍，潜在扩散模型提升高达50倍，同时内存成本更低。具体数据支撑了其高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Spin通过稀疏调度引导和暖启动，大幅提升逆问题求解效率，兼具高质量与低资源消耗。学术上提出新的后验采样范式，实际中适用于图像复原等任务。未来可探索调度策略的自适应优化。

title: RelaxFlow: Text-Driven Amodal 3D Generation
abstract: Image-to-3D generation faces inherent semantic ambiguity under occlusion, where partial observation alone is often insufficient to determine object category. In this work, we formalize text-driven amodal 3D generation, where text prompts steer the completion of unseen regions while strictly preserving input observation. Crucially, we identify that these objectives demand distinct control granularities: rigid control for the observation versus relaxed structural control for the prompt. To this end, we propose RelaxFlow, a training-free dual-branch framework that decouples control granularity via a Multi-Prior Consensus Module and a Relaxation Mechanism. Theoretically, we prove that our relaxation is equivalent to applying a low-pass filter on the generative vector field, which suppresses high-frequency instance details to isolate geometric structure that accommodates the observation. To facilitate evaluation, we introduce two diagnostic benchmarks, ExtremeOcc-3D and AmbiSem-3D. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RelaxFlow successfully steers the generation of unseen regions to match the prompt intent without compromising visual fidelity.
comment: Accepted as a spotlight presentation at ICML 2026. Code: https://github.com/viridityzhu/RelaxFlow

light_analysis.overview: 提出RelaxFlow，一种训练无关的双分支框架，通过松弛机制解耦控制粒度，实现文本驱动的非模态3D生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像到3D生成在遮挡下存在语义模糊，仅部分观测不足以确定物体类别。现有方法未能同时满足严格保留输入观测和根据文本提示补全未 seen 区域的双重目标，且缺乏对控制粒度的区分。
light_analysis.method: RelaxFlow采用训练无关的双分支框架，通过多先验共识模块和松弛机制解耦控制粒度。理论证明松弛等价于对生成向量场施加低通滤波，抑制高频实例细节，分离几何结构以适配观测。无需训练，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在提出的ExtremeOcc-3D和AmbiSem-3D基准上，RelaxFlow成功引导未 seen 区域生成匹配文本提示，同时保持观测区域的视觉保真度。与基线相比，在语义一致性和图像质量上均表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 形式化文本驱动非模态3D生成任务，提出解耦控制粒度的有效框架。方法无需训练，实用性强，可推广至其他3D生成场景。未来可探索更复杂的控制粒度自适应机制。

title: FinTexTS: Financial Text-Paired Time-Series Dataset via Semantic-Based and Multi-Level Pairing
abstract: The financial domain involves a variety of important time-series problems. Recently, time-series analysis methods that jointly leverage textual and numerical information have gained increasing attention. Accordingly, numerous efforts have been made to construct text-paired time-series datasets in the financial domain. However, financial markets are characterized by complex interdependencies, in which a company's stock price is influenced not only by company-specific events but also by events in other companies and broader macroeconomic factors. Existing approaches that pair text with financial time-series data based on simple keyword matching often fail to capture such complex relationships. To address this limitation, we propose a semantic-based and multi-level pairing framework. Specifically, we extract company-specific context for the target company from SEC filings and apply an embedding-based matching mechanism to retrieve semantically relevant news articles based on this context. Furthermore, we classify news articles into four levels (macro-level, sector-level, related company-level, and target company-level) using large language models (LLMs), enabling multi-level pairing of news articles with the target company. Applying this framework to publicly-available news datasets, we construct FinTexTS, a new large-scale text-paired stock price dataset. Experimental results on FinTexTS demonstrate the effectiveness of our semantic-based and multi-level pairing strategy in stock price forecasting. In addition to publicly-available news underlying FinTexTS, we show that applying our method to proprietary yet carefully curated news sources leads to higher-quality paired data and improved stock price forecasting performance.
comment: 12 pages, KDD 2026, Datasets and Benchmarks Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于语义和多层级配对的框架构建金融文本-时间序列数据集FinTexTS，提升股价预测效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融市场中公司股价受自身事件、其他公司事件及宏观经济等多因素影响，现有基于关键词匹配的文本-时间序列配对方法难以捕捉这种复杂关系。因此需要一种能语义理解并分层级配对的框架来构建高质量数据集，以提升股价预测的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出语义基础与多层级配对框架：首先从SEC文件中提取目标公司的特定上下文，利用嵌入匹配机制检索语义相关的新闻；然后使用大语言模型将新闻分为宏观、行业、相关公司和目标公司四个层级，实现多层级配对。基于公开新闻数据集构建FinTexTS数据集，并验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在FinTexTS数据集上的实验表明，所提出的语义和多层级配对策略在股价预测中有效。此外，将该方法应用于自有的精选新闻来源可获得更高质量的配对数据，进一步提升股价预测性能。摘要未明确具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过语义和多层级配对框架解决了现有金融文本-时间序列数据集构建中语义关联不足的问题，所构建的FinTexTS数据集及方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更精细的分层或更优的语义匹配机制。

title: ClinConsensus: A Physician-Calibrated Benchmark for Evaluating Clinical Rubric Coverage in Chinese Medical LLMs
abstract: Open-ended medical LLM evaluation remains weakly grounded in physician-calibrated coverage of clinically relevant response criteria, especially in localized clinical settings. We introduce \textsc{ClinConsensus}, a Chinese medical benchmark of 2{,}500 expert-curated cases spanning 36 specialties, 12 task themes, multiple difficulty levels, and lay-facing versus professional-facing settings. Each case is paired with 30 case-specific binary rubric criteria. To evaluate whether responses satisfy enough physician-authored criteria, we propose \emph{Clinician-Anchored Coverage Score} (CACS), a physician-calibrated threshold metric instantiated at \(k=10\), and develop a dual-judge framework combining a GPT-5.1 grader with a physician-supervised Qwen3-8B judge. Evaluating 11 frontier LLMs, we find a persistent coverage gap: Rubric Accuracy ranges from 39.6\% to 52.1\%, whereas CACS@10 ranges from 17.8\% to 32.9\%, leaving a 19.2--21.9 point gap across models. Stratified analyses further reveal substantial variation across reasoning, evidence use, structured extraction, medication instructions, follow-up, and dialogue register. These results suggest that medical LLM evaluation should measure thresholded, rubric-grounded clinical coverage rather than average partial correctness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出中文医学LLM评分标准覆盖基准ClinConsensus和医生校准的阈值指标CACS，揭示模型存在显著覆盖差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放式的医学LLM评估缺乏基于医生校准的临床相关响应标准覆盖，特别是在本地化临床环境中。现有方法侧重于平均部分正确性，未能充分评估模型是否满足医生制定的具体评分标准，导致评估结果与临床实践脱节。因此，亟需一个能衡量阈值化、基于评分标准的临床覆盖的基准和指标。
light_analysis.method: 构建了ClinConsensus基准，包含2,500个专家策划的案例，涵盖36个专科、12个任务主题、多个难度级别及面向公众与专业两种场景。每个案例配有30个医学专家编写的二值评分标准。提出CACS（Clinician-Anchored Coverage Score）指标，在k=10处实例化，用于评估响应是否满足医生制定的标准。开发了双评委框架，结合GPT-5.1评分器和医生监督的Qwen3-8B评委，以提高评估准确性。
light_analysis.result: 评估了11个前沿LLM，Rubric Accuracy（评分标准准确率）在39.6%至52.1%之间，而CACS@10（医生校准覆盖得分）仅为17.8%至32.9%，两者之间存在19.2至21.9个百分点的持续差距。分层分析还揭示了在推理、证据使用、结构化提取、药物说明、随访和对话语域等方面的显著差异。这些结果表明模型在满足临床评分标准方面普遍不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了一个医生校准的医学LLM评估框架，强调阈值化、基于评分标准的临床覆盖而非平均部分正确性。ClinConsensus和CACS为中文医疗LLM评估提供了更贴近临床实践的标准。未来工作可扩展至更多专科和任务类型，并探索自动生成评分标准的方法。局限性在于依赖专家人工构建案例和标准，成本较高。

title: Probing for Knowledge Attribution in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language model (LLM) hallucinations, meaning fluent but factually incorrect generations, fall into two types: faithfulness violations, where the model misuses provided context, and factuality violations, where answers reflect errors in internal knowledge. Proper mitigation depends on knowing which source drives each answer. We study contributive attribution, i.e. the classification of the dominant knowledge source behind each output, and show that a simple linear probe trained on hidden representations can reliably identify it. We introduce AttriWiki, a self-supervised pipeline that automatically generates labelled training data by prompting models to recall withheld entities from memory or read them from context without relying on knowledge conflicts. Probes trained on AttriWiki achieve up to 0.96 Macro-$F_1$ on Llama-3.1-8B, Mistral-7B, and Qwen-7B, transfer to SQuAD and WebQuestions with 0.94-0.99 Macro-$F_1$, and generalise zero-shot to Tighidet et al. (2024)'s benchmark, outperforming their probe on conflicting settings without retraining. Furthermore, attribution mismatches raise error rates by up to 70%, though correct attribution does not guarantee correct answers, pointing to the need for broader detection frameworks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于线性探针的知识归因方法，从LLM隐藏表示中判断输出依赖记忆还是上下文，利用自监督流水线自动生成训练数据。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM幻觉分为忠实性错误（误用上下文）和事实性错误（内部知识错误），缓解需识别答案的知识来源。现有方法依赖知识冲突，标注成本高且泛化有限。
light_analysis.method: 使用线性探针在隐藏层特征上分类知识来源（记忆vs上下文）。提出AttriWiki自监督流水线：通过设计提示模板让模型从记忆回忆或从上下文读取特定实体，自动生成标注数据，无需人工或冲突样本。探针在多个7B模型上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B、Mistral-7B、Qwen-7B上达到0.96 Macro-F1；零样本迁移到SQuAD和WebQuestions达0.94-0.99；在Tighidet等基准上零样本泛化优于其探针。归因错误导致答案错误率上升最多70%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 探针可有效区分LLM输出的知识来源，但正确归因不保证正确回答，需更全面的幻觉检测框架。为理解LLM内部行为提供轻量级工具，有助于设计针对性缓解策略。

title: WeatherCity: Urban Scene Reconstruction with Controllable Multi-Weather Transformation
abstract: Editable high-fidelity 4D scenes are crucial for autonomous driving, as they can be applied to end-to-end training and closed-loop simulation. However, existing reconstruction methods are primarily limited to replicating observed scenes and lack the capability for diverse weather simulation. While image-level weather editing methods tend to introduce scene artifacts and offer poor controllability over the weather effects. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{WeatherCity}, a novel framework for 4D urban scene reconstruction and weather editing. Specifically, we leverage a text-guided image editing model to achieve flexible editing of image weather backgrounds. To tackle the challenge of multi-weather modeling, we introduce a novel weather Gaussian representation based on shared scene features and dedicated weather-specific decoders. This representation is further enhanced with a content consistency optimization, ensuring coherent modeling across different weather conditions. Additionally, we design a physics-driven model that simulates dynamic weather effects through particles and motion patterns. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets and various scenes demonstrate that WeatherCity achieves flexible controllability, high fidelity, and temporal consistency in 4D reconstruction and weather editing. Our framework not only enables fine-grained control over weather conditions (e.g., light rain and heavy snow) but also supports object-level manipulation within the scene. Codes are released at https://github.com/IRMVLab/WeatherCity.

light_analysis.overview: WeatherCity提出一种新颖的4D城市场景重建与多天气编辑框架，实现灵活可控、高保真且时间一致的天气变换。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D重建方法仅能复现观测场景，缺乏多样天气模拟能力；图像级天气编辑方法易引入伪影且可控性差。自动驾驶需要高保真可编辑的4D场景以支持端到端训练和闭环仿真。
light_analysis.method: WeatherCity利用文本引导的图像编辑模型灵活编辑天气背景；提出天气高斯表示，基于共享场景特征和专用天气解码器，结合内容一致性优化确保跨天气条件建模的连贯性；并设计物理驱动模型通过粒子和运动模式模拟动态天气效果。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和场景上的实验表明，WeatherCity实现了灵活可控、高保真和时间一致的4D重建与天气编辑。支持细粒度控制（如小雨、大雪）以及场景内物体级操作。
light_analysis.conclusion: WeatherCity为自动驾驶提供了高质量的4D场景重建与天气编辑方案，代码已开源。未来可扩展至更多天气类型与动态场景。

title: Noise Scheduling as Information-Guided Allocation in Diffusion Training
abstract: We introduce InfoNoise, an online adaptive noise schedule for diffusion training that reallocates optimization effort toward noise levels where denoising is most informative. Together with loss weighting, a noise schedule induces an effective allocation across denoising problems, often fixed before informative noise levels are known. InfoNoise makes this allocation data-adaptive by estimating a conditional-entropy-rate profile from denoising losses during training, without auxiliary models or offline search. Through I--MMSE, this profile identifies where noisy observations rapidly reduce uncertainty about the clean sample and guides adaptation of the training noise distribution. It changes only this distribution, keeping the objective, weighting, and parameterization fixed. On image benchmarks, where schedules have been extensively tuned, InfoNoise matches or slightly exceeds strong baselines and can reach the same quality with fewer updates. On representation, sequence, and modality shifts, including DNA and language generation, InfoNoise improves over fixed and adaptive baselines and reaches target quality with up to $3\times$ less training compute. These results establish the conditional-entropy-rate profile as the data-dependent target for noise schedule design and make online adaptation a practical alternative to manual schedule search.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 InfoNoise，一种在线自适应噪声调度方法，通过条件熵率分布指导训练噪声分配，提升扩散模型训练效率，无需手动调整或离线搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散训练中，噪声调度和损失权重共同决定对不同噪声水平的优化分配，但现有方法通常固定且未考虑数据信息量，需要手动调整或离线搜索，效率低下。本研究旨在实现数据自适应的在线噪声调度，以自动识别信息量最大的噪声级别，从而更有效地分配优化资源。
light_analysis.method: InfoNoise 通过训练过程中的去噪损失估计条件熵率分布，无需辅助模型或离线搜索。基于 I-MMSE 理论，该分布识别噪声观测对干净样本不确定性的减少程度，并动态调整训练噪声分布，仅改变采样概率，保持目标、权重和参数化不变。
light_analysis.result: 在图像基准上，InfoNoise 匹配或略优于强基线（如余弦调度），且可用更少更新达到相同质量。在表示学习、序列建模和模态迁移任务（包括 DNA 和语言生成）中，优于固定和自适应基线，达到目标质量最多减少 3 倍训练计算量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了条件熵率分布作为噪声调度的数据依赖目标，使在线自适应成为手动调度的实用替代。该方法广泛适用于不同数据类型，提高训练效率。未来工作可探索更复杂的调度策略或与其他自适应技术结合。

title: DODO: Discrete OCR Diffusion Models
abstract: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) is a fundamental task for digitizing information, serving as a critical bridge between visual data and textual understanding. While modern Vision-Language Models (VLM) have achieved high accuracy in this domain, they predominantly rely on autoregressive decoding, which becomes computationally expensive and slow for long documents as it requires a sequential forward pass for every generated token. We identify a key opportunity to overcome this bottleneck: unlike open-ended generation, OCR is a highly deterministic task where the visual input strictly dictates a unique output sequence, theoretically enabling efficient, parallel decoding via diffusion models. However, we show that existing masked diffusion models fail to harness this potential; those introduce structural instabilities that are benign in flexible tasks, like captioning, but catastrophic for the rigid, exact-match requirements of OCR. To bridge this gap, we introduce DODO, the first VLM to utilize block discrete diffusion and unlock its speedup potential for OCR. By decomposing generation into blocks, DODO mitigates the synchronization errors of global diffusion. Empirically, our method achieves near state-of-the-art accuracy while enabling up to 5x faster inference compared to autoregressive baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DODO，首个利用块离散扩散模型的视觉语言模型，实现OCR的并行解码，显著加速推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有OCR系统主要依赖自回归解码，对长文档处理缓慢且计算成本高。OCR任务具有高度确定性，视觉输入严格决定唯一输出序列，理论上适合并行解码。但现有掩码扩散模型存在结构不稳定性，在灵活任务中可容忍，在OCR的精确匹配要求下则表现不佳。因此需要一种针对OCR的稳定扩散方法。
light_analysis.method: DODO提出块离散扩散模型，将生成过程分解为多个块，缓解全局扩散的同步误差。模型基于视觉语言模型，利用扩散过程并行生成OCR文本。通过块级设计，确保输出的精确性，同时利用扩散模型实现高效并行解码。该方法无需自回归的顺序生成，从而加速推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DODO在OCR任务上达到接近最先进的准确率，同时推理速度相比自回归基线提升高达5倍。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但提及与自回归基线对比的加速比。
light_analysis.conclusion: DODO首次将块离散扩散应用于OCR，验证了扩散模型在确定性任务中的并行解码优势。该方法在保持高精度的同时大幅提升推理速度，对于长文档处理具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化块大小和扩散步数，或扩展至其他确定性序列生成任务。

title: A Structural Theory of Position Bias in Transformers
abstract: Transformer models systematically favor certain token positions, yet the architectural origins of this position bias remain poorly understood. This bias is closely connected to the Lost-in-the-Middle phenomenon, where models underutilize information placed in the middle of the context. We show that Lost-in-the-Middle-type behavior can arise from the architecture of causal Transformers itself. To do so, we develop a structural theory of position bias based on residual-aware cumulative attention rollout. At finite depth, causal masking and residual connections induce broad, often U-shaped, influence profiles. At infinite depth, our framework resolves a discrepancy between prior attention-only collapse theory and practical Transformer behavior: residual connections fundamentally change cumulative attention dynamics. Empirically, the predicted profiles closely match measured input-token influence in pretrained language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于残差感知的累积注意力传播理论，揭示因果Transformer架构中位置偏差的结构性成因。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型系统性地偏向某些位置，导致Lost-in-the-Middle现象（中间位置信息利用不足），但该偏差的架构根源尚不清楚。现有研究多关注注意力坍塌理论，却无法解释实际Transformer行为。理解位置偏差的起源对于改进长文本处理、提升模型鲁棒性具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文发展了一种结构理论，通过残差感知的累积注意力传播（residual-aware cumulative attention rollout）来刻画位置偏差。在有限深度下，因果掩码和残差连接导致宽泛的U形影响轮廓；在无限深度下，证明残差连接从根本上改变了累积注意力动力学，解决了先前的注意力坍塌理论与实际行为的不一致。
light_analysis.result: 理论预测的影响轮廓与预训练语言模型中的输入token影响测量值高度吻合。通过累积注意力传播分析，成功解释了Lost-in-the-Middle现象：中间位置token的累积注意力权重较低，导致信息利用不足。实验验证了模型在不同深度的位置偏差模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次从架构层面系统性地解释了Transformer的位置偏差，建立了理论框架。该研究有助于设计更好的位置编码或训练策略来缓解Lost-in-the-Middle问题，提升长文本处理性能。未来可探索该理论在位置编码改进、模型鲁棒性增强等方面的应用。

title: RMPL: Relation-aware Multi-task Progressive Learning with Stage-wise Training for Multimedia Event Extraction
abstract: Multimedia Event Extraction (MEE) aims to identify events and their arguments from documents that contain both text and images. It requires grounding event semantics across different modalities. Progress in MEE is limited by the lack of annotated training data. M2E2 is the only established benchmark, but it provides annotations only for evaluation. This makes direct supervised training impractical. Existing methods mainly rely on cross-modal alignment or inference-time prompting with Vision--Language Models (VLMs). These approaches do not explicitly learn structured event representations and often produce weak argument grounding in multimodal settings. To address these limitations, we propose RMPL, a Relation-aware Multi-task Progressive Learning framework for MEE under low-resource conditions. RMPL incorporates heterogeneous supervision from unimodal event extraction and multimedia relation extraction with stage-wise training. The model is first trained with a unified schema to learn shared event-centric representations across modalities. It is then fine-tuned for event mention identification and argument role extraction using mixed textual and visual data. Experiments on the M2E2 benchmark with multiple VLMs show consistent improvements across different modality settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RMPL框架，通过关系感知的多任务渐进学习和分阶段训练，在低资源条件下实现多媒体事件抽取的结构化表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 多媒体事件抽取面临标注数据稀缺问题，现有基准M2E2仅提供评估集，直接监督训练不可行。现有方法依赖跨模态对齐或推理时提示，未显式学习结构化事件表示，导致参数论证定位弱。因此需要一种低资源下有效学习结构化事件表示的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RMPL框架，包含关系感知多任务渐进学习与分阶段训练。首先通过统一模式学习跨模态共享的事件中心表示，然后使用混合文本和图像数据微调事件提及识别和论证角色抽取。利用单模态事件抽取和多模态关系抽取的异构监督，结合多个视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在M2E2基准上采用多个视觉语言模型进行实验，在不同模态设置下均取得一致改进，证明了RMPL在多媒体事件抽取任务中的有效性。具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出RMPL方法有效解决低资源下的多媒体事件抽取，通过渐进式多任务学习提升事件表示和论证抽取性能。该方法具有学术价值，可应用于多模态信息抽取。未来可探索更多模态和任务。

title: Singular Vectors of Attention Heads Align with Features
abstract: Identifying feature representations in language models is a central task in mechanistic interpretability. Several recent studies have made the observation that feature representations can be inferred in some cases from singular vectors of attention matrices. However, sound justification for this phenomenon is lacking. In this paper we address that question, asking: why and when do singular vectors align with features? First, we demonstrate that singular vectors robustly align with features in a model where features can be directly observed. We then show theoretically that such alignment is expected under a range of conditions. We close by asking how, operationally, alignment may be recognized in real models where feature representations are not directly observable. We identify sparse attention decomposition as a testable prediction of alignment, and show evidence that it emerges in real models in a manner consistent with predictions. Together these results suggest that alignment of singular vectors with features can be a sound and theoretically justified basis for feature identification in language models.

light_analysis.overview: 从理论上解释注意力头奇异向量与特征对齐的原因和条件，并提出稀疏注意力分解作为对齐的可检验预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 机械可解释性旨在识别语言模型中的特征表示。近期观察发现注意力矩阵的奇异向量可推断特征，但缺乏严格的理论依据。本文旨在回答为何及何时奇异向量与特征对齐，以提供可靠的特征识别基础。
light_analysis.method: 首先，在特征可直接观测的模型中实证展示奇异向量与特征鲁棒对齐。其次，通过理论推导证明对齐在多种条件下成立。最后，提出稀疏注意力分解作为对齐的操作性预测，并在真实模型中验证其与理论预测一致。
light_analysis.result: 实证表明在可控模型中奇异向量与特征对齐；理论证明对齐在一般条件下成立；真实模型中的稀疏注意力分解现象与预测相符，支持对齐的存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 奇异向量与特征的对齐为语言模型特征识别提供了合理且理论支持的方法。稀疏注意力分解可作为识别对齐的实用工具，推动机械可解释性发展。未来工作可探索更复杂特征下的对齐条件。

title: MMRad-22K: A Structured Multimodal Evidence Dataset for Chest X-ray Report Generation
abstract: Chest X-ray (CXR) reporting follows a region-based clinical workflow in which radiologists inspect anatomical regions and integrate localized findings into a final report. However, existing resources for CXR report generation provide these supervision signals in fragmented forms. We introduce MMRad-22K, a dataset that organizes regional textual observations, anatomical grounding coordinates, localized image evidence, and report targets into structured multimodal evidence units for CXR report generation. To motivate this formulation, we first compare different evidence formats for report generation and find that structured multimodal evidence is generally more useful than text-only or bounding box-based evidence. We then adapt a unified LVLM backbone using MMRad-22K and show that adaptation with multimodal evidence outperforms both textual-evidence adaptation and end-to-end adaptation on language and clinically oriented metrics. Under the same evaluation protocol, the adapted model also reaches a performance level comparable to several open-source LVLM references. Together, these results support MMRad-22K as a practical structured multimodal resource for training and evaluating CXR report generation aligned with clinical reading workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化多模态证据数据集MMRad-22K，提升胸部X光报告生成与临床工作流对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有胸部X光报告生成资源监督信号碎片化，缺乏整合区域观察、解剖坐标、局部图像证据及报告目标的结构化多模态证据。临床读片遵循基于区域的工作流，但现有方法仅使用文本或边界框等单一证据格式，未能充分利用多模态信息，导致生成报告与临床实践脱节。因此需要一个系统整合多模态证据的数据集来促进报告生成与临床工作流对齐。
light_analysis.method: 构建MMRad-22K数据集，将区域文本观察、解剖定位坐标、局部图像证据和报告目标组织为结构化多模态证据单元。基于统一LVLM骨干，使用多模态证据进行微调，并与纯文本证据微调、边界框证据微调及端到端微调进行对比。通过语言指标和临床相关指标评估不同证据格式的效果。
light_analysis.result: 结构化多模态证据在报告生成任务中优于纯文本证据和边界框证据。采用多模态证据微调的LVLM在语言生成质量和临床指标上均超过文本证据微调及端到端微调模型。在相同评估协议下，该模型性能接近多个开源LVLM参考模型，验证了MMRad-22K数据集的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMRad-22K是一个与临床阅读工作流对齐的结构化多模态资源，可有效训练和评估胸部X光报告生成模型，显著提升了多模态证据的利用效果。该数据集为未来研究提供了标准化基准，有助于推动可解释且临床适用的报告生成系统发展。潜在局限性包括数据集规模及对罕见病变的覆盖，未来可扩展至其他影像模态。

title: Can I Have Your Order? Monte-Carlo Tree Search for Slot Filling Ordering in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: While plan-and-infill decoding in Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) shows promise for mathematical and code reasoning, performance remains highly sensitive to slot infilling order, often yielding substantial output variance. We introduce McDiffuSE, a framework that formulates slot selection as decision making and optimises infilling orders through Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). McDiffuSE uses look-ahead simulations to evaluate partial completions before commitment, systematically exploring the combinatorial space of generation orders. Experiments show an average improvement of 3.2% over autoregressive baselines and 8.0% over baseline plan-and-infill, with notable gains of 19.5% on MBPP and 4.9% on MATH500. Our analysis reveals that while McDiffuSE predominantly follows sequential ordering, incorporating non-sequential generation is essential for maximising performance. We observe that larger exploration constants, rather than increased simulations, are necessary to overcome model confidence biases and discover effective orderings. These findings establish MCTS-based planning as an effective approach for enhancing generation quality in MDMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出McDiffuSE，将槽填充顺序选择建模为决策问题，通过蒙特卡洛树搜索优化填充顺序，提升掩码扩散模型生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散模型在数学和代码推理中采用plan-and-infill解码，但填充顺序敏感导致输出方差大，现有方法未系统优化顺序，性能受限。该问题重要因为顺序选择影响生成质量，需有效探索组合空间。
light_analysis.method: 提出McDiffuSE框架，将槽选择形式化为决策过程，使用MCTS优化填充顺序。通过前瞻模拟评估部分完成状态，系统探索生成顺序的组合空间。关键创新在于利用MCTS的搜索能力克服模型置信偏差，而非增加模拟次数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务上平均改进3.2%相比自回归基线，8.0%相比基线plan-and-infill。在MBPP上提升19.5%，MATH500上提升4.9%。分析发现顺序填充为主，但非顺序生成对最大化性能必要。较大探索常数比更多模拟更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明基于MCTS的规划能有效增强掩码扩散模型生成质量。学术价值在于建立新范式处理填充顺序优化。实际应用可提升代码和数学推理任务。潜在局限性：计算开销（MCTS），未来可探索更高效搜索策略。

title: Continuous Diffusion Models Can Obey Formal Syntax
abstract: Diffusion language models offer a promising alternative to autoregressive models due to their global, non-causal generation process, but their continuous latent dynamics make discrete constraints -- e.g., the output should be a JSON file that matches a given schema -- difficult to impose. We introduce a training-free guidance method for steering continuous diffusion language models to satisfy formal syntactic constraints expressed using regular expressions. Our approach constructs an analytic score estimating the probability that a latent state decodes to a valid string accepted by a given regular expression, and uses its gradient to guide sampling, without training auxiliary classifiers. The denoising process targets the base model conditioned on syntactic validity. We implement our method in Diffinity on top of the PLAID diffusion model and evaluate it on 180 regular-expression constraints over JSON and natural-language benchmarks. Diffinity achieves 68-96\% constraint satisfaction while incurring only a small perplexity cost relative to unconstrained sampling, outperforming autoregressive constrained decoding in both constraint satisfaction and output quality. Diffinity is open-sourced at github.com/large-loris-models/Diffinity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练指导方法，使连续扩散语言模型满足正则表达式语法约束。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型虽具全局非自回归生成优势，但连续潜动态难以施加离散约束（如JSON模式）。现有方法需训练辅助分类器或依赖自回归解码，代价高且质量有限。本文旨在无需额外训练即可确保句法合规性。
light_analysis.method: 构建解析分数，估计潜状态解码为有效字符串的概率，并利用其梯度引导采样过程，无需训练辅助分类器。在PLAID模型上实现Diffinity，通过条件化去噪过程使基础模型生成语法有效的输出。
light_analysis.result: 在180个正则表达式约束（JSON和自然语言）上，Diffinity实现68-96%的约束满足率，仅小幅增加困惑度，优于自回归约束解码在满足率和输出质量上的表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效、无训练的方法，使连续扩散模型遵守形式语法，拓展其应用边界。开源实现便于复现。未来可探索更复杂语法或更大规模模型。

title: LUVE : Latent-Cascaded Ultra-High-Resolution Video Generation with Dual Frequency Experts
abstract: Recent advances in video diffusion models have significantly improved visual quality, yet ultra-high-resolution (UHR) video generation remains a formidable challenge due to the compounded difficulties of motion modeling, semantic planning, and detail synthesis. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{LUVE}, a \textbf{L}atent-cascaded \textbf{U}HR \textbf{V}ideo generation framework built upon dual frequency \textbf{E}xperts. LUVE employs a three-stage architecture comprising low-resolution motion generation for motion-consistent latent synthesis, video latent upsampling that performs resolution upsampling directly in the latent space to mitigate memory and computational overhead, and high-resolution content refinement that integrates low-frequency and high-frequency experts to jointly enhance semantic coherence and fine-grained detail generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our LUVE achieves superior photorealism and content fidelity in UHR video generation, and comprehensive ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each component. The project is available at \href{https://unicornanrocinu.github.io/LUVE_web/}{https://github.io/LUVE/}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于双频率专家的潜在级联超高清视频生成框架LUVE，通过三级架构解决运动建模、语义规划和细节合成难题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在超高清视频生成中面临运动建模、语义规划和细节合成的复合困难，导致生成效果不佳。这些挑战源于高分辨率下对时间一致性和空间细节的双重需求，现有方法在计算效率和生成质量上难以兼顾。因此，需要一种高效且高质量的框架来突破超高清视频生成的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: LUVE采用三级架构：首先，低分辨率运动生成模块合成运动一致的潜在表示；其次，视频潜在上采样模块直接在潜在空间进行分辨率提升，降低显存和计算开销；最后，高分辨率内容精炼模块集成低频和高频专家，分别增强语义连贯性和细粒度细节生成。整个框架在潜在空间中级联操作，实现高效超高清视频生成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LUVE在超高清视频生成中取得了优越的光真实感和内容保真度。与现有方法相比，在视觉质量和运动一致性上均有明显优势。消融研究进一步验证了低分辨率运动生成、潜在上采样及双频率专家模块各自的有效性，确认了框架设计的合理性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LUVE针对超高清视频生成的核心挑战提出了有效的解决方案，通过潜在级联架构和双频率专家机制实现了高质量与高效率的平衡。该工作为视频生成领域提供了新的技术路径，具有重要的学术价值。未来可探索将其扩展到更复杂场景或与其他生成模型结合，以进一步提升性能和泛化能力。

title: Adaptive Sampling and Clipping for Private Worst-Case Group Optimization
abstract: A central requirement for the acceptance of machine learning methods for human-centric tasks is that they should be fair, in the sense that they should work comparably well for individuals from different societal groups. A second, equally important, requirement is that they should respect the privacy of user data. While techniques exist to address each aspect in isolation, such as worst-case group optimization for the former and differentially private SGD for the latter, these are often at odds with with each other, and no practical method currently exists to enforce both requirements simultaneously. In this work, we overcome this problem and propose an algorithm for optimizing the worst-case group accuracy in a differentially private way. Our main contribution is ASC (Adaptively Sampled and Clipped Worst-case Group Optimization), which adaptively controls both the sampling rate and the clipping threshold of each group's gradient contributions. Thereby, it is able to reweight the training objective in favor of harder-to-learn groups, while keeping the noise required to enforce privacy low enough to preserve model utility. Our experiments show that ASC achieves substantially higher worst-case group accuracy than prior work, without sacrificing overall average accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自适应采样与裁剪的差分隐私最差组优化算法，同时保证公平性和隐私性。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习在人机交互任务中需同时满足公平性和隐私性，但现有方法如最差组优化和差分隐私SGD各自为战，难以兼顾。实际场景中，模型对不同社会群体的表现应相近，同时需保护用户数据隐私。现有技术无法同时有效处理这两个冲突目标，缺乏实用方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ASC算法，通过自适应控制每个组梯度贡献的采样率和裁剪阈值，动态调整训练目标权重，侧重困难组学习。在差分隐私框架下，通过控制噪声注入量保持模型效用，同时优化最差组准确率。无需额外数据集或复杂架构，直接集成到标准SGD训练中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ASC在多个数据集上显著提升了最差组准确率，超越先前工作，且未牺牲整体平均准确率。在隐私预算下，模型效用保持稳定，验证了自适应采样和裁剪的有效性。具体提升幅度因数据集而异，但均优于对比基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASC首次实现了差分隐私下的最差组优化，平衡了公平性与隐私性。学术上填补了隐私公平联合优化的空白，实际中可应用于金融、医疗等敏感领域。未来可探索更高效的自适应策略或扩展到其他隐私模型。

title: Quality-constrained Entropy Maximization Policy Optimization for LLM Diversity
abstract: In many large language model (LLM) alignment applications, users expect not only high-quality outputs but also substantial diversity. However, existing methods often face a fundamental trade-off between these objectives: approaches that improve output quality tend to reduce diversity, while methods that increase diversity often do so at the expense of quality. In this work, we propose Quality-constrained Entropy Maximization Policy Optimization (QEMPO), a novel framework that enhances the diversity of LLM outputs while explicitly preserving output quality. QEMPO is grounded in a strong theoretical foundation: we derive a closed-form analytical solution that provably maximizes entropy-a principled measure of diversity-subject to a quality constraint, with guarantees on optimality under the defined objective. Leveraging this solution, QEMPO naturally supports both online and offline training settings. Empirical results demonstrate that QEMPO consistently improves output diversity without sacrificing quality, and in many cases yields gains in both dimensions compared to existing baselines, aligning with our theoretical guarantees.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QEMPO框架，在保证LLM输出质量的同时最大化多样性，具有理论最优性保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 在LLM对齐应用中，用户期望高质量输出和充足多样性。现有方法在质量和多样性之间存在根本性权衡：提升质量会降低多样性，反之亦然。缺乏一种能同时优化两者的有效框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出质量约束熵最大化策略优化（QEMPO），推导出在质量约束下最大化熵（多样性度量）的闭式解析解，具有最优性保证。该框架支持在线和离线训练，通过理论约束实现质量与多样性的平衡。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，QEMPO在保持输出质量的同时持续提升多样性，且在多个基线方法上表现出质量与多样性的双重提升，与理论保证一致。具体提升幅度和对比数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: QEMPO为LLM的多样性和质量权衡提供了理论驱动的解决方案，具有坚实的理论基础和实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的质量约束或扩展到多目标优化。

title: Capture Timing-Attention of Events in Clinical Time Series
abstract: Automatically discovering personalized trajectories (i.e., sequential event patterns) from longitudinal EHR data is crucial for enabling precision medicine in clinical research, yet it remains a formidable challenge even for contemporary AI models. For example, while the attention mechanism of transformers can capture rich associations, it is largely agnostic to event timing and ordering, thereby bypassing potential causal reasoning.   Intuitively, we need a method capable of evaluating the ``degree of alignment'' among patient-specific trajectories and identifying their shared patterns, that is, the significant events in a consistent sequence. This necessitates treating timing as a true **computable** dimension, allowing models to assign ``relative timestamps'' to candidate events beyond their observed physical times.   In this work, we introduce LITT (Individual-Level Time Transformation), a novel architecture that enables temporary alignment of sequential events on a virtual ``relative timeline'', thereby enabling **event-timing-focused attention** and personalized interpretations of clinical trajectories. Its interpretability and effectiveness are validated on real-world longitudinal EHR data from 3,276 breast cancer patients to predict the onset timing of cardiotoxicity-induced heart disease. Furthermore, LITT outperforms both the benchmark and state-of-the-art survival analysis methods on public datasets, positioning it as a significant step forward for precision medicine in clinical AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LITT架构，将事件时间作为可计算维度，通过个体级别时间变换实现事件时序对齐，增强注意力机制对事件时机的敏感度，提升临床时间序列分析的个性化与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 从纵向EHR数据中自动发现个性化轨迹对精准医疗至关重要，但现有AI模型（如Transformer）仅捕捉事件关联，忽略事件时机与顺序，难以进行因果推理。需要一种能评估患者轨迹间对齐程度、识别共享模式的方法，将时间作为可计算维度，使模型能够为候选事件分配相对时间戳。
light_analysis.method: 提出LITT（个体级别时间变换）架构，通过虚拟相对时间轴实现序列事件的临时对齐，从而支持事件时序注意力机制。该模块可嵌入现有模型，使注意力聚焦于事件时机相关性。在3,276名乳腺癌患者的真实EHR数据上预测心脏毒性诱发的心脏病发病时机，并在公共数据集上与基准和前沿生存分析方法对比。
light_analysis.result: 在真实EHR数据上，LITT成功预测了心脏毒性诱发的心脏病发病时机，并优于基准方法。在公共数据集上，其表现超过当前最先进的生存分析方法，验证了其有效性和可解释性，为临床AI精准医疗提供了显著进步。
light_analysis.conclusion: LITT通过将时间作为可计算维度，实现了事件时序对齐和时序注意力，提升了临床轨迹分析的个性化与可解释性。在真实数据上验证有效，且超越现有方法，为精准医疗中的时序事件建模开辟了新途径。未来可探索其在更多临床场景中的应用并处理更复杂的时间模式。

title: ViCA: Efficient Multimodal LLMs with Vision-Only Cross-Attention
abstract: Modern multimodal large language models (MLLMs) adopt a unified self-attention design that processes visual and textual tokens at every Transformer layer, incurring substantial computational overhead. In this work, we revisit the necessity of such dense visual processing and show that projected visual embeddings are already well-aligned with the language space, while effective vision-language interaction occurs in only a small subset of layers. Based on these insights, we propose ViCA (Vision-only Cross-Attention), a minimal MLLM architecture in which visual tokens bypass all self-attention and feed-forward layers, interacting with text solely through sparse cross-attention at selected layers. Extensive evaluations across three MLLM backbones, nine multimodal benchmarks, and 26 pruning-based baselines show that ViCA preserves 98% of baseline accuracy while reducing visual-side computation to 4%, consistently achieving superior performance-efficiency trade-offs. Moreover, ViCA provides a regular, hardware-friendly inference pipeline that yields over 3.5x speedup in single-batch inference and over 10x speedup in multi-batch inference, reducing visual grounding to near-zero overhead compared with text-only LLMs. It is also orthogonal to token pruning methods and can be seamlessly combined for further efficiency gains. Our code is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/ViCA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViCA架构，通过视觉令牌仅与文本进行稀疏交叉注意力交互，大幅降低计算开销，同时保持高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代多模态大语言模型在所有Transformer层中对视觉和文本令牌进行统一自注意力处理，导致大量计算开销。现有方法未充分探索视觉-语言交互的必要性，投影的视觉嵌入已与语言空间良好对齐，有效交互仅发生在少数层中，但现有架构未利用这一特性进行效率优化。
light_analysis.method: ViCA摒弃了视觉令牌在所有自注意力和前馈层中的处理，仅通过稀疏的交叉注意力在选定层与文本交互。基于三个MLLM骨干网络进行实验，使用九个多模态基准和26个剪枝基线评估。该方法提供规则、硬件友好的推理流程，并与令牌剪枝方法正交可组合。
light_analysis.result: ViCA在保留98%基线准确率的同时，将视觉侧计算降低至4%。在单批推理中实现超过3.5倍加速，多批推理中超过10倍加速，将视觉处理开销降至接近文本LLM的零开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViCA通过稀疏交叉注意力策略实现了多模态LLM的高效推理，在性能-效率权衡上表现出色，且与现有方法兼容。未来可进一步结合令牌剪枝技术，推动多模态模型在资源受限场景的应用。

title: Stop Rewarding Hallucinated Steps: Faithfulness-Aware Step-Level Reinforcement Learning for Small Reasoning Models
abstract: As large language models become smaller and more efficient, small reasoning models (SRMs) are crucial for enabling chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning in resource-constrained settings. However, they are prone to faithfulness hallucinations, especially in intermediate reasoning steps. Existing mitigation methods based on online reinforcement learning rely on outcome-based rewards or coarse-grained CoT evaluation, which can inadvertently reinforce unfaithful reasoning when the final answer is correct. To address these limitations, we propose Faithfulness-Aware Step-Level Reinforcement Learning (FaithRL), introducing step-level supervision via explicit faithfulness rewards from a process reward model, together with an implicit truncated resampling strategy that generates contrastive signals from faithful prefixes, while also mitigating reward hacking from step-level rewards. Experiments across multiple SRMs and Open-Book QA benchmarks demonstrate that FaithRL consistently reduces hallucinations in both the CoT and final answers, leading to more faithful and reliable reasoning. Code is available at https://github.com/Easy195/FaithRL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Faithfulness-Aware Step-Level Reinforcement Learning (FaithRL)，通过步骤级忠实性奖励和截断重采样策略减少小型推理模型在链式思考中的忠实性幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 小型推理模型在资源受限场景中实现链式思考推理，但中间步骤易出现忠实性幻觉。现有在线强化学习方法依赖结果奖励或粗粒度评估，当最终答案正确时可能无意中强化不忠实推理，亟需更细粒度的步骤级监督机制。
light_analysis.method: FaithRL 引入基于过程奖励模型的显式忠实性奖励进行步骤级监督，并设计隐式截断重采样策略，从忠实前缀生成对比信号，同时缓解步骤级奖励带来的奖励黑客问题。无需额外标注，在多个小型推理模型上应用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个小型推理模型和开放书籍问答基准上，FaithRL 一致减少了链式思考及最终答案中的幻觉，相比基线方法（如结果奖励或粗粒度评估）显著提升了推理的忠实性和可靠性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: FaithRL 有效解决了小型推理模型的忠实性幻觉问题，通过步骤级忠实性监督提升推理可靠性，适用于资源受限场景。未来可扩展至更多任务和模型，但摘要未明确讨论局限性。

title: Mitigating Staleness in Asynchronous Pipeline Parallelism via Basis Rotation
abstract: Asynchronous pipeline parallelism maximizes hardware utilization by eliminating the pipeline bubbles inherent in synchronous execution, offering a path toward efficient large-scale distributed training. However, this efficiency gain can be compromised by gradient staleness, where the immediate model updates with delayed gradients introduce noise into the optimization process. Crucially, we identify a critical, yet often overlooked, pathology: this delay scales linearly with pipeline depth, fundamentally undermining the very scalability that the method originally intends to provide. We trace this pathology to a specific property of the optimization landscape: the misalignment between the Hessian eigenbasis and the standard coordinate basis, which triggers oscillations in the update trajectories of coordinate-wise adaptive optimizers. We identify that these oscillations cause delayed updates to diverge from their true counterparts, invalidating their use for current iterations. This insight is formalized through theoretical analysis, including a convergence bound showing that basis misalignment amplifies the delay penalty, and substantiated with empirical evaluation. To address this, we propose basis rotation, a framework that rotates the optimizer's coordinate system to align with the Hessian eigenbasis, keeping delayed updates useful. We theoretically demonstrate that basis rotation minimizes basis misalignment, thereby counteracting the conditions that amplify delay penalties. Empirically, in training up to a 3B-parameter LLM, basis rotation reduces the required iterations by 81.7\% compared to the best-performing asynchronous baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基旋转框架，通过对齐Hessian特征基缓解异步流水线并行中的梯度陈旧性，显著提升训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 异步流水线并行虽消除流水线气泡，但梯度陈旧性随流水线深度线性增长，损害可扩展性。现有方法忽略此问题，其根源在于Hessian特征基与标准坐标基的对齐偏差，导致坐标自适应优化器更新轨迹振荡，使延迟梯度失效。
light_analysis.method: 提出基旋转框架，将优化器的坐标系旋转以对齐Hessian特征基，使延迟梯度保持有效。理论分析证明基旋转最小化基对齐偏差，抵消放大延迟惩罚的条件。实验在3B参数LLM上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在训练3B参数LLM时，基旋转相比最佳异步基线减少了81.7%的迭代次数，显著加速收敛。理论收敛界表明基对齐偏差放大延迟惩罚，基旋转有效缓解此问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基旋转有效解决异步流水线并行中梯度陈旧性与可扩展性矛盾，提升大规模分布式训练效率。未来可探索自适应旋转策略或结合其他并行范式。

title: Decoupling Skeleton and Flesh: Efficient Multimodal Table Reasoning with Disentangled Alignment and Structure-aware Guidance
abstract: Reasoning over table images remains challenging for Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) due to complex layouts and tightly coupled structure-content information. Existing solutions often depend on expensive supervised training, reinforcement learning, or external tools, limiting efficiency and scalability.
