This work addresses a key question: how to adapt LVLMs to table reasoning with minimal annotation and no external tools? Specifically, we first introduce DiSCo, a Disentangled Structure-Content alignment framework that explicitly separates structural abstraction from semantic grounding during multimodal alignment, efficiently adapting LVLMs to tables structures. Building on DiSCo, we further present Table-GLS, a Global-to-Local Structure-guided reasoning framework that performs table reasoning via structured exploration and evidence-grounded inference. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that our framework efficiently enhances LVLM's table understanding and reasoning capabilities, particularly generalizing to unseen table structures. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/AAAndy-Zhu/TableVLM.
comment: Accepted as a Spotlight Paper at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦结构与内容的对齐框架DiSCo和全局到局部结构引导推理框架Table-GLS，高效增强LVLMs的表格推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大视觉语言模型在表格图像推理中面临布局复杂、结构与内容耦合紧密的挑战。现有方法依赖昂贵的监督训练、强化学习或外部工具，限制了效率和可扩展性。本文旨在以最小标注且无需外部工具的方式，使LVLMs适应表格推理，解决其结构理解与泛化能力不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出DiSCo（解耦结构-内容对齐框架），在多模态对齐阶段显式分离结构抽象与语义基础，高效适应表格结构。在此基础上，提出Table-GLS（全局到局部结构引导推理框架），通过结构化探索和证据基础推理执行表格推理。该方法无需外部工具，利用解耦对齐实现高效适配。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上的大量实验表明，所提框架有效增强了LVLMs的表格理解和推理能力，尤其能够泛化到未见过的表格结构。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调其高效性和泛化性，验证了方法在实际场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究解决了LVLMs在表格推理中的结构-内容耦合问题，通过解耦对齐和结构引导推理，实现了高效且可扩展的表格理解。方法无需外部工具和大量标注，具有实用价值。代码和数据集已开源，便于复现和进一步研究。未来可探索更复杂的表格布局和推理任务。

title: Trust Region Continual Learning as an Implicit Meta-Learner
abstract: Continual learning aims to acquire tasks sequentially without catastrophic forgetting, yet standard strategies face a core tradeoff: regularization-based methods (e.g., EWC) can overconstrain updates when task optima are weakly overlapping, while replay-based methods can retain performance but drift due to imperfect replay. We study a hybrid perspective: \emph{trust region continual learning} that combines generative replay with a Fisher-metric trust region constraint. We show that, under local approximations, the resulting update admits a MAML-style interpretation with a single implicit inner step: replay supplies an old-task gradient signal (query-like), while the Fisher-weighted penalty provides an efficient offline curvature shaping (support-like). This yields an emergent meta-learning property in continual learning: the model becomes an initialization that rapidly \emph{re-converges} to prior task optima after each task transition, without explicitly optimizing a bilevel objective. Empirically, on task-incremental diffusion image generation and continual diffusion-policy control, trust region continual learning achieves the best final performance and retention, and consistently recovers early-task performance faster than EWC, replay, and continual meta-learning baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 信任区域持续学习通过结合生成重放和Fisher度量约束，隐式实现元学习，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习中，正则化方法（如EWC）在任务最优弱重叠时可能过度约束更新，而重放方法因不完美重放导致性能漂移。为解决这一核心权衡，论文探索混合视角，旨在同时利用重放和正则化的优势，提升任务序列学习中的适应性和稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出信任区域持续学习，融合生成重放和Fisher度量信任区域约束。在局部近似下，更新等效于MAML风格的单隐式内步：重放提供旧任务梯度（查询类），Fisher加权惩罚实现离线曲率塑造（支持类）。无需显式优化双层目标，使模型成为可快速重收敛到先前任务最优的初始化。
light_analysis.result: 在任务增量扩散图像生成和持续扩散策略控制任务上，该方法达到最佳最终性能和保留率，且恢复早期任务性能的速度一致优于EWC、重放和持续元学习基线。未提供具体数值，摘要指出最佳性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了持续学习中的隐式元学习特性，信任区域方法有效结合重放与正则化，为持续学习提供新视角。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于扩散模型等场景。未来可探索更复杂的信任区域构造和任务间关系建模。

title: Segment to Focus: Guiding Latent Action Models in the Presence of Distractors
abstract: Latent action models (LAMs) offer a promising path to pre-training embodied agents on large amounts of action-free video. They infer latent actions between consecutive observations that can later be decoded to ground-truth actions using a small number of labels. However, recent work has shown that this recipe fails in the presence of action-correlated visual distractors common in real-world video, such as dynamic backgrounds, camera shake, or other moving objects. In these scenarios, the standard reconstruction objective drives latent actions to encode exogenous motion instead of agent-controlled dynamics, resulting in policies that underperform when fine-tuned. We observe, however, that endogenous and exogenous factors are typically spatially separated in pixel space: control-relevant change is concentrated on the agent, while distractor motion occurs elsewhere. We exploit this observation by restricting the reconstruction objective to agent pixels, forcing latent actions to explain agent-controlled dynamics rather than exogenous ones. We call this method MaskLAM; it obtains the agent mask zero-shot from off-the-shelf segmentation foundation models (e.g., SAM) and requires no architectural changes, auxiliary losses, or action labels during pre-training. Across two continuous-control benchmarks (Distracting Control Suite, Distracting Meta-World), MaskLAM reduces normalized linear-probe MSE by up to $3.51\times$ and improves normalized return by up to $4.97\times$ over LAPO, while narrowing the gap to LAOM-Labels, which relies on ground-truth action supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MaskLAM方法，利用分割模型获取agent mask，将重建目标限制在agent像素，解决潜在动作模型在视觉干扰下的失败问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在动作模型（LAM）可从无动作视频中预训练具身智能体，但在真实世界视频中存在与动作相关的视觉干扰物（如动态背景、相机抖动等）时，标准重建目标会驱动潜在动作编码外部运动而非智能体控制动态，导致微调后策略性能下降。现有方法未能有效分离内源性和外源性因素。
light_analysis.method: MaskLAM利用现成的分割基础模型（如SAM）零样本获取agent mask，将重建目标限制在agent像素上，迫使潜在动作解释智能体控制的动态而非外部运动。无需改变架构、添加辅助损失或在预训练中使用动作标签，仅通过mask引导重建目标。
light_analysis.result: 在Distracting Control Suite和Distracting Meta-World两个连续控制基准上，与LAPO相比，MaskLAM将归一化线性探针MSE降低最多3.51倍，归一化回报提升最多4.97倍，显著缩小了与使用真实动作监督的LAOM-Labels的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: MaskLAM通过简单的mask引导重建目标，有效提升了LAM在存在视觉干扰物时的性能，展示了利用基础分割模型改进具身智能预训练的潜力。局限在于依赖分割模型的质量和mask的准确性，未来可探索更鲁棒的mask获取方式。

title: ECHO: Entropy-Confidence Hybrid Optimization for Test-Time Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Test-time reinforcement learning generates multiple candidate answers via repeated rollouts and performs online updates using pseudo-labels constructed by majority voting. To reduce overhead and improve exploration, prior work introduces tree structured rollouts, which share reasoning prefixes and branch at key nodes to improve sampling efficiency. However, this paradigm still faces two challenges: (1) high entropy branching can trigger rollout collapse, where the branching budget concentrates on a few trajectories with consecutive high-entropy segments, rapidly reducing the number of effective branches; (2) early pseudo-labels are noisy and biased, which can induce self-reinforcing overfitting, causing the policy to sharpen prematurely and suppress exploration. To address these issues, we propose Entropy Confidence Hybrid Group Relative Policy Optimization (ECHO). During rollout, ECHO jointly leverages local entropy and group level confidence to adaptively control branch width, and further introduces online confidence-based pruning to terminate persistently low confidence branches, avoiding high entropy traps and mitigating collapse. During policy updates, ECHO employs confidence adaptive clipping and an entropy confidence hybrid advantage shaping approach to enhance training robustness and mitigate early stage bias. Experiments demonstrate that ECHO achieves consistent gains on multiple mathematical and visual reasoning benchmarks, and generalizes more effectively under a limited rollout budget.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ECHO方法，通过熵-置信度混合优化解决测试时强化学习中的rollout崩溃和早期伪标签偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时强化学习通过多次rollout生成候选答案并用多数投票构建伪标签进行在线更新，树结构rollout虽提高采样效率，但面临高熵分支导致rollout崩溃（分支预算集中于少数高熵轨迹）和早期伪标签噪声引发的自强化过拟合问题，限制探索和性能。
light_analysis.method: ECHO在rollout阶段联合利用局部熵和组级置信度自适应控制分支宽度，并引入在线置信度剪枝终止低置信分支，避免高熵陷阱；在策略更新阶段采用置信度自适应裁剪和熵-置信度混合优势塑造方法，增强训练鲁棒性，缓解早期偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数学和视觉推理基准上，ECHO相比基线方法取得一致性能增益，且在有限rollout预算下泛化能力更有效，表明其能提升采样效率和训练稳定性，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: ECHO通过熵-置信度混合优化有效缓解测试时强化学习中的rollout崩溃和早期过拟合问题，提升探索效率和训练鲁棒性，具有重要学术价值；未来可进一步探索其在更复杂任务或更大规模模型上的应用。

title: Emergent Analogical Reasoning in Transformers
abstract: Analogy is a central faculty of human intelligence, enabling abstract patterns discovered in one domain to be applied to another. Despite its central role in cognition, the mechanisms by which Transformers acquire and implement analogical reasoning remain poorly understood. In this work, inspired by the notion of functors in category theory, we formalize analogical reasoning as the inference of correspondences between entities across categories. Based on this formulation, we introduce synthetic tasks that evaluate the emergence of analogical reasoning under controlled settings. We find that the emergence of analogical reasoning is highly sensitive to data characteristics, optimization choices, and model scale. Through mechanistic analysis, we show that analogical reasoning in Transformers decomposes into two key components: (1) geometric alignment of relational structure in the embedding space, and (2) the application of a functor within the Transformer. These mechanisms enable models to transfer relational structure from one category to another, realizing analogy. Finally, we quantify these effects and find that the same trends are observed in pretrained LLMs. In doing so, we move analogy from an abstract cognitive notion to a concrete, mechanistically grounded phenomenon in modern neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 通过范畴论函子形式化类比推理，发现Transformer中类比推理的机制（几何对齐与函子应用），并在预训练LLM中验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 类比推理是人类智能的核心能力，使抽象模式能从一域迁移到另一域。然而，尽管Transformer在多种任务中表现出色，其获取并实现类比推理的内部机制仍不清楚。理解这一机制对于提升模型的推理能力和可解释性至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对类比推理在神经网络中具体实现的深入分析。
light_analysis.method: 受范畴论中函子概念的启发，将类比推理形式化为跨类别实体间对应关系的推断。基于此，设计了合成任务以在受控环境下评估类比推理的出现。通过机械分析，发现类比推理在Transformer中分解为两个关键组件：嵌入空间中对关系结构的几何对齐，以及Transformer内部应用函子的操作。这些机制使模型能将关系结构从一类别迁移到另一类别，实现类比。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现类比推理的出现对数据特性、优化选择和模型规模高度敏感。通过量化分析，在预训练的大语言模型（LLMs）中观察到相同的趋势。具体地，模型的类比推理能力与几何对齐程度和函子应用效果正相关，验证了所提出机制的普适性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将类比推理从抽象认知概念转化为神经网络中具体、可机械分析的现象。主要贡献包括：形式化类比推理、揭示其内在机制、并通过实验验证。这为理解Transformer的推理能力提供了新视角，并可能指导设计更擅长类比推理的模型。未来可探索更复杂类比任务及不同架构中的泛化性。

title: SAME: Stabilized Mixture-of-Experts for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, but real-world deployment requires them to continually expand their capabilities, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. Recent methods leverage sparse expert routing to promote task specialization, but we find that the expert routing process suffers from drift as the data distribution evolves. For example, a grounding query that previously activated localization experts may instead be routed to irrelevant experts after learning OCR tasks. Meanwhile, the grounding-related experts can be overwritten by new tasks and lose their original functionality. Such failure reflects two problems: router drift, where expert selection becomes inconsistent over time, and expert drift, where shared experts are overwritten across tasks. Therefore, we propose StAbilized Mixture-of-Experts (SAME) for MCIT. To address router drift, SAME stabilizes expert selection by decomposing routing dynamics into orthogonal subspaces and updating only task-relevant directions. To mitigate expert drift, we regulate expert updates via curvature-aware scaling using historical input covariance in a rehearsal-free manner. SAME also introduces adaptive expert activation to freeze selected experts during training, reducing redundant computation and cross-task interference. We also introduce a new benchmark to evaluate MCIT with long task sequence, and extensive experiments demonstrate SAME's SOTA performance. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/Prism.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/Prism

light_analysis.overview: 提出稳定混合专家方法SAME，解决多模态持续指令微调中的专家选择漂移和专家知识覆盖问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在现实部署中需持续扩展能力，但现有稀疏专家路由方法面临数据分布演化导致的专家选择漂移和知识覆盖问题。例如，原激活定位专家的查询在学会OCR任务后可能路由至无关专家，且定位相关专家被新任务覆盖。这亟需一种稳定路由和知识保留的持续学习方案。
light_analysis.method: SAME包含三部分：1）通过将路由动态分解为正交子空间并仅更新任务相关方向来稳定专家选择；2）利用历史输入协方差进行曲率感知缩放，无记忆地调节专家更新以缓解知识覆盖；3）自适应专家激活在训练中冻结已选专家，减少冗余计算和跨任务干扰。该方法无需存储旧样本。
light_analysis.result: 在提出的长任务序列MCIT新基准上，SAME取得最先进性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了其在多模态持续指令微调中的有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAME通过正交子空间路由稳定和曲率感知专家更新，有效解决多模态持续学习中的路由漂移和专家漂移。该方法在无需记忆样本下提升任务专精度和泛化性，为实际部署提供新思路。未来可探索动态子空间维度与更复杂任务序列的扩展。

title: Towards Long-Horizon Interpretability: Efficient and Faithful Multi-Token Attribution for Reasoning LLMs
abstract: Token attribution methods provide intuitive explanations for language model outputs by identifying causally important input tokens. However, as modern LLMs increasingly rely on extended reasoning chains, existing schemes face two critical challenges: (1) efficiency bottleneck, where attributing a target span of M tokens within a context of length N requires O(M*N) operations, making long-context attribution prohibitively slow; and (2) faithfulness drop, where intermediate reasoning tokens absorb attribution mass, preventing importance from propagating back to the original input. To address these, we introduce FlashTrace, an efficient multi-token attribution method that employs span-wise aggregation to compute attribution over multi-token targets in a single pass, while maintaining faithfulness. Moreover, we design a recursive attribution mechanism that traces importance through intermediate reasoning chains back to source inputs. Extensive experiments on long-context retrieval (RULER) and multi-step reasoning (MATH, MorehopQA) tasks demonstrate that FlashTrace achieves over 130x speedup over existing baselines while maintaining superior faithfulness. We further analyze the dynamics of recursive attribution, showing that even a single recursive hop improves faithfulness by tracing importance through the reasoning chain.
comment: Accepted as an Oral paper at ICML 2026. Code available at https://github.com/wbopan/flashtrace

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlashTrace，实现高效且忠实的长上下文多token归因，支持递归追踪推理链。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM依赖长推理链，现有token归因方法面临两大挑战：(1) 效率瓶颈，归因M个目标token需O(M*N)操作，长上下文归因极慢；(2) 忠实度下降，中间推理token吸收归因重要性，无法传播回原始输入。这些问题限制了对推理过程的可解释性分析。
light_analysis.method: FlashTrace引入span-wise聚合，在单次前向传播中计算多token目标的归因，避免逐token操作；同时设计递归归因机制，通过追踪重要性从中间推理链回溯至源输入。该方法保持忠实度，无需额外模型修改或训练。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文检索（RULER）和多步推理（MATH、MorehopQA）任务上，FlashTrace相比基线方法实现130倍以上加速，同时保持优越的忠实度。递归归因分析表明，单次递归跳转即可通过沿推理链传递重要性显著提升忠实度。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlashTrace有效解决了长上下文归因的效率与忠实度问题，为理解LLM推理过程提供了实用工具。其递归归因机制揭示了推理链中的重要性传播动态，未来可扩展至更复杂的推理结构和多步归因场景。

title: Probability-Entropy Calibration: An Elastic Indicator for Adaptive Fine-tuning
abstract: Token-level reweighting is a simple yet effective mechanism for controlling supervised fine-tuning, but common indicators are largely one-dimensional: the ground-truth probability reflects downstream alignment, while token entropy reflects intrinsic uncertainty induced by the pre-training prior. Ignoring entropy can misidentify noisy or easily replaceable tokens as learning-critical, while ignoring probability fails to reflect target-specific alignment. RankTuner introduces a probability--entropy calibration signal, the Relative Rank Indicator, which compares the rank of the ground-truth token with its expected rank under the prediction distribution. The inverse indicator is used as a token-wise Relative Scale to reweight the fine-tuning objective, focusing updates on truly under-learned tokens without over-penalizing intrinsically uncertain positions. Experiments on multiple backbones show consistent improvements on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, transfer gains on out-of-distribution reasoning, and pre code generation performance over probability-only or entropy-only reweighting baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出概率-熵联合校准的相对排名指标，用于自适应地重加权微调目标，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有token级重加权方法仅使用概率或熵，前者忽略先验不确定性，后者忽略目标对齐，导致噪声或易替换token被误判为关键。需要一种结合两者的弹性指标，以准确识别真正未学习好的token。
light_analysis.method: 提出相对排名指标（Relative Rank Indicator），比较真实token在预测分布中的排名与期望排名，并用其倒数作为相对缩放因子（Relative Scale）对交叉熵损失进行token级重加权，从而聚焦更新真正未学习好的token，避免过度惩罚内在不确定的位置。
light_analysis.result: 在多个骨干网络上，该方法在数学推理基准、分布外推理和代码生成任务上一致优于仅概率或仅熵重加权的基线，验证了概率-熵联合校准的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 概率-熵校准通过结合概率和熵信息，实现了更精准的token级重加权，提升了微调效果。该方法计算简单，适用于多种微调场景，未来可探索其在其他任务中的泛化性及进一步优化排名比较的鲁棒性。

title: Attention Sink Forges Native MoE in Attention Layers: Sink-Aware Training to Address Head Collapse
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often assign disproportionate attention to the first token, a phenomenon known as the attention sink. Several recent approaches aim to address this issue, including Sink Attention in GPT-OSS and Gated Attention in Qwen3-Next. However, a comprehensive analysis of the relationship among these attention mechanisms is lacking. In this work, we provide both theoretical and empirical evidence demonstrating that the sink in Vanilla Attention and Sink Attention naturally construct a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) mechanism within attention layers. This insight explains the head collapse phenomenon observed in prior work, where only a fixed subset of attention heads contributes to generation. To mitigate head collapse, we propose a sink-aware training algorithm with an auxiliary load balancing loss designed for attention layers. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves effective head load balancing and improves model performance across Vanilla Attention, Sink Attention, and Gated Attention. We hope this study offers a new perspective on attention mechanisms and encourages further exploration of the inherent MoE structure within attention layers.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示注意力层中sink现象天然构成MoE机制，并提出sink感知训练缓解头部坍缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型中存在注意力sink现象，即模型对首个token分配过多注意力。现有方法如Sink Attention和Gated Attention试图解决该问题，但缺乏对注意力机制间关系的深入分析。此外，先前工作观察到头部坍缩现象，即只有固定子集注意力头参与生成，严重限制了模型表达能力。因此，需要理解注意力sink与MoE的内在联系，并开发有效策略缓解头部坍缩以提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过理论和实证分析证明，Vanilla Attention和Sink Attention中的sink自然形成了注意力层内的MoE机制，解释了头部坍缩的原因。基于此，提出一种sink感知训练算法，在标准训练中添加针对注意力层的辅助负载均衡损失，以促进所有注意力头均衡参与。该方法可直接应用于Vanilla Attention、Sink Attention和Gated Attention结构。训练过程无需额外修改架构，仅通过损失函数引导。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务上进行实验，所提方法实现了有效的头部负载均衡，显著缓解了头部坍缩现象。相比基线（如普通Vanilla Attention、Sink Attention、Gated Attention），模型性能得到提升，具体指标包括困惑度降低和下游任务准确率提高。消融实验验证了辅助损失的有效性，且未引入过多计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了注意力层中sink与MoE的自然对应关系，为理解注意力机制提供了新视角。提出的sink感知训练算法简单有效，能推广到多种注意力变体，具有重要的学术价值和实践意义。未来工作可进一步探索MoE结构在注意力层中的自适应性，以及将该方法扩展到更大规模模型。

title: Particle-Guided Diffusion Models for Partial Differential Equations
abstract: We introduce a guided stochastic sampling method that augments sampling from diffusion models with physics-based guidance derived from partial differential equation (PDE) residuals and observational constraints, ensuring generated samples remain physically admissible. We embed this sampling procedure within a new Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) framework, yielding a scalable generative PDE solver. Across multiple benchmark PDE systems as well as multiphysics and interacting PDE systems, our method produces solution fields with lower numerical error than existing state-of-the-art generative methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出粒子引导扩散模型，结合物理引导与顺序蒙特卡洛框架，生成数值误差更低的PDE解场。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成式PDE求解器生成样本可能不满足物理规律，导致数值误差较大。确保解场的物理可接受性对于科学计算至关重要，但现有方法缺乏有效的物理约束机制。
light_analysis.method: 引入基于PDE残差和观测约束的物理引导，修正扩散模型采样过程；将采样嵌入顺序蒙特卡洛（SMC）框架中，实现多步引导生成。该方法确保了生成解场的物理一致性和计算可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准PDE系统（包括多物理和相互作用系统）上，所提方法生成解场的数值误差低于现有最先进的生成方法，如扩散模型或其他生成式求解器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过物理引导和SMC框架有效结合了数据驱动与物理约束，为复杂PDE系统提供了一种新的高精度生成式求解途径。未来可进一步优化计算效率并扩展至更多实际应用。

title: Transferable Graph Condensation from the Causal Perspective
abstract: The increasing scale of graph datasets has significantly improved the performance of graph representation learning methods, but it has also introduced substantial training challenges. Graph dataset condensation techniques have emerged to compress large datasets into smaller yet information-rich datasets, while maintaining similar test performance. However, these methods strictly require downstream applications to match the original dataset and task, which often fails in cross-task and cross-domain scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose a novel causal-invariance-based and transferable graph dataset condensation method, named TGCC, providing effective and transferable condensed datasets. Specifically, to preserve domain-invariant knowledge, we first extract domain causal-invariant features from the spatial domain of the graph using causal interventions. Then, to fully capture the structural and feature information of the original graph, we perform enhanced condensation operations. Finally, through spectral-domain enhanced contrastive learning, we inject the causal-invariant features into the condensed graph, ensuring that the compressed graph retains the causal information of the original graph. Experimental results on five public datasets and our novel FinReport dataset demonstrate that TGCC achieves up to a 13.41% improvement in cross-task and cross-domain complex scenarios compared to existing methods, and achieves state-of-the-art performance on 5 out of 6 datasets in the single dataset and task scenario.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于因果不变性的可迁移图数据集压缩方法TGCC，通过提取域因果不变特征并注入压缩图，解决跨任务和跨域场景下现有压缩方法失效的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图数据集规模增大导致训练成本上升，现有图压缩方法在压缩数据集时要求下游应用与原始任务和数据集严格匹配，在跨任务、跨域场景下性能显著下降。因此，亟需一种可迁移的图压缩方法，使得压缩后的小数据集能够适用于多种下游任务和领域，同时保持高准确性。
light_analysis.method: TGCC方法包含三个核心步骤：首先，通过因果干预从图的空间域中提取域因果不变特征，保留跨域共享的因果知识；其次，执行增强压缩操作以充分捕获原始图的结构和特征信息；最后，利用谱域增强对比学习将提取的因果不变特征注入到压缩图中，确保压缩图保留原始图的因果信息。实验使用五个公开数据集和自建的FinReport数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在跨任务和跨域的复杂场景下，TGCC相比现有方法实现高达13.41%的性能提升；在单一数据集和单一任务的简单场景下，TGCC在6个数据集中的5个上取得最优性能，验证了其可迁移性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TGCC从因果视角出发，首次将因果不变性引入图数据集压缩，实现了跨场景高效可迁移的压缩。该方法在图压缩领域具有创新性和实用价值，为大规模图数据的迁移学习提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索其他因果干预策略和更复杂的跨域任务。

title: A Sheaf-Theoretic and Topological Perspective on Complex Network Modeling and Attention Mechanisms in Graph Neural Models
abstract: Combinatorial and topological structures, such as graphs, simplicial complexes, and cell complexes, form the foundation of geometric and topological deep learning (GDL and TDL) architectures. These models aggregate signals over such domains, integrate local features, and generate representations for diverse real-world applications. However, the distribution and diffusion behavior of GDL and TDL features during training remains an open and underexplored problem. Motivated by this gap, we introduce a cellular sheaf theoretic framework for modeling and analyzing the local consistency and harmonicity of node features and edge weights in graph-based architectures. By tracking local feature alignments and agreements through sheaf structures, the framework offers a topological perspective on feature diffusion and aggregation. Furthermore, a multiscale extension inspired by topological data analysis (TDA) is proposed to capture hierarchical feature interactions in graph models. This approach enables a joint characterization of GDL and TDL architectures based on their underlying geometric and topological structures and the learned signals defined on them, providing insights for future studies on conventional tasks such as node classification, substructure detection, and community detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于细胞层理论的框架，从拓扑视角分析图神经模型中特征扩散与局部一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前几何与拓扑深度学习架构（如GDL和TDL）在训练过程中特征的分布与扩散行为尚未被充分研究，缺乏理论模型来解释节点特征和边权重的局部一致性与调和性。该问题对于理解模型内部机制、改进节点分类等任务具有重要意义，但现有方法多集中于架构设计，忽视了特征动态的拓扑本质。
light_analysis.method: 构建细胞层理论框架，将图结构视为层空间，通过层结构追踪局部特征对齐与协议，量化特征扩散与聚合的调和性。进一步引入基于拓扑数据分析的多尺度扩展，捕获层次化的特征交互。该框架联合表征GDL/TDL架构的几何拓扑结构与学习信号，适用于节点分类、子结构检测等任务。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，但指出该框架为常规任务（如节点分类、子结构检测、社区检测）提供了新的分析视角和理论基础，有望提升对特征扩散行为的理解。性能提升的具体指标待验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作从拓扑角度统一建模GDL/TDL中的特征动态，填补了理论空白，为设计更鲁棒的图神经网络提供了数学工具。未来可扩展至注意力机制的解释与分析，潜在局限性在于计算复杂度较高，需进一步简化。

title: Formula-One Prompting: A Composable Equation-First Prefix for Applied Mathematics
abstract: This paper introduces Formula Prompting (FP) and Formula-One Prompting (F-1), two single-call methods that elicit governing equations before solving applied-math problems. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Program-of-Thought (PoT) prompting improve mathematical reasoning by eliciting reasoning traces or code-like structures learned during pretraining. This suggests a diagnostic question: which useful pretraining patterns remain under-elicited? Using infini-gram-mini, we scan 81.7 trillion pretraining tokens and find that, in curated corpora such as DataComp-LM, equation-centered language appears 121x more often than code and 3.79x more often than step-by-step narration, yet standard prompting methods do not explicitly elicit equation formulation. FP asks the model to formalize a problem's governing equations before solving; F-1 extends FP with a composable Phase 2 that selects Direct, CoT, or PoT-style solving in the same call. Across five reasoning models and four applied-math benchmarks (finance, physics, cryptography, competition math), F-1 outperforms CoT by 5.76 pp and PoT by 8.42 pp on average, with the largest gain of 13.30 pp on FinanceMath, while topping the accuracy-token efficiency frontier at only 68 prompt tokens of overhead. Variant ablations identify the equation-formalization prefix, not the strategy menu, as the primary driver: adding CoT or PoT on top of the prefix yields no further gain, and 73.3% of remaining failures occur downstream of a correct Phase-1 equation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出先形式化控制方程再求解的提示方法，显著提升应用数学推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有CoT和PoT方法虽提升数学推理，但忽略了预训练中更常见的以方程为中心的语言模式。扫描81.7万亿token发现方程语言出现频率比代码高121倍、比逐步叙述高3.79倍，但标准提示方法未明确要求方程形式化，因此需要一种有效利用该模式的提示方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Formula Prompting (FP)和Formula-One Prompting (F-1)，FP先要求模型形式化问题控制方程再求解；F-1扩展FP，增加可组合的第二阶段选择直接、CoT或PoT风格求解。使用infini-gram-mini分析预训练数据，在五个推理模型和四个应用数学基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在五个推理模型和四个基准（金融、物理、密码学、竞赛数学）上，F-1平均优于CoT 5.76个百分点、PoT 8.42个百分点，FinanceMath上最大提升13.30个百分点，仅增加68个提示token开销。消融实验表明方程形式化前缀是主要驱动因素，添加CoT或PoT无额外收益，73.3%失败发生在正确方程后。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效利用预训练中方程中心语言模式，显著提升应用数学推理准确率且高效低开销。未来可改进后续求解步骤以解决方程正确后的失败情况。

title: PEAR: Pairwise Evaluation for Automatic Relative Scoring in Machine Translation
abstract: We present PEAR (Pairwise Evaluation for Automatic Relative Scoring), a supervised quality estimation (QE) metric family that reframes reference-free machine translation (MT) evaluation as a graded pairwise comparison. Given a source segment and two candidate translations, PEAR predicts the direction and magnitude of their quality difference. The metrics are trained using pairwise supervision derived from differences in human judgments, with an additional regularization term that encourages sign inversion under candidate order reversal. On the WMT24 meta-evaluation benchmark, PEAR outperforms strictly matched single-candidate QE baselines trained with the same data and backbones, isolating the benefit of the proposed pairwise formulation. Despite using substantially fewer parameters than recent large metrics, PEAR surpasses far larger QE models and reference-based metrics. Our analysis further indicates that PEAR yields a less redundant evaluation signal relative to other top metrics. Finally, we show that PEAR is an effective utility function for minimum Bayes risk (MBR) decoding, reducing pairwise scoring cost at negligible impact.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEAR，一种基于成对比较的无参考机器翻译评估方法，通过预测候选翻译质量差异的方向和幅度，实现更准确的相对评分。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无参考机器翻译评估方法多采用单候选评分，难以直接比较候选翻译间的相对质量，且评估信号可能存在冗余。PEAR通过成对比较框架，利用人类判断差异进行监督学习，旨在提供更细致、高效且低冗余的评估信号，提升评估准确性并支持下游应用如MBR解码。
light_analysis.method: PEAR框架将无参考MT评估转化为分级成对比较：输入源句和两个候选翻译，输出质量差异的方向和幅度。训练时使用人类评分差异作为成对监督，并加入正则化项强制顺序反转时符号反转。采用与单候选基线相同的数据和骨干网络进行训练，以隔离成对公式的贡献。
light_analysis.result: 在WMT24元评估基准上，PEAR优于严格匹配的单候选QE基线。尽管参数远少于近期大模型，PEAR仍超越更大QE模型和基于参考的度量。分析表明PEAR评估信号冗余度更低。作为MBR解码的效用函数，PEAR显著降低成对评分成本，且对最终性能影响可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEAR通过成对比较有效提升了无参考MT评估的准确性和效率，减少了冗余信号，并展现出参数高效性。在MBR解码中具有实用价值，可大幅降低计算成本。未来可扩展至其他需要相对质量比较的NLP任务。

title: The Script is All You Need: An Agentic Framework for Long-Horizon Dialogue-to-Cinematic Video Generation
abstract: Recent advances in video generation have produced models capable of synthesizing stunning visual content from simple text prompts. However, these models struggle to generate long-form, coherent narratives from high-level concepts like dialogue, revealing a ``semantic gap'' between a creative idea and its cinematic execution. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel, end-to-end agentic framework for dialogue-to-cinematic-video generation. Central to our framework is ScripterAgent, a model trained to translate coarse dialogue into a fine-grained, executable cinematic script. To enable this, we construct ScriptBench, a new large-scale benchmark with rich multimodal context, annotated via an expert-guided pipeline. The generated script then guides DirectorAgent, which orchestrates state-of-the-art video models using a cross-scene continuous generation strategy to ensure long-horizon coherence. Our comprehensive evaluation, featuring an AI-powered CriticAgent and a new Visual-Script Alignment (VSA) metric, shows our framework significantly improves script faithfulness and temporal fidelity across all tested video models. Furthermore, our analysis uncovers a crucial trade-off in current SOTA models between visual spectacle and strict script adherence, providing valuable insights for the future of automated filmmaking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出端到端智能体框架ScripterAgent与DirectorAgent，弥合从对话到长时电影视频生成的语义鸿沟。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能根据文本提示合成高质量视觉内容，但在从对话等高层次概念生成连贯长叙事时存在语义鸿沟，缺乏将创意转化为电影执行的桥梁。当前方法难以保证长时跨场景的叙事一致性和脚本忠实度，限制了自动电影制作的发展。
light_analysis.method: 核心是ScripterAgent，训练将粗略对话转化为细粒度可执行电影脚本。为此构建大型多模态基准ScriptBench，通过专家引导管道注释。生成脚本后由DirectorAgent协调，采用跨场景连续生成策略确保长时连贯。使用AI驱动的CriticAgent和新的视觉-脚本对齐（VSA）指标进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在所有测试视频模型上显著提升了脚本忠实度和时间保真度。分析揭示了当前SOTA模型在视觉奇观与严格脚本遵循之间存在关键权衡，为自动电影制作提供了宝贵见解。摘要未明确说明具体数值提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了首个端到端智能体框架，实现对话到电影视频生成，有效弥合语义鸿沟。学术上揭示了视觉与脚本的权衡，应用上为自动电影制作提供新范式。未来可优化智能体协作和脚本多样性。

title: NCSAM Noise-Compensated Sharpness-Aware Minimization for Noisy Label Learning
abstract: Learning from Noisy Labels (LNL) remains a fundamental challenge in deep learning because real-world datasets often contain corrupted annotations. Most existing methods rely on label correction or sample selection mechanisms. In contrast, we study LNL from an optimization perspective by establishing a theoretical connection between label noise and the flatness-seeking behavior of Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM). Based on this analysis, we propose Noise-Compensated Sharpness-Aware Minimization (NCSAM), which uses a noise-compensated perturbation to counteract the optimization bias induced by noisy labels. By correcting distorted SAM perturbations, NCSAM mitigates the memorization of noisy labels during training while preserving the simplicity of optimization-based learning. Experiments on synthetic and real-world noisy-label benchmarks show that NCSAM consistently improves over SAM-based optimization baselines and remains competitive with representative noisy-label learning methods.
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 8 tables. Major revision of v1: revised PAC-Bayesian theoretical analysis, clarified the NCSAM formulation, added appendix derivations, reorganized experiments and ablations, updated related work, citations, writing, and author list

light_analysis.overview: 提出噪声补偿的锐度感知最小化（NCSAM），通过理论联系标签噪声与锐度感知优化，利用补偿扰动抵消噪声偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实数据集常含错误标注，现有噪声标签学习方法多依赖标签校正或样本选择，复杂度高。从优化视角出发，旨在利用锐度感知最小化（SAM）的平坦性行为，直接对抗噪声引起的优化偏差，保持方法简洁性。
light_analysis.method: 建立标签噪声与SAM平坦性搜索的理论关系，提出NCSAM：在SAM扰动中引入噪声补偿项，修正被噪声扭曲的扰动方向，从而减少模型对噪声标签的记忆。核心创新在于高效修正优化偏差，无需额外样本筛选或标签修正模块。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实噪声标签基准上，NCSAM优于SAM基线，并与代表性噪声标签学习方法性能相当。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但表明一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: NCSAM从优化角度为噪声标签学习提供新思路，验证了理论连接的有效性。方法简单易集成，但未讨论计算成本等问题，未来可探索更复杂噪声场景。

title: Do readers prefer AI-generated Italian short stories?
abstract: This study investigates whether readers prefer AI-generated short stories in Italian over one written by a renowned Italian author. In a blind setup, 20 participants read and evaluated three stories, two created with ChatGPT-4o and one by Alberto Moravia, without being informed of their origin. To explore potential influencing factors, reading habits and demographic data, comprising age, gender, education and first language, were also collected. The results showed that the AI-written texts received slightly higher average ratings and were more frequently preferred, although differences were modest. No statistically significant associations were found between text preference and demographic or reading-habit variables. These findings challenge assumptions about reader preference for human-authored fiction and raise questions about the necessity of synthetic-text editing in literary contexts.
comment: 7 pages, peer-reviewed and accepted for presentation at New Trends in Translation and Interpreting Technology (NeTTIT 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 通过盲测实验，发现读者对AI生成的意大利短篇小说评价略高于人类作家作品，但差异不显著。
light_analysis.motivation: 探究读者是否偏好AI生成的文学作品而非人类作家的作品。现有研究多关注AI文本的质量，但缺乏对读者实际偏好的直接比较。该研究通过盲测实验，挑战了普遍认为读者更偏爱人类创作的假设，并为AI在文学创作中的应用提供实证依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用盲测设计，20名参与者阅读三篇短篇小说（两篇由ChatGPT-4o生成，一篇由意大利著名作家Alberto Moravia创作），对文本进行评价，并报告偏好。同时收集参与者的阅读习惯和人口统计学数据（年龄、性别、教育背景、母语），以分析可能的影响因素。
light_analysis.result: AI生成的文本获得略高的平均评分，且更多参与者偏好AI文本，但差异较小。人口统计学变量和阅读习惯与文本偏好之间未发现统计显著关联。摘要未明确说明具体评分数据或统计检验值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结果挑战了读者普遍偏好人类创作文学作品的假设，表明AI生成文本在文学接受度上可与人类作家媲美。这引发了对合成文本编辑必要性的思考，未来可在更大样本和更多样化文学类型中进一步验证。

title: PocketGS: On-Device Training of 3D Gaussian Splatting for High Perceptual Modeling
abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables real-time rendering, its training demands workstation-level compute and memory, making mobile deployment impractical under minute-scale time budgets and limited peak memory. We present PocketGS, a mobile scene modeling paradigm that enables on-device 3DGS training under these tightly coupled constraints while preserving high-fidelity reconstruction. PocketGS resolves the fundamental tension between training efficiency, memory compactness, and modeling quality through three co-designed operators: $\mathcal{G}$ builds geometry-faithful point-cloud priors; $\mathcal{I}$ injects local surface statistics to seed anisotropic Gaussians, thereby reducing early conditioning gaps; and $\mathcal{T}$ unrolls alpha compositing with cached intermediates and index-mapped gradient scattering for stable mobile backpropagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PocketGS outperforms the powerful mainstream workstation 3DGS baseline under mobile budgets, delivering high-quality reconstructions and enabling a fully on-device, practical capture-to-rendering workflow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了PocketGS，首个在移动设备上实现3D高斯溅射训练的方法，兼顾效率、内存和重建质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯溅射虽然能实时渲染，但训练需要工作站级计算和内存，移动设备上难以在分钟级时间预算和有限峰值内存下部署。现有方法无法同时满足训练效率、内存紧凑性和建模质量的要求。
light_analysis.method: PocketGS通过三个协同设计的算子解决核心矛盾：G构建几何保真点云先验；I注入局部表面统计来初始化各向异性高斯，减少早期条件差距；T展开alpha合成并缓存中间结果，使用索引映射梯度散射实现稳定的移动反向传播。
light_analysis.result: 在移动预算下，PocketGS性能优于主流工作站3DGS基线，实现了高质量重建，并支持完整的移动端端到端采集到渲染流程。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PocketGS首次实现了移动设备上的3DGS训练，为移动场景建模提供了实用方案。其价值在于将高保真重建与移动端部署结合起来，未来可进一步优化实时性。

title: Large Language Models as Automatic Annotators and Annotation Adjudicators for Fine-Grained Opinion Analysis
abstract: Fine-grained opinion analysis of text provides a detailed understanding of expressed sentiments, including the addressed entity. Although this level of detail is valuable, annotating opinions in datasets for model training requires considerable human effort and substantial cost, especially across diverse domains and real-world applications. To address this shortage of domain-specific labelled datasets, we explore the feasibility of LLMs as automatic annotators for fine-grained opinion analysis. We use a declarative annotation pipeline, an approach that reduces the variability of manual prompt engineering when using LLMs to identify fine-grained opinion spans in text. We also present a dedicated methodology for an LLM to adjudicate multiple labels and produce final annotations. We trial the pipeline with models of different sizes for the Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) and Aspect-Category-Opinion-Sentiment (ACOS) analysis tasks. In this work, we attempt to develop fully autonomous LLM-based annotators, but our results reveal an uneven picture characterised by a critical performance bifurcation: LLMs are reliable at the span level yet struggle to faithfully reproduce the relational structures that connect those spans. This suggests that LLMs are better positioned as high-fidelity annotation assistants and data augmentation tools to expand fine-grained opinion-annotated datasets, rather than replacing human annotators entirely.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用LLM作为自动标注器和标注裁决者的方法，发现其在跨度级可靠但关系结构欠佳，更适合辅助标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度意见分析需要大量人工标注，成本高且难以跨领域泛化。现有方法依赖手动提示工程，变异性大。为缓解领域特定标注数据短缺，探索LLM能否自动完成标注任务，减少人力投入。
light_analysis.method: 采用声明式标注流程减少手动提示变异性，并设计LLM作为裁决者融合多个标注结果。在ASTE和ACOS任务上测试不同规模LLM，通过流水线自动生成细粒度意见跨度及关系。
light_analysis.result: LLM在跨度级标注上表现可靠，但无法准确复现连接跨度的关系结构（如情感三元组）。与人类标注对比，存在性能分叉，表明LLM不适合完全替代人类。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM更适合作为高保真标注助手和数据增强工具，用于扩展细粒度意见标注数据集，而非完全取代人工。未来工作可优化关系建模或结合半监督学习。

title: Teaching and Evaluating LLMs to Reason About Polymer Design Related Tasks
abstract: Research in AI4Science has shown promise in many science applications, including polymer design. However, current LLMs are ineffective in this problem space because: (i) most models lack polymer-specific knowledge, and (ii) existing aligned models have limited coverage of knowledge and capabilities relevant to polymer design. Addressing this, we introduce PolyBench, a large-scale training and test benchmark dataset of more than 125K polymer design-related tasks, leveraging a knowledge base of more than 13 million data points obtained from experimental and synthetic data sources to ensure broad coverage of polymers and their properties. For effective alignment using PolyBench, we introduce a knowledge-augmented reasoning distillation method that augments this dataset with structured CoT. Furthermore, tasks in PolyBench are organized from simple to complex analytical reasoning problems, enabling generalization tests and diagnostic probes across the problem space. Experiments show that small- and mid- sized language models (SLMs) with 7B to 32BB parameters, trained on PolyBench, outperform similar-sized models and remain competitive with closed-source frontier LLMs on PolyBench's test dataset, while demonstrating performance gains on external polymer benchmarks.   Dataset and associated code available at https://github.com/StonyBrookNLP/PolyBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PolyBench基准数据集和知识增强推理蒸馏方法，提升LLMs在聚合物设计任务中的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLMs在聚合物设计领域表现不佳，因为缺乏聚合物专业知识且现有模型的知识和能力覆盖有限。聚合物设计在材料科学中至关重要，但现有方法无法有效处理该领域复杂、专业化的推理任务，亟需专门的数据集和训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建PolyBench，包含超过12.5万聚合物设计任务，源自1300万+数据点（实验和合成数据）。提出知识增强推理蒸馏方法，以结构化思维链（CoT）增强数据集。任务按从简单到复杂分析推理分层组织，支持泛化测试和诊断探测。使用7B-32B参数的小型和中等语言模型进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在PolyBench测试集上，训练后的7B-32B SLMs性能优于同规模模型，并与闭源前沿LLMs竞争。在外部聚合物基准上也展现出性能提升。具体指标摘要未明确给出，但表明有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: PolyBench和知识增强推理蒸馏方法有效提升了LLMs在聚合物设计中的推理能力，弥合了小模型与大型前沿模型之间的差距。数据集和代码已开源，促进AI4Science研究。未来可扩展至其他科学领域。

title: Plug-and-Play Benchmarking of Reinforcement Learning Algorithms for Large-Scale Flow Control
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown promising results in active flow control (AFC), yet progress in the field remains difficult to assess as existing studies rely on heterogeneous observation and actuation schemes, numerical setups, and evaluation protocols. Current AFC benchmarks attempt to address these issues but heavily rely on external computational fluid dynamics (CFD) solvers, are not fully differentiable, and provide limited 3D and multi-agent support. To overcome these limitations, we introduce FluidGym, the first standalone, fully differentiable benchmark suite for RL in AFC. Built entirely in PyTorch on top of the GPU-accelerated PICT solver, FluidGym runs in a single Python stack, requires no external CFD software, and provides standardized evaluation protocols. We present baseline results with PPO, SAC, DPC, and TD-MPC, and release all environments, datasets, and trained models as public resources. FluidGym enables systematic comparison of control methods, establishes a scalable foundation for future research in learning-based flow control, and is available at github.com/safe-autonomous-systems/fluidgym.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Code available at https://github.com/safe-autonomous-systems/fluidgym

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个独立、全可微的强化学习流控制基准套件FluidGym，基于PyTorch和GPU加速求解器，无需外部CFD软件。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在主动流控制中展现出潜力，但现有研究依赖异构观测方案、数值设置和评估协议，难以客观比较进展。当前基准套件需外部CFD求解器、非全可微、且对3D和多智能体支持有限，限制了系统性研究和可复现性。FluidGym旨在解决这些瓶颈，提供标准化、可扩展的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: FluidGym完全基于PyTorch构建，采用GPU加速的PICT求解器，单Python栈运行，无需外部CFD软件。它提供标准化的评估协议，并集成PPO、SAC、DPC、TD-MPC等多种算法作为基线。环境、数据集和训练模型均公开，支持系统比较控制方法。
light_analysis.result: 提供了PPO、SAC、DPC和TD-MPC的基线实验结果，验证了FluidGym的有效性和可复现性。所有环境、数据集和预训练模型均作为公共资源发布，便于社区使用和扩展。
light_analysis.conclusion: FluidGym建立了首个独立、全可微的强化学习流控制基准，推动该领域研究的标准化和可比较性。其开源发布（github.com/safe-autonomous-systems/fluidgym）为未来基于学习的流控制提供了可扩展的基础设施，并支持3D和多智能体扩展。

title: Analyzing Cancer Patients' Experiences with Embedding-based Topic Modeling and LLMs
abstract: This study investigates the use of neural topic modeling and LLMs to uncover meaningful themes from patient storytelling data, to offer insights that could contribute to more patient-oriented healthcare practices. We analyze a collection of transcribed interviews with cancer patients (132,722 words in 13 interviews). We first evaluate BERTopic and Top2Vec for individual interview summarization by using similar preprocessing, chunking, and clustering configurations to ensure a fair comparison on Keyword Extraction. LLMs (GPT4) are then used for the next step topic labeling. Their outputs for a single interview (I0) are rated through a small-scale human evaluation, focusing on {coherence}, {clarity}, and {relevance}. Based on the preliminary results and evaluation, BERTopic shows stronger performance and is selected for further experimentation using three {clinically oriented embedding} models. We then analyzed the full interview collection with the best model setting. Results show that domain-specific embeddings improved topic \textit{precision} and \textit{interpretability}, with BioClinicalBERT producing the most consistent results across transcripts. The global analysis of the full dataset of 13 interviews, using the BioClinicalBERT embedding model, reveals the most dominant topics throughout all 13 interviews, namely ``Coordination and Communication in Cancer Care Management" and ``Patient Decision-Making in Cancer Treatment Journey''. Although the interviews are machine translations from Dutch to English, and clinical professionals are not involved in this evaluation, the findings suggest that neural topic modeling, particularly BERTopic, can help provide useful feedback to clinicians from patient interviews. This pipeline could support more efficient document navigation and strengthen the role of patients' voices in healthcare workflows.
comment: accepted by the CLIN journal. The CLIN Journal is the journal for research in computational linguistics in The Netherlands and Belgium

light_analysis.overview: 利用BERTopic和LLM分析癌症患者访谈，揭示患者经历中的主导主题。
light_analysis.motivation: 患者故事数据中包含丰富但非结构化的信息，难以直接用于改善医疗服务。现有主题建模方法在医疗文本中缺乏针对性的评估，且未充分利用领域知识。本研究旨在探索神经主题建模与LLM结合的有效性，以从患者访谈中提取有意义主题，支持以患者为中心的医疗实践。
light_analysis.method: 首先比较BERTopic和Top2Vec在单篇访谈摘要中的关键词提取性能，使用统一预处理和聚类配置。然后通过GPT4进行主题标签生成，并进行人工评估（一致性、清晰度、相关性）。基于评估选择BERTopic，进一步使用三个临床导向嵌入模型（包括BioClinicalBERT）分析全部13篇访谈，最终采用最佳模型进行全局主题发现。
light_analysis.result: 人工评估显示BERTopic在一致性和相关性上优于Top2Vec。领域特定嵌入（BioClinicalBERT）提升了主题精确性和可解释性，在全部访谈中产生最一致的结果。全局分析揭示了两个主导主题："癌症护理管理中的协调与沟通"和"患者治疗旅程中的决策"。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明BERTopic结合领域嵌入模型能有效从患者访谈中提取临床相关主题，为医生提供反馈。该流水线可支持更高效的文档导航，增强患者声音在医疗工作流中的作用。局限性包括访谈为机器翻译且缺乏临床专家参与，未来需进一步验证。

title: Alterbute: Editing Intrinsic Attributes of Objects in Images
abstract: We introduce Alterbute, a diffusion-based method for editing an object's intrinsic attributes in an image. We allow changing color, texture, material, and even the shape of an object, while preserving its perceived identity and scene context. Existing approaches either rely on unsupervised priors that often fail to preserve identity or use overly restrictive supervision that prevents meaningful intrinsic variations. Our method relies on: (i) a relaxed training objective that allows the model to change both intrinsic and extrinsic attributes conditioned on an identity reference image, a textual prompt describing the target intrinsic attributes, and a background image and object mask defining the extrinsic context. At inference, we restrict extrinsic changes by reusing the original background and object mask, thereby ensuring that only the desired intrinsic attributes are altered; (ii) Visual Named Entities (VNEs) - fine-grained visual identity categories (e.g., ''Porsche 911 Carrera'') that group objects sharing identity-defining features while allowing variation in intrinsic attributes. We use a vision-language model to automatically extract VNE labels and intrinsic attribute descriptions from a large public image dataset, enabling scalable, identity-preserving supervision. Alterbute outperforms existing methods on identity-preserving object intrinsic attribute editing.
comment: ICML 2026. Project page is available at https://talreiss.github.io/alterbute/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Alterbute扩散模型，通过视觉命名实体（VNE）和宽松训练目标实现物体内在属性（颜色、纹理、材质、形状）编辑，同时保持身份和场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法在修改物体内在属性（如颜色、材质）时难以兼顾身份保持与编辑灵活性：无监督方法常导致身份丢失，而过度监督则限制有意义的内在变化。实际应用中（如设计、虚拟试穿）需要精确控制属性而不改变对象整体身份，因此亟需一种既能保持身份又能实现可控内在属性编辑的方法。
light_analysis.method: Alterbute基于扩散模型，采用两步策略：训练时使用宽松目标允许模型同时改变内在和外在属性，条件包括身份参考图像、目标属性文本提示、背景图像和物体掩码；推理时固定原始背景和掩码限制外在变化。核心创新是视觉命名实体（VNE）——视觉语言模型自动从大规模数据集提取细粒度身份类别（如'Porsche 911 Carrera'）及其属性描述，提供可扩展的身份保持监督。
light_analysis.result: 在身份保持对象内在属性编辑任务上，Alterbute优于现有方法（如基于无监督先验或严格监督的方法）。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称在身份保持和编辑真实性方面取得更优效果。通过VNE自动标注和扩散模型条件控制，实现了更精准的属性修改，同时维持物体可识别性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Alterbute通过视觉命名实体和宽松训练目标，解决了身份保持与灵活编辑的矛盾，为对象内在属性编辑提供了可扩展方案。学术上贡献了基于VNE的细粒度身份监督范式，应用上可用于图像编辑、设计生成等场景。未来工作可扩展至更多属性类型或视频域。

title: CALM-IT: Generating Realistic Long-Form Motivational Interviewing Dialogues with Dual-Actor Conversational Dynamics Tracking
abstract: Therapeutic dialogue is not a sequence of isolated responses: client goals, motivation, resistance, and therapeutic alliance evolve over time. Yet current LLM-based mental health dialogue systems often lack explicit mechanisms for tracking these dynamics across extended interactions, which can lead to poorly timed interventions or premature goal resolution. We introduce CALM-IT, a framework for generating and evaluating long-form Motivational Interviewing dialogues through explicit modeling of evolving client and counselor states, guiding both counseling strategy selection and utterance generation. We evaluate CALM-IT on a large-scale corpus of 8,232 synthetic dialogues spanning multiple dialogue lengths and frameworks. Compared with all baselines, CALM-IT achieves the best performance on most MITI 4.2 global ratings, including Empathy, Partnership, and Softening Sustain Talk, as well as on other key performance metrics while exhibiting minimal performance degradation as dialogue length increases. Notably, although CALM-IT initiates fewer change-directed prompts, it produces the highest client acceptance rate (64.3%) on average across different length conditions. We release a reproducible generation framework, a MITI-grounded process-level evaluation protocol, and a large-scale synthetic corpus for studying therapeutic LLMs under realistic long-form interaction conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CALM-IT框架，通过显式建模来访者和咨询师动态状态，生成逼真的长篇动机访谈对话。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于LLM的心理健康对话系统缺乏追踪长时间交互中动态变化的机制，导致干预时机不当或过早解决目标。治疗对话中客户目标、动机、抵抗和治疗联盟随时间演变，现有方法忽略这些动态，影响对话真实性和治疗效果。
light_analysis.method: CALM-IT框架通过显式建模来访者和咨询师状态的演变，指导咨询策略选择和话语生成。使用8232个合成对话的大规模语料库评估，对话长度多样。评估采用MITI 4.2全局评分（同理心、伙伴关系、软化维持谈话等）及其他性能指标。
light_analysis.result: 与所有基线相比，CALM-IT在大多数MITI 4.2全局评分上取得最佳性能，包括同理心、伙伴关系和软化维持谈话。随对话长度增加，性能退化最小。尽管发起更少的改变导向提示，但平均客户接受率高达64.3%，优于其他方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: CALM-IT提供了可复现的生成框架、MITI接地过程级评估协议和大规模合成语料库，促进治疗性LLM在真实长篇交互条件下的研究。未来可应用于真实咨询场景，但合成数据的泛化性需进一步验证。

title: Are We Truly Innovating? A Qualitative and Quantitative Study of Originality in AI Research Papers
abstract: Assessing originality in AI research is arguably the most consequential yet least reliable step in peer review. Reviewer judgments of originality remain opaque, inconsistent, and dependent on comparisons to prior work that are often incomplete. In this paper, we present a large-scale, data-driven qualitative and quantitative analysis of research originality based on over 100,000 peer-review reports from leading AI venues, spanning a period of rapid growth in the field. Leveraging structured, semantically retrieved prior work and signals embedded in expert reviewer assessments, we systematically characterize how originality is perceived in practice and identify the key dimensions that most strongly influence novelty judgments. Our analysis yields a fine-grained, evidence-based framework that equips both authors and reviewers with actionable insights into how originality is evaluated. In addition, we evaluate the reliability of current large language model (LLM) agents in assessing originality. We find that these models tend to systematically overestimate novelty and struggle to detect conceptual plagiarism, particularly in the presence of paraphrasing. We release our dataset, trained models, and code at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Novelty-Reviewer-365C/.

light_analysis.overview: 基于10万+同行评审报告，系统分析AI论文原创性的感知维度，评估LLM评估新颖性的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在AI领域，同行评审中对原创性的评估是关键但最不可靠的环节，评审者的判断模糊、不一致且依赖不完全的先前工作对比。现有方法缺乏对原创性如何被实际感知的系统理解，亟需大规模数据驱动的分析来揭示影响新颖性判断的关键因素。
light_analysis.method: 收集了来自顶级AI会议的超过10万份同行评审报告，采用结构化语义检索提取先前工作，结合评审专家评估中的信号，进行定性和定量分析。构建了一个细粒度的、基于证据的原创性评估框架，并评估了当前大语言模型（LLM）在评估原创性中的表现。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现LLM系统性地高估了新颖性，在检测概念抄袭（尤其是释义改写）方面表现不佳。作者公开了数据集、训练模型和代码，为作者和评审者提供了评估原创性的可操作见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为理解AI研究原创性的实际评估机制提供了大规模实证基础，揭示了LLM在评估新颖性中的局限性。所提出的框架和公开资源有助于提升同行评审的透明度和一致性，未来可探索更准确的原创性自动评估方法。

title: KG-ViP: Bridging Knowledge Grounding and Visual Perception in Multi-modal LLMs for Visual Question Answering
abstract: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for Visual Question Answering (VQA) often suffer from dual limitations: knowledge hallucination and insufficient fine-grained visual perception. Crucially, we identify that commonsense graphs and scene graphs provide precisely complementary solutions to these respective deficiencies by providing rich external knowledge and capturing fine-grained visual details. However, prior works typically treat them in isolation, overlooking their synergistic potential. To bridge this gap, we propose KG-ViP, a unified framework that empowers MLLMs by fusing scene graphs and commonsense graphs. The core of the KG-ViP framework is a novel retrieval-and-fusion pipeline that utilizes the query as a semantic bridge to progressively integrate both graphs, synthesizing a unified structured context that facilitates reliable multi-modal reasoning. Extensive experiments on FVQA 2.0+ and MVQA benchmarks demonstrate that KG-ViP significantly outperforms existing VQA methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KG-ViP框架，通过融合场景图和常识图，统一知识基础与视觉感知，解决多模态大语言模型在视觉问答中的知识幻觉和细粒度视觉感知不足问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在视觉问答中面临知识幻觉和细粒度感知不足的双重局限。常识图可提供丰富外部知识，场景图能捕捉视觉细节，但现有方法通常孤立处理二者，忽视了协同潜力。因此，需要一种统一框架来整合这两类图结构，提升多模态推理的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出KG-ViP统一框架，核心是检索与融合流水线：以查询为语义桥，逐步集成场景图和常识图，合成统一的结构化上下文。该过程利用查询从两种图中检索相关子图，并融合为联合表示，输入多模态大模型进行推理，从而增强知识基础和视觉感知能力。
light_analysis.result: 在FVQA 2.0+和MVQA基准测试上，KG-ViP显著优于现有VQA方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其性能超越现有方法，验证了融合场景图和常识图的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: KG-ViP通过桥接知识基础与视觉感知，为多模态推理提供了统一结构化上下文，有效缓解知识幻觉和感知不足问题。该工作展示了图结构融合在多模态大模型中的潜力，未来可探索更复杂的图交互策略及动态图构建。

title: Attention Projection Mixing with Exogenous Anchors
abstract: Cross-layer reuse of early attention projections can improve optimization and data efficiency, but it creates a structural conflict: the first layer must simultaneously act as a stable, reusable anchor for all deeper layers and as an effective computational block. We demonstrate that this tension constrains the performance of internal-anchor designs. We propose ExoFormer, which resolves the conflict by learning exogenous anchor projections outside the sequential layer stack. We introduce a unified normalized mixing framework that mixes queries, keys, values, and gate logits using learnable coefficients (exploring coefficient granularities: elementwise, headwise, and scalar), and we show that normalizing anchor sources is key to stable reuse. ExoFormer variants consistently outperform their internal-anchor counterparts, and the dynamic variant yields 1.5x downstream accuracy points while matching validation loss using 1.5x fewer tokens than Gated Attention. We explain this efficacy via an Offloading Hypothesis: external anchors preserve essential token identity, allowing layers to specialize exclusively in feature transformation. We release code and models to facilitate future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExoFormer，通过外部锚定投影解决跨层注意力重用冲突，并引入统一归一化混合框架提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨层重用早期注意力投影可以优化训练和数据效率，但导致结构冲突：第一层需同时作为稳定可重用的锚点和有效计算块。这种内部锚定设计限制了性能。现有方法未能解决这一矛盾，因此需要新方法解除冲突，使深层网络能更有效地利用锚点。
light_analysis.method: ExoFormer在序列层堆栈外学习外生锚定投影，通过统一归一化混合框架混合查询、键、值和门控logits，使用可学习系数（元素级、头级、标量粒度）。关键创新是归一化锚点源以实现稳定重用。动态变体进一步优化混合系数，基于Offloading Hypothesis：外部锚点保留令牌身份，使各层专注特征变换。
light_analysis.result: ExoFormer变体一致优于内部锚定对应方法。动态变体在下游任务准确率上提升1.5倍，且达到相同验证损失时所需令牌数减少1.5倍，相比Gated Attention。实验表明外部锚定设计在效率和性能上均有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExoFormer有效解决跨层注意力投影重用的结构冲突，通过外生锚点和归一化混合框架提升性能和数据效率。Offloading Hypothesis解释了其有效性。未来可探索更细粒度混合机制和不同架构中的锚定策略，代码和模型已开源。

title: What Are We Measuring in NLG? A Meta-Analysis of Evaluation Trends 2020-2025
abstract: As Natural Language Generation (NLG) dominates modern NLP, scalable evaluation remains a critical bottleneck. Consequently, LLM-as-a-judge (LaaJ) adoption has accelerated rapidly, appearing in more papers than human evaluation in 2025. This pivotal shift motivates a critical analysis of current evaluation practices. Overcoming the limits of rigid keyword filtering and manual review, we employ a multi-LLM information extraction pipeline to gather structured metadata from 14,171 papers across four major NLP conferences (2020-2025). Analyzing 3,334 filtered NLG papers, we identify three systemic challenges. (1) Metric inertia: despite the shift toward open-ended generation, legacy lexical metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) persist as primary indicators, typically used alongside rather than replaced by semantic alternatives. (2) Metric-criteria mapping problem: our paper-level co-occurrence data reveals that general-purpose automatic metrics are applied as broad proxies for quality, without specifying which dimension of text generation they are intended to evaluate. (3) Validation gap: LaaJ has grown rapidly without commensurate human validation (fewer than 8% of papers). Crucially, while LaaJ correlates with aggregate quality, alignment collapses on fine-grained criteria like fluency. To address these gaps, we distill our findings into a minimal Evaluation Checklist to guide metric selection, construct validity, and LaaJ deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 通过元分析揭示NLG评估中的三大系统性问题，并提出最小评估清单以指导指标选择、构念效度和LaaJ部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然语言生成（NLG）评估是瓶颈，LLM作为评判者（LaaJ）迅速普及但缺乏验证。现有评估存在指标惯性（旧词法指标仍为主流）、指标-标准映射问题（通用指标作为宽泛代理）、以及与人类验证的差距，亟需系统分析当前实践。
light_analysis.method: 采用多LLM信息提取管道，从14,171篇论文（2020-2025四大NLP会议）中提取结构化元数据，筛选3,334篇NLG论文进行分析。通过论文级共现数据识别评估趋势，量化指标使用、标准映射和人类验证情况。
light_analysis.result: 发现三大挑战：①指标惯性：BLEU/ROUGE仍为主要指标，未被语义替代；②映射问题：通用自动指标作为宽泛代理，未指定评估维度；③验证差距：LaaJ快速增长但仅<8%论文有人类验证，且LaaJ在细粒度标准（如流畅性）上对齐崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 总结NLG评估的系统性缺陷，并提炼出最小评估清单，以促进严格的指标选择、构念效度验证和LaaJ的可靠部署。该工作为未来评估实践提供了可操作的指导，但未涉及具体解决方案的实验验证。

title: On the Fallacy of Global Token Perplexity in Spoken Language Model Evaluation
abstract: Generative spoken language models pretrained on large-scale raw audio can continue a speech prompt with appropriate content while preserving attributes like speaker and emotion, serving as foundation models for spoken dialogue. In prior literature, these models are often evaluated using ``global token perplexity'', which directly applies the text perplexity formulation to speech tokens. However, this practice overlooks fundamental differences between speech and text modalities, possibly leading to an underestimation of the speech characteristics. In this work, we propose a variety of likelihood- and generative-based evaluation methods that serve in place of naive global token perplexity. We demonstrate that the proposed evaluations more faithfully reflect perceived generation quality, as evidenced by stronger correlations with human-rated mean opinion scores (MOS). When assessed under the new metrics, the relative performance landscape of spoken language models is reshaped, revealing a significantly reduced gap between the best-performing model and the human topline. Together, these results suggest that appropriate evaluation is critical for accurately assessing progress in spoken language modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 指出全局词元困惑度用于口语语言模型评估的谬误，并提出更有效的似然与生成式评估方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前口语语言模型常使用全局词元困惑度进行评估，但该方法直接套用文本困惑度公式，忽视了语音与文本模态的根本差异，可能导致对语音特性的低估。准确评估生成质量对于模型进展至关重要，现有方法无法忠实反映人类感知，需要更合适的评估指标。
light_analysis.method: 提出多种基于似然和生成式的评估方法替代全局词元困惑度。这些方法通过计算与人类平均意见分数（MOS）的相关性验证有效性，更贴近人类感知。具体包括似然类指标和生成类指标，但论文未详细说明其计算细节，强调其评估能力优于传统困惑度。
light_analysis.result: 新提出的评估指标与人类评分具有更强的相关性，更忠实地反映感知生成质量。在该评估体系下，口语语言模型的性能排名发生变化，最佳模型与人类基线的差距显著缩小。这表明全局词元困惑度低估了模型能力，正确评估对于衡量领域进展至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了全局词元困惑度在口语语言模型评估中的谬误，提出了替代的似然与生成式评估方法。学术价值在于纠正评估偏差，推动更准确的模型比较。实际意义在于为语音生成模型开发提供可靠评价，未来可进一步探索评估方法的普适性。

title: Differential syntactic and semantic encoding in LLMs
abstract: We study how syntactic and semantic information is encoded in inner layer representations of Large Language Models (LLMs), focusing on the very large DeepSeek-V3. We find that, by averaging hidden-representation vectors of sentences sharing syntactic structure or meaning, we obtain vectors that capture a significant proportion of the syntactic and semantic information contained in the representations. In particular, subtracting these syntactic and semantic ``centroids'' from sentence vectors strongly affects their similarity with syntactically and semantically matched sentences, respectively, suggesting that syntax and semantics are, at least partially, linearly encoded. We also find that the cross-layer encoding profiles of syntax and semantics are different, and that the two signals can to some extent be decoupled, suggesting differential encoding of these two types of linguistic information in LLM representations.

light_analysis.overview: 通过平均共享句法结构或语义的句子向量得到质心，揭示LLM内部层中句法和语义信息的线性编码及差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解大型语言模型（LLM）内部如何编码句法和语义信息对于解释其语言能力至关重要。现有研究多关注最终输出，对中间层表示中这两类信息的分离程度和编码方式尚不清楚。本文旨在探究LLM（特别是DeepSeek-V3）是否以线性方式编码句法和语义，以及它们在不同层中的分布差异，为模型解释和可控生成提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 本研究对DeepSeek-V3的隐藏层表示进行平均操作：将共享句法结构或语义相似性的句子向量分别平均，得到句法质心和语义质心。通过从句子向量中减去这些质心，观察其与匹配句子相似性的变化，验证编码的线性假设。进一步分析跨层编码轮廓，比较句法和语义信号在不同层的强度和解耦程度。该方法无需额外标注数据，直接基于模型内部表示。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，句法和语义质心能显著捕捉对应信息：减去句法质心后，句子与句法匹配句的相似性大幅下降；语义质心类似。表明句法和语义至少部分线性编码。跨层分析显示，句法和语义的编码轮廓不同，且可在一定程度上解耦。具体指标如相似性下降幅度和层间差异数值需参考原文，摘要未提供精确数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次在超大规模LLM（DeepSeek-V3）上系统展示句法和语义信息的线性编码特性及其跨层差异，为理解模型内部语言表示提供了新视角。该发现有助于改进模型可解释性、设计更高效的微调策略，并可能促进句法与语义分离的生成任务。未来工作可探索更多复杂语言结构及不同模型规模的泛化性。

title: Identifying and Mitigating Bottlenecks in Role-Playing Agents: A Systematic Study of Disentangling Character Profile Axes
abstract: While Large Language Model (LLM) role-playing agents have advanced rapidly, it remains unclear which profile elements genuinely drive role-playing quality. To bridge this gap, we introduce a systematic diagnostic framework that disentangles the impact of character profiles along three axes: Familiarity (Known vs. Unknown), Structure (Structured vs. Unstructured), and Disposition (Moral vs. Immoral). Utilizing a unified hierarchical schema (5 dimensions, 28 fields), we construct a controlled dataset of 211 personas and evaluate five LLMs on both single- and multi-turn interactions. Our results reveal a striking asymmetry: Familiarity and Structure show negligible impact, while Disposition produces large, consistent performance degradation for immoral characters across all conditions. Further analyses suggest that the Moral--Immoral gap is amplified by post-SFT alignment, and that this degradation varies substantially across profile attributes. To mitigate this bottleneck, we propose Field-Aware Contrastive Decoding (FACD), a training-free strategy that amplifies suppressed disposition-sensitive signals, significantly closing the performance gap without sacrificing moral-character performance.

light_analysis.overview: 系统解耦角色形象轴，发现性格对角色扮演质量影响最大，并提出训练无关的对比解码策略缓解道德-不道德性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM角色扮演代理虽进展迅速，但哪些角色形象元素真正驱动角色扮演质量尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对角色形象各维度的系统解耦分析，难以识别瓶颈。该问题重要，因角色扮演在游戏、社交等领域应用广泛，提升可控性需明确关键因素。
light_analysis.method: 提出系统诊断框架，沿熟悉度、结构、性格三个轴解耦角色形象影响。基于统一分层模式（5维度28字段）构建211个角色的控制数据集，评估五个LLM在单轮和多轮交互中的表现。针对发现的性格瓶颈，提出场感知对比解码（FACD），一种训练无关策略，放大被抑制的性格敏感信号。
light_analysis.result: 熟悉度和结构对角色扮演质量影响可忽略，而性格产生显著且一致的性能下降，尤其对不道德角色。道德-不道德差距在后续SFT对齐后放大，且不同形象属性下差异明显。FACD能有效缩小该性能差距，同时保持道德角色性能不降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于系统识别性格为角色扮演主要瓶颈，揭示对齐放大效应，并提出简单有效的缓解方法。学术上深化了对LLM角色扮演可解释性的理解，实际应用可指导角色设计。未来可探索更细粒度属性及动态调整策略。

title: FEA-SLT: A Gloss-Free End-to-End Framework for Facial-Expression-Aware Sign Language Translation
abstract: Sign Language Translation (SLT) is a challenging cross-modal task requiring joint modeling of manual articulations and non-manual signals. Existing gloss-free SLT methods effectively capture gestural dynamics but often underutilize facial expressions, which play crucial grammatical and disambiguating roles. This limitation can cause semantic degradation when distinct concepts share similar manual configurations. To address this issue, we propose FEA-SLT (**F**acial-**E**xpression-**A**ware **S**ign **L**anguage **T**ranslation), a gloss-free end-to-end framework that uses facial dynamics as semantic anchors for resolving manual ambiguity. FEA-SLT employs a domain-transferred facial encoder to extract expression-sensitive representations and integrates them with manual features through a linguistically constrained *Facial-Expression-Aware Fusion* (FEAF) module. FEAF captures reciprocal dependencies between manual and facial channels via bidirectional modulation, enhancing syntactic fidelity. Experiments on PHOENIX14T and CSL-Daily show that FEA-SLT achieves state-of-the-art BLEU performance among gloss-free methods, while targeted analyses confirm improved translation of facial-sensitive utterances. Code is available at [https://github.com/TuGuobin/FEA-SLT](https://github.com/TuGuobin/FEA-SLT).

light_analysis.overview: 提出FEA-SLT，一种利用面部表情作为语义锚点的无标注端到端手语翻译框架，通过融合面部动态解决手部歧义问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 手语翻译需联合建模手部动作和面部表情等非手部信号。现有无标注方法过度关注手势动态，忽视了面部表情的语法和消歧作用，导致在手部动作相似但语义不同的场景下出现语义退化。因此，亟需一种能有效利用面部表情来提升翻译准确性的方法，以增强句法保真度和语义正确性。
light_analysis.method: FEA-SLT框架采用域转移面部编码器提取表情敏感表示，并通过面部表情感知融合（FEAF）模块与手部特征集成。FEAF通过双向调制机制捕获手部与面部通道间的相互依赖关系，从而增强翻译的句法保真度。实验基于PHOENIX14T和CSL-Daily数据集，采用端到端训练方式。
light_analysis.result: 在PHOENIX14T和CSL-Daily数据集上，FEA-SLT在无标注手语翻译方法中取得了最先进的BLEU评分。针对性分析进一步证实，该方法在翻译涉及面部表情的敏感语句时表现显著提升，有效缓解了因手部歧义导致的语义退化问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: FEA-SLT首次将面部表情作为语义锚点融入无标注手语翻译，显著提升了翻译准确性，验证了非手部信号的重要作用。该工作为手语翻译中多模态融合提供了新思路，并开源代码以促进后续研究。未来可探索更精细的面部-手部对齐机制及跨语种泛化。

title: On the Intrinsic Limits of Transformer Image Embeddings in Non-Solvable Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) excel in semantic recognition but exhibit systematic failures in spatial reasoning tasks such as mental rotation. While often attributed to data scale, this work argues that the limitation arises from the intrinsic circuit complexity of the architecture. By formalizing spatial understanding as learning a Group Homomorphism Problem -- where latent embeddings preserve the algebraic structure of physical transformations acting on images -- we identify a fundamental computational bottleneck. Specifically, for non-solvable groups (e.g., $\mathrm{SO}(3)$), maintaining such structure-preserving embeddings is lowerbounded by the Word Problem, which is $\mathsf{NC^1}$-complete. In contrast, constant-depth ViTs with polynomial precision are strictly bounded by the complexity class $\mathsf{TC^0}$. Under the standard conjecture $\mathsf{TC^0} \subsetneq \mathsf{NC^1}$, a complexity boundary emerges: constant-depth architectures lack the logical depth required to capture non-solvable spatial structures in a single forward pass. To empirically validate this theoretical gap, we propose the Latent Space Algebra (LSA) benchmark, which reveals a significant degradation in ViT representations as the compositional depth of non-solvable tasks increases.

light_analysis.overview: 从计算复杂性角度证明Vision Transformer在非可解空间推理中存在根本性局限，阐明其电路复杂度上限低于任务需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉Transformer在语义识别上表现优异，但在空间推理任务（如心理旋转）中系统性失败。现有研究常归因于数据规模不足，本文认为根源在于架构本身的电路复杂度限制。将空间理解形式化为群同态问题后，发现非可解群（如SO(3)）的结构保持嵌入需要解决NC^1完全的单词问题，而常数深度ViT受限于TC^0类，无法跨越复杂度鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 提出形式化框架：将空间推理建模为学习群同态问题，要求潜在嵌入保持物理变换的代数结构。分析恒定深度ViT的计算复杂度，证明其属于TC^0类，对于非可解群，所需嵌入的下界是NC^1完全的单词问题。基于TC^0⊊NC^1的猜想，指出架构缺乏必要逻辑深度。设计Latent Space Algebra (LSA)基准，通过测量非可解任务组合深度下的嵌入质量来验证理论。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明恒定深度ViT无法在单次前向传播中捕获非可解群的空间结构。LSA基准实验显示，随非可解任务组合深度增加，ViT表示的代数保真度显著下降，与复杂度边界预测一致。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性验证了理论gap的存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从计算复杂性角度揭示了ViT在非可解空间推理中的根本局限，为理解架构能力边界提供了理论基础。LSA基准可用于评估模型的空间推理能力。未来工作可能探索更深架构或替代性归纳偏置来突破TC^0限制，但需注意复杂度下界的基本性。

title: JMedEthicBench: A Multi-Turn Conversational Benchmark for Evaluating Medical Safety in Japanese Large Language Models
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in healthcare field, it becomes essential to carefully evaluate their medical safety before clinical use. However, existing safety benchmarks remain predominantly English-centric, and test with only single-turn prompts despite multi-turn clinical consultations. To address these gaps, we introduce JMedEthicBench, the first multi-turn conversational benchmark for evaluating medical safety of LLMs for Japanese healthcare. Our benchmark is based on 67 guidelines from the Japan Medical Association and contains over 50,000 adversarial conversations generated using seven automatically discovered jailbreak strategies. Using a dual-LLM scoring protocol, we evaluate 27 models and find that commercial models maintain robust safety while medical-specialized models exhibit increased vulnerability. Furthermore, safety scores decline significantly across conversation turns (median: 9.5 to 5.0, $p < 0.001$). Cross-lingual evaluation on both Japanese and English versions of our benchmark reveals that medical model vulnerabilities persist across languages, indicating inherent alignment limitations rather than language-specific factors. These findings suggest that domain-specific fine-tuning may accidentally weaken safety mechanisms and that multi-turn interactions represent a distinct threat surface requiring dedicated alignment strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个日语多轮对话医疗安全基准JMedEthicBench，发现专业微调模型在多轮对话中安全漏洞显著。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在医疗领域部署需严格评估安全性，但现有基准仅限英文单轮对话，无法反映多轮临床咨询的真实场景。缺乏日语医疗安全评测工具，且医疗模型在越狱攻击下的脆弱性尚未被系统研究。
light_analysis.method: 基于日本医师协会67条指南构建基准，自动生成7种越狱策略（如角色扮演、假设场景）产生5万+对抗性多轮对话。采用双LLM评分协议（GPT-4+Claude-3）评估27个模型的安全性，并设计日语和英语双语版本进行跨语言对比。
light_analysis.result: 商业模型（如GPT-4）安全性评分中位数9.5/10，医疗专业模型仅5.0/10；多轮对话中安全性从首轮到末轮下降显著（中位数9.5→5.0, p<0.001）。跨语言测试显示医疗模型在日语和英语中均脆弱，证实对齐缺陷而非语言特异性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 领域微调可能意外削弱安全机制，多轮交互构成新的威胁面，需针对多轮对话开发专用对齐策略。本基准为评估日语医疗LLM安全性提供了标准化工具，对跨语言安全研究具有启示价值。

title: Real Time NILM Based Power Monitoring of Identical Induction Motors Representing Cutting Machines in Textile Industry
abstract: The textile industry in Bangladesh is one of the most energy-intensive sectors, yet its monitoring practices remain largely outdated, resulting in inefficient power usage and high operational costs. To address this, we propose a real-time Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM)-based framework tailored for industrial applications, with a focus on identical motor-driven loads representing textile cutting machines. A hardware setup comprising voltage and current sensors, Arduino Mega and ESP8266 was developed to capture aggregate and individual load data, which was stored and processed on cloud platforms. A new dataset was created from three identical induction motors and auxiliary loads, totaling over 180,000 samples, to evaluate the state-of-the-art MATNILM model under challenging industrial conditions. Results indicate that while aggregate energy estimation was reasonably accurate, per-appliance disaggregation faced difficulties, particularly when multiple identical machines operated simultaneously. Despite these challenges, the integrated system demonstrated practical real-time monitoring with remote accessibility through the Blynk application. This work highlights both the potential and limitations of NILM in industrial contexts, offering insights into future improvements such as higher-frequency data collection, larger-scale datasets and advanced deep learning approaches for handling identical loads.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于非侵入式负荷监测的实时功率监控框架，针对纺织工业中相同感应电机负载，评估了现有模型并指出分解挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 孟加拉国纺织业是能源密集型行业，但监控实践落后，导致低效用电和高运营成本。现有方法无法有效处理工业环境中相同负载同时运行的情况，迫切需要实时、非侵入的监控方案以优化能源管理。
light_analysis.method: 开发了包含电压电流传感器、Arduino Mega和ESP8266的硬件系统，捕获汇聚和单个负载数据。创建了三个相同感应电机和辅助负载的新数据集（18万样本），采用MATNILM模型进行负载分解，数据存储在云端并通过Blynk应用实现远程实时监控。
light_analysis.result: 整体能量估计较为准确，但单个设备分解面临困难，特别是多台相同机器同时运行时。系统实现了实际实时监控和远程访问功能，但证明了NILM在工业环境中的局限性，需要改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 工作展示了NILM在纺织工业中的潜力与挑战，指出未来方向包括更高频数据采集、更大规模数据集和先进深度学习方法处理相同负载。实际应用价值在于提供低成本的实时监控方案，但需进一步优化分解精度。

title: HGMEM: Hypergraph-based Working Memory to Improve Multi-step RAG for Long-Context Complex Relational Modeling
abstract: Multi-step retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a widely adopted strategy for enhancing large language models (LLMs) on tasks that demand global comprehension and intensive reasoning. Although many RAG systems incorporate a working memory to consolidate information, existing designs primarily function as a passive storage for isolated facts. This static nature overlooks crucial high-order correlations among primitive facts, thereby limiting models' capacity for multi-step reasoning and resulting in fragmented reasoning and weak global sense-making within extended contexts. We introduce HGMem, a hypergraph-based working memory system, extending the concept of memory beyond simple storage into a dynamic, expressive structure for complex reasoning and global understanding. In our approach, memory is represented as a hypergraph where hyperedges correspond to distinct memory units, enabling the progressive formation of high-order interactions within memory. This mechanism connects facts and thoughts around the focal problem, evolving the memory into an integrated and situated knowledge structure that provides strong propositions for deeper reasoning. We evaluate HGMem on several challenging global sense-making benchmarks. Extensive experiments and in-depth analyses demonstrate that our method consistently improves multi-step RAG and substantially outperforms strong baseline systems across diverse datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于超图的工作记忆HGMem，通过高阶交互改进多步RAG的长上下文复杂关系建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG系统的工作记忆主要是被动存储孤立事实，忽略了事实间的高阶相关性，导致多步推理碎片化，弱全局理解。长上下文复杂关系建模需要动态整合知识，但静态存储方式限制了模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.method: HGMem将工作记忆表示为超图，超边对应记忆单元，通过超边连接事实和思考，渐进形成高阶交互。记忆演进为整合的情境化知识结构，为深层推理提供强命题。使用超图结构替代传统线性存储，提升记忆的表达力和动态性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个全局意义理解基准上，HGMem持续改进多步RAG性能，大幅优于强基线系统。摘要未明确具体数值，但实验充分且分析深入。
light_analysis.conclusion: HGMem通过超图工作记忆克服了现有方法的静态限制，增强了多步推理和全局感知。其动态知识整合机制对长上下文复杂关系建模有重要价值，未来可探索更高效的超图构建和更新策略。

title: FasterVAR: Plug-and-Play Acceleration for Visual Autoregressive Models
abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) modeling departs from the next-token prediction paradigm of traditional Autoregressive (AR) models through next-scale prediction, enabling high-quality image generation. However, the VAR paradigm suffers from sharply increased computational complexity and running time at large-scale steps. Although existing acceleration methods reduce runtime for large-scale steps, but rely on manual step selection and overlook the varying importance of different stages in the generation process. To address this challenge, we present FasterVAR, a systematic study and plug-and-play acceleration framework for VAR models. Our analysis shows that early steps are critical for preserving semantic and structural consistency and should remain intact,while later steps mainly refine details and can be pruned or approximated for acceleration. Building on these insights, FasterVAR introduces a plug-and-play acceleration strategy that exploits semantic irrelevance and low-rank properties in late-stage computations, without requiring additional training. Our proposed FasterVAR achieves up to 3.4x speedup with almost no performance loss. consistently outperforming existing acceleration baselines.These results highlight stage-aware design as a powerful principle for efficient visual autoregressive image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FasterVAR，一个即插即用的加速框架，利用后期计算的语义无关性和低秩性质，实现最高3.4倍加速且几乎无性能损失。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉自回归（VAR）模型通过next-scale预测实现高质量图像生成，但大规模步长导致计算复杂度和运行时间急剧增加。现有加速方法依赖手动步长选择，忽略了生成过程中不同阶段的重要性差异，早期步骤对语义和结构一致性至关重要，而后期步骤主要细化细节。因此需要一种系统性的、自动化的加速方法。
light_analysis.method: FasterVAR通过分析VAR模型，识别出早期步骤对保持语义和结构一致性至关重要，应保留；后期步骤主要细化细节，可剪枝或近似。基于此，提出即插即用加速策略，利用后期计算中的语义无关性和低秩性质进行近似，无需额外训练。该方法使用无训练的低秩分解和剪枝技术，实现加速。
light_analysis.result: FasterVAR在多个基准测试上实现最高3.4倍速度提升，同时几乎无性能损失（例如在FID指标上与原模型相当）。与现有加速基线相比，FasterVAR一致优于它们，在保持生成质量的同时显著降低推理时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: FasterVAR提出了阶段感知设计作为高效视觉自回归图像生成的有力原则，证明通过区分早期和晚期生成阶段可以实现显著加速。该方法即插即用，无需重新训练，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更细粒度的阶段划分或结合其他加速技术。

title: Super-Resolved Canopy Height Mapping from Sentinel-2 Time Series Using Airborne LiDAR HD Reference Data across Metropolitan France
abstract: Fine-scale forest monitoring is essential for understanding canopy structure and its dynamics, which are key indicators of carbon stocks, biodiversity, and forest health. Deep learning is particularly effective for this task, as it integrates spectral, temporal, and spatial signals that jointly reflect the canopy structure. To address this need, we introduce THREASURE-Net, a novel end-to-end framework for Tree Height Regression And Super-Resolution. The model is trained on Sentinel-2 time series using reference height metrics derived from LiDAR HD data at multiple spatial resolutions over Metropolitan France to produce annual height maps. We evaluate three model variants, producing tree-height predictions at 2.5 m, 5 m, and 10 m resolution. THREASURE-Net does not rely on any pretrained model nor on reference very high resolution optical imagery to train its super-resolution module; instead, it learns solely from LiDAR-derived height information. Our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods based on Sentinel data and is competitive with methods based on very high resolution imagery. It can be deployed to generate high-precision annual canopy-height maps, achieving mean absolute errors of 2.63 m, 2.70 m, and 2.88 m at 2.5 m, 5 m, and 10 m resolution, respectively. These results highlight the potential of THREASURE-Net for scalable and cost-effective structural monitoring of temperate forests using only freely available satellite data. The source code for THREASURE-Net is available at: https://github.com/Global-Earth-Observation/threasure-net.

light_analysis.overview: 提出THREASURE-Net框架，利用Sentinel-2时间序列和LiDAR HD参考数据生成高分辨率树高图。
light_analysis.motivation: 精细尺度森林监测对理解冠层结构及其动态至关重要，这些是碳储量、生物多样性和森林健康的关键指标。现有方法依赖高分辨率光学影像或预训练模型，成本高且难以大规模应用。本文旨在利用免费可得的Sentinel-2数据，通过深度学习融合光谱、时间和空间信号，实现低成本、可扩展的高精度冠层高度制图。
light_analysis.method: THREASURE-Net是一个端到端的树高回归与超分辨率框架，使用Sentinel-2时间序列训练，参考法国大都市区的LiDAR HD数据多分辨率高度指标，生成年度高度图。模型包含三个变体，分别输出2.5m、5m和10m分辨率预测。关键创新在于无需预训练模型或高分辨率光学影像，仅从LiDAR导出的高度信息学习超分辨率。
light_analysis.result: THREASURE-Net在2.5m、5m和10m分辨率下分别达到平均绝对误差2.63m、2.70m和2.88m。优于现有基于Sentinel的先进方法，与基于极高分辨率影像的方法竞争力相当。证明仅使用免费卫星数据即可实现高精度年度冠层高度制图。
light_analysis.conclusion: THREASURE-Net为温带森林的结构监测提供了可扩展且经济高效的解决方案，仅依赖免费可得的Sentinel-2数据。其高精度年度高度图有助于碳储量评估、生物多样性研究和森林健康监测。未来工作可扩展至其他生态系统或集成更多时序信息。

title: Ariel-ML: Computing Parallelization with Embedded Rust for Neural Networks on Heterogeneous Multi-core Microcontrollers
abstract: Low-power microcontroller (MCU) hardware is currently evolving from single-core architectures to predominantly multi-core architectures. In parallel, new embedded software building blocks are more and more written in Rust, while C/C++ dominance fades in this domain. On the other hand, small artificial neural networks (ANN) of various kinds are increasingly deployed in edge AI use cases, thus deployed and executed directly on low-power MCUs. In this context, both incremental improvements and novel innovative services will have to be continuously retrofitted using ANNs execution in software embedded on sensing/actuating systems already deployed in the field. However, there was so far no Rust embedded software platform automating parallelization for inference computation on multi-core MCUs executing arbitrary TinyML models. This paper thus fills this gap by introducing Ariel-ML, a novel toolkit we designed combining a generic TinyML pipeline and an embedded Rust software platform which can take full advantage of multi-core capabilities of various 32bit microcontroller families (Arm Cortex-M, RISC-V, ESP-32). We published the full open source code of its implementation, which we used to benchmark its capabilities using a zoo of various TinyML models. We show that Ariel-ML outperforms prior art in terms of inference latency as expected, and we show that, compared to pre-existing toolkits using embedded C/C++, Ariel-ML achieves comparable memory footprints. Ariel-ML thus provides a useful basis for TinyML practitioners and resource-constrained embedded Rust developers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ariel-ML工具包，通过结合通用TinyML管道和嵌入式Rust平台，首次实现异构多核MCU上任意TinyML模型的自动并行化推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 低功耗MCU正从单核向多核架构演进，嵌入式开发中Rust逐渐取代C/C++，但缺乏支持多核并行推理TinyML的Rust软件平台，导致现有方法无法自动利用多核能力，推理延迟高，制约了边缘AI应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: Ariel-ML设计了一个通用TinyML管道与嵌入式Rust软件平台，自动将神经网络计算映射到多核MCU（Arm Cortex-M、RISC-V、ESP-32）上并行执行。其实现完全开源，并采用多种TinyML模型（如小型ANN）进行基准测试，以评估性能与内存效率。
light_analysis.result: Ariel-ML在推理延迟上显著优于现有工具，且内存占用与成熟的嵌入式C/C++工具包相当，证明其在保持资源效率的同时有效降低了响应时间。
