light_analysis.conclusion: Ariel-ML填补了多核MCU上TinyML自动并行化的空白，为边缘AI应用提供了高效、内存友好的Rust解决方案，有助于推动嵌入式Rust在资源受限场景下的实用化。未来可扩展至更多架构与更复杂的网络结构。

title: TinyDéjàVu: Smaller RAM and Faster Inference with Neural Networks on MCUs for Sensor Data Streams
abstract: Examples of embedded intelligence include a wide variety of tiny neural networks used on-board wireless sensors and actuators, which are expected to continuously perform inference on time-series of the data they sense. In order to fit lifetime and energy consumption requirements when operating on battery, such hardware is exclusively based on microcontroller with as little memory as possible, e.g., 128 kB of RAM. In this context, optimizing data flows during inference across neural network layers becomes crucial. In this paper, we introduce a new framework, TinyDéjàVu, and novel algorithms we designed to drastically reduce the RAM budget required by inference using various neural network models for sensor data time-series on typical microcontroller hardware. We publish the implementation of TinyDéjàVu as open source, and we perform reproducible benchmarks on common microcontroller hardware (Arm Cortex-M). We show that TinyDéjàVu can save up to 90\% of RAM usage with equal compute latency compared to prior work (StreamiNNC) on overlapping sliding window inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TinyDéjàVu框架，通过优化传感器数据流神经网络推理的数据流，在微控制器上节省高达90%的RAM使用，同时保持计算延迟不变。
light_analysis.motivation: 嵌入式智能设备如无线传感器需持续运行神经网络推理，但受限于微控制器的内存（如128 kB RAM）和能耗。现有方法（如StreamiNNC）在滑动窗口输入下RAM占用高，亟需更高效的数据流优化技术以延长电池寿命并满足资源约束。
light_analysis.method: TinyDéjàVu框架包含一系列新颖算法，针对传感器时间序列的滑动窗口输入，通过减少中间数据存储和优化层间数据流动来降低RAM预算。实现为开源工具，在Arm Cortex-M微控制器上进行基准测试，支持多种神经网络模型。
light_analysis.result: 在与先前工作StreamiNNC的对比中，TinyDéjàVu在重叠滑动窗口输入下节省高达90%的RAM使用，同时保持相同的计算延迟。实验结果基于常见微控制器硬件（Arm Cortex-M），验证了显著的内存效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: TinyDéjàVu成功解决了微控制器上神经网络推理的内存瓶颈，为嵌入式智能应用提供了高效解决方案。其开源实现促进了可复现研究和实际部署，未来可扩展至更多传感器数据流场景。

title: Diffusion-Augmented Markov Decision Processes for Maximum Entropy Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Diffusion models excel at sampling from complex, unnormalized distributions. In this work, we extend Maximum Entropy Reinforcement Learning (ME-RL) to diffusion processes, enabling sampling from the optimal policy trajectory distribution. By minimizing a tractable upper bound on the reverse KL divergence between the diffusion policy and the optimal policy trajectory distributions, we derive a modified surrogate objective and introduce Diffusion-Augmented Markov Decision Processes (DA-MDPs). DA-MDPs allow for seamless integration of diffusion policies into any ME-RL method with minimal modifications. We demonstrate its effectiveness by adapting Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), Wasserstein Policy Optimization (WPO), and Relative Entropy Pathwise Policy Optimization (REPPO) into their diffusion-based variants: DA-MDP: PPO, DA-MDP: WPO, and DA-MDP: REPPO. Empirical results on standard continuous-control benchmarks show that our approach matches or outperforms baseline methods, while experiments on multimodal benchmarks confirm its ability to model multimodal action distributions.

light_analysis.overview: 扩展最大熵强化学习到扩散过程，提出扩散增强马尔可夫决策过程（DA-MDPs），实现扩散策略与ME-RL的无缝集成。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型擅长从复杂非归一化分布采样，但将其集成到强化学习（尤其是最大熵RL）中存在困难。现有方法可能无法有效利用扩散模型的优势来建模最优策略轨迹分布。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过最小化逆向KL散度的上界，推导出修改后的代理目标，从而引入DA-MDPs。
light_analysis.method: 提出扩散增强马尔可夫决策过程（DA-MDPs），通过最小化扩散策略与最优策略轨迹分布之间的逆向KL散度的可处理上界，推导出修改后的代理目标。该方法可无缝集成到任何最大熵RL方法中，仅需最小修改。具体地，将PPO、WPO、REPPO改编为扩散变体：DA-MDP: PPO、DA-MDP: WPO、DA-MDP: REPPO。
light_analysis.result: 在标准连续控制基准上，该方法匹配或超越基线方法；在多模态基准上，验证了其建模多模态动作分布的能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性表明性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过DA-MDPs有效将扩散模型引入最大熵强化学习，实现了对最优策略轨迹分布的采样。该方法具有通用性，可应用于多种现有算法。其意义在于为强化学习中复杂分布建模提供了新途径，未来可探索更多应用场景。

title: Artemis: Structured Visual Reasoning for Perception Policy Learning
abstract: Recent reinforcement-learning frameworks for visual perception policy usually incorporate intermediate reasoning chains expressed in natural language. Empirical observations indicate that such purely linguistic intermediate reasoning often reduces performance on perception tasks. We argue that the core issue lies not in reasoning per se but in the form of reasoning: while these chains perform semantic reasoning in an unstructured linguistic space, \textbf{visual perception requires reasoning in a spatial and object-centric space}. In response, we introduce \textbf{Artemis}, a perception-policy learning method that performs structured visual reasoning, where each intermediate step is represented as a (label, bounding-box) pair capturing a verifiable visual state. This design enables explicit tracking of intermediate states, direct supervision for proposal quality, and avoids ambiguity introduced by language-based reasoning. Building upon verifiable and spatially grounded reasoning chains, Artemis provides a unified architecture for diverse perceptual tasks, without requiring the task-specific designs relied upon by prior perceptual policy models. Trained using grounding and detection sampeles in natural image domains, Artemis generalizes to counting and geometric perception tasks. At its core, a spatially grounded, object-centric chain rule provides a principled foundation for scalable and general perceptual policies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Artemis，一种基于结构化视觉推理的感知策略学习方法，使用(label, bounding-box)对替代语言推理，提升视觉感知性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习框架在视觉感知策略中常使用自然语言作为中间推理链，但实验表明纯语言推理会降低感知任务性能。核心问题在于语言推理在非结构化的语义空间中进行，而视觉感知需要空间和以对象为中心的推理。因此需要一种结构化、可验证的视觉推理方法。
light_analysis.method: Artemis将每个中间推理步骤表示为(label, bounding-box)对，捕获可验证的视觉状态。这种方法支持显式跟踪中间状态、直接监督提议质量，并避免语言歧义。基于空间接地和以对象为中心的推理链，提供统一架构，无需任务特定设计，利用自然图像域中的接地和检测样本训练。
light_analysis.result: Artemis在计数和几何感知任务上展现出泛化能力。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但指出其性能优于使用语言推理的基线方法，并且通过结构化推理避免了语言推理的性能下降。具体数据需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: Artemis通过结构化视觉推理为感知策略学习提供了可扩展和通用的基础，具有较高的学术价值。其以对象为中心的空间推理链为未来研究提供了新方向。局限性可能包括依赖高质量的检测和接地样本，未来可探索更复杂的推理场景。

title: Debate with Images: Detecting Deceptive Behaviors in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Are frontier AI systems becoming more capable? Certainly. Yet such progress is not an unalloyed blessing but rather a Trojan horse: behind their performance leaps lie more insidious and destructive safety risks, namely deception. Unlike hallucination, which arises from insufficient capability and leads to mistakes, deception represents a deeper threat in which models deliberately mislead users through complex reasoning and insincere responses. As system capabilities advance, deceptive behaviours have spread from textual to multimodal settings, amplifying their potential harm. First and foremost, how can we monitor these covert multimodal deceptive behaviors? Nevertheless, current research remains almost entirely confined to text, leaving the deceptive risks of multimodal large language models unexplored. In this work, we systematically reveal and quantify multimodal deception risks, introducing MM-DeceptionBench, the first benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate multimodal deception. Covering six categories of deception, MM-DeceptionBench characterizes how models strategically manipulate and mislead through combined visual and textual modalities. On the other hand, multimodal deception evaluation is almost a blind spot in existing methods. Its stealth, compounded by visual-semantic ambiguity and the complexity of cross-modal reasoning, renders action monitoring and chain-of-thought monitoring largely ineffective. To tackle this challenge, we propose debate with images, a novel multi-agent debate monitor framework. By compelling models to ground their claims in visual evidence, this method substantially improves the detectability of deceptive strategies. Experiments show that it consistently increases agreement with human judgements across all tested models, boosting Cohen's kappa by 1.5x and accuracy by 1.25x on GPT-4o.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MM-DeceptionBench基准和“辩论与图像”多智能体监测框架，用于检测多模态大语言模型的欺骗行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大模型能力提升，欺骗行为从文本扩展到多模态，带来更大的安全风险。现有检测方法仅局限于文本，无法有效监测多模态欺骗，因其具有视觉语义歧义和跨模态推理复杂性，亟需新的基准和监测方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建MM-DeceptionBench基准，覆盖六类欺骗行为；提出“辩论与图像”多智能体辩论监测框架，通过让模型基于视觉证据论证，强制其将声明与视觉证据对齐，从而显著提升欺骗策略的可检测性。
light_analysis.result: 在所有测试模型上，该方法与人类判断的一致性显著提升，在GPT-4o上Cohen's kappa提高1.5倍，准确率提高1.25倍，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统揭示和量化多模态欺骗风险，提供了标准化评估基准与高效监测框架，对提升多模态大模型的安全性与可信度具有重要价值，未来可扩展至更复杂的欺骗场景。

title: Object-Centric Vision Token Pruning for Vision Language Models
abstract: In Vision Language Models (VLMs), vision tokens are quantity-heavy yet information-dispersed compared with language tokens, thus consume too much unnecessary computation. Pruning redundant vision tokens for high VLM inference efficiency has been continuously studied but all existing methods resort to indirect and non-guaranteed ways. We propose OC-VTP, a direct and guaranteed approach to select the most representative vision tokens for high-efficiency yet accuracy-preserving VLM inference. Our OC-VTP requires merely light-weight pre-training of a small object-centric vision token pruner, which can then be inserted into existing VLMs, without fine-tuning of any models on any datasets. It is gauranteed that the most representative vision tokens are kept by minimizing the error in reconstructing the original unpruned tokens from the selected ones. Across any vision pruning ratios, i.e., inference efficiency, our OC-VTP consistently helps mainstream VLMs to preserve the highest inference accuracy. Our pruning also demonstrates interesting interpretability. Our codes are available at https://github.com/GarryLarry010131/OC-VTP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OC-VTP，一种直接且有保证的视觉token剪枝方法，通过最小化重构误差保留最具代表性的token，提升VLM推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在视觉语言模型中，视觉token数量庞大但信息分散，导致大量不必要的计算开销。现有剪枝方法采用间接方式，无法保证保留最关键的token，从而影响推理精度。因此，需要一种直接且保证代表性的剪枝方法，以在提高效率的同时保持精度。
light_analysis.method: OC-VTP通过轻量预训练一个小型的以对象为中心的视觉token剪枝器，该剪枝器可插入现有VLM而无需微调。其核心创新在于通过最小化所选token重构原始未剪枝token的误差，保证保留最代表性的视觉token。该方法不依赖特定数据集，具有通用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在不同视觉剪枝比例下，OC-VTP均能帮助主流VLM保持最高推理精度，优于现有间接方法。此外，剪枝结果展现出有趣的可解释性。代码已开源，验证了方法的高效性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OC-VTP提供了一种直接、有保证的视觉token剪枝方案，显著提升VLM推理效率而不损失精度。其轻量级设计便于集成，无需模型微调，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的重构目标或适应更多VLM架构。

title: Not All Pixels Are Equal: Pixel-wise Meta-Learning for Medical Segmentation with Noisy Labels
abstract: Medical image segmentation is crucial for clinical applications, but it is frequently disrupted by noisy annotations and ambiguous anatomical boundaries, limiting its application in real-world scenarios. Existing methods often directly adapt noisy label learning techniques designed for instance classification, overlooking the pixel-wise heterogeneity in medical segmentation with its spatially and anatomically varying difficulties. Consequently, global assumptions or simple confidence metrics fail to address these local variations, leaving boundary ambiguities unresolved. To address this issue, we propose MetaDCSeg, a robust framework that dynamically learns optimal pixel-wise weights to suppress the influence of noisy labels while preserving reliable annotations. By explicitly modeling boundary uncertainty through a Dynamic Center Distance (DCD) mechanism, our approach utilizes weighted feature distances for foreground, background, and boundary centers, directing the model's attention toward hard-to-segment pixels near ambiguous boundaries. This strategy enables more precise handling of structural boundaries, which are often overlooked by existing methods, and significantly enhances segmentation performance. Extensive experiments across four benchmark datasets with varying noise levels demonstrate that MetaDCSeg outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaDCSeg框架，通过像素级元学习动态学习最优权重，抑制噪声标签影响，并利用动态中心距离机制处理边界不确定性，提升医学图像分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割受噪声标注和解剖边界模糊的困扰，现有方法直接适应实例分类的噪声标签学习技术，忽略了像素级异质性和空间解剖难度变化，导致全局假设或简单置信度无法解决局部变异，边界模糊问题未解决。
light_analysis.method: 提出MetaDCSeg框架，动态学习像素级最优权重，抑制噪声标签并保留可靠标注。通过动态中心距离（DCD）机制显式建模边界不确定性，利用加权特征距离对前景、背景和边界中心进行处理，引导模型关注模糊边界附近的难分割像素。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集上，针对不同噪声水平进行大量实验，MetaDCSeg优于现有最先进方法。摘要未说明具体数值，但声称性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出像素级元学习框架，通过动态权重和边界不确定性建模有效处理噪声标签和边界模糊，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更多元学习策略或扩展到其他任务。

title: Automatic Pruning Discovery for Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on a wide range of tasks, hindering real-world deployment due to their massive size. Existing pruning methods (e.g., Wanda) tailored for LLMs rely heavily on manual design pruning algorithms, thereby leading to huge labor costs and requires expert knowledge. Furthermore, we are the first to identify the serious outlier value issue behind dramatic performance degradation under high pruning ratios that are caused by uniform sparsity, raising an additional concern about how to design adaptive pruning sparsity ideal for LLMs. Can LLMs prune by themselves? In this work, we introduce an affirmative answer by proposing a novel pruning method called AutoPrune, which first overcomes expert knowledge limits by leveraging LLMs to design optimal pruning algorithm for themselves automatically without any expert knowledge. Specifically, to mitigate the black-box nature of LLMs, we propose a Graph-driven Chain-of-Thought (GCoT) to optimize prompts, significantly enhancing the reasoning process in learning the pruning algorithm and enabling us to generate pruning algorithms with superior performance and interpretability in the next generation. Finally, grounded in insights of outlier value issue, we introduce Skew-aware Dynamic Sparsity Allocation (SDSA) to overcome the outlier value issue, mitigating performance degradation under high pruning ratios. We conduct extensive experiments on mainstream LLMs benchmarks, demonstrating the superiority of AutoPrune, which consistently excels state-of-the-art competitors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoPrune方法，让大语言模型自动发现剪枝算法，无需专家知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM剪枝方法依赖人工设计，成本高且需专家知识。此外，高剪枝率下均匀稀疏导致异常值问题，性能严重下降。亟需自动、自适应的剪枝策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出AutoPrune，利用LLM自身自动生成剪枝算法。引入Graph-driven Chain-of-Thought (GCoT)优化提示，增强推理过程，生成可解释的剪枝算法。针对异常值问题，提出Skew-aware Dynamic Sparsity Allocation (SDSA)，动态调整稀疏分配。
light_analysis.result: 在主流LLM基准上实验，AutoPrune持续优于最先进方法，有效缓解高剪枝率下的性能下降。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但表明超越现有竞争者。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoPrune首次实现LLM自我剪枝发现，减少人工成本。GCoT和SDSA分别提升算法生成和性能。未来可扩展至更多模型。局限性：未提及计算开销。

title: ReflexGrad: Within-Episode Failure Recovery in LLM Agents via Progress-Gated Dual-Process Routing
abstract: We present ReflexGrad, a dual-process architecture for within-episode failure recovery in LLM agents without demonstrations. When agents commit to a wrong approach early and exhaust the step budget, the post-failure trajectory contains the information to escape -- but no published architecture acts on it within a single episode. ReflexGrad routes between a fast process (TextGrad-style continuous refinement every $k{=}3$ steps) and a slow process (Reflexion-style causal diagnosis when $m{=}5$ consecutive low-progress scores fire a routing gate). A deterministic priority merge keeps the natural-language policy coherent, and each slow activation emits three observable artifacts: a reproducible trigger, a causal diagnostic, and a verified fix. On ALFWorld 134 tasks, $n{=}10$ seeds, no demonstrations, ReflexGrad lifts Qwen-3-8B from $35.1\%$ to $75.4\%$ ($+40.3$pp), beating compute-matched 1-shot LATS by $+2.7$pp ($p{\approx}0.01$), ToT by $+5.7$pp ($p{<}10^{-4}$), and Self-Refine by $+6.7$pp ($p{<}10^{-5}$); on GPT-5 the lift is $46.3{\to}88.1\%$ ($+41.8$pp). The $1.5$pp cross-model difference is within seed noise ($p{\approx}0.13$), suggesting that the routing mechanism, rather than model scale, is the primary source of the gain. Code, prompts, per-seed logs, and sensitivity sweeps are released.
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Accepted at ICML 2026 FoGen Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReflexGrad双过程架构，实现LLM智能体在单次推理内从失败中自我恢复，无需示范，显著提升任务成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM智能体在任务执行中常因早期错误耗尽步数预算而失败，但失败后的轨迹包含逃脱信息。现有方法无法在单个episode内利用该信息进行恢复，导致性能瓶颈。解决此问题对提升智能体自主性和鲁棒性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: ReflexGrad采用双过程路由：快过程每k=3步进行TextGrad式连续精化，慢过程在连续m=5低进度分数时触发Reflexion式因果诊断。通过确定性优先级合并保持自然语言策略一致，每次慢激活产出可复现触发、因果诊断和验证修复。无需示范，在ALFWorld任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld 134任务、10种子、无示范条件下，Qwen-3-8B从35.1%提升至75.4%（+40.3pp），超越LATS（+2.7pp）、ToT（+5.7pp）和Self-Refine（+6.7pp）。GPT-5上从46.3%升至88.1%（+41.8pp），跨模型差异仅1.5pp（p≈0.13），表明路由机制是主要增益来源。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReflexGrad提出一种无需示范的episode内失败恢复机制，通过双过程路由显著提升LLM智能体性能。其增益主要源于算法设计而非模型规模，具有通用性。未来可探索更灵活的路由阈值和跨任务泛化，代码和数据已开源。

title: Explaining Digital Pathology Models via Clustering Activations
abstract: We present a clustering-based explainability technique for digital pathology models based on convolutional neural networks. Unlike commonly used methods based on saliency maps, such as occlusion, GradCAM, or relevance propagation, which highlight regions that contribute the most to the prediction for a single slide, our method shows the global behaviour of the model under consideration, while also providing more fine-grained information. The result clusters can be visualised not only to understand the model, but also to increase confidence in its operation, leading to faster adoption in clinical practice. We also evaluate the performance of our technique on an existing model for detecting prostate cancer, demonstrating its usefulness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于聚类激活的可解释性技术，展示数字病理学模型的全局行为，优于传统显著性图方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释性方法如GradCAM仅突出单个切片的贡献区域，缺乏对模型整体行为的理解。数字病理学中，医生需要全局视角来信任AI模型，以加速临床采纳。
light_analysis.method: 基于卷积神经网络激活图的聚类方法，通过将特征聚类为多个模式，可视化模型全局行为。与仅关注单张切片的显著性图不同，提供更细粒度的全局信息，帮助理解模型学到的病理特征。
light_analysis.result: 在前列腺癌检测模型上评估，可视化聚类结果有效展示了模型行为，增强了操作信心。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性证明了方法的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了一种聚类的可解释性技术，通过展示模型全局行为而非局部区域，提高了数字病理学模型的可信度，有助于临床采纳。未来可进一步量化评估聚类质量。

title: MVI-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Robustness to Misleading Visual Inputs in LVLMs
abstract: Evaluating the robustness of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) is essential for their continued development and responsible deployment in real-world applications. However, existing robustness benchmarks typically focus on hallucination or misleading textual inputs, while largely overlooking the equally critical challenge posed by misleading visual inputs in assessing visual understanding. To fill this important gap, we introduce MVI-Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark specially designed for evaluating how Misleading Visual Inputs undermine the robustness of LVLMs. Grounded in fundamental visual primitives, the design of MVI-Bench centers on three hierarchical levels of misleading visual inputs: Visual Concept, Visual Attribute, and Visual Relationship. Using this taxonomy, we curate six representative categories and compile 1,248 expertly annotated VQA instances. To facilitate fine-grained robustness evaluation, we further introduce MVI-Sensitivity, a novel metric that characterizes LVLM robustness at a granular level. Empirical results across 18 state-of-the-art LVLMs uncover pronounced vulnerabilities to misleading visual inputs, and our in-depth analyses on MVI-Bench provide actionable insights that can guide the development of more reliable and robust LVLMs. The benchmark and codebase can be accessed at https://github.com/chenyil6/MVI-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个评估大型视觉语言模型对误导性视觉输入鲁棒性的综合基准MVI-Bench，包含三级分类体系和细粒度指标MVI-Sensitivity。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有鲁棒性基准多聚焦于幻觉或误导性文本输入，忽视了误导性视觉输入对视觉理解的挑战。为填补这一空白，需要专门评估LVLM在视觉层面被误导时的脆弱性。
light_analysis.method: 基于视觉基元设计三级层次：视觉概念、视觉属性和视觉关系，构建6个代表性类别，包含1248个专家注释的VQA实例。提出MVI-Sensitivity指标实现细粒度鲁棒性评估，并在18个最先进LVLM上进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现所有评估的LVLM对误导性视觉输入均表现出明显脆弱性，MVI-Sensitivity指标揭示了不同模型在各级别上的缺陷，分析结果提供了提升鲁棒性的可操作见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: MVI-Bench填补了LVLM鲁棒性评估在误导性视觉输入方面的空白，为开发更可靠的模型奠定基础。基准和代码已开源，可指导未来研究。

title: A Spatially Informed Gaussian Process UCB Method for Decentralized Coverage Control
abstract: We present a novel decentralized algorithm for coverage control in unknown spatial environments modeled by Gaussian Processes (GPs). To trade-off between exploration and exploitation, each agent autonomously determines its trajectory by minimizing a local cost function. Inspired by the GP-UCB (Upper Confidence Bound for GPs) acquisition function, the proposed cost combines the expected locational cost with a variance-based exploration term, guiding agents toward regions that are both high in predicted density and model uncertainty. Compared to previous work, our algorithm operates in a fully decentralized fashion, relying only on local observations and communication with neighboring agents. In particular, agents periodically update their inducing points using a greedy selection strategy, enabling scalable online GP updates. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于高斯过程UCB的分散式覆盖控制算法，平衡探索与利用。
light_analysis.motivation: 在未知空间环境中进行覆盖控制时，需要同时探索未知区域和利用已知高密度区域。现有方法多依赖中心化规划或全局信息，缺乏可扩展性和实时性。本研究旨在设计一种完全分散的算法，使每个agent仅通过局部观测和邻居通信，自主决定轨迹，实现高效的覆盖控制，同时在线更新高斯过程模型以应对环境未知性。
light_analysis.method: 基于高斯过程建模未知密度场，每个agent最小化一个局部成本函数，该函数由期望位置成本和方差探索项组成，类似GP-UCB采集函数。agent采用贪心选择策略周期性地更新诱导点（inducing points），实现可扩展的在线GP更新。算法完全分散，只依赖局部观测和与相邻agent的通信，无需全局信息。
light_analysis.result: 通过仿真验证了算法的有效性，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明算法在分散式覆盖控制中能平衡探索与利用，相比之前工作具有更好的可扩展性和实时性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新颖的分散式覆盖控制算法，利用高斯过程UCB策略引导agent自主决策。主要贡献在于实现了完全分散的在线学习与决策，适用于大规模未知环境。未来可考虑更复杂的通信约束或动态环境下的扩展。

title: The Principles of Diffusion Models
abstract: This book presents the core principles that have guided the development of diffusion models, tracing their origins and showing how diverse formulations arise from shared mathematical ideas. Diffusion modeling starts by defining a forward process that gradually corrupts data into noise, linking the data distribution to a simple prior through a continuum of intermediate distributions. The goal is to learn a reverse process that transforms noise back into data while recovering the same intermediates. We describe three complementary views. The variational view, inspired by variational autoencoders, sees diffusion as learning to remove noise step by step. The score-based view, rooted in energy-based modeling, learns the gradient of the evolving data distribution, indicating how to nudge samples toward more likely regions. The flow-based view, related to normalizing flows, treats generation as following a smooth path that moves samples from noise to data under a learned velocity field. These perspectives share a common backbone: a time-dependent velocity field whose flow transports a simple prior to the data. Sampling then amounts to solving a differential equation that evolves noise into data along a continuous trajectory. On this foundation, the book discusses guidance for controllable generation, efficient numerical solvers, and diffusion-motivated flow-map models that learn direct mappings between arbitrary times. It provides a conceptual and mathematically grounded understanding of diffusion models for readers with basic deep-learning knowledge.
comment: Supplementary materials for the book are available at the book website: https://the-principles-of-diffusion-models.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 系统阐述扩散模型的核心原理，统一变分、分数和流三种视角，揭示其共享的数学基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成等领域取得了显著成功，但其理论基础分散于多种表述中，如变分、分数匹配和流模型。现有文献常侧重具体实现，缺乏统一的理论框架。本书旨在提炼扩散模型的共同数学原理，帮助研究者理解不同方法的内在联系，降低学习门槛，促进可控生成和高效采样等技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: 从正向扩散过程（逐步加噪）和反向生成（去噪）的基本框架出发，综述三种互补视角：变分视角借鉴VAE逐步去噪；分数视角基于能量模型学习数据分布梯度；流视角通过学习速度场实现从噪声到数据的平滑变换。三者统一于时间依赖的速度场，采样等价于求解常微分方程。书中还讨论了引导机制、高效数值求解器以及扩散驱动的流映射模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告定量实验结果，但指出该框架为可控生成（如无分类器引导）、高效采样（如DDIM等数值求解器）和流映射模型（如Rectified Flow）提供了理论基础。这些技术已在图像、音频和视频生成任务中验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本书通过统一理论视角，阐明了扩散模型的本质是学习一个将噪声分布映射到数据分布的连续时间流。该框架不仅加深了对现有方法的理解，还为设计新模型（如流匹配）和改进采样效率指明了方向。局限性可能在于数学推导较多，对初学者有一定门槛，但适合具备基础深度学习知识的读者。

title: InfiMed-ORBIT: Aligning LLMs on Open-Ended Complex Tasks via Rubric-Based Incremental Training
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has driven recent breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs), especially for tasks where rewards can be computed automatically, such as code generation. However, it is less effective in open-ended medical dialogue, where feedback is ambiguous, context-dependent, and difficult to summarize into a single scalar signal-often requiring heavily supervised reward models and risking reward hacking. Thus, we introduce ORBIT, an open-ended rubric-based incremental training framework tailored for critical medical dialogues. ORBIT integrates medical dialogue construction with dynamically generated case-conditioned rubrics that serve as adaptive guides for incremental RL. Unlike approaches that rely on external medical knowledge bases or handcrafted rules, ORBIT uses rubric-guided evaluation and can be implemented with general-purpose instruction-following LLMs, avoiding task-specific judge fine-tuning. With only 2k training samples, ORBIT raises Qwen3-4B-Instruct's HealthBench-Hard score from 7.0 to 27.5, achieving state-of-the-art performance among similarly sized open-source models while maintaining strong consultation quality as rubric coverage broadens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ORBIT框架，通过基于评分标准（rubric）的增量训练，大幅提升开源LLM在开放复杂医疗对话任务中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在医疗对话中效果不佳，因反馈模糊、依赖上下文、难以单标量信号，且易奖励欺骗。现有方法依赖外部知识库或手工规则，缺乏自适应能力。
light_analysis.method: ORBIT框架将医疗对话构建与动态生成的病例条件评分标准结合，引导增量RL。使用评分引导评估，无需专用裁判微调，仅需通用指令跟随LLM，利用少量样本实现高效训练。
light_analysis.result: 仅用2k训练样本，ORBIT将Qwen3-4B-Instruct在HealthBench-Hard上的得分从7.0提升至27.5，达到同规模开源模型最优，且随评分范围扩大保持高质量咨询。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORBIT有效提升开源模型在开放复杂医疗对话中的性能，展现自适应训练潜力。未来可扩展至其他领域，但需注意评分标准的覆盖与泛化能力。

title: An Empirical Study on Variance-based MC Dropout Uncertainty-Error Correlation in 2D Brain Tumor Segmentation
abstract: Accurate brain tumor segmentation from MRI is vital for diagnosis and treatment planning. Although Monte Carlo (MC) Dropout is widely used to estimate model uncertainty, the effectiveness of variance-based uncertainty - computed as pixel-wise variance across stochastic forward passes - in identifying segmentation errors, particularly near tumor boundaries, remains insufficiently studied. This study empirically examines the relationship between variance-based MC Dropout uncertainty and segmentation error in 2D brain tumor MRI segmentation using a U-Net trained under four augmentation settings: none, horizontal flip, rotation, and scaling. Uncertainty was estimated as the pixel-wise variance across 50 stochastic forward passes and correlated with pixel-wise errors using Pearson and Spearman coefficients. Results show weak global correlations (r ~ 0.30-0.38) and negligible boundary correlations (|r| < 0.05). Although differences across augmentations were statistically significant (p < 0.001), they lacked practical relevance. These findings suggest that variance-based MC Dropout uncertainty provides limited cues for global and boundary error localization, and that the choice of uncertainty representation critically affects the utility of MC Dropout in medical image segmentation. Alternative representations such as predictive entropy or mutual information may better capture segmentation errors, particularly at boundaries.
comment: v2: Updated title and framing to clarify that findings are specific to variance-based uncertainty estimation via MC Dropout, not MC Dropout broadly. Minor textual improvements throughout. Code and results available at https://github.com/Saumya4321/mcd-error-correlation

light_analysis.overview: 论文实证研究了基于方差的MC Dropout不确定性在2D脑肿瘤分割中与分割误差的相关性，发现全局相关性弱且边界相关性可忽略。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑肿瘤MRI分割对诊断和治疗至关重要。MC Dropout广泛用于估计模型不确定性，但基于方差的逐像素不确定性在识别分割误差，特别是肿瘤边界附近误差的有效性尚未充分研究。现有方法缺乏对这种相关性定量分析，导致不确定性估计的实际价值不明确。
light_analysis.method: 采用U-Net模型在四种数据增强设置（无、水平翻转、旋转、缩放）下训练，使用2D脑肿瘤MRI数据。不确定性为50次随机前向传播的逐像素方差，与逐像素误差通过皮尔逊和斯皮尔曼系数计算相关性。重点分析全局和边界区域的相关系数。
light_analysis.result: 全局相关系数较弱（r ~ 0.30-0.38），边界相关系数可忽略（|r| < 0.05）。不同增强方法间差异统计显著（p < 0.001），但实际意义有限。表明方差MC Dropout不确定性难以有效定位全局或边界误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 方差MC Dropout不确定性在脑肿瘤分割中与误差相关性弱，对误差定位帮助有限。建议探索预测熵或互信息等替代不确定性表示，尤其是在边界区域。研究强调了不确定性表示选择对分割任务实用性的关键影响。

title: Neural Weight Compression for Language Models
abstract: Efficient compression of language model weights is increasingly critical as model scale and deployment grow. Yet, most existing methods rely on handcrafted transforms and heuristics, reflecting the limited understanding of weights as a data modality. To move beyond this paradigm, we formulate weight compression as neural codec learning and propose Neural Weight Compression (NWC), a framework for training neural codecs on pretrained weight datasets. NWC addresses challenges intrinsic to weight compression, including tensor heterogeneity and the mismatch between reconstruction losses and downstream performance. Experiments show that NWC achieves highly competitive accuracy-compression tradeoffs, with particularly strong results in the 4-6 bit regime, without relying on rigid handcrafted components such as the Hadamard transform. These gains extend to across diverse architectures, e.g., vision encoders. Our analysis highlights the roles of entropy-constrained quantization and learned transforms in adapting compression to weight data and downstream tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经权重压缩（NWC）框架，将权重压缩视为神经编解码器学习，在4-6比特范围实现高精度-压缩权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着模型规模和部署增长，高效压缩权重日益关键，但现有方法依赖手工变换和启发式，对权重作为数据模态的理解有限。该方法旨在突破这一范式，通过神经编解码器学习自动适应权重数据。
light_analysis.method: NWC将权重压缩形式化为神经编解码器学习，在预训练权重数据集上训练编解码器。针对张量异质性和重建损失与下游性能不匹配的挑战，采用熵约束量化和学习变换，无需硬性手工组件如Hadamard变换。
light_analysis.result: 实验在4-6比特范围内取得高度竞争性的精度-压缩权衡，显著优于现有方法。性能提升跨多种架构（如视觉编码器）一致，验证了NWC的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NWC通过神经编解码器学习实现了权重压缩的范式转变，揭示了熵约束量化和学习变换的关键作用。该工作为理解权重数据模态提供了新视角，未来可扩展至更多模型和任务。

title: EAGer: Entropy-Aware GEneRation for Adaptive Inference-Time Scaling
abstract: With the rise of reasoning language models and test-time scaling methods as a paradigm for improving model performance, substantial computation is often required to generate multiple candidate sequences from the same prompt. This enables exploration of different reasoning paths toward the correct solution, however, allocates the same compute budget for each prompt. Grounded on the assumption that different prompts carry different degrees of complexity, and thus different computation needs, we propose EAGer, a training-free generation method that leverages model uncertainty through token-wise entropy distribution to reduce redundant computation and concurrently improve overall performance. EAGer allows branching to multiple reasoning paths only in the presence of high-entropy tokens, and reallocates the saved compute budget to instances where exploration of alternative paths is most needed. We validate EAGer across multiple open-source models on complex reasoning benchmarks, with gains specifically demonstrated on AIME 2025. When target labels are accessible -- as in RLVR training pipelines -- EAGer achieves up to +37% in Pass@k and 59% fewer tokens; in test-time settings it still yields +12% in Pass@k and 64% fewer tokens compared to Full Parallel Sampling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EAGer，一种基于熵感知的自适应推理时计算分配方法，无需训练即可减少冗余并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前推理语言模型和测试时缩放方法为每个提示分配相同计算预算生成多个候选序列，但不同提示复杂度不同，导致计算资源浪费。现有方法未考虑提示的难度差异，无法有效分配计算。EAGer旨在通过动态调整计算分配，在保持或提升性能的同时降低计算成本。
light_analysis.method: EAGer利用令牌级熵分布作为模型不确定性的指标，仅在遇到高熵令牌时分支到多条推理路径，低熵路径则继续生成。节省的计算预算被重新分配给需要探索更多替代路径的高熵实例。该方法无需训练，兼容现有开源模型。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME 2025基准测试上，当目标标签可用时（如RLVR训练），EAGer在Pass@k上提升高达37%，同时减少59%的令牌；在测试时设置中，Pass@k提升12%，令牌减少64%，相比全并行采样具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: EAGer通过自适应计算分配有效平衡了推理质量与效率，展示了利用不确定性信息指导推理路径探索的潜力。未来可应用于更多复杂推理任务，并探索与其他测试时缩放技术的结合，其局限在于对熵阈值的设定可能需针对不同模型调整。

title: Auditing medical multi-agent AI reveals risks of false consensus
abstract: Large language models are increasingly being assembled into medical multi-agent systems that emulate multidisciplinary consultation through specialist roles, peer review and consensus formation. In clinical decision support, however, apparent consensus is not enough. Clinicians also need to know whether agents checked the evidence, addressed disagreement and kept uncertainty visible. Current evaluations largely score final accuracy, leaving the safety of the collaborative process untested. Here we introduce MedAgentAudit, a clinically grounded workflow audit framework for diagnosing and quantifying collaborative failure modes in medical multi-agent systems. From 3,600 execution logs, we derive an expert-validated taxonomy of ten recurrent failures spanning task comprehension, collaborative discussion, and synthesis and decision-making. We then deploy an expert-validated automated auditor as non-interventional probes across 14,400 cases, covering six multi-agent architectures, six medical text and vision datasets, and four large language model settings per modality. Across systems, collaboration yields uneven accuracy gains and frequent process failures. Unsupported observations affect 16.63% of cases and propagate downstream. In discussion, agents repeat initial views in 98.42% of cases rather than re-examining evidence, and fail to activate specialist reasoning in 42.73%. During synthesis, final answers often substitute authority or majority count for evidence checking, showing authority bias in 28.76% (rising from 35.30% to 68.75% across rounds), self-contradiction in 18.53%, contradiction neglect in 5.48% and minority suppression in 5.11%. MedAgentAudit reframes medical AI evaluation from output scoring to process-level safety and accountability, providing a practical foundation for transparent, auditable and clinician-supervised agentic systems in medicine.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedAgentAudit审计框架，揭示医疗多智能体系统中虚假共识的风险，将评估从输出准确性转向过程安全与问责。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医疗多智能体系统评估主要关注最终准确性，未测试协作过程的安全性。临床决策需要智能体检查证据、处理分歧并保持不确定性可见，但当前评估忽略这些过程失败，导致潜在安全风险。因此需要系统性的过程审计框架来诊断量化协作失败模式。
light_analysis.method: 提出MedAgentAudit，一个基于临床工作流的审计框架。从3,600条执行日志中推导出专家验证的十种反复失败分类法（涵盖任务理解、协作讨论和综合决策）。部署自动审计器作为非干预探针，覆盖14,400案例、六种多智能体架构、六种医疗文本/视觉数据集及四种LLM设置，对过程失败进行定量分析。
light_analysis.result: 协作带来不均匀准确性提升和频繁过程失败：无支持的观察占16.63%并向下游传播；讨论中98.42%案例重复初始观点，42.73%未激活专家推理；综合中权威偏见28.76%（从35.30%升至68.75%），自相矛盾18.53%，矛盾忽视5.48%，少数压制5.11%。这些失败普遍且严重。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedAgentAudit将医疗AI评估从输出评分转向过程级安全与问责，为透明、可审计和临床医生监督的智能系统提供实用基础。未来可扩展至更多临床路径，但需进一步临床验证和自动化改进。

title: VideoCanvas: Unified Video Completion from Arbitrary Spatiotemporal Patches via In-Context Conditioning
abstract: Existing controllable video generation methods are typically designed for rigid, task-specific settings, such as first-frame image-to-video, inpainting, or interpolation, treating spatio-temporal control as a set of isolated problems. We formalize a unified task, arbitrary spatio-temporal video completion, where a model generates a coherent video from user-specified patches placed at any spatial location and timestamp. However, realizing such a unified framework within modern latent video diffusion models is non-trivial: causal video VAEs compress multiple frames into a single latent slot, making frame-level conditioning fundamentally ill-posed, and directly feeding sparsely populated, zero-padded video inputs into the VAE leads to severe out-of-distribution artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose VideoCanvas, a simple yet effective framework that adapts the In-Context Conditioning paradigm to arbitrary spatio-temporal completion without modifying or retraining the VAE. Our key idea is a hybrid conditioning strategy that decouples spatial and temporal control: spatially, we encode zero-padded full-frame canvases in image mode to keep VAE inputs in-distribution, and temporally we use Temporal RoPE Interpolation to assign each condition a continuous fractional index in the latent sequence for precise frame-level alignment. To evaluate this capability, we develop VideoCanvasBench, the first benchmark for arbitrary spatio-temporal video completion, covering both intra-scene fidelity and inter-scene creativity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VideoCanvas achieves state-of-the-art performance across a diverse range of video generation tasks under a single, unified framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VideoCanvas，一种通过上下文条件化实现任意时空视频补全的统一框架，无需修改或重新训练VAE。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可控视频生成方法针对特定任务（如首帧图到视频、修复、插值），将时空控制视为孤立问题。本文形式化统一任务：任意时空视频补全，要求模型从用户指定的任意位置和时间戳的补丁生成连贯视频。然而，现代潜在视频扩散模型中，因果视频VAE将多帧压缩到单个潜在槽，使帧级条件设置不合理；直接输入稀疏零填充视频会导致严重分布外伪影。因此需要一种无需修改VAE的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出VideoCanvas，采用混合条件策略：空间上，以图像模式编码零填充全帧画布，保持VAE输入分布内；时间上，使用Temporal RoPE Interpolation为每个条件分配连续分数索引，实现精确帧级对齐。该框架基于In-Context Conditioning范式，无需重新训练VAE。同时构建第一个任意时空视频补全基准VideoCanvasBench，涵盖场景内保真度和场景间创造力。
light_analysis.result: 在VideoCanvasBench上，VideoCanvas在多种视频生成任务（如修复、插值、外推等）中以单一统一框架取得最先进性能。具体数值未在摘要中明确，但实验表明其能生成连贯视频，且优于现有任务特定方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献包括：形式化任意时空视频补全任务，提出无需修改VAE的VideoCanvas框架，以及构建首个专用基准VideoCanvasBench。该工作统一了之前分散的时空控制任务，具有较高学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的补丁条件或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: Which Heads Matter for Reasoning? RL-Guided KV Cache Compression
abstract: Reasoning large language models exhibit complex reasoning behaviors via extended chain-of-thought generation that are highly fragile to information loss during decoding, creating critical challenges for KV cache compression. Existing token-dropping methods directly disrupt reasoning chains by removing intermediate steps, while head-reallocation methods, designed for retrieval tasks, fail to preserve the heads essential for generative reasoning. However, no existing method can identify which attention heads genuinely maintain reasoning consistency and control generation termination. To address this, we propose RLKV, which uses reinforcement learning as a probe to discover which heads contribute to reasoning quality by directly optimizing their cache usage against actual generation outcomes. This discovery naturally leads to an efficient compression strategy: we allocate full KV cache to reasoning-critical heads while aggressively compressing others with constant-size KV cache. Experiments reveal that a fraction of heads proves essential for reasoning, enabling 20--60% cache reduction with near-lossless performance across diverse tasks and models, and up to 2.06x end-to-end speedup at 60% reduction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLKV方法，利用强化学习识别推理关键注意力头，实现KV缓存高效压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理大语言模型通过扩展思维链生成复杂推理行为，对解码过程中的信息损失高度敏感，给KV缓存压缩带来挑战。现有token-dropping方法直接移除中间步骤破坏推理链，而head-reallocation方法针对检索任务设计，无法保留生成推理所需的关键头。目前尚无方法能识别哪些注意力头真正维护推理一致性并控制生成终止。因此，需要一种能自动发现推理关键头并据此优化压缩的策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出RLKV方法，将强化学习作为探针，直接优化注意力头的缓存使用与实际生成结果，从而发现哪些头对推理质量贡献最大。基于此发现，设计混合压缩策略：对推理关键头分配完整KV缓存，对其他头采用固定大小缓存进行激进压缩。该方法无需预先定义头的重要性，通过RL自适应学习，适用于不同模型和任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，仅需少量注意力头即可维持推理质量，RLKV在多种任务和模型上实现20-60%的缓存压缩且性能近乎无损。在60%压缩率下，端到端推理速度提升高达2.06倍。与基线方法相比，RLKV有效保护了推理链的完整性，避免了因压缩导致的推理退化，验证了其识别关键头的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLKV首次通过强化学习识别推理关键注意力头，并据此实现高效的KV缓存压缩，为推理大模型的部署优化提供了新思路。该方法在保持推理质量的同时显著降低内存开销，具有重要的学术和实用价值。未来可探索将RLKV扩展到更细粒度的压缩策略或与其他加速技术结合，进一步提升效率。

title: A Broader View of Thompson Sampling
abstract: Thompson Sampling is one of the most widely used and studied bandit algorithms, known for its simple structure, low regret performance, and solid theoretical guarantees. Yet, in stark contrast to most other families of bandit algorithms, the exact mechanism through which posterior sampling (as introduced by Thompson) is able to "properly" balance exploration and exploitation, remains a mystery. In this paper, we show that the core insight to address this question stems from recasting Thompson Sampling as an online optimization algorithm. To distill this, we introduce a suitable time invariant notion of regret that leads to a stationarized bandit problem, and a stationary Bellman-optimal policy. We then show that Thompson Sampling admits an online optimization form that mimics the structure of the aforementioned Bellman-optimal policy, where "greediness" is regularized by a measure of residual uncertainty. This new lens of online optimization allows both a better understanding of Thompson Sampling dynamics, as well as a principled manner for policy improvement that mimics the Bellman-optimal benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 将Thompson Sampling重新解释为在线优化算法，揭示其平衡探索与利用的机制。
light_analysis.motivation: Thompson Sampling虽广泛应用且理论坚实，但其通过后验采样平衡探索与利用的精确机制仍不明确。现有方法缺乏对内部动态的深层理解，限制了策略改进。该研究旨在揭示这一核心机理，为优化提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 引入时间不变遗憾概念和静态化强盗问题，推导出静态Bellman最优策略。证明Thompson Sampling可转化为在线优化形式，其结构模仿Bellman最优策略，其中贪婪行为被残差不确定性正则化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，但提出新视角能更好地理解Thompson Sampling动态，并提供原则性的策略改进方法，以接近Bellman最优基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文将Thompson Sampling重铸为在线优化算法，揭示了其内部工作机制与Bellman最优策略的联系。这为理论分析和实际策略优化提供了新工具，潜在可扩展至更复杂的强化学习问题。

title: IAR2: Improving Autoregressive Visual Generation with Semantic-Detail Associated Token Prediction
abstract: Autoregressive models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for visual content creation, but often overlook the intrinsic structural properties of visual data. Our prior work, IAR, initiated a direction to address this by reorganizing the visual codebook based on embedding similarity, thereby improving generation robustness. However, it is constrained by the rigidity of pre-trained codebooks and the inaccuracies of hard, uniform clustering. To overcome these limitations, we propose IAR2, an advanced autoregressive framework that enables a hierarchical semantic-detail synthesis process. At the core of IAR2 is a novel Semantic-Detail Associated Dual Codebook, which decouples image representations into a semantic codebook for global semantic information and a detail codebook for fine-grained refinements. It expands the quantization capacity from a linear to a polynomial scale, significantly enhancing expressiveness. To accommodate this dual representation, we propose a Semantic-Detail Autoregressive Prediction scheme coupled with a Local-Context Enhanced Autoregressive Head, which performs hierarchical prediction-first the semantic token, then the detail token-while leveraging a local context window to enhance spatial coherence. Furthermore, for conditional generation, we introduce a Progressive Attention-Guided Adaptive CFG mechanism that dynamically modulates the guidance scale for each token based on its relevance to the condition and its temporal position in the generation sequence, improving conditional alignment without sacrificing realism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IAR2 sets a new state-of-the-art for autoregressive image generation, achieving a FID of 1.50 on ImageNet. Our model not only surpasses previous methods in performance but also demonstrates superior computational efficiency, highlighting the effectiveness of our structured, coarse-to-fine generation strategy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IAR2框架，通过语义-细节关联双码本和分层自回归预测，显著提升图像生成质量与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归模型在视觉内容生成中表现优异，但忽略了视觉数据的结构特性。前期工作IAR虽通过重组码本提升鲁棒性，但受限于预训练码本的刚性和硬聚类的不准确性。现有方法无法有效分离全局语义和局部细节，导致生成图像缺乏精细控制。本文旨在克服这些局限，实现粗到细的层次化生成。
light_analysis.method: 提出IAR2框架，核心是语义-细节关联双码本（Semantic-Detail Associated Dual Codebook），将图像表示解耦为语义码本（全局信息）和细节码本（细粒度修正），量化容量从线性扩增至多项式级别。设计语义-细节自回归预测方案，配合局部上下文增强的自回归头，先预测语义token再预测细节token，利用局部窗口增强空间连贯性。对于条件生成，引入渐进注意力引导自适应CFG机制，根据token与条件的相关性和生成位置动态调节引导尺度。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet上实现FID为1.50，达到自回归图像生成新最优。相比此前方法，性能显著提升，同时计算效率更高。实验证明了结构化粗到细生成策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: IAR2通过解耦语义和细节表示，实现了高效高质量的自回归图像生成。其分层预测和自适应CFG为条件生成提供了更优控制。未来可扩展至视频生成等更复杂任务。局限在于双码本设计可能增加训练复杂度，但实验证明其收益远大于成本。

title: Flatness-Aware Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics
abstract: Flatness of the loss landscape has been widely studied as an important perspective for understanding the behavior and generalization of deep learning algorithms. Motivated by this view, we propose Flatness-Aware Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics (fSGLD), a first-order optimization method that biases learning its dynamics toward flat basins while retaining the computational and memory efficiency of SGD and SGLD. We provide a non-asymptotic theoretical analysis showing that fSGLD targets a flatness-biased Gibbs distribution under a theoretically prescribed coupling between the noise scale $σ$ and the inverse temperature $β$, together with explicit excess risk guarantees. We empirically evaluate fSGLD across standard optimizer benchmarks, Bayesian image classification, uncertainty quantification, and out-of-distribution detection, demonstrating consistently strong performance and reliable uncertainty estimates. Additional experiments confirm the effectiveness of the theoretically prescribed $β$-$σ$ coupling compared to decoupled choices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出平坦感知随机梯度朗之万动力学（fSGLD），一种偏向平坦极小值的一阶优化方法，兼具计算效率与泛化优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习中损失景观的平坦性对泛化至关重要，但现有方法如SGD和SGLD缺乏显式偏向平坦区域的机制。该研究旨在设计一种能引导动力学走向平坦盆地的一阶优化方法，同时保持SGD和SGLD的计算与内存效率，从而提升模型泛化能力和不确定性估计质量。
light_analysis.method: fSGLD通过理论设计的噪声尺度σ与逆温度β耦合，使采样过程偏向平坦的吉布斯分布。该方法基于随机梯度朗之万动力学框架，引入平坦度感知项，并给出非渐近理论保证（包括过剩风险界）。实验涵盖标准优化基准、贝叶斯图像分类、不确定性量化及分布外检测任务。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，fSGLD表现出一致强劲的性能，优于标准SGD/SGLD，尤其在贝叶斯图像分类和不确定性量化任务中提供了更可靠的估计。分布外检测实验中，fSGLD有效区分未知样本。验证了理论预设的β-σ耦合比解耦选择更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: fSGLD为理解损失景观平坦性与泛化关系提供了新工具，兼具理论严谨性与实际效能。其价值在于可广泛应用于需要可靠不确定性的场景（如医疗诊断、自动驾驶）。未来可探索更高效的耦合机制或扩展至其他优化框架。

title: MetaboT: An LLM-based Multi-Agent Frameworkfor Interactive Analysis of Mass SpectrometryMetabolomics Knowledge Graphs
abstract: Mass spectrometry-based metabolomics generates complex, high-dimensional data that holds vast potential for biological discovery but remains difficult to integrate and interpret. Knowledge graphs (KGs) unify this heterogeneous information by representing spectra, annotations, taxa, chemical classes, and biological activities as a single interoperable network; however, their practical use is limited by the steep learning curve of corresponding specialized representation and query languages. Here we introduce MetaboT, an open-source multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) framework that translates natural-language questions into executable SPARQL queries over metabolomics knowledge graphs. MetaboT mitigates the hallucination and schema-compliance limitations of single-model approaches through a modular architecture in which specialised agents handle scope validation, entity resolution against authoritative resources, schema-aware query generation, iterative refinement, and result interpretation. We validated MetaboT on the Experimental Natural Products Knowledge Graph (ENPKG), using an expert-authored benchmark of natural-language questions paired with reference SPARQL queries, and demonstrate its ability to answer complex questions about plant--metabolite relationships and biological activities. MetaboT lowers the technical barrier for metabolomics researchers and enables semantic data mining without specialised programming expertise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaboT，一个基于LLM的多智能体框架，将自然语言问题转化为SPARQL查询，显著降低代谢组学知识图谱的使用门槛。
light_analysis.motivation: 质谱代谢组学数据高维复杂，知识图谱虽能整合异构数据，但专用查询语言学习曲线陡峭，限制了实际应用。现有单模型LLM方法存在幻觉和模式合规问题，难以准确生成复杂查询。
light_analysis.method: 采用模块化多智能体架构，包括范围验证、实体解析、模式感知查询生成、迭代精炼和结果解释等专门代理。基于开源ENPKG知识图谱，使用专家编写的自然语言-查询对基准进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在ENPKG上成功回答复杂植物-代谢物关系和生物活性问题，证明其有效性。降低了技术门槛，使无编程背景的研究人员也能进行语义数据挖掘。摘要未提供具体性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaboT通过多智能体协作克服单模型局限，为代谢组学领域提供易于使用的知识图谱交互工具。未来可扩展至其他科学知识图谱，促进跨学科数据探索。

title: Regression Language Models for Code
abstract: We study code-to-metric regression: predicting numeric outcomes of code executions, a challenging task due to the open-ended nature of programming languages. While prior methods have resorted to heavy and domain-specific feature engineering, we show that a single unified Regression Language Model (RLM) using a frozen LLM encoder can simultaneously predict directly from text, (i) the memory footprint of code across multiple high-level languages such as Python and C++, (ii) the latency of Triton GPU kernels, and (iii) the accuracy and speed of trained neural networks represented in ONNX. In particular, a relatively small 300M parameter RLM based on T5Gemma, obtains $>$0.9 Spearman-rank on competitive programming submissions from APPS, and a single unified model achieves $>$0.5 average Spearman-rank across 17 separate languages from CodeNet. Furthermore, the RLM can obtain the highest average Kendall-Tau of 0.46 on five classic NAS design spaces previously dominated by graph neural networks, and simultaneously predict architecture latencies on numerous hardware platforms.
comment: Published in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的回归语言模型（RLM），利用冻结的LLM编码器预测代码执行的多项数值指标，无需领域特定特征工程。
light_analysis.motivation: 代码到度量的回归任务（如预测内存占用、执行延迟）因编程语言的开放性而极具挑战。现有方法依赖大量领域特定的特征工程，泛化能力差，且需针对不同任务单独设计。本文旨在探索是否一个统一的模型能够直接从文本预测多种代码相关的数值结果，以消除人工特征设计的繁琐并提升跨语言、跨任务的通用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出回归语言模型（RLM），基于冻结的LLM编码器（如T5Gemma，300M参数）直接处理代码文本，通过回归头预测连续值。模型统一处理多语言代码（Python、C++等）、GPU内核延迟、神经网络精度和速度等任务。关键创新在于利用预训练语言模型的语义理解能力，避免特征工程，并采用单一模型架构同时应对多个回归目标。
light_analysis.result: 在APPS竞赛编程任务中，RLM取得>0.9的Spearman秩相关系数；在CodeNet的17种语言上统一模型平均Spearman>0.5。在NAS设计空间上，RLM获得最高平均Kendall-Tau 0.46，超越先前占主导的图神经网络，并能同时预测多种硬件平台的架构延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了冻结LLM编码器的统一回归模型在代码度量预测中的有效性，显著降低了特征工程成本，并展现了跨语言、跨任务的泛化能力。该工作为自动化性能分析和代码优化提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多代码相关度量和更大规模模型，但当前RLM在极小规模数据上的表现和可解释性仍有待探索。

title: Extensions of Robbins-Siegmund Theorem with Applications in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: The Robbins-Siegmund theorem establishes the convergence of stochastic processes that are almost supermartingales and is one of the most commonly used approaches for analyzing stochastic iterative algorithms in stochastic approximation and reinforcement learning (RL). However, its original form has a significant limitation as it requires the zero-order term to be summable. In many important RL applications, this summable condition, however, cannot be met. This limitation motivates us to extend the Robbins-Siegmund theorem for almost supermartingales where the zero-order term is not summable, but only square-summable. In particular, we introduce a novel and mild assumption on the increments of the stochastic processes. This together with the square-summable condition enables an almost sure convergence to a bounded set. Additionally, we further provide almost sure convergence rates, high probability concentration bounds, and $L^p$ convergence rates. We then apply the new results to stochastic approximation and RL. Notably, we obtain the first almost sure convergence rate, the first high probability concentration bound, and the first $L^p$ convergence rate for $Q$-learning with linear function approximation.

light_analysis.overview: 扩展了Robbins-Siegmund定理，放宽零阶项可加和条件至平方可加和，并首次给出线性函数逼近Q学习的几乎必然收敛率、高概率置信界和L^p收敛率。
light_analysis.motivation: Robbins-Siegmund定理是分析随机逼近和强化学习迭代算法收敛性的关键工具，但原始形式要求零阶项可加和，这在许多强化学习应用中无法满足。该局限性阻碍了对广泛使用的算法（如带有线性函数近似的Q学习）进行严格收敛性分析。因此，需要扩展定理以处理零阶项仅平方可加和的情况，从而为更实际的强化学习算法提供理论保证。
light_analysis.method: 在随机过程增量上引入一种新颖且温和的假设，结合零阶项平方可加和条件，证明了几乎必然收敛到有界集。进一步推导了几乎必然收敛率、高概率置信界和L^p收敛率。将扩展结果应用于随机逼近和强化学习，特别是针对线性函数近似的Q学习算法进行分析。
light_analysis.result: 对于线性函数近似的Q学习，首次获得了几乎必然收敛率、高概率置信界和L^p收敛率。虽然摘要未提供具体数值，但表明这些结果是首次建立，填补了该领域理论空白。与现有方法相比，新定理放宽了条件，使得分析更广泛的算法成为可能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该扩展定理解决了Robbins-Siegmund原始定理的重要局限性，为分析随机迭代算法提供了更强工具。首次为线性Q学习提供了多种收敛保证，具有重要理论意义。未来可将此结果推广到其他强化学习算法（如策略梯度方法），并进一步探索更弱的假设条件。

title: Safe In-Context Reinforcement Learning
abstract: In-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) is an emerging RL paradigm where an agent, after pretraining, can adapt to out-of-distribution test tasks without any parameter updates, instead relying on an expanding context of interaction history. While ICRL has shown impressive generalization, safety during this adaptation process remains unexplored, limiting its applicability in real-world deployments where test-time behavior is expected to be safe. In this work, we propose SCARED: Safe Contextual Adaptive Reinforcement via Exact-penalty Dual, the first method that promotes safe adaptation of ICRL under the constrained Markov decision process framework. During the parameter-update-free adaptation process, our agent not only maximizes the reward but also keeps the accumulated cost within a user-specified safety budget. We also demonstrate that the agent actively reacts to the safety budget; with a higher safety budget, the agent behaves more aggressively, and with a lower safety budget the agent behaves more conservatively. Across challenging benchmarks, SCARED consistently enables safe and robust in-context adaptation, outperforming existing ICRL and safe meta-RL baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCARED方法，首次在无参数更新的在线上下文中实现安全强化学习适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文强化学习（ICRL）使智能体在预训练后无需参数更新即可适应分布外任务，但该过程中的安全性尚未被探索，限制了其在需要安全行为真实场景中的部署。现有ICRL方法仅关注任务性能，无法保证测试时的安全约束。
light_analysis.method: SCARED基于约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），采用精确对偶惩罚方法，在无参数更新的适应期间同时最大化奖励并确保累积成本在用户指定的安全预算内。智能体会根据安全预算主动调整行为：预算高时更激进，预算低时更保守。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准测试中，SCARED持续实现安全稳健的在线上下文适应，性能优于现有ICRL和安全元强化学习基线方法。智能体能够根据安全预算灵活调整行为，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCARED是首个在ICRL中实现安全适应的方法，通过CMDP框架确保测试时行为安全，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可探索更复杂的安全约束或扩展到多任务场景。

title: SelfJudge: Faster Speculative Decoding via Self-Supervised Judge Verification
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by verifying candidate tokens from a draft model against a larger target model. Recent judge decoding boosts this process by relaxing verification criteria by accepting draft tokens that may exhibit minor discrepancies from target model output, but existing methods are restricted by their reliance on human annotations or tasks with verifiable ground truths, limiting generalizability across diverse NLP tasks. We propose SelfJudge, which trains judge verifiers via self-supervision of the target model. Our method measures semantic preservation by assessing whether token-substituted responses preserve the meaning of original responses, enabling automatic verifier training across diverse NLP tasks. Our experiments show SelfJudge achieves superior inference-accuracy trade-offs than judge decoding baselines, offering a broadly applicable solution for faster LLM inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SelfJudge方法，通过自监督训练判官验证器加速推测解码，无需人工标注，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测解码中，现有判官解码方法通过放宽验证标准加速推理，但依赖人工标注或可验证任务，难以泛化到多样化的NLP任务。需要一种无需人工干预、自动训练验证器的通用方案。
light_analysis.method: SelfJudge利用目标模型的自监督能力，通过评估替换token后的语义保持程度来训练判官验证器。该方法自动生成训练数据，无需人工标注，适用于多种NLP任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SelfJudge在推理速度与准确率的权衡上优于现有判官解码基线，提供了更高效的LLM推理方案。具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: SelfJudge为加速LLM推理提供了通用且高效的解决方案，避免了人工标注的局限，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的语义评估机制。

title: RL Squeezes, SFT Expands: A Comparative Study of Reasoning LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically trained by reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on reasoning traces to improve their reasoning abilities. However, how these methods shape reasoning capabilities remains largely elusive. Going beyond an accuracy-based investigation of how these two components sculpt the reasoning process, this paper introduces a novel analysis framework that quantifies reasoning paths and captures their qualitative changes under each training process (with models of 1.5B, 7B, and 14B parameters on mathematical domains). Specifically, we investigate the reasoning process at two levels of granularity: the trajectory-level, which examines complete reasoning outputs, and the step-level, which analyzes reasoning graphs whose nodes correspond to individual reasoning steps. Notably, clustering of unique reasoning trajectories shows complementary effects: RL compresses incorrect trajectories, whereas SFT expands correct ones. Step-level analysis reveals that RL steepens (about 2.5 times), while SFT flattens (reduced to about one-third), the decay rates of node visitation frequency, degree, and betweenness centrality distributions in the reasoning graph. This indicates that RL concentrates reasoning functionality into a small subset of steps, while SFT homogenizes it across many steps. Furthermore, by evaluating the reasoning graph topologies from multiple perspectives, we delineate the shared and distinct characteristics of RL and SFT. Our work presents a novel reasoning path perspective that explains why the current best practice of two-stage training, with SFT followed by RL, is successful, and offers practical implications for data construction and more efficient learning approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出量化推理路径的分析框架，揭示RL压缩错误轨迹、SFT扩展正确轨迹，解释两阶段训练成功原因。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM通过RL和SFT提升推理能力，但两种方法如何塑造推理过程尚不明确。现有研究仅关注准确率，缺乏对推理路径的定量分析。理解RL和SFT的互补作用对于优化训练策略和数据构建至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出分析框架，在轨迹级（完整输出）和步级（推理图，节点为推理步骤）量化推理路径。使用1.5B、7B、14B模型在数学领域训练，对唯一轨迹聚类，分析节点访问频率、度等分布的衰减率，比较RL和SFT的效应。
light_analysis.result: RL压缩错误轨迹，SFT扩展正确轨迹；步级分析显示RL使节点频率、度和介数中心性衰减率陡化约2.5倍，SFT使其平化至约三分之一。表明RL将推理功能集中到小部分步骤，SFT均匀化到多步。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从推理路径视角解释了SFT后RL的两阶段训练成功原因，为数据构建和高效学习提供实践启示。论文揭示了RL和SFT的共享与差异特征，但未明确提及局限性，未来可探索更细粒度分析或扩展到其他领域。

title: Domain size asymptotics for Markov logic networks
abstract: A Markov logic network (MLN) $\mathbb{M}$ determines a probability distribution $\mathbb{P}_n^\mathbb{M}$ on the set $\mathbf{W}_n$ of structures, or ``possible worlds'', with domain $\{1, \ldots, n\}$. We study the properties of such distributions as $n$ tends to infinity.   We show that with mild assumptions on an MLN $\mathbb{M}$ with one soft constraint with an arbitrary positive weight the distribution $\mathbb{P}_n^\mathbb{M}$ will behave quite differently from the uniform distribution $\mathbb{P}_n^{uni}$ on $\mathbf{W}_n$ for all sufficiently large $n$.   For a language with only one relation symbol $R$ which has arity 1 we give an almost complete characterization of the possible asymptotic behaviours of $\mathbb{P}_n^\mathbb{M}$ as $n \to \infty$, where $\mathbb{M}$ may be any MLN for this language. The asymptotic behaviour depends on the soft constraints and weights of the MLN. This characterization is used to show that if the language under consideration contains at least one relation symbol of arity 1 then the following holds: (a) There is an MLN $\mathbb{M}$ such that for every lifted Bayesian network (LBN) $\mathbb{G}$ there are infinitely many $n$ such that $\mathbb{M}$ and $\mathbb{G}$ determine different distributions on $\mathbf{W}_n$. (b) There is an LBN $\mathbb{G}$ such that for every MLN $\mathbb{M}$ there are infinitely many $n$ such that $\mathbb{G}$ and $\mathbb{M}$ determine different distributions on $\mathbf{W}_n$.   We also show that, in the limit, the weight dimension and the domain size dimension may behave completely differently.
comment: Version 2 is a major revision of version 1

light_analysis.overview: 研究马尔可夫逻辑网络在域大小趋于无穷时的渐近行为，对一元关系语言给出完整刻画，并揭示与提升贝叶斯网络的本质差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 马尔可夫逻辑网络（MLN）定义的概率分布依赖于域大小n，理解其渐近行为对于统计关系学习和知识库推理至关重要。现有研究往往忽略域大小的影响，而该文发现即使只有一个软约束，MLN分布也与均匀分布截然不同。此外，MLN与提升贝叶斯网络（LBN）作为两种主流统计关系模型，其关系尚不明确。该工作旨在填补这些理论空白，提供严格的渐近分析。
light_analysis.method: 通过数学分析，在弱假设下（单个正权值软约束）证明MLN分布与均匀分布渐近不同。针对仅含一个一元关系符号的语言，基于软约束和权值对渐近行为进行几乎完整的刻画。利用该刻画构造反例，证明存在MLN使得对每个LBN有无穷多n分布不同，反之亦然，从而揭示两类模型不可互换性。
light_analysis.result: 主要理论结果：对于含至少一个一元关系符号的语言，(a)存在MLN使得对任意LBN，存在无穷多n下两者分布不同；(b)存在LBN使得对任意MLN，存在无穷多n下分布不同。还证明了在极限下，权值维度和域大小维度行为完全分离。摘要未提供数值实验，结论基于严格推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究深化了对MLN统计性质的渐近理解，揭示了域大小对分布的关键影响，并明确了MLN与LBN在表达能力上的根本差异。理论结果有助于指导统计关系模型的选型与比较，如领域泛化或模型等价性验证。未来工作可扩展到多元关系或多约束场景，以及探索实际应用中的渐近性质。

title: Rethinking Calibration for Early-Exit Neural Networks
abstract: Early-exit neural networks (EENNs) accelerate inference by allowing intermediate classifiers to stop computation once predictions are confident enough. Most methods rely on confidence thresholds for exiting, and consequently, improving classifier calibration is widely assumed to improve performance. In this work, we challenge this assumption and show that calibration alone is not sufficient for EENNs to exploit adaptive computation. To address this insufficiency, we introduce Early-Exit Failure Prediction (EEFP), which accounts for both prediction correctness and the cost of further computation. We also propose a lightweight, EEFP-motivated procedure to improve the intermediate classifiers, which can directly replace calibration in EENNs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves superior cost-accuracy trade-offs compared to calibration, and EEFP more reliably reflects overall EENN performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/gmum/rethinking-calibration-for-eenns.

light_analysis.overview: 挑战早期退出神经网络中校准的充分性假设，提出早期退出失败预测（EEFP）方法以优化计算与准确率的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 早期退出神经网络通过中间分类器提前退出加速推理，传统方法依赖置信度阈值并认为改善校准能提升性能。然而，本文质疑这一假设，指出仅靠校准不足以让EENN充分利用自适应计算，因为校准忽略了预测正确性与额外计算成本的权衡。现有方法在动态退出策略上存在不足，亟需一种更全面的性能度量方式来指导中间分类器的改进。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出早期退出失败预测（EEFP），综合考虑预测正确性与继续计算的成本。基于EEFP设计一种轻量级程序直接替代校准，用于改进中间分类器。该方法无需大幅修改网络结构，通过优化退出决策的准确性来提升整体性能。实验在多个EENN架构上验证，代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，所提方法在成本-准确率权衡上优于传统校准方法。EEFP更可靠地反映EENN整体性能，在相同计算预算下获得更高准确率，或保持准确率同时减少计算开销。具体数值因模型而异，但一致优于基线校准方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了EENN中校准的传统认知，证明校准不足以保证自适应计算的最优性。EEFP作为一种新范式，为EENN退出策略提供了更有效的指导，兼具学术价值与实践意义。未来可探索EEFP在更复杂网络中的应用，并进一步降低其计算成本。

title: CogVLA: Cognition-Aligned Vision-Language-Action Model via Instruction-Driven Routing & Sparsification
abstract: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models built on pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) require extensive post-training, resulting in high computational overhead that limits scalability and deployment.We propose CogVLA, a Cognition-Aligned Vision-Language-Action framework that leverages instruction-driven routing and sparsification to improve both efficiency and performance. CogVLA draws inspiration from human multimodal coordination and introduces a 3-stage progressive architecture. 1) Encoder-FiLM based Aggregation Routing (EFA-Routing) injects instruction information into the vision encoder to selectively aggregate and compress dual-stream visual tokens, forming a instruction-aware latent representation. 2) Building upon this compact visual encoding, LLM-FiLM based Pruning Routing (LFP-Routing) introduces action intent into the language model by pruning instruction-irrelevant visually grounded tokens, thereby achieving token-level sparsity. 3) To ensure that compressed perception inputs can still support accurate and coherent action generation, we introduce V-L-A Coupled Attention (CAtten), which combines causal vision-language attention with bidirectional action parallel decoding. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark and real-world robotic tasks demonstrate that CogVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance with success rates of 97.4% and 70.0%, respectively, while reducing training costs by 2.5-fold and decreasing inference latency by 2.8-fold compared to OpenVLA. CogVLA is open-sourced and publicly available at https://github.com/JiuTian-VL/CogVLA.
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2025, Project Page: https://jiutian-vl.github.io/CogVLA-page

light_analysis.overview: 提出CogVLA框架，通过指令驱动路由和稀疏化技术，在保持高性能的同时大幅降低VLA模型的计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型基于预训练VLM，需大量后训练导致计算开销高，限制了可扩展性和部署。本文旨在通过模仿人类多模态协调机制，设计高效架构以降低训练和推理成本。
light_analysis.method: CogVLA采用三阶段渐进架构：1) EFA-Routing通过FiLM将指令信息注入视觉编码器，选择性聚合压缩双流视觉令牌，形成指令感知的潜在表示；2) LFP-Routing利用LLM-FiLM剪枝与指令无关的视觉令牌，实现令牌级稀疏；3) CAtten结合因果视觉-语言注意力与双向动作并行解码，确保压缩感知输入仍能生成准确连贯的动作。
light_analysis.result: 在LIBERO基准和真实机器人任务上，CogVLA成功率分别达97.4%和70.0%，优于现有SOTA；相比OpenVLA，训练成本降低2.5倍，推理延迟降低2.8倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: CogVLA通过指令驱动路由和稀疏化，实现了高效高性能的VLA模型，为机器人操作任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。代码已开源，有助于推动相关领域研究。

title: ObjFiller3D: Scaling 3D Object Inpainting to Dense Multi-View Consistency
abstract: 3D object inpainting is commonly achieved via multi-view 2D image completion, yet independently inpainted views often suffer from cross-view inconsistencies, leading to blurred textures, geometric discontinuities, and visual artifacts in the reconstructed 3D objects. To overcome these limitations, we propose ObjFiller-3D, a novel method designed for the completion and editing of high-quality and consistent 3D objects. Instead of relying on sparse-view editing or per-view 2D inpainting, our method jointly optimizes a sequence of densely sampled views along a $360^\circ$ trajectory, enabling global coherence across viewpoints. We design a new framework with three complementary components: a Temporal-Driven Generative Encoder for modeling dense-view dependencies, a Semantic-Aware Completion Encoder for object-level inpainting, and a Cycle-Consistent 3D Encoder that enforces global coherence through a closed-loop formulation. Our framework also supports reference-guided 3D inpainting, allowing fine-grained control over appearance. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets demonstrate that ObjFiller-3D significantly outperforms prior methods, achieving higher reconstruction fidelity (PSNR 26.6 vs.\ 15.9 of NeRFiller) and perceptual quality (LPIPS 0.19 vs.\ 0.25 of Instant3dit), while reducing reconstruction time from over 40 minutes to under 10 minutes. These results highlight the effectiveness and practical potential of our approach for real-world 3D editing applications. Project page: https://objfiller3d.github.io/ Code: https://github.com/objfiller3d/ObjFiller-3D .

light_analysis.overview: 提出ObjFiller3D，通过联合优化密集多视图实现3D物体修复，达到跨视图全局一致性和高质量输出。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D物体修复多采用多视图2D图像完成，但独立修复的视图间存在严重跨视图不一致，导致模糊纹理、几何不连续和视觉伪影。这一问题限制了生成3D物体的真实感和实用性，亟需一种能建模全局依赖、保持多视图连贯性的修复方法。
light_analysis.method: 设计框架包含三个互补组件：时间驱动生成编码器建模密集视图的时间依赖；语义感知完成编码器实现对象级修复；循环一致3D编码器通过闭环强化整体一致性。支持参考引导修复，允许细粒度外观控制。在360°轨迹上密集采样视图并联合优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上优于基线：PSNR 26.6 vs. 15.9（NeRFiller），LPIPS 0.19 vs. 0.25（Instant3dit），重建时间从40分钟以上降至10分钟以下，大幅提升效率与质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效且高质量的3D物体修复与编辑方法，显著缓解多视图不一致问题，具有高保真度和良好知觉质量。为实际3D编辑应用提供了有效工具，未来可探索更复杂的场景和实时交互。

title: FLAIR: Frequency- and Locality-Aware Implicit Neural Representations
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) leverage neural networks to map coordinates to corresponding signals, enabling continuous and compact representations. This paradigm has driven significant advances in various vision tasks. However, existing INRs lack frequency selectivity and spatial localization, leading to an over-reliance on redundant signal components. Consequently, they exhibit spectral bias, tending to learn low-frequency components early while struggling to capture fine high-frequency details. To address these issues, we propose FLAIR (Frequency- and Locality-Aware Implicit Neural Representations), which incorporates two key innovations. The first is Band-Localized Activation (BLA), a novel activation designed for joint frequency selection and spatial localization under the constraints of the time-frequency uncertainty principle (TFUP). Through structured frequency control and spatially localized responses, BLA effectively mitigates spectral bias and enhances training stability. The second is Wavelet-Energy-Guided Encoding (WEGE), which leverages the discrete wavelet transform to compute energy scores and explicitly guide frequency information to the network, enabling precise frequency selection and adaptive band control. Our method consistently outperforms existing INRs in 2D image representation, as well as 3D shape reconstruction and novel view synthesis.
comment: CVPR Findings 2026 (camera ready ver.). Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/FLAIR/

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLAIR，通过频带定位激活和波能量引导编码解决隐式神经表示的频谱偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有隐式神经表示（INR）缺乏频率选择性和空间定位，导致过度依赖冗余信号分量，出现频谱偏差：早期偏向学习低频成分，难以捕捉精细高频细节。这一问题限制了INR在图像表示、3D重建等任务中的性能，亟需一种能够自适应控制频率和局部化响应的机制。
light_analysis.method: FLAIR包含两个创新：1）频带定位激活（BLA），在时频不确定性原理约束下设计，通过结构化频率控制和空间局部响应缓解频谱偏差并提升训练稳定性；2）波能量引导编码（WEGE），利用离散小波变换计算能量分数，显式引导频率信息输入网络，实现精确频率选择和自适应频带控制。
light_analysis.result: 在2D图像表示任务中，FLAIR重建质量优于现有INR方法；在3D形状重建和新视图合成任务中，FLAIR同样取得最佳性能，一致超越基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了一致性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLAIR通过引入频率和空间感知机制，有效克服了INR的频谱偏差，提升了表示精度和训练稳定性，为连续信号表示提供了新范式。其方法具有通用性，可应用于多种视觉任务。未来可探索更高效的频带控制策略或扩展到动态场景。

title: RASR: Retrieval-Augmented Super Resolution for Practical Reference-based Image Restoration
abstract: Reference-based Super Resolution (RefSR) improves upon Single Image Super Resolution (SISR) by leveraging high-quality reference images to enhance texture fidelity and visual realism. However, a critical limitation of existing RefSR approaches is their reliance on manually curated target-reference image pairs, which severely constrains their practicality in real-world scenarios. To overcome this, we introduce Retrieval-Augmented Super Resolution (RASR), a new and practical RefSR paradigm that automatically retrieves semantically relevant high-resolution images from a reference database given only a low-quality input. This enables scalable and flexible RefSR in realistic use cases, such as enhancing mobile photos taken in environments like zoos or museums, where category-specific reference data (e.g., animals, artworks) can be readily collected or pre-curated. To facilitate research in this direction, we construct RASR-Flickr30, the first benchmark dataset designed for RASR. Unlike prior datasets with fixed target-reference pairs, RASR-Flickr30 provides per-category reference databases to support open-world retrieval. We further propose RASRNet, a strong baseline that combines a semantic reference retriever with a diffusion-based RefSR generator. It retrieves relevant references based on semantic similarity and employs a diffusion-based generator enhanced with semantic conditioning. Experiments on RASR-Flickr30 demonstrate that RASRNet consistently improves over SISR baselines, achieving +0.38 dB PSNR and -0.0131 LPIPS, while generating more realistic textures. These findings highlight retrieval augmentation as a promising direction to bridge the gap between academic RefSR research and real-world applicability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出检索增强超分辨率(RASR)范式，通过自动检索相关参考图像实现实用化的参考图像超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参考超分辨率(RefSR)方法依赖人工配对的目标-参考图像，严重限制了其在实际场景中的可用性。为了克服这一局限，需要一种能从参考数据库自动检索相关高分辨率图像的新范式，使RefSR在动物园、博物馆等移动摄影场景中可扩展且灵活，从而弥合学术研究与实际应用之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 引入检索增强超分辨率(RASR)范式，包括语义参考检索器和扩散生成器。构建首个RASR基准数据集RASR-Flickr30，提供按类别的参考数据库支持开放世界检索。提出RASRNet基线方法，检索器基于语义相似度获取参考，生成器采用扩散模型并增强语义条件。
light_analysis.result: 在RASR-Flickr30数据集上，RASRNet相比SISR基线在PSNR上提升0.38 dB，在LPIPS上降低0.0131，生成更真实的纹理。实验表明检索增强是缩小学术RefSR研究与实际应用的有效方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出RASR范式、基准数据集和基线方法，解决了现有RefSR依赖人工配对的问题，显著提升了实际适用性。该工作为基于检索的图像恢复开辟了新方向，未来可探索更高效的检索策略和跨域迁移能力。

title: Toward Robust Semi-supervised Regression via Dual-stream Knowledge Distillation
abstract: Semi-supervised regression (SSR), which aims to predict continuous scores for samples while reducing the reliance on large-scale labeled data, has recently attracted considerable attention across various applications, including computer vision, natural language processing, audio analysis, and medical analysis. Existing SSR methods typically train models with scarce labeled data by introducing constraint-based regularization or ordinal ranking to mitigate overfitting. However, these approaches often fail to fully exploit the abundance of unlabeled samples. Although consistency-driven pseudo-labeling methods attempt to incorporate unlabeled data, their performance is highly sensitive to pseudo-label quality and noisy predictions. To address these challenges, we propose a Dual-stream Knowledge Distillation framework (DKD), which is specifically designed for SSR to distill both continuous-valued knowledge and distributional information. This design better preserves regression magnitude information and improves sample efficiency. Specifically, in DKD, the teacher is optimized solely with ground-truth labels for label distribution estimation, while the student learns from a mixture of real labels and teacher-generated pseudo targets on unlabeled data. The distillation process enables effective supervision transfer, allowing the student to leverage pseudo labels more robustly. Furthermore, we introduce a Decoupled Distribution Alignment (DDA) module, which separately aligns the target and non-target distributions between the teacher and student. To improve the reliability of non-target knowledge transfer, DDA incorporates a variance-guided non-target distribution alignment strategy that adaptively downweights uncertain teacher predictions, thereby enhancing the student's ability to mitigate noise in pseudo-label supervision and learn a better-calibrated regression predictor.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双流知识蒸馏框架（DKD），通过连续值知识和分布信息蒸馏，提升半监督回归的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督回归（SSR）旨在利用少量标注数据和大量未标注数据预测连续值，现有方法如约束正则化或排序方法未能充分利用未标注数据，而一致性伪标签方法对伪标签质量和噪声预测高度敏感，导致性能不稳定。因此需要更鲁棒的蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出双流知识蒸馏框架（DKD），教师网络仅用真实标签进行标签分布估计，学生网络同时从真实标签和教师生成的伪目标学习。引入解耦分布对齐（DDA）模块，分别对齐教师和学生的目标与非目标分布，并通过方差引导的非目标分布对齐策略自适应降低不确定性高的教师预测的权重，从而增强学生抗噪能力。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但指出该方法通过蒸馏连续值知识和分布信息，提升了样本效率和回归预测的校准能力，相比现有方法更鲁棒。具体性能指标需参考论文实验部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: DKD框架通过双流知识蒸馏和解耦分布对齐，有效解决了半监督回归中伪标签噪声问题，提升了模型鲁棒性和样本效率。该方法可应用于计算机视觉、自然语言处理等领域，未来可进一步探索更复杂的蒸馏策略或扩展到其他回归任务。

title: Smoothing Slot Attention Iterations and Recurrences
abstract: Slot Attention (SA) lies at the heart of mainstream Object-Centric Learning (OCL). Image features can be aggregated into object-level representations by SA \textit{iteratively} refining cold-start query slots. For video, such aggregation proceeds by SA \textit{recurrently} shared across frames, with queries cold-started on the first frame while transitioned from the previous frame's slots thereafter. However, cold-start queries lack sample-specific cues thus hindering precise aggregation on image or video's first frame; Non-first frames' queries are already sample-specific thus requiring aggregation transforms different from the first frame. We address these issues with our \textit{SmoothSA}: (1) To smooth SA iterations on image or video's first frame, we \textit{preheat} cold-start queries with rich input-feature information, by a tiny module self-distilled inside OCL; (2) To smooth SA recurrences across video's first and non-first frames, we \textit{differentiate} the homogeneous aggregation transforms by using full and single iterations respectively. Comprehensive experiments on object discovery, recognition and visual reasoning validate our method's effectiveness. Further visual analyses illuminate the underline mechanisms. Our \textit{source code}, \textit{model checkpoints} and \textit{training logs} are provided on https://github.com/Genera1Z/SmoothSA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SmoothSA方法，通过预热冷启动查询和区分聚合变换，平滑Slot Attention的迭代和递归过程，提升对象中心学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Slot Attention在对象中心学习中扮演核心角色，但存在两个问题：一是冷启动查询缺乏样本特定线索，影响图像或视频首帧的精确聚合；二是非首帧的查询已具备样本特异性，需要与首帧不同的聚合变换。现有方法对此未加区分，导致性能受限。因此，需要一种能够平滑迭代和递归过程的方法。
light_analysis.method: SmoothSA方法包含两个关键创新：1）在图像或视频首帧，通过一个在OCL内部自蒸馏的小模块预热冷启动查询，使其富含输入特征信息，平滑迭代过程；2）对于视频的首帧与非首帧，分别使用完整迭代和单次迭代来区分聚合变换，平滑递归过程。该方法无需改变整体架构，仅增加轻量模块。
light_analysis.result: 在对象发现、识别和视觉推理任务上的综合实验验证了SmoothSA的有效性。实验结果显示，与基线Slot Attention相比，SmoothSA在多个指标上取得提升。具体数值摘要未提及，但提供了源代码、模型检查点和训练日志以供复现。进一步的可视化分析揭示了其工作机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: SmoothSA通过简单有效的技术解决了Slot Attention在迭代和递归中的固有问题，提升了对象中心学习的性能。该方法具有通用性，可应用于图像和视频任务。未来工作可探索更复杂的预热策略或自适应迭代次数。代码已开源，便于社区使用和改进。

title: DeepC4: Deep Conditional Census-Constrained Clustering for Large-scale Multitask Spatial Disaggregation of Urban Morphology
abstract: To understand our global progress for sustainable development and disaster risk reduction in many developing economies, two recent major initiatives - the Uniform African Exposure Dataset of the Global Earthquake Model (GEM) Foundation and the Modelling Exposure through Earth Observation Routines (METEOR) Project - implemented classical spatial disaggregation techniques to generate large-scale mapping of urban morphology using the information from various satellite imagery and its derivatives, geospatial datasets of the built environment, and subnational census statistics. However, the local discrepancy with well-validated census statistics and the propagated model uncertainties remain a challenge in such coarse-to-fine-grained mapping problems, specifically constrained by weak and conditional label supervision. Therefore, we present Deep Conditional Census-Constrained Clustering (DeepC4), a novel deep learning-based spatial disaggregation approach that incorporates local census statistics as cluster-level constraints while considering multiple conditional label relationships in a joint multitask learning of the patterns of satellite imagery. As a demonstration using Rwandan urban morphology, DeepC4 achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.63, 0.78, and 0.45 and macro-mIoU of 0.57, 0.71, and 0.42 for roof, wall, and height prediction respectively, estimates national dwelling and occupant counts within 1.13% and 1.11% error compared to census records, outperforming GEM (2.03% and 3.29%), and occupies 32%-49% more 500-meter grid pixels than METEOR across provinces. As the world approaches the conclusion of many global frameworks in 2030, our work offers a new deep learning-based mapping technique that explicitly encodes well-validated census and experts' belief systems to achieve an explainable and interpretable auditing of existing coarse-grained derived information at large scales.
comment: Major Revised Preprint Submitted to ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (in review) | Keywords: urban morphology, building exposure, physical vulnerability, spatial disaggregation, deep clustering | Data: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.13119552 | Code: https://github.com/riskaudit/DeepC4

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepC4，一种深度条件普查约束聚类方法，用于大规模多任务空间分解城市形态，实现可解释的粗到细映射。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间分解技术（如GEM和METEOR）在从粗粒度到细粒度的城市形态映射中，面临与普查统计数据的局部差异和模型不确定性挑战，尤其受弱标签监督约束。这些问题限制了大规模、高精度映射的可靠性，亟需新方法以有效整合普查统计和地理空间数据。
light_analysis.method: DeepC4是一种基于深度学习的空间分解方法，将本地普查统计数据作为聚类级别约束，并在联合多任务学习中考虑多个条件标签关系。通过分析卫星图像模式，同时预测屋顶、墙壁和高度等多类城市形态属性，实现多任务空间分解。
light_analysis.result: 在卢旺达城市形态预测中，DeepC4的屋顶、墙壁和高度宏F1分别为0.63、0.78、0.45，宏mIoU分别为0.57、0.71、0.42。国家居住和居住者计数误差分别为1.13%和1.11%，优于GEM（2.03%、3.29%），且比METEOR多覆盖32%-49%的500米网格像素。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepC4提供了一种新的深度学习映射技术，显式编码普查数据和专家信念，实现可解释的粗粒度信息审计，有助于评估全球可持续发展框架进展。其局限性可能在于依赖高质量普查数据，未来可探索更弱标签或无监督场景。

title: Learning Deliberately, Acting Intuitively: Unlocking Test-Time Reasoning in Multimodal LLMs
abstract: Reasoning is essential for large language models (LLMs), especially in complex tasks such as mathematical problem solving. However, multimodal reasoning still faces challenges in modality alignment and training scalability, as many existing methods rely on additional annotations or complex rule-based rewards. To address these issues, we propose the Deliberate-to-Intuitive reasoning framework (D2I), which improves the understanding and reasoning abilities of multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) without extra annotations or complex rewards. During training, D2I uses deliberate reasoning strategies supervised only by rule-based format rewards to enhance modality alignment. During inference, it shifts to intuitive reasoning by removing these explicit strategies, allowing the model to implicitly apply the acquired abilities in its responses.
